searchText: genesis 1:1 in the beginning god created the heaven and the earth.
english: In the beginning God created the heaven and the earth.

searchText: genesis 1:2 now the earth was unformed and void, and darkness was upon the face of the deep; and the spirit of god hovered over the face of the waters.
english: Now the earth was unformed and void, and darkness was upon the face of the deep; and the spirit of God hovered over the face of the waters.

searchText: genesis 1:3 and god said: ‘let there be light.’ and there was light.
english: And God said: ‘Let there be light.’ And there was light.

searchText: genesis 1:4 and god saw the light, that it was good; and god divided the light from the darkness.
english: And God saw the light, that it was good; and God divided the light from the darkness.

searchText: genesis 1:5 and god called the light day, and the darkness he called night. and there was evening and there was morning, one day.
english: And God called the light Day, and the darkness He called Night. And there was evening and there was morning, one day.

searchText: genesis 1:6 and god said: ‘let there be a firmament in the midst of the waters, and let it divide the waters from the waters.’
english: And God said: ‘Let there be a firmament in the midst of the waters, and let it divide the waters from the waters.’

searchText: genesis 1:7 and god made the firmament, and divided the waters which were under the firmament from the waters which were above the firmament; and it was so.
english: And God made the firmament, and divided the waters which were under the firmament from the waters which were above the firmament; and it was so.

searchText: genesis 1:8 and god called the firmament heaven. and there was evening and there was morning, a second day.
english: And God called the firmament Heaven. And there was evening and there was morning, a second day.

searchText: genesis 1:9 and god said: ‘let the waters under the heaven be gathered together unto one place, and let the dry land appear.’ and it was so.
english: And God said: ‘Let the waters under the heaven be gathered together unto one place, and let the dry land appear.’ And it was so.

searchText: genesis 1:10 and god called the dry land earth, and the gathering together of the waters called he seas; and god saw that it was good.
english: And God called the dry land Earth, and the gathering together of the waters called He Seas; and God saw that it was good.

searchText: genesis 1:11 and god said: ‘let the earth put forth grass, herb yielding seed, and fruit-tree bearing fruit after its kind, wherein is the seed thereof, upon the earth.’ and it was so.
english: And God said: ‘Let the earth put forth grass, herb yielding seed, and fruit-tree bearing fruit after its kind, wherein is the seed thereof, upon the earth.’ And it was so.

searchText: genesis 1:12 and the earth brought forth grass, herb yielding seed after its kind, and tree bearing fruit, wherein is the seed thereof, after its kind; and god saw that it was good.
english: And the earth brought forth grass, herb yielding seed after its kind, and tree bearing fruit, wherein is the seed thereof, after its kind; and God saw that it was good.

searchText: genesis 1:13 and there was evening and there was morning, a third day.
english: And there was evening and there was morning, a third day.

searchText: genesis 1:14 and god said: ‘let there be lights in the firmament of the heaven to divide the day from the night; and let them be for signs, and for seasons, and for days and years;
english: And God said: ‘Let there be lights in the firmament of the heaven to divide the day from the night; and let them be for signs, and for seasons, and for days and years;

searchText: genesis 1:15 and let them be for lights in the firmament of the heaven to give light upon the earth.’ and it was so.
english: and let them be for lights in the firmament of the heaven to give light upon the earth.’ And it was so.

searchText: genesis 1:16 and god made the two great lights: the greater light to rule the day, and the lesser light to rule the night; and the stars.
english: And God made the two great lights: the greater light to rule the day, and the lesser light to rule the night; and the stars.

searchText: genesis 1:17 and god set them in the firmament of the heaven to give light upon the earth,
english: And God set them in the firmament of the heaven to give light upon the earth,

searchText: genesis 1:18 and to rule over the day and over the night, and to divide the light from the darkness; and god saw that it was good.
english: and to rule over the day and over the night, and to divide the light from the darkness; and God saw that it was good.

searchText: genesis 1:19 and there was evening and there was morning, a fourth day.
english: And there was evening and there was morning, a fourth day.

searchText: genesis 1:20 and god said: ‘let the waters swarm with swarms of living creatures, and let fowl fly above the earth in the open firmament of heaven.’
english: And God said: ‘Let the waters swarm with swarms of living creatures, and let fowl fly above the earth in the open firmament of heaven.’

searchText: genesis 1:21 and god created the great sea-monsters, and every living creature that creepeth, wherewith the waters swarmed, after its kind, and every winged fowl after its kind; and god saw that it was good.
english: And God created the great sea-monsters, and every living creature that creepeth, wherewith the waters swarmed, after its kind, and every winged fowl after its kind; and God saw that it was good.

searchText: genesis 1:22 and god blessed them, saying: ‘be fruitful, and multiply, and fill the waters in the seas, and let fowl multiply in the earth.’
english: And God blessed them, saying: ‘Be fruitful, and multiply, and fill the waters in the seas, and let fowl multiply in the earth.’

searchText: genesis 1:23 and there was evening and there was morning, a fifth day.
english: And there was evening and there was morning, a fifth day.

searchText: genesis 1:24 and god said: ‘let the earth bring forth the living creature after its kind, cattle, and creeping thing, and beast of the earth after its kind.’ and it was so.
english: And God said: ‘Let the earth bring forth the living creature after its kind, cattle, and creeping thing, and beast of the earth after its kind.’ And it was so.

searchText: genesis 1:25 and god made the beast of the earth after its kind, and the cattle after their kind, and every thing that creepeth upon the ground after its kind; and god saw that it was good.
english: And God made the beast of the earth after its kind, and the cattle after their kind, and every thing that creepeth upon the ground after its kind; and God saw that it was good.

searchText: genesis 1:26 and god said: ‘let us make man in our image, after our likeness; and let them have dominion over the fish of the sea, and over the fowl of the air, and over the cattle, and over all the earth, and over every creeping thing that creepeth upon the earth.’
english: And God said: ‘Let us make man in our image, after our likeness; and let them have dominion over the fish of the sea, and over the fowl of the air, and over the cattle, and over all the earth, and over every creeping thing that creepeth upon the earth.’

searchText: genesis 1:27 and god created man in his own image, in the image of god created he him; male and female created he them.
english: And God created man in His own image, in the image of God created He him; male and female created He them.

searchText: genesis 1:28 and god blessed them; and god said unto them: ‘be fruitful, and multiply, and replenish the earth, and subdue it; and have dominion over the fish of the sea, and over the fowl of the air, and over every living thing that creepeth upon the earth.’
english: And God blessed them; and God said unto them: ‘Be fruitful, and multiply, and replenish the earth, and subdue it; and have dominion over the fish of the sea, and over the fowl of the air, and over every living thing that creepeth upon the earth.’

searchText: genesis 1:29 and god said: ‘behold, i have given you every herb yielding seed, which is upon the face of all the earth, and every tree, in which is the fruit of a tree yielding seed—to you it shall be for food;
english: And God said: ‘Behold, I have given you every herb yielding seed, which is upon the face of all the earth, and every tree, in which is the fruit of a tree yielding seed—to you it shall be for food;

searchText: genesis 1:30 and to every beast of the earth, and to every fowl of the air, and to every thing that creepeth upon the earth, wherein there is a living soul, [i have given] every green herb for food.’ and it was so.
english: and to every beast of the earth, and to every fowl of the air, and to every thing that creepeth upon the earth, wherein there is a living soul, [I have given] every green herb for food.’ And it was so.

searchText: genesis 1:31 and god saw every thing that he had made, and, behold, it was very good. and there was evening and there was morning, the sixth day.
english: And God saw every thing that He had made, and, behold, it was very good. And there was evening and there was morning, the sixth day.

searchText: genesis 2:1 and the heaven and the earth were finished, and all the host of them.
english: And the heaven and the earth were finished, and all the host of them.

searchText: genesis 2:2 and on the seventh day god finished his work which he had made; and he rested on the seventh day from all his work which he had made.
english: And on the seventh day God finished His work which He had made; and He rested on the seventh day from all His work which He had made.

searchText: genesis 2:3 and god blessed the seventh day, and hallowed it; because that in it he rested from all his work which god in creating had made.
english: And God blessed the seventh day, and hallowed it; because that in it He rested from all His work which God in creating had made.

searchText: genesis 2:4 these are the generations of the heaven and of the earth when they were created, in the day that the lord god made earth and heaven.
english: These are the generations of the heaven and of the earth when they were created, in the day that the LORD God made earth and heaven.

searchText: genesis 2:5 no shrub of the field was yet in the earth, and no herb of the field had yet sprung up; for the lord god had not caused it to rain upon the earth, and there was not a man to till the ground;
english: No shrub of the field was yet in the earth, and no herb of the field had yet sprung up; for the LORD God had not caused it to rain upon the earth, and there was not a man to till the ground;

searchText: genesis 2:6 but there went up a mist from the earth, and watered the whole face of the ground.
english: but there went up a mist from the earth, and watered the whole face of the ground.

searchText: genesis 2:7 then the lord god formed man of the dust of the ground, and breathed into his nostrils the breath of life; and man became a living soul.
english: Then the LORD God formed man of the dust of the ground, and breathed into his nostrils the breath of life; and man became a living soul.

searchText: genesis 2:8 and the lord god planted a garden eastward, in eden; and there he put the man whom he had formed.
english: And the LORD God planted a garden eastward, in Eden; and there He put the man whom He had formed.

searchText: genesis 2:9 and out of the ground made the lord god to grow every tree that is pleasant to the sight, and good for food; the tree of life also in the midst of the garden, and the tree of the knowledge of good and evil.
english: And out of the ground made the LORD God to grow every tree that is pleasant to the sight, and good for food; the tree of life also in the midst of the garden, and the tree of the knowledge of good and evil.

searchText: genesis 2:10 and a river went out of eden to water the garden; and from thence it was parted, and became four heads.
english: And a river went out of Eden to water the garden; and from thence it was parted, and became four heads.

searchText: genesis 2:11 the name of the first is pishon; that is it which compasseth the whole land of havilah, where there is gold;
english: The name of the first is Pishon; that is it which compasseth the whole land of Havilah, where there is gold;

searchText: genesis 2:12 and the gold of that land is good; there is bdellium and the onyx stone.
english: and the gold of that land is good; there is bdellium and the onyx stone.

searchText: genesis 2:13 and the name of the second river is gihon; the same is it that compasseth the whole land of cush.
english: And the name of the second river is Gihon; the same is it that compasseth the whole land of Cush.

searchText: genesis 2:14 and the name of the third river is tigris; that is it which goeth toward the east of asshur. and the fourth river is the euphrates.
english: And the name of the third river is Tigris; that is it which goeth toward the east of Asshur. And the fourth river is the Euphrates.

searchText: genesis 2:15 and the lord god took the man, and put him into the garden of eden to dress it and to keep it.
english: And the LORD God took the man, and put him into the garden of Eden to dress it and to keep it.

searchText: genesis 2:16 and the lord god commanded the man, saying: ‘of every tree of the garden thou mayest freely eat;
english: And the LORD God commanded the man, saying: ‘Of every tree of the garden thou mayest freely eat;

searchText: genesis 2:17 but of the tree of the knowledge of good and evil, thou shalt not eat of it; for in the day that thou eatest thereof thou shalt surely die.’
english: but of the tree of the knowledge of good and evil, thou shalt not eat of it; for in the day that thou eatest thereof thou shalt surely die.’

searchText: genesis 2:18 and the lord god said: ‘it is not good that the man should be alone; i will make him a help meet for him.’
english: And the LORD God said: ‘It is not good that the man should be alone; I will make him a help meet for him.’

searchText: genesis 2:19 and out of the ground the lord god formed every beast of the field, and every fowl of the air; and brought them unto the man to see what he would call them; and whatsoever the man would call every living creature, that was to be the name thereof.
english: And out of the ground the LORD God formed every beast of the field, and every fowl of the air; and brought them unto the man to see what he would call them; and whatsoever the man would call every living creature, that was to be the name thereof.

searchText: genesis 2:20 and the man gave names to all cattle, and to the fowl of the air, and to every beast of the field; but for adam there was not found a help meet for him.
english: And the man gave names to all cattle, and to the fowl of the air, and to every beast of the field; but for Adam there was not found a help meet for him.

searchText: genesis 2:21 and the lord god caused a deep sleep to fall upon the man, and he slept; and he took one of his ribs, and closed up the place with flesh instead thereof.
english: And the LORD God caused a deep sleep to fall upon the man, and he slept; and He took one of his ribs, and closed up the place with flesh instead thereof.

searchText: genesis 2:22 and the rib, which the lord god had taken from the man, made he a woman, and brought her unto the man.
english: And the rib, which the LORD God had taken from the man, made He a woman, and brought her unto the man.

searchText: genesis 2:23 and the man said: ‘this is now bone of my bones, and flesh of my flesh; she shall be called woman, because she was taken out of man.’
english: And the man said: ‘This is now bone of my bones, and flesh of my flesh; she shall be called Woman, because she was taken out of Man.’

searchText: genesis 2:24 therefore shall a man leave his father and his mother, and shall cleave unto his wife, and they shall be one flesh.
english: Therefore shall a man leave his father and his mother, and shall cleave unto his wife, and they shall be one flesh.

searchText: genesis 2:25 and they were both naked, the man and his wife, and were not ashamed.
english: And they were both naked, the man and his wife, and were not ashamed.

searchText: genesis 3:1 now the serpent was more subtle than any beast of the field which the lord god had made. and he said unto the woman: ‘yea, hath god said: ye shall not eat of any tree of the garden?’
english: Now the serpent was more subtle than any beast of the field which the LORD God had made. And he said unto the woman: ‘Yea, hath God said: Ye shall not eat of any tree of the garden?’

searchText: genesis 3:2 and the woman said unto the serpent: ‘of the fruit of the trees of the garden we may eat;
english: And the woman said unto the serpent: ‘Of the fruit of the trees of the garden we may eat;

searchText: genesis 3:3 but of the fruit of the tree which is in the midst of the garden, god hath said: ye shall not eat of it, neither shall ye touch it, lest ye die.’
english: but of the fruit of the tree which is in the midst of the garden, God hath said: Ye shall not eat of it, neither shall ye touch it, lest ye die.’

searchText: genesis 3:4 and the serpent said unto the woman: ‘ye shall not surely die;
english: And the serpent said unto the woman: ‘Ye shall not surely die;

searchText: genesis 3:5 for god doth know that in the day ye eat thereof, then your eyes shall be opened, and ye shall be as god, knowing good and evil.’
english: for God doth know that in the day ye eat thereof, then your eyes shall be opened, and ye shall be as God, knowing good and evil.’

searchText: genesis 3:6 and when the woman saw that the tree was good for food, and that it was a delight to the eyes, and that the tree was to be desired to make one wise, she took of the fruit thereof, and did eat; and she gave also unto her husband with her, and he did eat.
english: And when the woman saw that the tree was good for food, and that it was a delight to the eyes, and that the tree was to be desired to make one wise, she took of the fruit thereof, and did eat; and she gave also unto her husband with her, and he did eat.

searchText: genesis 3:7 and the eyes of them both were opened, and they knew that they were naked; and they sewed fig-leaves together, and made themselves girdles.
english: And the eyes of them both were opened, and they knew that they were naked; and they sewed fig-leaves together, and made themselves girdles.

searchText: genesis 3:8 and they heard the voice of the lord god walking in the garden toward the cool of the day; and the man and his wife hid themselves from the presence of the lord god amongst the trees of the garden.
english: And they heard the voice of the LORD God walking in the garden toward the cool of the day; and the man and his wife hid themselves from the presence of the LORD God amongst the trees of the garden.

searchText: genesis 3:9 and the lord god called unto the man, and said unto him: ‘where art thou?’
english: And the LORD God called unto the man, and said unto him: ‘Where art thou?’

searchText: genesis 3:10 and he said: ‘i heard thy voice in the garden, and i was afraid, because i was naked; and i hid myself.’
english: And he said: ‘I heard Thy voice in the garden, and I was afraid, because I was naked; and I hid myself.’

searchText: genesis 3:11 and he said: ‘who told thee that thou wast naked? hast thou eaten of the tree, whereof i commanded thee that thou shouldest not eat?’
english: And He said: ‘Who told thee that thou wast naked? Hast thou eaten of the tree, whereof I commanded thee that thou shouldest not eat?’

searchText: genesis 3:12 and the man said: ‘the woman whom thou gavest to be with me, she gave me of the tree, and i did eat.’
english: And the man said: ‘The woman whom Thou gavest to be with me, she gave me of the tree, and I did eat.’

searchText: genesis 3:13 and the lord god said unto the woman: ‘what is this thou hast done?’ and the woman said: ‘the serpent beguiled me, and i did eat.’
english: And the LORD God said unto the woman: ‘What is this thou hast done?’ And the woman said: ‘The serpent beguiled me, and I did eat.’

searchText: genesis 3:14 and the lord god said unto the serpent: ‘because thou hast done this, cursed art thou from among all cattle, and from among all beasts of the field; upon thy belly shalt thou go, and dust shalt thou eat all the days of thy life.
english: And the LORD God said unto the serpent: ‘Because thou hast done this, cursed art thou from among all cattle, and from among all beasts of the field; upon thy belly shalt thou go, and dust shalt thou eat all the days of thy life.

searchText: genesis 3:15 and i will put enmity between thee and the woman, and between thy seed and her seed; they shall bruise thy head, and thou shalt bruise their heel.’
english: And I will put enmity between thee and the woman, and between thy seed and her seed; they shall bruise thy head, and thou shalt bruise their heel.’

searchText: genesis 3:16 unto the woman he said: ‘i will greatly multiply thy pain and thy travail; in pain thou shalt bring forth children; and thy desire shall be to thy husband, and he shall rule over thee.’
english: Unto the woman He said: ‘I will greatly multiply thy pain and thy travail; in pain thou shalt bring forth children; and thy desire shall be to thy husband, and he shall rule over thee.’

searchText: genesis 3:17 and unto adam he said: ‘because thou hast hearkened unto the voice of thy wife, and hast eaten of the tree, of which i commanded thee, saying: thou shalt not eat of it; cursed is the ground for thy sake; in toil shalt thou eat of it all the days of thy life.
english: And unto Adam He said: ‘Because thou hast hearkened unto the voice of thy wife, and hast eaten of the tree, of which I commanded thee, saying: Thou shalt not eat of it; cursed is the ground for thy sake; in toil shalt thou eat of it all the days of thy life.

searchText: genesis 3:18 thorns also and thistles shall it bring forth to thee; and thou shalt eat the herb of the field.
english: Thorns also and thistles shall it bring forth to thee; and thou shalt eat the herb of the field.

searchText: genesis 3:19 in the sweat of thy face shalt thou eat bread, till thou return unto the ground; for out of it wast thou taken; for dust thou art, and unto dust shalt thou return.’
english: In the sweat of thy face shalt thou eat bread, till thou return unto the ground; for out of it wast thou taken; for dust thou art, and unto dust shalt thou return.’

searchText: genesis 3:20 and the man called his wife’s name eve; because she was the mother of all living.
english: And the man called his wife’s name Eve; because she was the mother of all living.

searchText: genesis 3:21 and the lord god made for adam and for his wife garments of skins, and clothed them.
english: And the LORD God made for Adam and for his wife garments of skins, and clothed them.

searchText: genesis 3:22 and the lord god said: ‘behold, the man is become as one of us, to know good and evil; and now, lest he put forth his hand, and take also of the tree of life, and eat, and live for ever.’
english: And the LORD God said: ‘Behold, the man is become as one of us, to know good and evil; and now, lest he put forth his hand, and take also of the tree of life, and eat, and live for ever.’

searchText: genesis 3:23 therefore the lord god sent him forth from the garden of eden, to till the ground from whence he was taken.
english: Therefore the LORD God sent him forth from the garden of Eden, to till the ground from whence he was taken.

searchText: genesis 3:24 so he drove out the man; and he placed at the east of the garden of eden the cherubim, and the flaming sword which turned every way, to keep the way to the tree of life.
english: So He drove out the man; and He placed at the east of the garden of Eden the cherubim, and the flaming sword which turned every way, to keep the way to the tree of life.

searchText: genesis 4:1 and the man knew eve his wife; and she conceived and bore cain, and said: ‘i have agotten a man with the help of the lord.’
english: And the man knew Eve his wife; and she conceived and bore Cain, and said: ‘I have agotten a man with the help of the LORD.’

searchText: genesis 4:2 and again she bore his brother abel. and abel was a keeper of sheep, but cain was a tiller of the ground.
english: And again she bore his brother Abel. And Abel was a keeper of sheep, but Cain was a tiller of the ground.

searchText: genesis 4:3 and in process of time it came to pass, that cain brought of the fruit of the ground an offering unto the lord.
english: And in process of time it came to pass, that Cain brought of the fruit of the ground an offering unto the LORD.

searchText: genesis 4:4 and abel, he also brought of the firstlings of his flock and of the fat thereof. and the lord had respect unto abel and to his offering;
english: And Abel, he also brought of the firstlings of his flock and of the fat thereof. And the LORD had respect unto Abel and to his offering;

searchText: genesis 4:5 but unto cain and to his offering he had not respect. and cain was very wroth, and his countenance fell.
english: but unto Cain and to his offering He had not respect. And Cain was very wroth, and his countenance fell.

searchText: genesis 4:6 and the lord said unto cain: ‘why art thou wroth? and why is thy countenance fallen?
english: And the LORD said unto Cain: ‘Why art thou wroth? and why is thy countenance fallen?

searchText: genesis 4:7 if thou doest well, shall it not be lifted up? and if thou doest not well, sin coucheth at the door; and unto thee is its desire, but thou mayest rule over it.’
english: If thou doest well, shall it not be lifted up? and if thou doest not well, sin coucheth at the door; and unto thee is its desire, but thou mayest rule over it.’

searchText: genesis 4:8 and cain spoke unto abel his brother. and it came to pass, when they were in the field, that cain rose up against abel his brother, and slew him.
english: And Cain spoke unto Abel his brother. And it came to pass, when they were in the field, that Cain rose up against Abel his brother, and slew him.

searchText: genesis 4:9 and the lord said unto cain: ‘where is abel thy brother?’ and he said: ‘i know not; am i my brother’s keeper?’
english: And the LORD said unto Cain: ‘Where is Abel thy brother?’ And he said: ‘I know not; am I my brother’s keeper?’

searchText: genesis 4:10 and he said: ‘what hast thou done? the voice of thy brother’s blood crieth unto me from the ground.
english: And He said: ‘What hast thou done? the voice of thy brother’s blood crieth unto Me from the ground.

searchText: genesis 4:11 and now cursed art thou from the ground, which hath opened her mouth to receive thy brother’s blood from thy hand.
english: And now cursed art thou from the ground, which hath opened her mouth to receive thy brother’s blood from thy hand.

searchText: genesis 4:12 when thou tillest the ground, it shall not henceforth yield unto thee her strength; a fugitive and a wanderer shalt thou be in the earth.’
english: When thou tillest the ground, it shall not henceforth yield unto thee her strength; a fugitive and a wanderer shalt thou be in the earth.’

searchText: genesis 4:13 and cain said unto the lord: ‘my punishment is greater than i can bear.
english: And Cain said unto the LORD: ‘My punishment is greater than I can bear.

searchText: genesis 4:14 behold, thou hast driven me out this day from the face of the land; and from thy face shall i be hid; and i shall be a fugitive and a wanderer in the earth; and it will come to pass, that whosoever findeth me will slay me.’
english: Behold, Thou hast driven me out this day from the face of the land; and from Thy face shall I be hid; and I shall be a fugitive and a wanderer in the earth; and it will come to pass, that whosoever findeth me will slay me.’

searchText: genesis 4:15 and the lord said unto him: ‘therefore whosoever slayeth cain, vengeance shall be taken on him sevenfold.’ and the lord set a sign for cain, lest any finding him should smite him.
english: And the LORD said unto him: ‘Therefore whosoever slayeth Cain, vengeance shall be taken on him sevenfold.’ And the LORD set a sign for Cain, lest any finding him should smite him.

searchText: genesis 4:16 and cain went out from the presence of the lord, and dwelt in the land of nod, on the east of eden.
english: And Cain went out from the presence of the LORD, and dwelt in the land of Nod, on the east of Eden.

searchText: genesis 4:17 and cain knew his wife; and she conceived, and bore enoch; and he builded a city, and called the name of the city after the name of his son enoch.
english: And Cain knew his wife; and she conceived, and bore Enoch; and he builded a city, and called the name of the city after the name of his son Enoch.

searchText: genesis 4:18 and unto enoch was born irad; and irad begot mehujael; and mehujael begot methushael; and methushael begot lamech.
english: And unto Enoch was born Irad; and Irad begot Mehujael; and Mehujael begot Methushael; and Methushael begot Lamech.

searchText: genesis 4:19 and lamech took unto him two wives; the name of one was adah, and the name of the other zillah.
english: And Lamech took unto him two wives; the name of one was Adah, and the name of the other Zillah.

searchText: genesis 4:20 and adah bore jabal; he was the father of such as dwell in tents and have cattle.
english: And Adah bore Jabal; he was the father of such as dwell in tents and have cattle.

searchText: genesis 4:21 and his brother’s name was jubal; he was the father of all such as handle the harp and pipe.
english: And his brother’s name was Jubal; he was the father of all such as handle the harp and pipe.

searchText: genesis 4:22 and zillah, she also bore tubal-cain, the forger of every cutting instrument of brass and iron; and the sister of tubal-cain was naamah.
english: And Zillah, she also bore Tubal-cain, the forger of every cutting instrument of brass and iron; and the sister of Tubal-cain was Naamah.

searchText: genesis 4:23 and lamech said unto his wives: adah and zillah, hear my voice; ye wives of lamech, hearken unto my speech; for i have slain a man for wounding me, and a young man for bruising me;
english: And Lamech said unto his wives: Adah and Zillah, hear my voice; Ye wives of Lamech, hearken unto my speech; For I have slain a man for wounding me, And a young man for bruising me;

searchText: genesis 4:24 if cain shall be avenged sevenfold, truly lamech seventy and sevenfold.
english: If Cain shall be avenged sevenfold, Truly Lamech seventy and sevenfold.

searchText: genesis 4:25 and adam knew his wife again; and she bore a son, and called his name seth: ‘for god hath appointed me another seed instead of abel; for cain slew him.’
english: And Adam knew his wife again; and she bore a son, and called his name Seth: ‘for God hath appointed me another seed instead of Abel; for Cain slew him.’

searchText: genesis 4:26 and to seth, to him also there was born a son; and he called his name enosh; then began men to call upon the name of the lord.
english: And to Seth, to him also there was born a son; and he called his name Enosh; then began men to call upon the name of the LORD.

searchText: genesis 5:1 this is the book of the generations of adam. in the day that god created man, in the likeness of god made he him;
english: This is the book of the generations of Adam. In the day that God created man, in the likeness of God made He him;

searchText: genesis 5:2 male and female created he them, and blessed them, and called their name adam, in the day when they were created.
english: male and female created He them, and blessed them, and called their name Adam, in the day when they were created.

searchText: genesis 5:3 and adam lived a hundred and thirty years, and begot a son in his own likeness, after his image; and called his name seth.
english: And Adam lived a hundred and thirty years, and begot a son in his own likeness, after his image; and called his name Seth.

searchText: genesis 5:4 and the days of adam after he begot seth were eight hundred years; and he begot sons and daughters.
english: And the days of Adam after he begot Seth were eight hundred years; and he begot sons and daughters.

searchText: genesis 5:5 and all the days that adam lived were nine hundred and thirty years; and he died.
english: And all the days that Adam lived were nine hundred and thirty years; and he died.

searchText: genesis 5:6 and seth lived a hundred and five years, and begot enosh.
english: And Seth lived a hundred and five years, and begot Enosh.

searchText: genesis 5:7 and seth lived after he begot enosh eight hundred and seven years, and begot sons and daughters.
english: And Seth lived after he begot Enosh eight hundred and seven years, and begot sons and daughters.

searchText: genesis 5:8 and all the days of seth were nine hundred and twelve years; and he died.
english: And all the days of Seth were nine hundred and twelve years; and he died.

searchText: genesis 5:9 and enosh lived ninety years, and begot kenan.
english: And Enosh lived ninety years, and begot Kenan.

searchText: genesis 5:10 and enosh lived after he begot kenan eight hundred and fifteen years, and begot sons and daughters.
english: And Enosh lived after he begot Kenan eight hundred and fifteen years, and begot sons and daughters.

searchText: genesis 5:11 and all the days of enosh were nine hundred and five years; and he died.
english: And all the days of Enosh were nine hundred and five years; and he died.

searchText: genesis 5:12 and kenan lived seventy years, and begot mahalalel.
english: And Kenan lived seventy years, and begot Mahalalel.

searchText: genesis 5:13 and kenan lived after he begot mahalalel eight hundred and forty years, and begot sons and daughters.
english: And Kenan lived after he begot Mahalalel eight hundred and forty years, and begot sons and daughters.

searchText: genesis 5:14 and all the days of kenan were nine hundred and ten years; and he died.
english: And all the days of Kenan were nine hundred and ten years; and he died.

searchText: genesis 5:15 and mahalalel lived sixty and five years, and begot jared.
english: And Mahalalel lived sixty and five years, and begot Jared.

searchText: genesis 5:16 and mahalalel lived after he begot jared eight hundred and thirty years, and begot sons and daughters.
english: And Mahalalel lived after he begot Jared eight hundred and thirty years, and begot sons and daughters.

searchText: genesis 5:17 and all the days of mahalalel were eight hundred ninety and five years; and he died.
english: And all the days of Mahalalel were eight hundred ninety and five years; and he died.

searchText: genesis 5:18 and jared lived a hundred sixty and two years, and begot enoch.
english: And Jared lived a hundred sixty and two years, and begot Enoch.

searchText: genesis 5:19 and jared lived after he begot enoch eight hundred years, and begot sons and daughters.
english: And Jared lived after he begot Enoch eight hundred years, and begot sons and daughters.

searchText: genesis 5:20 and all the days of jared were nine hundred sixty and two years; and he died. .
english: And all the days of Jared were nine hundred sixty and two years; and he died. .

searchText: genesis 5:21 and enoch lived sixty and five years, and begot methuselah.
english: And Enoch lived sixty and five years, and begot Methuselah.

searchText: genesis 5:22 and enoch walked with god after he begot methuselah three hundred years, and begot sons and daughters.
english: And Enoch walked with God after he begot Methuselah three hundred years, and begot sons and daughters.

searchText: genesis 5:23 and all the days of enoch were three hundred sixty and five years.
english: And all the days of Enoch were three hundred sixty and five years.

searchText: genesis 5:24 and enoch walked with god, and he was not; for god took him.
english: And Enoch walked with God, and he was not; for God took him.

searchText: genesis 5:25 and methuselah lived a hundred eighty and seven years, and begot lamech.
english: And Methuselah lived a hundred eighty and seven years, and begot Lamech.

searchText: genesis 5:26 and methuselah lived after he begot lamech seven hundred eighty and two years, and begot sons and daughters.
english: And Methuselah lived after he begot Lamech seven hundred eighty and two years, and begot sons and daughters.

searchText: genesis 5:27 and all the days of methuselah were nine hundred sixty and nine years; and he died.
english: And all the days of Methuselah were nine hundred sixty and nine years; and he died.

searchText: genesis 5:28 and lamech lived a hundred eighty and two years, and begot a son.
english: And Lamech lived a hundred eighty and two years, and begot a son.

searchText: genesis 5:29 and he called his name noah, saying: ‘this same shall comfort us in our work and in the toil of our hands, which cometh from the ground which the lord hath cursed.’
english: And he called his name Noah, saying: ‘This same shall comfort us in our work and in the toil of our hands, which cometh from the ground which the LORD hath cursed.’

searchText: genesis 5:30 and lamech lived after he begot noah five hundred ninety and five years, and begot sons and daughters.
english: And Lamech lived after he begot Noah five hundred ninety and five years, and begot sons and daughters.

searchText: genesis 5:31 and all the days of lamech were seven hundred seventy and seven years; and he died.
english: And all the days of Lamech were seven hundred seventy and seven years; and he died.

searchText: genesis 5:32 and noah was five hundred years old; and noah begot shem, ham, and japheth.
english: And Noah was five hundred years old; and Noah begot Shem, Ham, and Japheth.

searchText: genesis 6:1 and it came to pass, when men began to multiply on the face of the earth, and daughters were born unto them,
english: And it came to pass, when men began to multiply on the face of the earth, and daughters were born unto them,

searchText: genesis 6:2 that the sons of nobles saw the daughters of men that they were fair; and they took them wives, whomsoever they chose.
english: that the sons of nobles saw the daughters of men that they were fair; and they took them wives, whomsoever they chose.

searchText: genesis 6:3 and the lord said: ‘my spirit shall not abide in man for ever, for that he also is flesh; therefore shall his days be a hundred and twenty years.’
english: And the LORD said: ‘My spirit shall not abide in man for ever, for that he also is flesh; therefore shall his days be a hundred and twenty years.’

searchText: genesis 6:4 the nephilim were in the earth in those days, and also after that, when the sons of nobles came in unto the daughters of men, and they bore children to them; the same were the mighty men that were of old, the men of renown.
english: The Nephilim were in the earth in those days, and also after that, when the sons of nobles came in unto the daughters of men, and they bore children to them; the same were the mighty men that were of old, the men of renown.

searchText: genesis 6:5 and the lord saw that the wickedness of man was great in the earth, and that every imagination of the thoughts of his heart was only evil continually.
english: And the LORD saw that the wickedness of man was great in the earth, and that every imagination of the thoughts of his heart was only evil continually.

searchText: genesis 6:6 and it repented the lord that he had made man on the earth, and it grieved him at his heart.
english: And it repented the LORD that He had made man on the earth, and it grieved Him at His heart.

searchText: genesis 6:7 and the lord said: ‘i will blot out man whom i have created from the face of the earth; both man, and beast, and creeping thing, and fowl of the air; for it repenteth me that i have made them.’
english: And the LORD said: ‘I will blot out man whom I have created from the face of the earth; both man, and beast, and creeping thing, and fowl of the air; for it repenteth Me that I have made them.’

searchText: genesis 6:8 but noah found grace in the eyes of the lord.
english: But Noah found grace in the eyes of the LORD.

searchText: genesis 6:9 these are the generations of noah. noah was in his generations a man righteous and wholehearted; noah walked with god.
english: These are the generations of Noah. Noah was in his generations a man righteous and wholehearted; Noah walked with God.

searchText: genesis 6:10 and noah begot three sons, shem, ham, and japheth.
english: And Noah begot three sons, Shem, Ham, and Japheth.

searchText: genesis 6:11 and the earth was corrupt before god, and the earth was filled with violence.
english: And the earth was corrupt before God, and the earth was filled with violence.

searchText: genesis 6:12 and god saw the earth, and, behold, it was corrupt; for all flesh had corrupted their way upon the earth. .
english: And God saw the earth, and, behold, it was corrupt; for all flesh had corrupted their way upon the earth. .

searchText: genesis 6:13 and god said unto noah: ‘the end of all flesh is come before me; for the earth is filled with violence through them; and, behold, i will destroy them with the earth.
english: And God said unto Noah: ‘The end of all flesh is come before Me; for the earth is filled with violence through them; and, behold, I will destroy them with the earth.

searchText: genesis 6:14 make thee an ark of gopher wood; with rooms shalt thou make the ark, and shalt pitch it within and without with pitch.
english: Make thee an ark of gopher wood; with rooms shalt thou make the ark, and shalt pitch it within and without with pitch.

searchText: genesis 6:15 and this is how thou shalt make it: the length of the ark three hundred cubits, the breadth of it fifty cubits, and the height of it thirty cubits.
english: And this is how thou shalt make it: the length of the ark three hundred cubits, the breadth of it fifty cubits, and the height of it thirty cubits.

searchText: genesis 6:16 a light shalt thou make to the ark, and to a cubit shalt thou finish it upward; and the door of the ark shalt thou set in the side thereof; with lower, second, and third stories shalt thou make it.
english: A light shalt thou make to the ark, and to a cubit shalt thou finish it upward; and the door of the ark shalt thou set in the side thereof; with lower, second, and third stories shalt thou make it.

searchText: genesis 6:17 and i, behold, i do bring the flood of waters upon the earth, to destroy all flesh, wherein is the breath of life, from under heaven; every thing that is in the earth shall perish.
english: And I, behold, I do bring the flood of waters upon the earth, to destroy all flesh, wherein is the breath of life, from under heaven; every thing that is in the earth shall perish.

searchText: genesis 6:18 but i will establish my covenant with thee; and thou shalt come into the ark, thou, and thy sons, and thy wife, and thy sons’ wives with thee.
english: But I will establish My covenant with thee; and thou shalt come into the ark, thou, and thy sons, and thy wife, and thy sons’ wives with thee.

searchText: genesis 6:19 and of every living thing of all flesh, two of every sort shalt thou bring into the ark, to keep them alive with thee; they shall be male and female.
english: And of every living thing of all flesh, two of every sort shalt thou bring into the ark, to keep them alive with thee; they shall be male and female.

searchText: genesis 6:20 of the fowl after their kind, and of the cattle after their kind, of every creeping thing of the ground after its kind, two of every sort shall come unto thee, to keep them alive.
english: Of the fowl after their kind, and of the cattle after their kind, of every creeping thing of the ground after its kind, two of every sort shall come unto thee, to keep them alive.

searchText: genesis 6:21 and take thou unto thee of all food that is eaten, and gather it to thee; and it shall be for food for thee, and for them.’
english: And take thou unto thee of all food that is eaten, and gather it to thee; and it shall be for food for thee, and for them.’

searchText: genesis 6:22 thus did noah; according to all that god commanded him, so did he.
english: Thus did Noah; according to all that God commanded him, so did he.

searchText: genesis 7:1 and the lord said unto noah: ‘come thou and all thy house into the ark; for thee have i seen righteous before me in this generation.
english: And the LORD said unto Noah: ‘Come thou and all thy house into the ark; for thee have I seen righteous before Me in this generation.

searchText: genesis 7:2 of every clean beast thou shalt take to thee seven and seven, each with his mate; and of the beasts that are not clean two [and two], each with his mate;
english: Of every clean beast thou shalt take to thee seven and seven, each with his mate; and of the beasts that are not clean two [and two], each with his mate;

searchText: genesis 7:3 of the fowl also of the air, seven and seven, male and female; to keep seed alive upon the face of all the earth.
english: of the fowl also of the air, seven and seven, male and female; to keep seed alive upon the face of all the earth.

searchText: genesis 7:4 for yet seven days, and i will cause it to rain upon the earth forty days and forty nights; and every living substance that i have made will i blot out from off the face of the earth.’
english: For yet seven days, and I will cause it to rain upon the earth forty days and forty nights; and every living substance that I have made will I blot out from off the face of the earth.’

searchText: genesis 7:5 and noah did according unto all that the lord commanded him.
english: And Noah did according unto all that the LORD commanded him.

searchText: genesis 7:6 and noah was six hundred years old when the flood of waters was upon the earth.
english: And Noah was six hundred years old when the flood of waters was upon the earth.

searchText: genesis 7:7 and noah went in, and his sons, and his wife, and his sons’ wives with him, into the ark, before the waters of the flood.
english: And Noah went in, and his sons, and his wife, and his sons’ wives with him, into the ark, before the waters of the flood.

searchText: genesis 7:8 of clean beasts, and of beasts that are not clean, and of fowls, and of every thing that creepeth upon the ground,
english: Of clean beasts, and of beasts that are not clean, and of fowls, and of every thing that creepeth upon the ground,

searchText: genesis 7:9 there went in two and two unto noah into the ark, male and female, as god commanded noah.
english: there went in two and two unto Noah into the ark, male and female, as God commanded Noah.

searchText: genesis 7:10 and it came to pass after the seven days, that the waters of the flood were upon the earth.
english: And it came to pass after the seven days, that the waters of the flood were upon the earth.

searchText: genesis 7:11 in the six hundredth year of noah’s life, in the second month, on the seventeenth day of the month, on the same day were all the fountains of the great deep broken up, and the windows of heaven were opened.
english: In the six hundredth year of Noah’s life, in the second month, on the seventeenth day of the month, on the same day were all the fountains of the great deep broken up, and the windows of heaven were opened.

searchText: genesis 7:12 and the rain was upon the earth forty days and forty nights.
english: And the rain was upon the earth forty days and forty nights.

searchText: genesis 7:13 in the selfsame day entered noah, and shem, and ham, and japheth, the sons of noah, and noah’s wife, and the three wives of his sons with them, into the ark;
english: In the selfsame day entered Noah, and Shem, and Ham, and Japheth, the sons of Noah, and Noah’s wife, and the three wives of his sons with them, into the ark;

searchText: genesis 7:14 they, and every beast after its kind, and all the cattle after their kind, and every creeping thing that creepeth upon the earth after its kind, and every fowl after its kind, every bird of every sort.
english: they, and every beast after its kind, and all the cattle after their kind, and every creeping thing that creepeth upon the earth after its kind, and every fowl after its kind, every bird of every sort.

searchText: genesis 7:15 and they went in unto noah into the ark, two and two of all flesh wherein is the breath of life.
english: And they went in unto Noah into the ark, two and two of all flesh wherein is the breath of life.

searchText: genesis 7:16 and they that went in, went in male and female of all flesh, as god commanded him; and the lord shut him in.
english: And they that went in, went in male and female of all flesh, as God commanded him; and the LORD shut him in.

searchText: genesis 7:17 and the flood was forty days upon the earth; and the waters increased, and bore up the ark, and it was lifted up above the earth.
english: And the flood was forty days upon the earth; and the waters increased, and bore up the ark, and it was lifted up above the earth.

searchText: genesis 7:18 and the waters prevailed, and increased greatly upon the earth; and the ark went upon the face of the waters.
english: And the waters prevailed, and increased greatly upon the earth; and the ark went upon the face of the waters.

searchText: genesis 7:19 and the waters prevailed exceedingly upon the earth; and all the high mountains that were under the whole heaven were covered.
english: And the waters prevailed exceedingly upon the earth; and all the high mountains that were under the whole heaven were covered.

searchText: genesis 7:20 fifteen cubits upward did the waters prevail; and the mountains were covered.
english: Fifteen cubits upward did the waters prevail; and the mountains were covered.

searchText: genesis 7:21 and all flesh perished that moved upon the earth, both fowl, and cattle, and beast, and every swarming thing that swarmeth upon the earth, and every man;
english: And all flesh perished that moved upon the earth, both fowl, and cattle, and beast, and every swarming thing that swarmeth upon the earth, and every man;

searchText: genesis 7:22 all in whose nostrils was the breath of the spirit of life, whatsoever was in the dry land, died.
english: all in whose nostrils was the breath of the spirit of life, whatsoever was in the dry land, died.

searchText: genesis 7:23 and he blotted out every living substance which was upon the face of the ground, both man, and cattle, and creeping thing, and fowl of the heaven; and they were blotted out from the earth; and noah only was left, and they that were with him in the ark.
english: And He blotted out every living substance which was upon the face of the ground, both man, and cattle, and creeping thing, and fowl of the heaven; and they were blotted out from the earth; and Noah only was left, and they that were with him in the ark.

searchText: genesis 7:24 and the waters prevailed upon the earth a hundred and fifty days.
english: And the waters prevailed upon the earth a hundred and fifty days.

searchText: genesis 8:1 and god remembered noah, and every living thing, and all the cattle that were with him in the ark; and god made a wind to pass over the earth, and the waters assuaged;
english: And God remembered Noah, and every living thing, and all the cattle that were with him in the ark; and God made a wind to pass over the earth, and the waters assuaged;

searchText: genesis 8:2 the fountains also of the deep and the windows of heaven were stopped, and the rain from heaven was restrained.
english: the fountains also of the deep and the windows of heaven were stopped, and the rain from heaven was restrained.

searchText: genesis 8:3 and the waters returned from off the earth continually; and after the end of a hundred and fifty days the waters decreased.
english: And the waters returned from off the earth continually; and after the end of a hundred and fifty days the waters decreased.

searchText: genesis 8:4 and the ark rested in the seventh month, on the seventeenth day of the month, upon the mountains of ararat.
english: And the ark rested in the seventh month, on the seventeenth day of the month, upon the mountains of Ararat.

searchText: genesis 8:5 and the waters decreased continually until the tenth month; in the tenth month, on the first day of the month, were the tops of the mountains seen.
english: And the waters decreased continually until the tenth month; in the tenth month, on the first day of the month, were the tops of the mountains seen.

searchText: genesis 8:6 and it came to pass at the end of forty days, that noah opened the window of the ark which he had made.
english: And it came to pass at the end of forty days, that Noah opened the window of the ark which he had made.

searchText: genesis 8:7 and he sent forth a raven, and it went forth to and fro, until the waters were dried up from off the earth.
english: And he sent forth a raven, and it went forth to and fro, until the waters were dried up from off the earth.

searchText: genesis 8:8 and he sent forth a dove from him, to see if the waters were abated from off the face of the ground.
english: And he sent forth a dove from him, to see if the waters were abated from off the face of the ground.

searchText: genesis 8:9 but the dove found no rest for the sole of her foot, and she returned unto him to the ark, for the waters were on the face of the whole earth; and he put forth his hand, and took her, and brought her in unto him into the ark.
english: But the dove found no rest for the sole of her foot, and she returned unto him to the ark, for the waters were on the face of the whole earth; and he put forth his hand, and took her, and brought her in unto him into the ark.

searchText: genesis 8:10 and he stayed yet other seven days; and again he sent forth the dove out of the ark.
english: And he stayed yet other seven days; and again he sent forth the dove out of the ark.

searchText: genesis 8:11 and the dove came in to him at eventide; and lo in her mouth an olive-leaf freshly plucked; so noah knew that the waters were abated from off the earth.
english: And the dove came in to him at eventide; and lo in her mouth an olive-leaf freshly plucked; so Noah knew that the waters were abated from off the earth.

searchText: genesis 8:12 and he stayed yet other seven days; and sent forth the dove; and she returned not again unto him any more.
english: And he stayed yet other seven days; and sent forth the dove; and she returned not again unto him any more.

searchText: genesis 8:13 and it came to pass in the six hundred and first year, in the first month, the first day of the month, the waters were dried up from off the earth; and noah removed the covering of the ark, and looked, and behold, the face of the ground was dried.
english: And it came to pass in the six hundred and first year, in the first month, the first day of the month, the waters were dried up from off the earth; and Noah removed the covering of the ark, and looked, and behold, the face of the ground was dried.

searchText: genesis 8:14 and in the second month, on the seven and twentieth day of the month, was the earth dry.
english: And in the second month, on the seven and twentieth day of the month, was the earth dry.

searchText: genesis 8:15 and god spoke unto noah, saying:
english: And God spoke unto Noah, saying:

searchText: genesis 8:16 ’go forth from the ark, thou, and thy wife, and thy sons, and thy sons’ wives with thee.
english: ’Go forth from the ark, thou, and thy wife, and thy sons, and thy sons’ wives with thee.

searchText: genesis 8:17 bring forth with thee every living thing that is with thee of all flesh, both fowl, and cattle, and every creeping thing that creepeth upon the earth; that they may swarm in the earth, and be fruitful, and multiply upon the earth.’
english: Bring forth with thee every living thing that is with thee of all flesh, both fowl, and cattle, and every creeping thing that creepeth upon the earth; that they may swarm in the earth, and be fruitful, and multiply upon the earth.’

searchText: genesis 8:18 and noah went forth, and his sons, and his wife, and his sons’wives with him;
english: And Noah went forth, and his sons, and his wife, and his sons’wives with him;

searchText: genesis 8:19 every beast, every creeping thing, and every fowl, whatsoever moveth upon the earth, after their families; went forth out of the ark.
english: every beast, every creeping thing, and every fowl, whatsoever moveth upon the earth, after their families; went forth out of the ark.

searchText: genesis 8:20 and noah builded an altar unto the lord; and took of every clean beast, and of every clean fowl, and offered burnt-offerings on the altar.
english: And Noah builded an altar unto the LORD; and took of every clean beast, and of every clean fowl, and offered burnt-offerings on the altar.

searchText: genesis 8:21 and the lord smelled the sweet savour; and the lord said in his heart: ‘i will not again curse the ground any more for man’s sake; for the imagination of man’s heart is evil from his youth; neither will i again smite any more every thing living, as i have done.
english: And the LORD smelled the sweet savour; and the LORD said in His heart: ‘I will not again curse the ground any more for man’s sake; for the imagination of man’s heart is evil from his youth; neither will I again smite any more every thing living, as I have done.

searchText: genesis 8:22 while the earth remaineth, seedtime and harvest, and cold and heat, and summer and winter, and day and night shall not cease.’
english: While the earth remaineth, seedtime and harvest, and cold and heat, and summer and winter, and day and night shall not cease.’

searchText: genesis 9:1 and god blessed noah and his sons, and said unto them: ‘be fruitful and multiply, and replenish the earth.
english: And God blessed Noah and his sons, and said unto them: ‘Be fruitful and multiply, and replenish the earth.

searchText: genesis 9:2 and the fear of you and the dread of you shall be upon every beast of the earth, and upon every fowl of the air, and upon all wherewith the ground teemeth, and upon all the fishes of the sea: into your hand are they delivered.
english: And the fear of you and the dread of you shall be upon every beast of the earth, and upon every fowl of the air, and upon all wherewith the ground teemeth, and upon all the fishes of the sea: into your hand are they delivered.

searchText: genesis 9:3 every moving thing that liveth shall be for food for you; as the green herb have i given you all.
english: Every moving thing that liveth shall be for food for you; as the green herb have I given you all.

searchText: genesis 9:4 only flesh with the life thereof, which is the blood thereof, shall ye not eat.
english: Only flesh with the life thereof, which is the blood thereof, shall ye not eat.

searchText: genesis 9:5 and surely your blood of your lives will i require; at the hand of every beast will i require it; and at the hand of man, even at the hand of every man’s brother, will i require the life of man.
english: And surely your blood of your lives will I require; at the hand of every beast will I require it; and at the hand of man, even at the hand of every man’s brother, will I require the life of man.

searchText: genesis 9:6 whoso sheddeth man’s blood, by man shall his blood be shed; for in the image of god made he man.
english: Whoso sheddeth man’s blood, by man shall his blood be shed; for in the image of God made He man.

searchText: genesis 9:7 and you, be ye fruitful, and multiply; swarm in the earth, and multiply therein.’ .
english: And you, be ye fruitful, and multiply; swarm in the earth, and multiply therein.’ .

searchText: genesis 9:8 and god spoke unto noah, and to his sons with him, saying:
english: And God spoke unto Noah, and to his sons with him, saying:

searchText: genesis 9:9 ’as for me, behold, i establish my covenant with you, and with your seed after you;
english: ’As for Me, behold, I establish My covenant with you, and with your seed after you;

searchText: genesis 9:10 and with every living creature that is with you, the fowl, the cattle, and every beast of the earth with you; of all that go out of the ark, even every beast of the earth.
english: and with every living creature that is with you, the fowl, the cattle, and every beast of the earth with you; of all that go out of the ark, even every beast of the earth.

searchText: genesis 9:11 and i will establish my covenant with you; neither shall all flesh be cut off any more by the waters of the flood; neither shall there any more be a flood to destroy the earth.’
english: And I will establish My covenant with you; neither shall all flesh be cut off any more by the waters of the flood; neither shall there any more be a flood to destroy the earth.’

searchText: genesis 9:12 and god said: ‘this is the token of the covenant which i make between me and you and every living creature that is with you, for perpetual generations:
english: And God said: ‘This is the token of the covenant which I make between Me and you and every living creature that is with you, for perpetual generations:

searchText: genesis 9:13 i have set my bow in the cloud, and it shall be for a token of a covenant between me and the earth.
english: I have set My bow in the cloud, and it shall be for a token of a covenant between Me and the earth.

searchText: genesis 9:14 and it shall come to pass, when i bring clouds over the earth, and the bow is seen in the cloud,
english: And it shall come to pass, when I bring clouds over the earth, and the bow is seen in the cloud,

searchText: genesis 9:15 that i will remember my covenant, which is between me and you and every living creature of all flesh; and the waters shall no more become a flood to destroy all flesh.
english: that I will remember My covenant, which is between Me and you and every living creature of all flesh; and the waters shall no more become a flood to destroy all flesh.

searchText: genesis 9:16 and the bow shall be in the cloud; and i will look upon it, that i may remember the everlasting covenant between god and every living creature of all flesh that is upon the earth.’
english: And the bow shall be in the cloud; and I will look upon it, that I may remember the everlasting covenant between God and every living creature of all flesh that is upon the earth.’

searchText: genesis 9:17 and god said unto noah: ‘this is the token of the covenant which i have established between me and all flesh that is upon the earth.’
english: And God said unto Noah: ‘This is the token of the covenant which I have established between Me and all flesh that is upon the earth.’

searchText: genesis 9:18 and the sons of noah, that went forth from the ark, were shem, and ham, and japheth; and ham is the father of canaan.
english: And the sons of Noah, that went forth from the ark, were Shem, and Ham, and Japheth; and Ham is the father of Canaan.

searchText: genesis 9:19 these three were the sons of noah, and of these was the whole earth overspread.
english: These three were the sons of Noah, and of these was the whole earth overspread.

searchText: genesis 9:20 and noah, the man of the land, began and planted a vineyard.
english: And Noah, the man of the land, began and planted a vineyard.

searchText: genesis 9:21 and he drank of the wine, and was drunken; and he was uncovered within his tent.
english: And he drank of the wine, and was drunken; and he was uncovered within his tent.

searchText: genesis 9:22 and ham, the father of canaan, saw the nakedness of his father, and told his two brethren without.
english: And Ham, the father of Canaan, saw the nakedness of his father, and told his two brethren without.

searchText: genesis 9:23 and shem and japheth took a garment, and laid it upon both their shoulders, and went backward, and covered the nakedness of their father; and their faces were backward, and they saw not their father’s nakedness.
english: And Shem and Japheth took a garment, and laid it upon both their shoulders, and went backward, and covered the nakedness of their father; and their faces were backward, and they saw not their father’s nakedness.

searchText: genesis 9:24 and noah awoke from his wine, and knew what his youngest son had done unto him.
english: And Noah awoke from his wine, and knew what his youngest son had done unto him.

searchText: genesis 9:25 and he said: cursed be canaan; a servant of servants shall he be unto his brethren.
english: And he said: Cursed be Canaan; a servant of servants shall he be unto his brethren.

searchText: genesis 9:26 and he said: blessed be the lord, the god of shem; and let canaan be their servant.
english: And he said: Blessed be the LORD, the God of Shem; And let Canaan be their servant.

searchText: genesis 9:27 god enlarge japheth, and he shall dwell in the tents of shem; and let canaan be their servant.
english: God enlarge Japheth, and he shall dwell in the tents of Shem; And let Canaan be their servant.

searchText: genesis 9:28 and noah lived after the flood three hundred and fifty years.
english: And Noah lived after the flood three hundred and fifty years.

searchText: genesis 9:29 and all the days of noah were nine hundred and fifty years; and he died.
english: And all the days of Noah were nine hundred and fifty years; and he died.

searchText: genesis 10:1 now these are the generations of the sons of noah: shem, ham, and japheth; and unto them were sons born after the flood.
english: Now these are the generations of the sons of Noah: Shem, Ham, and Japheth; and unto them were sons born after the flood.

searchText: genesis 10:2 the sons of japheth: gomer, and magog, and madai, and javan, and tubal, and meshech, and tiras.
english: The sons of Japheth: Gomer, and Magog, and Madai, and Javan, and Tubal, and Meshech, and Tiras.

searchText: genesis 10:3 and the sons of gomer: ashkenaz, and riphath, and togarmah.
english: And the sons of Gomer: Ashkenaz, and Riphath, and Togarmah.

searchText: genesis 10:4 and the sons of javan: elishah, and tarshish, kittim, and dodanim.
english: And the sons of Javan: Elishah, and Tarshish, Kittim, and Dodanim.

searchText: genesis 10:5 of these were the isles of the nations divided in their lands, every one after his tongue, after their families, in their nations.
english: Of these were the isles of the nations divided in their lands, every one after his tongue, after their families, in their nations.

searchText: genesis 10:6 and the sons of ham: cush, and mizraim, and put, and canaan.
english: And the sons of Ham: Cush, and Mizraim, and Put, and Canaan.

searchText: genesis 10:7 and the sons of cush: seba, and havilah, and sabtah, and raamah, and sabteca; and the sons of raamah: sheba, and dedan.
english: And the sons of Cush: Seba, and Havilah, and Sabtah, and Raamah, and Sabteca; and the sons of Raamah: Sheba, and Dedan.

searchText: genesis 10:8 and cush begot nimrod; he began to be a mighty one in the earth.
english: And Cush begot Nimrod; he began to be a mighty one in the earth.

searchText: genesis 10:9 he was a mighty hunter before the lord; wherefore it is said: ‘like nimrod a mighty hunter before the lord.’
english: He was a mighty hunter before the LORD; wherefore it is said: ‘Like Nimrod a mighty hunter before the LORD.’

searchText: genesis 10:10 and the beginning of his kingdom was babel, and erech, and accad, and calneh, in the land of shinar.
english: And the beginning of his kingdom was Babel, and Erech, and Accad, and Calneh, in the land of Shinar.

searchText: genesis 10:11 out of that land went forth asshur, and builded nineveh, and rehoboth-ir, and calah,
english: Out of that land went forth Asshur, and builded Nineveh, and Rehoboth-ir, and Calah,

searchText: genesis 10:12 and resen between nineveh and calah—the same is the great city.
english: and Resen between Nineveh and Calah—the same is the great city.

searchText: genesis 10:13 and mizraim begot ludim, and anamim, and lehabim, and naphtuhim,
english: And Mizraim begot Ludim, and Anamim, and Lehabim, and Naphtuhim,

searchText: genesis 10:14 and pathrusim, and casluhim—whence went forth the philistines—and caphtorim.
english: and Pathrusim, and Casluhim—whence went forth the Philistines—and Caphtorim.

searchText: genesis 10:15 and canaan begot zidon his firstborn, and heth;
english: And Canaan begot Zidon his firstborn, and Heth;

searchText: genesis 10:16 and the jebusite, and the amorite, and the girgashite;
english: and the Jebusite, and the Amorite, and the Girgashite;

searchText: genesis 10:17 and the hivite, and the arkite, and the sinite;
english: and the Hivite, and the Arkite, and the Sinite;

searchText: genesis 10:18 and the arvadite, and the zemarite, and the hamathite; and afterward were the families of the canaanite spread abroad.
english: and the Arvadite, and the Zemarite, and the Hamathite; and afterward were the families of the Canaanite spread abroad.

searchText: genesis 10:19 and the border of the canaanite was from zidon, as thou goest toward gerar, unto gaza; as thou goest toward sodom and gomorrah and admah and zeboiim, unto lasha.
english: And the border of the Canaanite was from Zidon, as thou goest toward Gerar, unto Gaza; as thou goest toward Sodom and Gomorrah and Admah and Zeboiim, unto Lasha.

searchText: genesis 10:20 these are the sons of ham, after their families, after their tongues, in their lands, in their nations.
english: These are the sons of Ham, after their families, after their tongues, in their lands, in their nations.

searchText: genesis 10:21 and unto shem, the father of all the children of eber, the elder brother of japheth, to him also were children born.
english: And unto Shem, the father of all the children of Eber, the elder brother of Japheth, to him also were children born.

searchText: genesis 10:22 the sons of shem: elam, and asshur, and arpachshad, and lud, and aram.
english: The sons of Shem: Elam, and Asshur, and Arpachshad, and Lud, and Aram.

searchText: genesis 10:23 and the sons of aram: uz, and hul, and gether, and mash.
english: And the sons of Aram: Uz, and Hul, and Gether, and Mash.

searchText: genesis 10:24 and arpachshad begot shelah; and shelah begot eber.
english: And Arpachshad begot Shelah; and Shelah begot Eber.

searchText: genesis 10:25 and unto eber were born two sons; the name of the one was peleg; for in his days was the earth divided; and his brother’s name was joktan.
english: And unto Eber were born two sons; the name of the one was Peleg; for in his days was the earth divided; and his brother’s name was Joktan.

searchText: genesis 10:26 and joktan begot almodad, and sheleph, and hazarmaveth, and jerah;
english: And Joktan begot Almodad, and Sheleph, and Hazarmaveth, and Jerah;

searchText: genesis 10:27 and hadoram, and uzal, and diklah;
english: and Hadoram, and Uzal, and Diklah;

searchText: genesis 10:28 and obal, and abimael, and sheba;
english: and Obal, and Abimael, and Sheba;

searchText: genesis 10:29 and ophir, and havilah, and jobab; all these were the sons of joktan.
english: and Ophir, and Havilah, and Jobab; all these were the sons of Joktan.

searchText: genesis 10:30 and their dwelling was from mesha, as thou goest toward sephar, unto the mountain of the east.
english: And their dwelling was from Mesha, as thou goest toward Sephar, unto the mountain of the east.

searchText: genesis 10:31 these are the sons of shem, after their families, after their tongues, in their lands, after their nations.
english: These are the sons of Shem, after their families, after their tongues, in their lands, after their nations.

searchText: genesis 10:32 these are the families of the sons of noah, after their generations, in their nations; and of these were the nations divided in the earth after the flood.
english: These are the families of the sons of Noah, after their generations, in their nations; and of these were the nations divided in the earth after the flood.

searchText: genesis 11:1 and the whole earth was of one language and of one speech.
english: And the whole earth was of one language and of one speech.

searchText: genesis 11:2 and it came to pass, as they journeyed east, that they found a plain in the land of shinar; and they dwelt there.
english: And it came to pass, as they journeyed east, that they found a plain in the land of Shinar; and they dwelt there.

searchText: genesis 11:3 and they said one to another: ‘come, let us make brick, and burn them thoroughly.’ and they had brick for stone, and slime had they for mortar.
english: And they said one to another: ‘Come, let us make brick, and burn them thoroughly.’ And they had brick for stone, and slime had they for mortar.

searchText: genesis 11:4 and they said: ‘come, let us build us a city, and a tower, with its top in heaven, and let us make us a name; lest we be scattered abroad upon the face of the whole earth.’
english: And they said: ‘Come, let us build us a city, and a tower, with its top in heaven, and let us make us a name; lest we be scattered abroad upon the face of the whole earth.’

searchText: genesis 11:5 and the lord came down to see the city and the tower, which the children of men builded.
english: And the LORD came down to see the city and the tower, which the children of men builded.

searchText: genesis 11:6 and the lord said: ‘behold, they are one people, and they have all one language; and this is what they begin to do; and now nothing will be withholden from them, which they purpose to do.
english: And the LORD said: ‘Behold, they are one people, and they have all one language; and this is what they begin to do; and now nothing will be withholden from them, which they purpose to do.

searchText: genesis 11:7 come, let us go down, and there confound their language, that they may not understand one another’s speech.’
english: Come, let us go down, and there confound their language, that they may not understand one another’s speech.’

searchText: genesis 11:8 so the lord scattered them abroad from thence upon the face of all the earth; and they left off to build the city.
english: So the LORD scattered them abroad from thence upon the face of all the earth; and they left off to build the city.

searchText: genesis 11:9 therefore was the name of it called babel; because the lord did there aconfound the language of all the earth; and from thence did the lord scatter them abroad upon the face of all the earth.
english: Therefore was the name of it called Babel; because the LORD did there aconfound the language of all the earth; and from thence did the LORD scatter them abroad upon the face of all the earth.

searchText: genesis 11:10 these are the generations of shem. shem was a hundred years old, and begot arpachshad two years after the flood.
english: These are the generations of Shem. Shem was a hundred years old, and begot Arpachshad two years after the flood.

searchText: genesis 11:11 and shem lived after he begot arpachshad five hundred years, and begot sons and daughters.
english: And Shem lived after he begot Arpachshad five hundred years, and begot sons and daughters.

searchText: genesis 11:12 and arpachshad lived five and thirty years, and begot shelah.
english: And Arpachshad lived five and thirty years, and begot Shelah.

searchText: genesis 11:13 and arpachshad lived after he begot shelah four hundred and three years, and begot sons and daughters.
english: And Arpachshad lived after he begot Shelah four hundred and three years, and begot sons and daughters.

searchText: genesis 11:14 and shelah lived thirty years, and begot eber.
english: And Shelah lived thirty years, and begot Eber.

searchText: genesis 11:15 and shelah lived after he begot eber four hundred and three years, and begot sons and daughters.
english: And Shelah lived after he begot Eber four hundred and three years, and begot sons and daughters.

searchText: genesis 11:16 and eber lived four and thirty years, and begot peleg.
english: And Eber lived four and thirty years, and begot Peleg.

searchText: genesis 11:17 and eber lived after he begot peleg four hundred and thirty years, and begot sons and daughters.
english: And Eber lived after he begot Peleg four hundred and thirty years, and begot sons and daughters.

searchText: genesis 11:18 and peleg lived thirty years, and begot reu.
english: And Peleg lived thirty years, and begot Reu.

searchText: genesis 11:19 and peleg lived after he begot reu two hundred and nine years, and begot sons and daughters.
english: And Peleg lived after he begot Reu two hundred and nine years, and begot sons and daughters.

searchText: genesis 11:20 and reu lived two and thirty years, and begot serug.
english: And Reu lived two and thirty years, and begot Serug.

searchText: genesis 11:21 and reu lived after he begot serug two hundred and seven years, and begot sons and daughters.
english: And Reu lived after he begot Serug two hundred and seven years, and begot sons and daughters.

searchText: genesis 11:22 and serug lived thirty years, and begot nahor.
english: And Serug lived thirty years, and begot Nahor.

searchText: genesis 11:23 and serug lived after he begot nahor two hundred years, and begot sons and daughters.
english: And Serug lived after he begot Nahor two hundred years, and begot sons and daughters.

searchText: genesis 11:24 and nahor lived nine and twenty years, and begot terah.
english: And Nahor lived nine and twenty years, and begot Terah.

searchText: genesis 11:25 and nahor lived after he begot terah a hundred and nineteen years, and begot sons and daughters.
english: And Nahor lived after he begot Terah a hundred and nineteen years, and begot sons and daughters.

searchText: genesis 11:26 and terah lived seventy years, and begot abram, nahor, and haran.
english: And Terah lived seventy years, and begot Abram, Nahor, and Haran.

searchText: genesis 11:27 now these are the generations of terah. terah begot abram, nahor, and haran; and haran begot lot.
english: Now these are the generations of Terah. Terah begot Abram, Nahor, and Haran; and Haran begot Lot.

searchText: genesis 11:28 and haran died in the presence of his father terah in the land of his nativity, in ur of the chaldees.
english: And Haran died in the presence of his father Terah in the land of his nativity, in Ur of the Chaldees.

searchText: genesis 11:29 and abram and nahor took them wives: the name of abram’s wife was sarai; and the name of nahor’s wife, milcah, the daughter of haran, the father of milcah, and the father of iscah.
english: And Abram and Nahor took them wives: the name of Abram’s wife was Sarai; and the name of Nahor’s wife, Milcah, the daughter of Haran, the father of Milcah, and the father of Iscah.

searchText: genesis 11:30 and sarai was barren; she had no child.
english: And Sarai was barren; she had no child.

searchText: genesis 11:31 and terah took abram his son, and lot the son of haran, his son’s son, and sarai his daughter-in-law, his son abram’s wife; and they went forth with them from ur of the chaldees, to go into the land of canaan; and they came unto haran, and dwelt there.
english: And Terah took Abram his son, and Lot the son of Haran, his son’s son, and Sarai his daughter-in-law, his son Abram’s wife; and they went forth with them from Ur of the Chaldees, to go into the land of Canaan; and they came unto Haran, and dwelt there.
