searchText: genesis 11:32 and the days of terah were two hundred and five years; and terah died in haran.
english: And the days of Terah were two hundred and five years; and Terah died in Haran.

searchText: genesis 12:1 now the lord said unto abram: ‘get thee out of thy country, and from thy kindred, and from thy father’s house, unto the land that i will show thee.
english: Now the LORD said unto Abram: ‘Get thee out of thy country, and from thy kindred, and from thy father’s house, unto the land that I will show thee.

searchText: genesis 12:2 and i will make of thee a great nation, and i will bless thee, and make thy name great; and be thou a blessing.
english: And I will make of thee a great nation, and I will bless thee, and make thy name great; and be thou a blessing.

searchText: genesis 12:3 and i will bless them that bless thee, and him that curseth thee will i curse; and in thee shall all the families of the earth be blessed.’
english: And I will bless them that bless thee, and him that curseth thee will I curse; and in thee shall all the families of the earth be blessed.’

searchText: genesis 12:4 so abram went, as the lord had spoken unto him; and lot went with him; and abram was seventy and five years old when he departed out of haran.
english: So Abram went, as the LORD had spoken unto him; and Lot went with him; and Abram was seventy and five years old when he departed out of Haran.

searchText: genesis 12:5 and abram took sarai his wife, and lot his brother’s son, and all their substance that they had gathered, and the souls that they had gotten in haran; and they went forth to go into the land of canaan; and into the land of canaan they came.
english: And Abram took Sarai his wife, and Lot his brother’s son, and all their substance that they had gathered, and the souls that they had gotten in Haran; and they went forth to go into the land of Canaan; and into the land of Canaan they came.

searchText: genesis 12:6 and abram passed through the land unto the place of shechem, unto the terebinth of moreh. and the canaanite was then in the land.
english: And Abram passed through the land unto the place of Shechem, unto the terebinth of Moreh. And the Canaanite was then in the land.

searchText: genesis 12:7 and the lord appeared unto abram, and said: ‘unto thy seed will i give this land’; and he builded there an altar unto the lord, who appeared unto him.
english: And the LORD appeared unto Abram, and said: ‘Unto thy seed will I give this land’; and he builded there an altar unto the LORD, who appeared unto him.

searchText: genesis 12:8 and he removed from thence unto the mountain on the east of beth-el, and pitched his tent, having beth-el on the west, and ai on the east; and he builded there an altar unto the lord, and called upon the name of the lord.
english: And he removed from thence unto the mountain on the east of Beth-el, and pitched his tent, having Beth-el on the west, and Ai on the east; and he builded there an altar unto the LORD, and called upon the name of the LORD.

searchText: genesis 12:9 and abram journeyed, going on still toward the south.
english: And Abram journeyed, going on still toward the South.

searchText: genesis 12:10 and there was a famine in the land; and abram went down into egypt to sojourn there; for the famine was sore in the land.
english: And there was a famine in the land; and Abram went down into Egypt to sojourn there; for the famine was sore in the land.

searchText: genesis 12:11 and it came to pass, when he was come near to enter into egypt, that he said unto sarai his wife: ‘behold now, i know that thou art a fair woman to look upon.
english: And it came to pass, when he was come near to enter into Egypt, that he said unto Sarai his wife: ‘Behold now, I know that thou art a fair woman to look upon.

searchText: genesis 12:12 and it will come to pass, when the egyptians shall see thee, that they will say: this is his wife; and they will kill me, but thee they will keep alive.
english: And it will come to pass, when the Egyptians shall see thee, that they will say: This is his wife; and they will kill me, but thee they will keep alive.

searchText: genesis 12:13 say, i pray thee, thou art my sister; that it may be well with me for thy sake, and that my soul may live because of thee.’
english: Say, I pray thee, thou art my sister; that it may be well with me for thy sake, and that my soul may live because of thee.’

searchText: genesis 12:14 and it came to pass, that, when abram was come into egypt, the egyptians beheld the woman that she was very fair.
english: And it came to pass, that, when Abram was come into Egypt, the Egyptians beheld the woman that she was very fair.

searchText: genesis 12:15 and the princes of pharaoh saw her, and praised her to pharaoh; and the woman was taken into pharaoh’s house.
english: And the princes of Pharaoh saw her, and praised her to Pharaoh; and the woman was taken into Pharaoh’s house.

searchText: genesis 12:16 and he dealt well with abram for her sake; and he had sheep, and oxen, and he-asses, and men-servants, and maid-servants, and she-asses, and camels.
english: And he dealt well with Abram for her sake; and he had sheep, and oxen, and he-asses, and men-servants, and maid-servants, and she-asses, and camels.

searchText: genesis 12:17 and the lord plagued pharaoh and his house with great plagues because of sarai abram’s wife.
english: And the LORD plagued Pharaoh and his house with great plagues because of Sarai Abram’s wife.

searchText: genesis 12:18 and pharaoh called abram, and said: ‘what is this that thou hast done unto me? why didst thou not tell me that she was thy wife?
english: And Pharaoh called Abram, and said: ‘What is this that thou hast done unto me? why didst thou not tell me that she was thy wife?

searchText: genesis 12:19 why saidst thou: she is my sister? so that i took her to be my wife; now therefore behold thy wife, take her, and go thy way.’
english: Why saidst thou: She is my sister? so that I took her to be my wife; now therefore behold thy wife, take her, and go thy way.’

searchText: genesis 12:20 and pharaoh gave men charge concerning him; and they brought him on the way, and his wife, and all that he had.
english: And Pharaoh gave men charge concerning him; and they brought him on the way, and his wife, and all that he had.

searchText: genesis 13:1 and abram went up out of egypt, he, and his wife, and all that he had, and lot with him, into the south.
english: And Abram went up out of Egypt, he, and his wife, and all that he had, and Lot with him, into the South.

searchText: genesis 13:2 and abram was very rich in cattle, in silver, and in gold.
english: And Abram was very rich in cattle, in silver, and in gold.

searchText: genesis 13:3 and he went on his journeys from the south even to beth-el, unto the place where his tent had been at the beginning, between beth-el and ai;
english: And he went on his journeys from the South even to Beth-el, unto the place where his tent had been at the beginning, between Beth-el and Ai;

searchText: genesis 13:4 unto the place of the altar, which he had made there at the first; and abram called there on the name of the lord.
english: unto the place of the altar, which he had made there at the first; and Abram called there on the name of the LORD.

searchText: genesis 13:5 and lot also, who went with abram, had flocks, and herds, and tents.
english: And Lot also, who went with Abram, had flocks, and herds, and tents.

searchText: genesis 13:6 and the land was not able to bear them, that they might dwell together; for their substance was great, so that they could not dwell together.
english: And the land was not able to bear them, that they might dwell together; for their substance was great, so that they could not dwell together.

searchText: genesis 13:7 and there was a strife between the herdmen of abram’s cattle and the herdmen of lot’s cattle. and the canaanite and the perizzite dwelt then in the land.
english: And there was a strife between the herdmen of Abram’s cattle and the herdmen of Lot’s cattle. And the Canaanite and the Perizzite dwelt then in the land.

searchText: genesis 13:8 and abram said unto lot: ‘let there be no strife, i pray thee, between me and thee, and between my herdmen and thy herdmen; for we are brethren.
english: And Abram said unto Lot: ‘Let there be no strife, I pray thee, between me and thee, and between my herdmen and thy herdmen; for we are brethren.

searchText: genesis 13:9 is not the whole land before thee? separate thyself, i pray thee, from me; if thou wilt take the left hand, then i will go to the right; or if thou take the right hand, then i will go to the left.’
english: Is not the whole land before thee? separate thyself, I pray thee, from me; if thou wilt take the left hand, then I will go to the right; or if thou take the right hand, then I will go to the left.’

searchText: genesis 13:10 and lot lifted up his eyes, and beheld all the plain of the jordan, that it was well watered every where, before the lord destroyed sodom and gomorrah, like the garden of the lord, like the land of egypt, as thou goest unto zoar.
english: And Lot lifted up his eyes, and beheld all the plain of the Jordan, that it was well watered every where, before the LORD destroyed Sodom and Gomorrah, like the garden of the LORD, like the land of Egypt, as thou goest unto Zoar.

searchText: genesis 13:11 so lot chose him all the plain of the jordan; and lot journeyed east; and they separated themselves the one from the other.
english: So Lot chose him all the plain of the Jordan; and Lot journeyed east; and they separated themselves the one from the other.

searchText: genesis 13:12 abram dwelt in the land of canaan, and lot dwelt in the cities of the plain, and moved his tent as far as sodom.
english: Abram dwelt in the land of Canaan, and Lot dwelt in the cities of the Plain, and moved his tent as far as Sodom.

searchText: genesis 13:13 now the men of sodom were wicked and sinners against the lord exceedingly.
english: Now the men of Sodom were wicked and sinners against the LORD exceedingly.

searchText: genesis 13:14 and the lord said unto abram, after that lot was separated from him: ‘lift up now thine eyes, and look from the place where thou art, northward and southward and eastward and westward;
english: And the LORD said unto Abram, after that Lot was separated from him: ‘Lift up now thine eyes, and look from the place where thou art, northward and southward and eastward and westward;

searchText: genesis 13:15 for all the land which thou seest, to thee will i give it, and to thy seed for ever.
english: for all the land which thou seest, to thee will I give it, and to thy seed for ever.

searchText: genesis 13:16 and i will make thy seed as the dust of the earth; so that if a man can number the dust of the earth, then shall thy seed also be numbered.
english: And I will make thy seed as the dust of the earth; so that if a man can number the dust of the earth, then shall thy seed also be numbered.

searchText: genesis 13:17 arise, walk through the land in the length of it and in the breadth of it; for unto thee will i give it.’
english: Arise, walk through the land in the length of it and in the breadth of it; for unto thee will I give it.’

searchText: genesis 13:18 and abram moved his tent, and came and dwelt by the terebinths of mamre, which are in hebron, and built there an altar unto the lord.
english: And Abram moved his tent, and came and dwelt by the terebinths of Mamre, which are in Hebron, and built there an altar unto the LORD.

searchText: genesis 14:1 and it came to pass in the days of amraphel king of shinar, arioch king of ellasar, chedorlaomer king of elam, and tidal king of goiim,
english: And it came to pass in the days of Amraphel king of Shinar, Arioch king of Ellasar, Chedorlaomer king of Elam, and Tidal king of Goiim,

searchText: genesis 14:2 that they made war with bera king of sodom, and with birsha king of gomorrah, shinab king of admah, and shemeber king of zeboiim, and the king of bela—the same is zoar.
english: that they made war with Bera king of Sodom, and with Birsha king of Gomorrah, Shinab king of Admah, and Shemeber king of Zeboiim, and the king of Bela—the same is Zoar.

searchText: genesis 14:3 all these came as allies unto the vale of siddim—the same is the salt sea.
english: All these came as allies unto the vale of Siddim—the same is the Salt Sea.

searchText: genesis 14:4 twelve years they served chedorlaomer, and in the thirteenth year they rebelled.
english: Twelve years they served Chedorlaomer, and in the thirteenth year they rebelled.

searchText: genesis 14:5 and in the fourteenth year came chedorlaomer and the kings that were with him, and smote the rephaim in ashteroth-karnaim, and the zuzim in ham, and the emim in shaveh-kiriathaim,
english: And in the fourteenth year came Chedorlaomer and the kings that were with him, and smote the Rephaim in Ashteroth-karnaim, and the Zuzim in Ham, and the Emim in Shaveh-kiriathaim,

searchText: genesis 14:6 and the horites in their mount seir, unto el-paran, which is by the wilderness.
english: and the Horites in their mount Seir, unto El-paran, which is by the wilderness.

searchText: genesis 14:7 and they turned back, and came to en-mishpat—the same is kadesh—and smote all the country of the amalekites, and also the amorites, that dwelt in hazazon-tamar.
english: And they turned back, and came to En-mishpat—the same is Kadesh—and smote all the country of the Amalekites, and also the Amorites, that dwelt in Hazazon-tamar.

searchText: genesis 14:8 and there went out the king of sodom, and the king of gomorrah, and the king of admah, and the king of zeboiim, and the king of bela—the same is zoar; and they set the battle in array against them in the vale of siddim;
english: And there went out the king of Sodom, and the king of Gomorrah, and the king of Admah, and the king of Zeboiim, and the king of Bela—the same is Zoar; and they set the battle in array against them in the vale of Siddim;

searchText: genesis 14:9 against chedorlaomer king of elam, and tidal king of goiim, and amraphel king of shinar, and arioch king of ellasar; four kings against the five.
english: against Chedorlaomer king of Elam, and Tidal king of Goiim, and Amraphel king of Shinar, and Arioch king of Ellasar; four kings against the five.

searchText: genesis 14:10 now the vale of siddim was full of slime pits; and the kings of sodom and gomorrah fled, and they fell there, and they that remained fled to the mountain.
english: Now the vale of Siddim was full of slime pits; and the kings of Sodom and Gomorrah fled, and they fell there, and they that remained fled to the mountain.

searchText: genesis 14:11 and they took all the goods of sodom and gomorrah, and all their victuals, and went their way.
english: And they took all the goods of Sodom and Gomorrah, and all their victuals, and went their way.

searchText: genesis 14:12 and they took lot, abram’s brother’s son, who dwelt in sodom, and his goods, and departed.
english: And they took Lot, Abram’s brother’s son, who dwelt in Sodom, and his goods, and departed.

searchText: genesis 14:13 and there came one that had escaped, and told abram the hebrew—now he dwelt by the terebinths of mamre the amorite, brother of eshcol, and brother of aner; and these were confederate with abram.
english: And there came one that had escaped, and told Abram the Hebrew—now he dwelt by the terebinths of Mamre the Amorite, brother of Eshcol, and brother of Aner; and these were confederate with Abram.

searchText: genesis 14:14 and when abram heard that his brother was taken captive, he led forth his trained men, born in his house, three hundred and eighteen, and pursued as far as dan.
english: And when Abram heard that his brother was taken captive, he led forth his trained men, born in his house, three hundred and eighteen, and pursued as far as Dan.

searchText: genesis 14:15 and he divided himself against them by night, he and his servants, and smote them, and pursued them unto hobah, which is on the left hand of damascus.
english: And he divided himself against them by night, he and his servants, and smote them, and pursued them unto Hobah, which is on the left hand of Damascus.

searchText: genesis 14:16 and he brought back all the goods, and also brought back his brother lot, and his goods, and the women also, and the people.
english: And he brought back all the goods, and also brought back his brother Lot, and his goods, and the women also, and the people.

searchText: genesis 14:17 and the king of sodom went out to meet him, after his return from the slaughter of chedorlaomer and the kings that were with him, at the vale of shaveh—the same is the king’s vale.
english: And the king of Sodom went out to meet him, after his return from the slaughter of Chedorlaomer and the kings that were with him, at the vale of Shaveh—the same is the King’s Vale.

searchText: genesis 14:18 and melchizedek king of salem brought forth bread and wine; and he was priest of god the most high.
english: And Melchizedek king of Salem brought forth bread and wine; and he was priest of God the Most High.

searchText: genesis 14:19 and he blessed him, and said: ‘blessed be abram of god most high, maker of heaven and earth;
english: And he blessed him, and said: ‘Blessed be Abram of God Most High, Maker of heaven and earth;

searchText: genesis 14:20 and blessed be god the most high, who hath delivered thine enemies into thy hand.’ and he gave him a tenth of all.
english: and blessed be God the Most High, who hath delivered thine enemies into thy hand.’ And he gave him a tenth of all.

searchText: genesis 14:21 and the king of sodom said unto abram: ‘give me the persons, and take the goods to thyself.’
english: And the king of Sodom said unto Abram: ‘Give me the persons, and take the goods to thyself.’

searchText: genesis 14:22 and abram said to the king of sodom: ‘i have lifted up my hand unto the lord, god most high, maker of heaven and earth,
english: And Abram said to the king of Sodom: ‘I have lifted up my hand unto the LORD, God Most High, Maker of heaven and earth,

searchText: genesis 14:23 that i will not take a thread nor a shoe-latchet nor aught that is thine, lest thou shouldest say: i have made abram rich;
english: that I will not take a thread nor a shoe-latchet nor aught that is thine, lest thou shouldest say: I have made Abram rich;

searchText: genesis 14:24 save only that which the young men have eaten, and the portion of the men which went with me, aner, eshcol, and mamre, let them take their portion.’
english: save only that which the young men have eaten, and the portion of the men which went with me, Aner, Eshcol, and Mamre, let them take their portion.’

searchText: genesis 15:1 after these things the word of the lord came unto abram in a vision, saying: ‘fear not, abram, i am thy shield, thy reward shall be exceeding great.’
english: After these things the word of the LORD came unto Abram in a vision, saying: ‘Fear not, Abram, I am thy shield, thy reward shall be exceeding great.’

searchText: genesis 15:2 and abram said: ‘o lord god, what wilt thou give me, seeing i go hence childless, and he that shall be possessor of my house is eliezer of damascus?’
english: And Abram said: ‘O Lord GOD, what wilt Thou give me, seeing I go hence childless, and he that shall be possessor of my house is Eliezer of Damascus?’

searchText: genesis 15:3 and abram said: ‘behold, to me thou hast given no seed, and, lo, one born in my house is to be mine heir.’
english: And Abram said: ‘Behold, to me Thou hast given no seed, and, lo, one born in my house is to be mine heir.’

searchText: genesis 15:4 and, behold, the word of the lord came unto him, saying: ‘this man shall not be thine heir; but he that shall come forth out of thine own bowels shall be thine heir.’
english: And, behold, the word of the LORD came unto him, saying: ‘This man shall not be thine heir; but he that shall come forth out of thine own bowels shall be thine heir.’

searchText: genesis 15:5 and he brought him forth abroad, and said: ‘look now toward heaven, and count the stars, if thou be able to count them’; and he said unto him: ‘so shall thy seed be.’
english: And He brought him forth abroad, and said: ‘Look now toward heaven, and count the stars, if thou be able to count them’; and He said unto him: ‘So shall thy seed be.’

searchText: genesis 15:6 and he believed in the lord; and he counted it to him for righteousness.
english: And he believed in the LORD; and He counted it to him for righteousness.

searchText: genesis 15:7 and he said unto him: ‘i am the lord that brought thee out of ur of the chaldees, to give thee this land to inherit it.’
english: And He said unto him: ‘I am the LORD that brought thee out of Ur of the Chaldees, to give thee this land to inherit it.’

searchText: genesis 15:8 and he said: ‘o lord god, whereby shall i know that i shall inherit it?’
english: And he said: ‘O Lord GOD, whereby shall I know that I shall inherit it?’

searchText: genesis 15:9 and he said unto him: ‘take me a heifer of three years old, and a she-goat of three years old, and a ram of three years old, and a turtle-dove, and a young pigeon.’
english: And He said unto him: ‘Take Me a heifer of three years old, and a she-goat of three years old, and a ram of three years old, and a turtle-dove, and a young pigeon.’

searchText: genesis 15:10 and he took him all these, and divided them in the midst, and laid each half over against the other; but the birds divided he not.
english: And he took him all these, and divided them in the midst, and laid each half over against the other; but the birds divided he not.

searchText: genesis 15:11 and the birds of prey came down upon the carcasses, and abram drove them away.
english: And the birds of prey came down upon the carcasses, and Abram drove them away.

searchText: genesis 15:12 and it came to pass, that, when the sun was going down, a deep sleep fell upon abram; and, lo, a dread, even a great darkness, fell upon him.
english: And it came to pass, that, when the sun was going down, a deep sleep fell upon Abram; and, lo, a dread, even a great darkness, fell upon him.

searchText: genesis 15:13 and he said unto abram: ‘know of a surety that thy seed shall be a stranger in a land that is not theirs, and shall serve them; and they shall afflict them four hundred years;
english: And He said unto Abram: ‘Know of a surety that thy seed shall be a stranger in a land that is not theirs, and shall serve them; and they shall afflict them four hundred years;

searchText: genesis 15:14 and also that nation, whom they shall serve, will i judge; and afterward shall they come out with great substance.
english: and also that nation, whom they shall serve, will I judge; and afterward shall they come out with great substance.

searchText: genesis 15:15 but thou shalt go to thy fathers in peace; thou shalt be buried in a good old age.
english: But thou shalt go to thy fathers in peace; thou shalt be buried in a good old age.

searchText: genesis 15:16 and in the fourth generation they shall come back hither; for the iniquity of the amorite is not yet full.’
english: And in the fourth generation they shall come back hither; for the iniquity of the Amorite is not yet full.’

searchText: genesis 15:17 and it came to pass, that, when the sun went down, and there was thick darkness, behold a smoking furnace, and a flaming torch that passed between these pieces.
english: And it came to pass, that, when the sun went down, and there was thick darkness, behold a smoking furnace, and a flaming torch that passed between these pieces.

searchText: genesis 15:18 in that day the lord made a covenant with abram, saying: ‘unto thy seed have i given this land, from the river of egypt unto the great river, the river euphrates;
english: In that day the LORD made a covenant with Abram, saying: ‘Unto thy seed have I given this land, from the river of Egypt unto the great river, the river Euphrates;

searchText: genesis 15:19 the kenite, and the kenizzite, and the kadmonite,
english: the Kenite, and the Kenizzite, and the Kadmonite,

searchText: genesis 15:20 and the hittite, and the perizzite, and the rephaim,
english: and the Hittite, and the Perizzite, and the Rephaim,

searchText: genesis 15:21 and the amorite, and the canaanite, and the girgashite, and the jebusite.’
english: and the Amorite, and the Canaanite, and the Girgashite, and the Jebusite.’

searchText: genesis 16:1 now sarai abram’s wife bore him no children; and she had a handmaid, an egyptian, whose name was hagar.
english: Now Sarai Abram’s wife bore him no children; and she had a handmaid, an Egyptian, whose name was Hagar.

searchText: genesis 16:2 and sarai said unto abram: ‘behold now, the lord hath restrained me from bearing; go in, i pray thee, unto my handmaid; it may be that i shall be builded up through her.’ and abram hearkened to the voice of sarai.
english: And Sarai said unto Abram: ‘Behold now, the LORD hath restrained me from bearing; go in, I pray thee, unto my handmaid; it may be that I shall be builded up through her.’ And Abram hearkened to the voice of Sarai.

searchText: genesis 16:3 and sarai abram’s wife took hagar the egyptian, her handmaid, after abram had dwelt ten years in the land of canaan, and gave her to abram her husband to be his wife.
english: And Sarai Abram’s wife took Hagar the Egyptian, her handmaid, after Abram had dwelt ten years in the land of Canaan, and gave her to Abram her husband to be his wife.

searchText: genesis 16:4 and he went in unto hagar, and she conceived; and when she saw that she had conceived, her mistress was despised in her eyes.
english: And he went in unto Hagar, and she conceived; and when she saw that she had conceived, her mistress was despised in her eyes.

searchText: genesis 16:5 and sarai said unto abram: ‘my wrong be upon thee: i gave my handmaid into thy bosom; and when she saw that she had conceived, i was despised in her eyes: the lord judge between me and thee.’
english: And Sarai said unto Abram: ‘My wrong be upon thee: I gave my handmaid into thy bosom; and when she saw that she had conceived, I was despised in her eyes: the LORD judge between me and thee.’

searchText: genesis 16:6 but abram said unto sarai: ‘behold, thy maid is in thy hand; do to her that which is good in thine eyes.’ and sarai dealt harshly with her, and she fled from her face.
english: But Abram said unto Sarai: ‘Behold, thy maid is in thy hand; do to her that which is good in thine eyes.’ And Sarai dealt harshly with her, and she fled from her face.

searchText: genesis 16:7 and the angel of the lord found her by a fountain of water in the wilderness, by the fountain in the way to shur.
english: And the angel of the LORD found her by a fountain of water in the wilderness, by the fountain in the way to Shur.

searchText: genesis 16:8 and he said: ‘hagar, sarai’s handmaid, whence camest thou? and whither goest thou?’ and she said: ‘i flee from the face of my mistress sarai.’
english: And he said: ‘Hagar, Sarai’s handmaid, whence camest thou? and whither goest thou?’ And she said: ‘I flee from the face of my mistress Sarai.’

searchText: genesis 16:9 and the angel of the lord said unto her: ‘return to thy mistress, and submit thyself under her hands.’
english: And the angel of the LORD said unto her: ‘Return to thy mistress, and submit thyself under her hands.’

searchText: genesis 16:10 and the angel of the lord said unto her: ‘i will greatly multiply thy seed, that it shall not be numbered for multitude.
english: And the angel of the LORD said unto her: ‘I will greatly multiply thy seed, that it shall not be numbered for multitude.

searchText: genesis 16:11 and the angel of the lord said unto her: ‘behold, thou art with child, and shalt bear a son; and thou shalt call his name ishmael, because the lord hath heard thy affliction.
english: And the angel of the LORD said unto her: ‘Behold, thou art with child, and shalt bear a son; and thou shalt call his name Ishmael, because the LORD hath heard thy affliction.

searchText: genesis 16:12 and he shall be a wild ass of a man: his hand shall be against every man, and every man’s hand against him; and he shall dwell in the face of all his brethren.’
english: And he shall be a wild ass of a man: his hand shall be against every man, and every man’s hand against him; and he shall dwell in the face of all his brethren.’

searchText: genesis 16:13 and she called the name of the lord that spoke unto her, thou art a god of seeing; for she said: ‘have i even here seen him that seeth me?’
english: And she called the name of the LORD that spoke unto her, Thou art a God of seeing; for she said: ‘Have I even here seen Him that seeth Me?’

searchText: genesis 16:14 wherefore the well was called beer-lahai-roi; behold, it is between kadesh and bered.
english: Wherefore the well was called Beer-lahai-roi; behold, it is between Kadesh and Bered.

searchText: genesis 16:15 and hagar bore abram a son; and abram called the name of his son, whom hagar bore, ishmael.
english: And Hagar bore Abram a son; and Abram called the name of his son, whom Hagar bore, Ishmael.

searchText: genesis 16:16 and abram was fourscore and six years old, when hagar bore ishmael to abram.
english: And Abram was fourscore and six years old, when Hagar bore Ishmael to Abram.

searchText: genesis 17:1 and when abram was ninety years old and nine, the lord appeared to abram, and said unto him: ‘i am god almighty; walk before me, and be thou wholehearted.
english: And when Abram was ninety years old and nine, the LORD appeared to Abram, and said unto him: ‘I am God Almighty; walk before Me, and be thou wholehearted.

searchText: genesis 17:2 and i will make my covenant between me and thee, and will multiply thee exceedingly.’
english: And I will make My covenant between Me and thee, and will multiply thee exceedingly.’

searchText: genesis 17:3 and abram fell on his face; and god talked with him, saying:
english: And Abram fell on his face; and God talked with him, saying:

searchText: genesis 17:4 ’as for me, behold, my covenant is with thee, and thou shalt be the father of a multitude of nations.
english: ’As for Me, behold, My covenant is with thee, and thou shalt be the father of a multitude of nations.

searchText: genesis 17:5 neither shall thy name any more be called abram, but thy name shall be abraham; for the father of a multitude of nations have i made thee.
english: Neither shall thy name any more be called Abram, but thy name shall be Abraham; for the father of a multitude of nations have I made thee.

searchText: genesis 17:6 and i will make thee exceeding fruitful, and i will make nations of thee, and kings shall come out of thee.
english: And I will make thee exceeding fruitful, and I will make nations of thee, and kings shall come out of thee.

searchText: genesis 17:7 and i will establish my covenant between me and thee and thy seed after thee throughout their generations for an everlasting covenant, to be a god unto thee and to thy seed after thee.
english: And I will establish My covenant between Me and thee and thy seed after thee throughout their generations for an everlasting covenant, to be a God unto thee and to thy seed after thee.

searchText: genesis 17:8 and i will give unto thee, and to thy seed after thee, the land of thy sojournings, all the land of canaan, for an everlasting possession; and i will be their god.’
english: And I will give unto thee, and to thy seed after thee, the land of thy sojournings, all the land of Canaan, for an everlasting possession; and I will be their God.’

searchText: genesis 17:9 and god said unto abraham: ‘and as for thee, thou shalt keep my covenant, thou, and thy seed after thee throughout their generations.
english: And God said unto Abraham: ‘And as for thee, thou shalt keep My covenant, thou, and thy seed after thee throughout their generations.

searchText: genesis 17:10 this is my covenant, which ye shall keep, between me and you and thy seed after thee: every male among you shall be circumcised.
english: This is My covenant, which ye shall keep, between Me and you and thy seed after thee: every male among you shall be circumcised.

searchText: genesis 17:11 and ye shall be circumcised in the flesh of your foreskin; and it shall be a token of a covenant betwixt me and you.
english: And ye shall be circumcised in the flesh of your foreskin; and it shall be a token of a covenant betwixt Me and you.

searchText: genesis 17:12 and he that is eight days old shall be circumcised among you, every male throughout your generations, he that is born in the house, or bought with money of any foreigner, that is not of thy seed.
english: And he that is eight days old shall be circumcised among you, every male throughout your generations, he that is born in the house, or bought with money of any foreigner, that is not of thy seed.

searchText: genesis 17:13 he that is born in thy house, and he that is bought with thy money, must needs be circumcised; and my covenant shall be in your flesh for an everlasting covenant.
english: He that is born in thy house, and he that is bought with thy money, must needs be circumcised; and My covenant shall be in your flesh for an everlasting covenant.

searchText: genesis 17:14 and the uncircumcised male who is not circumcised in the flesh of his foreskin, that soul shall be cut off from his people; he hath broken my covenant.’
english: And the uncircumcised male who is not circumcised in the flesh of his foreskin, that soul shall be cut off from his people; he hath broken My covenant.’

searchText: genesis 17:15 and god said unto abraham: ‘as for sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name sarai, but sarah shall her name be.
english: And God said unto Abraham: ‘As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be.

searchText: genesis 17:16 and i will bless her, and moreover i will give thee a son of her; yea, i will bless her, and she shall be a mother of nations; kings of peoples shall be of her.’
english: And I will bless her, and moreover I will give thee a son of her; yea, I will bless her, and she shall be a mother of nations; kings of peoples shall be of her.’

searchText: genesis 17:17 then abraham fell upon his face, and laughed, and said in his heart: ‘shall a child be born unto him that is a hundred years old? and shall sarah, that is ninety years old, bear?’
english: Then Abraham fell upon his face, and laughed, and said in his heart: ‘Shall a child be born unto him that is a hundred years old? and shall Sarah, that is ninety years old, bear?’

searchText: genesis 17:18 and abraham said unto god: ‘oh that ishmael might live before thee! ’
english: And Abraham said unto God: ‘Oh that Ishmael might live before Thee! ’

searchText: genesis 17:19 and god said: ‘‘nay, but sarah thy wife shall bear thee a son; and thou shalt call his name isaac; and i will establish my covenant with him for an everlasting covenant for his seed after him.
english: And God said: ‘‘Nay, but Sarah thy wife shall bear thee a son; and thou shalt call his name Isaac; and I will establish My covenant with him for an everlasting covenant for his seed after him.

searchText: genesis 17:20 and as for ishmael, i have heard thee; behold, i have blessed him, and will make him fruitful, and will multiply him exceedingly; twelve princes shall he beget, and i will make him a great nation.
english: And as for Ishmael, I have heard thee; behold, I have blessed him, and will make him fruitful, and will multiply him exceedingly; twelve princes shall he beget, and I will make him a great nation.

searchText: genesis 17:21 but my covenant will i establish with isaac, whom sarah shall bear unto thee at this set time in the next year.’
english: But My covenant will I establish with Isaac, whom Sarah shall bear unto thee at this set time in the next year.’

searchText: genesis 17:22 and he left off talking with him, and god went up from abraham.
english: And He left off talking with him, and God went up from Abraham.

searchText: genesis 17:23 and abraham took ishmael his son, and all that were born in his house, and all that were bought with his money, every male among the men of abraham’s house, and circumcised the flesh of their foreskin in the selfsame day, as god had said unto him.
english: And Abraham took Ishmael his son, and all that were born in his house, and all that were bought with his money, every male among the men of Abraham’s house, and circumcised the flesh of their foreskin in the selfsame day, as God had said unto him.

searchText: genesis 17:24 and abraham was ninety years old and nine, when he was circumcised in the flesh of his foreskin.
english: And Abraham was ninety years old and nine, when he was circumcised in the flesh of his foreskin.

searchText: genesis 17:25 and ishmael his son was thirteen years old, when he was circumcised in the flesh of his foreskin.
english: And Ishmael his son was thirteen years old, when he was circumcised in the flesh of his foreskin.

searchText: genesis 17:26 in the selfsame day was abraham circumcised, and ishmael his son.
english: In the selfsame day was Abraham circumcised, and Ishmael his son.

searchText: genesis 17:27 and all the men of his house, those born in the house, and those bought with money of a foreigner, were circumcised with him.
english: And all the men of his house, those born in the house, and those bought with money of a foreigner, were circumcised with him.

searchText: genesis 18:1 and the lord appeared unto him by the terebinths of mamre, as he sat in the tent door in the heat of the day;
english: And the LORD appeared unto him by the terebinths of Mamre, as he sat in the tent door in the heat of the day;

searchText: genesis 18:2 and he lifted up his eyes and looked, and, lo, three men stood over against him; and when he saw them, he ran to meet them from the tent door, and bowed down to the earth,
english: and he lifted up his eyes and looked, and, lo, three men stood over against him; and when he saw them, he ran to meet them from the tent door, and bowed down to the earth,

searchText: genesis 18:3 and said: ‘my lord, if now i have found favour in thy sight, pass not away, i pray thee, from thy servant.
english: and said: ‘My lord, if now I have found favour in thy sight, pass not away, I pray thee, from thy servant.

searchText: genesis 18:4 let now a little water be fetched, and wash your feet, and recline yourselves under the tree.
english: Let now a little water be fetched, and wash your feet, and recline yourselves under the tree.

searchText: genesis 18:5 and i will fetch a morsel of bread, and stay ye your heart; after that ye shall pass on; forasmuch as ye are come to your servant.’ and they said: ‘so do, as thou hast said.’
english: And I will fetch a morsel of bread, and stay ye your heart; after that ye shall pass on; forasmuch as ye are come to your servant.’ And they said: ‘So do, as thou hast said.’

searchText: genesis 18:6 and abraham hastened into the tent unto sarah, and said: ‘make ready quickly three measures of fine meal, knead it, and make cakes.’
english: And Abraham hastened into the tent unto Sarah, and said: ‘Make ready quickly three measures of fine meal, knead it, and make cakes.’

searchText: genesis 18:7 and abraham ran unto the herd, and fetched a calf tender and good, and gave it unto the servant; and he hastened to dress it.
english: And Abraham ran unto the herd, and fetched a calf tender and good, and gave it unto the servant; and he hastened to dress it.

searchText: genesis 18:8 and he took curd, and milk, and the calf which he had dressed, and set it before them; and he stood by them under the tree, and they did eat.
english: And he took curd, and milk, and the calf which he had dressed, and set it before them; and he stood by them under the tree, and they did eat.

searchText: genesis 18:9 and they said unto him: ‘where is sarah thy wife?’ and he said: ‘behold, in the tent.’
english: And they said unto him: ‘Where is Sarah thy wife?’ And he said: ‘Behold, in the tent.’

searchText: genesis 18:10 and he said: ‘i will certainly return unto thee when the season cometh round; and, lo, sarah thy wife shall have a son.’ and sarah heard in the tent door, which was behind him.—
english: And He said: ‘I will certainly return unto thee when the season cometh round; and, lo, Sarah thy wife shall have a son.’ And Sarah heard in the tent door, which was behind him.—

searchText: genesis 18:11 now abraham and sarah were old, and well stricken in age; it had ceased to be with sarah after the manner of women.—
english: Now Abraham and Sarah were old, and well stricken in age; it had ceased to be with Sarah after the manner of women.—

searchText: genesis 18:12 and sarah laughed within herself, saying: ‘after i am waxed old shall i have pleasure, my lord being old also?’
english: And Sarah laughed within herself, saying: ‘After I am waxed old shall I have pleasure, my lord being old also?’

searchText: genesis 18:13 and the lord said unto abraham: ‘wherefore did sarah laugh, saying: shall i of a surety bear a child, who am old?
english: And the LORD said unto Abraham: ‘Wherefore did Sarah laugh, saying: Shall I of a surety bear a child, who am old?

searchText: genesis 18:14 is any thing too hard for the lord. at the set time i will return unto thee, when the season cometh round, and sarah shall have a son.’
english: Is any thing too hard for the LORD. At the set time I will return unto thee, when the season cometh round, and Sarah shall have a son.’

searchText: genesis 18:15 then sarah denied, saying: ‘i laughed not’; for she was afraid. and he said: ‘nay; but thou didst laugh.’
english: Then Sarah denied, saying: ‘I laughed not’; for she was afraid. And He said: ‘Nay; but thou didst laugh.’

searchText: genesis 18:16 and the men rose up from thence, and looked out toward sodom; and abraham went with them to bring them on the way.
english: And the men rose up from thence, and looked out toward Sodom; and Abraham went with them to bring them on the way.

searchText: genesis 18:17 and the lord said: ‘shall i hide from abraham that which i am doing;
english: And the LORD said: ‘Shall I hide from Abraham that which I am doing;

searchText: genesis 18:18 seeing that abraham shall surely become a great and mighty nation, and all the nations of the earth shall be blessed in him?
english: seeing that Abraham shall surely become a great and mighty nation, and all the nations of the earth shall be blessed in him?

searchText: genesis 18:19 for i have known him, to the end that he may command his children and his household after him, that they may keep the way of the lord, to do righteousness and justice; to the end that the lord may bring upon abraham that which he hath spoken of him.’
english: For I have known him, to the end that he may command his children and his household after him, that they may keep the way of the LORD, to do righteousness and justice; to the end that the LORD may bring upon Abraham that which He hath spoken of him.’

searchText: genesis 18:20 and the lord said: ‘verily, the cry of sodom and gomorrah is great, and, verily, their sin is exceeding grievous.
english: And the LORD said: ‘Verily, the cry of Sodom and Gomorrah is great, and, verily, their sin is exceeding grievous.

searchText: genesis 18:21 i will go down now, and see whether they have done altogether according to the cry of it, which is come unto me; and if not, i will know.’
english: I will go down now, and see whether they have done altogether according to the cry of it, which is come unto Me; and if not, I will know.’

searchText: genesis 18:22 and the men turned from thence, and went toward sodom; but abraham stood yet before the lord.
english: And the men turned from thence, and went toward Sodom; but Abraham stood yet before the LORD.

searchText: genesis 18:23 and abraham drew near, and said: ‘will you indeed sweep away the righteous with the wicked?
english: And Abraham drew near, and said: ‘Will You indeed sweep away the righteous with the wicked?

searchText: genesis 18:24 peradventure there are fifty righteous within the city; wilt thou indeed sweep away and not forgive the place for the fifty righteous that are therein?
english: Peradventure there are fifty righteous within the city; wilt Thou indeed sweep away and not forgive the place for the fifty righteous that are therein?

searchText: genesis 18:25 that be far from thee to do after this manner, to slay the righteous with the wicked, that so the righteous should be as the wicked; that be far from thee; shall not the judge of all the earth do justly?’
english: That be far from Thee to do after this manner, to slay the righteous with the wicked, that so the righteous should be as the wicked; that be far from Thee; shall not the judge of all the earth do justly?’

searchText: genesis 18:26 and the lord said: ‘if i find in sodom fifty righteous within the city, then i will forgive all the place for their sake.’
english: And the LORD said: ‘If I find in Sodom fifty righteous within the city, then I will forgive all the place for their sake.’

searchText: genesis 18:27 and abraham answered and said: ‘behold now, i have taken upon me to speak unto the lord, who am but dust and ashes.
english: And Abraham answered and said: ‘Behold now, I have taken upon me to speak unto the Lord, who am but dust and ashes.

searchText: genesis 18:28 peradventure there shall lack five of the fifty righteous; wilt thou destroy all the city for lack of five?’ and he said: ‘i will not destroy it, if i find there forty and five.’
english: Peradventure there shall lack five of the fifty righteous; wilt Thou destroy all the city for lack of five?’ And He said: ‘I will not destroy it, if I find there forty and five.’

searchText: genesis 18:29 and he spoke unto him yet again, and said: ‘peradventure there shall be forty found there.’ and he said: ‘i will not do it for the forty’s sake.’
english: And he spoke unto Him yet again, and said: ‘Peradventure there shall be forty found there.’ And He said: ‘I will not do it for the forty’s sake.’

searchText: genesis 18:30 and he said: ‘oh, let not the lord be angry, and i will speak. peradventure there shall thirty be found there.’ and he said: ‘i will not do it, if i find thirty there.’
english: And he said: ‘Oh, let not the Lord be angry, and I will speak. Peradventure there shall thirty be found there.’ And He said: ‘I will not do it, if I find thirty there.’

searchText: genesis 18:31 and he said: ‘behold now, i have taken upon me to speak unto the lord. peradventure there shall be twenty found there.’ and he said: ‘i will not destroy it for the twenty’s sake.’
english: And he said: ‘Behold now, I have taken upon me to speak unto the Lord. Peradventure there shall be twenty found there.’ And He said: ‘I will not destroy it for the twenty’s sake.’

searchText: genesis 18:32 and he said: ‘oh, let not the lord be angry, and i will speak yet but this once. peradventure ten shall be found there.’ and he said: ‘i will not destroy it for the ten’s sake.’
english: And he said: ‘Oh, let not the Lord be angry, and I will speak yet but this once. Peradventure ten shall be found there.’ And He said: ‘I will not destroy it for the ten’s sake.’

searchText: genesis 18:33 and the lord went his way, as soon as he had left off speaking to abraham; and abraham returned unto his place.
english: And the LORD went His way, as soon as He had left off speaking to Abraham; and Abraham returned unto his place.

searchText: genesis 19:1 and the two angels came to sodom at even; and lot sat in the gate of sodom; and lot saw them, and rose up to meet them; and he fell down on his face to the earth;
english: And the two angels came to Sodom at even; and Lot sat in the gate of Sodom; and Lot saw them, and rose up to meet them; and he fell down on his face to the earth;

searchText: genesis 19:2 and he said: ‘behold now, my lords, turn aside, i pray you, into your servant’s house, and tarry all night, and wash your feet, and ye shall rise up early, and go on your way.’ and they said: ‘nay; but we will abide in the broad place all night.’
english: and he said: ‘Behold now, my lords, turn aside, I pray you, into your servant’s house, and tarry all night, and wash your feet, and ye shall rise up early, and go on your way.’ And they said: ‘Nay; but we will abide in the broad place all night.’

searchText: genesis 19:3 and he urged them greatly; and they turned in unto him, and entered into his house; and he made them a feast, and did bake unleavened bread, and they did eat.
english: And he urged them greatly; and they turned in unto him, and entered into his house; and he made them a feast, and did bake unleavened bread, and they did eat.

searchText: genesis 19:4 but before they lay down, the men of the city, even the men of sodom, compassed the house round, both young and old, all the people from every quarter.
english: But before they lay down, the men of the city, even the men of Sodom, compassed the house round, both young and old, all the people from every quarter.

searchText: genesis 19:5 and they called unto lot, and said unto him: ‘where are the men that came in to thee this night? bring them out unto us, that we may know them.’
english: And they called unto Lot, and said unto him: ‘Where are the men that came in to thee this night? bring them out unto us, that we may know them.’

searchText: genesis 19:6 and lot went out unto them to the door, and shut the door after him.
english: And Lot went out unto them to the door, and shut the door after him.

searchText: genesis 19:7 and he said: ‘i pray you, my brethren, do not so wickedly.
english: And he said: ‘I pray you, my brethren, do not so wickedly.

searchText: genesis 19:8 behold now, i have two daughters that have not known man; let me, i pray you, bring them out unto you, and do ye to them as is good in your eyes; only unto these men do nothing; forasmuch as they are come under the shadow of my roof.’
english: Behold now, I have two daughters that have not known man; let me, I pray you, bring them out unto you, and do ye to them as is good in your eyes; only unto these men do nothing; forasmuch as they are come under the shadow of my roof.’

searchText: genesis 19:9 and they said: ‘stand back.’ and they said: ‘this one fellow came in to sojourn, and he will needs play the judge; now will we deal worse with thee, than with them.’ and they pressed sore upon the man, even lot, and drew near to break the door.
english: And they said: ‘Stand back.’ And they said: ‘This one fellow came in to sojourn, and he will needs play the judge; now will we deal worse with thee, than with them.’ And they pressed sore upon the man, even Lot, and drew near to break the door.

searchText: genesis 19:10 but the men put forth their hand, and brought lot into the house to them, and the door they shut.
english: But the men put forth their hand, and brought Lot into the house to them, and the door they shut.

searchText: genesis 19:11 and they smote the men that were at the door of the house with blindness, both small and great; so that they wearied themselves to find the door.
english: And they smote the men that were at the door of the house with blindness, both small and great; so that they wearied themselves to find the door.

searchText: genesis 19:12 and the men said unto lot: ‘hast thou here any besides? son-in-law, and thy sons, and thy daughters, and whomsoever thou hast in the city; bring them out of the place;
english: And the men said unto Lot: ‘Hast thou here any besides? son-in-law, and thy sons, and thy daughters, and whomsoever thou hast in the city; bring them out of the place;

searchText: genesis 19:13 for we will destroy this place, because the cry of them is waxed great before the lord; and the lord hath sent us to destroy it.’
english: for we will destroy this place, because the cry of them is waxed great before the LORD; and the LORD hath sent us to destroy it.’

searchText: genesis 19:14 and lot went out, and spoke unto his sons-in-law, who married his daughters, and said: ‘up, get you out of this place; for the lord will destroy the city.’ but he seemed unto his sons-in-law as one that jested.
english: And Lot went out, and spoke unto his sons-in-law, who married his daughters, and said: ‘Up, get you out of this place; for the LORD will destroy the city.’ But he seemed unto his sons-in-law as one that jested.

searchText: genesis 19:15 and when the morning arose, then the angels hastened lot, saying: ‘arise, take thy wife, and thy two daughters that are here; lest thou be swept away in the iniquity of the city.’
english: And when the morning arose, then the angels hastened Lot, saying: ‘Arise, take thy wife, and thy two daughters that are here; lest thou be swept away in the iniquity of the city.’

searchText: genesis 19:16 but he lingered; and the men laid hold upon his hand, and upon the hand of his wife, and upon the hand of his two daughters; the lord being merciful unto him. and they brought him forth, and set him without the city.
english: But he lingered; and the men laid hold upon his hand, and upon the hand of his wife, and upon the hand of his two daughters; the LORD being merciful unto him. And they brought him forth, and set him without the city.

searchText: genesis 19:17 and it came to pass, when they had brought them forth abroad, that he said: ‘escape for thy life; look not behind thee, neither stay thou in all the plain; escape to the mountain, lest thou be swept away.’
english: And it came to pass, when they had brought them forth abroad, that he said: ‘Escape for thy life; look not behind thee, neither stay thou in all the Plain; escape to the mountain, lest thou be swept away.’

searchText: genesis 19:18 and lot said unto them: ‘oh, not so, my lord;
english: And Lot said unto them: ‘Oh, not so, my lord;

searchText: genesis 19:19 behold now, thy servant hath found grace in thy sight, and thou hast magnified thy mercy, which thou hast shown unto me in saving my life; and i cannot escape to the mountain, lest the evil overtake me, and i die.
english: behold now, thy servant hath found grace in thy sight, and thou hast magnified thy mercy, which thou hast shown unto me in saving my life; and I cannot escape to the mountain, lest the evil overtake me, and I die.

searchText: genesis 19:20 behold now, this city is near to flee unto, and it is a little one; oh, let me escape thither—is it not a little one?—and my soul shall live.’
english: Behold now, this city is near to flee unto, and it is a little one; oh, let me escape thither—is it not a little one?—and my soul shall live.’

searchText: genesis 19:21 and he said unto him: ‘see, i have accepted thee concerning this thing also, that i will not overthrow the city of which thou hast spoken.
english: And he said unto him: ‘See, I have accepted thee concerning this thing also, that I will not overthrow the city of which thou hast spoken.

searchText: genesis 19:22 hasten thou, escape thither; for i cannot do any thing till thou be come thither.’—therefore the name of the city was called zoar.—
english: Hasten thou, escape thither; for I cannot do any thing till thou be come thither.’—Therefore the name of the city was called Zoar.—

searchText: genesis 19:23 the sun was risen upon the earth when lot came unto zoar.
english: The sun was risen upon the earth when Lot came unto Zoar.

searchText: genesis 19:24 then the lord caused to rain upon sodom and upon gomorrah brimstone and fire from the lord out of heaven;
english: Then the LORD caused to rain upon Sodom and upon Gomorrah brimstone and fire from the LORD out of heaven;

searchText: genesis 19:25 and he overthrow those cities, and all the plain, and all the inhabitants of the cities, and that which grew upon the ground.
english: and He overthrow those cities, and all the Plain, and all the inhabitants of the cities, and that which grew upon the ground.

searchText: genesis 19:26 but his wife looked back from behind him, and she became a pillar of salt.
english: But his wife looked back from behind him, and she became a pillar of salt.

searchText: genesis 19:27 and abraham got up early in the morning to the place where he had stood before the lord.
english: And Abraham got up early in the morning to the place where he had stood before the LORD.

searchText: genesis 19:28 and he looked out toward sodom and gomorrah, and toward all the land of the plain, and beheld, and, lo, the smoke of the land went up as the smoke of a furnace.
english: And he looked out toward Sodom and Gomorrah, and toward all the land of the Plain, and beheld, and, lo, the smoke of the land went up as the smoke of a furnace.

searchText: genesis 19:29 and it came to pass, when god destroyed the cities of the plain, that god remembered abraham, and sent lot out of the midst of the overthrow, when he overthrew the cities in which lot dwelt.
english: And it came to pass, when God destroyed the cities of the Plain, that God remembered Abraham, and sent Lot out of the midst of the overthrow, when He overthrew the cities in which Lot dwelt.

searchText: genesis 19:30 and lot went up out of zoar, and dwelt in the mountain, and his two daughters with him; for he feared to dwell in zoar; and he dwelt in a cave, he and his two daughters.
english: And Lot went up out of Zoar, and dwelt in the mountain, and his two daughters with him; for he feared to dwell in Zoar; and he dwelt in a cave, he and his two daughters.

searchText: genesis 19:31 and the first-born said unto the younger: ‘our father is old, and there is not a man in the earth to come in unto us after the manner of all the earth.
english: And the first-born said unto the younger: ‘Our father is old, and there is not a man in the earth to come in unto us after the manner of all the earth.

searchText: genesis 19:32 come, let us make our father drink wine, and we will lie with him, that we may preserve seed of our father.’
english: Come, let us make our father drink wine, and we will lie with him, that we may preserve seed of our father.’

searchText: genesis 19:33 and they made their father drink wine that night. and the first-born went in, and lay with her father; and he knew not when she lay down, nor when she arose.
english: And they made their father drink wine that night. And the first-born went in, and lay with her father; and he knew not when she lay down, nor when she arose.

searchText: genesis 19:34 and it came to pass on the morrow, that the first-born said unto the younger: ‘behold, i lay yesternight with my father. let us make him drink wine this night also; and go thou in, and lie with him, that we may preserve seed of our father.’
english: And it came to pass on the morrow, that the first-born said unto the younger: ‘Behold, I lay yesternight with my father. Let us make him drink wine this night also; and go thou in, and lie with him, that we may preserve seed of our father.’

searchText: genesis 19:35 and they made their father drink wine that night also. and the younger arose, and lay with him; and he knew not when she lay down, nor when she arose.
english: And they made their father drink wine that night also. And the younger arose, and lay with him; and he knew not when she lay down, nor when she arose.

searchText: genesis 19:36 thus were both the daughters of lot with child by their father.
english: Thus were both the daughters of Lot with child by their father.

searchText: genesis 19:37 and the first-born bore a son, and called his name moab—the same is the father of the moabites unto this day.
english: And the first-born bore a son, and called his name Moab—the same is the father of the Moabites unto this day.

searchText: genesis 19:38 and the younger, she also bore a son, and called his name ben-ammi—the same is the father of the children of ammon unto this day.
english: And the younger, she also bore a son, and called his name Ben-ammi—the same is the father of the children of Ammon unto this day.

searchText: genesis 20:1 and abraham journeyed from thence toward the land of the south, and dwelt between kadesh and shur; and he sojourned in gerar.
english: And Abraham journeyed from thence toward the land of the South, and dwelt between Kadesh and Shur; and he sojourned in Gerar.

searchText: genesis 20:2 and abraham said of sarah his wife: ‘she is my sister.’ and abimelech king of gerar sent, and took sarah.
english: And Abraham said of Sarah his wife: ‘She is my sister.’ And Abimelech king of Gerar sent, and took Sarah.

searchText: genesis 20:3 but god came to abimelech in a dream of the night, and said to him: ‘behold, thou shalt die, because of the woman whom thou hast taken; for she is a man’s wife.’
english: But God came to Abimelech in a dream of the night, and said to him: ‘Behold, thou shalt die, because of the woman whom thou hast taken; for she is a man’s wife.’

searchText: genesis 20:4 now abimelech had not come near her; and he said: ‘lord, wilt thou slay even a righteous nation?
english: Now Abimelech had not come near her; and he said: ‘Lord, wilt Thou slay even a righteous nation?

searchText: genesis 20:5 said he not himself unto me: she is my sister? and she, even she herself said: he is my brother. in the simplicity of my heart and the innocency of my hands have i done this.’
english: Said he not himself unto me: She is my sister? and she, even she herself said: He is my brother. In the simplicity of my heart and the innocency of my hands have I done this.’

searchText: genesis 20:6 and god said unto him in the dream: ‘yea, i know that in the simplicity of thy heart thou hast done this, and i also withheld thee from sinning against me. therefore suffered i thee not to touch her.
english: And God said unto him in the dream: ‘Yea, I know that in the simplicity of thy heart thou hast done this, and I also withheld thee from sinning against Me. Therefore suffered I thee not to touch her.

searchText: genesis 20:7 now therefore restore the man’s wife; for he is a prophet, and he shall pray for thee, and thou shalt live; and if thou restore her not, know thou that thou shalt surely die, thou, and all that are thine.’
english: Now therefore restore the man’s wife; for he is a prophet, and he shall pray for thee, and thou shalt live; and if thou restore her not, know thou that thou shalt surely die, thou, and all that are thine.’

searchText: genesis 20:8 and abimelech rose early in the morning, and called all his servants, and told all these things in their ears; and the men were sore afraid.
english: And Abimelech rose early in the morning, and called all his servants, and told all these things in their ears; and the men were sore afraid.

searchText: genesis 20:9 then abimelech called abraham, and said unto him: ‘what hast thou done unto us? and wherein have i sinned against thee, that thou hast brought on me and on my kingdom a great sin? thou hast done deeds unto me that ought not to be done.’
english: Then Abimelech called Abraham, and said unto him: ‘What hast thou done unto us? and wherein have I sinned against thee, that thou hast brought on me and on my kingdom a great sin? thou hast done deeds unto me that ought not to be done.’

searchText: genesis 20:10 and abimelech said unto abraham: ‘what sawest thou, that thou hast done this thing?’
english: And Abimelech said unto Abraham: ‘What sawest thou, that thou hast done this thing?’

searchText: genesis 20:11 and abraham said: ‘because i thought: surely the fear of god is not in this place; and they will slay me for my wife’s sake.
english: And Abraham said: ‘Because I thought: Surely the fear of God is not in this place; and they will slay me for my wife’s sake.

searchText: genesis 20:12 and moreover she is indeed my sister, the daughter of my father, but not the daughter of my mother; and so she became my wife.
english: And moreover she is indeed my sister, the daughter of my father, but not the daughter of my mother; and so she became my wife.

searchText: genesis 20:13 and it came to pass, when god caused me to wander from my father’s house, that i said unto her: this is thy kindness which thou shalt show unto me; at every place whither we shall come, say of me: he is my brother.’
english: And it came to pass, when God caused me to wander from my father’s house, that I said unto her: This is thy kindness which thou shalt show unto me; at every place whither we shall come, say of me: He is my brother.’

searchText: genesis 20:14 and abimelech took sheep and oxen, and men-servants and women-servants, and gave them unto abraham, and restored him sarah his wife.
english: And Abimelech took sheep and oxen, and men-servants and women-servants, and gave them unto Abraham, and restored him Sarah his wife.

searchText: genesis 20:15 and abimelech said: ‘behold, my land is before thee: dwell where it pleaseth thee.’
english: And Abimelech said: ‘Behold, my land is before thee: dwell where it pleaseth thee.’

searchText: genesis 20:16 and unto sarah he said: ‘behold, i have given thy brother a thousand pieces of silver; behold, it is for thee a covering of the eyes to all that are with thee; and before all men thou art righted.’
english: And unto Sarah he said: ‘Behold, I have given thy brother a thousand pieces of silver; behold, it is for thee a covering of the eyes to all that are with thee; and before all men thou art righted.’

searchText: genesis 20:17 and abraham prayed unto god; and god healed abimelech, and his wife, and his maid-servants; and they bore children.
english: And Abraham prayed unto God; and God healed Abimelech, and his wife, and his maid-servants; and they bore children.

searchText: genesis 20:18 for the lord had fast closed up all the wombs of the house of abimelech, because of sarah abraham’s wife.
english: For the LORD had fast closed up all the wombs of the house of Abimelech, because of Sarah Abraham’s wife.

searchText: genesis 21:1 and the lord remembered sarah as he had said, and the lord did unto sarah as he had spoken.
english: And the LORD remembered Sarah as He had said, and the LORD did unto Sarah as He had spoken.

searchText: genesis 21:2 and sarah conceived, and bore abraham a son in his old age, at the set time of which god had spoken to him.
english: And Sarah conceived, and bore Abraham a son in his old age, at the set time of which God had spoken to him.

searchText: genesis 21:3 and abraham called the name of his son that was born unto him, whom sarah bore to him, isaac.
english: And Abraham called the name of his son that was born unto him, whom Sarah bore to him, Isaac.

searchText: genesis 21:4 and abraham circumcised his son isaac when he was eight days old, as god had commanded him.
english: And Abraham circumcised his son Isaac when he was eight days old, as God had commanded him.

searchText: genesis 21:5 and abraham was a hundred years old, when his son isaac was born unto him.
english: And Abraham was a hundred years old, when his son Isaac was born unto him.

searchText: genesis 21:6 and sarah said: ‘god hath made laughter for me; every one that heareth will laugh on account of me.’
english: And Sarah said: ‘God hath made laughter for me; every one that heareth will laugh on account of me.’

searchText: genesis 21:7 and she said: ‘who would have said unto abraham, that sarah should give children suck? for i have borne him a son in his old age.’
english: And she said: ‘Who would have said unto Abraham, that Sarah should give children suck? for I have borne him a son in his old age.’

searchText: genesis 21:8 and the child grew, and was weaned. and abraham made a great feast on the day that isaac was weaned.
english: And the child grew, and was weaned. And Abraham made a great feast on the day that Isaac was weaned.

searchText: genesis 21:9 and sarah saw the son of hagar the egyptian, whom she had borne unto abraham, making sport.
english: And Sarah saw the son of Hagar the Egyptian, whom she had borne unto Abraham, making sport.

searchText: genesis 21:10 wherefore she said unto abraham: ‘cast out this bondwoman and her son; for the son of this bondwoman shall not be heir with my son, even with isaac.’
english: Wherefore she said unto Abraham: ‘Cast out this bondwoman and her son; for the son of this bondwoman shall not be heir with my son, even with Isaac.’

searchText: genesis 21:11 and the thing was very grievous in abraham’s sight on account of his son.
english: And the thing was very grievous in Abraham’s sight on account of his son.

searchText: genesis 21:12 and god said unto abraham: ‘let it not be grievous in thy sight because of the lad, and because of thy bondwoman; in all that sarah saith unto thee, hearken unto her voice; for in isaac shall seed be called to thee.
english: And God said unto Abraham: ‘Let it not be grievous in thy sight because of the lad, and because of thy bondwoman; in all that Sarah saith unto thee, hearken unto her voice; for in Isaac shall seed be called to thee.

searchText: genesis 21:13 and also of the son of the bondwoman will i make a nation, because he is thy seed.’
english: And also of the son of the bondwoman will I make a nation, because he is thy seed.’

searchText: genesis 21:14 and abraham arose up early in the morning, and took bread and a bottle of water, and gave it unto hagar, putting it on her shoulder, and the child, and sent her away; and she departed, and strayed in the wilderness of beer-sheba.
english: And Abraham arose up early in the morning, and took bread and a bottle of water, and gave it unto Hagar, putting it on her shoulder, and the child, and sent her away; and she departed, and strayed in the wilderness of Beer-sheba.

searchText: genesis 21:15 and the water in the bottle was spent, and she cast the child under one of the shrubs.
english: And the water in the bottle was spent, and she cast the child under one of the shrubs.

searchText: genesis 21:16 and she went, and sat her down over against him a good way off, as it were a bow-shot; for she said: ‘let me not look upon the death of the child.’ and she sat over against him, and lifted up her voice, and wept.
english: And she went, and sat her down over against him a good way off, as it were a bow-shot; for she said: ‘Let me not look upon the death of the child.’ And she sat over against him, and lifted up her voice, and wept.

searchText: genesis 21:17 and god heard the voice of the lad; and the angel of god called to hagar out of heaven, and said unto her: ‘what aileth thee, hagar? fear not; for god hath heard the voice of the lad where he is.
english: And God heard the voice of the lad; and the angel of God called to Hagar out of heaven, and said unto her: ‘What aileth thee, Hagar? fear not; for God hath heard the voice of the lad where he is.

searchText: genesis 21:18 arise, lift up the lad, and hold him fast by thy hand; for i will make him a great nation.’
english: Arise, lift up the lad, and hold him fast by thy hand; for I will make him a great nation.’

searchText: genesis 21:19 and god opened her eyes, and she saw a well of water; and she went, and filled the bottle with water, and gave the lad drink.
english: And God opened her eyes, and she saw a well of water; and she went, and filled the bottle with water, and gave the lad drink.

searchText: genesis 21:20 and god was with the lad, and he grew; and he dwelt in the wilderness, and became an archer.
english: And God was with the lad, and he grew; and he dwelt in the wilderness, and became an archer.

searchText: genesis 21:21 and he dwelt in the wilderness of paran; and his mother took him a wife out of the land of egypt.
english: And he dwelt in the wilderness of Paran; and his mother took him a wife out of the land of Egypt.

searchText: genesis 21:22 and it came to pass at that time, that abimelech and phicol the captain of his host spoke unto abraham, saying: ‘god is with thee in all that thou doest.
english: And it came to pass at that time, that Abimelech and Phicol the captain of his host spoke unto Abraham, saying: ‘God is with thee in all that thou doest.

searchText: genesis 21:23 now therefore swear unto me here by god that thou wilt not deal falsely with me, nor with my son, nor with my son’s son; but according to the kindness that i have done unto thee, thou shalt do unto me, and to the land wherein thou hast sojourned.’
english: Now therefore swear unto me here by God that thou wilt not deal falsely with me, nor with my son, nor with my son’s son; but according to the kindness that I have done unto thee, thou shalt do unto me, and to the land wherein thou hast sojourned.’

searchText: genesis 21:24 and abraham said: ‘i will swear.’
english: And Abraham said: ‘I will swear.’

searchText: genesis 21:25 and abraham reproved abimelech because of the well of water, which abimelech’s servants had violently taken away.
english: And Abraham reproved Abimelech because of the well of water, which Abimelech’s servants had violently taken away.

searchText: genesis 21:26 and abimelech said: ‘i know not who hath done this thing; neither didst thou tell me, neither yet heard i of it, but to-day.’
english: And Abimelech said: ‘I know not who hath done this thing; neither didst thou tell me, neither yet heard I of it, but to-day.’

searchText: genesis 21:27 and abraham took sheep and oxen, and gave them unto abimelech; and they two made a covenant.
english: And Abraham took sheep and oxen, and gave them unto Abimelech; and they two made a covenant.

searchText: genesis 21:28 and abraham set seven ewe-lambs of the flock by themselves.
english: And Abraham set seven ewe-lambs of the flock by themselves.

searchText: genesis 21:29 and abimelech said unto abraham: ‘what mean these seven ewe-lambs which thou hast set by themselves?’
english: And Abimelech said unto Abraham: ‘What mean these seven ewe-lambs which thou hast set by themselves?’

searchText: genesis 21:30 and he said: ‘verily, these seven ewe-lambs shalt thou take of my hand, that it may be a witness unto me, that i have digged this well.’
english: And he said: ‘Verily, these seven ewe-lambs shalt thou take of my hand, that it may be a witness unto me, that I have digged this well.’

searchText: genesis 21:31 wherefore that place was called beer-sheba; because there they swore both of them.
english: Wherefore that place was called Beer-sheba; because there they swore both of them.

searchText: genesis 21:32 so they made a covenant at beer-sheba; and abimelech rose up, and phicol the captain of his host, and they returned into the land of the philistines.
english: So they made a covenant at Beer-sheba; and Abimelech rose up, and Phicol the captain of his host, and they returned into the land of the Philistines.

searchText: genesis 21:33 and abraham planted a tamarisk-tree in beer-sheba, and called there on the name of the lord, the everlasting god.
english: And Abraham planted a tamarisk-tree in Beer-sheba, and called there on the name of the LORD, the Everlasting God.

searchText: genesis 21:34 and abraham sojourned in the land of the philistines many days.
english: And Abraham sojourned in the land of the Philistines many days.

searchText: genesis 22:1 and it came to pass after these things, that god did prove abraham, and said unto him: ‘abraham’; and he said: ‘here am i.’
english: And it came to pass after these things, that God did prove Abraham, and said unto him: ‘Abraham’; and he said: ‘Here am I.’

searchText: genesis 22:2 and he said: ‘take now thy son, thine only son, whom thou lovest, even isaac, and get thee into the land of moriah; and offer him there for a burnt-offering upon one of the mountains which i will tell thee of.’
english: And He said: ‘Take now thy son, thine only son, whom thou lovest, even Isaac, and get thee into the land of Moriah; and offer him there for a burnt-offering upon one of the mountains which I will tell thee of.’

searchText: genesis 22:3 and abraham rose early in the morning, and saddled his ass, and took two of his young men with him, and isaac his son; and he cleaved the wood for the burnt-offering, and rose up, and went unto the place of which god had told him.
english: And Abraham rose early in the morning, and saddled his ass, and took two of his young men with him, and Isaac his son; and he cleaved the wood for the burnt-offering, and rose up, and went unto the place of which God had told him.

searchText: genesis 22:4 on the third day abraham lifted up his eyes, and saw the place afar off.
english: On the third day Abraham lifted up his eyes, and saw the place afar off.

searchText: genesis 22:5 and abraham said unto his young men: ‘abide ye here with the ass, and i and the lad will go yonder; and we will worship, and come back to you.’
english: And Abraham said unto his young men: ‘Abide ye here with the ass, and I and the lad will go yonder; and we will worship, and come back to you.’

searchText: genesis 22:6 and abraham took the wood of the burnt-offering, and laid it upon isaac his son; and he took in his hand the fire and the knife; and they went both of them together.
english: And Abraham took the wood of the burnt-offering, and laid it upon Isaac his son; and he took in his hand the fire and the knife; and they went both of them together.

searchText: genesis 22:7 and isaac spoke unto abraham his father, and said: ‘my father.’ and he said: ‘here am i, my son.’ and he said: ‘behold the fire and the wood; but where is the lamb for a burnt-offering?’
english: And Isaac spoke unto Abraham his father, and said: ‘My father.’ And he said: ‘Here am I, my son.’ And he said: ‘Behold the fire and the wood; but where is the lamb for a burnt-offering?’

searchText: genesis 22:8 and abraham said: ‘god will aprovide himself the lamb for a burnt-offering, my son.’ so they went both of them together.
english: And Abraham said: ‘God will aprovide Himself the lamb for a burnt-offering, my son.’ So they went both of them together.

searchText: genesis 22:9 and they came to the place which god had told him of; and abraham built the altar there, and laid the wood in order, and bound isaac his son, and laid him on the altar, upon the wood.
english: And they came to the place which God had told him of; and Abraham built the altar there, and laid the wood in order, and bound Isaac his son, and laid him on the altar, upon the wood.

searchText: genesis 22:10 and abraham stretched forth his hand, and took the knife to slay his son.
english: And Abraham stretched forth his hand, and took the knife to slay his son.

searchText: genesis 22:11 and the angel of the lord called unto him out of heaven, and said: ‘abraham, abraham.’ and he said: ‘here am i.’
english: And the angel of the LORD called unto him out of heaven, and said: ‘Abraham, Abraham.’ And he said: ‘Here am I.’

searchText: genesis 22:12 and he said: ‘lay not thy hand upon the lad, neither do thou any thing unto him; for now i know that thou art a god-fearing man, seeing thou hast not withheld thy son, thine only son, from me.’
english: And he said: ‘Lay not thy hand upon the lad, neither do thou any thing unto him; for now I know that thou art a God-fearing man, seeing thou hast not withheld thy son, thine only son, from Me.’

searchText: genesis 22:13 and abraham lifted up his eyes, and looked, and behold behind him a ram caught in the thicket by his horns. and abraham went and took the ram, and offered him up for a burnt-offering in the stead of his son.
