english: And Abraham lifted up his eyes, and looked, and behold behind him a ram caught in the thicket by his horns. And Abraham went and took the ram, and offered him up for a burnt-offering in the stead of his son.

searchText: genesis 22:14 and abraham called the name of that place adonai-jireh; as it is said to this day: ‘in the mount where the lord is seen.’
english: And Abraham called the name of that place Adonai-jireh; as it is said to this day: ‘In the mount where the LORD is seen.’

searchText: genesis 22:15 and the angel of the lord called unto abraham a second time out of heaven,
english: And the angel of the LORD called unto Abraham a second time out of heaven,

searchText: genesis 22:16 and said: ‘by myself have i sworn, saith the lord, because thou hast done this thing, and hast not withheld thy son, thine only son,
english: and said: ‘By Myself have I sworn, saith the LORD, because thou hast done this thing, and hast not withheld thy son, thine only son,

searchText: genesis 22:17 that in blessing i will bless thee, and in multiplying i will multiply thy seed as the stars of the heaven, and as the sand which is upon the seashore; and thy seed shall possess the gate of his enemies;
english: that in blessing I will bless thee, and in multiplying I will multiply thy seed as the stars of the heaven, and as the sand which is upon the seashore; and thy seed shall possess the gate of his enemies;

searchText: genesis 22:18 and in thy seed shall all the nations of the earth be blessed; because thou hast hearkened to my voice.’
english: and in thy seed shall all the nations of the earth be blessed; because thou hast hearkened to My voice.’

searchText: genesis 22:19 so abraham returned unto his young men, and they rose up and went together to beer- sheba; and abraham dwelt at beer-sheba.
english: So Abraham returned unto his young men, and they rose up and went together to Beer- sheba; and Abraham dwelt at Beer-sheba.

searchText: genesis 22:20 and it came to pass after these things, that it was told abraham, saying: ‘behold, milcah, she also hath borne children unto thy brother nahor:
english: And it came to pass after these things, that it was told Abraham, saying: ‘Behold, Milcah, she also hath borne children unto thy brother Nahor:

searchText: genesis 22:21 uz his first-born, and buz his brother, and kemuel the father of aram;
english: Uz his first-born, and Buz his brother, and Kemuel the father of Aram;

searchText: genesis 22:22 and chesed, and hazo, and pildash, and jidlaph, and bethuel.’
english: and Chesed, and Hazo, and Pildash, and Jidlaph, and Bethuel.’

searchText: genesis 22:23 and bethuel begot rebekah; these eight did milcah bear to nahor, abraham’s brother.
english: And Bethuel begot Rebekah; these eight did Milcah bear to Nahor, Abraham’s brother.

searchText: genesis 22:24 and his concubine, whose name was reumah, she also bore tebah, and gaham, and tahash, and maacah.
english: And his concubine, whose name was Reumah, she also bore Tebah, and Gaham, and Tahash, and Maacah.

searchText: genesis 23:1 and the life of sarah was a hundred and seven and twenty years; these were the years of the life of sarah.
english: And the life of Sarah was a hundred and seven and twenty years; these were the years of the life of Sarah.

searchText: genesis 23:2 and sarah died in kiriatharba—the same is hebron—in the land of canaan; and abraham came to mourn for sarah, and to weep for her.
english: And Sarah died in Kiriatharba—the same is Hebron—in the land of Canaan; and Abraham came to mourn for Sarah, and to weep for her.

searchText: genesis 23:3 and abraham rose up from before his dead, and spoke unto the children of heth, saying:
english: And Abraham rose up from before his dead, and spoke unto the children of Heth, saying:

searchText: genesis 23:4 ’i am a stranger and a sojourner with you: give me a possession of a burying-place with you, that i may bury my dead out of my sight.’
english: ’I am a stranger and a sojourner with you: give me a possession of a burying-place with you, that I may bury my dead out of my sight.’

searchText: genesis 23:5 and the children of heth answered abraham, saying unto him:
english: And the children of Heth answered Abraham, saying unto him:

searchText: genesis 23:6 ’hear us, my lord: thou art a mighty prince among us; in the choice of our sepulchres bury thy dead; none of us shall withhold from thee his sepulchre, but that thou mayest bury thy dead.’
english: ’Hear us, my lord: thou art a mighty prince among us; in the choice of our sepulchres bury thy dead; none of us shall withhold from thee his sepulchre, but that thou mayest bury thy dead.’

searchText: genesis 23:7 and abraham rose up, and bowed down to the people of the land, even to the children of heth.
english: And Abraham rose up, and bowed down to the people of the land, even to the children of Heth.

searchText: genesis 23:8 and he spoke with them, saying: ‘if it be your mind that i should bury my dead out of my sight, hear me, and entreat for me to ephron the son of zohar,
english: And he spoke with them, saying: ‘If it be your mind that I should bury my dead out of my sight, hear me, and entreat for me to Ephron the son of Zohar,

searchText: genesis 23:9 that he may give me the cave of machpelah, which he hath, which is in the end of his field; for the full price let him give it to me in the midst of you for a possession of a burying-place.’
english: that he may give me the cave of Machpelah, which he hath, which is in the end of his field; for the full price let him give it to me in the midst of you for a possession of a burying-place.’

searchText: genesis 23:10 now ephron was sitting in the midst of the children of heth; and ephron the hittite answered abraham in the hearing of the children of heth, even of all that went in at the gate of his city, saying:
english: Now Ephron was sitting in the midst of the children of Heth; and Ephron the Hittite answered Abraham in the hearing of the children of Heth, even of all that went in at the gate of his city, saying:

searchText: genesis 23:11 ’nay, my lord, hear me: the field give i thee, and the cave that is therein, i give it thee; in the presence of the sons of my people give i it thee; bury thy dead.’
english: ’Nay, my lord, hear me: the field give I thee, and the cave that is therein, I give it thee; in the presence of the sons of my people give I it thee; bury thy dead.’

searchText: genesis 23:12 and abraham bowed down before the people of the land.
english: And Abraham bowed down before the people of the land.

searchText: genesis 23:13 and he spoke unto ephron in the hearing of the people of the land, saying: ‘but if thou wilt, i pray thee, hear me: i will give the price of the field; take it of me, and i will bury my dead there.’
english: And he spoke unto Ephron in the hearing of the people of the land, saying: ‘But if thou wilt, I pray thee, hear me: I will give the price of the field; take it of me, and I will bury my dead there.’

searchText: genesis 23:14 and ephron answered abraham, saying unto him:
english: And Ephron answered Abraham, saying unto him:

searchText: genesis 23:15 ’my lord, hearken unto me: a piece of land worth four hundred shekels of silver, what is that betwixt me and thee? bury therefore thy dead.’
english: ’My lord, hearken unto me: a piece of land worth four hundred shekels of silver, what is that betwixt me and thee? bury therefore thy dead.’

searchText: genesis 23:16 and abraham hearkened unto ephron; and abraham weighed to ephron the silver, which he had named in the hearing of the children of heth, four hundred shekels of silver, current money with the merchant.
english: And Abraham hearkened unto Ephron; and Abraham weighed to Ephron the silver, which he had named in the hearing of the children of Heth, four hundred shekels of silver, current money with the merchant.

searchText: genesis 23:17 so the field of ephron, which was in machpelah, which was before mamre, the field, and the cave which was therein, and all the trees that were in the field, that were in all the border thereof round about, were made sure
english: So the field of Ephron, which was in Machpelah, which was before Mamre, the field, and the cave which was therein, and all the trees that were in the field, that were in all the border thereof round about, were made sure

searchText: genesis 23:18 unto abraham for a possession in the presence of the children of heth, before all that went in at the gate of his city.
english: unto Abraham for a possession in the presence of the children of Heth, before all that went in at the gate of his city.

searchText: genesis 23:19 and after this, abraham buried sarah his wife in the cave of the field of machpelah before mamre—the same is hebron—in the land of canaan.
english: And after this, Abraham buried Sarah his wife in the cave of the field of Machpelah before Mamre—the same is Hebron—in the land of Canaan.

searchText: genesis 23:20 and the field, and the cave that is therein, were made sure unto abraham for a possession of a burying-place by the children of heth.
english: And the field, and the cave that is therein, were made sure unto Abraham for a possession of a burying-place by the children of Heth.

searchText: genesis 24:1 and abraham was old, well stricken in age; and the lord had blessed abraham in all things.
english: And Abraham was old, well stricken in age; and the LORD had blessed Abraham in all things.

searchText: genesis 24:2 and abraham said unto his servant, the elder of his house, that ruled over all that he had: ‘put, i pray thee, thy hand under my thigh.
english: And Abraham said unto his servant, the elder of his house, that ruled over all that he had: ‘Put, I pray thee, thy hand under my thigh.

searchText: genesis 24:3 and i will make thee swear by the lord, the god of heaven and the god of the earth, that thou shalt not take a wife for my son of the daughters of the canaanites, among whom i dwell.
english: And I will make thee swear by the LORD, the God of heaven and the God of the earth, that thou shalt not take a wife for my son of the daughters of the Canaanites, among whom I dwell.

searchText: genesis 24:4 but thou shalt go unto my country, and to my kindred, and take a wife for my son, even for isaac.’
english: But thou shalt go unto my country, and to my kindred, and take a wife for my son, even for Isaac.’

searchText: genesis 24:5 and the servant said unto him: ‘peradventure the woman will not be willing to follow me unto this land; must i needs bring thy son back unto the land from whence thou camest?’
english: And the servant said unto him: ‘Peradventure the woman will not be willing to follow me unto this land; must I needs bring thy son back unto the land from whence thou camest?’

searchText: genesis 24:6 and abraham said unto him: ‘beware thou that thou bring not my son back thither.
english: And Abraham said unto him: ‘Beware thou that thou bring not my son back thither.

searchText: genesis 24:7 the lord, the god of heaven, who took me from my father’s house, and from the land of my nativity, and who spoke unto me, and who swore unto me, saying: unto thy seed will i give this land; he will send his angel before thee, and thou shalt take a wife for my son from thence.
english: The LORD, the God of heaven, who took me from my father’s house, and from the land of my nativity, and who spoke unto me, and who swore unto me, saying: Unto thy seed will I give this land; He will send His angel before thee, and thou shalt take a wife for my son from thence.

searchText: genesis 24:8 and if the woman be not willing to follow thee, then thou shalt be clear from this my oath; only thou shalt not bring my son back thither.’
english: And if the woman be not willing to follow thee, then thou shalt be clear from this my oath; only thou shalt not bring my son back thither.’

searchText: genesis 24:9 and the servant put his hand under the thigh of abraham his master, and swore to him concerning this matter.
english: And the servant put his hand under the thigh of Abraham his master, and swore to him concerning this matter.

searchText: genesis 24:10 and the servant took ten camels, of the camels of his master, and departed; having all goodly things of his master’s in his hand; and he arose, and went to aram-naharaim, unto the city of nahor.
english: And the servant took ten camels, of the camels of his master, and departed; having all goodly things of his master’s in his hand; and he arose, and went to Aram-naharaim, unto the city of Nahor.

searchText: genesis 24:11 and he made the camels to kneel down without the city by the well of water at the time of evening, the time that women go out to draw water.
english: And he made the camels to kneel down without the city by the well of water at the time of evening, the time that women go out to draw water.

searchText: genesis 24:12 and he said: ‘o lord, the god of my master abraham, send me, i pray thee, good speed this day, and show kindness unto my master abraham.
english: And he said: ‘O LORD, the God of my master Abraham, send me, I pray Thee, good speed this day, and show kindness unto my master Abraham.

searchText: genesis 24:13 behold, i stand by the fountain of water; and the daughters of the men of the city come out to draw water.
english: Behold, I stand by the fountain of water; and the daughters of the men of the city come out to draw water.

searchText: genesis 24:14 so let it come to pass, that the damsel to whom i shall say: let down thy pitcher, i pray thee, that i may drink; and she shall say: drink, and i will give thy camels drink also; let the same be she that thou hast appointed for thy servant, even for isaac; and thereby shall i know that thou hast shown kindness unto my master.’
english: So let it come to pass, that the damsel to whom I shall say: Let down thy pitcher, I pray thee, that I may drink; and she shall say: Drink, and I will give thy camels drink also; let the same be she that Thou hast appointed for Thy servant, even for Isaac; and thereby shall I know that Thou hast shown kindness unto my master.’

searchText: genesis 24:15 and it came to pass, before he had done speaking, that, behold, rebekah came out, who was born to bethuel the son of milcah, the wife of nahor, abraham’s brother, with her pitcher upon her shoulder.
english: And it came to pass, before he had done speaking, that, behold, Rebekah came out, who was born to Bethuel the son of Milcah, the wife of Nahor, Abraham’s brother, with her pitcher upon her shoulder.

searchText: genesis 24:16 and the damsel was very fair to look upon, a virgin, neither had any man known her; and she went down to the fountain, and filled her pitcher, and came up.
english: And the damsel was very fair to look upon, a virgin, neither had any man known her; and she went down to the fountain, and filled her pitcher, and came up.

searchText: genesis 24:17 and the servant ran to meet her, and said: ‘give me to drink, i pray thee, a little water of thy pitcher.’
english: And the servant ran to meet her, and said: ‘Give me to drink, I pray thee, a little water of thy pitcher.’

searchText: genesis 24:18 and she said: ‘drink, my lord’; and she hastened, and let down her pitcher upon her hand, and gave him drink.
english: And she said: ‘Drink, my lord’; and she hastened, and let down her pitcher upon her hand, and gave him drink.

searchText: genesis 24:19 and when she had done giving him drink, she said: ‘i will draw for thy camels also, until they have done drinking.’
english: And when she had done giving him drink, she said: ‘I will draw for thy camels also, until they have done drinking.’

searchText: genesis 24:20 and she hastened, and emptied her pitcher into the trough, and ran again unto the well to draw, and drew for all his camels.
english: And she hastened, and emptied her pitcher into the trough, and ran again unto the well to draw, and drew for all his camels.

searchText: genesis 24:21 and the man looked stedfastly on her; holding his peace, to know whether the lord had made his journey prosperous or not.
english: And the man looked stedfastly on her; holding his peace, to know whether the LORD had made his journey prosperous or not.

searchText: genesis 24:22 and it came to pass, as the camels had done drinking, that the man took a golden ring of half a shekel weight, and two bracelets for her hands of ten shekels weight of gold;
english: And it came to pass, as the camels had done drinking, that the man took a golden ring of half a shekel weight, and two bracelets for her hands of ten shekels weight of gold;

searchText: genesis 24:23 and said: ‘whose daughter art thou? tell me, i pray thee. is there room in thy father’s house for us to lodge in?’
english: and said: ‘Whose daughter art thou? tell me, I pray thee. Is there room in thy father’s house for us to lodge in?’

searchText: genesis 24:24 and she said unto him: ‘i am the daughter of bethuel the son of milcah, whom she bore unto nahor.’
english: And she said unto him: ‘I am the daughter of Bethuel the son of Milcah, whom she bore unto Nahor.’

searchText: genesis 24:25 she said moreover unto him: ‘we have both straw and provender enough, and room to lodge in.’
english: She said moreover unto him: ‘We have both straw and provender enough, and room to lodge in.’

searchText: genesis 24:26 and the man bowed his head, and prostrated himself before the lord.
english: And the man bowed his head, and prostrated himself before the LORD.

searchText: genesis 24:27 and he said: ‘blessed be the lord, the god of my master abraham, who hath not forsaken his mercy and his truth toward my master; as for me, the lord hath led me in the way to the house of my master’s brethren.’
english: And he said: ‘Blessed be the LORD, the God of my master Abraham, who hath not forsaken His mercy and His truth toward my master; as for me, the LORD hath led me in the way to the house of my master’s brethren.’

searchText: genesis 24:28 and the damsel ran, and told her mother’s house according to these words.
english: And the damsel ran, and told her mother’s house according to these words.

searchText: genesis 24:29 and rebekah had a brother, and his name was laban; and laban ran out unto the man, unto the fountain.
english: And Rebekah had a brother, and his name was Laban; and Laban ran out unto the man, unto the fountain.

searchText: genesis 24:30 and it came to pass, when he saw the ring, and the bracelets upon his sister’s hands, and when he heard the words of rebekah his sister, saying: ‘thus spoke the man unto me, ‘that he came unto the man; and, behold, he stood by the camels at the fountain.
english: And it came to pass, when he saw the ring, and the bracelets upon his sister’s hands, and when he heard the words of Rebekah his sister, saying: ‘Thus spoke the man unto me, ‘that he came unto the man; and, behold, he stood by the camels at the fountain.

searchText: genesis 24:31 and he said: ‘come in, thou blessed of the lord; wherefore standest thou without? for i have cleared the house, and made room for the camels.’
english: And he said: ‘Come in, thou blessed of the LORD; wherefore standest thou without? for I have cleared the house, and made room for the camels.’

searchText: genesis 24:32 and the man came into the house, and he ungirded the camels; and he gave straw and provender for the camels, and water to wash his feet and the feet of the men that were with him.
english: And the man came into the house, and he ungirded the camels; and he gave straw and provender for the camels, and water to wash his feet and the feet of the men that were with him.

searchText: genesis 24:33 and there was set food before him to eat; but he said: ‘i will not eat, until i have told mine errand.’ and he said: ‘speak on.’
english: And there was set food before him to eat; but he said: ‘I will not eat, until I have told mine errand.’ And he said: ‘Speak on.’

searchText: genesis 24:34 and he said: ‘i am abraham’s servant.
english: And he said: ‘I am Abraham’s servant.

searchText: genesis 24:35 and the lord hath blessed my master greatly; and he is become great; and he hath given him flocks and herds, and silver and gold, and men-servants and maid-servants, and camels and asses.
english: And the LORD hath blessed my master greatly; and he is become great; and He hath given him flocks and herds, and silver and gold, and men-servants and maid-servants, and camels and asses.

searchText: genesis 24:36 and sarah my master’s wife bore a son to my master when she was old; and unto him hath he given all that he hath.
english: And Sarah my master’s wife bore a son to my master when she was old; and unto him hath he given all that he hath.

searchText: genesis 24:37 and my master made me swear, saying: thou shalt not take a wife for my son of the daughters of the canaanites, in whose land i dwell.
english: And my master made me swear, saying: Thou shalt not take a wife for my son of the daughters of the Canaanites, in whose land I dwell.

searchText: genesis 24:38 but thou shalt go unto my father’s house, and to my kindred, and take a wife for my son.
english: But thou shalt go unto my father’s house, and to my kindred, and take a wife for my son.

searchText: genesis 24:39 and i said unto my master: peradventure the woman will not follow me.
english: And I said unto my master: Peradventure the woman will not follow me.

searchText: genesis 24:40 and he said unto me: the lord, before whom i walk, will send his angel with thee, and prosper thy way; and thou shalt take a wife for my son of my kindred, and of my father’s house;
english: And he said unto me: The LORD, before whom I walk, will send His angel with thee, and prosper thy way; and thou shalt take a wife for my son of my kindred, and of my father’s house;

searchText: genesis 24:41 then shalt thou be clear from my oath, when thou comest to my kindred; and if they give her not to thee, thou shalt be clear from my oath.
english: then shalt thou be clear from my oath, when thou comest to my kindred; and if they give her not to thee, thou shalt be clear from my oath.

searchText: genesis 24:42 and i came this day unto the fountain, and said: o lord, the god of my master abraham, if now thou do prosper my way which i go:
english: And I came this day unto the fountain, and said: O LORD, the God of my master Abraham, if now Thou do prosper my way which I go:

searchText: genesis 24:43 behold, i stand by the fountain of water; and let it come to pass, that the maiden that cometh forth to draw, to whom i shall say: give me, i pray thee, a little water from thy pitcher to drink;
english: behold, I stand by the fountain of water; and let it come to pass, that the maiden that cometh forth to draw, to whom I shall say: Give me, I pray thee, a little water from thy pitcher to drink;

searchText: genesis 24:44 and she shall say to me: both drink thou, and i will also draw for thy camels; let the same be the woman whom the lord hath appointed for my master’s son.
english: and she shall say to me: Both drink thou, and I will also draw for thy camels; let the same be the woman whom the LORD hath appointed for my master’s son.

searchText: genesis 24:45 and before i had done speaking to my heart, behold, rebekah came forth with her pitcher on her shoulder; and she went down unto the fountain, and drew. and i said unto her: let me drink, i pray thee.
english: And before I had done speaking to my heart, behold, Rebekah came forth with her pitcher on her shoulder; and she went down unto the fountain, and drew. And I said unto her: Let me drink, I pray thee.

searchText: genesis 24:46 and she made haste, and let down her pitcher from her shoulder, and said: drink, and i will give thy camels drink also. so i drank, and she made the camels drink also.
english: And she made haste, and let down her pitcher from her shoulder, and said: Drink, and I will give thy camels drink also. So I drank, and she made the camels drink also.

searchText: genesis 24:47 and i asked her, and said: whose daughter art thou? and she said: the daughter of bethuel, nahor’s son, whom milcah bore unto him. and i put the ring upon her nose, and the bracelets upon her hands.
english: And I asked her, and said: Whose daughter art thou? And she said: The daughter of Bethuel, Nahor’s son, whom Milcah bore unto him. And I put the ring upon her nose, and the bracelets upon her hands.

searchText: genesis 24:48 and i bowed my head, and prostrated myself before the lord, and blessed the lord, the god of my master abraham, who had led me in the right way to take my master’s brother’s daughter for his son.
english: And I bowed my head, and prostrated myself before the LORD, and blessed the LORD, the God of my master Abraham, who had led me in the right way to take my master’s brother’s daughter for his son.

searchText: genesis 24:49 and now if ye will deal kindly and truly with my master, tell me; and if not, tell me; that i may turn to the right hand, or to the left.’
english: And now if ye will deal kindly and truly with my master, tell me; and if not, tell me; that I may turn to the right hand, or to the left.’

searchText: genesis 24:50 then laban and bethuel answered and said: ‘the thing proceedeth from the lord; we cannot speak unto thee bad or good.
english: Then Laban and Bethuel answered and said: ‘The thing proceedeth from the LORD; we cannot speak unto thee bad or good.

searchText: genesis 24:51 behold, rebekah is before thee, take her, and go, and let her be thy master’s son’s wife, as the lord hath spoken.’
english: Behold, Rebekah is before thee, take her, and go, and let her be thy master’s son’s wife, as the LORD hath spoken.’

searchText: genesis 24:52 and it came to pass, that, when abraham’s servant heard their words, he bowed himself down to the earth unto the lord.
english: And it came to pass, that, when Abraham’s servant heard their words, he bowed himself down to the earth unto the LORD.

searchText: genesis 24:53 and the servant brought forth jewels of silver, and jewels of gold, and raiment, and gave them to rebekah; he gave also to her brother and to her mother precious things.
english: And the servant brought forth jewels of silver, and jewels of gold, and raiment, and gave them to Rebekah; he gave also to her brother and to her mother precious things.

searchText: genesis 24:54 and they did eat and drink, he and the men that were with him, and tarried all night; and they rose up in the morning, and he said: ‘send me away unto my master.’
english: And they did eat and drink, he and the men that were with him, and tarried all night; and they rose up in the morning, and he said: ‘Send me away unto my master.’

searchText: genesis 24:55 and her brother and her mother said: ‘let the damsel abide with us a few days, at the least ten; after that she shall go.’
english: And her brother and her mother said: ‘Let the damsel abide with us a few days, at the least ten; after that she shall go.’

searchText: genesis 24:56 and he said unto them: ‘delay me not, seeing the lord hath prospered my way; send me away that i may go to my master.’
english: And he said unto them: ‘Delay me not, seeing the LORD hath prospered my way; send me away that I may go to my master.’

searchText: genesis 24:57 and they said: ‘we will call the damsel, and inquire at her mouth.’
english: And they said: ‘We will call the damsel, and inquire at her mouth.’

searchText: genesis 24:58 and they called rebekah, and said unto her: ‘wilt thou go with this man?’ and she said: ‘i will go.’
english: And they called Rebekah, and said unto her: ‘Wilt thou go with this man?’ And she said: ‘I will go.’

searchText: genesis 24:59 and they sent away rebekah their sister, and her nurse, and abraham’s servant, and his men.
english: And they sent away Rebekah their sister, and her nurse, and Abraham’s servant, and his men.

searchText: genesis 24:60 and they blessed rebekah, and said unto her: ‘our sister, be thou the mother of thousands of ten thousands, and let thy seed possess the gate of those that hate them.’
english: And they blessed Rebekah, and said unto her: ‘Our sister, be thou the mother of thousands of ten thousands, and let thy seed possess the gate of those that hate them.’

searchText: genesis 24:61 and rebekah arose, and her damsels, and they rode upon the camels, and followed the man. and the servant took rebekah, and went his way.
english: And Rebekah arose, and her damsels, and they rode upon the camels, and followed the man. And the servant took Rebekah, and went his way.

searchText: genesis 24:62 and isaac came from the way of beer-lahai-roi; for he dwelt in the land of the south.
english: And Isaac came from the way of Beer-lahai-roi; for he dwelt in the land of the South.

searchText: genesis 24:63 and isaac went out to meditate in the field at the eventide; and he lifted up his eyes, and saw, and, behold, there were camels coming.
english: And Isaac went out to meditate in the field at the eventide; and he lifted up his eyes, and saw, and, behold, there were camels coming.

searchText: genesis 24:64 and rebekah lifted up her eyes, and when she saw isaac, she alighted from the camel.
english: And Rebekah lifted up her eyes, and when she saw Isaac, she alighted from the camel.

searchText: genesis 24:65 and she said unto the servant: ‘what man is this that walketh in the field to meet us?’ and the servant said: ‘it is my master.’ and she took her veil, and covered herself.
english: And she said unto the servant: ‘What man is this that walketh in the field to meet us?’ And the servant said: ‘It is my master.’ And she took her veil, and covered herself.

searchText: genesis 24:66 and the servant told isaac all the things that he had done.
english: And the servant told Isaac all the things that he had done.

searchText: genesis 24:67 and isaac brought her into his mother sarah’s tent, and took rebekah, and she became his wife; and he loved her. and isaac was comforted for his mother.
english: And Isaac brought her into his mother Sarah’s tent, and took Rebekah, and she became his wife; and he loved her. And Isaac was comforted for his mother.

searchText: genesis 25:1 and abraham took another wife, and her name was keturah.
english: And Abraham took another wife, and her name was Keturah.

searchText: genesis 25:2 and she bore him zimran, and jokshan, and medan, and midian, and ishbak, and shuah.
english: And she bore him Zimran, and Jokshan, and Medan, and Midian, and Ishbak, and Shuah.

searchText: genesis 25:3 and jokshan begot sheba, and dedan. and the sons of dedan were asshurim, and letushim, and leummim.
english: And Jokshan begot Sheba, and Dedan. And the sons of Dedan were Asshurim, and Letushim, and Leummim.

searchText: genesis 25:4 and the sons of midian: ephah, and epher, and hanoch, and abida, and eldaah. all these were the children of keturah.
english: And the sons of Midian: Ephah, and Epher, and Hanoch, and Abida, and Eldaah. All these were the children of Keturah.

searchText: genesis 25:5 and abraham gave all that he had unto isaac.
english: And Abraham gave all that he had unto Isaac.

searchText: genesis 25:6 but unto the sons of the concubines, that abraham had, abraham gave gifts; and he sent them away from isaac his son, while he yet lived, eastward, unto the east country.
english: But unto the sons of the concubines, that Abraham had, Abraham gave gifts; and he sent them away from Isaac his son, while he yet lived, eastward, unto the east country.

searchText: genesis 25:7 and these are the days of the years of abraham’s life which he lived, a hundred threescore and fifteen years.
english: And these are the days of the years of Abraham’s life which he lived, a hundred threescore and fifteen years.

searchText: genesis 25:8 and abraham expired, and died in a good old age, an old man, and full of years; and was gathered to his people.
english: And Abraham expired, and died in a good old age, an old man, and full of years; and was gathered to his people.

searchText: genesis 25:9 and isaac and ishmael his sons buried him in the cave of machpelah, in the field of ephron the son of zohar the hittite, which is before mamre;
english: And Isaac and Ishmael his sons buried him in the cave of Machpelah, in the field of Ephron the son of Zohar the Hittite, which is before Mamre;

searchText: genesis 25:10 the field which abraham purchased of the children of heth; there was abraham buried, and sarah his wife.
english: the field which Abraham purchased of the children of Heth; there was Abraham buried, and Sarah his wife.

searchText: genesis 25:11 and it came to pass after the death of abraham, that god blessed isaac his son; and isaac dwelt by beer-lahai-roi.
english: And it came to pass after the death of Abraham, that God blessed Isaac his son; and Isaac dwelt by Beer-lahai-roi.

searchText: genesis 25:12 now these are the generations of ishmael, abraham’s son, whom hagar the egyptian, sarah’s handmaid, bore unto abraham.
english: Now these are the generations of Ishmael, Abraham’s son, whom Hagar the Egyptian, Sarah’s handmaid, bore unto Abraham.

searchText: genesis 25:13 and these are the names of the sons of ishmael, by their names, according to their generations: the first-born of ishmael, nebaioth; and kedar, and adbeel, and mibsam,
english: And these are the names of the sons of Ishmael, by their names, according to their generations: the first-born of Ishmael, Nebaioth; and Kedar, and Adbeel, and Mibsam,

searchText: genesis 25:14 and mishma, and dumah, and massa;
english: and Mishma, and Dumah, and Massa;

searchText: genesis 25:15 hadad, and tema, jetur, naphish, and kedem;
english: Hadad, and Tema, Jetur, Naphish, and Kedem;

searchText: genesis 25:16 these are the sons of ishmael, and these are their names, by their villages, and by their encampments; twelve princes according to their nations.
english: these are the sons of Ishmael, and these are their names, by their villages, and by their encampments; twelve princes according to their nations.

searchText: genesis 25:17 and these are the years of the life of ishmael, a hundred and thirty and seven years; and he expired and died; and was gathered unto his people.
english: And these are the years of the life of Ishmael, a hundred and thirty and seven years; and he expired and died; and was gathered unto his people.

searchText: genesis 25:18 and they dwelt from havilah unto shur that is before egypt, as thou goest toward asshur: over against all his brethren he did settle.
english: And they dwelt from Havilah unto Shur that is before Egypt, as thou goest toward Asshur: over against all his brethren he did settle.

searchText: genesis 25:19 and these are the generations of isaac, abraham’s son: abraham begot isaac.
english: And these are the generations of Isaac, Abraham’s son: Abraham begot Isaac.

searchText: genesis 25:20 and isaac was forty years old when he took rebekah, the daughter of bethuel the aramean, of paddan-aram, the sister of laban the aramean, to be his wife.
english: And Isaac was forty years old when he took Rebekah, the daughter of Bethuel the Aramean, of Paddan-aram, the sister of Laban the Aramean, to be his wife.

searchText: genesis 25:21 and isaac entreated the lord for his wife, because she was barren; and the lord let himself be entreated of him, and rebekah his wife conceived.
english: And Isaac entreated the LORD for his wife, because she was barren; and the LORD let Himself be entreated of him, and Rebekah his wife conceived.

searchText: genesis 25:22 and the children struggled together within her; and she said: ‘if it be so, wherefore do i live?’ and she went to inquire of the lord.
english: And the children struggled together within her; and she said: ‘If it be so, wherefore do I live?’ And she went to inquire of the LORD.

searchText: genesis 25:23 and the lord said unto her: two nations are in thy womb, and two peoples shall be separated from thy bowels; and the one people shall be stronger than the other people; and the elder shall serve the younger.
english: And the LORD said unto her: Two nations are in thy womb, And two peoples shall be separated from thy bowels; And the one people shall be stronger than the other people; And the elder shall serve the younger.

searchText: genesis 25:24 and when her days to be delivered were fulfilled, behold, there were twins in her womb.
english: And when her days to be delivered were fulfilled, behold, there were twins in her womb.

searchText: genesis 25:25 and the first came forth ruddy, all over like a hairy mantle; and they called his name esau.
english: And the first came forth ruddy, all over like a hairy mantle; and they called his name Esau.

searchText: genesis 25:26 and after that came forth his brother, and his hand had hold on esau’s heel; and his name was called jacob. and isaac was threescore years old when she bore them.
english: And after that came forth his brother, and his hand had hold on Esau’s heel; and his name was called Jacob. And Isaac was threescore years old when she bore them.

searchText: genesis 25:27 and the boys grew; and esau was a cunning hunter, a man of the field; and jacob was a quiet man, dwelling in tents.
english: And the boys grew; and Esau was a cunning hunter, a man of the field; and Jacob was a quiet man, dwelling in tents.

searchText: genesis 25:28 now isaac loved esau, because he did eat of his venison; and rebekah loved jacob.
english: Now Isaac loved Esau, because he did eat of his venison; and Rebekah loved Jacob.

searchText: genesis 25:29 and jacob sod pottage; and esau came in from the field, and he was faint.
english: And Jacob sod pottage; and Esau came in from the field, and he was faint.

searchText: genesis 25:30 and esau said to jacob: ‘let me swallow, i pray thee, some of this red, red pottage; for i am faint.’ therefore was his name called edom.
english: And Esau said to Jacob: ‘Let me swallow, I pray thee, some of this red, red pottage; for I am faint.’ Therefore was his name called Edom.

searchText: genesis 25:31 and jacob said: ‘sell me first thy birth right.’
english: And Jacob said: ‘Sell me first thy birth right.’

searchText: genesis 25:32 and esau said: ‘behold, i am at the point to die; and what profit shall the birthright do to me?’
english: And Esau said: ‘Behold, I am at the point to die; and what profit shall the birthright do to me?’

searchText: genesis 25:33 and jacob said: ‘swear to me first’; and he swore unto him; and he sold his birthright unto jacob.
english: And Jacob said: ‘Swear to me first’; and he swore unto him; and he sold his birthright unto Jacob.

searchText: genesis 25:34 and jacob gave esau bread and pottage of lentils; and he did eat and drink, and rose up, and went his way. so esau despised his birthright.
english: And Jacob gave Esau bread and pottage of lentils; and he did eat and drink, and rose up, and went his way. So Esau despised his birthright.

searchText: genesis 26:1 and there was a famine in the land, beside the first famine that was in the days of abraham. and isaac went unto abimelech king of the philistines unto gerar.
english: And there was a famine in the land, beside the first famine that was in the days of Abraham. And Isaac went unto Abimelech king of the Philistines unto Gerar.

searchText: genesis 26:2 and the lord appeared unto him, and said: ‘go not down unto egypt; dwell in the land which i shall tell thee of.
english: And the LORD appeared unto him, and said: ‘Go not down unto Egypt; dwell in the land which I shall tell thee of.

searchText: genesis 26:3 sojourn in this land, and i will be with thee, and will bless thee; for unto thee, and unto thy seed, i will give all these lands, and i will establish the oath which i swore unto abraham thy father;
english: Sojourn in this land, and I will be with thee, and will bless thee; for unto thee, and unto thy seed, I will give all these lands, and I will establish the oath which I swore unto Abraham thy father;

searchText: genesis 26:4 and i will multiply thy seed as the stars of heaven, and will give unto thy seed all these lands; and by thy seed shall all the nations of the earth bless themselves;
english: and I will multiply thy seed as the stars of heaven, and will give unto thy seed all these lands; and by thy seed shall all the nations of the earth bless themselves;

searchText: genesis 26:5 because that abraham hearkened to my voice, and kept my charge, my commandments, my statutes, and my laws.’
english: because that Abraham hearkened to My voice, and kept My charge, My commandments, My statutes, and My laws.’

searchText: genesis 26:6 and isaac dwelt in gerar.
english: And Isaac dwelt in Gerar.

searchText: genesis 26:7 and the men of the place asked him of his wife; and he said: ‘she is my sister’; for he feared to say: ‘my wife’; ‘lest the men of the place should kill me for rebekah, because she is fair to look upon.’
english: And the men of the place asked him of his wife; and he said: ‘She is my sister’; for he feared to say: ‘My wife’; ‘lest the men of the place should kill me for Rebekah, because she is fair to look upon.’

searchText: genesis 26:8 and it came to pass, when he had been there a long time, that abimelech king of the philistines looked out at a window, and saw, and, behold, isaac was sporting with rebekah his wife.
english: And it came to pass, when he had been there a long time, that Abimelech king of the Philistines looked out at a window, and saw, and, behold, Isaac was sporting with Rebekah his wife.

searchText: genesis 26:9 and abimelech called isaac, and said: ‘behold, of a surety she is thy wife; and how saidst thou: she is my sister?’ and isaac said unto him: ‘because i said: lest i die because of her.’
english: And Abimelech called Isaac, and said: ‘Behold, of a surety she is thy wife; and how saidst thou: She is my sister?’ And Isaac said unto him: ‘Because I said: Lest I die because of her.’

searchText: genesis 26:10 and abimelech said: ‘what is this thou hast done unto us? one of the people might easily have lain with thy wife, and thou wouldest have brought guiltiness upon us.’
english: And Abimelech said: ‘What is this thou hast done unto us? one of the people might easily have lain with thy wife, and thou wouldest have brought guiltiness upon us.’

searchText: genesis 26:11 and abimelech charged all the people, saying: ‘he that toucheth this man or his wife shall surely be put to death.’
english: And Abimelech charged all the people, saying: ‘He that toucheth this man or his wife shall surely be put to death.’

searchText: genesis 26:12 and isaac sowed in that land, and found in the same year a hundred-fold; and the lord blessed him.
english: And Isaac sowed in that land, and found in the same year a hundred-fold; and the LORD blessed him.

searchText: genesis 26:13 and the man waxed great, and grew more and more until he became very great.
english: And the man waxed great, and grew more and more until he became very great.

searchText: genesis 26:14 and he had possessions of flocks, and possessions of herds, and a great household; and the philistines envied him.
english: And he had possessions of flocks, and possessions of herds, and a great household; and the Philistines envied him.

searchText: genesis 26:15 now all the wells which his father’s servants had digged in the days of abraham his father, the philistines had stopped them, and filled them with earth.
english: Now all the wells which his father’s servants had digged in the days of Abraham his father, the Philistines had stopped them, and filled them with earth.

searchText: genesis 26:16 and abimelech said unto isaac: ‘go from us; for thou art much mightier than we.’
english: And Abimelech said unto Isaac: ‘Go from us; for thou art much mightier than we.’

searchText: genesis 26:17 and isaac departed thence, and encamped in the valley of gerar, and dwelt there.
english: And Isaac departed thence, and encamped in the valley of Gerar, and dwelt there.

searchText: genesis 26:18 and isaac digged again the wells of water, which they had digged in the days of abraham his father; for the philistines had stopped them after the death of abraham; and he called their names after the names by which his father had called them.
english: And Isaac digged again the wells of water, which they had digged in the days of Abraham his father; for the Philistines had stopped them after the death of Abraham; and he called their names after the names by which his father had called them.

searchText: genesis 26:19 and isaac’s servants digged in the valley, and found there a well of living water.
english: And Isaac’s servants digged in the valley, and found there a well of living water.

searchText: genesis 26:20 and the herdmen of gerar strove with isaac’s herdmen, saying: ‘the water is ours.’ and he called the name of the well esek; because they contended with him.
english: And the herdmen of Gerar strove with Isaac’s herdmen, saying: ‘The water is ours.’ And he called the name of the well Esek; because they contended with him.

searchText: genesis 26:21 and they digged another well, and they strove for that also. and he called the name of it sitnah.
english: And they digged another well, and they strove for that also. And he called the name of it Sitnah.

searchText: genesis 26:22 and he removed from thence, and digged another well; and for that they strove not. and he called the name of it rehoboth; and he said: ‘for now the lord hath made room for us, and we shall be fruitful in the land.’
english: And he removed from thence, and digged another well; and for that they strove not. And he called the name of it Rehoboth; and he said: ‘For now the LORD hath made room for us, and we shall be fruitful in the land.’

searchText: genesis 26:23 and he went up from thence to beer-sheba.
english: And he went up from thence to Beer-sheba.

searchText: genesis 26:24 and the lord appeared unto him the same night, and said: ‘i am the god of abraham thy father. fear not, for i am with thee, and will bless thee, and multiply thy seed for my servant abraham’s sake.’
english: And the LORD appeared unto him the same night, and said: ‘I am the God of Abraham thy father. Fear not, for I am with thee, and will bless thee, and multiply thy seed for My servant Abraham’s sake.’

searchText: genesis 26:25 and he builded an altar there, and called upon the name of the lord, and pitched his tent there; and there isaac’s servants digged a well.
english: And he builded an altar there, and called upon the name of the LORD, and pitched his tent there; and there Isaac’s servants digged a well.

searchText: genesis 26:26 then abimelech went to him from gerar, and ahuzzath his friend, and phicol the captain of his host.
english: Then Abimelech went to him from Gerar, and Ahuzzath his friend, and Phicol the captain of his host.

searchText: genesis 26:27 and isaac said unto them: ‘wherefore are ye come unto me, seeing ye hate me, and have sent me away from you?’
english: And Isaac said unto them: ‘Wherefore are ye come unto me, seeing ye hate me, and have sent me away from you?’

searchText: genesis 26:28 and they said: ‘we saw plainly that the lord was with thee; and we said: let there now be an oath betwixt us, even betwixt us and thee, and let us make a covenant with thee;
english: And they said: ‘We saw plainly that the LORD was with thee; and we said: Let there now be an oath betwixt us, even betwixt us and thee, and let us make a covenant with thee;

searchText: genesis 26:29 that thou wilt do us no hurt, as we have not touched thee, and as we have done unto thee nothing but good, and have sent thee away in peace; thou art now the blessed of the lord.’
english: that thou wilt do us no hurt, as we have not touched thee, and as we have done unto thee nothing but good, and have sent thee away in peace; thou art now the blessed of the LORD.’

searchText: genesis 26:30 and he made them a feast, and they did eat and drink.
english: And he made them a feast, and they did eat and drink.

searchText: genesis 26:31 and they rose up betimes in the morning, and swore one to another; and isaac sent them away, and they departed from him in peace.
english: And they rose up betimes in the morning, and swore one to another; and Isaac sent them away, and they departed from him in peace.

searchText: genesis 26:32 and it came to pass the same day, that isaac’s servants came, and told him concerning the well which they had digged, and said unto him: ‘we have found water.’
english: And it came to pass the same day, that Isaac’s servants came, and told him concerning the well which they had digged, and said unto him: ‘We have found water.’

searchText: genesis 26:33 and he called it shibah. therefore the name of the city is beer-sheba unto this day.
english: And he called it Shibah. Therefore the name of the city is Beer-sheba unto this day.

searchText: genesis 26:34 and when esau was forty years old, he took to wife judith the daughter of beeri the hittite, and basemath the daughter of elon the hittite.
english: And when Esau was forty years old, he took to wife Judith the daughter of Beeri the Hittite, and Basemath the daughter of Elon the Hittite.

searchText: genesis 26:35 and they were a bitterness of spirit unto isaac and to rebekah.
english: And they were a bitterness of spirit unto Isaac and to Rebekah.

searchText: genesis 27:1 and it came to pass, that when isaac was old, and his eyes were dim, so that he could not see, he called esau his elder son, and said unto him: ‘my son’; and he said unto him: ‘here am i.’
english: And it came to pass, that when Isaac was old, and his eyes were dim, so that he could not see, he called Esau his elder son, and said unto him: ‘My son’; and he said unto him: ‘Here am I.’

searchText: genesis 27:2 and he said: ‘behold now, i am old, i know not the day of my death.
english: And he said: ‘Behold now, I am old, I know not the day of my death.

searchText: genesis 27:3 now therefore take, i pray thee, thy weapons, thy quiver and thy bow, and go out to the field, and take me venison;
english: Now therefore take, I pray thee, thy weapons, thy quiver and thy bow, and go out to the field, and take me venison;

searchText: genesis 27:4 and make me savoury food, such as i love, and bring it to me, that i may eat; that my soul may bless thee before i die.’
english: and make me savoury food, such as I love, and bring it to me, that I may eat; that my soul may bless thee before I die.’

searchText: genesis 27:5 and rebekah heard when isaac spoke to esau his son. and esau went to the field to hunt for venison, and to bring it.
english: And Rebekah heard when Isaac spoke to Esau his son. And Esau went to the field to hunt for venison, and to bring it.

searchText: genesis 27:6 and rebekah spoke unto jacob her son, saying: ‘behold, i heard thy father speak unto esau thy brother, saying:
english: And Rebekah spoke unto Jacob her son, saying: ‘Behold, I heard thy father speak unto Esau thy brother, saying:

searchText: genesis 27:7 bring me venison, and make me savoury food, that i may eat, and bless thee before the lord before my death.
english: Bring me venison, and make me savoury food, that I may eat, and bless thee before the LORD before my death.

searchText: genesis 27:8 now therefore, my son, hearken to my voice according to that which i command thee.
english: Now therefore, my son, hearken to my voice according to that which I command thee.

searchText: genesis 27:9 go now to the flock, and fetch me from thence two good kids of the goats; and i will make them savoury food for thy father, such as he loveth;
english: Go now to the flock, and fetch me from thence two good kids of the goats; and I will make them savoury food for thy father, such as he loveth;

searchText: genesis 27:10 and thou shalt bring it to thy father, that he may eat, so that he may bless thee before his death.’
english: and thou shalt bring it to thy father, that he may eat, so that he may bless thee before his death.’

searchText: genesis 27:11 and jacob said to rebekah his mother: ‘behold, esau my brother is a hairy man, and i am a smooth man.
english: And Jacob said to Rebekah his mother: ‘Behold, Esau my brother is a hairy man, and I am a smooth man.

searchText: genesis 27:12 my father peradventure will feel me, and i shall seem to him as a mocker; and i shall bring a curse upon me, and not a blessing.’
english: My father peradventure will feel me, and I shall seem to him as a mocker; and I shall bring a curse upon me, and not a blessing.’

searchText: genesis 27:13 and his mother said unto him: ‘upon me be thy curse, my son; only hearken to my voice, and go fetch me them.’
english: And his mother said unto him: ‘Upon me be thy curse, my son; only hearken to my voice, and go fetch me them.’

searchText: genesis 27:14 and he went, and fetched, and brought them to his mother; and his mother made savoury food, such as his father loved.
english: And he went, and fetched, and brought them to his mother; and his mother made savoury food, such as his father loved.

searchText: genesis 27:15 and rebekah took the choicest garments of esau her elder son, which were with her in the house, and put them upon jacob her younger son.
english: And Rebekah took the choicest garments of Esau her elder son, which were with her in the house, and put them upon Jacob her younger son.

searchText: genesis 27:16 and she put the skins of the kids of the goats upon his hands, and upon the smooth of his neck.
english: And she put the skins of the kids of the goats upon his hands, and upon the smooth of his neck.

searchText: genesis 27:17 and she gave the savoury food and the bread, which she had prepared, into the hand of her son jacob.
english: And she gave the savoury food and the bread, which she had prepared, into the hand of her son Jacob.

searchText: genesis 27:18 and he came unto his father, and said: ‘my father’; and he said: ‘here am i; who art thou, my son?’
english: And he came unto his father, and said: ‘My father’; and he said: ‘Here am I; who art thou, my son?’

searchText: genesis 27:19 and jacob said unto his father: ‘i am esau thy first-born; i have done according as thou badest me. arise, i pray thee, sit and eat of my venison, that thy soul may bless me.’
english: And Jacob said unto his father: ‘I am Esau thy first-born; I have done according as thou badest me. Arise, I pray thee, sit and eat of my venison, that thy soul may bless me.’

searchText: genesis 27:20 and isaac said unto his son: ‘how is it that thou hast found it so quickly, my son?’ and he said: ‘because the lord thy god sent me good speed.’
english: And Isaac said unto his son: ‘How is it that thou hast found it so quickly, my son?’ And he said: ‘Because the LORD thy God sent me good speed.’

searchText: genesis 27:21 and isaac said unto jacob: ‘come near, i pray thee, that i may feel thee, my son, whether thou be my very son esau or not.’
english: And Isaac said unto Jacob: ‘Come near, I pray thee, that I may feel thee, my son, whether thou be my very son Esau or not.’

searchText: genesis 27:22 and jacob went near unto isaac his father; and he felt him, and said: ‘the voice is the voice of jacob, but the hands are the hands of esau.’
english: And Jacob went near unto Isaac his father; and he felt him, and said: ‘The voice is the voice of Jacob, but the hands are the hands of Esau.’

searchText: genesis 27:23 and he discerned him not, because his hands were hairy, as his brother esau’s hands; so he blessed him.
english: And he discerned him not, because his hands were hairy, as his brother Esau’s hands; so he blessed him.

searchText: genesis 27:24 and he said: ‘art thou my very son esau?’ and he said: ‘i am.’
english: And he said: ‘Art thou my very son Esau?’ And he said: ‘I am.’

searchText: genesis 27:25 and he said: ‘bring it near to me, and i will eat of my son’s venison, that my soul may bless thee.’ and he brought it near to him, and he did eat; and he brought him wine, and he drank.
english: And he said: ‘Bring it near to me, and I will eat of my son’s venison, that my soul may bless thee.’ And he brought it near to him, and he did eat; and he brought him wine, and he drank.

searchText: genesis 27:26 and his father isaac said unto him: ‘come near now, and kiss me, my son.’
english: And his father Isaac said unto him: ‘Come near now, and kiss me, my son.’

searchText: genesis 27:27 and he came near, and kissed him. and he smelled the smell of his raiment, and blessed him, and said: see, the smell of my son is as the smell of a field which the lord hath blessed.
english: And he came near, and kissed him. And he smelled the smell of his raiment, and blessed him, and said: See, the smell of my son Is as the smell of a field which the LORD hath blessed.

searchText: genesis 27:28 so god give thee of the dew of heaven, and of the fat places of the earth, and plenty of corn and wine.
english: So God give thee of the dew of heaven, And of the fat places of the earth, And plenty of corn and wine.

searchText: genesis 27:29 let peoples serve thee, and nations bow down to thee. be lord over thy brethren, and let thy mother’s sons bow down to thee. cursed be every one that curseth thee, and blessed be every one that blesseth thee.
english: Let peoples serve thee, And nations bow down to thee. Be lord over thy brethren, And let thy mother’s sons bow down to thee. Cursed be every one that curseth thee, And blessed be every one that blesseth thee.

searchText: genesis 27:30 and it came to pass, as soon as isaac had made an end of blessing jacob, and jacob was yet scarce gone out from the presence of isaac his father, that esau his brother came in from his hunting.
english: And it came to pass, as soon as Isaac had made an end of blessing Jacob, and Jacob was yet scarce gone out from the presence of Isaac his father, that Esau his brother came in from his hunting.

searchText: genesis 27:31 and he also made savoury food, and brought it unto his father; and he said unto his father: ‘let my father arise, and eat of his son’s venison, that thy soul may bless me.’
english: And he also made savoury food, and brought it unto his father; and he said unto his father: ‘Let my father arise, and eat of his son’s venison, that thy soul may bless me.’

searchText: genesis 27:32 and isaac his father said unto him: ‘who art thou?’ and he said: ‘i am thy son, thy first-born, esau.’
english: And Isaac his father said unto him: ‘Who art thou?’ And he said: ‘I am thy son, thy first-born, Esau.’

searchText: genesis 27:33 and isaac trembled very exceedingly, and said: ‘who then is he that hath taken venison, and brought it me, and i have eaten of all before thou camest, and have blessed him? yea, and he shall be blessed.’
english: And Isaac trembled very exceedingly, and said: ‘Who then is he that hath taken venison, and brought it me, and I have eaten of all before thou camest, and have blessed him? yea, and he shall be blessed.’

searchText: genesis 27:34 when esau heard the words of his father, he cried with an exceeding great and bitter cry, and said unto his father: ‘bless me, even me also, o my father.’
english: When Esau heard the words of his father, he cried with an exceeding great and bitter cry, and said unto his father: ‘Bless me, even me also, O my father.’

searchText: genesis 27:35 and he said: ‘thy brother came with guile, and hath taken away thy blessing.’
english: And he said: ‘Thy brother came with guile, and hath taken away thy blessing.’

searchText: genesis 27:36 and he said: ‘is not he rightly named jacob? for he hath supplanted me these two times: he took away my birthright; and, behold, now he hath taken away my blessing.’ and he said: ‘hast thou not reserved a blessing for me?’
english: And he said: ‘Is not he rightly named Jacob? for he hath supplanted me these two times: he took away my birthright; and, behold, now he hath taken away my blessing.’ And he said: ‘Hast thou not reserved a blessing for me?’

searchText: genesis 27:37 and isaac answered and said unto esau: ‘behold, i have made him thy lord, and all his brethren have i given to him for servants; and with corn and wine have i sustained him; and what then shall i do for thee, my son?’
english: And Isaac answered and said unto Esau: ‘Behold, I have made him thy lord, and all his brethren have I given to him for servants; and with corn and wine have I sustained him; and what then shall I do for thee, my son?’

searchText: genesis 27:38 and esau said unto his father: ‘hast thou but one blessing, my father? bless me, even me also, o my father.’ and esau lifted up his voice, and wept.
english: And Esau said unto his father: ‘Hast thou but one blessing, my father? bless me, even me also, O my father.’ And Esau lifted up his voice, and wept.

searchText: genesis 27:39 and isaac his father answered and said unto him: behold, of the fat places of the earth shall be thy dwelling, and of the dew of heaven from above;
english: And Isaac his father answered and said unto him: Behold, of the fat places of the earth shall be thy dwelling, And of the dew of heaven from above;

searchText: genesis 27:40 and by thy sword shalt thou live, and thou shalt serve thy brother; and it shall come to pass when thou shalt break loose, that thou shalt shake his yoke from off thy neck.
english: And by thy sword shalt thou live, And thou shalt serve thy brother; And it shall come to pass when thou shalt break loose, That thou shalt shake his yoke from off thy neck.

searchText: genesis 27:41 and esau hated jacob because of the blessing wherewith his father blessed him. and esau said in his heart: ‘let the days of mourning for my father be at hand; then will i slay my brother jacob.’
english: And Esau hated Jacob because of the blessing wherewith his father blessed him. And Esau said in his heart: ‘Let the days of mourning for my father be at hand; then will I slay my brother Jacob.’

searchText: genesis 27:42 and the words of esau her elder son were told to rebekah; and she sent and called jacob her younger son, and said unto him: ‘behold, thy brother esau, as touching thee, doth comfort himself, purposing to kill thee.
english: And the words of Esau her elder son were told to Rebekah; and she sent and called Jacob her younger son, and said unto him: ‘Behold, thy brother Esau, as touching thee, doth comfort himself, purposing to kill thee.

searchText: genesis 27:43 now therefore, my son, hearken to my voice; and arise, flee thou to laban my brother to haran;
english: Now therefore, my son, hearken to my voice; and arise, flee thou to Laban my brother to Haran;

searchText: genesis 27:44 and tarry with him a few days, until thy brother’s fury turn away;
english: and tarry with him a few days, until thy brother’s fury turn away;

searchText: genesis 27:45 until thy brother’s anger turn away from thee, and he forget that which thou hast done to him; then i will send, and fetch thee from thence; why should i be bereaved of you both in one day?’
english: until thy brother’s anger turn away from thee, and he forget that which thou hast done to him; then I will send, and fetch thee from thence; why should I be bereaved of you both in one day?’

searchText: genesis 27:46 and rebekah said to isaac: ‘i am weary of my life because of the daughters of heth. if jacob take a wife of the daughters of heth, such as these, of the daughters of the land, what good shall my life do me?’
english: And Rebekah said to Isaac: ‘I am weary of my life because of the daughters of Heth. If Jacob take a wife of the daughters of Heth, such as these, of the daughters of the land, what good shall my life do me?’

searchText: genesis 28:1 and isaac called jacob, and blessed him, and charged him, and said unto him: ‘thou shalt not take a wife of the daughters of canaan.
english: And Isaac called Jacob, and blessed him, and charged him, and said unto him: ‘Thou shalt not take a wife of the daughters of Canaan.

searchText: genesis 28:2 arise, go to paddan-aram, to the house of bethuel thy mother’s father; and take thee a wife from thence of the daughters of laban thy mother’s brother.
english: Arise, go to Paddan-aram, to the house of Bethuel thy mother’s father; and take thee a wife from thence of the daughters of Laban thy mother’s brother.

searchText: genesis 28:3 and god almighty bless thee, and make thee fruitful, and multiply thee, that thou mayest be a congregation of peoples;
english: And God Almighty bless thee, and make thee fruitful, and multiply thee, that thou mayest be a congregation of peoples;

searchText: genesis 28:4 and give thee the blessing of abraham, to thee, and to thy seed with thee; that thou mayest inherit the land of thy sojournings, which god gave unto abraham.’
english: and give thee the blessing of Abraham, to thee, and to thy seed with thee; that thou mayest inherit the land of thy sojournings, which God gave unto Abraham.’

searchText: genesis 28:5 and isaac sent away jacob; and he went to paddan-aram unto laban, son of bethuel the aramean, the brother of rebekah, jacob’s and esau’s mother.
english: And Isaac sent away Jacob; and he went to Paddan-aram unto Laban, son of Bethuel the Aramean, the brother of Rebekah, Jacob’s and Esau’s mother.

searchText: genesis 28:6 now esau saw that isaac had blessed jacob and sent him away to paddan-aram, to take him a wife from thence; and that as he blessed him he gave him a charge, saying: ‘thou shalt not take a wife of the daughters of canaan’;
english: Now Esau saw that Isaac had blessed Jacob and sent him away to Paddan-aram, to take him a wife from thence; and that as he blessed him he gave him a charge, saying: ‘Thou shalt not take a wife of the daughters of Canaan’;

searchText: genesis 28:7 and that jacob hearkened to his father and his mother, and was gone to paddan-aram;
english: and that Jacob hearkened to his father and his mother, and was gone to Paddan-aram;

searchText: genesis 28:8 and esau saw that the daughters of canaan pleased not isaac his father; .
english: and Esau saw that the daughters of Canaan pleased not Isaac his father; .

searchText: genesis 28:9 so esau went unto ishmael, and took unto the wives that he had mahalath the daughter of ishmael abraham’s son, the sister of nebaioth, to be his wife.
english: so Esau went unto Ishmael, and took unto the wives that he had Mahalath the daughter of Ishmael Abraham’s son, the sister of Nebaioth, to be his wife.

searchText: genesis 28:10 and jacob went out from beer-sheba, and went toward haran.
english: And Jacob went out from Beer-sheba, and went toward Haran.

searchText: genesis 28:11 and he lighted upon the place, and tarried there all night, because the sun was set; and he took one of the stones of the place, and put it under his head, and lay down in that place to sleep.
english: And he lighted upon the place, and tarried there all night, because the sun was set; and he took one of the stones of the place, and put it under his head, and lay down in that place to sleep.

searchText: genesis 28:12 and he dreamed, and behold a ladder set up on the earth, and the top of it reached to heaven; and behold the angels of god ascending and descending on it.
english: And he dreamed, and behold a ladder set up on the earth, and the top of it reached to heaven; and behold the angels of God ascending and descending on it.

searchText: genesis 28:13 and, behold, the lord stood beside him, and said: ‘i am the lord, the god of abraham thy father, and the god of isaac. the land whereon thou liest, to thee will i give it, and to thy seed.
english: And, behold, the LORD stood beside him, and said: ‘I am the LORD, the God of Abraham thy father, and the God of Isaac. The land whereon thou liest, to thee will I give it, and to thy seed.

searchText: genesis 28:14 and thy seed shall be as the dust of the earth, and thou shalt spread abroad to the west, and to the east, and to the north, and to the south. and in thee and in thy seed shall all the families of the earth be blessed.
english: And thy seed shall be as the dust of the earth, and thou shalt spread abroad to the west, and to the east, and to the north, and to the south. And in thee and in thy seed shall all the families of the earth be blessed.

searchText: genesis 28:15 and, behold, i am with thee, and will keep thee whithersoever thou goest, and will bring thee back into this land; for i will not leave thee, until i have done that which i have spoken to thee of.’
english: And, behold, I am with thee, and will keep thee whithersoever thou goest, and will bring thee back into this land; for I will not leave thee, until I have done that which I have spoken to thee of.’

searchText: genesis 28:16 and jacob awaked out of his sleep, and he said: ‘surely the lord is in this place; and i knew it not.’
english: And Jacob awaked out of his sleep, and he said: ‘Surely the LORD is in this place; and I knew it not.’

searchText: genesis 28:17 and he was afraid, and said: ‘how full of awe is this place! this is none other than the house of god, and this is the gate of heaven.’
english: And he was afraid, and said: ‘How full of awe is this place! this is none other than the house of God, and this is the gate of heaven.’

searchText: genesis 28:18 and jacob rose up early in the morning, and took the stone that he had put under his head, and set it up for a pillar, and poured oil upon the top of it.
english: And Jacob rose up early in the morning, and took the stone that he had put under his head, and set it up for a pillar, and poured oil upon the top of it.

searchText: genesis 28:19 and he called the name of that place beth-el, but the name of the city was luz at the first.
english: And he called the name of that place Beth-el, but the name of the city was Luz at the first.

searchText: genesis 28:20 and jacob vowed a vow, saying: ‘if god will be with me, and will keep me in this way that i go, and will give me bread to eat, and raiment to put on,
english: And Jacob vowed a vow, saying: ‘If God will be with me, and will keep me in this way that I go, and will give me bread to eat, and raiment to put on,

searchText: genesis 28:21 so that i come back to my father’s house in peace, then shall the lord be my god,
english: so that I come back to my father’s house in peace, then shall the LORD be my God,

searchText: genesis 28:22 and this stone, which i have set up for a pillar, shall be god’s house; and of all that thou shalt give me i will surely give the tenth unto thee.’
english: and this stone, which I have set up for a pillar, shall be God’s house; and of all that Thou shalt give me I will surely give the tenth unto Thee.’

searchText: genesis 29:1 then jacob went on his journey, and came to the land of the children of the east.
english: Then Jacob went on his journey, and came to the land of the children of the east.

searchText: genesis 29:2 and he looked, and behold a well in the field, and, lo, three flocks of sheep lying there by it.—for out of that well they watered the flocks. and the stone upon the well’s mouth was great.
english: And he looked, and behold a well in the field, and, lo, three flocks of sheep lying there by it.—For out of that well they watered the flocks. And the stone upon the well’s mouth was great.

searchText: genesis 29:3 and thither were all the flocks gathered; and they rolled the stone from the well’s mouth, and watered the sheep, and put the stone back upon the well’s mouth in its place.—
english: And thither were all the flocks gathered; and they rolled the stone from the well’s mouth, and watered the sheep, and put the stone back upon the well’s mouth in its place.—

searchText: genesis 29:4 and jacob said unto them: ‘my brethren, whence are ye?’ and they said: ‘of haran are we.’
english: And Jacob said unto them: ‘My brethren, whence are ye?’ And they said: ‘Of Haran are we.’

searchText: genesis 29:5 and he said unto them: ‘know ye laban the son of nahor?’ and they said: ‘we know him.’
english: And he said unto them: ‘Know ye Laban the son of Nahor?’ And they said: ‘We know him.’

searchText: genesis 29:6 and he said unto them: ‘is it well with him?’ and they said: ‘it is well; and, behold, rachel his daughter cometh with the sheep.’
english: And he said unto them: ‘Is it well with him?’ And they said: ‘It is well; and, behold, Rachel his daughter cometh with the sheep.’

searchText: genesis 29:7 and he said: ‘lo, it is yet high day, neither is it time that the cattle should be gathered together; water ye the sheep, and go and feed them.’
english: And he said: ‘Lo, it is yet high day, neither is it time that the cattle should be gathered together; water ye the sheep, and go and feed them.’

searchText: genesis 29:8 and they said: ‘we cannot, until all the flocks be gathered together, and they roll the stone from the well’s mouth; then we water the sheep.’
english: And they said: ‘We cannot, until all the flocks be gathered together, and they roll the stone from the well’s mouth; then we water the sheep.’

searchText: genesis 29:9 while he was yet speaking with them, rachel came with her father’s sheep; for she tended them.
english: While he was yet speaking with them, Rachel came with her father’s sheep; for she tended them.

searchText: genesis 29:10 and it came to pass, when jacob saw rachel the daughter of laban his mother’s brother, and the sheep of laban his mother’s brother, that jacob went near, and rolled the stone from the well’s mouth, and watered the flock of laban his mother’s brother.
english: And it came to pass, when Jacob saw Rachel the daughter of Laban his mother’s brother, and the sheep of Laban his mother’s brother, that Jacob went near, and rolled the stone from the well’s mouth, and watered the flock of Laban his mother’s brother.

searchText: genesis 29:11 and jacob kissed rachel, and lifted up his voice, and wept.
english: And Jacob kissed Rachel, and lifted up his voice, and wept.

searchText: genesis 29:12 and jacob told rachel that he was her father’s brother, and that he was rebekah’s son; and she ran and told her father.
english: And Jacob told Rachel that he was her father’s brother, and that he was Rebekah’s son; and she ran and told her father.

searchText: genesis 29:13 and it came to pass, when laban heard the tidings of jacob his sister’s son, that he ran to meet him, and embraced him, and kissed him, and brought him to his house. and he told laban all these things.
english: And it came to pass, when Laban heard the tidings of Jacob his sister’s son, that he ran to meet him, and embraced him, and kissed him, and brought him to his house. And he told Laban all these things.

searchText: genesis 29:14 and laban said to him: ‘surely thou art my bone and my flesh.’ and he abode with him the space of a month.
english: And Laban said to him: ‘Surely thou art my bone and my flesh.’ And he abode with him the space of a month.

searchText: genesis 29:15 and laban said unto jacob: ‘because thou art my brother, shouldest thou therefore serve me for nought? tell me, what shall thy wages be?’
english: And Laban said unto Jacob: ‘Because thou art my brother, shouldest thou therefore serve me for nought? tell me, what shall thy wages be?’

searchText: genesis 29:16 now laban had two daughters: the name of the elder was leah, and the name of the younger was rachel.
english: Now Laban had two daughters: the name of the elder was Leah, and the name of the younger was Rachel.

searchText: genesis 29:17 and leah’s eyes were weak; but rachel was of beautiful form and fair to look upon.
english: And Leah’s eyes were weak; but Rachel was of beautiful form and fair to look upon.

searchText: genesis 29:18 and jacob loved rachel; and he said: ‘i will serve thee seven years for rachel thy younger daughter.’
english: And Jacob loved Rachel; and he said: ‘I will serve thee seven years for Rachel thy younger daughter.’

searchText: genesis 29:19 and laban said: ‘it is better that i give her to thee, than that i should give her to another man; abide with me.’
english: And Laban said: ‘It is better that I give her to thee, than that I should give her to another man; abide with me.’

searchText: genesis 29:20 and jacob served seven years for rachel; and they seemed unto him but a few days, for the love he had to her.
english: And Jacob served seven years for Rachel; and they seemed unto him but a few days, for the love he had to her.

searchText: genesis 29:21 and jacob said unto laban: ‘give me my wife, for my days are filled, that i may go in unto her.’
english: And Jacob said unto Laban: ‘Give me my wife, for my days are filled, that I may go in unto her.’

searchText: genesis 29:22 and laban gathered together all the men of the place, and made a feast.
english: And Laban gathered together all the men of the place, and made a feast.

searchText: genesis 29:23 and it came to pass in the evening, that he took leah his daughter, and brought her to him; and he went in unto her.
english: And it came to pass in the evening, that he took Leah his daughter, and brought her to him; and he went in unto her.

searchText: genesis 29:24 and laban gave zilpah his handmaid unto his daughter leah for a handmaid.
english: And Laban gave Zilpah his handmaid unto his daughter Leah for a handmaid.

searchText: genesis 29:25 and it came to pass in the morning that, behold, it was leah; and he said to laban: ‘what is this thou hast done unto me? did not i serve with thee for rachel? wherefore then hast thou beguiled me?’
english: And it came to pass in the morning that, behold, it was Leah; and he said to Laban: ‘What is this thou hast done unto me? did not I serve with thee for Rachel? wherefore then hast thou beguiled me?’

searchText: genesis 29:26 and laban said: ‘it is not so done in our place, to give the younger before the first-born.
english: And Laban said: ‘It is not so done in our place, to give the younger before the first-born.

searchText: genesis 29:27 fulfil the week of this one, and we will give thee the other also for the service which thou shalt serve with me yet seven other years.’
english: Fulfil the week of this one, and we will give thee the other also for the service which thou shalt serve with me yet seven other years.’

searchText: genesis 29:28 and jacob did so, and fulfilled her week; and he gave him rachel his daughter to wife.
english: And Jacob did so, and fulfilled her week; and he gave him Rachel his daughter to wife.

searchText: genesis 29:29 and laban gave to rachel his daughter bilhah his handmaid to be her handmaid.
english: And Laban gave to Rachel his daughter Bilhah his handmaid to be her handmaid.

searchText: genesis 29:30 and he went in also unto rachel, and he loved rachel more than leah, and served with him yet seven other years.
english: And he went in also unto Rachel, and he loved Rachel more than Leah, and served with him yet seven other years.

searchText: genesis 29:31 and the lord saw that leah was hated, and he opened her womb; but rachel was barren.
english: And the LORD saw that Leah was hated, and he opened her womb; but Rachel was barren.

searchText: genesis 29:32 and leah conceived, and bore a son, and she called his name reuben; for she said: ‘because the lord hath looked upon my affliction; for now my husband will love me.’
english: And Leah conceived, and bore a son, and she called his name Reuben; for she said: ‘Because the LORD hath looked upon my affliction; for now my husband will love me.’

searchText: genesis 29:33 and she conceived again, and bore a son; and said: ‘because the lord hath heard that i am hated, he hath therefore given me this son also.’ and she called his name simeon.
