english: And she conceived again, and bore a son; and said: ‘Because the LORD hath heard that I am hated, He hath therefore given me this son also.’ And she called his name Simeon.

searchText: genesis 29:34 and she conceived again, and bore a son; and said: ‘now this time will my husband be joined unto me, because i have borne him three sons.’ therefore was his name called levi.
english: And she conceived again, and bore a son; and said: ‘Now this time will my husband be joined unto me, because I have borne him three sons.’ Therefore was his name called Levi.

searchText: genesis 29:35 and she conceived again, and bore a son; and she said: ‘this time will i praise the lord.’ therefore she called his name judah; and she left off bearing.
english: And she conceived again, and bore a son; and she said: ‘This time will I praise the LORD.’ Therefore she called his name Judah; and she left off bearing.

searchText: genesis 30:1 and when rachel saw that she bore jacob no children, rachel envied her sister; and she said unto jacob: ‘give me children, or else i die.’
english: And when Rachel saw that she bore Jacob no children, Rachel envied her sister; and she said unto Jacob: ‘Give me children, or else I die.’

searchText: genesis 30:2 and jacob’s anger was kindled against rachel; and he said: ‘am i in god’s stead, who hath withheld from thee the fruit of the womb?’
english: And Jacob’s anger was kindled against Rachel; and he said: ‘Am I in God’s stead, who hath withheld from thee the fruit of the womb?’

searchText: genesis 30:3 and she said: ‘behold my maid bilhah, go in unto her; that she may bear upon my knees, and i also may be builded up through her.’
english: And she said: ‘Behold my maid Bilhah, go in unto her; that she may bear upon my knees, and I also may be builded up through her.’

searchText: genesis 30:4 and she gave him bilhah her handmaid to wife; and jacob went in unto her.
english: And she gave him Bilhah her handmaid to wife; and Jacob went in unto her.

searchText: genesis 30:5 and bilhah conceived, and bore jacob a son.
english: And Bilhah conceived, and bore Jacob a son.

searchText: genesis 30:6 and rachel said: ‘god hath judged me, and hath also heard my voice, and hath given me a son.’ therefore called she his name dan.
english: And Rachel said: ‘God hath judged me, and hath also heard my voice, and hath given me a son.’ Therefore called she his name Dan.

searchText: genesis 30:7 and bilhah rachel’s handmaid conceived again, and bore jacob a second son.
english: And Bilhah Rachel’s handmaid conceived again, and bore Jacob a second son.

searchText: genesis 30:8 and rachel said: ‘with mighty wrestlings have i wrestled with my sister, and have prevailed.’ and she called his name naphtali.
english: And Rachel said: ‘With mighty wrestlings have I wrestled with my sister, and have prevailed.’ And she called his name Naphtali.

searchText: genesis 30:9 when leah saw that she had left off bearing, she took zilpah her handmaid, and gave her to jacob to wife.
english: When Leah saw that she had left off bearing, she took Zilpah her handmaid, and gave her to Jacob to wife.

searchText: genesis 30:10 and zilpah leah’s handmaid bore jacob a son.
english: And Zilpah Leah’s handmaid bore Jacob a son.

searchText: genesis 30:11 and leah said: ‘fortune is come! ’ and she called his name gad.
english: And Leah said: ‘Fortune is come! ’ And she called his name Gad.

searchText: genesis 30:12 and zilpah leah’s handmaid bore jacob a second son.
english: And Zilpah Leah’s handmaid bore Jacob a second son.

searchText: genesis 30:13 and leah said: ‘happy am i! for the daughters will call me happy.’ and she called his name asher.
english: And Leah said: ‘Happy am I! for the daughters will call me happy.’ And she called his name Asher.

searchText: genesis 30:14 and reuben went in the days of wheat harvest, and found mandrakes in the field, and brought them unto his mother leah. then rachel said to leah: ‘give me, i pray thee, of thy son’s mandrakes.’
english: And Reuben went in the days of wheat harvest, and found mandrakes in the field, and brought them unto his mother Leah. Then Rachel said to Leah: ‘Give me, I pray thee, of thy son’s mandrakes.’

searchText: genesis 30:15 and she said unto her: ‘is it a small matter that thou hast taken away my husband? and wouldest thou take away my son’s mandrakes also?’ and rachel said: ‘therefore he shall lie with thee to-night for thy son’s mandrakes.’
english: And she said unto her: ‘Is it a small matter that thou hast taken away my husband? and wouldest thou take away my son’s mandrakes also?’ And Rachel said: ‘Therefore he shall lie with thee to-night for thy son’s mandrakes.’

searchText: genesis 30:16 and jacob came from the field in the evening, and leah went out to meet him, and said: ‘thou must come in unto me; for i have surely hired thee with my son’s mandrakes.’ and he lay with her that night.
english: And Jacob came from the field in the evening, and Leah went out to meet him, and said: ‘Thou must come in unto me; for I have surely hired thee with my son’s mandrakes.’ And he lay with her that night.

searchText: genesis 30:17 and god hearkened unto leah, and she conceived, and bore jacob a fifth son.
english: And God hearkened unto Leah, and she conceived, and bore Jacob a fifth son.

searchText: genesis 30:18 and leah said: ‘god hath given me my hire, because i gave my handmaid to my husband. and she called his name issachar.
english: And Leah said: ‘God hath given me my hire, because I gave my handmaid to my husband. And she called his name Issachar.

searchText: genesis 30:19 and leah conceived again, and bore a sixth son to jacob.
english: And Leah conceived again, and bore a sixth son to Jacob.

searchText: genesis 30:20 and leah said: ‘god hath endowed me with a good dowry; now will my husband dwell with me, because i have borne him six sons.’ and she called his name zebulun.
english: And Leah said: ‘God hath endowed me with a good dowry; now will my husband dwell with me, because I have borne him six sons.’ And she called his name Zebulun.

searchText: genesis 30:21 and afterwards she bore a daughter, and called her name dinah.
english: And afterwards she bore a daughter, and called her name Dinah.

searchText: genesis 30:22 and god remembered rachel, and god hearkened to her, and opened her womb.
english: And God remembered Rachel, and God hearkened to her, and opened her womb.

searchText: genesis 30:23 and she conceived, and bore a son, and said: ‘god hath taken away my reproach.’
english: And she conceived, and bore a son, and said: ‘God hath taken away my reproach.’

searchText: genesis 30:24 and she called his name joseph, saying: ‘the lord add to me another son.’
english: And she called his name Joseph, saying: ‘The LORD add to me another son.’

searchText: genesis 30:25 and it came to pass, when rachel had borne joseph, that jacob said unto laban: ‘send me away, that i may go unto mine own place, and to my country.
english: And it came to pass, when Rachel had borne Joseph, that Jacob said unto Laban: ‘Send me away, that I may go unto mine own place, and to my country.

searchText: genesis 30:26 give me my wives and my children for whom i have served thee, and let me go; for thou knowest my service wherewith i have served thee.’
english: Give me my wives and my children for whom I have served thee, and let me go; for thou knowest my service wherewith I have served thee.’

searchText: genesis 30:27 and laban said unto him: ‘if now i have found favour in thine eyes—i have observed the signs, and the lord hath blessed me for thy sake.’
english: And Laban said unto him: ‘If now I have found favour in thine eyes—I have observed the signs, and the LORD hath blessed me for thy sake.’

searchText: genesis 30:28 and he said: ‘appoint me thy wages, and i will give it.’
english: And he said: ‘Appoint me thy wages, and I will give it.’

searchText: genesis 30:29 and he said unto him: ‘thou knowest how i have served thee, and how thy cattle have fared with me.
english: And he said unto him: ‘Thou knowest how I have served thee, and how thy cattle have fared with me.

searchText: genesis 30:30 for it was little which thou hadst before i came, and it hath increased abundantly; and the lord hath blessed thee whithersoever i turned. and now when shall i provide for mine own house also?’
english: For it was little which thou hadst before I came, and it hath increased abundantly; and the LORD hath blessed thee whithersoever I turned. And now when shall I provide for mine own house also?’

searchText: genesis 30:31 and he said: ‘what shall i give thee?’ and jacob said: ‘thou shalt not give me aught; if thou wilt do this thing for me, i will again feed thy flock and keep it.
english: And he said: ‘What shall I give thee?’ And Jacob said: ‘Thou shalt not give me aught; if thou wilt do this thing for me, I will again feed thy flock and keep it.

searchText: genesis 30:32 i will pass through all thy flock to-day, removing from thence every speckled and spotted one, and every dark one among the sheep, and the spotted and speckled among the goats; and of such shall be my hire.
english: I will pass through all thy flock to-day, removing from thence every speckled and spotted one, and every dark one among the sheep, and the spotted and speckled among the goats; and of such shall be my hire.

searchText: genesis 30:33 so shall my righteousness witness against me hereafter, when thou shalt come to look over my hire that is before thee: every one that is not speckled and spotted among the goats, and dark among the sheep, that if found with me shall be counted stolen.’
english: So shall my righteousness witness against me hereafter, when thou shalt come to look over my hire that is before thee: every one that is not speckled and spotted among the goats, and dark among the sheep, that if found with me shall be counted stolen.’

searchText: genesis 30:34 and laban said: ‘behold, would it might be according to thy word.’
english: And Laban said: ‘Behold, would it might be according to thy word.’

searchText: genesis 30:35 and he removed that day the he-goats that were streaked and spotted, and all the she-goats that were speckled and spotted, every one that had white in it, and all the dark ones among the sheep, and gave them into the hand of his sons.
english: And he removed that day the he-goats that were streaked and spotted, and all the she-goats that were speckled and spotted, every one that had white in it, and all the dark ones among the sheep, and gave them into the hand of his sons.

searchText: genesis 30:36 and he set three days’journey betwixt himself and jacob. and jacob fed the rest of laban’s flocks.
english: And he set three days’journey betwixt himself and Jacob. And Jacob fed the rest of Laban’s flocks.

searchText: genesis 30:37 and jacob took him rods of fresh poplar, and of the almond and of the plane-tree; and peeled white streaks in them, making the white appear which was in the rods.
english: And Jacob took him rods of fresh poplar, and of the almond and of the plane-tree; and peeled white streaks in them, making the white appear which was in the rods.

searchText: genesis 30:38 and he set the rods which he had peeled over against the flocks in the gutters in the watering-troughs where the flocks came to drink; and they conceived when they came to drink.
english: And he set the rods which he had peeled over against the flocks in the gutters in the watering-troughs where the flocks came to drink; and they conceived when they came to drink.

searchText: genesis 30:39 and the flocks conceived at the sight of the rods, and the flocks brought forth streaked, speckled, and spotted.
english: And the flocks conceived at the sight of the rods, and the flocks brought forth streaked, speckled, and spotted.

searchText: genesis 30:40 and jacob separated the lambs—he also set the faces of the flocks toward the streaked and all the dark in the flock of laban— and put his own droves apart, and put them not unto laban’s flock.
english: And Jacob separated the lambs—he also set the faces of the flocks toward the streaked and all the dark in the flock of Laban— and put his own droves apart, and put them not unto Laban’s flock.

searchText: genesis 30:41 and it came to pass, whensoever the stronger of the flock did conceive, that jacob laid the rods before the eyes of the flock in the gutters, that they might conceive among the rods;
english: And it came to pass, whensoever the stronger of the flock did conceive, that Jacob laid the rods before the eyes of the flock in the gutters, that they might conceive among the rods;

searchText: genesis 30:42 but when the flock were feeble, he put them not in; so the feebler were laban’s, and the stronger jacob’s.
english: but when the flock were feeble, he put them not in; so the feebler were Laban’s, and the stronger Jacob’s.

searchText: genesis 30:43 and the man increased exceedingly, and had large flocks, and maid-servants and men-servants, and camels and asses.
english: And the man increased exceedingly, and had large flocks, and maid-servants and men-servants, and camels and asses.

searchText: genesis 31:1 and he heard the words of laban’s sons, saying: ‘jacob hath taken away all that was our father’s; and of that which was our father’s hath he gotten all this wealth.’
english: And he heard the words of Laban’s sons, saying: ‘Jacob hath taken away all that was our father’s; and of that which was our father’s hath he gotten all this wealth.’

searchText: genesis 31:2 and jacob beheld the countenance of laban, and, behold, it was not toward him as beforetime.
english: And Jacob beheld the countenance of Laban, and, behold, it was not toward him as beforetime.

searchText: genesis 31:3 and the lord said unto jacob: ‘return unto the land of thy fathers, and to thy kindred; and i will be with thee.’
english: And the LORD said unto Jacob: ‘Return unto the land of thy fathers, and to thy kindred; and I will be with thee.’

searchText: genesis 31:4 and jacob sent and called rachel and leah to the field unto his flock,
english: And Jacob sent and called Rachel and Leah to the field unto his flock,

searchText: genesis 31:5 and said unto them: ‘i see your father’s countenance, that it is not toward me as beforetime; but the god of my father hath been with me.
english: and said unto them: ‘I see your father’s countenance, that it is not toward me as beforetime; but the God of my father hath been with me.

searchText: genesis 31:6 and ye know that with all my power i have served your father.
english: And ye know that with all my power I have served your father.

searchText: genesis 31:7 and your father hath mocked me, and changed my wages ten times; but god suffered him not to hurt me.
english: And your father hath mocked me, and changed my wages ten times; but God suffered him not to hurt me.

searchText: genesis 31:8 if he said thus: the speckled shall be thy wages; then all the flock bore speckled; and if he said thus: the streaked shall be thy wages; then bore all the flock streaked.
english: If he said thus: The speckled shall be thy wages; then all the flock bore speckled; and if he said thus: The streaked shall be thy wages; then bore all the flock streaked.

searchText: genesis 31:9 thus god hath taken away the cattle of your father, and given them to me.
english: Thus God hath taken away the cattle of your father, and given them to me.

searchText: genesis 31:10 and it came to pass at the time that the flock conceived, that i lifted up mine eyes, and saw in a dream, and, behold, the he-goats which leaped upon the flock were streaked, speckled, and grizzled.
english: And it came to pass at the time that the flock conceived, that I lifted up mine eyes, and saw in a dream, and, behold, the he-goats which leaped upon the flock were streaked, speckled, and grizzled.

searchText: genesis 31:11 and the angel of god said unto me in the dream: jacob; and i said: here am i.
english: And the angel of God said unto me in the dream: Jacob; and I said: Here am I.

searchText: genesis 31:12 and he said: lift up now thine eyes, and see, all the he-goats which leap upon the flock are streaked, speckled, and grizzled; for i have seen all that laban doeth unto thee.
english: And he said: Lift up now thine eyes, and see, all the he-goats which leap upon the flock are streaked, speckled, and grizzled; for I have seen all that Laban doeth unto thee.

searchText: genesis 31:13 i am the god of beth-el, where thou didst anoint a pillar, where thou didst vow a vow unto me. now arise, get thee out from this land, and return unto the land of thy nativity.’
english: I am the God of Beth-el, where thou didst anoint a pillar, where thou didst vow a vow unto Me. Now arise, get thee out from this land, and return unto the land of thy nativity.’

searchText: genesis 31:14 and rachel and leah answered and said unto him: ‘is there yet any portion or inheritance for us in our father’s house?
english: And Rachel and Leah answered and said unto him: ‘Is there yet any portion or inheritance for us in our father’s house?

searchText: genesis 31:15 are we not accounted by him strangers? for he hath sold us, and hath also quite devoured our price.
english: Are we not accounted by him strangers? for he hath sold us, and hath also quite devoured our price.

searchText: genesis 31:16 for all the riches which god hath taken away from our father, that is ours and our children’s. now then, whatsoever god hath said unto thee, do.’
english: For all the riches which God hath taken away from our father, that is ours and our children’s. Now then, whatsoever God hath said unto thee, do.’

searchText: genesis 31:17 then jacob rose up, and set his sons and his wives upon the camels;
english: Then Jacob rose up, and set his sons and his wives upon the camels;

searchText: genesis 31:18 and he carried away all his cattle, and all his substance which he had gathered, the cattle of his getting, which he had gathered in paddan-aram, to go to isaac his father unto the land of canaan.
english: and he carried away all his cattle, and all his substance which he had gathered, the cattle of his getting, which he had gathered in Paddan-aram, to go to Isaac his father unto the land of Canaan.

searchText: genesis 31:19 now laban was gone to shear his sheep. and rachel stole the teraphim that were her father’s.
english: Now Laban was gone to shear his sheep. And Rachel stole the teraphim that were her father’s.

searchText: genesis 31:20 and jacob outwitted laban the aramean, in that he told him not that he fled.
english: And Jacob outwitted Laban the Aramean, in that he told him not that he fled.

searchText: genesis 31:21 so he fled with all that he had; and he rose up, and passed over the river, and set his face toward the mountain of gilead.
english: So he fled with all that he had; and he rose up, and passed over the River, and set his face toward the mountain of Gilead.

searchText: genesis 31:22 and it was told laban on the third day that jacob was fled.
english: And it was told Laban on the third day that Jacob was fled.

searchText: genesis 31:23 and he took his brethren with him, and pursued after him seven days’journey; and he overtook him in the mountain of gilead.
english: And he took his brethren with him, and pursued after him seven days’journey; and he overtook him in the mountain of Gilead.

searchText: genesis 31:24 and god came to laban the aramean in a dream of the night, and said unto him: ‘take heed to thyself that thou speak not to jacob either good or bad.’
english: And God came to Laban the Aramean in a dream of the night, and said unto him: ‘Take heed to thyself that thou speak not to Jacob either good or bad.’

searchText: genesis 31:25 and laban came up with jacob. now jacob had pitched his tent in the mountain; and laban with his brethren pitched in the mountain of gilead.
english: And Laban came up with Jacob. Now Jacob had pitched his tent in the mountain; and Laban with his brethren pitched in the mountain of Gilead.

searchText: genesis 31:26 and laban said to jacob: ‘what hast thou done, that thou hast outwitted me, and carried away my daughters as though captives of the sword?
english: And Laban said to Jacob: ‘What hast thou done, that thou hast outwitted me, and carried away my daughters as though captives of the sword?

searchText: genesis 31:27 wherefore didst thou flee secretly, and outwit me; and didst not tell me, that i might have sent thee away with mirth and with songs, with tabret and with harp;
english: Wherefore didst thou flee secretly, and outwit me; and didst not tell me, that I might have sent thee away with mirth and with songs, with tabret and with harp;

searchText: genesis 31:28 and didst not suffer me to kiss my sons and my daughters? now hast thou done foolishly.
english: and didst not suffer me to kiss my sons and my daughters? now hast thou done foolishly.

searchText: genesis 31:29 it is in the power of my hand to do you hurt; but the god of your father spoke unto me yesternight, saying: take heed to thyself that thou speak not to jacob either good or bad.
english: It is in the power of my hand to do you hurt; but the God of your father spoke unto me yesternight, saying: Take heed to thyself that thou speak not to Jacob either good or bad.

searchText: genesis 31:30 and now that thou art surely gone, because thou sore longest after thy father’s house, wherefore hast thou stolen my gods?’
english: And now that thou art surely gone, because thou sore longest after thy father’s house, wherefore hast thou stolen my gods?’

searchText: genesis 31:31 and jacob answered and said to laban: ‘because i was afraid; for i said: lest thou shouldest take thy daughters from me by force.
english: And Jacob answered and said to Laban: ‘Because I was afraid; for I said: Lest thou shouldest take thy daughters from me by force.

searchText: genesis 31:32 with whomsoever thou findest thy gods, he shall not live; before our brethren discern thou what is thine with me, and take it to thee.’—for jacob knew not that rachel had stolen them.—
english: With whomsoever thou findest thy gods, he shall not live; before our brethren discern thou what is thine with me, and take it to thee.’—For Jacob knew not that Rachel had stolen them.—

searchText: genesis 31:33 and laban went into jacob’s tent, and into leah’s tent, and into the tent of the two maid-servants; but he found them not. and he went out of leah’s tent, and entered into rachel’s tent.
english: And Laban went into Jacob’s tent, and into Leah’s tent, and into the tent of the two maid-servants; but he found them not. And he went out of Leah’s tent, and entered into Rachel’s tent.

searchText: genesis 31:34 now rachel had taken the teraphim, and put them in the saddle of the camel, and sat upon them. and laban felt about all the tent, but found them not.
english: Now Rachel had taken the teraphim, and put them in the saddle of the camel, and sat upon them. And Laban felt about all the tent, but found them not.

searchText: genesis 31:35 and she said to her father: ‘let not my lord be angry that i cannot rise up before thee; for the manner of women is upon me.’ and he searched, but found not the teraphim.
english: And she said to her father: ‘Let not my lord be angry that I cannot rise up before thee; for the manner of women is upon me.’ And he searched, but found not the teraphim.

searchText: genesis 31:36 and jacob was wroth, and strove with laban. and jacob answered and said to laban: ‘what is my trespass? what is my sin, that thou hast hotly pursued after me?
english: And Jacob was wroth, and strove with Laban. And Jacob answered and said to Laban: ‘What is my trespass? what is my sin, that thou hast hotly pursued after me?

searchText: genesis 31:37 whereas thou hast felt about all my stuff, what hast thou found of all thy household stuff? set it here before my brethren and thy brethren, that they may judge betwixt us two.
english: Whereas thou hast felt about all my stuff, what hast thou found of all thy household stuff? Set it here before my brethren and thy brethren, that they may judge betwixt us two.

searchText: genesis 31:38 these twenty years have i been with thee; thy ewes and thy she-goats have not cast their young, and the rams of thy flocks have i not eaten.
english: These twenty years have I been with thee; thy ewes and thy she-goats have not cast their young, and the rams of thy flocks have I not eaten.

searchText: genesis 31:39 that which was torn of beasts i brought not unto thee; i bore the loss of it; of my hand didst thou require it, whether stolen by day or stolen by night.
english: That which was torn of beasts I brought not unto thee; I bore the loss of it; of my hand didst thou require it, whether stolen by day or stolen by night.

searchText: genesis 31:40 thus i was: in the day the drought consumed me, and the frost by night; and my sleep fled from mine eyes.
english: Thus I was: in the day the drought consumed me, and the frost by night; and my sleep fled from mine eyes.

searchText: genesis 31:41 these twenty years have i been in thy house: i served thee fourteen years for thy two daughters, and six years for thy flock; and thou hast changed my wages ten times.
english: These twenty years have I been in thy house: I served thee fourteen years for thy two daughters, and six years for thy flock; and thou hast changed my wages ten times.

searchText: genesis 31:42 except the god of my father, the god of abraham, and the fear of isaac, had been on my side, surely now hadst thou sent me away empty. god hath seen mine affliction and the labour of my hands, and gave judgment yesternight.’
english: Except the God of my father, the God of Abraham, and the Fear of Isaac, had been on my side, surely now hadst thou sent me away empty. God hath seen mine affliction and the labour of my hands, and gave judgment yesternight.’

searchText: genesis 31:43 and laban answered and said unto jacob: ‘the daughters are my daughters, and the children are my children, and the flocks are my flocks, and all that thou seest is mine; and what can i do this day for these my daughters, or for their children whom they have borne?
english: And Laban answered and said unto Jacob: ‘The daughters are my daughters, and the children are my children, and the flocks are my flocks, and all that thou seest is mine; and what can I do this day for these my daughters, or for their children whom they have borne?

searchText: genesis 31:44 and now come, let us make a covenant, i and thou; and let it be for a witness between me and thee.’
english: And now come, let us make a covenant, I and thou; and let it be for a witness between me and thee.’

searchText: genesis 31:45 and jacob took a stone, and set it up for a pillar.
english: And Jacob took a stone, and set it up for a pillar.

searchText: genesis 31:46 and jacob said unto his brethren: ‘gather stones’; and they took stones, and made a heap. and they did eat there by the heap.
english: And Jacob said unto his brethren: ‘Gather stones’; and they took stones, and made a heap. And they did eat there by the heap.

searchText: genesis 31:47 and laban called it jegar-sahadutha; but jacob called it galeed.
english: And Laban called it Jegar-sahadutha; but Jacob called it Galeed.

searchText: genesis 31:48 and laban said: ‘this heap is witness between me and thee this day.’ therefore was the name of it called galeed;
english: And Laban said: ‘This heap is witness between me and thee this day.’ Therefore was the name of it called Galeed;

searchText: genesis 31:49 and mizpah, for he said: ‘the lord watch between me and thee, when we are absent one from another.
english: and Mizpah, for he said: ‘The LORD watch between me and thee, when we are absent one from another.

searchText: genesis 31:50 if thou shalt afflict my daughters, and if thou shalt take wives beside my daughters, no man being with us; see, god is witness betwixt me and thee.’
english: If thou shalt afflict my daughters, and if thou shalt take wives beside my daughters, no man being with us; see, God is witness betwixt me and thee.’

searchText: genesis 31:51 and laban said to jacob: ‘behold this heap, and behold the pillar, which i have set up betwixt me and thee.
english: And Laban said to Jacob: ‘Behold this heap, and behold the pillar, which I have set up betwixt me and thee.

searchText: genesis 31:52 this heap be witness, and the pillar be witness, that i will not pass over this heap to thee, and that thou shalt not pass over this heap and this pillar unto me, for harm.
english: This heap be witness, and the pillar be witness, that I will not pass over this heap to thee, and that thou shalt not pass over this heap and this pillar unto me, for harm.

searchText: genesis 31:53 the god of abraham, and the god of nahor, the god of their father, judge betwixt us.’ and jacob swore by the fear of his father isaac.
english: The God of Abraham, and the God of Nahor, the God of their father, judge betwixt us.’ And Jacob swore by the Fear of his father Isaac.

searchText: genesis 31:54 and jacob offered a sacrifice in the mountain, and called his brethren to eat bread; and they did eat bread, and tarried all night in the mountain.
english: And Jacob offered a sacrifice in the mountain, and called his brethren to eat bread; and they did eat bread, and tarried all night in the mountain.

searchText: genesis 32:1 and laban arose early in the morning, kissed his sons and daughters, and blessed them; and then laban went and returned to his place.
english: And Laban arose early in the morning, kissed his sons and daughters, and blessed them; and then Laban went and returned to his place.

searchText: genesis 32:2 and jacob went on his way, and the angels of god met him.
english: And Jacob went on his way, and the angels of God met him.

searchText: genesis 32:3 and jacob said when he saw them: ‘this is god’s camp.’ and he called the name of that place mahanaim.
english: And Jacob said when he saw them: ‘This is God’s camp.’ And he called the name of that place Mahanaim.

searchText: genesis 32:4 and jacob sent messengers before him to esau his brother unto the land of seir, the field of edom.
english: And Jacob sent messengers before him to Esau his brother unto the land of Seir, the field of Edom.

searchText: genesis 32:5 and he commanded them, saying: ‘thus shall ye say unto my lord esau: thus saith thy servant jacob: i have sojourned with laban, and stayed until now.
english: And he commanded them, saying: ‘Thus shall ye say unto my lord Esau: Thus saith thy servant Jacob: I have sojourned with Laban, and stayed until now.

searchText: genesis 32:6 and i have oxen, and asses and flocks, and men-servants and maid-servants; and i have sent to tell my lord, that i may find favour in thy sight.’
english: And I have oxen, and asses and flocks, and men-servants and maid-servants; and I have sent to tell my lord, that I may find favour in thy sight.’

searchText: genesis 32:7 and the messengers returned to jacob, saying: ‘we came to thy brother esau, and moreover he cometh to meet thee, and four hundred men with him.’
english: And the messengers returned to Jacob, saying: ‘We came to thy brother Esau, and moreover he cometh to meet thee, and four hundred men with him.’

searchText: genesis 32:8 then jacob was greatly afraid and was distressed. and he divided the people that was with him, and the flocks, and the herds, and the camels, into two camps.
english: Then Jacob was greatly afraid and was distressed. And he divided the people that was with him, and the flocks, and the herds, and the camels, into two camps.

searchText: genesis 32:9 and he said: ‘if esau come to the one camp, and smite it, then the camp which is left shall escape.’
english: And he said: ‘If Esau come to the one camp, and smite it, then the camp which is left shall escape.’

searchText: genesis 32:10 and jacob said: ‘o god of my father abraham, and god of my father isaac, o lord, who saidst unto me: return unto thy country, and to thy kindred, and i will do thee good;
english: And Jacob said: ‘O God of my father Abraham, and God of my father Isaac, O LORD, who saidst unto me: Return unto thy country, and to thy kindred, and I will do thee good;

searchText: genesis 32:11 i am not worthy of all the mercies, and of all the truth, which thou hast shown unto thy servant; for with my staff i passed over this jordan; and now i am become two camps.
english: I am not worthy of all the mercies, and of all the truth, which Thou hast shown unto Thy servant; for with my staff I passed over this Jordan; and now I am become two camps.

searchText: genesis 32:12 deliver me, i pray thee, from the hand of my brother, from the hand of esau; for i fear him, lest he come and smite me, the mother with the children.
english: Deliver me, I pray Thee, from the hand of my brother, from the hand of Esau; for I fear him, lest he come and smite me, the mother with the children.

searchText: genesis 32:13 and thou saidst: i will surely do thee good, and make thy seed as the sand of the sea, which cannot be numbered for multitude.’
english: And Thou saidst: I will surely do thee good, and make thy seed as the sand of the sea, which cannot be numbered for multitude.’

searchText: genesis 32:14 and he lodged there that night; and took of that which he had with him a present for esau his brother:
english: And he lodged there that night; and took of that which he had with him a present for Esau his brother:

searchText: genesis 32:15 two hundred she-goats and twenty he-goats, two hundred ewes and twenty rams,
english: two hundred she-goats and twenty he-goats, two hundred ewes and twenty rams,

searchText: genesis 32:16 thirty milch camels and their colts, forty kine and ten bulls, twenty she-asses and ten foals.
english: thirty milch camels and their colts, forty kine and ten bulls, twenty she-asses and ten foals.

searchText: genesis 32:17 and he delivered them into the hand of his servants, every drove by itself; and said unto his servants: ‘pass over before me, and put a space betwixt drove and drove.’
english: And he delivered them into the hand of his servants, every drove by itself; and said unto his servants: ‘Pass over before me, and put a space betwixt drove and drove.’

searchText: genesis 32:18 and he commanded the foremost, saying: ‘when esau my brother meeteth thee, and asketh thee, saying: whose art thou? and whither goest thou? and whose are these before thee?
english: And he commanded the foremost, saying: ‘When Esau my brother meeteth thee, and asketh thee, saying: Whose art thou? and whither goest thou? and whose are these before thee?

searchText: genesis 32:19 then thou shalt say: they are thy servant jacob’s; it is a present sent unto my lord, even unto esau; and, behold, he also is behind us.’
english: then thou shalt say: They are thy servant Jacob’s; it is a present sent unto my lord, even unto Esau; and, behold, he also is behind us.’

searchText: genesis 32:20 and he commanded also the second, and the third, and all that followed the droves, saying: ‘in this manner shall ye speak unto esau, when ye find him;
english: And he commanded also the second, and the third, and all that followed the droves, saying: ‘In this manner shall ye speak unto Esau, when ye find him;

searchText: genesis 32:21 and ye shall say: moreover, behold, thy servant jacob is behind us.’ for he said: ‘i will appease him with the present that goeth before me, and afterward i will see his face; peradventure he will accept me.’
english: and ye shall say: Moreover, behold, thy servant Jacob is behind us.’ For he said: ‘I will appease him with the present that goeth before me, and afterward I will see his face; peradventure he will accept me.’

searchText: genesis 32:22 so the present passed over before him; and he himself lodged that night in the camp.
english: So the present passed over before him; and he himself lodged that night in the camp.

searchText: genesis 32:23 and he rose up that night, and took his two wives, and his two handmaids, and his eleven children, and passed over the ford of the jabbok.
english: And he rose up that night, and took his two wives, and his two handmaids, and his eleven children, and passed over the ford of the Jabbok.

searchText: genesis 32:24 and he took them, and sent them over the stream, and sent over that which he had.
english: And he took them, and sent them over the stream, and sent over that which he had.

searchText: genesis 32:25 and jacob was left alone; and there wrestled a man with him until the breaking of the day.
english: And Jacob was left alone; and there wrestled a man with him until the breaking of the day.

searchText: genesis 32:26 and when he saw that he prevailed not against him, he touched the hollow of his thigh; and the hollow of jacob’s thigh was strained, as he wrestled with him.
english: And when he saw that he prevailed not against him, he touched the hollow of his thigh; and the hollow of Jacob’s thigh was strained, as he wrestled with him.

searchText: genesis 32:27 and he said: ‘let me go, for the day breaketh.’ and he said: ‘i will not let thee go, except thou bless me.’
english: And he said: ‘Let me go, for the day breaketh.’ And he said: ‘I will not let thee go, except thou bless me.’

searchText: genesis 32:28 and he said unto him: ‘what is thy name?’ and he said: ‘jacob.’
english: And he said unto him: ‘What is thy name?’ And he said: ‘Jacob.’

searchText: genesis 32:29 and he said: ‘thy name shall be called no more jacob, but israel; for thou hast striven with god and with men, and hast prevailed.’
english: And he said: ‘Thy name shall be called no more Jacob, but Israel; for thou hast striven with God and with men, and hast prevailed.’

searchText: genesis 32:30 and jacob asked him, and said: ‘tell me, i pray thee, thy name.’ and he said: ‘wherefore is it that thou dost ask after my name?’ and he blessed him there.
english: And Jacob asked him, and said: ‘Tell me, I pray thee, thy name.’ And he said: ‘Wherefore is it that thou dost ask after my name?’ And he blessed him there.

searchText: genesis 32:31 and jacob called the name of the place peniel: ‘for i have seen god face to face, and my life is preserved.’
english: And Jacob called the name of the place Peniel: ‘for I have seen God face to face, and my life is preserved.’

searchText: genesis 32:32 and the sun rose upon him as he passed over peniel, and he limped upon his thigh.
english: And the sun rose upon him as he passed over Peniel, and he limped upon his thigh.

searchText: genesis 32:33 therefore the children of israel eat not the sinew of the thigh-vein which is upon the hollow of the thigh, unto this day; because he touched the hollow of jacob’s thigh, even in the sinew of the thigh-vein.
english: Therefore the children of Israel eat not the sinew of the thigh-vein which is upon the hollow of the thigh, unto this day; because he touched the hollow of Jacob’s thigh, even in the sinew of the thigh-vein.

searchText: genesis 33:1 and jacob lifted up his eyes and looked, and, behold, esau came, and with him four hundred men. and he divided the children unto leah, and unto rachel, and unto the two handmaids.
english: And Jacob lifted up his eyes and looked, and, behold, Esau came, and with him four hundred men. And he divided the children unto Leah, and unto Rachel, and unto the two handmaids.

searchText: genesis 33:2 and he put the handmaids and their children foremost, and leah and her children after, and rachel and joseph hindermost.
english: And he put the handmaids and their children foremost, and Leah and her children after, and Rachel and Joseph hindermost.

searchText: genesis 33:3 and he himself passed over before them, and bowed himself to the ground seven times, until he came near to his brother.
english: And he himself passed over before them, and bowed himself to the ground seven times, until he came near to his brother.

searchText: genesis 33:4 and esau ran to meet him, and embraced him, and fell on his neck, and kissed him; and they wept.
english: And Esau ran to meet him, and embraced him, and fell on his neck, and kissed him; and they wept.

searchText: genesis 33:5 and he lifted up his eyes, and saw the women and the children; and said: ‘who are these with thee?’ and he said: ‘the children whom god hath graciously given thy servant.’
english: And he lifted up his eyes, and saw the women and the children; and said: ‘Who are these with thee?’ And he said: ‘The children whom God hath graciously given thy servant.’

searchText: genesis 33:6 then the handmaids came near, they and their children, and they bowed down.
english: Then the handmaids came near, they and their children, and they bowed down.

searchText: genesis 33:7 and leah also and her children came near, and bowed down; and after came joseph near and rachel, and they bowed down.
english: And Leah also and her children came near, and bowed down; and after came Joseph near and Rachel, and they bowed down.

searchText: genesis 33:8 and he said: ‘what meanest thou by all this camp which i met?’ and he said: ‘to find favour in the sight of my lord.’
english: And he said: ‘What meanest thou by all this camp which I met?’ And he said: ‘To find favour in the sight of my lord.’

searchText: genesis 33:9 and esau said: ‘i have enough; my brother, let that which thou hast be thine.’
english: And Esau said: ‘I have enough; my brother, let that which thou hast be thine.’

searchText: genesis 33:10 and jacob said: ‘nay, i pray thee, if now i have found favour in thy sight, then receive my present at my hand; forasmuch as i have seen thy face, as one seeth the face of god, and thou wast pleased with me.
english: And Jacob said: ‘Nay, I pray thee, if now I have found favour in thy sight, then receive my present at my hand; forasmuch as I have seen thy face, as one seeth the face of God, and thou wast pleased with me.

searchText: genesis 33:11 take, i pray thee, my gift that is brought to thee; because god hath dealt graciously with me, and because i have enough.’ and he urged him, and he took it.
english: Take, I pray thee, my gift that is brought to thee; because God hath dealt graciously with me, and because I have enough.’ And he urged him, and he took it.

searchText: genesis 33:12 and he said: ‘let us take our journey, and let us go, and i will go before thee.’
english: And he said: ‘Let us take our journey, and let us go, and I will go before thee.’

searchText: genesis 33:13 and he said unto him: ‘my lord knoweth that the children are tender, and that the flocks and herds giving suck are a care to me; and if they overdrive them one day, all the flocks will die.
english: And he said unto him: ‘My lord knoweth that the children are tender, and that the flocks and herds giving suck are a care to me; and if they overdrive them one day, all the flocks will die.

searchText: genesis 33:14 let my lord, i pray thee, pass over before his servant; and i will journey on gently, according to the pace of the cattle that are before me and according to the pace of the children, until i come unto my lord unto seir.’
english: Let my lord, I pray thee, pass over before his servant; and I will journey on gently, according to the pace of the cattle that are before me and according to the pace of the children, until I come unto my lord unto Seir.’

searchText: genesis 33:15 and esau said: ‘let me now leave with thee some of the folk that are with me.’ and he said: ‘what needeth it? let me find favour in the sight of my lord.’
english: And Esau said: ‘Let me now leave with thee some of the folk that are with me.’ And he said: ‘What needeth it? let me find favour in the sight of my lord.’

searchText: genesis 33:16 so esau returned that day on his way unto seir.
english: So Esau returned that day on his way unto Seir.

searchText: genesis 33:17 and jacob journeyed to succoth, and built him a house, and made booths for his cattle. therefore the name of the place is called succoth.
english: And Jacob journeyed to Succoth, and built him a house, and made booths for his cattle. Therefore the name of the place is called Succoth.

searchText: genesis 33:18 and jacob came in peace to the city of shechem, which is in the land of canaan, when he came from paddan-aram; and encamped before the city.
english: And Jacob came in peace to the city of Shechem, which is in the land of Canaan, when he came from Paddan-aram; and encamped before the city.

searchText: genesis 33:19 and he bought the parcel of ground, where he had spread his tent, at the hand of the children of hamor, shechem’s father, for a hundred pieces of money.
english: And he bought the parcel of ground, where he had spread his tent, at the hand of the children of Hamor, Shechem’s father, for a hundred pieces of money.

searchText: genesis 33:20 and he erected there an altar, and called it el-elohe-israel.
english: And he erected there an altar, and called it El-elohe-Israel.

searchText: genesis 34:1 and dinah the daughter of leah, whom she had borne unto jacob, went out to see the daughters of the land.
english: And Dinah the daughter of Leah, whom she had borne unto Jacob, went out to see the daughters of the land.

searchText: genesis 34:2 and shechem the son of hamor the hivite, the prince of the land, saw her; and he took her, and lay with her, and humbled her.
english: And Shechem the son of Hamor the Hivite, the prince of the land, saw her; and he took her, and lay with her, and humbled her.

searchText: genesis 34:3 and his soul did cleave unto dinah the daughter of jacob, and he loved the damsel, and spoke comfortingly unto the damsel.
english: And his soul did cleave unto Dinah the daughter of Jacob, and he loved the damsel, and spoke comfortingly unto the damsel.

searchText: genesis 34:4 and shechem spoke unto his father hamor, saying: ‘get me this damsel to wife.’
english: And Shechem spoke unto his father Hamor, saying: ‘Get me this damsel to wife.’

searchText: genesis 34:5 now jacob heard that he had defiled dinah his daughter; and his sons were with his cattle in the field; and jacob held his peace until they came.
english: Now Jacob heard that he had defiled Dinah his daughter; and his sons were with his cattle in the field; and Jacob held his peace until they came.

searchText: genesis 34:6 and hamor the father of shechem went out unto jacob to speak with him.
english: And Hamor the father of Shechem went out unto Jacob to speak with him.

searchText: genesis 34:7 and the sons of jacob came in from the field when they heard it; and the men were grieved, and they were very wroth, because he had wrought a vile deed in israel in lying with jacob’s daughter; which thing ought not to be done.
english: And the sons of Jacob came in from the field when they heard it; and the men were grieved, and they were very wroth, because he had wrought a vile deed in Israel in lying with Jacob’s daughter; which thing ought not to be done.

searchText: genesis 34:8 and hamor spoke with them, saying ‘the soul of my son shechem longeth for your daughter. i pray you give her unto him to wife.
english: And Hamor spoke with them, saying ‘The soul of my son Shechem longeth for your daughter. I pray you give her unto him to wife.

searchText: genesis 34:9 and make ye marriages with us; give your daughters unto us, and take our daughters unto you.
english: And make ye marriages with us; give your daughters unto us, and take our daughters unto you.

searchText: genesis 34:10 and ye shall dwell with us; and the land shall be before you; dwell and trade ye therein, and get you possessions therein.’
english: And ye shall dwell with us; and the land shall be before you; dwell and trade ye therein, and get you possessions therein.’

searchText: genesis 34:11 and shechem said unto her father and unto her brethren: ‘let me find favour in your eyes, and what ye shall say unto me i will give.
english: And Shechem said unto her father and unto her brethren: ‘Let me find favour in your eyes, and what ye shall say unto me I will give.

searchText: genesis 34:12 ask me never so much dowry and gift, and i will give according as ye shall say unto me; but give me the damsel to wife.’
english: Ask me never so much dowry and gift, and I will give according as ye shall say unto me; but give me the damsel to wife.’

searchText: genesis 34:13 and the sons of jacob answered shechem and hamor his father with guile, and spoke, because he had defiled dinah their sister,
english: And the sons of Jacob answered Shechem and Hamor his father with guile, and spoke, because he had defiled Dinah their sister,

searchText: genesis 34:14 and said unto them: ‘we cannot do this thing, to give our sister to one that is uncircumcised; for that were a reproach unto us.
english: and said unto them: ‘We cannot do this thing, to give our sister to one that is uncircumcised; for that were a reproach unto us.

searchText: genesis 34:15 only on this condition will we consent unto you: if ye will be as we are, that every male of you be circumcised;
english: Only on this condition will we consent unto you: if ye will be as we are, that every male of you be circumcised;

searchText: genesis 34:16 then will we give our daughters unto you, and we will take your daughters to us, and we will dwell with you, and we will become one people.
english: then will we give our daughters unto you, and we will take your daughters to us, and we will dwell with you, and we will become one people.

searchText: genesis 34:17 but if ye will not hearken unto us, to be circumcised; then will we take our daughter, and we will be gone.’
english: But if ye will not hearken unto us, to be circumcised; then will we take our daughter, and we will be gone.’

searchText: genesis 34:18 and their words pleased hamor, and shechem hamor’s son.
english: And their words pleased Hamor, and Shechem Hamor’s son.

searchText: genesis 34:19 and the young man deferred not to do the thing, because he had delight in jacob’s daughter. and he was honoured above all the house of his father.
english: And the young man deferred not to do the thing, because he had delight in Jacob’s daughter. And he was honoured above all the house of his father.

searchText: genesis 34:20 and hamor and shechem his son came unto the gate of their city, and spoke with the men of their city, saying:
english: And Hamor and Shechem his son came unto the gate of their city, and spoke with the men of their city, saying:

searchText: genesis 34:21 ’these men are peaceable with us; therefore let them dwell in the land, and trade therein; for, behold, the land is large enough for them; let us take their daughters to us for wives, and let us give them our daughters.
english: ’These men are peaceable with us; therefore let them dwell in the land, and trade therein; for, behold, the land is large enough for them; let us take their daughters to us for wives, and let us give them our daughters.

searchText: genesis 34:22 only on this condition will the men consent unto us to dwell with us, to become one people, if every male among us be circumcised, as they are circumcised.
english: Only on this condition will the men consent unto us to dwell with us, to become one people, if every male among us be circumcised, as they are circumcised.

searchText: genesis 34:23 shall not their cattle and their substance and all their beasts be ours? only let us consent unto them, and they will dwell with us.’
english: Shall not their cattle and their substance and all their beasts be ours? only let us consent unto them, and they will dwell with us.’

searchText: genesis 34:24 and unto hamor and unto shechem his son hearkened all that went out of the gate of his city; and every male was circumcised, all that went out of the gate of his city.
english: And unto Hamor and unto Shechem his son hearkened all that went out of the gate of his city; and every male was circumcised, all that went out of the gate of his city.

searchText: genesis 34:25 and it came to pass on the third day, when they were in pain, that two of the sons of jacob, simeon and levi, dinah’s brethren, took each man his sword, and came upon the city unawares, and slew all the males.
english: And it came to pass on the third day, when they were in pain, that two of the sons of Jacob, Simeon and Levi, Dinah’s brethren, took each man his sword, and came upon the city unawares, and slew all the males.

searchText: genesis 34:26 and they slew hamor and shechem his son with the edge of the sword, and took dinah out of shechem’s house, and went forth. .
english: And they slew Hamor and Shechem his son with the edge of the sword, and took Dinah out of Shechem’s house, and went forth. .

searchText: genesis 34:27 the sons of jacob came upon the slain, and spoiled the city, because they had defiled their sister.
english: The sons of Jacob came upon the slain, and spoiled the city, because they had defiled their sister.

searchText: genesis 34:28 they took their flocks and their herds and their asses, and that which was in the city and that which was in the field;
english: They took their flocks and their herds and their asses, and that which was in the city and that which was in the field;

searchText: genesis 34:29 and all their wealth, and all their little ones and their wives, took they captive and spoiled, even all that was in the house.
english: and all their wealth, and all their little ones and their wives, took they captive and spoiled, even all that was in the house.

searchText: genesis 34:30 and jacob said to simeon and levi: ‘ye have troubled me, to make me odious unto the inhabitants of the land, even unto the canaanites and the perizzites; and, i being few in number, they will gather themselves together against me and smite me; and i shall be destroyed, i and my house.’
english: And Jacob said to Simeon and Levi: ‘Ye have troubled me, to make me odious unto the inhabitants of the land, even unto the Canaanites and the Perizzites; and, I being few in number, they will gather themselves together against me and smite me; and I shall be destroyed, I and my house.’

searchText: genesis 34:31 and they said: ‘should one deal with our sister as with a harlot?’
english: And they said: ‘Should one deal with our sister as with a harlot?’

searchText: genesis 35:1 and god said unto jacob: ‘arise, go up to beth-el, and dwell there; and make there an altar unto god, who appeared unto thee when thou didst flee from the face of esau thy brother.’
english: And God said unto Jacob: ‘Arise, go up to Beth-el, and dwell there; and make there an altar unto God, who appeared unto thee when thou didst flee from the face of Esau thy brother.’

searchText: genesis 35:2 then jacob said unto his household, and to all that were with him: ‘put away the strange gods that are among you, and purify yourselves, and change your garments;
english: Then Jacob said unto his household, and to all that were with him: ‘Put away the strange gods that are among you, and purify yourselves, and change your garments;

searchText: genesis 35:3 and let us arise, and go up to beth-el; and i will make there an altar unto god, who answered me in the day of my distress, and was with me in the way which i went.’
english: and let us arise, and go up to Beth-el; and I will make there an altar unto God, who answered me in the day of my distress, and was with me in the way which I went.’

searchText: genesis 35:4 and they gave unto jacob all the foreign gods which were in their hand, and the rings which were in their ears; and jacob hid them under the terebinth which was by shechem.
english: And they gave unto Jacob all the foreign gods which were in their hand, and the rings which were in their ears; and Jacob hid them under the terebinth which was by Shechem.

searchText: genesis 35:5 and they journeyed; and a terror of god was upon the cities that were round about them, and they did not pursue after the sons of jacob.
english: And they journeyed; and a terror of God was upon the cities that were round about them, and they did not pursue after the sons of Jacob.

searchText: genesis 35:6 so jacob came to luz, which is in the land of canaan—the same is beth-el—he and all the people that were with him.
english: So Jacob came to Luz, which is in the land of Canaan—the same is Beth-el—he and all the people that were with him.

searchText: genesis 35:7 and he built there an altar, and called the place el-beth-el, because there god was revealed unto him, when he fled from the face of his brother.
english: And he built there an altar, and called the place El-beth-el, because there God was revealed unto him, when he fled from the face of his brother.

searchText: genesis 35:8 and deborah rebekah’s nurse died, and she was buried below beth-el under the oak; and the name of it was called allon-bacuth.
english: And Deborah Rebekah’s nurse died, and she was buried below Beth-el under the oak; and the name of it was called Allon-bacuth.

searchText: genesis 35:9 and god appeared unto jacob again, when he came from paddan-aram, and blessed him.
english: And God appeared unto Jacob again, when he came from Paddan-aram, and blessed him.

searchText: genesis 35:10 and god said unto him: ‘thy name is jacob: thy name shall not be called any more jacob, but israel shall be thy name’; and he called his name israel.
english: And God said unto him: ‘Thy name is Jacob: thy name shall not be called any more Jacob, but Israel shall be thy name’; and He called his name Israel.

searchText: genesis 35:11 and god said unto him: ‘i am god almighty. be fruitful and multiply; a nation and a company of nations shall be of thee, and kings shall come out of thy loins;
english: And God said unto him: ‘I am God Almighty. Be fruitful and multiply; a nation and a company of nations shall be of thee, and kings shall come out of thy loins;

searchText: genesis 35:12 and the land which i gave unto abraham and isaac, to thee i will give it, and to thy seed after thee will i give the land.’
english: and the land which I gave unto Abraham and Isaac, to thee I will give it, and to thy seed after thee will I give the land.’

searchText: genesis 35:13 and god went up from him in the place where he spoke with him.
english: And God went up from him in the place where He spoke with him.

searchText: genesis 35:14 and jacob set up a pillar in the place where he spoke with him, a pillar of stone, and he poured out a drink-offering thereon, and poured oil thereon.
english: And Jacob set up a pillar in the place where He spoke with him, a pillar of stone, and he poured out a drink-offering thereon, and poured oil thereon.

searchText: genesis 35:15 and jacob called the name of the place where god spoke with him, beth-el.
english: And Jacob called the name of the place where God spoke with him, Beth-el.

searchText: genesis 35:16 and they journeyed from beth-el; and there was still some way to come to ephrath; and rachel travailed, and she had hard labour.
english: And they journeyed from Beth-el; and there was still some way to come to Ephrath; and Rachel travailed, and she had hard labour.

searchText: genesis 35:17 and it came to pass, when she was in hard labour, that the mid-wife said unto her: ‘fear not; for this also is a son for thee.’
english: And it came to pass, when she was in hard labour, that the mid-wife said unto her: ‘Fear not; for this also is a son for thee.’

searchText: genesis 35:18 and it came to pass, as her soul was in departing—for she died—that she called his name ben-oni; but his father called him benjamin.
english: And it came to pass, as her soul was in departing—for she died—that she called his name Ben-oni; but his father called him Benjamin.

searchText: genesis 35:19 and rachel died, and was buried in the way to ephrath—the same is beth-lehem.
english: And Rachel died, and was buried in the way to Ephrath—the same is Beth-lehem.

searchText: genesis 35:20 and jacob set up a pillar upon her grave; the same is the pillar of rachel’s grave unto this day.
english: And Jacob set up a pillar upon her grave; the same is the pillar of Rachel’s grave unto this day.

searchText: genesis 35:21 and israel journeyed, and spread his tent beyond migdal-eder.
english: And Israel journeyed, and spread his tent beyond Migdal-eder.

searchText: genesis 35:22 and it came to pass, while israel dwelt in that land, that reuben went and lay with bilhah his father’s concubine; and israel heard of it. now the sons of jacob were twelve:
english: And it came to pass, while Israel dwelt in that land, that Reuben went and lay with Bilhah his father’s concubine; and Israel heard of it. Now the sons of Jacob were twelve:

searchText: genesis 35:23 the sons of leah: reuben, jacob’s first-born, and simeon, and levi, and judah, and issachar, and zebulun;
english: the sons of Leah: Reuben, Jacob’s first-born, and Simeon, and Levi, and Judah, and Issachar, and Zebulun;

searchText: genesis 35:24 the sons of rachel: joseph and benjamin;
english: the sons of Rachel: Joseph and Benjamin;

searchText: genesis 35:25 and the sons of bilhah, rachel’s handmaid: dan and naphtali;
english: and the sons of Bilhah, Rachel’s handmaid: Dan and Naphtali;

searchText: genesis 35:26 and the sons of zilpah, leah’s handmaid: gad and asher. these are the sons of jacob, that were born to him in paddan-aram.
english: and the sons of Zilpah, Leah’s handmaid: Gad and Asher. These are the sons of Jacob, that were born to him in Paddan-aram.

searchText: genesis 35:27 and jacob came unto isaac his father to mamre, to kiriatharba—the same is hebron—where abraham and isaac sojourned.
english: And Jacob came unto Isaac his father to Mamre, to Kiriatharba—the same is Hebron—where Abraham and Isaac sojourned.

searchText: genesis 35:28 and the days of isaac were a hundred and fourscore years.
english: And the days of Isaac were a hundred and fourscore years.

searchText: genesis 35:29 and isaac expired, and died, and was gathered unto his people, old and full of days; and esau and jacob his sons buried him.
english: And Isaac expired, and died, and was gathered unto his people, old and full of days; and Esau and Jacob his sons buried him.

searchText: genesis 36:1 now these are the generations of esau—the same is edom.
english: Now these are the generations of Esau—the same is Edom.

searchText: genesis 36:2 esau took his wives of the daughters of canaan; adah the daughter of elon the hittite, and oholibamah the daughter of anah, the daughter of zibeon the hivite,
english: Esau took his wives of the daughters of Canaan; Adah the daughter of Elon the Hittite, and Oholibamah the daughter of Anah, the daughter of Zibeon the Hivite,

searchText: genesis 36:3 and basemath ishmael’s daughter, sister of nebaioth.
english: and Basemath Ishmael’s daughter, sister of Nebaioth.

searchText: genesis 36:4 and adah bore to esau eliphaz; and basemath bore reuel;
english: And Adah bore to Esau Eliphaz; and Basemath bore Reuel;

searchText: genesis 36:5 and oholibamah bore jeush, and jalam, and korah. these are the sons of esau, that were born unto him in the land of canaan.
english: and Oholibamah bore Jeush, and Jalam, and Korah. These are the sons of Esau, that were born unto him in the land of Canaan.

searchText: genesis 36:6 and esau took his wives, and his sons, and his daughters, and all the souls of his house, and his cattle, and all his beasts, and all his possessions, which he had gathered in the land of canaan; and went into a land away from his brother jacob.
english: And Esau took his wives, and his sons, and his daughters, and all the souls of his house, and his cattle, and all his beasts, and all his possessions, which he had gathered in the land of Canaan; and went into a land away from his brother Jacob.

searchText: genesis 36:7 for their substance was too great for them to dwell together; and the land of their sojournings could not bear them because of their cattle.
english: For their substance was too great for them to dwell together; and the land of their sojournings could not bear them because of their cattle.

searchText: genesis 36:8 and esau dwelt in the mountain-land of seir—esau is edom.
english: And Esau dwelt in the mountain-land of Seir—Esau is Edom.

searchText: genesis 36:9 and these are the generations of esau the father of a the edomites in the mountain-land of seir.
english: And these are the generations of Esau the father of a the Edomites in the mountain-land of Seir.

searchText: genesis 36:10 these are the names of esau’s sons: eliphaz the son of adah the wife of esau, reuel the son of basemath the wife of esau.
english: These are the names of Esau’s sons: Eliphaz the son of Adah the wife of Esau, Reuel the son of Basemath the wife of Esau.

searchText: genesis 36:11 and the sons of eliphaz were teman, omar, zepho, and gatam, and kenaz.
english: And the sons of Eliphaz were Teman, Omar, Zepho, and Gatam, and Kenaz.

searchText: genesis 36:12 and timna was concubine to eliphaz esau’s son; and she bore to eliphaz amalek. these are the sons of adah esau’s wife.
english: And Timna was concubine to Eliphaz Esau’s son; and she bore to Eliphaz Amalek. These are the sons of Adah Esau’s wife.

searchText: genesis 36:13 and these are the sons of reuel: nahath, and zerah, shammah, and mizzah. these were the sons of basemath esau’s wife.
english: And these are the sons of Reuel: Nahath, and Zerah, Shammah, and Mizzah. These were the sons of Basemath Esau’s wife.

searchText: genesis 36:14 and these were the sons of oholibamah the daughter of anah, the daughter of zibeon, esau’s wife; and she bore to esau jeush, and jalam, and korah.
english: And these were the sons of Oholibamah the daughter of Anah, the daughter of Zibeon, Esau’s wife; and she bore to Esau Jeush, and Jalam, and Korah.

searchText: genesis 36:15 these are the chiefs of the sons of esau: the sons of eliphaz the first-born of esau: the chief of teman, the chief of omar, the chief of zepho, the chief of kenaz,
english: These are the chiefs of the sons of Esau: the sons of Eliphaz the first-born of Esau: the chief of Teman, the chief of Omar, the chief of Zepho, the chief of Kenaz,

searchText: genesis 36:16 the chief of korah, the chief of gatam, the chief of amalek. these are the chiefs that came of eliphaz in the land of edom. these are the sons of adah.
english: the chief of Korah, the chief of Gatam, the chief of Amalek. These are the chiefs that came of Eliphaz in the land of Edom. These are the sons of Adah.

searchText: genesis 36:17 and these are the sons of reuel esau’s son: the chief of nahath, the chief of zerah, the chief of shammah, the chief of mizzah. these are the chiefs that came of reuel in the land of edom. these are the sons of basemath esau’s wife.
english: And these are the sons of Reuel Esau’s son: the chief of Nahath, the chief of Zerah, the chief of Shammah, the chief of Mizzah. These are the chiefs that came of Reuel in the land of Edom. These are the sons of Basemath Esau’s wife.

searchText: genesis 36:18 and these are the sons of oholibamah esau’s wife: the chief of jeush, the chief of jalam, the chief of korah. these are the chiefs that came of oholibamah the daughter of anah, esau’s wife.
english: And these are the sons of Oholibamah Esau’s wife: the chief of Jeush, the chief of Jalam, the chief of Korah. These are the chiefs that came of Oholibamah the daughter of Anah, Esau’s wife.

searchText: genesis 36:19 these are the sons of esau, and these are their chiefs; the same is edom.
english: These are the sons of Esau, and these are their chiefs; the same is Edom.

searchText: genesis 36:20 these are the sons of seir the horite, the inhabitants of the land: lotan and shobal and zibeon and anah,
english: These are the sons of Seir the Horite, the inhabitants of the land: Lotan and Shobal and Zibeon and Anah,

searchText: genesis 36:21 and dishon and ezer and dishan. these are the chiefs that came of the horites, the children of seir in the land of edom.
english: and Dishon and Ezer and Dishan. These are the chiefs that came of the Horites, the children of Seir in the land of Edom.

searchText: genesis 36:22 and the children of lotan were hori and hemam; and lotan’s sister was timna.
english: And the children of Lotan were Hori and Hemam; and Lotan’s sister was Timna.

searchText: genesis 36:23 and these are the children of shobal: alvan and manahath and ebal, shepho and onam.
english: And these are the children of Shobal: Alvan and Manahath and Ebal, Shepho and Onam.

searchText: genesis 36:24 and these are the children of zibeon: aiah and anah—this is anah who found the hot springs in the wilderness, as he fed the asses of zibeon his father.
english: And these are the children of Zibeon: Aiah and Anah—this is Anah who found the hot springs in the wilderness, as he fed the asses of Zibeon his father.

searchText: genesis 36:25 and these are the children of anah: dishon and oholibamah the daughter of anah.
english: And these are the children of Anah: Dishon and Oholibamah the daughter of Anah.

searchText: genesis 36:26 and these are the children of dishon: hemdan and eshban and ithran and cheran.
english: And these are the children of Dishon: Hemdan and Eshban and Ithran and Cheran.

searchText: genesis 36:27 these are the children of ezer: bilhan and zaavan and akan.
english: These are the children of Ezer: Bilhan and Zaavan and Akan.

searchText: genesis 36:28 these are the children of dishan: uz and aran.
english: These are the children of Dishan: Uz and Aran.

searchText: genesis 36:29 these are the chiefs that came of the horites: the chief of lotan, the chief of shobal, the chief of zibeon, the chief of anah,
english: These are the chiefs that came of the Horites: the chief of Lotan, the chief of Shobal, the chief of Zibeon, the chief of Anah,

searchText: genesis 36:30 the chief of dishon, the chief of ezer, the chief of dishan. these are the chiefs that came of the horites, according to their chiefs in the land of seir.
english: the chief of Dishon, the chief of Ezer, the chief of Dishan. These are the chiefs that came of the Horites, according to their chiefs in the land of Seir.

searchText: genesis 36:31 and these are the kings that reigned in the land of edom, before there reigned any king over the children of israel.
english: And these are the kings that reigned in the land of Edom, before there reigned any king over the children of Israel.

searchText: genesis 36:32 and bela the son of beor reigned in edom; and the name of his city was dinhabah.
english: And Bela the son of Beor reigned in Edom; and the name of his city was Dinhabah.

searchText: genesis 36:33 and bela died, and jobab the son of zerah of bozrah reigned in his stead.
english: And Bela died, and Jobab the son of Zerah of Bozrah reigned in his stead.

searchText: genesis 36:34 and jobab died, and husham of the land of the temanites reigned in his stead.
english: And Jobab died, and Husham of the land of the Temanites reigned in his stead.

searchText: genesis 36:35 and husham died, and hadad the son of bedad, who smote midian in the field of moab, reigned in his stead; and the name of his city was avith.
english: And Husham died, and Hadad the son of Bedad, who smote Midian in the field of Moab, reigned in his stead; and the name of his city was Avith.

searchText: genesis 36:36 and hadad died, and samlah of masrekah reigned in his stead.
english: And Hadad died, and Samlah of Masrekah reigned in his stead.

searchText: genesis 36:37 and samlah died, and shaul of rehoboth by the river reigned in his stead.
english: And Samlah died, and Shaul of Rehoboth by the River reigned in his stead.

searchText: genesis 36:38 and shaul died, and baal-hanan the son of achbor reigned in his stead.
english: And Shaul died, and Baal-hanan the son of Achbor reigned in his stead.

searchText: genesis 36:39 and baal-hanan the son of achbor died, and hadar reigned in his stead; and the name of the city was pau; and his wife’s name was mehetabel, the daughter of matred, the daughter of me-zahab.
english: And Baal-hanan the son of Achbor died, and Hadar reigned in his stead; and the name of the city was Pau; and his wife’s name was Mehetabel, the daughter of Matred, the daughter of Me-zahab.

searchText: genesis 36:40 and these are the names of the chiefs that came of esau, according to their families, after their places, by their names: the chief of timna, the chief of alvah, the chief of jetheth;
english: And these are the names of the chiefs that came of Esau, according to their families, after their places, by their names: the chief of Timna, the chief of Alvah, the chief of Jetheth;

searchText: genesis 36:41 the chief of oholibamah, the chief of elah, the chief of pinon;
english: the chief of Oholibamah, the chief of Elah, the chief of Pinon;

searchText: genesis 36:42 the chief of kenaz, the chief of teman, the chief of mibzar;
english: the chief of Kenaz, the chief of Teman, the chief of Mibzar;

searchText: genesis 36:43 the chief of magdiel, the chief of iram. these are the chiefs of edom, according to their habitations in the land of their possession. this is esau the father of the edomites.
english: the chief of Magdiel, the chief of Iram. These are the chiefs of Edom, according to their habitations in the land of their possession. This is Esau the father of the Edomites.

searchText: genesis 37:1 and jacob dwelt in the land of his father’s sojournings, in the land of canaan.
english: And Jacob dwelt in the land of his father’s sojournings, in the land of Canaan.

searchText: genesis 37:2 these are the generations of jacob. joseph, being seventeen years old, was feeding the flock with his brethren, being still a lad even with the sons of bilhah, and with the sons of zilpah, his father’s wives; and joseph brought evil report of them unto their father.
english: These are the generations of Jacob. Joseph, being seventeen years old, was feeding the flock with his brethren, being still a lad even with the sons of Bilhah, and with the sons of Zilpah, his father’s wives; and Joseph brought evil report of them unto their father.

searchText: genesis 37:3 now israel loved joseph more than all his children, because he was the son of his old age; and he made him a coat of many colours.
english: Now Israel loved Joseph more than all his children, because he was the son of his old age; and he made him a coat of many colours.

searchText: genesis 37:4 and when his brethren saw that their father loved him more than all his brethren, they hated him, and could not speak peaceably unto him.
english: And when his brethren saw that their father loved him more than all his brethren, they hated him, and could not speak peaceably unto him.

searchText: genesis 37:5 and joseph dreamed a dream, and he told it to his brethren; and they hated him yet the more.
english: And Joseph dreamed a dream, and he told it to his brethren; and they hated him yet the more.

searchText: genesis 37:6 and he said unto them: ‘hear, i pray you, this dream which i have dreamed:
english: And he said unto them: ‘Hear, I pray you, this dream which I have dreamed:

searchText: genesis 37:7 for, behold, we were binding sheaves in the field, and, lo, my sheaf arose, and also stood upright; and, behold, your sheaves came round about, and bowed down to my sheaf.’
english: for, behold, we were binding sheaves in the field, and, lo, my sheaf arose, and also stood upright; and, behold, your sheaves came round about, and bowed down to my sheaf.’

searchText: genesis 37:8 and his brethren said to him: ‘shalt thou indeed reign over us? or shalt thou indeed have dominion over us?’ and they hated him yet the more for his dreams, and for his words.
english: And his brethren said to him: ‘Shalt thou indeed reign over us? or shalt thou indeed have dominion over us?’ And they hated him yet the more for his dreams, and for his words.

searchText: genesis 37:9 and he dreamed yet another dream, and told it to his brethren, and said: ‘behold, i have dreamed yet a dream: and, behold, the sun and the moon and eleven stars bowed down to me.’
english: And he dreamed yet another dream, and told it to his brethren, and said: ‘Behold, I have dreamed yet a dream: and, behold, the sun and the moon and eleven stars bowed down to me.’

searchText: genesis 37:10 and he told it to his father, and to his brethren; and his father rebuked him, and said unto him: ‘what is this dream that thou hast dreamed? shall i and thy mother and thy brethren indeed come to bow down to thee to the earth?’
english: And he told it to his father, and to his brethren; and his father rebuked him, and said unto him: ‘What is this dream that thou hast dreamed? Shall I and thy mother and thy brethren indeed come to bow down to thee to the earth?’

searchText: genesis 37:11 and his brethren envied him; but his father kept the saying in mind. .
english: And his brethren envied him; but his father kept the saying in mind. .

searchText: genesis 37:12 and his brethren went to feed their father’s flock in shechem.
english: And his brethren went to feed their father’s flock in Shechem.

searchText: genesis 37:13 and israel said unto joseph: ‘do not thy brethren feed the flock in shechem? come, and i will send thee unto them.’ and he said to him: ‘here am i.’
english: And Israel said unto Joseph: ‘Do not thy brethren feed the flock in Shechem? come, and I will send thee unto them.’ And he said to him: ‘Here am I.’

searchText: genesis 37:14 and he said to him: ‘go now, see whether it is well with thy brethren, and well with the flock; and bring me back word.’ so he sent him out of the vale of hebron, and he came to shechem.
english: And he said to him: ‘Go now, see whether it is well with thy brethren, and well with the flock; and bring me back word.’ So he sent him out of the vale of Hebron, and he came to Shechem.

searchText: genesis 37:15 and a certain man found him, and, behold, he was wandering in the field. and the man asked him, saying: ‘what seekest thou?’
english: And a certain man found him, and, behold, he was wandering in the field. And the man asked him, saying: ‘What seekest thou?’

searchText: genesis 37:16 and he said: ‘i seek my brethren. tell me, i pray thee, where they are feeding the flock.’
english: And he said: ‘I seek my brethren. Tell me, I pray thee, where they are feeding the flock.’

searchText: genesis 37:17 and the man said: ‘they are departed hence; for i heard them say: let us go to dothan.’ and joseph went after his brethren, and found them in dothan.
english: And the man said: ‘They are departed hence; for I heard them say: Let us go to Dothan.’ And Joseph went after his brethren, and found them in Dothan.

searchText: genesis 37:18 and they saw him afar off, and before he came near unto them, they conspired against him to slay him.
english: And they saw him afar off, and before he came near unto them, they conspired against him to slay him.

searchText: genesis 37:19 and they said one to another: ‘behold, this dreamer cometh.
english: And they said one to another: ‘Behold, this dreamer cometh.

searchText: genesis 37:20 come now therefore, and let us slay him, and cast him into one of the pits, and we will say: an evil beast hath devoured him; and we shall see what will become of his dreams.’
english: Come now therefore, and let us slay him, and cast him into one of the pits, and we will say: An evil beast hath devoured him; and we shall see what will become of his dreams.’

searchText: genesis 37:21 and reuben heard it, and delivered him out of their hand; and said: ‘let us not take his life.’
