searchText: genesis 45:9 hasten ye, and go up to my father, and say unto him: thus saith thy son joseph: god hath made me lord of all egypt; come down unto me, tarry not.
english: Hasten ye, and go up to my father, and say unto him: Thus saith thy son Joseph: God hath made me lord of all Egypt; come down unto me, tarry not.

searchText: genesis 45:10 and thou shalt dwell in the land of goshen, and thou shalt be near unto me, thou, and thy children, and thy children’s children, and thy flocks, and thy herds, and all that thou hast;
english: And thou shalt dwell in the land of Goshen, and thou shalt be near unto me, thou, and thy children, and thy children’s children, and thy flocks, and thy herds, and all that thou hast;

searchText: genesis 45:11 and there will i sustain thee; for there are yet five years of famine; lest thou come to poverty, thou, and thy household, and all that thou hast.
english: and there will I sustain thee; for there are yet five years of famine; lest thou come to poverty, thou, and thy household, and all that thou hast.

searchText: genesis 45:12 and, behold, your eyes see, and the eyes of my brother benjamin, that it is my mouth that speaketh unto you.
english: And, behold, your eyes see, and the eyes of my brother Benjamin, that it is my mouth that speaketh unto you.

searchText: genesis 45:13 and ye shall tell my father of all my glory in egypt, and of all that ye have seen; and ye shall hasten and bring down my father hither.’
english: And ye shall tell my father of all my glory in Egypt, and of all that ye have seen; and ye shall hasten and bring down my father hither.’

searchText: genesis 45:14 and he fell upon his brother benjamin’s neck, and wept; and benjamin wept upon his neck.
english: And he fell upon his brother Benjamin’s neck, and wept; and Benjamin wept upon his neck.

searchText: genesis 45:15 and he kissed all his brethren, and wept upon them; and after that his brethren talked with him.
english: And he kissed all his brethren, and wept upon them; and after that his brethren talked with him.

searchText: genesis 45:16 and the report thereof was heard in pharaoh’s house, saying: ‘joseph’s brethren are come’; and it pleased pharaoh well, and his servants.
english: And the report thereof was heard in Pharaoh’s house, saying: ‘Joseph’s brethren are come’; and it pleased Pharaoh well, and his servants.

searchText: genesis 45:17 and pharaoh said unto joseph: ‘say unto thy brethren: this do ye: lade your beasts, and go, get you unto the land of canaan;
english: And Pharaoh said unto Joseph: ‘Say unto thy brethren: This do ye: lade your beasts, and go, get you unto the land of Canaan;

searchText: genesis 45:18 and take your father and your households, and come unto me; and i will give you the good of the land of egypt, and ye shall eat the fat of the land.
english: and take your father and your households, and come unto me; and I will give you the good of the land of Egypt, and ye shall eat the fat of the land.

searchText: genesis 45:19 now thou art commanded, this do ye: take you wagons out of the land of egypt for your little ones, and for your wives, and bring your father, and come.
english: Now thou art commanded, this do ye: take you wagons out of the land of Egypt for your little ones, and for your wives, and bring your father, and come.

searchText: genesis 45:20 also regard not your stuff; for the good things of all the land of egypt are yours.’
english: Also regard not your stuff; for the good things of all the land of Egypt are yours.’

searchText: genesis 45:21 and the sons of israel did so; and joseph gave them wagons, according to the commandment of pharaoh, and gave them provision for the way.
english: And the sons of Israel did so; and Joseph gave them wagons, according to the commandment of Pharaoh, and gave them provision for the way.

searchText: genesis 45:22 to all of them he gave each man changes of raiment; but to benjamin he gave three hundred shekels of silver, and five changes of raiment.
english: To all of them he gave each man changes of raiment; but to Benjamin he gave three hundred shekels of silver, and five changes of raiment.

searchText: genesis 45:23 and to his father he sent in like manner ten asses laden with the good things of egypt, and ten she-asses laden with corn and bread and victual for his father by the way.
english: And to his father he sent in like manner ten asses laden with the good things of Egypt, and ten she-asses laden with corn and bread and victual for his father by the way.

searchText: genesis 45:24 so he sent his brethren away, and they departed; and he said unto them: ‘see that ye fall not out by the way.’
english: So he sent his brethren away, and they departed; and he said unto them: ‘See that ye fall not out by the way.’

searchText: genesis 45:25 and they went up out of egypt, and came into the land of canaan unto jacob their father.
english: And they went up out of Egypt, and came into the land of Canaan unto Jacob their father.

searchText: genesis 45:26 and they told him, saying: ‘joseph is yet alive, and he is ruler over all the land of egypt.’ and his heart fainted, for he believed them not.
english: And they told him, saying: ‘Joseph is yet alive, and he is ruler over all the land of Egypt.’ And his heart fainted, for he believed them not.

searchText: genesis 45:27 and they told him all the words of joseph, which he had said unto them; and when he saw the wagons which joseph had sent to carry him, the spirit of jacob their father revived.
english: And they told him all the words of Joseph, which he had said unto them; and when he saw the wagons which Joseph had sent to carry him, the spirit of Jacob their father revived.

searchText: genesis 45:28 and israel said: ‘it is enough; joseph my son is yet alive; i will go and see him before i die.’
english: And Israel said: ‘It is enough; Joseph my son is yet alive; I will go and see him before I die.’

searchText: genesis 46:1 and israel took his journey with all that he had, and came to beer-sheba, and offered sacrifices unto the god of his father isaac.
english: And Israel took his journey with all that he had, and came to Beer-sheba, and offered sacrifices unto the God of his father Isaac.

searchText: genesis 46:2 and god spoke unto israel in the visions of the night, and said: ‘jacob, jacob.’ and he said: ‘here am i.’
english: And God spoke unto Israel in the visions of the night, and said: ‘Jacob, Jacob.’ And he said: ‘Here am I.’

searchText: genesis 46:3 and he said: ‘i am god, the god of thy father; fear not to go down into egypt; for i will there make of thee a great nation.
english: And He said: ‘I am God, the God of thy father; fear not to go down into Egypt; for I will there make of thee a great nation.

searchText: genesis 46:4 i will go down with thee into egypt; and i will also surely bring thee up again; and joseph shall put his hand upon thine eyes.’
english: I will go down with thee into Egypt; and I will also surely bring thee up again; and Joseph shall put his hand upon thine eyes.’

searchText: genesis 46:5 and jacob rose up from beer-sheba; and the sons of israel carried jacob their father, and their little ones, and their wives, in the wagons which pharaoh had sent to carry him.
english: And Jacob rose up from Beer-sheba; and the sons of Israel carried Jacob their father, and their little ones, and their wives, in the wagons which Pharaoh had sent to carry him.

searchText: genesis 46:6 and they took their cattle, and their goods, which they had gotten in the land of canaan, and came into egypt, jacob, and all his seed with him;
english: And they took their cattle, and their goods, which they had gotten in the land of Canaan, and came into Egypt, Jacob, and all his seed with him;

searchText: genesis 46:7 his sons, and his sons’sons with him, his daughters, and his sons’daughters, and all his seed brought he with him into egypt.
english: his sons, and his sons’sons with him, his daughters, and his sons’daughters, and all his seed brought he with him into Egypt.

searchText: genesis 46:8 and these are the names of the children of israel, who came into egypt, jacob and his sons: reuben, jacob’s first-born.
english: And these are the names of the children of Israel, who came into Egypt, Jacob and his sons: Reuben, Jacob’s first-born.

searchText: genesis 46:9 and the sons of reuben: hanoch, and pallu, and hezron, and carmi.
english: And the sons of Reuben: Hanoch, and Pallu, and Hezron, and Carmi.

searchText: genesis 46:10 and the sons of simeon: jemuel, and jamin, and ohad, and jachin, and zohar, and shaul the son of a canaanitish woman.
english: And the sons of Simeon: Jemuel, and Jamin, and Ohad, and Jachin, and Zohar, and Shaul the son of a Canaanitish woman.

searchText: genesis 46:11 and the sons of levi: gershon, kohath, and merari.
english: And the sons of Levi: Gershon, Kohath, and Merari.

searchText: genesis 46:12 and the sons of judah: er, and onan, and shelah, and perez, and zerah; but er and onan died in the land of canaan. and the sons of perez were hezron and hamul.
english: And the sons of Judah: Er, and Onan, and Shelah, and Perez, and Zerah; but Er and Onan died in the land of Canaan. And the sons of Perez were Hezron and Hamul.

searchText: genesis 46:13 and the sons of issachar: tola, and puvah, and iob, and shimron.
english: And the sons of Issachar: Tola, and Puvah, and Iob, and Shimron.

searchText: genesis 46:14 and the sons of zebulun: sered, and elon, and jahleel.
english: And the sons of Zebulun: Sered, and Elon, and Jahleel.

searchText: genesis 46:15 these are the sons of leah, whom she bore unto jacob in paddan-aram, with his daughter dinah; all the souls of his sons and his daughters were thirty and three.
english: These are the sons of Leah, whom she bore unto Jacob in Paddan-aram, with his daughter Dinah; all the souls of his sons and his daughters were thirty and three.

searchText: genesis 46:16 and the sons of gad: ziphion, and haggi, shuni, and ezbon, eri, and arodi, and areli.
english: And the sons of Gad: Ziphion, and Haggi, Shuni, and Ezbon, Eri, and Arodi, and Areli.

searchText: genesis 46:17 and the sons of asher: imnah, and ishvah, and ishvi, and beriah, and serah their sister; and the sons of beriah: heber, and malchiel.
english: And the sons of Asher: Imnah, and Ishvah, and Ishvi, and Beriah, and Serah their sister; and the sons of Beriah: Heber, and Malchiel.

searchText: genesis 46:18 these are the sons of zilpah, whom laban gave to leah his daughter, and these she bore unto jacob, even sixteen souls.
english: These are the sons of Zilpah, whom Laban gave to Leah his daughter, and these she bore unto Jacob, even sixteen souls.

searchText: genesis 46:19 the sons of rachel jacob’s wife: joseph and benjamin.
english: The sons of Rachel Jacob’s wife: Joseph and Benjamin.

searchText: genesis 46:20 and unto joseph in the land of egypt were born manasseh and ephraim, whom asenath the daughter of poti-phera priest of on bore unto him.
english: And unto Joseph in the land of Egypt were born Manasseh and Ephraim, whom Asenath the daughter of Poti-phera priest of On bore unto him.

searchText: genesis 46:21 and the sons of benjamin: bela, and becher, and ashbel, gera, and naaman, ehi, and rosh, muppim, and huppim, and ard.
english: And the sons of Benjamin: Bela, and Becher, and Ashbel, Gera, and Naaman, Ehi, and Rosh, Muppim, and Huppim, and Ard.

searchText: genesis 46:22 these are the sons of rachel, who were born to jacob; all the souls were fourteen.
english: These are the sons of Rachel, who were born to Jacob; all the souls were fourteen.

searchText: genesis 46:23 and the sons of dan: hushim.
english: And the sons of Dan: Hushim.

searchText: genesis 46:24 and the sons of naphtali: jahzeel, and guni, and jezer, and shillem.
english: And the sons of Naphtali: Jahzeel, and Guni, and Jezer, and Shillem.

searchText: genesis 46:25 these are the sons of bilhah, whom laban gave unto rachel his daughter, and these she bore unto jacob; all the souls were seven.
english: These are the sons of Bilhah, whom Laban gave unto Rachel his daughter, and these she bore unto Jacob; all the souls were seven.

searchText: genesis 46:26 all the souls belonging to jacob that came into egypt, that came out of his loins, besides jacob’s sons’wives, all the souls were threescore and six.
english: All the souls belonging to Jacob that came into Egypt, that came out of his loins, besides Jacob’s sons’wives, all the souls were threescore and six.

searchText: genesis 46:27 and the sons of joseph, who were born to him in egypt, were two souls; all the souls of the house of jacob, that came into egypt, were threescore and ten.
english: And the sons of Joseph, who were born to him in Egypt, were two souls; all the souls of the house of Jacob, that came into Egypt, were threescore and ten.

searchText: genesis 46:28 and he sent judah before him unto joseph, to show the way before him unto goshen; and they came into the land of goshen.
english: And he sent Judah before him unto Joseph, to show the way before him unto Goshen; and they came into the land of Goshen.

searchText: genesis 46:29 and joseph made ready his chariot, and went up to meet israel his father, to goshen; and he presented himself unto him, and fell on his neck, and wept on his neck a good while.
english: And Joseph made ready his chariot, and went up to meet Israel his father, to Goshen; and he presented himself unto him, and fell on his neck, and wept on his neck a good while.

searchText: genesis 46:30 and israel said unto joseph: ‘now let me die, since i have seen thy face, that thou art yet alive.’
english: And Israel said unto Joseph: ‘Now let me die, since I have seen thy face, that thou art yet alive.’

searchText: genesis 46:31 and joseph said unto his brethren, and unto his father’s house: ‘i will go up, and tell pharaoh, and will say unto him: my brethren, and my father’s house, who were in the land of canaan, are come unto me;
english: And Joseph said unto his brethren, and unto his father’s house: ‘I will go up, and tell Pharaoh, and will say unto him: My brethren, and my father’s house, who were in the land of Canaan, are come unto me;

searchText: genesis 46:32 and the men are shepherds, for they have been keepers of cattle; and they have brought their flocks, and their herds, and all that they have.
english: and the men are shepherds, for they have been keepers of cattle; and they have brought their flocks, and their herds, and all that they have.

searchText: genesis 46:33 and it shall come to pass, when pharaoh shall call you, and shall say: what is your occupation?
english: And it shall come to pass, when Pharaoh shall call you, and shall say: What is your occupation?

searchText: genesis 46:34 that ye shall say: thy servants have been keepers of cattle from our youth even until now, both we, and our fathers; that ye may dwell in the land of goshen; for every shepherd is an abomination unto the egyptians.’
english: that ye shall say: Thy servants have been keepers of cattle from our youth even until now, both we, and our fathers; that ye may dwell in the land of Goshen; for every shepherd is an abomination unto the Egyptians.’

searchText: genesis 47:1 then joseph went in and told pharaoh, and said: ‘my father and my brethren, and their flocks, and their herds, and all that they have, are come out of the land of canaan; and, behold, they are in the land of goshen.’
english: Then Joseph went in and told Pharaoh, and said: ‘My father and my brethren, and their flocks, and their herds, and all that they have, are come out of the land of Canaan; and, behold, they are in the land of Goshen.’

searchText: genesis 47:2 and from among his brethren he took five men, and presented them unto pharaoh.
english: And from among his brethren he took five men, and presented them unto Pharaoh.

searchText: genesis 47:3 and pharaoh said unto his brethren: ‘what is your occupation?’ and they said unto pharaoh: ‘thy servants are shepherds, both we, and our fathers.’
english: And Pharaoh said unto his brethren: ‘What is your occupation?’ And they said unto Pharaoh: ‘Thy servants are shepherds, both we, and our fathers.’

searchText: genesis 47:4 and they said unto pharaoh: ‘to sojourn in the land are we come; for there is no pasture for thy servants’flocks; for the famine is sore in the land of canaan. now therefore, we pray thee, let thy servants dwell in the land of goshen.’
english: And they said unto Pharaoh: ‘To sojourn in the land are we come; for there is no pasture for thy servants’flocks; for the famine is sore in the land of Canaan. Now therefore, we pray thee, let thy servants dwell in the land of Goshen.’

searchText: genesis 47:5 and pharaoh spoke unto joseph, saying: ‘thy father and thy brethren are come unto thee;
english: And Pharaoh spoke unto Joseph, saying: ‘Thy father and thy brethren are come unto thee;

searchText: genesis 47:6 the land of egypt is before thee; in the best of the land make thy father and thy brethren to dwell; in the land of goshen let them dwell. and if thou knowest any able men among them, then make them rulers over my cattle.’
english: the land of Egypt is before thee; in the best of the land make thy father and thy brethren to dwell; in the land of Goshen let them dwell. And if thou knowest any able men among them, then make them rulers over my cattle.’

searchText: genesis 47:7 and joseph brought in jacob his father, and set him before pharaoh. and jacob blessed pharaoh.
english: And Joseph brought in Jacob his father, and set him before Pharaoh. And Jacob blessed Pharaoh.

searchText: genesis 47:8 and pharaoh said unto jacob: ‘how many are the days of the years of thy life?’
english: And Pharaoh said unto Jacob: ‘How many are the days of the years of thy life?’

searchText: genesis 47:9 and jacob said unto pharaoh: ‘the days of the years of my sojournings are a hundred and thirty years; few and evil have been the days of the years of my life, and they have not attained unto the days of the years of the life of my fathers in the days of their sojournings.’
english: And Jacob said unto Pharaoh: ‘The days of the years of my sojournings are a hundred and thirty years; few and evil have been the days of the years of my life, and they have not attained unto the days of the years of the life of my fathers in the days of their sojournings.’

searchText: genesis 47:10 and jacob blessed pharaoh, and went out from the presence of pharaoh.
english: And Jacob blessed Pharaoh, and went out from the presence of Pharaoh.

searchText: genesis 47:11 and joseph placed his father and his brethren, and gave them a possession in the land of egypt, in the best of the land, in the land of rameses, as pharaoh had commanded.
english: And Joseph placed his father and his brethren, and gave them a possession in the land of Egypt, in the best of the land, in the land of Rameses, as Pharaoh had commanded.

searchText: genesis 47:12 and joseph sustained his father, and his brethren, and all his father’s household, with bread, according to the want of their little ones.
english: And Joseph sustained his father, and his brethren, and all his father’s household, with bread, according to the want of their little ones.

searchText: genesis 47:13 and there was no bread in all the land; for the famine was very sore, so that the land of egypt and the land of canaan languished by reason of the famine.
english: And there was no bread in all the land; for the famine was very sore, so that the land of Egypt and the land of Canaan languished by reason of the famine.

searchText: genesis 47:14 and joseph gathered up all the money that was found in the land of egypt, and in the land of canaan, for the corn which they bought; and joseph brought the money into pharaoh’s house.
english: And Joseph gathered up all the money that was found in the land of Egypt, and in the land of Canaan, for the corn which they bought; and Joseph brought the money into Pharaoh’s house.

searchText: genesis 47:15 and when the money was all spent in the land of egypt, and in the land of canaan, all the egyptians came unto joseph, and said: ‘give us bread; for why should we die in thy presence? for our money faileth.’
english: And when the money was all spent in the land of Egypt, and in the land of Canaan, all the Egyptians came unto Joseph, and said: ‘Give us bread; for why should we die in thy presence? for our money faileth.’

searchText: genesis 47:16 and joseph said: ‘give your cattle, and i will give you [bread] for your cattle, if money fail.’
english: And Joseph said: ‘Give your cattle, and I will give you [bread] for your cattle, if money fail.’

searchText: genesis 47:17 and they brought their cattle unto joseph. and joseph gave them bread in exchange for the horses, and for the flocks, and for the herds, and for the asses; and he fed them with bread in exchange for all their cattle for that year.
english: And they brought their cattle unto Joseph. And Joseph gave them bread in exchange for the horses, and for the flocks, and for the herds, and for the asses; and he fed them with bread in exchange for all their cattle for that year.

searchText: genesis 47:18 and when that year was ended, they came unto him the second year, and said unto him: ‘we will not hide from my lord, how that our money is all spent; and the herds of cattle are my lord’s; there is nought left in the sight of my lord, but our bodies, and our lands.
english: And when that year was ended, they came unto him the second year, and said unto him: ‘We will not hide from my lord, how that our money is all spent; and the herds of cattle are my lord’s; there is nought left in the sight of my lord, but our bodies, and our lands.

searchText: genesis 47:19 wherefore should we die before thine eyes, both we and our land? buy us and our land for bread, and we and our land will be bondmen unto pharaoh; and give us seed, that we may live, and not die, and that the land be not desolate.’
english: Wherefore should we die before thine eyes, both we and our land? buy us and our land for bread, and we and our land will be bondmen unto Pharaoh; and give us seed, that we may live, and not die, and that the land be not desolate.’

searchText: genesis 47:20 so joseph bought all the land of egypt for pharaoh; for the egyptians sold every man his field, because the famine was sore upon them; and the land became pharaoh’s.
english: So Joseph bought all the land of Egypt for Pharaoh; for the Egyptians sold every man his field, because the famine was sore upon them; and the land became Pharaoh’s.

searchText: genesis 47:21 and as for the people, he removed them city by city, from one end of the border of egypt even to the other end thereof.
english: And as for the people, he removed them city by city, from one end of the border of Egypt even to the other end thereof.

searchText: genesis 47:22 only the land of the priests bought he not, for the priests had a portion from pharaoh, and did eat their portion which pharaoh gave them; wherefore they sold not their land.
english: Only the land of the priests bought he not, for the priests had a portion from Pharaoh, and did eat their portion which Pharaoh gave them; wherefore they sold not their land.

searchText: genesis 47:23 then joseph said unto the people: ‘behold, i have bought you this day and your land for pharaoh. lo, here is seed for you, and ye shall sow the land.
english: Then Joseph said unto the people: ‘Behold, I have bought you this day and your land for Pharaoh. Lo, here is seed for you, and ye shall sow the land.

searchText: genesis 47:24 and it shall come to pass at the ingatherings, that ye shall give a fifth unto pharaoh, and four parts shall be your own, for seed of the field, and for your food, and for them of your households, and for food for your little ones.’
english: And it shall come to pass at the ingatherings, that ye shall give a fifth unto Pharaoh, and four parts shall be your own, for seed of the field, and for your food, and for them of your households, and for food for your little ones.’

searchText: genesis 47:25 and they said: ‘thou hast saved our lives. let us find favour in the sight of my lord, and we will be pharaoh’s bondmen.’
english: And they said: ‘Thou hast saved our lives. Let us find favour in the sight of my lord, and we will be Pharaoh’s bondmen.’

searchText: genesis 47:26 and joseph made it a statute concerning the land of egypt unto this day, that pharaoh should have the fifth; only the land of the priests alone became not pharaoh’s.
english: And Joseph made it a statute concerning the land of Egypt unto this day, that Pharaoh should have the fifth; only the land of the priests alone became not Pharaoh’s.

searchText: genesis 47:27 and israel dwelt in the land of egypt, in the land of goshen; and they got them possessions therein, and were fruitful, and multiplied exceedingly.
english: And Israel dwelt in the land of Egypt, in the land of Goshen; and they got them possessions therein, and were fruitful, and multiplied exceedingly.

searchText: genesis 47:28 and jacob lived in the land of egypt seventeen years; so the days of jacob, the years of his life, were a hundred forty and seven years.
english: And Jacob lived in the land of Egypt seventeen years; so the days of Jacob, the years of his life, were a hundred forty and seven years.

searchText: genesis 47:29 and the time drew near that israel must die; and he called his son joseph, and said unto him: ‘if now i have found favour in thy sight, put, i pray thee, thy hand under my thigh, and deal kindly and truly with me; bury me not, i pray thee, in egypt.
english: And the time drew near that Israel must die; and he called his son Joseph, and said unto him: ‘If now I have found favour in thy sight, put, I pray thee, thy hand under my thigh, and deal kindly and truly with me; bury me not, I pray thee, in Egypt.

searchText: genesis 47:30 but when i sleep with my fathers, thou shalt carry me out of egypt, and bury me in their burying-place.’ and he said: ‘i will do as thou hast said.’
english: But when I sleep with my fathers, thou shalt carry me out of Egypt, and bury me in their burying-place.’ And he said: ‘I will do as thou hast said.’

searchText: genesis 47:31 and he said: ‘swear unto me.’ and he swore unto him. and israel bowed down upon the bed’s head.
english: And he said: ‘Swear unto me.’ And he swore unto him. And Israel bowed down upon the bed’s head.

searchText: genesis 48:1 and it came to pass after these things, that one said to joseph: ‘behold, thy father is sick.’ and he took with him his two sons, manasseh and ephraim.
english: And it came to pass after these things, that one said to Joseph: ‘Behold, thy father is sick.’ And he took with him his two sons, Manasseh and Ephraim.

searchText: genesis 48:2 and one told jacob, and said: ‘behold, thy son joseph cometh unto thee.’ and israel strengthened himself, and sat upon the bed.
english: And one told Jacob, and said: ‘Behold, thy son Joseph cometh unto thee.’ And Israel strengthened himself, and sat upon the bed.

searchText: genesis 48:3 and jacob said unto joseph: ‘god almighty appeared unto me at luz in the land of canaan, and blessed me,
english: And Jacob said unto Joseph: ‘God Almighty appeared unto me at Luz in the land of Canaan, and blessed me,

searchText: genesis 48:4 and said unto me: behold, i will make thee fruitful, and multiply thee, and i will make of thee a company of peoples; and will give this land to thy seed after thee for an everlasting possession.
english: and said unto me: Behold, I will make thee fruitful, and multiply thee, and I will make of thee a company of peoples; and will give this land to thy seed after thee for an everlasting possession.

searchText: genesis 48:5 and now thy two sons, who were born unto thee in the land of egypt before i came unto thee into egypt, are mine; ephraim and manasseh, even as reuben and simeon, shall be mine.
english: And now thy two sons, who were born unto thee in the land of Egypt before I came unto thee into Egypt, are mine; Ephraim and Manasseh, even as Reuben and Simeon, shall be mine.

searchText: genesis 48:6 and thy issue, that thou begettest after them, shall be thine; they shall be called after the name of their brethren in their inheritance.
english: And thy issue, that thou begettest after them, shall be thine; they shall be called after the name of their brethren in their inheritance.

searchText: genesis 48:7 and as for me, when i came from paddan, rachel died unto me in the land of canaan in the way, when there was still some way to come unto ephrath; and i buried her there in the way to ephrath—the same is beth-lehem.’
english: And as for me, when I came from Paddan, Rachel died unto me in the land of Canaan in the way, when there was still some way to come unto Ephrath; and I buried her there in the way to Ephrath—the same is Beth-lehem.’

searchText: genesis 48:8 and israel beheld joseph’s sons, and said: ‘who are these?’
english: And Israel beheld Joseph’s sons, and said: ‘Who are these?’

searchText: genesis 48:9 and joseph said unto his father: ‘they are my sons, whom god hath given me here.’ and he said: ‘bring them, i pray thee, unto me, and i will bless them.’
english: And Joseph said unto his father: ‘They are my sons, whom God hath given me here.’ And he said: ‘Bring them, I pray thee, unto me, and I will bless them.’

searchText: genesis 48:10 now the eyes of israel were dim for age, so that he could not see. and he brought them near unto him; and he kissed them, and embraced them.
english: Now the eyes of Israel were dim for age, so that he could not see. And he brought them near unto him; and he kissed them, and embraced them.

searchText: genesis 48:11 and israel said unto joseph: ‘i had not thought to see thy face; and, lo, god hath let me see thy seed also.’
english: And Israel said unto Joseph: ‘I had not thought to see thy face; and, lo, God hath let me see thy seed also.’

searchText: genesis 48:12 and joseph brought them out from between his knees; and he fell down on his face to the earth.
english: And Joseph brought them out from between his knees; and he fell down on his face to the earth.

searchText: genesis 48:13 and joseph took them both, ephraim in his right hand toward israel’s left hand, and manasseh in his left hand toward israel’s right hand, and brought them near unto him.
english: And Joseph took them both, Ephraim in his right hand toward Israel’s left hand, and Manasseh in his left hand toward Israel’s right hand, and brought them near unto him.

searchText: genesis 48:14 and israel stretched out his right hand, and laid it upon ephraim’s head, who was the younger, and his left hand upon manasseh’s head, guiding his hands wittingly; for manasseh was the first-born.
english: And Israel stretched out his right hand, and laid it upon Ephraim’s head, who was the younger, and his left hand upon Manasseh’s head, guiding his hands wittingly; for Manasseh was the first-born.

searchText: genesis 48:15 and he blessed joseph, and said: ‘the god before whom my fathers abraham and isaac did walk, the god who hath been my shepherd all my life long unto this day,
english: And he blessed Joseph, and said: ‘The God before whom my fathers Abraham and Isaac did walk, the God who hath been my shepherd all my life long unto this day,

searchText: genesis 48:16 the angel who hath redeemed me from all evil, bless the lads; and let my name be named in them, and the name of my fathers abraham and isaac; and let them grow into a multitude in the midst of the earth.’
english: the angel who hath redeemed me from all evil, bless the lads; and let my name be named in them, and the name of my fathers Abraham and Isaac; and let them grow into a multitude in the midst of the earth.’

searchText: genesis 48:17 and when joseph saw that his father was laying his right hand upon the head of ephraim, it displeased him, and he held up his father’s hand, to remove it from ephraim’s head unto manasseh’s head.
english: And when Joseph saw that his father was laying his right hand upon the head of Ephraim, it displeased him, and he held up his father’s hand, to remove it from Ephraim’s head unto Manasseh’s head.

searchText: genesis 48:18 and joseph said unto his father: ‘not so, my father, for this is the first-born; put thy right hand upon his head.’
english: And Joseph said unto his father: ‘Not so, my father, for this is the first-born; put thy right hand upon his head.’

searchText: genesis 48:19 and his father refused, and said: ‘i know it, my son, i know it; he also shall become a people, and he also shall be great; howbeit his younger brother shall be greater than he, and his seed shall become a multitude of nations.’
english: And his father refused, and said: ‘I know it, my son, I know it; he also shall become a people, and he also shall be great; howbeit his younger brother shall be greater than he, and his seed shall become a multitude of nations.’

searchText: genesis 48:20 and he blessed them that day, saying: ‘by thee shall israel bless, saying: god make thee as ephraim and as manasseh.’ and he set ephraim before manasseh.
english: And he blessed them that day, saying: ‘By thee shall Israel bless, saying: God make thee as Ephraim and as Manasseh.’ And he set Ephraim before Manasseh.

searchText: genesis 48:21 and israel said unto joseph: ‘behold, i die; but god will be with you, and bring you back unto the land of your fathers.
english: And Israel said unto Joseph: ‘Behold, I die; but God will be with you, and bring you back unto the land of your fathers.

searchText: genesis 48:22 moreover i have given to thee one aportion above thy brethren, which i took out of the hand of the amorite with my sword and with my bow.’
english: Moreover I have given to thee one aportion above thy brethren, which I took out of the hand of the Amorite with my sword and with my bow.’

searchText: genesis 49:1 and jacob called unto his sons, and said: ‘gather yourselves together, that i may tell you that which shall befall you in the end of days.
english: And Jacob called unto his sons, and said: ‘Gather yourselves together, that I may tell you that which shall befall you in the end of days.

searchText: genesis 49:2 assemble yourselves, and hear, ye sons of jacob; and hearken unto israel your father.
english: Assemble yourselves, and hear, ye sons of Jacob; And hearken unto Israel your father.

searchText: genesis 49:3 reuben, thou art my first-born, my might, and the first-fruits of my strength; the excellency of dignity, and the excellency of power.
english: Reuben, thou art my first-born, My might, and the first-fruits of my strength; The excellency of dignity, and the excellency of power.

searchText: genesis 49:4 unstable as water, have not thou the excellency; because thou wentest up to thy father’s bed; then defiledst thou it—he went up to my couch.
english: Unstable as water, have not thou the excellency; Because thou wentest up to thy father’s bed; Then defiledst thou it—he went up to my couch.

searchText: genesis 49:5 simeon and levi are brethren; weapons of violence their kinship.
english: Simeon and Levi are brethren; Weapons of violence their kinship.

searchText: genesis 49:6 let my soul not come into their council; unto their assembly let my glory not be not united; for in their anger they slew men, and in their self-will they houghed oxen.
english: Let my soul not come into their council; Unto their assembly let my glory not be not united; For in their anger they slew men, And in their self-will they houghed oxen.

searchText: genesis 49:7 cursed be their anger, for it was fierce, and their wrath, for it was cruel; i will divide them in jacob, and scatter them in israel.
english: Cursed be their anger, for it was fierce, And their wrath, for it was cruel; I will divide them in Jacob, And scatter them in Israel.

searchText: genesis 49:8 judah, thee shall thy brethren praise; thy hand shall be on the neck of thine enemies; thy father’s sons shall bow down before thee.
english: Judah, thee shall thy brethren praise; Thy hand shall be on the neck of thine enemies; Thy father’s sons shall bow down before thee.

searchText: genesis 49:9 judah is a lion’s whelp; from the prey, my son, thou art gone up. he stooped down, he couched as a lion, and as a lioness; who shall rouse him up?
english: Judah is a lion’s whelp; From the prey, my son, thou art gone up. He stooped down, he couched as a lion, And as a lioness; who shall rouse him up?

searchText: genesis 49:10 the sceptre shall not depart from judah, nor the ruler’s staff from between his feet, as long as men come to shiloh; and unto him shall the obedience of the peoples be.
english: The sceptre shall not depart from Judah, Nor the ruler’s staff from between his feet, As long as men come to Shiloh; And unto him shall the obedience of the peoples be.

searchText: genesis 49:11 binding his foal unto the vine, and his ass’s colt unto the choice vine; he washeth his garments in wine, and his vesture in the blood of grapes;
english: Binding his foal unto the vine, And his ass’s colt unto the choice vine; He washeth his garments in wine, And his vesture in the blood of grapes;

searchText: genesis 49:12 his eyes shall be red with wine, and his teeth white with milk.
english: His eyes shall be red with wine, And his teeth white with milk.

searchText: genesis 49:13 zebulun shall dwell at the shore of the sea, and he shall be a shore for ships, and his flank shall be upon zidon.
english: Zebulun shall dwell at the shore of the sea, And he shall be a shore for ships, And his flank shall be upon Zidon.

searchText: genesis 49:14 issachar is a large-boned ass, couching down between the sheep-folds.
english: Issachar is a large-boned ass, Couching down between the sheep-folds.

searchText: genesis 49:15 for he saw a resting-place that it was good, and the land that it was pleasant; and he bowed his shoulder to bear, and became a servant under task-work
english: For he saw a resting-place that it was good, And the land that it was pleasant; And he bowed his shoulder to bear, And became a servant under task-work

searchText: genesis 49:16 dan shall judge his people, as one of the tribes of israel.
english: Dan shall judge his people, As one of the tribes of Israel.

searchText: genesis 49:17 dan shall be a serpent in the way, a horned snake in the path, that biteth the horse’s heels, so that his rider falleth backward.
english: Dan shall be a serpent in the way, A horned snake in the path, That biteth the horse’s heels, So that his rider falleth backward.

searchText: genesis 49:18 i wait for thy salvation, o lord.
english: I wait for Thy salvation, O Lord.

searchText: genesis 49:19 gad, a troop shall troop upon him; but he shall troop upon their heel.
english: Gad, a troop shall troop upon him; But he shall troop upon their heel.

searchText: genesis 49:20 as for asher, his bread shall be fat, and he shall yield royal dainties.
english: As for Asher, his bread shall be fat, And he shall yield royal dainties.

searchText: genesis 49:21 naphtali is a hind let loose: he giveth goodly words.
english: Naphtali is a hind let loose: He giveth goodly words.

searchText: genesis 49:22 joseph is a fruitful vine, a fruitful vine by a fountain; its branches run over the wall. .
english: Joseph is a fruitful vine, A fruitful vine by a fountain; Its branches run over the wall. .

searchText: genesis 49:23 the archers have dealt bitterly with him, and shot at him, and hated him;
english: The archers have dealt bitterly with him, And shot at him, and hated him;

searchText: genesis 49:24 but his bow abode firm, and the arms of his hands were made supple, by the hands of the mighty one of jacob, from thence, from the shepherd, the stone of israel,
english: But his bow abode firm, And the arms of his hands were made supple, By the hands of the Mighty One of Jacob, From thence, from the Shepherd, the Stone of Israel,

searchText: genesis 49:25 even by the god of thy father, who shall help thee, and by the almighty, who shall bless thee, with blessings of heaven above, blessings of the deep that coucheth beneath, blessings of the breasts, and of the womb.
english: Even by the God of thy father, who shall help thee, And by the Almighty, who shall bless thee, With blessings of heaven above, Blessings of the deep that coucheth beneath, Blessings of the breasts, and of the womb.

searchText: genesis 49:26 the blessings of thy father are mighty beyond the blessings of my progenitors unto the utmost bound of the everlasting hills; they shall be on the head of joseph, and on the crown of the head of the prince among his brethren.
english: The blessings of thy father Are mighty beyond the blessings of my progenitors Unto the utmost bound of the everlasting hills; They shall be on the head of Joseph, And on the crown of the head of the prince among his brethren.

searchText: genesis 49:27 benjamin is a wolf that raveneth; in the morning he devoureth the prey, and at even he divideth the spoil.’
english: Benjamin is a wolf that raveneth; In the morning he devoureth the prey, And at even he divideth the spoil.’

searchText: genesis 49:28 all these are the twelve tribes of israel, and this is it that their father spoke unto them and blessed them; every one according to his blessing he blessed them.
english: All these are the twelve tribes of Israel, and this is it that their father spoke unto them and blessed them; every one according to his blessing he blessed them.

searchText: genesis 49:29 and be charged them, and said unto them: ‘i am to be gathered unto my people; bury me with my fathers in the cave that is in the field of ephron the hittite,
english: And be charged them, and said unto them: ‘I am to be gathered unto my people; bury me with my fathers in the cave that is in the field of Ephron the Hittite,

searchText: genesis 49:30 in the cave that is in the field of machpelah, which is before mamre, in the land of canaan, which abraham bought with the field from ephron the hittite for a possession of a burying-place.
english: in the cave that is in the field of Machpelah, which is before Mamre, in the land of Canaan, which Abraham bought with the field from Ephron the Hittite for a possession of a burying-place.

searchText: genesis 49:31 there they buried abraham and sarah his wife; there they buried isaac and rebekah his wife; and there i buried leah.
english: There they buried Abraham and Sarah his wife; there they buried Isaac and Rebekah his wife; and there I buried Leah.

searchText: genesis 49:32 the field and the cave that is therein, which was purchased from the children of heth.’
english: The field and the cave that is therein, which was purchased from the children of Heth.’

searchText: genesis 49:33 and when jacob made an end of charging his sons, he gathered up his feet into the bed, and expired, and was gathered unto his people.
english: And when Jacob made an end of charging his sons, he gathered up his feet into the bed, and expired, and was gathered unto his people.

searchText: genesis 50:1 and joseph fell upon his father’s face, and wept upon him, and kissed him.
english: And Joseph fell upon his father’s face, and wept upon him, and kissed him.

searchText: genesis 50:2 and joseph commanded his servants the physicians to embalm his father. and the physicians embalmed israel.
english: And Joseph commanded his servants the physicians to embalm his father. And the physicians embalmed Israel.

searchText: genesis 50:3 and forty days were fulfilled for him; for so are fulfilled the days of embalming. and the egyptians wept for him threescore and ten days.
english: And forty days were fulfilled for him; for so are fulfilled the days of embalming. And the Egyptians wept for him threescore and ten days.

searchText: genesis 50:4 and when the days of weeping for him were past, joseph spoke unto the house of pharaoh, saying: ‘if now i have found favour in your eyes, speak, i pray you, in the ears of pharaoh, saying:
english: And when the days of weeping for him were past, Joseph spoke unto the house of Pharaoh, saying: ‘If now I have found favour in your eyes, speak, I pray you, in the ears of Pharaoh, saying:

searchText: genesis 50:5 my father made me swear, saying: lo, i die; in my grave which i have digged for me in the land of canaan, there shalt thou bury me. now therefore let me go up, i pray thee, and bury my father, and i will come back.’ .
english: My father made me swear, saying: Lo, I die; in my grave which I have digged for me in the land of Canaan, there shalt thou bury me. Now therefore let me go up, I pray thee, and bury my father, and I will come back.’ .

searchText: genesis 50:6 and pharaoh said: ‘go up, and bury thy father, according as he made thee swear.’
english: And Pharaoh said: ‘Go up, and bury thy father, according as he made thee swear.’

searchText: genesis 50:7 and joseph went up to bury his father; and with him went up all the servants of pharaoh, the elders of his house, and all the elders of the land of egypt,
english: And Joseph went up to bury his father; and with him went up all the servants of Pharaoh, the elders of his house, and all the elders of the land of Egypt,

searchText: genesis 50:8 and all the house of joseph, and his brethren, and his father’s house; only their little ones, and their flocks, and their herds, they left in the land of goshen.
english: and all the house of Joseph, and his brethren, and his father’s house; only their little ones, and their flocks, and their herds, they left in the land of Goshen.

searchText: genesis 50:9 and there went up with him both chariots and horsemen; and it was a very great company.
english: And there went up with him both chariots and horsemen; and it was a very great company.

searchText: genesis 50:10 and they came to the threshing-floor of atad, which is beyond the jordan, and there they wailed with a very great and sore wailing; and he made a mourning for his father seven days.
english: And they came to the threshing-floor of Atad, which is beyond the Jordan, and there they wailed with a very great and sore wailing; and he made a mourning for his father seven days.

searchText: genesis 50:11 and when the inhabitants of the land, the canaanites, saw the mourning in the floor of atad, they said: ‘this is a grievous amourning to the egyptians.’ wherefore the name of it was called abel-mizraim, which is beyond the jordan.
english: And when the inhabitants of the land, the Canaanites, saw the mourning in the floor of Atad, they said: ‘This is a grievous amourning to the Egyptians.’ Wherefore the name of it was called Abel-mizraim, which is beyond the Jordan.

searchText: genesis 50:12 and his sons did unto him according as he commanded them.
english: And his sons did unto him according as he commanded them.

searchText: genesis 50:13 for his sons carried him into the land of canaan, and buried him in the cave of the field of machpelah, which abraham bought with the field, for a possession of a burying-place, of ephron the hittite, in front of mamre.
english: For his sons carried him into the land of Canaan, and buried him in the cave of the field of Machpelah, which Abraham bought with the field, for a possession of a burying-place, of Ephron the Hittite, in front of Mamre.

searchText: genesis 50:14 and joseph returned into egypt, he, and his brethren, and all that went up with him to bury his father, after he had buried his father.
english: And Joseph returned into Egypt, he, and his brethren, and all that went up with him to bury his father, after he had buried his father.

searchText: genesis 50:15 and when joseph’s brethren saw that their father was dead, they said: ‘it may be that joseph will hate us, and will fully requite us all the evil which we did unto him.’
english: And when Joseph’s brethren saw that their father was dead, they said: ‘It may be that Joseph will hate us, and will fully requite us all the evil which we did unto him.’

searchText: genesis 50:16 and they sent a message unto joseph, saying: ‘thy father did command before he died, saying:
english: And they sent a message unto Joseph, saying: ‘Thy father did command before he died, saying:

searchText: genesis 50:17 so shall ye say unto joseph: forgive, i pray thee now, the transgression of thy brethren, and their sin, for that they did unto thee evil. and now, we pray thee, forgive the transgression of the servants of the god of thy father.’ and joseph wept when they spoke unto him.
english: So shall ye say unto Joseph: Forgive, I pray thee now, the transgression of thy brethren, and their sin, for that they did unto thee evil. And now, we pray thee, forgive the transgression of the servants of the God of thy father.’ And Joseph wept when they spoke unto him.

searchText: genesis 50:18 and his brethren also went and fell down before his face; and they said: ‘behold, we are thy bondmen.’
english: And his brethren also went and fell down before his face; and they said: ‘Behold, we are thy bondmen.’

searchText: genesis 50:19 and joseph said unto them: ‘fear not; for am i in the place of god?
english: And Joseph said unto them: ‘Fear not; for am I in the place of God?

searchText: genesis 50:20 and as for you, ye meant evil against me; but god meant it for good, to bring to pass, as it is this day, to save much people alive.
english: And as for you, ye meant evil against me; but God meant it for good, to bring to pass, as it is this day, to save much people alive.

searchText: genesis 50:21 now therefore fear ye not; i will sustain you, and your little ones.’ and he comforted them, and spoke kindly unto them.
english: Now therefore fear ye not; I will sustain you, and your little ones.’ And he comforted them, and spoke kindly unto them.

searchText: genesis 50:22 and joseph dwelt in egypt, he, and his father’s house; and joseph lived a hundred and ten years.
english: And Joseph dwelt in Egypt, he, and his father’s house; and Joseph lived a hundred and ten years.

searchText: genesis 50:23 and joseph saw ephraim’s children of the third generation; the children also of machir the son of manasseh were born upon joseph’s knees.
english: And Joseph saw Ephraim’s children of the third generation; the children also of Machir the son of Manasseh were born upon Joseph’s knees.

searchText: genesis 50:24 and joseph said unto his brethren: ‘i die; but god will surely remember you, and bring you up out of this land unto the land which he swore to abraham, to isaac, and to jacob.’
english: And Joseph said unto his brethren: ‘I die; but God will surely remember you, and bring you up out of this land unto the land which He swore to Abraham, to Isaac, and to Jacob.’

searchText: genesis 50:25 and joseph took an oath of the children of israel, saying: ‘god will surely remember you, and ye shall carry up my bones from hence.’
english: And Joseph took an oath of the children of Israel, saying: ‘God will surely remember you, and ye shall carry up my bones from hence.’

searchText: genesis 50:26 so joseph died, being a hundred and ten years old. and they embalmed him, and he was put in a coffin in egypt.
english: So Joseph died, being a hundred and ten years old. And they embalmed him, and he was put in a coffin in Egypt.

searchText: exodus 1:1 now these are the names of the sons of israel, who came into egypt with jacob; every man came with his household:
english: NOW THESE are the names of the sons of Israel, who came into Egypt with Jacob; every man came with his household:

searchText: exodus 1:2 reuben, simeon, levi, and judah;
english: Reuben, Simeon, Levi, and Judah;

searchText: exodus 1:3 issachar, zebulun, and benjamin;
english: Issachar, Zebulun, and Benjamin;

searchText: exodus 1:4 dan and naphtali, gad and asher.
english: Dan and Naphtali, Gad and Asher.

searchText: exodus 1:5 and all the souls that came out of the loins of jacob were seventy souls; and joseph was in egypt already.
english: And all the souls that came out of the loins of Jacob were seventy souls; and Joseph was in Egypt already.

searchText: exodus 1:6 and joseph died, and all his brethren, and all that generation.
english: And Joseph died, and all his brethren, and all that generation.

searchText: exodus 1:7 and the children of israel were fruitful, and increased abundantly, and multiplied, and waxed exceeding mighty; and the land was filled with them.
english: And the children of Israel were fruitful, and increased abundantly, and multiplied, and waxed exceeding mighty; and the land was filled with them.

searchText: exodus 1:8 now there arose a new king over egypt, who knew not joseph.
english: Now there arose a new king over Egypt, who knew not Joseph.

searchText: exodus 1:9 and he said unto his people: ‘behold, the people of the children of israel are too many and too mighty for us;
english: And he said unto his people: ‘Behold, the people of the children of Israel are too many and too mighty for us;

searchText: exodus 1:10 come, let us deal wisely with them, lest they multiply, and it come to pass, that, when there befalleth us any war, they also join themselves unto our enemies, and fight against us, and get them up out of the land.’
english: come, let us deal wisely with them, lest they multiply, and it come to pass, that, when there befalleth us any war, they also join themselves unto our enemies, and fight against us, and get them up out of the land.’

searchText: exodus 1:11 therefore they did set over them taskmasters to afflict them with their burdens. and they built for pharaoh store-cities, pithom and raamses.
english: Therefore they did set over them taskmasters to afflict them with their burdens. And they built for Pharaoh store-cities, Pithom and Raamses.

searchText: exodus 1:12 but the more they afflicted them, the more they multiplied and the more they spread abroad. and they were adread because of the children of israel.
english: But the more they afflicted them, the more they multiplied and the more they spread abroad. And they were adread because of the children of Israel.

searchText: exodus 1:13 and the egyptians made the children of israel to serve with rigour.
english: And the Egyptians made the children of Israel to serve with rigour.

searchText: exodus 1:14 and they made their lives bitter with hard service, in mortar and in brick, and in all manner of service in the field; in all their service, wherein they made them serve with rigour.
english: And they made their lives bitter with hard service, in mortar and in brick, and in all manner of service in the field; in all their service, wherein they made them serve with rigour.

searchText: exodus 1:15 and the king of egypt spoke to the hebrew midwives, of whom the name of the one was shiphrah, and the name of the other puah;
english: And the king of Egypt spoke to the Hebrew midwives, of whom the name of the one was Shiphrah, and the name of the other Puah;

searchText: exodus 1:16 and he said: ‘when ye do the office of a midwife to the hebrew women, ye shall look upon the birthstool: if it be a son, then ye shall kill him; but if it be a daughter, then she shall live.’
english: and he said: ‘When ye do the office of a midwife to the Hebrew women, ye shall look upon the birthstool: if it be a son, then ye shall kill him; but if it be a daughter, then she shall live.’

searchText: exodus 1:17 but the midwives feared god, and did not as the king of egypt commanded them, but saved the men-children alive.
english: But the midwives feared God, and did not as the king of Egypt commanded them, but saved the men-children alive.

searchText: exodus 1:18 and the king of egypt called for the midwives, and said unto them: ‘why have ye done this thing, and have saved the men-children alive?’
english: And the king of Egypt called for the midwives, and said unto them: ‘Why have ye done this thing, and have saved the men-children alive?’

searchText: exodus 1:19 and the midwives said unto pharaoh: ‘because the hebrew women are not as the egyptian women; for they are lively, and are delivered ere the midwife come unto them.’
english: And the midwives said unto Pharaoh: ‘Because the Hebrew women are not as the Egyptian women; for they are lively, and are delivered ere the midwife come unto them.’

searchText: exodus 1:20 and god dealt well with the midwives; and the people multiplied, and waxed very mighty.
english: And God dealt well with the midwives; and the people multiplied, and waxed very mighty.

searchText: exodus 1:21 and it came to pass, because the midwives feared god, that he made them houses.
english: And it came to pass, because the midwives feared God, that He made them houses.

searchText: exodus 1:22 and pharaoh charged all his people, saying: ‘every son that is born ye shall cast into the river, and every daughter ye shall save alive.’
english: And Pharaoh charged all his people, saying: ‘Every son that is born ye shall cast into the river, and every daughter ye shall save alive.’

searchText: exodus 2:1 and there went a man of the house of levi, and took to wife a daughter of levi.
english: And there went a man of the house of Levi, and took to wife a daughter of Levi.

searchText: exodus 2:2 and the woman conceived, and bore a son; and when she saw him that he was a goodly child, she hid him three months.
english: And the woman conceived, and bore a son; and when she saw him that he was a goodly child, she hid him three months.

searchText: exodus 2:3 and when she could not longer hide him, she took for him an ark of bulrushes, and daubed it with slime and with pitch; and she put the child therein, and laid it in the flags by the river’s brink.
english: And when she could not longer hide him, she took for him an ark of bulrushes, and daubed it with slime and with pitch; and she put the child therein, and laid it in the flags by the river’s brink.

searchText: exodus 2:4 and his sister stood afar off, to know what would be done to him.
english: And his sister stood afar off, to know what would be done to him.

searchText: exodus 2:5 and the daughter of pharaoh came down to bathe in the river; and her maidens walked along by the river-side; and she saw the ark among the flags, and sent her handmaid to fetch it.
english: And the daughter of Pharaoh came down to bathe in the river; and her maidens walked along by the river-side; and she saw the ark among the flags, and sent her handmaid to fetch it.

searchText: exodus 2:6 and she opened it, and saw it, even the child; and behold a boy that wept. and she had compassion on him, and said: ‘this is one of the hebrews’children.’
english: And she opened it, and saw it, even the child; and behold a boy that wept. And she had compassion on him, and said: ‘This is one of the Hebrews’children.’

searchText: exodus 2:7 then said his sister to pharaoh’s daughter: ‘shall i go and call thee a nurse of the hebrew women, that she may nurse the child for thee?’
english: Then said his sister to Pharaoh’s daughter: ‘Shall I go and call thee a nurse of the Hebrew women, that she may nurse the child for thee?’

searchText: exodus 2:8 and pharaoh’s daughter said to her: ‘go.’ and the maiden went and called the child’s mother.
english: And Pharaoh’s daughter said to her: ‘Go.’ And the maiden went and called the child’s mother.

searchText: exodus 2:9 and pharaoh’s daughter said unto her: ‘take this child away, and nurse it for me, and i will give thee thy wages.’ and the woman took the child, and nursed it.
english: And Pharaoh’s daughter said unto her: ‘Take this child away, and nurse it for me, and I will give thee thy wages.’ And the woman took the child, and nursed it.

searchText: exodus 2:10 and the child grew, and she brought him unto pharaoh’s daughter, and he became her son. and she called his name moses, and said: ‘because i drew him out of the water.’
english: And the child grew, and she brought him unto Pharaoh’s daughter, and he became her son. And she called his name Moses, and said: ‘Because I drew him out of the water.’

searchText: exodus 2:11 and it came to pass in those days, when moses was grown up, that he went out unto his brethren, and looked on their burdens; and he saw an egyptian smiting a hebrew, one of his brethren.
english: And it came to pass in those days, when Moses was grown up, that he went out unto his brethren, and looked on their burdens; and he saw an Egyptian smiting a Hebrew, one of his brethren.

searchText: exodus 2:12 and he looked this way and that way, and when he saw that there was no man, he smote the egyptian, and hid him in the sand.
english: And he looked this way and that way, and when he saw that there was no man, he smote the Egyptian, and hid him in the sand.

searchText: exodus 2:13 and he went out the second day, and, behold, two men of the hebrews were striving together; and he said to him that did the wrong: ‘wherefore smitest thou thy fellow?’
english: And he went out the second day, and, behold, two men of the Hebrews were striving together; and he said to him that did the wrong: ‘Wherefore smitest thou thy fellow?’

searchText: exodus 2:14 and he said: ‘who made thee a ruler and a judge over us? thinkest thou to kill me, as thou didst kill the egyptian?’ and moses feared, and said: ‘surely the thing is known.’
english: And he said: ‘Who made thee a ruler and a judge over us? thinkest thou to kill me, as thou didst kill the Egyptian?’ And Moses feared, and said: ‘Surely the thing is known.’

searchText: exodus 2:15 now when pharaoh heard this thing, he sought to slay moses. but moses fled from the face of pharaoh, and dwelt in the land of midian; and he sat down by a well.
english: Now when Pharaoh heard this thing, he sought to slay Moses. But Moses fled from the face of Pharaoh, and dwelt in the land of Midian; and he sat down by a well.

searchText: exodus 2:16 now the priest of midian had seven daughters; and they came and drew water, and filled the troughs to water their father’s flock.
english: Now the priest of Midian had seven daughters; and they came and drew water, and filled the troughs to water their father’s flock.

searchText: exodus 2:17 and the shepherds came and drove them away; but moses stood up and helped them, and watered their flock.
english: And the shepherds came and drove them away; but Moses stood up and helped them, and watered their flock.

searchText: exodus 2:18 and when they came to reuel their father, he said: ‘how is it that ye are come so soon to-day?’
english: And when they came to Reuel their father, he said: ‘How is it that ye are come so soon to-day?’

searchText: exodus 2:19 and they said: ‘an egyptian delivered us out of the hand of the shepherds, and moreover he drew water for us, and watered the flock.’
english: And they said: ‘An Egyptian delivered us out of the hand of the shepherds, and moreover he drew water for us, and watered the flock.’

searchText: exodus 2:20 and he said unto his daughters: ‘and where is he? why is it that ye have left the man? call him, that he may eat bread.’
english: And he said unto his daughters: ‘And where is he? Why is it that ye have left the man? call him, that he may eat bread.’

searchText: exodus 2:21 and moses was content to dwell with the man; and he gave moses zipporah his daughter.
english: And Moses was content to dwell with the man; and he gave Moses Zipporah his daughter.

searchText: exodus 2:22 and she bore a son, and he called his name gershom; for he said: ‘i have been a stranger in a strange land.’
english: And she bore a son, and he called his name Gershom; for he said: ‘I have been a stranger in a strange land.’

searchText: exodus 2:23 and it came to pass in the course of those many days that the king of egypt died; and the children of israel sighed by reason of the bondage, and they cried, and their cry came up unto god by reason of the bondage.
english: And it came to pass in the course of those many days that the king of Egypt died; and the children of Israel sighed by reason of the bondage, and they cried, and their cry came up unto God by reason of the bondage.

searchText: exodus 2:24 and god heard their groaning, and god remembered his covenant with abraham, with isaac, and with jacob.
english: And God heard their groaning, and God remembered His covenant with Abraham, with Isaac, and with Jacob.

searchText: exodus 2:25 and god saw the children of israel, and god took cognizance of them.
english: And God saw the children of Israel, and God took cognizance of them.

searchText: exodus 3:1 now moses was keeping the flock of jethro his father-in-law, the priest of midian; and he led the flock to the farthest end of the wilderness, and came to the mountain of god, unto horeb.
english: Now Moses was keeping the flock of Jethro his father-in-law, the priest of Midian; and he led the flock to the farthest end of the wilderness, and came to the mountain of God, unto Horeb.

searchText: exodus 3:2 and the angel of the lord appeared unto him in a flame of fire out of the midst of a bush; and he looked, and, behold, the bush burned with fire, and the bush was not consumed.
english: And the angel of the LORD appeared unto him in a flame of fire out of the midst of a bush; and he looked, and, behold, the bush burned with fire, and the bush was not consumed.

searchText: exodus 3:3 and moses said: ‘i will turn aside now, and see this great sight, why the bush is not burnt.’
english: And Moses said: ‘I will turn aside now, and see this great sight, why the bush is not burnt.’

searchText: exodus 3:4 and when the lord saw that he turned aside to see, god called unto him out of the midst of the bush, and said: ‘moses, moses.’ and he said: ‘here am i.’
english: And when the LORD saw that he turned aside to see, God called unto him out of the midst of the bush, and said: ‘Moses, Moses.’ And he said: ‘Here am I.’

searchText: exodus 3:5 and he said: ‘draw not nigh hither; put off thy shoes from off thy feet, for the place whereon thou standest is holy ground.’
english: And He said: ‘Draw not nigh hither; put off thy shoes from off thy feet, for the place whereon thou standest is holy ground.’

searchText: exodus 3:6 moreover he said: ‘i am the god of thy father, the god of abraham, the god of isaac, and the god of jacob.’ and moses hid his face; for he was afraid to look upon god.
english: Moreover He said: ‘I am the God of thy father, the God of Abraham, the God of Isaac, and the God of Jacob.’ And Moses hid his face; for he was afraid to look upon God.

searchText: exodus 3:7 and the lord said: ‘i have surely seen the affliction of my people that are in egypt, and have heard their cry by reason of their taskmasters; for i know their pains;
english: And the LORD said: ‘I have surely seen the affliction of My people that are in Egypt, and have heard their cry by reason of their taskmasters; for I know their pains;

searchText: exodus 3:8 and i am come down to deliver them out of the hand of the egyptians, and to bring them up out of that land unto a good land and a large, unto a land flowing with milk and honey; unto the place of the canaanite, and the hittite, and the amorite, and the perizzite, and the hivite, and the jebusite.
english: and I am come down to deliver them out of the hand of the Egyptians, and to bring them up out of that land unto a good land and a large, unto a land flowing with milk and honey; unto the place of the Canaanite, and the Hittite, and the Amorite, and the Perizzite, and the Hivite, and the Jebusite.

searchText: exodus 3:9 and now, behold, the cry of the children of israel is come unto me; moreover i have seen the oppression wherewith the egyptians oppress them.
english: And now, behold, the cry of the children of Israel is come unto Me; moreover I have seen the oppression wherewith the Egyptians oppress them.

searchText: exodus 3:10 come now therefore, and i will send thee unto pharaoh, that thou mayest bring forth my people the children of israel out of egypt.’
english: Come now therefore, and I will send thee unto Pharaoh, that thou mayest bring forth My people the children of Israel out of Egypt.’

searchText: exodus 3:11 and moses said unto god: ‘who am i, that i should go unto pharaoh, and that i should bring forth the children of israel out of egypt?’
english: And Moses said unto God: ‘Who am I, that I should go unto Pharaoh, and that I should bring forth the children of Israel out of Egypt?’

searchText: exodus 3:12 and he said: ‘certainly i will be with thee; and this shall be the token unto thee, that i have sent thee: when thou hast brought forth the people out of egypt, ye shall serve god upon this mountain.’
english: And He said: ‘Certainly I will be with thee; and this shall be the token unto thee, that I have sent thee: when thou hast brought forth the people out of Egypt, ye shall serve God upon this mountain.’

searchText: exodus 3:13 and moses said unto god: ‘behold, when i come unto the children of israel, and shall say unto them: the god of your fathers hath sent me unto you; and they shall say to me: what is his name? what shall i say unto them?’
english: And Moses said unto God: ‘Behold, when I come unto the children of Israel, and shall say unto them: The God of your fathers hath sent me unto you; and they shall say to me: What is His name? what shall I say unto them?’

searchText: exodus 3:14 and god said unto moses: ‘i am that i am’; and he said: ‘thus shalt thou say unto the children of israel: i am hath sent me unto you.’
english: And God said unto Moses: ‘I AM THAT I AM’; and He said: ‘Thus shalt thou say unto the children of Israel: I AM hath sent me unto you.’

searchText: exodus 3:15 and god said moreover unto moses: ‘thus shalt thou say unto the children of israel: the lord, the god of your fathers, the god of abraham, the god of isaac, and the god of jacob, hath sent me unto you; this is my name for ever, and this is my memorial unto all generations.
english: And God said moreover unto Moses: ‘Thus shalt thou say unto the children of Israel: The LORD, the God of your fathers, the God of Abraham, the God of Isaac, and the God of Jacob, hath sent me unto you; this is My name for ever, and this is My memorial unto all generations.

searchText: exodus 3:16 go, and gather the elders of israel together, and say unto them: the lord, the god of your fathers, the god of abraham, of isaac, and of jacob, hath appeared unto me, saying: i have surely remembered you, and seen that which is done to you in egypt.
english: Go, and gather the elders of Israel together, and say unto them: The LORD, the God of your fathers, the God of Abraham, of Isaac, and of Jacob, hath appeared unto me, saying: I have surely remembered you, and seen that which is done to you in Egypt.

searchText: exodus 3:17 and i have said: i will bring you up out of the affliction of egypt unto the land of the canaanite, and the hittite, and the amorite, and the perizzite, and the hivite, and the jebusite, unto a land flowing with milk and honey.
english: And I have said: I will bring you up out of the affliction of Egypt unto the land of the Canaanite, and the Hittite, and the Amorite, and the Perizzite, and the Hivite, and the Jebusite, unto a land flowing with milk and honey.

searchText: exodus 3:18 and they shall hearken to thy voice. and thou shalt come, thou and the elders of israel, unto the king of egypt, and ye shall say unto him: the lord, the god of the hebrews, hath met with us. and now let us go, we pray thee, three days’journey into the wilderness, that we may sacrifice to the lord our god.
english: And they shall hearken to thy voice. And thou shalt come, thou and the elders of Israel, unto the king of Egypt, and ye shall say unto him: The LORD, the God of the Hebrews, hath met with us. And now let us go, we pray thee, three days’journey into the wilderness, that we may sacrifice to the LORD our God.

searchText: exodus 3:19 and i know that the king of egypt will not give you leave to go, except by a mighty hand.
english: And I know that the king of Egypt will not give you leave to go, except by a mighty hand.

searchText: exodus 3:20 and i will put forth my hand, and smite egypt with all my wonders which i will do in the midst thereof. and after that he will let you go.
english: And I will put forth My hand, and smite Egypt with all My wonders which I will do in the midst thereof. And after that he will let you go.

searchText: exodus 3:21 and i will give this people favour in the sight of the egyptians. and it shall come to pass, that, when ye go, ye shall not go empty;
english: And I will give this people favour in the sight of the Egyptians. And it shall come to pass, that, when ye go, ye shall not go empty;

searchText: exodus 3:22 but every woman shall ask of her neighbour, and of her that sojourneth in her house, jewels of silver, and jewels of gold, and raiment; and ye shall put them upon your sons, and upon your daughters; and ye shall spoil the egyptians.’
english: but every woman shall ask of her neighbour, and of her that sojourneth in her house, jewels of silver, and jewels of gold, and raiment; and ye shall put them upon your sons, and upon your daughters; and ye shall spoil the Egyptians.’

searchText: exodus 4:1 and moses answered and said: ‘but, behold, they will not believe me, nor hearken unto my voice; for they will say: the lord hath not appeared unto thee.’
english: And Moses answered and said: ‘But, behold, they will not believe me, nor hearken unto my voice; for they will say: The LORD hath not appeared unto thee.’

searchText: exodus 4:2 and the lord said unto him: ‘what is that in thy hand?’ and he said: ‘a rod.’
english: And the LORD said unto him: ‘What is that in thy hand?’ And he said: ‘A rod.’

searchText: exodus 4:3 and he said: ‘cast it on the ground.’ and he cast it on the ground, and it became a serpent; and moses fled from before it.
english: And He said: ‘Cast it on the ground.’ And he cast it on the ground, and it became a serpent; and Moses fled from before it.

searchText: exodus 4:4 and the lord said unto moses: ‘put forth thy hand, and take it by the tail—and he put forth his hand, and laid hold of it, and it became a rod in his hand—
english: And the LORD said unto Moses: ‘Put forth thy hand, and take it by the tail—and he put forth his hand, and laid hold of it, and it became a rod in his hand—

searchText: exodus 4:5 that they may believe that the lord, the god of their fathers, the god of abraham, the god of isaac, and the god of jacob, hath appeared unto thee.’
english: that they may believe that the LORD, the God of their fathers, the God of Abraham, the God of Isaac, and the God of Jacob, hath appeared unto thee.’

searchText: exodus 4:6 and the lord said furthermore unto him: ‘put now thy hand into thy bosom.’ and he put his hand into his bosom; and when he took it out, behold, his hand was leprous, as white as snow.
english: And the LORD said furthermore unto him: ‘Put now thy hand into thy bosom.’ And he put his hand into his bosom; and when he took it out, behold, his hand was leprous, as white as snow.

searchText: exodus 4:7 and he said: ‘put thy hand back into thy bosom.—and he put his hand back into his bosom; and when he took it out of his bosom, behold, it was turned again as his other flesh.—
english: And He said: ‘Put thy hand back into thy bosom.—And he put his hand back into his bosom; and when he took it out of his bosom, behold, it was turned again as his other flesh.—

searchText: exodus 4:8 and it shall come to pass, if they will not believe thee, neither hearken to the voice of the first sign, that they will believe the voice of the latter sign.
english: And it shall come to pass, if they will not believe thee, neither hearken to the voice of the first sign, that they will believe the voice of the latter sign.

searchText: exodus 4:9 and it shall come to pass, if they will not believe even these two signs, neither hearken unto thy voice, that thou shalt take of the water of the river, and pour it upon the dry land; and the water which thou takest out of the river shall become blood upon the dry land.’
english: And it shall come to pass, if they will not believe even these two signs, neither hearken unto thy voice, that thou shalt take of the water of the river, and pour it upon the dry land; and the water which thou takest out of the river shall become blood upon the dry land.’

searchText: exodus 4:10 and moses said unto the lord: ‘oh lord, i am not a man of words, neither heretofore, nor since thou hast spoken unto thy servant; for i am slow of speech, and of a slow tongue.’
english: And Moses said unto the LORD: ‘Oh Lord, I am not a man of words, neither heretofore, nor since Thou hast spoken unto Thy servant; for I am slow of speech, and of a slow tongue.’

searchText: exodus 4:11 and the lord said unto him: ‘who hath made man’s mouth? or who maketh a man dumb, or deaf, or seeing, or blind? is it not i the lord?
english: And the LORD said unto him: ‘Who hath made man’s mouth? or who maketh a man dumb, or deaf, or seeing, or blind? is it not I the LORD?

searchText: exodus 4:12 now therefore go, and i will be with thy mouth, and teach thee what thou shalt speak.’
english: Now therefore go, and I will be with thy mouth, and teach thee what thou shalt speak.’

searchText: exodus 4:13 and he said: ‘oh lord, send, i pray thee, by the hand of him whom thou wilt send.’
english: And he said: ‘Oh Lord, send, I pray Thee, by the hand of him whom Thou wilt send.’

searchText: exodus 4:14 and the anger of the lord was kindled against moses, and he said: ‘is there not aaron thy brother the levite? i know that he can speak well. and also, behold, he cometh forth to meet thee; and when he seeth thee, he will be glad in his heart.
english: And the anger of the LORD was kindled against Moses, and He said: ‘Is there not Aaron thy brother the Levite? I know that he can speak well. And also, behold, he cometh forth to meet thee; and when he seeth thee, he will be glad in his heart.

searchText: exodus 4:15 and thou shalt speak unto him, and put the words in his mouth; and i will be with thy mouth, and with his mouth, and will teach you what ye shall do.
english: And thou shalt speak unto him, and put the words in his mouth; and I will be with thy mouth, and with his mouth, and will teach you what ye shall do.

searchText: exodus 4:16 and he shall be thy spokesman unto the people; and it shall come to pass, that he shall be to thee a mouth, and thou shalt be to him in god’s stead.
english: And he shall be thy spokesman unto the people; and it shall come to pass, that he shall be to thee a mouth, and thou shalt be to him in God’s stead.

searchText: exodus 4:17 and thou shalt take in thy hand this rod, wherewith thou shalt do the signs.’
english: And thou shalt take in thy hand this rod, wherewith thou shalt do the signs.’

searchText: exodus 4:18 and moses went and returned to jethro his father-in-law, and said unto him: ‘let me go, i pray thee, and unto my brethren that are in egypt, and see whether they be yet alive.’ and jethro said to moses: ‘go in peace.’
english: And Moses went and returned to Jethro his father-in-law, and said unto him: ‘Let me go, I pray thee, and unto my brethren that are in Egypt, and see whether they be yet alive.’ And Jethro said to Moses: ‘Go in peace.’

searchText: exodus 4:19 and the lord said unto moses in midian: ‘go, return into egypt; for all the men are dead that sought thy life.’
english: And the LORD said unto Moses in Midian: ‘Go, return into Egypt; for all the men are dead that sought thy life.’
