english: If a man cause a field or vineyard to be eaten, and shall let his beast loose, and it feed in another man’s field; of the best of his own field, and of the best of his own vineyard, shall he make restitution.

searchText: exodus 22:5 if fire break out, and catch in thorns, so that the shocks of corn, or the standing corn, or the field are consumed; he that kindled the fire shall surely make restitution.
english: If fire break out, and catch in thorns, so that the shocks of corn, or the standing corn, or the field are consumed; he that kindled the fire shall surely make restitution.

searchText: exodus 22:6 if a man deliver unto his neighbour money or stuff to keep, and it be stolen out of the man’s house; if the thief be found, he shall pay double.
english: If a man deliver unto his neighbour money or stuff to keep, and it be stolen out of the man’s house; if the thief be found, he shall pay double.

searchText: exodus 22:7 if the thief be not found, then the master of the house shall come near unto god, to see whether he have not put his hand unto his neighbour’s goods.
english: If the thief be not found, then the master of the house shall come near unto God, to see whether he have not put his hand unto his neighbour’s goods.

searchText: exodus 22:8 for every matter of trespass, whether it be for ox, for ass, for sheep, for raiment, or for any manner of lost thing, whereof one saith: 'this is it,' the cause of both parties shall come before god; he whom god shall condemn shall pay double unto his neighbour.
english: For every matter of trespass, whether it be for ox, for ass, for sheep, for raiment, or for any manner of lost thing, whereof one saith: 'This is it,' the cause of both parties shall come before God; he whom God shall condemn shall pay double unto his neighbour.

searchText: exodus 22:9 if a man deliver unto his neighbour an ass, or an ox, or a sheep, or any beast, to keep, and it die, or be hurt, or driven away, no man seeing it;
english: If a man deliver unto his neighbour an ass, or an ox, or a sheep, or any beast, to keep, and it die, or be hurt, or driven away, no man seeing it;

searchText: exodus 22:10 the oath of the lord shall be between them both, to see whether he have not put his hand unto his neighbour’s goods; and the owner thereof shall accept it, and he shall not make restitution.
english: the oath of the LORD shall be between them both, to see whether he have not put his hand unto his neighbour’s goods; and the owner thereof shall accept it, and he shall not make restitution.

searchText: exodus 22:11 but if it be stolen from him, he shall make restitution unto the owner thereof.
english: But if it be stolen from him, he shall make restitution unto the owner thereof.

searchText: exodus 22:12 if it be torn in pieces, let him bring it for witness; he shall not make good that which was torn.
english: If it be torn in pieces, let him bring it for witness; he shall not make good that which was torn.

searchText: exodus 22:13 and if a man borrow aught of his neighbour, and it be hurt, or die, the owner thereof not being with it, he shall surely make restitution.
english: And if a man borrow aught of his neighbour, and it be hurt, or die, the owner thereof not being with it, he shall surely make restitution.

searchText: exodus 22:14 if the owner thereof be with it, he shall not make it good; if it be a hireling, he loseth his hire.
english: If the owner thereof be with it, he shall not make it good; if it be a hireling, he loseth his hire.

searchText: exodus 22:15 and if a man entice a virgin that is not betrothed, and lie with her, he shall surely pay a dowry for her to be his wife.
english: And if a man entice a virgin that is not betrothed, and lie with her, he shall surely pay a dowry for her to be his wife.

searchText: exodus 22:16 if her father utterly refuse to give her unto him, he shall pay money according to the dowry of virgins.
english: If her father utterly refuse to give her unto him, he shall pay money according to the dowry of virgins.

searchText: exodus 22:17 thou shalt not suffer a sorceress to live.
english: Thou shalt not suffer a sorceress to live.

searchText: exodus 22:18 whosoever lieth with a beast shall surely be put to death.
english: Whosoever lieth with a beast shall surely be put to death.

searchText: exodus 22:19 he that sacrificeth unto the gods, save unto the lord only, shall be utterly destroyed.
english: He that sacrificeth unto the gods, save unto the LORD only, shall be utterly destroyed.

searchText: exodus 22:20 and a stranger shalt thou not wrong, neither shalt thou oppress him; for ye were strangers in the land of egypt.
english: And a stranger shalt thou not wrong, neither shalt thou oppress him; for ye were strangers in the land of Egypt.

searchText: exodus 22:21 ye shall not afflict any widow, or fatherless child.
english: Ye shall not afflict any widow, or fatherless child.

searchText: exodus 22:22 if thou afflict them in any wise—for if they cry at all unto me, i will surely hear their cry—
english: If thou afflict them in any wise—for if they cry at all unto Me, I will surely hear their cry—

searchText: exodus 22:23 my wrath shall wax hot, and i will kill you with the sword; and your wives shall be widows, and your children fatherless.
english: My wrath shall wax hot, and I will kill you with the sword; and your wives shall be widows, and your children fatherless.

searchText: exodus 22:24 if thou lend money to any of my people, even to the poor with thee, thou shalt not be to him as a creditor; neither shall ye lay upon him interest.
english: If thou lend money to any of My people, even to the poor with thee, thou shalt not be to him as a creditor; neither shall ye lay upon him interest.

searchText: exodus 22:25 if thou at all take thy neighbour’s garment to pledge, thou shalt restore it unto him by that the sun goeth down;
english: If thou at all take thy neighbour’s garment to pledge, thou shalt restore it unto him by that the sun goeth down;

searchText: exodus 22:26 for that is his only covering, it is his garment for his skin; wherein shall he sleep? and it shall come to pass, when he crieth unto me, that i will hear; for i am gracious.
english: for that is his only covering, it is his garment for his skin; wherein shall he sleep? and it shall come to pass, when he crieth unto Me, that I will hear; for I am gracious.

searchText: exodus 22:27 thou shalt not revile god, nor curse a ruler of thy people.
english: Thou shalt not revile God, nor curse a ruler of thy people.

searchText: exodus 22:28 thou shalt not delay to offer of the fulness of thy harvest, and of the outflow of thy presses. the first-born of thy sons shalt thou give unto me.
english: Thou shalt not delay to offer of the fulness of thy harvest, and of the outflow of thy presses. The first-born of thy sons shalt thou give unto Me.

searchText: exodus 22:29 likewise shalt thou do with thine oxen, and with thy sheep; seven days it shall be with its dam; on the eighth day thou shalt give it me.
english: Likewise shalt thou do with thine oxen, and with thy sheep; seven days it shall be with its dam; on the eighth day thou shalt give it Me.

searchText: exodus 22:30 and ye shall be holy men unto me; therefore ye shall not eat any flesh that is torn of beasts in the field; ye shall cast it to the dogs.
english: And ye shall be holy men unto Me; therefore ye shall not eat any flesh that is torn of beasts in the field; ye shall cast it to the dogs.

searchText: exodus 23:1 thou shalt not utter a false report; put not thy hand with the wicked to be an unrighteous witness.
english: Thou shalt not utter a false report; put not thy hand with the wicked to be an unrighteous witness.

searchText: exodus 23:2 thou shalt not follow a multitude to do evil; neither shalt thou bear witness in a cause to turn aside after a multitude to pervert justice;
english: Thou shalt not follow a multitude to do evil; neither shalt thou bear witness in a cause to turn aside after a multitude to pervert justice;

searchText: exodus 23:3 neither shalt thou favour a poor man in his cause.
english: neither shalt thou favour a poor man in his cause.

searchText: exodus 23:4 if thou meet thine enemy’s ox or his ass going astray, thou shalt surely bring it back to him again.
english: If thou meet thine enemy’s ox or his ass going astray, thou shalt surely bring it back to him again.

searchText: exodus 23:5 if thou see the ass of him that hateth thee lying under its burden, thou shalt forbear to pass by him; thou shalt surely release it with him.
english: If thou see the ass of him that hateth thee lying under its burden, thou shalt forbear to pass by him; thou shalt surely release it with him.

searchText: exodus 23:6 thou shalt not wrest the judgment of thy poor in his cause.
english: Thou shalt not wrest the judgment of thy poor in his cause.

searchText: exodus 23:7 keep thee far from a false matter; and the innocent and righteous slay thou not; for i will not justify the wicked.
english: Keep thee far from a false matter; and the innocent and righteous slay thou not; for I will not justify the wicked.

searchText: exodus 23:8 and thou shalt take no gift; for a gift blindeth them that have sight, and perverteth the words of the righteous.
english: And thou shalt take no gift; for a gift blindeth them that have sight, and perverteth the words of the righteous.

searchText: exodus 23:9 and a stranger shalt thou not oppress; for ye know the heart of a stranger, seeing ye were strangers in the land of egypt.
english: And a stranger shalt thou not oppress; for ye know the heart of a stranger, seeing ye were strangers in the land of Egypt.

searchText: exodus 23:10 and six years thou shalt sow thy land, and gather in the increase thereof;
english: And six years thou shalt sow thy land, and gather in the increase thereof;

searchText: exodus 23:11 but the seventh year thou shalt let it rest and lie fallow, that the poor of thy people may eat; and what they leave the beast of the field shall eat. in like manner thou shalt deal with thy vineyard, and with thy oliveyard.
english: but the seventh year thou shalt let it rest and lie fallow, that the poor of thy people may eat; and what they leave the beast of the field shall eat. In like manner thou shalt deal with thy vineyard, and with thy oliveyard.

searchText: exodus 23:12 six days thou shalt do thy work, but on the seventh day thou shalt rest; that thine ox and thine ass may have rest, and the son of thy handmaid, and the stranger, may be refreshed.
english: Six days thou shalt do thy work, but on the seventh day thou shalt rest; that thine ox and thine ass may have rest, and the son of thy handmaid, and the stranger, may be refreshed.

searchText: exodus 23:13 and in all things that i have said unto you take ye heed; and make no mention of the name of other gods, neither let it be heard out of thy mouth. .
english: And in all things that I have said unto you take ye heed; and make no mention of the name of other gods, neither let it be heard out of thy mouth. .

searchText: exodus 23:14 three times thou shalt keep a feast unto me in the year.
english: Three times thou shalt keep a feast unto Me in the year.

searchText: exodus 23:15 the feast of unleavened bread shalt thou keep; seven days thou shalt eat unleavened bread, as i commanded thee, at the time appointed in the month abib—for in it thou camest out from egypt; and none shall appear before me empty;
english: The feast of unleavened bread shalt thou keep; seven days thou shalt eat unleavened bread, as I commanded thee, at the time appointed in the month Abib—for in it thou camest out from Egypt; and none shall appear before Me empty;

searchText: exodus 23:16 and the feast of harvest, the first-fruits of thy labours, which thou sowest in the field; and the feast of ingathering, at the end of the year, when thou gatherest in thy labours out of the field.
english: and the feast of harvest, the first-fruits of thy labours, which thou sowest in the field; and the feast of ingathering, at the end of the year, when thou gatherest in thy labours out of the field.

searchText: exodus 23:17 three times in the year all thy males shall appear before the lord god.
english: Three times in the year all thy males shall appear before the Lord GOD.

searchText: exodus 23:18 thou shalt not offer the blood of my sacrifice with leavened bread; neither shall the fat of my feast remain all night until the morning.
english: Thou shalt not offer the blood of My sacrifice with leavened bread; neither shall the fat of My feast remain all night until the morning.

searchText: exodus 23:19 the choicest first-fruits of thy land thou shalt bring into the house of the lord thy god. thou shalt not seethe a kid in its mother’s milk.
english: The choicest first-fruits of thy land thou shalt bring into the house of the LORD thy God. Thou shalt not seethe a kid in its mother’s milk.

searchText: exodus 23:20 behold, i send an angel before thee, to keep thee by the way, and to bring thee into the place which i have prepared.
english: Behold, I send an angel before thee, to keep thee by the way, and to bring thee into the place which I have prepared.

searchText: exodus 23:21 take heed of him, and hearken unto his voice; be not rebellious against him; for he will not pardon your transgression; for my name is in him.
english: Take heed of him, and hearken unto his voice; be not rebellious against him; for he will not pardon your transgression; for My name is in him.

searchText: exodus 23:22 but if thou shalt indeed hearken unto his voice, and do all that i speak; then i will be an enemy unto thine enemies, and an adversary unto thine adversaries.
english: But if thou shalt indeed hearken unto his voice, and do all that I speak; then I will be an enemy unto thine enemies, and an adversary unto thine adversaries.

searchText: exodus 23:23 for mine angel shall go before thee, and bring thee in unto the amorite, and the hittite, and the perizzite, and the canaanite, the hivite, and the jebusite; and i will cut them off.
english: For Mine angel shall go before thee, and bring thee in unto the Amorite, and the Hittite, and the Perizzite, and the Canaanite, the Hivite, and the Jebusite; and I will cut them off.

searchText: exodus 23:24 thou shalt not bow down to their gods, nor serve them, nor do after their doings; but thou shalt utterly overthrow them, and break in pieces their pillars.
english: Thou shalt not bow down to their gods, nor serve them, nor do after their doings; but thou shalt utterly overthrow them, and break in pieces their pillars.

searchText: exodus 23:25 and ye shall serve the lord your god, and he will bless thy bread, and thy water; and i will take sickness away from the midst of thee.
english: And ye shall serve the LORD your God, and He will bless thy bread, and thy water; and I will take sickness away from the midst of thee.

searchText: exodus 23:26 none shall miscarry, nor be barren, in thy land; the number of thy days i will fulfil.
english: None shall miscarry, nor be barren, in thy land; the number of thy days I will fulfil.

searchText: exodus 23:27 i will send my terror before thee, and will discomfit all the people to whom thou shalt come, and i will make all thine enemies turn their backs unto thee.
english: I will send My terror before thee, and will discomfit all the people to whom thou shalt come, and I will make all thine enemies turn their backs unto thee.

searchText: exodus 23:28 and i will send the hornet before thee, which shall drive out the hivite, the canaanite, and the hittite, from before thee.
english: And I will send the hornet before thee, which shall drive out the Hivite, the Canaanite, and the Hittite, from before thee.

searchText: exodus 23:29 i will not drive them out from before thee in one year, lest the land become desolate, and the beasts of the field multiply against thee.
english: I will not drive them out from before thee in one year, lest the land become desolate, and the beasts of the field multiply against thee.

searchText: exodus 23:30 by little and little i will drive them out from before thee, until thou be increased, and inherit the land.
english: By little and little I will drive them out from before thee, until thou be increased, and inherit the land.

searchText: exodus 23:31 and i will set thy border from the red sea even unto the sea of the philistines, and from the wilderness unto athe river; for i will deliver the inhabitants of the land into your hand; and thou shalt drive them out before thee.
english: And I will set thy border from the Red Sea even unto the sea of the Philistines, and from the wilderness unto athe River; for I will deliver the inhabitants of the land into your hand; and thou shalt drive them out before thee.

searchText: exodus 23:32 thou shalt make no covenant with them, nor with their gods.
english: Thou shalt make no covenant with them, nor with their gods.

searchText: exodus 23:33 they shall not dwell in thy land—lest they make thee sin against me, for thou wilt serve their gods—for they will be a snare unto thee.
english: They shall not dwell in thy land—lest they make thee sin against Me, for thou wilt serve their gods—for they will be a snare unto thee.

searchText: exodus 24:1 and unto moses he said: ‘come up unto the lord, thou, and aaron, nadab, and abihu, and seventy of the elders of israel; and worship ye afar off;
english: And unto Moses He said: ‘Come up unto the LORD, thou, and Aaron, Nadab, and Abihu, and seventy of the elders of Israel; and worship ye afar off;

searchText: exodus 24:2 and moses alone shall come near unto the lord; but they shall not come near; neither shall the people go up with him.’
english: and Moses alone shall come near unto the LORD; but they shall not come near; neither shall the people go up with him.’

searchText: exodus 24:3 and moses came and told the people all the words of the lord, and all the ordinances; and all the people answered with one voice, and said: ‘all the words which the lord hath spoken will we do.’
english: And Moses came and told the people all the words of the LORD, and all the ordinances; and all the people answered with one voice, and said: ‘All the words which the Lord hath spoken will we do.’

searchText: exodus 24:4 and moses wrote all the words of the lord, and rose up early in the morning, and builded an altar under the mount, and twelve pillars, according to the twelve tribes of israel.
english: And Moses wrote all the words of the LORD, and rose up early in the morning, and builded an altar under the mount, and twelve pillars, according to the twelve tribes of Israel.

searchText: exodus 24:5 and he sent the young men of the children of israel, who offered burnt-offerings, and sacrificed peace-offerings of oxen unto the lord.
english: And he sent the young men of the children of Israel, who offered burnt-offerings, and sacrificed peace-offerings of oxen unto the LORD.

searchText: exodus 24:6 and moses took half of the blood, and put it in basins; and half of the blood he dashed against the altar.
english: And Moses took half of the blood, and put it in basins; and half of the blood he dashed against the altar.

searchText: exodus 24:7 and he took the book of the covenant, and read in the hearing of the people; and they said: ‘all that the lord hath spoken will we do, and obey.’
english: And he took the book of the covenant, and read in the hearing of the people; and they said: ‘All that the LORD hath spoken will we do, and obey.’

searchText: exodus 24:8 and moses took the blood, and sprinkled it on the people, and said: ‘behold the blood of the covenant, which the lord hath made with you in agreement with all these words.’
english: And Moses took the blood, and sprinkled it on the people, and said: ‘Behold the blood of the covenant, which the LORD hath made with you in agreement with all these words.’

searchText: exodus 24:9 then went up moses, and aaron, nadab, and abihu, and seventy of the elders of israel;
english: Then went up Moses, and Aaron, Nadab, and Abihu, and seventy of the elders of Israel;

searchText: exodus 24:10 and they saw the god of israel; and there was under his feet the like of a paved work of sapphire stone, and the like of the very heaven for clearness.
english: and they saw the God of Israel; and there was under His feet the like of a paved work of sapphire stone, and the like of the very heaven for clearness.

searchText: exodus 24:11 and upon the nobles of the children of israel he laid not his hand; and they beheld god, and did eat and drink.
english: And upon the nobles of the children of Israel He laid not His hand; and they beheld God, and did eat and drink.

searchText: exodus 24:12 and the lord said unto moses: ‘come up to me into the mount and be there; and i will give thee the tables of stone, and the law and the commandment, which i have written, that thou mayest teach them.’
english: And the LORD said unto Moses: ‘Come up to Me into the mount and be there; and I will give thee the tables of stone, and the law and the commandment, which I have written, that thou mayest teach them.’

searchText: exodus 24:13 and moses rose up, and joshua his minister; and moses went up into the mount of god.
english: And Moses rose up, and Joshua his minister; and Moses went up into the mount of God.

searchText: exodus 24:14 and unto the elders he said: ‘tarry ye here for us, until we come back unto you; and, behold, aaron and hur are with you; whosoever hath a cause, let him come near unto them.’
english: And unto the elders he said: ‘Tarry ye here for us, until we come back unto you; and, behold, Aaron and Hur are with you; whosoever hath a cause, let him come near unto them.’

searchText: exodus 24:15 and moses went up into the mount, and the cloud covered the mount.
english: And Moses went up into the mount, and the cloud covered the mount.

searchText: exodus 24:16 and the glory of the lord abode upon mount sinai, and the cloud covered it six days; and the seventh day he called unto moses out of the midst of the cloud.
english: And the glory of the LORD abode upon mount Sinai, and the cloud covered it six days; and the seventh day He called unto Moses out of the midst of the cloud.

searchText: exodus 24:17 and the appearance of the glory of the lord was like devouring fire on the top of the mount in the eyes of the children of israel.
english: And the appearance of the glory of the LORD was like devouring fire on the top of the mount in the eyes of the children of Israel.

searchText: exodus 24:18 and moses entered into the midst of the cloud, and went up into the mount; and moses was in the mount forty days and forty nights.
english: And Moses entered into the midst of the cloud, and went up into the mount; and Moses was in the mount forty days and forty nights.

searchText: exodus 25:1 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: exodus 25:2 ’speak unto the children of israel, that they take for me an offering; of every man whose heart maketh him willing ye shall take my offering.
english: ’Speak unto the children of Israel, that they take for Me an offering; of every man whose heart maketh him willing ye shall take My offering.

searchText: exodus 25:3 and this is the offering which ye shall take of them: gold, and silver, and brass;
english: And this is the offering which ye shall take of them: gold, and silver, and brass;

searchText: exodus 25:4 and blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine linen, and goats’hair;
english: and blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine linen, and goats’hair;

searchText: exodus 25:5 and rams’skins dyed red, and sealskins, and acacia-wood;
english: and rams’skins dyed red, and sealskins, and acacia-wood;

searchText: exodus 25:6 oil for the light, spices for the anointing oil, and for the sweet incense;
english: oil for the light, spices for the anointing oil, and for the sweet incense;

searchText: exodus 25:7 onyx stones, and stones to be set, for the ephod, and for the breastplate.
english: onyx stones, and stones to be set, for the ephod, and for the breastplate.

searchText: exodus 25:8 and let them make me a sanctuary, that i may dwell among them.
english: And let them make Me a sanctuary, that I may dwell among them.

searchText: exodus 25:9 according to all that i show thee, the pattern of the tabernacle, and the pattern of all the furniture thereof, even so shall ye make it.
english: According to all that I show thee, the pattern of the tabernacle, and the pattern of all the furniture thereof, even so shall ye make it.

searchText: exodus 25:10 and they shall make an ark of acacia-wood: two cubits and a half shall be the length thereof, and a cubit and a half the breadth thereof, and a cubit and a half the height thereof.
english: And they shall make an ark of acacia-wood: two cubits and a half shall be the length thereof, and a cubit and a half the breadth thereof, and a cubit and a half the height thereof.

searchText: exodus 25:11 and thou shalt overlay it with pure gold, within and without shalt thou overlay it, and shalt make upon it a crown of gold round about.
english: And thou shalt overlay it with pure gold, within and without shalt thou overlay it, and shalt make upon it a crown of gold round about.

searchText: exodus 25:12 and thou shalt cast four rings of gold for it, and put them in the four feet thereof; and two rings shall be on the one side of it, and two rings on the other side of it.
english: And thou shalt cast four rings of gold for it, and put them in the four feet thereof; and two rings shall be on the one side of it, and two rings on the other side of it.

searchText: exodus 25:13 and thou shalt make staves of acacia-wood, and overlay them with gold.
english: And thou shalt make staves of acacia-wood, and overlay them with gold.

searchText: exodus 25:14 and thou shalt put the staves into the rings on the sides of the ark, wherewith to bear the ark.
english: And thou shalt put the staves into the rings on the sides of the ark, wherewith to bear the ark.

searchText: exodus 25:15 the staves shall be in the rings of the ark; they shall not be taken from it.
english: The staves shall be in the rings of the ark; they shall not be taken from it.

searchText: exodus 25:16 and thou shalt put into the ark the testimony which i shall give thee.
english: And thou shalt put into the ark the testimony which I shall give thee.

searchText: exodus 25:17 and thou shalt make an ark-cover of pure gold: two cubits and a half shall be the length thereof, and a cubit and a half the breadth thereof.
english: And thou shalt make an ark-cover of pure gold: two cubits and a half shall be the length thereof, and a cubit and a half the breadth thereof.

searchText: exodus 25:18 and thou shalt make two cherubim of gold; of beaten work shalt thou make them, at the two ends of the ark-cover.
english: And thou shalt make two cherubim of gold; of beaten work shalt thou make them, at the two ends of the ark-cover.

searchText: exodus 25:19 and make one cherub at the one end, and one cherub at the other end; of one piece with the ark-cover shall ye make the cherubim of the two ends thereof.
english: And make one cherub at the one end, and one cherub at the other end; of one piece with the ark-cover shall ye make the cherubim of the two ends thereof.

searchText: exodus 25:20 and the cherubim shall spread out their wings on high, screening the ark-cover with their wings, with their faces one to another; toward the ark-cover shall the faces of the cherubim be.
english: And the cherubim shall spread out their wings on high, screening the ark-cover with their wings, with their faces one to another; toward the ark-cover shall the faces of the cherubim be.

searchText: exodus 25:21 and thou shalt put the ark-cover above upon the ark; and in the ark thou shalt put the testimony that i shall give thee.
english: And thou shalt put the ark-cover above upon the ark; and in the ark thou shalt put the testimony that I shall give thee.

searchText: exodus 25:22 and there i will meet with thee, and i will speak with thee from above the ark-cover, from between the two cherubim which are upon the ark of the testimony, of all things which i will give thee in commandment unto the children of israel.
english: And there I will meet with thee, and I will speak with thee from above the ark-cover, from between the two cherubim which are upon the ark of the testimony, of all things which I will give thee in commandment unto the children of Israel.

searchText: exodus 25:23 and thou shalt make a table of acacia-wood: two cubits shall be the length thereof, and a cubit the breadth thereof, and a cubit and a half the height thereof.
english: And thou shalt make a table of acacia-wood: two cubits shall be the length thereof, and a cubit the breadth thereof, and a cubit and a half the height thereof.

searchText: exodus 25:24 and thou shalt overlay it with pure gold, and make thereto a crown of gold round about.
english: And thou shalt overlay it with pure gold, and make thereto a crown of gold round about.

searchText: exodus 25:25 and thou shalt make unto it a border of a handbreadth round about, and thou shalt make a golden crown to the border thereof round about.
english: And thou shalt make unto it a border of a handbreadth round about, and thou shalt make a golden crown to the border thereof round about.

searchText: exodus 25:26 and thou shalt make for it four rings of gold, and put the rings in the four corners that are on the four feet thereof.
english: And thou shalt make for it four rings of gold, and put the rings in the four corners that are on the four feet thereof.

searchText: exodus 25:27 close by the border shall the rings be, for places for the staves to bear the table.
english: Close by the border shall the rings be, for places for the staves to bear the table.

searchText: exodus 25:28 and thou shalt make the staves of acacia-wood, and overlay them with gold, that the table may be borne with them.
english: And thou shalt make the staves of acacia-wood, and overlay them with gold, that the table may be borne with them.

searchText: exodus 25:29 and thou shalt make the dishes thereof, and the pans thereof, and the jars thereof, and the bowls thereof, wherewith to pour out; of pure gold shalt thou make them.
english: And thou shalt make the dishes thereof, and the pans thereof, and the jars thereof, and the bowls thereof, wherewith to pour out; of pure gold shalt thou make them.

searchText: exodus 25:30 and thou shalt set upon the table showbread before me always.
english: And thou shalt set upon the table showbread before Me always.

searchText: exodus 25:31 and thou shalt make a candlestick of pure gold: of beaten work shall the candlestick be made, even its base, and its shaft; its cups, its knops, and its flowers, shall be of one piece with it.
english: And thou shalt make a candlestick of pure gold: of beaten work shall the candlestick be made, even its base, and its shaft; its cups, its knops, and its flowers, shall be of one piece with it.

searchText: exodus 25:32 and there shall be six branches going out of the sides thereof: three branches of the candlestick out of the one side thereof, and three branches of the candle-stick out of the other side thereof;
english: And there shall be six branches going out of the sides thereof: three branches of the candlestick out of the one side thereof, and three branches of the candle-stick out of the other side thereof;

searchText: exodus 25:33 three cups made like almond-blossoms in one branch, a knop and a flower; and three cups made like almond-blossoms in the other branch, a knop and a flower; so for the six branches going out of the candlestick.
english: three cups made like almond-blossoms in one branch, a knop and a flower; and three cups made like almond-blossoms in the other branch, a knop and a flower; so for the six branches going out of the candlestick.

searchText: exodus 25:34 and in the candlestick four cups made like almond-blossoms, the knops thereof, and the flowers thereof.
english: And in the candlestick four cups made like almond-blossoms, the knops thereof, and the flowers thereof.

searchText: exodus 25:35 and a knop under two branches of one piece with it, and a knop under two branches of one piece with it, and a knop under two branches of one piece with it, for the six branches going out of the candlestick.
english: And a knop under two branches of one piece with it, and a knop under two branches of one piece with it, and a knop under two branches of one piece with it, for the six branches going out of the candlestick.

searchText: exodus 25:36 their knops and their branches shall be of one piece with it; the whole of it one beaten work of pure gold.
english: Their knops and their branches shall be of one piece with it; the whole of it one beaten work of pure gold.

searchText: exodus 25:37 and thou shalt make the lamps thereof, seven; and they shall light the lamps thereof, to give light over against it.
english: And thou shalt make the lamps thereof, seven; and they shall light the lamps thereof, to give light over against it.

searchText: exodus 25:38 and the tongs thereof, and the snuffdishes thereof, shall be of pure gold.
english: And the tongs thereof, and the snuffdishes thereof, shall be of pure gold.

searchText: exodus 25:39 of a talent of pure gold shall it be made, with all these vessels.
english: Of a talent of pure gold shall it be made, with all these vessels.

searchText: exodus 25:40 and see that thou make them after their pattern, which is being shown thee in the mount.
english: And see that thou make them after their pattern, which is being shown thee in the mount.

searchText: exodus 26:1 moreover thou shalt make the tabernacle with ten curtains: of fine twined linen, and blue, and purple, and scarlet, with cherubim the work of the skilful workman shalt thou make them.
english: Moreover thou shalt make the tabernacle with ten curtains: of fine twined linen, and blue, and purple, and scarlet, with cherubim the work of the skilful workman shalt thou make them.

searchText: exodus 26:2 the length of each curtain shall be eight and twenty cubits, and the breadth of each curtain four cubits; all the curtains shall have one measure.
english: The length of each curtain shall be eight and twenty cubits, and the breadth of each curtain four cubits; all the curtains shall have one measure.

searchText: exodus 26:3 five curtains shall be coupled together one to another; and the other five curtains shall be coupled one to another.
english: Five curtains shall be coupled together one to another; and the other five curtains shall be coupled one to another.

searchText: exodus 26:4 and thou shalt make loops of blue upon the edge of the one curtain that is outmost in the first set; and likewise shalt thou make in the edge of the curtain that is outmost in the second set.
english: And thou shalt make loops of blue upon the edge of the one curtain that is outmost in the first set; and likewise shalt thou make in the edge of the curtain that is outmost in the second set.

searchText: exodus 26:5 fifty loops shalt thou make in the one curtain, and fifty loops shalt thou make in the edge of the curtain that is in the second set; the loops shall be opposite one to another.
english: Fifty loops shalt thou make in the one curtain, and fifty loops shalt thou make in the edge of the curtain that is in the second set; the loops shall be opposite one to another.

searchText: exodus 26:6 and thou shalt make fifty clasps of gold, and couple the curtains one to another with the clasps, that the tabernacle may be one whole.
english: And thou shalt make fifty clasps of gold, and couple the curtains one to another with the clasps, that the tabernacle may be one whole.

searchText: exodus 26:7 and thou shalt make curtains of goats’hair for a tent over the tabernacle; eleven curtains shalt thou make them.
english: And thou shalt make curtains of goats’hair for a tent over the tabernacle; eleven curtains shalt thou make them.

searchText: exodus 26:8 the length of each curtain shall be thirty cubits, and the breadth of each curtain four cubits; the eleven curtains shall have one measure.
english: The length of each curtain shall be thirty cubits, and the breadth of each curtain four cubits; the eleven curtains shall have one measure.

searchText: exodus 26:9 and thou shalt couple five curtains by themselves, and six curtains by themselves, and shalt double over the sixth curtain in the forefront of the tent.
english: And thou shalt couple five curtains by themselves, and six curtains by themselves, and shalt double over the sixth curtain in the forefront of the tent.

searchText: exodus 26:10 and thou shalt make fifty loops on the edge of the one curtain that is outmost in the first set, and fifty loops upon the edge of the curtain which is outmost in the second set.
english: And thou shalt make fifty loops on the edge of the one curtain that is outmost in the first set, and fifty loops upon the edge of the curtain which is outmost in the second set.

searchText: exodus 26:11 and thou shalt make fifty clasps of brass, and put the clasps into the loops, and couple the tent together, that it may be one.
english: And thou shalt make fifty clasps of brass, and put the clasps into the loops, and couple the tent together, that it may be one.

searchText: exodus 26:12 and as for the overhanging part that remaineth of the curtains of the tent, the half curtain that remaineth over shall hang over the back of the tabernacle.
english: And as for the overhanging part that remaineth of the curtains of the tent, the half curtain that remaineth over shall hang over the back of the tabernacle.

searchText: exodus 26:13 and the cubit on the one side, and the cubit on the other side, of that which remaineth over in the length of the curtains of the tent, shall hang over the sides of the tabernacle on this side and on that side, to cover it.
english: And the cubit on the one side, and the cubit on the other side, of that which remaineth over in the length of the curtains of the tent, shall hang over the sides of the tabernacle on this side and on that side, to cover it.

searchText: exodus 26:14 and thou shalt make a covering for the tent of rams’skins dyed red and a covering of sealskins above.
english: And thou shalt make a covering for the tent of rams’skins dyed red and a covering of sealskins above.

searchText: exodus 26:15 and thou shalt make the boards for the tabernacle of acacia-wood, standing up.
english: And thou shalt make the boards for the tabernacle of acacia-wood, standing up.

searchText: exodus 26:16 ten cubits shall be the length of a board, and a cubit and a half the breadth of each board.
english: Ten cubits shall be the length of a board, and a cubit and a half the breadth of each board.

searchText: exodus 26:17 two tenons shall there be in each board, joined one to another; thus shalt thou make for all the boards of the tabernacle.
english: Two tenons shall there be in each board, joined one to another; thus shalt thou make for all the boards of the tabernacle.

searchText: exodus 26:18 and thou shalt make the boards for the tabernacle, twenty boards for the south side southward:
english: And thou shalt make the boards for the tabernacle, twenty boards for the south side southward:

searchText: exodus 26:19 and thou shalt make forty sockets of silver under the twenty boards: two sockets under one board for its two tenons, and two sockets under another board for its two tenons;
english: And thou shalt make forty sockets of silver under the twenty boards: two sockets under one board for its two tenons, and two sockets under another board for its two tenons;

searchText: exodus 26:20 and for the second side of the tabernacle, on the north side, twenty boards.
english: and for the second side of the tabernacle, on the north side, twenty boards.

searchText: exodus 26:21 and their forty sockets of silver: two sockets under one board, and two sockets under another board.
english: And their forty sockets of silver: two sockets under one board, and two sockets under another board.

searchText: exodus 26:22 and for the hinder part of the tabernacle westward thou shalt make six boards.
english: And for the hinder part of the tabernacle westward thou shalt make six boards.

searchText: exodus 26:23 and two boards shalt thou make for the corners of the tabernacle in the hinder part.
english: And two boards shalt thou make for the corners of the tabernacle in the hinder part.

searchText: exodus 26:24 and they shall be double beneath, and in like manner they shall be complete unto the top thereof unto the first ring; thus shall it be for them both; they shall be for the two corners.
english: And they shall be double beneath, and in like manner they shall be complete unto the top thereof unto the first ring; thus shall it be for them both; they shall be for the two corners.

searchText: exodus 26:25 thus there shall be eight boards, and their sockets of silver, sixteen sockets: two sockets under one board, and two sockets under another board.
english: Thus there shall be eight boards, and their sockets of silver, sixteen sockets: two sockets under one board, and two sockets under another board.

searchText: exodus 26:26 and thou shalt make bars of acacia-wood: five for the boards of the one side of the tabernacle,
english: And thou shalt make bars of acacia-wood: five for the boards of the one side of the tabernacle,

searchText: exodus 26:27 and five bars for the boards of the other side of the tabernacle, and five bars for the boards of the side of the tabernacle, for the hinder part westward;
english: and five bars for the boards of the other side of the tabernacle, and five bars for the boards of the side of the tabernacle, for the hinder part westward;

searchText: exodus 26:28 and the middle bar in the midst of the boards, which shall pass through from end to end.
english: and the middle bar in the midst of the boards, which shall pass through from end to end.

searchText: exodus 26:29 and thou shalt overlay the boards with gold, and make their rings of gold for holders for the bars; and thou shalt overlay the bars with gold.
english: And thou shalt overlay the boards with gold, and make their rings of gold for holders for the bars; and thou shalt overlay the bars with gold.

searchText: exodus 26:30 and thou shalt rear up the tabernacle according to the fashion thereof which hath been shown thee in the mount.
english: And thou shalt rear up the tabernacle according to the fashion thereof which hath been shown thee in the mount.

searchText: exodus 26:31 and thou shalt make a veil of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen; with cherubim the work of the skilful workman shall it be made.
english: And thou shalt make a veil of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen; with cherubim the work of the skilful workman shall it be made.

searchText: exodus 26:32 and thou shalt hang it upon four pillars of acacia overlaid with gold, their hooks being of gold, upon four sockets of silver.
english: And thou shalt hang it upon four pillars of acacia overlaid with gold, their hooks being of gold, upon four sockets of silver.

searchText: exodus 26:33 and thou shalt hang up the veil under the clasps, and shalt bring in thither within the veil the ark of the testimony; and the veil shall divide unto you between the holy place and the most holy.
english: And thou shalt hang up the veil under the clasps, and shalt bring in thither within the veil the ark of the testimony; and the veil shall divide unto you between the holy place and the most holy.

searchText: exodus 26:34 and thou shalt put the ark-cover upon the ark of the testimony in the most holy place.
english: And thou shalt put the ark-cover upon the ark of the testimony in the most holy place.

searchText: exodus 26:35 and thou shalt set the table without the veil, and the candlestick over against the table on the side of the tabernacle toward the south; and thou shalt put the table on the north side.
english: And thou shalt set the table without the veil, and the candlestick over against the table on the side of the tabernacle toward the south; and thou shalt put the table on the north side.

searchText: exodus 26:36 and thou shalt make a screen for the door of the tent, of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen, the work of the weaver in colours.
english: And thou shalt make a screen for the door of the Tent, of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen, the work of the weaver in colours.

searchText: exodus 26:37 and thou shalt make for the screen five pillars of acacia, and overlay them with gold; their hooks shall be of gold; and thou shalt cast five sockets of brass for them.
english: And thou shalt make for the screen five pillars of acacia, and overlay them with gold; their hooks shall be of gold; and thou shalt cast five sockets of brass for them.

searchText: exodus 27:1 and thou shalt make the altar of acacia-wood, five cubits long, and five cubits broad; the altar shall be four-square; and the height thereof shall be three cubits.
english: And thou shalt make the altar of acacia-wood, five cubits long, and five cubits broad; the altar shall be four-square; and the height thereof shall be three cubits.

searchText: exodus 27:2 and thou shalt make the horns of it upon the four corners thereof; the horns thereof shall be of one piece with it; and thou shalt overlay it with brass.
english: And thou shalt make the horns of it upon the four corners thereof; the horns thereof shall be of one piece with it; and thou shalt overlay it with brass.

searchText: exodus 27:3 and thou shalt make its pots to take away its ashes, and its shovels, and its basins, and its flesh-hooks, and its fire-pans; all the vessels thereof thou shalt make of brass.
english: And thou shalt make its pots to take away its ashes, and its shovels, and its basins, and its flesh-hooks, and its fire-pans; all the vessels thereof thou shalt make of brass.

searchText: exodus 27:4 and thou shalt make for it a grating of network of brass; and upon the net shalt thou make four brazen rings in the four corners thereof.
english: And thou shalt make for it a grating of network of brass; and upon the net shalt thou make four brazen rings in the four corners thereof.

searchText: exodus 27:5 and thou shalt put it under the ledge round the altar beneath, that the net may reach halfway up the altar.
english: And thou shalt put it under the ledge round the altar beneath, that the net may reach halfway up the altar.

searchText: exodus 27:6 and thou shalt make staves for the altar, staves of acacia-wood, and overlay them with brass.
english: And thou shalt make staves for the altar, staves of acacia-wood, and overlay them with brass.

searchText: exodus 27:7 and the staves thereof shall be put into the rings, and the staves shall be upon the two sides of the altar, in bearing it.
english: And the staves thereof shall be put into the rings, and the staves shall be upon the two sides of the altar, in bearing it.

searchText: exodus 27:8 hollow with planks shalt thou make it; as it hath been shown thee in the mount, so shall they make it.
english: Hollow with planks shalt thou make it; as it hath been shown thee in the mount, so shall they make it.

searchText: exodus 27:9 and thou shalt make the court of the tabernacle: for the south side southward there shall be hangings for the court of fine twined linen a hundred cubits long for one side.
english: And thou shalt make the court of the tabernacle: for the south side southward there shall be hangings for the court of fine twined linen a hundred cubits long for one side.

searchText: exodus 27:10 and the pillars thereof shall be twenty, and their sockets twenty, of brass; the hooks of the pillars and their fillets shall be of silver.
english: And the pillars thereof shall be twenty, and their sockets twenty, of brass; the hooks of the pillars and their fillets shall be of silver.

searchText: exodus 27:11 and likewise for the north side in length there shall be hangings a hundred cubits long, and the pillars thereof twenty, and their sockets twenty, of brass; the hooks of the pillars and their fillets of silver.
english: And likewise for the north side in length there shall be hangings a hundred cubits long, and the pillars thereof twenty, and their sockets twenty, of brass; the hooks of the pillars and their fillets of silver.

searchText: exodus 27:12 and for the breadth of the court on the west side shall be hangings of fifty cubits: their pillars ten, and their sockets ten.
english: And for the breadth of the court on the west side shall be hangings of fifty cubits: their pillars ten, and their sockets ten.

searchText: exodus 27:13 and the breadth of the court on the east side eastward shall be fifty cubits.
english: And the breadth of the court on the east side eastward shall be fifty cubits.

searchText: exodus 27:14 the hangings for the one side [of the gate] shall be fifteen cubits: their pillars three, and their sockets three.
english: The hangings for the one side [of the gate] shall be fifteen cubits: their pillars three, and their sockets three.

searchText: exodus 27:15 and for the other side shall be hangings of fifteen cubits: their pillars three, and their sockets three.
english: And for the other side shall be hangings of fifteen cubits: their pillars three, and their sockets three.

searchText: exodus 27:16 and for the gate of the court shall be a screen of twenty cubits, of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen, the work of the weaver in colours: their pillars four, and their sockets four.
english: And for the gate of the court shall be a screen of twenty cubits, of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen, the work of the weaver in colours: their pillars four, and their sockets four.

searchText: exodus 27:17 all the pillars of the court round about shall be filleted with silver; their hooks of silver, and their sockets of brass.
english: All the pillars of the court round about shall be filleted with silver; their hooks of silver, and their sockets of brass.

searchText: exodus 27:18 the length of the court shall be a hundred cubits, and the breadth fifty every where, and the height five cubits, of fine twined linen, and their sockets of brass.
english: The length of the court shall be a hundred cubits, and the breadth fifty every where, and the height five cubits, of fine twined linen, and their sockets of brass.

searchText: exodus 27:19 all the instruments of the tabernacle in all the service thereof, and all the pins thereof, and all the pins of the court, shall be of brass.
english: All the instruments of the tabernacle in all the service thereof, and all the pins thereof, and all the pins of the court, shall be of brass.

searchText: exodus 27:20 and thou shalt command the children of israel, that they bring unto thee pure olive oil beaten for the light, to cause a lamp to burn continually.
english: And thou shalt command the children of Israel, that they bring unto thee pure olive oil beaten for the light, to cause a lamp to burn continually.

searchText: exodus 27:21 in the tent of meeting, without the veil which is before the testimony, aaron and his sons shall set it in order, to burn from evening to morning before the lord; it shall be a statute for ever throughout their generations on the behalf of the children of israel.
english: In the tent of meeting, without the veil which is before the testimony, Aaron and his sons shall set it in order, to burn from evening to morning before the LORD; it shall be a statute for ever throughout their generations on the behalf of the children of Israel.

searchText: exodus 28:1 and bring thou near unto thee aaron thy brother, and his sons with him, from among the children of israel, that they may minister unto me in the priest’s office, even aaron, nadab and abihu, eleazar and ithamar, aaron’s sons.
english: And bring thou near unto thee Aaron thy brother, and his sons with him, from among the children of Israel, that they may minister unto Me in the priest’s office, even Aaron, Nadab and Abihu, Eleazar and Ithamar, Aaron’s sons.

searchText: exodus 28:2 and thou shalt make holy garments for aaron thy brother, for splendour and for beauty.
english: And thou shalt make holy garments for Aaron thy brother, for splendour and for beauty.

searchText: exodus 28:3 and thou shalt speak unto all that are wise-hearted, whom i have filled with the spirit of wisdom, that they make aaron’s garments to sanctify him, that he may minister unto me in the priest’s office.
english: And thou shalt speak unto all that are wise-hearted, whom I have filled with the spirit of wisdom, that they make Aaron’s garments to sanctify him, that he may minister unto Me in the priest’s office.

searchText: exodus 28:4 and these are the garments which they shall make: a breastplate, and an ephod, and a robe, and a tunic of chequer work, a mitre, and a girdle; and they shall make holy garments for aaron thy brother, and his sons, that he may minister unto me in the priest’s office.
english: And these are the garments which they shall make: a breastplate, and an ephod, and a robe, and a tunic of chequer work, a mitre, and a girdle; and they shall make holy garments for Aaron thy brother, and his sons, that he may minister unto Me in the priest’s office.

searchText: exodus 28:5 and they shall take the gold, and the blue, and the purple, and the scarlet, and the fine linen.
english: And they shall take the gold, and the blue, and the purple, and the scarlet, and the fine linen.

searchText: exodus 28:6 and they shall make the ephod of gold, of blue, and purple, scarlet, and fine twined linen, the work of the skilful workman.
english: And they shall make the ephod of gold, of blue, and purple, scarlet, and fine twined linen, the work of the skilful workman.

searchText: exodus 28:7 it shall have two shoulder-pieces joined to the two ends thereof, that it may be joined together.
english: It shall have two shoulder-pieces joined to the two ends thereof, that it may be joined together.

searchText: exodus 28:8 and the skilfully woven band, which is upon it, wherewith to gird it on, shall be like the work thereof and of the same piece: of gold, of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen.
english: And the skilfully woven band, which is upon it, wherewith to gird it on, shall be like the work thereof and of the same piece: of gold, of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen.

searchText: exodus 28:9 and thou shalt take two onyx stones, and grave on them the names of the children of israel:
english: And thou shalt take two onyx stones, and grave on them the names of the children of Israel:

searchText: exodus 28:10 six of their names on the one stone, and the names of the six that remain on the other stone, according to their birth.
english: six of their names on the one stone, and the names of the six that remain on the other stone, according to their birth.

searchText: exodus 28:11 with the work of an engraver in stone, like the engravings of a signet, shalt thou engrave the two stones, according to the names of the children of israel; thou shalt make them to be inclosed in settings of gold.
english: With the work of an engraver in stone, like the engravings of a signet, shalt thou engrave the two stones, according to the names of the children of Israel; thou shalt make them to be inclosed in settings of gold.

searchText: exodus 28:12 and thou shalt put the two stones upon the shoulder-pieces of the ephod, to be stones of memorial for the children of israel; and aaron shall bear their names before the lord upon his two shoulders for a memorial.
english: And thou shalt put the two stones upon the shoulder-pieces of the ephod, to be stones of memorial for the children of Israel; and Aaron shall bear their names before the LORD upon his two shoulders for a memorial.

searchText: exodus 28:13 and thou shalt make settings of gold;
english: And thou shalt make settings of gold;

searchText: exodus 28:14 and two chains of pure gold; of plaited thread shalt thou make them, of wreathen work; and thou shalt put the wreathen chains on the settings.
english: and two chains of pure gold; of plaited thread shalt thou make them, of wreathen work; and thou shalt put the wreathen chains on the settings.

searchText: exodus 28:15 and thou shalt make a breastplate of judgment, the work of the skilful workman; like the work of the ephod thou shalt make it: of gold, of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen, shalt thou make it.
english: And thou shalt make a breastplate of judgment, the work of the skilful workman; like the work of the ephod thou shalt make it: of gold, of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen, shalt thou make it.

searchText: exodus 28:16 four-square it shall be and double: a span shall be the length thereof, and a span the breadth thereof.
english: Four-square it shall be and double: a span shall be the length thereof, and a span the breadth thereof.

searchText: exodus 28:17 and thou shalt set in it settings of stones, four rows of stones: a row of carnelian, topaz, and smaragd shall be the first row;
english: And thou shalt set in it settings of stones, four rows of stones: a row of carnelian, topaz, and smaragd shall be the first row;

searchText: exodus 28:18 and the second row a carbuncle, a sapphire, and an emerald;
english: and the second row a carbuncle, a sapphire, and an emerald;

searchText: exodus 28:19 and the third row a jacinth, an agate, and an amethyst;
english: and the third row a jacinth, an agate, and an amethyst;

searchText: exodus 28:20 and the fourth row a beryl, and an onyx, and a jasper; they shall be inclosed in gold in their settings.
english: and the fourth row a beryl, and an onyx, and a jasper; they shall be inclosed in gold in their settings.

searchText: exodus 28:21 and the stones shall be according to the names of the children of israel, twelve, according to their names; like the engravings of a signet, every one according to his name, they shall be for the twelve tribes.
english: And the stones shall be according to the names of the children of Israel, twelve, according to their names; like the engravings of a signet, every one according to his name, they shall be for the twelve tribes.

searchText: exodus 28:22 and thou shalt make upon the breastplate plaited chains of wreathen work of pure gold.
english: And thou shalt make upon the breastplate plaited chains of wreathen work of pure gold.

searchText: exodus 28:23 and thou shalt make upon the breastplate two rings of gold, and shalt put the two rings on the two ends of the breastplate.
english: And thou shalt make upon the breastplate two rings of gold, and shalt put the two rings on the two ends of the breastplate.

searchText: exodus 28:24 and thou shalt put the two wreathen chains of gold on the two rings at the ends of the breastplate.
english: And thou shalt put the two wreathen chains of gold on the two rings at the ends of the breastplate.

searchText: exodus 28:25 and the other two ends of the two wreathen chains thou shalt put on the two settings, and put them on the shoulder-pieces of the ephod, in the forepart thereof.
english: And the other two ends of the two wreathen chains thou shalt put on the two settings, and put them on the shoulder-pieces of the ephod, in the forepart thereof.

searchText: exodus 28:26 and thou shalt make two rings of gold, and thou shalt put them upon the two ends of the breastplate, upon the edge thereof, which is toward the side of the ephod inward.
english: And thou shalt make two rings of gold, and thou shalt put them upon the two ends of the breastplate, upon the edge thereof, which is toward the side of the ephod inward.

searchText: exodus 28:27 and thou shalt make two rings of gold, and shalt put them on the two shoulder-pieces of the ephod underneath, in the forepart thereof, close by the coupling thereof, above the skilfully woven band of the ephod.
english: And thou shalt make two rings of gold, and shalt put them on the two shoulder-pieces of the ephod underneath, in the forepart thereof, close by the coupling thereof, above the skilfully woven band of the ephod.

searchText: exodus 28:28 and they shall bind the breastplate by the rings thereof unto the rings of the ephod with a thread of blue, that it may be upon the skilfully woven band of the ephod, and that the breastplate be not loosed from the ephod.
english: And they shall bind the breastplate by the rings thereof unto the rings of the ephod with a thread of blue, that it may be upon the skilfully woven band of the ephod, and that the breastplate be not loosed from the ephod.

searchText: exodus 28:29 and aaron shall bear the names of the children of israel in the breastplate of judgment upon his heart, when he goeth in unto the holy place, for a memorial before the lord continually. .
english: And Aaron shall bear the names of the children of Israel in the breastplate of judgment upon his heart, when he goeth in unto the holy place, for a memorial before the LORD continually. .

searchText: exodus 28:30 and thou shalt put in the breastplate of judgment the urim and the thummim; and they shall be upon aaron’s heart, when he goeth in before the lord; and aaron shall bear the judgment of the children of israel upon his heart before the lord continually.
english: And thou shalt put in the breastplate of judgment the Urim and the Thummim; and they shall be upon Aaron’s heart, when he goeth in before the LORD; and Aaron shall bear the judgment of the children of Israel upon his heart before the LORD continually.

searchText: exodus 28:31 and thou shalt make the robe of the ephod all of blue.
english: And thou shalt make the robe of the ephod all of blue.

searchText: exodus 28:32 and it shall have a hole for the head in the midst thereof; it shall have a binding of woven work round about the hole of it, as it were the hole of a coat of mail that it be not rent.
english: And it shall have a hole for the head in the midst thereof; it shall have a binding of woven work round about the hole of it, as it were the hole of a coat of mail that it be not rent.

searchText: exodus 28:33 and upon the skirts of it thou shalt make pomegranates of blue, and of purple, and of scarlet, round about the skirts thereof; and bells of gold between them round about:
english: And upon the skirts of it thou shalt make pomegranates of blue, and of purple, and of scarlet, round about the skirts thereof; and bells of gold between them round about:

searchText: exodus 28:34 a golden bell and a pomegranate, a golden bell and a pomegranate, upon the skirts of the robe round about.
english: a golden bell and a pomegranate, a golden bell and a pomegranate, upon the skirts of the robe round about.

searchText: exodus 28:35 and it shall be upon aaron to minister; and the sound thereof shall be heard when he goeth in unto the holy place before the lord, and when he cometh out, that he die not.
english: And it shall be upon Aaron to minister; and the sound thereof shall be heard when he goeth in unto the holy place before the LORD, and when he cometh out, that he die not.

searchText: exodus 28:36 and thou shalt make a plate of pure gold, and engrave upon it, like the engravings of a signet: holy to the lord.
english: And thou shalt make a plate of pure gold, and engrave upon it, like the engravings of a signet: HOLY TO THE LORD.

searchText: exodus 28:37 and thou shalt put it on a thread of blue, and it shall be upon the mitre; upon the forefront of the mitre it shall be.
english: And thou shalt put it on a thread of blue, and it shall be upon the mitre; upon the forefront of the mitre it shall be.

searchText: exodus 28:38 and it shall be upon aaron’s forehead, and aaron shall bear the iniquity committed in the holy things, which the children of israel shall hallow, even in all their holy gifts; and it shall be always upon his forehead, that they may be accepted before the lord.
english: And it shall be upon Aaron’s forehead, and Aaron shall bear the iniquity committed in the holy things, which the children of Israel shall hallow, even in all their holy gifts; and it shall be always upon his forehead, that they may be accepted before the LORD.

searchText: exodus 28:39 and thou shalt weave the tunic in chequer work of fine linen, and thou shalt make a mitre of fine linen, and thou shalt make a girdle, the work of the weaver in colours.
english: And thou shalt weave the tunic in chequer work of fine linen, and thou shalt make a mitre of fine linen, and thou shalt make a girdle, the work of the weaver in colours.

searchText: exodus 28:40 and for aaron’s sons thou shalt make tunics, and thou shalt make for them girdles, and head-tires shalt thou make for them, for splendour and for beauty.
english: And for Aaron’s sons thou shalt make tunics, and thou shalt make for them girdles, and head-tires shalt thou make for them, for splendour and for beauty.

searchText: exodus 28:41 and thou shalt put them upon aaron thy brother, and upon his sons with him; and shalt anoint them, and consecrate them, and sanctify them, that they may minister unto me in the priest’s office.
english: And thou shalt put them upon Aaron thy brother, and upon his sons with him; and shalt anoint them, and consecrate them, and sanctify them, that they may minister unto Me in the priest’s office.

searchText: exodus 28:42 and thou shalt make them linen breeches to cover the flesh of their nakedness; from the loins even unto the thighs they shall reach.
english: And thou shalt make them linen breeches to cover the flesh of their nakedness; from the loins even unto the thighs they shall reach.

searchText: exodus 28:43 and they shall be upon aaron, and upon his sons, when they go in unto the tent of meeting, or when they come near unto the altar to minister in the holy place; that they bear not iniquity, and die; it shall be a statute for ever unto him and unto his seed after him.
english: And they shall be upon Aaron, and upon his sons, when they go in unto the tent of meeting, or when they come near unto the altar to minister in the holy place; that they bear not iniquity, and die; it shall be a statute for ever unto him and unto his seed after him.

searchText: exodus 29:1 and this is the thing that thou shalt do unto them to hallow them, to minister unto me in the priest’s office: take one young bullock and two rams without blemish,
english: And this is the thing that thou shalt do unto them to hallow them, to minister unto Me in the priest’s office: take one young bullock and two rams without blemish,

searchText: exodus 29:2 and unleavened bread, and cakes unleavened mingled with oil, and wafers unleavened spread with oil; of fine wheaten flour shalt thou make them.
english: and unleavened bread, and cakes unleavened mingled with oil, and wafers unleavened spread with oil; of fine wheaten flour shalt thou make them.

searchText: exodus 29:3 and thou shalt put them into one basket, and bring them in the basket, with the bullock and the two rams.
english: And thou shalt put them into one basket, and bring them in the basket, with the bullock and the two rams.

searchText: exodus 29:4 and aaron and his sons thou shalt bring unto the door of the tent of meeting, and shalt wash them with water.
english: And Aaron and his sons thou shalt bring unto the door of the tent of meeting, and shalt wash them with water.

searchText: exodus 29:5 and thou shalt take the garments, and put upon aaron the tunic, and the robe of the ephod, and the ephod, and the breastplate, and gird him with the skilfully woven band of the ephod.
english: And thou shalt take the garments, and put upon Aaron the tunic, and the robe of the ephod, and the ephod, and the breastplate, and gird him with the skilfully woven band of the ephod.

searchText: exodus 29:6 and thou shalt set the mitre upon his head, and put the holy crown upon the mitre.
english: And thou shalt set the mitre upon his head, and put the holy crown upon the mitre.

searchText: exodus 29:7 then shalt thou take the anointing oil, and pour it upon his head, and anoint him.
english: Then shalt thou take the anointing oil, and pour it upon his head, and anoint him.

searchText: exodus 29:8 and thou shalt bring his sons, and put tunics upon them.
english: And thou shalt bring his sons, and put tunics upon them.

searchText: exodus 29:9 and thou shalt gird them with girdles, aaron and his sons, and bind head-tires on them; and they shall have the priesthood by a perpetual statute; and thou shalt consecrate aaron and his sons.
english: And thou shalt gird them with girdles, Aaron and his sons, and bind head-tires on them; and they shall have the priesthood by a perpetual statute; and thou shalt consecrate Aaron and his sons.

searchText: exodus 29:10 and thou shalt bring the bullock before the tent of meeting; and aaron and his sons shall lay their hands upon the head of the bullock.
english: And thou shalt bring the bullock before the tent of meeting; and Aaron and his sons shall lay their hands upon the head of the bullock.

searchText: exodus 29:11 and thou shalt kill the bullock before the lord, at the door of the tent of meeting.
english: And thou shalt kill the bullock before the LORD, at the door of the tent of meeting.

searchText: exodus 29:12 and thou shalt take of the blood of the bullock, and put it upon the horns of the altar with thy finger; and thou shalt pour out all the remaining blood at the base of the altar.
english: And thou shalt take of the blood of the bullock, and put it upon the horns of the altar with thy finger; and thou shalt pour out all the remaining blood at the base of the altar.

searchText: exodus 29:13 and thou shalt take all the fat that covereth the inwards, and the lobe above the liver, and the two kidneys, and the fat that is upon them, and make them smoke upon the altar.
english: And thou shalt take all the fat that covereth the inwards, and the lobe above the liver, and the two kidneys, and the fat that is upon them, and make them smoke upon the altar.

searchText: exodus 29:14 but the flesh of the bullock, and its skin, and its dung, shalt thou burn with fire without the camp; it is a sin-offering.
english: But the flesh of the bullock, and its skin, and its dung, shalt thou burn with fire without the camp; it is a sin-offering.

searchText: exodus 29:15 thou shalt also take the one ram; and aaron and his sons shall lay their hands upon the head of the ram.
english: Thou shalt also take the one ram; and Aaron and his sons shall lay their hands upon the head of the ram.

searchText: exodus 29:16 and thou shalt slay the ram, and thou shalt take its blood, and dash it round about against the altar.
english: And thou shalt slay the ram, and thou shalt take its blood, and dash it round about against the altar.

searchText: exodus 29:17 and thou shalt cut the ram into its pieces, and wash its inwards, and its legs, and put them with its pieces, and with its head.
english: And thou shalt cut the ram into its pieces, and wash its inwards, and its legs, and put them with its pieces, and with its head.

searchText: exodus 29:18 and thou shalt make the whole ram smoke upon the altar; it is a burnt-offering unto the lord; it is a sweet savour, an offering made by fire unto the lord.
english: And thou shalt make the whole ram smoke upon the altar; it is a burnt-offering unto the LORD; it is a sweet savour, an offering made by fire unto the LORD.

searchText: exodus 29:19 and thou shalt take the other ram; and aaron and his sons shall lay their hands upon the head of the ram.
english: And thou shalt take the other ram; and Aaron and his sons shall lay their hands upon the head of the ram.

searchText: exodus 29:20 then shalt thou kill the ram, and take of its blood, and put it upon the tip of the right ear of aaron, and upon the tip of the right ear of his sons, and upon the thumb of their right hand, and upon the great toe of their right foot, and dash the blood against the altar round about.
english: Then shalt thou kill the ram, and take of its blood, and put it upon the tip of the right ear of Aaron, and upon the tip of the right ear of his sons, and upon the thumb of their right hand, and upon the great toe of their right foot, and dash the blood against the altar round about.

searchText: exodus 29:21 and thou shalt take of the blood that is upon the altar, and of the anointing oil, and sprinkle it upon aaron, and upon his garments, and upon his sons, and upon the garments of his sons with him; and he and his garments shall be hallowed, and his sons and his sons’garments with him.
english: And thou shalt take of the blood that is upon the altar, and of the anointing oil, and sprinkle it upon Aaron, and upon his garments, and upon his sons, and upon the garments of his sons with him; and he and his garments shall be hallowed, and his sons and his sons’garments with him.

searchText: exodus 29:22 also thou shalt take of the ram the fat, and the fat tail, and the fat that covereth the inwards, and the lobe of the liver, and the two kidneys, and the fat that is upon them, and the right thigh; for it is a ram of consecration;
english: Also thou shalt take of the ram the fat, and the fat tail, and the fat that covereth the inwards, and the lobe of the liver, and the two kidneys, and the fat that is upon them, and the right thigh; for it is a ram of consecration;

searchText: exodus 29:23 and one loaf of bread, and one cake of oiled bread, and one wafer, out of the basket of unleavened bread that is before the lord.
english: and one loaf of bread, and one cake of oiled bread, and one wafer, out of the basket of unleavened bread that is before the LORD.

searchText: exodus 29:24 and thou shalt put the whole upon the hands of aaron, and upon the hands of his sons; and shalt wave them for a wave-offering before the lord.
english: And thou shalt put the whole upon the hands of Aaron, and upon the hands of his sons; and shalt wave them for a wave-offering before the LORD.

searchText: exodus 29:25 and thou shalt take them from their hands, and make them smoke on the altar upon the burnt-offering, for a sweet savour before the lord; it is an offering made by fire unto the lord.
english: And thou shalt take them from their hands, and make them smoke on the altar upon the burnt-offering, for a sweet savour before the LORD; it is an offering made by fire unto the LORD.

searchText: exodus 29:26 and thou shalt take the breast of aaron’s ram of consecration, and wave it for a wave-offering before the lord; and it shall be thy portion.
english: And thou shalt take the breast of Aaron’s ram of consecration, and wave it for a wave-offering before the LORD; and it shall be thy portion.

searchText: exodus 29:27 and thou shalt sanctify the breast of the wave-offering, and the thigh of the heave-offering, which is waved, and which is heaved up, of the ram of consecration, even of that which is aaron’s, and of that which is his sons’.
english: And thou shalt sanctify the breast of the wave-offering, and the thigh of the heave-offering, which is waved, and which is heaved up, of the ram of consecration, even of that which is Aaron’s, and of that which is his sons’.

searchText: exodus 29:28 and it shall be for aaron and his sons as a due for ever from the children of israel; for it is a heave-offering; and it shall be a heave-offering from the children of israel of their sacrifices of peace-offerings, even their heave-offering unto the lord.
english: And it shall be for Aaron and his sons as a due for ever from the children of Israel; for it is a heave-offering; and it shall be a heave-offering from the children of Israel of their sacrifices of peace-offerings, even their heave-offering unto the LORD.

searchText: exodus 29:29 and the holy garments of aaron shall be for his sons after him, to be anointed in them, and to be consecrated in them.
english: And the holy garments of Aaron shall be for his sons after him, to be anointed in them, and to be consecrated in them.

searchText: exodus 29:30 seven days shall the son that is priest in his stead put them on, even he who cometh into the tent of meeting to minister in the holy place.
english: Seven days shall the son that is priest in his stead put them on, even he who cometh into the tent of meeting to minister in the holy place.

searchText: exodus 29:31 and thou shalt take the ram of consecration, and seethe its flesh in a holy place.
english: And thou shalt take the ram of consecration, and seethe its flesh in a holy place.

searchText: exodus 29:32 and aaron and his sons shall eat the flesh of the ram, and the bread that is in the basket, at the door of the tent of meeting.
english: And Aaron and his sons shall eat the flesh of the ram, and the bread that is in the basket, at the door of the tent of meeting.

searchText: exodus 29:33 and they shall eat those things wherewith atonement was made, to consecrate and to sanctify them; but a stranger shall not eat thereof, because they are holy.
english: And they shall eat those things wherewith atonement was made, to consecrate and to sanctify them; but a stranger shall not eat thereof, because they are holy.

searchText: exodus 29:34 and if aught of the flesh of the consecration, or of the bread, remain unto the morning, then thou shalt burn the remainder with fire; it shall not be eaten, because it is holy.
english: And if aught of the flesh of the consecration, or of the bread, remain unto the morning, then thou shalt burn the remainder with fire; it shall not be eaten, because it is holy.

searchText: exodus 29:35 and thus shalt thou do unto aaron, and to his sons, according to all that i have commanded thee; seven days shalt thou consecrate them.
english: And thus shalt thou do unto Aaron, and to his sons, according to all that I have commanded thee; seven days shalt thou consecrate them.

searchText: exodus 29:36 and every day shalt thou offer the bullock of sin-offering, beside the other offerings of atonement; and thou shalt do the purification upon the altar when thou makest atonement for it; and thou shalt anoint it, to sanctify it.
english: And every day shalt thou offer the bullock of sin-offering, beside the other offerings of atonement; and thou shalt do the purification upon the altar when thou makest atonement for it; and thou shalt anoint it, to sanctify it.

searchText: exodus 29:37 seven days thou shalt make atonement for the altar, and sanctify it; thus shall the altar be most holy; whatsoever toucheth the altar shall be holy.
english: Seven days thou shalt make atonement for the altar, and sanctify it; thus shall the altar be most holy; whatsoever toucheth the altar shall be holy.

searchText: exodus 29:38 now this is that which thou shalt offer upon the altar: two lambs of the first year day by day continually.
english: Now this is that which thou shalt offer upon the altar: two lambs of the first year day by day continually.

searchText: exodus 29:39 the one lamb thou shalt offer in the morning; and the other lamb thou shalt offer at dusk.
english: The one lamb thou shalt offer in the morning; and the other lamb thou shalt offer at dusk.
