searchText: exodus 29:40 and with the one lamb a tenth part of an ephah of fine flour mingled with the fourth part of a hin of beaten oil; and the fourth part of a hin of wine for a drink-offering.
english: And with the one lamb a tenth part of an ephah of fine flour mingled with the fourth part of a hin of beaten oil; and the fourth part of a hin of wine for a drink-offering.

searchText: exodus 29:41 and the other lamb thou shalt offer at dusk, and shalt do thereto according to the meal-offering of the morning, and according to the drink-offering thereof, for a sweet savour, an offering made by fire unto the lord.
english: And the other lamb thou shalt offer at dusk, and shalt do thereto according to the meal-offering of the morning, and according to the drink-offering thereof, for a sweet savour, an offering made by fire unto the LORD.

searchText: exodus 29:42 it shall be a continual burnt-offering throughout your generations at the door of the tent of meeting before the lord, where i will meet with you, to speak there unto thee.
english: It shall be a continual burnt-offering throughout your generations at the door of the tent of meeting before the LORD, where I will meet with you, to speak there unto thee.

searchText: exodus 29:43 and there i will meet with the children of israel; and [the tent] shall be sanctified by my glory.
english: And there I will meet with the children of Israel; and [the Tent] shall be sanctified by My glory.

searchText: exodus 29:44 and i will sanctify the tent of meeting, and the altar; aaron also and his sons will i sanctify, to minister to me in the priest’s office.
english: And I will sanctify the tent of meeting, and the altar; Aaron also and his sons will I sanctify, to minister to Me in the priest’s office.

searchText: exodus 29:45 and i will dwell among the children of israel, and will be their god.
english: And I will dwell among the children of Israel, and will be their God.

searchText: exodus 29:46 and they shall know that i am the lord their god, that brought them forth out of the land of egypt, that i may dwell among them. i am the lord their god.
english: And they shall know that I am the LORD their God, that brought them forth out of the land of Egypt, that I may dwell among them. I am the LORD their God.

searchText: exodus 30:1 and thou shalt make an altar to burn incense upon; of acacia-wood shalt thou make it.
english: And thou shalt make an altar to burn incense upon; of acacia-wood shalt thou make it.

searchText: exodus 30:2 a cubit shall be the length thereof, and a cubit the breadth thereof; foursquare shall it be; and two cubits shall be the height thereof; the horns thereof shall be of one piece with it.
english: A cubit shall be the length thereof, and a cubit the breadth thereof; foursquare shall it be; and two cubits shall be the height thereof; the horns thereof shall be of one piece with it.

searchText: exodus 30:3 and thou shalt overlay it with pure gold, the top thereof, and the sides thereof round about, and the horns thereof; and thou shalt make unto it a crown of gold round about.
english: And thou shalt overlay it with pure gold, the top thereof, and the sides thereof round about, and the horns thereof; and thou shalt make unto it a crown of gold round about.

searchText: exodus 30:4 and two golden rings shalt thou make for it under the crown thereof, upon the two ribs thereof, upon the two sides of it shalt thou make them; and they shall be for places for staves wherewith to bear it.
english: And two golden rings shalt thou make for it under the crown thereof, upon the two ribs thereof, upon the two sides of it shalt thou make them; and they shall be for places for staves wherewith to bear it.

searchText: exodus 30:5 and thou shalt make the staves of acacia-wood, and overlay them with gold.
english: And thou shalt make the staves of acacia-wood, and overlay them with gold.

searchText: exodus 30:6 and thou shalt put it before the veil that is by the ark of the testimony, before the ark-cover that is over the testimony, where i will meet with thee.
english: And thou shalt put it before the veil that is by the ark of the testimony, before the ark-cover that is over the testimony, where I will meet with thee.

searchText: exodus 30:7 and aaron shall burn thereon incense of sweet spices; every morning, when he dresseth the lamps, he shall burn it.
english: And Aaron shall burn thereon incense of sweet spices; every morning, when he dresseth the lamps, he shall burn it.

searchText: exodus 30:8 and when aaron lighteth the lamps at dusk, he shall burn it, a perpetual incense before the lord throughout your generations.
english: And when Aaron lighteth the lamps at dusk, he shall burn it, a perpetual incense before the LORD throughout your generations.

searchText: exodus 30:9 ye shall offer no strange incense thereon, nor burnt-offering, nor meal-offering; and ye shall pour no drink-offering thereon.
english: Ye shall offer no strange incense thereon, nor burnt-offering, nor meal-offering; and ye shall pour no drink-offering thereon.

searchText: exodus 30:10 and aaron shall make atonement upon the horns of it once in the year; with the blood of the sin-offering of atonement once in the year shall he make atonement for it throughout your generations; it is most holy unto the lord.’
english: And Aaron shall make atonement upon the horns of it once in the year; with the blood of the sin-offering of atonement once in the year shall he make atonement for it throughout your generations; it is most holy unto the LORD.’

searchText: exodus 30:11 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: exodus 30:12 ’when thou takest the sum of the children of israel, according to their number, then shall they give every man a ransom for his soul unto the lord, when thou numberest them; that there be no plague among them, when thou numberest them.
english: ’When thou takest the sum of the children of Israel, according to their number, then shall they give every man a ransom for his soul unto the LORD, when thou numberest them; that there be no plague among them, when thou numberest them.

searchText: exodus 30:13 this they shall give, every one that passeth among them that are numbered, half a shekel after the shekel of the sanctuary—the shekel is twenty gerahs—half a shekel for an offering to the lord.
english: This they shall give, every one that passeth among them that are numbered, half a shekel after the shekel of the sanctuary—the shekel is twenty gerahs—half a shekel for an offering to the LORD.

searchText: exodus 30:14 every one that passeth among them that are numbered, from twenty years old and upward, shall give the offering of the lord.
english: Every one that passeth among them that are numbered, from twenty years old and upward, shall give the offering of the LORD.

searchText: exodus 30:15 the rich shall not give more, and the poor shall not give less, than the half shekel, when they give the offering of the lord, to make atonement for your souls.
english: The rich shall not give more, and the poor shall not give less, than the half shekel, when they give the offering of the LORD, to make atonement for your souls.

searchText: exodus 30:16 and thou shalt take the atonement money from the children of israel, and shalt appoint it for the service of the tent of meeting, that it may be a memorial for the children of israel before the lord, to make atonement for your souls.’
english: And thou shalt take the atonement money from the children of Israel, and shalt appoint it for the service of the tent of meeting, that it may be a memorial for the children of Israel before the LORD, to make atonement for your souls.’

searchText: exodus 30:17 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: exodus 30:18 ’thou shalt also make a laver of brass, and the base thereof of brass, whereat to wash; and thou shalt put it between the tent of meeting and the altar, and thou shalt put water therein.
english: ’Thou shalt also make a laver of brass, and the base thereof of brass, whereat to wash; and thou shalt put it between the tent of meeting and the altar, and thou shalt put water therein.

searchText: exodus 30:19 and aaron and his sons shall wash their hands and their feet thereat;
english: And Aaron and his sons shall wash their hands and their feet thereat;

searchText: exodus 30:20 when they go into the tent of meeting, they shall wash with water, that they die not; or when they come near to the altar to minister, to cause an offering made by fire to smoke unto the lord;
english: when they go into the tent of meeting, they shall wash with water, that they die not; or when they come near to the altar to minister, to cause an offering made by fire to smoke unto the LORD;

searchText: exodus 30:21 so they shall wash their hands and their feet, that they die not; and it shall be a statute for ever to them, even to him and to his seed throughout their generations.’
english: so they shall wash their hands and their feet, that they die not; and it shall be a statute for ever to them, even to him and to his seed throughout their generations.’

searchText: exodus 30:22 moreover the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: Moreover the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: exodus 30:23 ’take thou also unto thee the chief spices, of flowing myrrh five hundred shekels, and of sweet cinnamon half so much, even two hundred and fifty, and of sweet calamus two hundred and fifty,
english: ’Take thou also unto thee the chief spices, of flowing myrrh five hundred shekels, and of sweet cinnamon half so much, even two hundred and fifty, and of sweet calamus two hundred and fifty,

searchText: exodus 30:24 and of cassia five hundred, after the shekel of the sanctuary, and of olive oil a hin.
english: and of cassia five hundred, after the shekel of the sanctuary, and of olive oil a hin.

searchText: exodus 30:25 and thou shalt make it a holy anointing oil, a perfume compounded after the art of the perfumer; it shall be a holy anointing oil.
english: And thou shalt make it a holy anointing oil, a perfume compounded after the art of the perfumer; it shall be a holy anointing oil.

searchText: exodus 30:26 and thou shalt anoint therewith the tent of meeting, and the ark of the testimony,
english: And thou shalt anoint therewith the tent of meeting, and the ark of the testimony,

searchText: exodus 30:27 and the table and all the vessels thereof, and the candlestick and the vessels thereof, and the altar of incense,
english: and the table and all the vessels thereof, and the candlestick and the vessels thereof, and the altar of incense,

searchText: exodus 30:28 and the altar of burnt-offering with all the vessels thereof, and the laver and the base thereof.
english: and the altar of burnt-offering with all the vessels thereof, and the laver and the base thereof.

searchText: exodus 30:29 and thou shalt sanctify them, that they may be most holy; whatsoever toucheth them shall be holy.
english: And thou shalt sanctify them, that they may be most holy; whatsoever toucheth them shall be holy.

searchText: exodus 30:30 and thou shalt anoint aaron and his sons, and sanctify them, that they may minister unto me in the priest’s office.
english: And thou shalt anoint Aaron and his sons, and sanctify them, that they may minister unto Me in the priest’s office.

searchText: exodus 30:31 and thou shalt speak unto the children of israel, saying: this shall be a holy anointing oil unto me throughout your generations.
english: And thou shalt speak unto the children of Israel, saying: This shall be a holy anointing oil unto Me throughout your generations.

searchText: exodus 30:32 upon the flesh of man shall it not be poured, neither shall ye make any like it, according to the composition thereof; it is holy, and it shall be holy unto you.
english: Upon the flesh of man shall it not be poured, neither shall ye make any like it, according to the composition thereof; it is holy, and it shall be holy unto you.

searchText: exodus 30:33 whosoever compoundeth any like it, or whosoever putteth any of it upon a stranger, he shall be cut off from his people.’
english: Whosoever compoundeth any like it, or whosoever putteth any of it upon a stranger, he shall be cut off from his people.’

searchText: exodus 30:34 and the lord said unto moses: ‘take unto thee sweet spices, stacte, and onycha, and galbanum; sweet spices with pure frankincense; of each shall there be a like weight.
english: And the LORD said unto Moses: ‘Take unto thee sweet spices, stacte, and onycha, and galbanum; sweet spices with pure frankincense; of each shall there be a like weight.

searchText: exodus 30:35 and thou shalt make of it incense, a perfume after the art of the perfumer, seasoned with salt, pure and holy.
english: And thou shalt make of it incense, a perfume after the art of the perfumer, seasoned with salt, pure and holy.

searchText: exodus 30:36 and thou shalt beat some of it very small, and put of it before the testimony in the tent of meeting, where i will meet with thee; it shall be unto you most holy. .
english: And thou shalt beat some of it very small, and put of it before the testimony in the tent of meeting, where I will meet with thee; it shall be unto you most holy. .

searchText: exodus 30:37 and the incense which thou shalt make, according to the composition thereof ye shall not make for yourselves; it shall be unto thee holy for the lord.
english: And the incense which thou shalt make, according to the composition thereof ye shall not make for yourselves; it shall be unto thee holy for the LORD.

searchText: exodus 30:38 whosoever shall make like unto that, to smell thereof, he shall be cut off from his people.’
english: Whosoever shall make like unto that, to smell thereof, he shall be cut off from his people.’

searchText: exodus 31:1 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: exodus 31:2 ’see, i have called by name bezalel the son of uri, the son of hur, of the tribe of judah;
english: ’See, I have called by name Bezalel the son of Uri, the son of Hur, of the tribe of Judah;

searchText: exodus 31:3 and i have filled him with the spirit of god, in wisdom, and in understanding, and in knowledge, and in all manner of workmanship,
english: and I have filled him with the spirit of God, in wisdom, and in understanding, and in knowledge, and in all manner of workmanship,

searchText: exodus 31:4 to devise skilful works, to work in gold, and in silver, and in brass,
english: to devise skilful works, to work in gold, and in silver, and in brass,

searchText: exodus 31:5 and in cutting of stones for setting, and in carving of wood, to work in all manner of workmanship.
english: and in cutting of stones for setting, and in carving of wood, to work in all manner of workmanship.

searchText: exodus 31:6 and i, behold, i have appointed with him oholiab, the son of ahisamach, of the tribe of dan; and in the hearts of all that are wise-hearted i have put wisdom, that they may make all that i have commanded thee:
english: And I, behold, I have appointed with him Oholiab, the son of Ahisamach, of the tribe of Dan; and in the hearts of all that are wise-hearted I have put wisdom, that they may make all that I have commanded thee:

searchText: exodus 31:7 the tent of meeting, and the ark of the testimony, and the ark-cover that is thereupon, and all the furniture of the tent;
english: the tent of meeting, and the ark of the testimony, and the ark-cover that is thereupon, and all the furniture of the Tent;

searchText: exodus 31:8 and the table and its vessels, and the pure candlestick with all its vessels, and the altar of incense;
english: and the table and its vessels, and the pure candlestick with all its vessels, and the altar of incense;

searchText: exodus 31:9 and the altar of burnt-offering with all its vessels, and the laver and its base;
english: and the altar of burnt-offering with all its vessels, and the laver and its base;

searchText: exodus 31:10 and the plaited garments, and the holy garments for aaron the priest, and the garments of his sons, to minister in the priest’s office;
english: and the plaited garments, and the holy garments for Aaron the priest, and the garments of his sons, to minister in the priest’s office;

searchText: exodus 31:11 and the anointing oil, and the incense of sweet spices for the holy place; according to all that i have commanded thee shall they do.’
english: and the anointing oil, and the incense of sweet spices for the holy place; according to all that I have commanded thee shall they do.’

searchText: exodus 31:12 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: exodus 31:13 ’speak thou also unto the children of israel, saying: verily ye shall keep my sabbaths, for it is a sign between me and you throughout your generations, that ye may know that i am the lord who sanctify you.
english: ’Speak thou also unto the children of Israel, saying: Verily ye shall keep My sabbaths, for it is a sign between Me and you throughout your generations, that ye may know that I am the LORD who sanctify you.

searchText: exodus 31:14 ye shall keep the sabbath therefore, for it is holy unto you; every one that profaneth it shall surely be put to death; for whosoever doeth any work therein, that soul shall be cut off from among his people.
english: Ye shall keep the sabbath therefore, for it is holy unto you; every one that profaneth it shall surely be put to death; for whosoever doeth any work therein, that soul shall be cut off from among his people.

searchText: exodus 31:15 six days shall work be done; but on the seventh day is a sabbath of solemn rest, holy to the lord; whosoever doeth any work in the sabbath day, he shall surely be put to death.
english: Six days shall work be done; but on the seventh day is a sabbath of solemn rest, holy to the LORD; whosoever doeth any work in the sabbath day, he shall surely be put to death.

searchText: exodus 31:16 wherefore the children of israel shall keep the sabbath, to observe the sabbath throughout their generations, for a perpetual covenant.
english: Wherefore the children of Israel shall keep the sabbath, to observe the sabbath throughout their generations, for a perpetual covenant.

searchText: exodus 31:17 it is a sign between me and the children of israel for ever; for in six days the lord made heaven and earth, and on the seventh day he ceased from work and rested.’
english: It is a sign between Me and the children of Israel for ever; for in six days the LORD made heaven and earth, and on the seventh day He ceased from work and rested.’

searchText: exodus 31:18 and he gave unto moses, when he had made an end of speaking with him upon mount sinai, the two tables of the testimony, tables of stone, written with the finger of god.
english: And He gave unto Moses, when He had made an end of speaking with him upon mount Sinai, the two tables of the testimony, tables of stone, written with the finger of God.

searchText: exodus 32:1 and when the people saw that moses delayed to come down from the mount, the people gathered themselves together unto aaron, and said unto him: ‘up, make us a god who shall go before us; for as for this moses, the man that brought us up out of the land of egypt, we know not what is become of him.’
english: And when the people saw that Moses delayed to come down from the mount, the people gathered themselves together unto Aaron, and said unto him: ‘Up, make us a god who shall go before us; for as for this Moses, the man that brought us up out of the land of Egypt, we know not what is become of him.’

searchText: exodus 32:2 and aaron said unto them: ‘break off the golden rings, which are in the ears of your wives, of your sons, and of your daughters, and bring them unto me.’
english: And Aaron said unto them: ‘Break off the golden rings, which are in the ears of your wives, of your sons, and of your daughters, and bring them unto me.’

searchText: exodus 32:3 and all the people broke off the golden rings which were in their ears, and brought them unto aaron.
english: And all the people broke off the golden rings which were in their ears, and brought them unto Aaron.

searchText: exodus 32:4 and he received it at their hand, and fashioned it with a graving tool, and made it a molten calf; and they said: ‘this is thy god, o israel, which brought thee up out of the land of egypt.’
english: And he received it at their hand, and fashioned it with a graving tool, and made it a molten calf; and they said: ‘This is thy god, O Israel, which brought thee up out of the land of Egypt.’

searchText: exodus 32:5 and when aaron saw this, he built an altar before it; and aaron made proclamation, and said: ‘to-morrow shall be a feast to the lord.’
english: And when Aaron saw this, he built an altar before it; and Aaron made proclamation, and said: ‘To-morrow shall be a feast to the LORD.’

searchText: exodus 32:6 and they rose up early on the morrow, and offered burnt-offerings, and brought peace-offerings; and the people sat down to eat and to drink, and rose up to make merry.
english: And they rose up early on the morrow, and offered burnt-offerings, and brought peace-offerings; and the people sat down to eat and to drink, and rose up to make merry.

searchText: exodus 32:7 and the lord spoke unto moses: ‘go, get thee down; for thy people, that thou broughtest up out of the land of egypt, have dealt corruptly;
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses: ‘Go, get thee down; for thy people, that thou broughtest up out of the land of Egypt, have dealt corruptly;

searchText: exodus 32:8 they have turned aside quickly out of the way which i commanded them; they have made them a molten calf, and have worshipped it, and have sacrificed unto it, and said: this is thy god, o israel, which brought thee up out of the land of egypt.’
english: they have turned aside quickly out of the way which I commanded them; they have made them a molten calf, and have worshipped it, and have sacrificed unto it, and said: This is thy god, O Israel, which brought thee up out of the land of Egypt.’

searchText: exodus 32:9 and the lord said unto moses: ‘i have seen this people, and, behold, it is a stiffnecked people.
english: And the LORD said unto Moses: ‘I have seen this people, and, behold, it is a stiffnecked people.

searchText: exodus 32:10 now therefore let me alone, that my wrath may wax hot against them, and that i may consume them; and i will make of thee a great nation.’
english: Now therefore let Me alone, that My wrath may wax hot against them, and that I may consume them; and I will make of thee a great nation.’

searchText: exodus 32:11 and moses besought the lord his god, and said: ‘lord, why doth thy wrath wax hot against thy people, that thou hast brought forth out of the land of egypt with great power and with a mighty hand?
english: And Moses besought the LORD his God, and said: ‘LORD, why doth Thy wrath wax hot against Thy people, that Thou hast brought forth out of the land of Egypt with great power and with a mighty hand?

searchText: exodus 32:12 wherefore should the egyptians speak, saying: for evil did he bring them forth, to slay them in the mountains, and to consume them from the face of the earth? turn from thy fierce wrath, and repent of this evil against thy people.
english: Wherefore should the Egyptians speak, saying: For evil did He bring them forth, to slay them in the mountains, and to consume them from the face of the earth? Turn from Thy fierce wrath, and repent of this evil against Thy people.

searchText: exodus 32:13 remember abraham, isaac, and israel, thy servants, to whom thou didst swear by thine own self, and saidst unto them: i will multiply your seed as the stars of heaven, and all this land that i have spoken of will i give unto your seed, and they shall inherit it for ever.’
english: Remember Abraham, Isaac, and Israel, Thy servants, to whom Thou didst swear by Thine own self, and saidst unto them: I will multiply your seed as the stars of heaven, and all this land that I have spoken of will I give unto your seed, and they shall inherit it for ever.’

searchText: exodus 32:14 and the lord repented of the evil which he said he would do unto his people.
english: And the LORD repented of the evil which He said He would do unto His people.

searchText: exodus 32:15 and moses turned, and went down from the mount, with the two tables of the testimony in his hand; tables that were written on both their sides; on the one side and on the other were they written.
english: And Moses turned, and went down from the mount, with the two tables of the testimony in his hand; tables that were written on both their sides; on the one side and on the other were they written.

searchText: exodus 32:16 and the tables were the work of god, and the writing was the writing of god, graven upon the tables.
english: And the tables were the work of God, and the writing was the writing of God, graven upon the tables.

searchText: exodus 32:17 and when joshua heard the noise of the people as they shouted, he said unto moses: ‘there is a noise of war in the camp.’
english: And when Joshua heard the noise of the people as they shouted, he said unto Moses: ‘There is a noise of war in the camp.’

searchText: exodus 32:18 and he said: ‘it is not the voice of them that shout for mastery, neither is it the voice of them that cry for being overcome, but the noise of them that sing do i hear.’
english: And he said: ‘It is not the voice of them that shout for mastery, neither is it the voice of them that cry for being overcome, but the noise of them that sing do I hear.’

searchText: exodus 32:19 and it came to pass, as soon as he came nigh unto the camp, that he saw the calf and the dancing; and moses’anger waxed hot, and he cast the tables out of his hands, and broke them beneath the mount.
english: And it came to pass, as soon as he came nigh unto the camp, that he saw the calf and the dancing; and Moses’anger waxed hot, and he cast the tables out of his hands, and broke them beneath the mount.

searchText: exodus 32:20 and he took the calf which they had made, and burnt it with fire, and ground it to powder, and strewed it upon the water, and made the children of israel drink of it.
english: And he took the calf which they had made, and burnt it with fire, and ground it to powder, and strewed it upon the water, and made the children of Israel drink of it.

searchText: exodus 32:21 and moses said unto aaron: ‘what did this people unto thee, that thou hast brought a great sin upon them?’
english: And Moses said unto Aaron: ‘What did this people unto thee, that thou hast brought a great sin upon them?’

searchText: exodus 32:22 and aaron said: ‘let not the anger of my lord wax hot; thou knowest the people, that they are set on evil.
english: And Aaron said: ‘Let not the anger of my lord wax hot; thou knowest the people, that they are set on evil.

searchText: exodus 32:23 so they said unto me: make us a god, which shall go before us; for as for this moses, the man that brought us up out of the land of egypt, we know not what is become of him.
english: So they said unto me: Make us a god, which shall go before us; for as for this Moses, the man that brought us up out of the land of Egypt, we know not what is become of him.

searchText: exodus 32:24 and i said unto them: whosoever hath any gold, let them break it off; so they gave it me; and i cast it into the fire, and there came out this calf.’
english: And I said unto them: Whosoever hath any gold, let them break it off; so they gave it me; and I cast it into the fire, and there came out this calf.’

searchText: exodus 32:25 and when moses saw that the people were broken loose—for aaron had let them loose for a derision among their enemies—
english: And when Moses saw that the people were broken loose—for Aaron had let them loose for a derision among their enemies—

searchText: exodus 32:26 then moses stood in the gate of the camp, and said: ‘whoso is on the lord’s side, let him come unto me.’ and all the sons of levi gathered themselves together unto him.
english: then Moses stood in the gate of the camp, and said: ‘Whoso is on the LORD’S side, let him come unto me.’ And all the sons of Levi gathered themselves together unto him.

searchText: exodus 32:27 and he said unto them: ‘thus saith the lord, the god of israel: put ye every man his sword upon his thigh, and go to and fro from gate to gate throughout the camp, and slay every man his brother, and every man his companion, and every man his neighbour.’
english: And he said unto them: ‘Thus saith the LORD, the God of Israel: Put ye every man his sword upon his thigh, and go to and fro from gate to gate throughout the camp, and slay every man his brother, and every man his companion, and every man his neighbour.’

searchText: exodus 32:28 and the sons of levi did according to the word of moses; and there fell of the people that day about three thousand men.
english: And the sons of Levi did according to the word of Moses; and there fell of the people that day about three thousand men.

searchText: exodus 32:29 and moses said: ‘consecrate yourselves to-day to the lord, for every man hath been against his son and against his brother; that he may also bestow upon you a blessing this day.’
english: And Moses said: ‘Consecrate yourselves to-day to the LORD, for every man hath been against his son and against his brother; that He may also bestow upon you a blessing this day.’

searchText: exodus 32:30 and it came to pass on the morrow, that moses said unto the people: ‘ye have sinned a great sin; and now i will go up unto the lord, peradventure i shall make atonement for your sin.’
english: And it came to pass on the morrow, that Moses said unto the people: ‘Ye have sinned a great sin; and now I will go up unto the LORD, peradventure I shall make atonement for your sin.’

searchText: exodus 32:31 and moses returned unto the lord, and said: ‘oh, this people have sinned a great sin, and have made them a god of gold.
english: And Moses returned unto the LORD, and said: ‘Oh, this people have sinned a great sin, and have made them a god of gold.

searchText: exodus 32:32 yet now, if thou wilt forgive their sin—; and if not, blot me, i pray thee, out of thy book which thou hast written.’
english: Yet now, if Thou wilt forgive their sin—; and if not, blot me, I pray Thee, out of Thy book which Thou hast written.’

searchText: exodus 32:33 and the lord said unto moses: ‘whosoever hath sinned against me, him will i blot out of my book.
english: And the LORD said unto Moses: ‘Whosoever hath sinned against Me, him will I blot out of My book.

searchText: exodus 32:34 and now go, lead the people unto the place of which i have spoken unto thee; behold, mine angel shall go before thee; nevertheless in the day when i visit, i will visit their sin upon them.’
english: And now go, lead the people unto the place of which I have spoken unto thee; behold, Mine angel shall go before thee; nevertheless in the day when I visit, I will visit their sin upon them.’

searchText: exodus 32:35 and the lord smote the people, because they made the calf, which aaron made.
english: And the LORD smote the people, because they made the calf, which Aaron made.

searchText: exodus 33:1 and the lord spoke unto moses: ‘depart, go up hence, thou and the people that thou hast brought up out of the land of egypt, unto the land of which i swore unto abraham, to isaac, and to jacob, saying: unto thy seed will i give it—
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses: ‘Depart, go up hence, thou and the people that thou hast brought up out of the land of Egypt, unto the land of which I swore unto Abraham, to Isaac, and to Jacob, saying: Unto thy seed will I give it—

searchText: exodus 33:2 and i will send an angel before thee; and i will drive out the canaanite, the amorite, and the hittite, and the perizzite, the hivite, and the jebusite—
english: and I will send an angel before thee; and I will drive out the Canaanite, the Amorite, and the Hittite, and the Perizzite, the Hivite, and the Jebusite—

searchText: exodus 33:3 unto a land flowing with milk and honey; for i will not go up in the midst of thee; for thou art a stiffnecked people; lest i consume thee in the way.’
english: unto a land flowing with milk and honey; for I will not go up in the midst of thee; for thou art a stiffnecked people; lest I consume thee in the way.’

searchText: exodus 33:4 and when the people heard these evil tidings, they mourned; and no man did put on him his ornaments.
english: And when the people heard these evil tidings, they mourned; and no man did put on him his ornaments.

searchText: exodus 33:5 and the lord said unto moses: ‘say unto the children of israel: ye are a stiffnecked people; if i go up into the midst of thee for one moment, i shall consume thee; therefore now put off thy ornaments from thee, that i may know what to do unto thee.’
english: And the LORD said unto Moses: ‘Say unto the children of Israel: Ye are a stiffnecked people; if I go up into the midst of thee for one moment, I shall consume thee; therefore now put off thy ornaments from thee, that I may know what to do unto thee.’

searchText: exodus 33:6 and the children of israel stripped themselves of their ornaments from mount horeb onward.
english: And the children of Israel stripped themselves of their ornaments from mount Horeb onward.

searchText: exodus 33:7 now moses used to take the tent and to pitch it without the camp, afar off from the camp; and he called it the tent of meeting. and it came to pass, that every one that sought the lord went out unto the tent of meeting, which was without the camp.
english: Now Moses used to take the tent and to pitch it without the camp, afar off from the camp; and he called it The tent of meeting. And it came to pass, that every one that sought the LORD went out unto the tent of meeting, which was without the camp.

searchText: exodus 33:8 and it came to pass, when moses went out unto the tent, that all the people rose up, and stood, every man at his tent door, and looked after moses, until he was gone into the tent.
english: And it came to pass, when Moses went out unto the Tent, that all the people rose up, and stood, every man at his tent door, and looked after Moses, until he was gone into the Tent.

searchText: exodus 33:9 and it came to pass, when moses entered into the tent, the pillar of cloud descended, and stood at the door of the tent; and [the lord] spoke with moses.
english: And it came to pass, when Moses entered into the Tent, the pillar of cloud descended, and stood at the door of the Tent; and [the LORD] spoke with Moses.

searchText: exodus 33:10 and when all the people saw the pillar of cloud stand at the door of the tent, all the people rose up and worshipped, every man at his tent door.
english: And when all the people saw the pillar of cloud stand at the door of the Tent, all the people rose up and worshipped, every man at his tent door.

searchText: exodus 33:11 and the lord spoke unto moses face to face, as a man speaketh unto his friend. and he would return into the camp; but his minister joshua, the son of nun, a young man, departed not out of the tent.
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses face to face, as a man speaketh unto his friend. And he would return into the camp; but his minister Joshua, the son of Nun, a young man, departed not out of the Tent.

searchText: exodus 33:12 and moses said unto the lord: ‘see, thou sayest unto me: bring up this people; and thou hast not let me know whom thou wilt send with me. yet thou hast said: i know thee by name, and thou hast also found grace in my sight.
english: And Moses said unto the LORD: ‘See, Thou sayest unto me: Bring up this people; and Thou hast not let me know whom Thou wilt send with me. Yet Thou hast said: I know thee by name, and thou hast also found grace in My sight.

searchText: exodus 33:13 now therefore, i pray thee, if i have found grace in thy sight, show me now thy ways, that i may know thee, to the end that i may find grace in thy sight; and consider that this nation is thy people.’
english: Now therefore, I pray Thee, if I have found grace in Thy sight, show me now Thy ways, that I may know Thee, to the end that I may find grace in Thy sight; and consider that this nation is Thy people.’

searchText: exodus 33:14 and he said: ‘my presence shall go with thee, and i will give thee rest.’
english: And He said: ‘My presence shall go with thee, and I will give thee rest.’

searchText: exodus 33:15 and he said unto him: ‘if thy presence go not with me, carry us not up hence.
english: And he said unto Him: ‘If Thy presence go not with me, carry us not up hence.

searchText: exodus 33:16 for wherein now shall it be known that i have found grace in thy sight, i and thy people? is it not in that thou goest with us, so that we are distinguished, i and thy people, from all the people that are upon the face of the earth?’
english: For wherein now shall it be known that I have found grace in Thy sight, I and Thy people? is it not in that Thou goest with us, so that we are distinguished, I and Thy people, from all the people that are upon the face of the earth?’

searchText: exodus 33:17 and the lord said unto moses: ‘i will do this thing also that thou hast spoken, for thou hast found grace in my sight, and i know thee by name.’
english: And the LORD said unto Moses: ‘I will do this thing also that thou hast spoken, for thou hast found grace in My sight, and I know thee by name.’

searchText: exodus 33:18 and he said: ‘show me, i pray thee, thy glory.’
english: And he said: ‘Show me, I pray Thee, Thy glory.’

searchText: exodus 33:19 and he said: ‘i will make all my goodness pass before thee, and will proclaim the name of the lord before thee; and i will be gracious to whom i will be gracious, and will show mercy on whom i will show mercy.’
english: And He said: ‘I will make all My goodness pass before thee, and will proclaim the name of the LORD before thee; and I will be gracious to whom I will be gracious, and will show mercy on whom I will show mercy.’

searchText: exodus 33:20 and he said: ‘thou canst not see my face, for man shall not see me and live.’
english: And He said: ‘Thou canst not see My face, for man shall not see Me and live.’

searchText: exodus 33:21 and the lord said: ‘behold, there is a place by me, and thou shalt stand upon the rock.
english: And the LORD said: ‘Behold, there is a place by Me, and thou shalt stand upon the rock.

searchText: exodus 33:22 and it shall come to pass, while my glory passeth by, that i will put thee in a cleft of the rock, and will cover thee with my hand until i have passed by.
english: And it shall come to pass, while My glory passeth by, that I will put thee in a cleft of the rock, and will cover thee with My hand until I have passed by.

searchText: exodus 33:23 and i will take away my hand, and thou shalt see my back; but my face shall not be seen.’
english: And I will take away My hand, and thou shalt see My back; but My face shall not be seen.’

searchText: exodus 34:1 and the lord said unto moses: ‘hew thee two tables of stone like unto the first; and i will write upon the tables the words that were on the first tables, which thou didst break.
english: And the LORD said unto Moses: ‘Hew thee two tables of stone like unto the first; and I will write upon the tables the words that were on the first tables, which thou didst break.

searchText: exodus 34:2 and be ready by the morning, and come up in the morning unto mount sinai, and present thyself there to me on the top of the mount.
english: And be ready by the morning, and come up in the morning unto mount Sinai, and present thyself there to Me on the top of the mount.

searchText: exodus 34:3 and no man shall come up with thee, neither let any man be seen throughout all the mount; neither let the flocks nor herds feed before that mount.’
english: And no man shall come up with thee, neither let any man be seen throughout all the mount; neither let the flocks nor herds feed before that mount.’

searchText: exodus 34:4 and he hewed two tables of stone like unto the first; and moses rose up early in the morning, and went up unto mount sinai, as the lord had commanded him, and took in his hand two tables of stone.
english: And he hewed two tables of stone like unto the first; and Moses rose up early in the morning, and went up unto mount Sinai, as the LORD had commanded him, and took in his hand two tables of stone.

searchText: exodus 34:5 and the lord descended in the cloud, and stood with him there, and proclaimed the name of the lord.
english: And the LORD descended in the cloud, and stood with him there, and proclaimed the name of the LORD.

searchText: exodus 34:6 and the lord passed by before him, and proclaimed: ‘the lord, the lord, god, merciful and gracious, long-suffering, and abundant in goodness and truth;
english: And the LORD passed by before him, and proclaimed: ‘The LORD, the LORD, God, merciful and gracious, long-suffering, and abundant in goodness and truth;

searchText: exodus 34:7 keeping mercy unto the thousandth generation, forgiving iniquity and transgression and sin; and that will by no means clear the guilty; visiting the iniquity of the fathers upon the children, and upon the children’s children, unto the third and unto the fourth generation.’
english: keeping mercy unto the thousandth generation, forgiving iniquity and transgression and sin; and that will by no means clear the guilty; visiting the iniquity of the fathers upon the children, and upon the children’s children, unto the third and unto the fourth generation.’

searchText: exodus 34:8 and moses made haste, and bowed his head toward the earth, and worshipped.
english: And Moses made haste, and bowed his head toward the earth, and worshipped.

searchText: exodus 34:9 and he said: ‘if now i have found grace in thy sight, o lord, let the lord, i pray thee, go in the midst of us; for it is a stiffnecked people; and pardon our iniquity and our sin, and take us for thine inheritance.’
english: And he said: ‘If now I have found grace in Thy sight, O Lord, let the Lord, I pray Thee, go in the midst of us; for it is a stiffnecked people; and pardon our iniquity and our sin, and take us for Thine inheritance.’

searchText: exodus 34:10 and he said: ‘behold, i make a covenant; before all thy people i will do marvels, such as have not been wrought in all the earth, nor in any nation; and all the people among which thou art shall see the work of the lord that i am about to do with thee, that it is tremendous.
english: And He said: ‘Behold, I make a covenant; before all thy people I will do marvels, such as have not been wrought in all the earth, nor in any nation; and all the people among which thou art shall see the work of the LORD that I am about to do with thee, that it is tremendous.

searchText: exodus 34:11 observe thou that which i am commanding thee this day; behold, i am driving out before thee the amorite, and the canaanite, and the hittite, and the perizzite, and the hivite, and the jebusite.
english: Observe thou that which I am commanding thee this day; behold, I am driving out before thee the Amorite, and the Canaanite, and the Hittite, and the Perizzite, and the Hivite, and the Jebusite.

searchText: exodus 34:12 take heed to thyself, lest thou make a covenant with the inhabitants of the land whither thou goest, lest they be for a snare in the midst of thee.
english: Take heed to thyself, lest thou make a covenant with the inhabitants of the land whither thou goest, lest they be for a snare in the midst of thee.

searchText: exodus 34:13 but ye shall break down their altars, and dash in pieces their pillars, and ye shall cut down their asherim.
english: But ye shall break down their altars, and dash in pieces their pillars, and ye shall cut down their Asherim.

searchText: exodus 34:14 for thou shalt bow down to no other god; for the lord, whose name is jealous, is a jealous god;
english: For thou shalt bow down to no other god; for the LORD, whose name is Jealous, is a jealous God;

searchText: exodus 34:15 lest thou make a covenant with the inhabitants of the land, and they go astray after their gods, and do sacrifice unto their gods, and they call thee, and thou eat of their sacrifice;
english: lest thou make a covenant with the inhabitants of the land, and they go astray after their gods, and do sacrifice unto their gods, and they call thee, and thou eat of their sacrifice;

searchText: exodus 34:16 and thou take of their daughters unto thy sons, and their daughters go astray after their gods, and make thy sons go astray after their gods.
english: and thou take of their daughters unto thy sons, and their daughters go astray after their gods, and make thy sons go astray after their gods.

searchText: exodus 34:17 thou shalt make thee no molten gods.
english: Thou shalt make thee no molten gods.

searchText: exodus 34:18 the feast of unleavened bread shalt thou keep. seven days thou shalt eat unleavened bread, as i commanded thee, at the time appointed in the month abib, for in the month abib thou camest out from egypt.
english: The feast of unleavened bread shalt thou keep. Seven days thou shalt eat unleavened bread, as I commanded thee, at the time appointed in the month Abib, for in the month Abib thou camest out from Egypt.

searchText: exodus 34:19 all that openeth the womb is mine; and of all thy cattle thou shalt sanctify the males, the firstlings of ox and sheep.
english: All that openeth the womb is Mine; and of all thy cattle thou shalt sanctify the males, the firstlings of ox and sheep.

searchText: exodus 34:20 and the firstling of an ass thou shalt redeem with a lamb; and if thou wilt not redeem it, then thou shalt break its neck. all the first-born of thy sons thou shalt redeem. and none shall appear before me empty.
english: And the firstling of an ass thou shalt redeem with a lamb; and if thou wilt not redeem it, then thou shalt break its neck. All the first-born of thy sons thou shalt redeem. And none shall appear before Me empty.

searchText: exodus 34:21 six days thou shalt work, but on the seventh day thou shalt rest; in plowing time and in harvest thou shalt rest.
english: Six days thou shalt work, but on the seventh day thou shalt rest; in plowing time and in harvest thou shalt rest.

searchText: exodus 34:22 and thou shalt observe the feast of weeks, even of the first-fruits of wheat harvest, and the feast of ingathering at the turn of the year.
english: And thou shalt observe the feast of weeks, even of the first-fruits of wheat harvest, and the feast of ingathering at the turn of the year.

searchText: exodus 34:23 three times in the year shall all thy males appear before the lord god, the god of israel.
english: Three times in the year shall all thy males appear before the Lord GOD, the God of Israel.

searchText: exodus 34:24 for i will cast out nations before thee, and enlarge thy borders; neither shall any man covet thy land, when thou goest up to appear before the lord thy god three times in the year.
english: For I will cast out nations before thee, and enlarge thy borders; neither shall any man covet thy land, when thou goest up to appear before the LORD thy God three times in the year.

searchText: exodus 34:25 thou shalt not offer the blood of my sacrifice with leavened bread; neither shall the sacrifice of the feast of the passover be left unto the morning.
english: Thou shalt not offer the blood of My sacrifice with leavened bread; neither shall the sacrifice of the feast of the passover be left unto the morning.

searchText: exodus 34:26 the choicest first-fruits of thy land thou shalt bring unto the house of the lord thy god. thou shalt not seethe a kid in its mother’s milk.’
english: The choicest first-fruits of thy land thou shalt bring unto the house of the LORD thy God. Thou shalt not seethe a kid in its mother’s milk.’

searchText: exodus 34:27 and the lord said unto moses: ‘write thou these words, for after the tenor of these words i have made a covenant with thee and with israel.’
english: And the LORD said unto Moses: ‘Write thou these words, for after the tenor of these words I have made a covenant with thee and with Israel.’

searchText: exodus 34:28 and he was there with the lord forty days and forty nights; he did neither eat bread, nor drink water. and he wrote upon the tables the words of the covenant, the ten words.
english: And he was there with the LORD forty days and forty nights; he did neither eat bread, nor drink water. And he wrote upon the tables the words of the covenant, the ten words.

searchText: exodus 34:29 and it came to pass, when moses came down from mount sinai with the two tables of the testimony in moses’hand, when he came down from the mount, that moses knew not that the skin of his face sent forth abeams while he talked with him.
english: And it came to pass, when Moses came down from mount Sinai with the two tables of the testimony in Moses’hand, when he came down from the mount, that Moses knew not that the skin of his face sent forth abeams while He talked with him.

searchText: exodus 34:30 and when aaron and all the children of israel saw moses, behold, the skin of his face sent forth beams; and they were afraid to come nigh him.
english: And when Aaron and all the children of Israel saw Moses, behold, the skin of his face sent forth beams; and they were afraid to come nigh him.

searchText: exodus 34:31 and moses called unto them; and aaron and all the rulers of the congregation returned unto him; and moses spoke to them.
english: And Moses called unto them; and Aaron and all the rulers of the congregation returned unto him; and Moses spoke to them.

searchText: exodus 34:32 and afterward all the children of israel came nigh, and he gave them in commandment all that the lord had spoken with him in mount sinai.
english: And afterward all the children of Israel came nigh, and he gave them in commandment all that the LORD had spoken with him in mount Sinai.

searchText: exodus 34:33 and when moses had done speaking with them, he put a veil on his face.
english: And when Moses had done speaking with them, he put a veil on his face.

searchText: exodus 34:34 but when moses went in before the lord that he might speak with him, he took the veil off, until he came out; and he came out; and spoke unto the children of israel that which he was commanded.
english: But when Moses went in before the LORD that He might speak with him, he took the veil off, until he came out; and he came out; and spoke unto the children of Israel that which he was commanded.

searchText: exodus 34:35 and the children of israel saw the face of moses, that the skin of moses’face sent forth beams; and moses put the veil back upon his face, until he went in to speak with him.
english: And the children of Israel saw the face of Moses, that the skin of Moses’face sent forth beams; and Moses put the veil back upon his face, until he went in to speak with Him.

searchText: exodus 35:1 and moses assembled all the congregation of the children of israel, and said unto them: ‘these are the words which the lord hath commanded, that ye should do them.
english: And Moses assembled all the congregation of the children of Israel, and said unto them: ‘These are the words which the LORD hath commanded, that ye should do them.

searchText: exodus 35:2 six days shall work be done, but on the seventh day there shall be to you a holy day, a sabbath of solemn rest to the lord; whosoever doeth any work therein shall be put to death.
english: Six days shall work be done, but on the seventh day there shall be to you a holy day, a sabbath of solemn rest to the LORD; whosoever doeth any work therein shall be put to death.

searchText: exodus 35:3 ye shall kindle no fire throughout your habitations upon the sabbath day.’
english: Ye shall kindle no fire throughout your habitations upon the sabbath day.’

searchText: exodus 35:4 and moses spoke unto all the congregation of the children of israel, saying: ‘this is the thing which the lord commanded, saying:
english: And Moses spoke unto all the congregation of the children of Israel, saying: ‘This is the thing which the LORD commanded, saying:

searchText: exodus 35:5 take ye from among you an offering unto the lord, whosoever is of a willing heart, let him bring it, the lord’s offering: gold, and silver, and brass;
english: Take ye from among you an offering unto the LORD, whosoever is of a willing heart, let him bring it, the LORD’S offering: gold, and silver, and brass;

searchText: exodus 35:6 and blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine linen, and goats’hair;
english: and blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine linen, and goats’hair;

searchText: exodus 35:7 and rams’skins dyed red, and sealskins, and acacia-wood;
english: and rams’skins dyed red, and sealskins, and acacia-wood;

searchText: exodus 35:8 and oil for the light, and spices for the anointing oil, and for the sweet incense;
english: and oil for the light, and spices for the anointing oil, and for the sweet incense;

searchText: exodus 35:9 and onyx stones, and stones to be set, for the ephod, and for the breastplate.
english: and onyx stones, and stones to be set, for the ephod, and for the breastplate.

searchText: exodus 35:10 and let every wise-hearted man among you come, and make all that the lord hath commanded:
english: And let every wise-hearted man among you come, and make all that the LORD hath commanded:

searchText: exodus 35:11 the tabernacle, its tent, and its covering, its clasps, and its boards, its bars, its pillars, and its sockets;
english: the tabernacle, its tent, and its covering, its clasps, and its boards, its bars, its pillars, and its sockets;

searchText: exodus 35:12 the ark, and the staves thereof, the ark-cover, and the veil of the screen;
english: the ark, and the staves thereof, the ark-cover, and the veil of the screen;

searchText: exodus 35:13 the table, and its staves, and all its vessels, and the showbread;
english: the table, and its staves, and all its vessels, and the showbread;

searchText: exodus 35:14 the candlestick also for the light, and its vessels, and its lamps, and the oil for the light;
english: the candlestick also for the light, and its vessels, and its lamps, and the oil for the light;

searchText: exodus 35:15 and the altar of incense, and its staves, and the anointing oil, and the sweet incense, and the screen for the door, at the door of the tabernacle;
english: and the altar of incense, and its staves, and the anointing oil, and the sweet incense, and the screen for the door, at the door of the tabernacle;

searchText: exodus 35:16 the altar of burnt-offering, with its grating of brass, its staves, and all its vessels, the laver and its base;
english: the altar of burnt-offering, with its grating of brass, its staves, and all its vessels, the laver and its base;

searchText: exodus 35:17 the hangings of the court, the pillars thereof, and their sockets, and the screen for the gate of the court;
english: the hangings of the court, the pillars thereof, and their sockets, and the screen for the gate of the court;

searchText: exodus 35:18 the pins of the tabernacle, and the pins of the court, and their cords;
english: the pins of the tabernacle, and the pins of the court, and their cords;

searchText: exodus 35:19 the plaited garments, for ministering in the holy place, the holy garments for aaron the priest, and the garments of his sons, to minister in the priest’s office.’
english: the plaited garments, for ministering in the holy place, the holy garments for Aaron the priest, and the garments of his sons, to minister in the priest’s office.’

searchText: exodus 35:20 and all the congregation of the children of israel departed from the presence of moses.
english: And all the congregation of the children of Israel departed from the presence of Moses.

searchText: exodus 35:21 and they came, every one whose heart stirred him up, and every one whom his spirit made willing, and brought the lord’s offering, for the work of the tent of meeting, and for all the service thereof, and for the holy garments. .
english: And they came, every one whose heart stirred him up, and every one whom his spirit made willing, and brought the LORD’S offering, for the work of the tent of meeting, and for all the service thereof, and for the holy garments. .

searchText: exodus 35:22 and they came, both men and women, as many as were willing-hearted, and brought nose-rings, and ear-rings, and signet-rings, and girdles, all jewels of gold; even every man that brought an offering of gold unto the lord.
english: And they came, both men and women, as many as were willing-hearted, and brought nose-rings, and ear-rings, and signet-rings, and girdles, all jewels of gold; even every man that brought an offering of gold unto the LORD.

searchText: exodus 35:23 and every man, with whom was found blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine linen, and goats’hair, and rams’skins dyed red, and sealskins, brought them.
english: And every man, with whom was found blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine linen, and goats’hair, and rams’skins dyed red, and sealskins, brought them.

searchText: exodus 35:24 every one that did set apart an offering of silver and brass brought the lord’s offering; and every man, with whom was found acacia-wood for any work of the service, brought it.
english: Every one that did set apart an offering of silver and brass brought the LORD’S offering; and every man, with whom was found acacia-wood for any work of the service, brought it.

searchText: exodus 35:25 and all the women that were wise-hearted did spin with their hands, and brought that which they had spun, the blue, and the purple, the scarlet, and the fine linen.
english: And all the women that were wise-hearted did spin with their hands, and brought that which they had spun, the blue, and the purple, the scarlet, and the fine linen.

searchText: exodus 35:26 and all the women whose heart stirred them up in wisdom spun the goats’hair.
english: And all the women whose heart stirred them up in wisdom spun the goats’hair.

searchText: exodus 35:27 and the rulers brought the onyx stones, and the stones to be set, for the ephod, and for the breastplate;
english: And the rulers brought the onyx stones, and the stones to be set, for the ephod, and for the breastplate;

searchText: exodus 35:28 and the spice, and the oil, for the light, and for the anointing oil, and for the sweet incense.
english: and the spice, and the oil, for the light, and for the anointing oil, and for the sweet incense.

searchText: exodus 35:29 the children of israel brought a freewill-offering unto the lord; every man and woman, whose heart made them willing to bring for all the work, which the lord had commanded by the hand of moses to be made.
english: The children of Israel brought a freewill-offering unto the LORD; every man and woman, whose heart made them willing to bring for all the work, which the LORD had commanded by the hand of Moses to be made.

searchText: exodus 35:30 and moses said unto the children of israel: ‘see, the lord hath called by name bezalel the son of uri, the son of hur, of the tribe of judah.
english: And Moses said unto the children of Israel: ‘See, the LORD hath called by name Bezalel the son of Uri, the son of Hur, of the tribe of Judah.

searchText: exodus 35:31 and he hath filled him with the spirit of god, in wisdom, in understanding, and in knowledge, and in all manner of workmanship.
english: And He hath filled him with the spirit of God, in wisdom, in understanding, and in knowledge, and in all manner of workmanship.

searchText: exodus 35:32 and to devise skilful works, to work in gold, and in silver, and in brass,
english: And to devise skilful works, to work in gold, and in silver, and in brass,

searchText: exodus 35:33 and in cutting of stones for setting, and in carving of wood, to work in all manner of skilful workmanship.
english: and in cutting of stones for setting, and in carving of wood, to work in all manner of skilful workmanship.

searchText: exodus 35:34 and he hath put in his heart that he may teach, both he, and oholiab, the son of ahisamach, of the tribe of dan.
english: And He hath put in his heart that he may teach, both he, and Oholiab, the son of Ahisamach, of the tribe of Dan.

searchText: exodus 35:35 them hath he filled with wisdom of heart, to work all manner of workmanship, of the craftsman, and of the skilful workman, and of the weaver in colours, in blue, and in purple, in scarlet, and in fine linen, and of the weaver, even of them that do any workmanship, and of those that devise skilful works.
english: Them hath He filled with wisdom of heart, to work all manner of workmanship, of the craftsman, and of the skilful workman, and of the weaver in colours, in blue, and in purple, in scarlet, and in fine linen, and of the weaver, even of them that do any workmanship, and of those that devise skilful works.

searchText: exodus 36:1 and bezalel and oholiab shall work, and every wise-hearted man, in whom the lord hath put wisdom and understanding to know how to work all the work for the service of the sanctuary, according to all that the lord hath commanded.’
english: And Bezalel and Oholiab shall work, and every wise-hearted man, in whom the LORD hath put wisdom and understanding to know how to work all the work for the service of the sanctuary, according to all that the LORD hath commanded.’

searchText: exodus 36:2 and moses called bezalel and oholiab, and every wise-hearted man, in whose heart the lord had put wisdom, even every one whose heart stirred him up to come unto the work to do it.
english: And Moses called Bezalel and Oholiab, and every wise-hearted man, in whose heart the LORD had put wisdom, even every one whose heart stirred him up to come unto the work to do it.

searchText: exodus 36:3 and they received of moses all the offering, which the children of israel had brought for the work of the service of the sanctuary, wherewith to make it. and they brought yet unto him freewill-offerings every morning.
english: And they received of Moses all the offering, which the children of Israel had brought for the work of the service of the sanctuary, wherewith to make it. And they brought yet unto him freewill-offerings every morning.

searchText: exodus 36:4 and all the wise men, that wrought all the work of the sanctuary, came every man from his work which they wrought.
english: And all the wise men, that wrought all the work of the sanctuary, came every man from his work which they wrought.

searchText: exodus 36:5 and they spoke unto moses, saying: ‘the people bring much more than enough for the service of the work, which the lord commanded to make.’
english: And they spoke unto Moses, saying: ‘The people bring much more than enough for the service of the work, which the LORD commanded to make.’

searchText: exodus 36:6 and moses gave commandment, and they caused it to be proclaimed throughout the camp, saying: ‘let neither man nor woman make any more work for the offering of the sanctuary.’ so the people were restrained from bringing.
english: And Moses gave commandment, and they caused it to be proclaimed throughout the camp, saying: ‘Let neither man nor woman make any more work for the offering of the sanctuary.’ So the people were restrained from bringing.

searchText: exodus 36:7 for the stuff they had was sufficient for all the work to make it, and too much.
english: For the stuff they had was sufficient for all the work to make it, and too much.

searchText: exodus 36:8 and every wise-hearted man among them that wrought the work made the tabernacle with ten curtains: of fine twined linen, and blue, and purple, and scarlet, with cherubim the work of the skilful workman made he them.
english: And every wise-hearted man among them that wrought the work made the tabernacle with ten curtains: of fine twined linen, and blue, and purple, and scarlet, with cherubim the work of the skilful workman made he them.

searchText: exodus 36:9 the length of each curtain was eight and twenty cubits, and the breadth of each curtain four cubits; all the curtains had one measure.
english: The length of each curtain was eight and twenty cubits, and the breadth of each curtain four cubits; all the curtains had one measure.

searchText: exodus 36:10 and he coupled five curtains one to another; and the other five curtains he coupled one to another.
english: And he coupled five curtains one to another; and the other five curtains he coupled one to another.

searchText: exodus 36:11 and he made loops of blue upon the edge of the one curtain that was outmost in the first set; likewise he made in the edge of the curtain that was outmost in the second set.
english: And he made loops of blue upon the edge of the one curtain that was outmost in the first set; likewise he made in the edge of the curtain that was outmost in the second set.

searchText: exodus 36:12 fifty loops made he in the one curtain, and fifty loops made he in the edge of the curtain that was in the second set; the loops were opposite one to another.
english: Fifty loops made he in the one curtain, and fifty loops made he in the edge of the curtain that was in the second set; the loops were opposite one to another.

searchText: exodus 36:13 and he made fifty clasps of gold, and coupled the curtains one to another with the clasps; so the tabernacle was one.
english: And he made fifty clasps of gold, and coupled the curtains one to another with the clasps; so the tabernacle was one.

searchText: exodus 36:14 and he made curtains of goats’hair for a tent over the tabernacle; eleven curtains he made them.
english: And he made curtains of goats’hair for a tent over the tabernacle; eleven curtains he made them.

searchText: exodus 36:15 the length of each curtain was thirty cubits, and four cubits the breadth of each curtain; the eleven curtains had one measure.
english: The length of each curtain was thirty cubits, and four cubits the breadth of each curtain; the eleven curtains had one measure.

searchText: exodus 36:16 and he coupled five curtains by themselves, and six curtains by themselves.
english: And he coupled five curtains by themselves, and six curtains by themselves.

searchText: exodus 36:17 and he made fifty loops on the edge of the curtain that was outmost in the first set, and fifty loops made he upon the edge of the curtain which was outmost in the second set.
english: And he made fifty loops on the edge of the curtain that was outmost in the first set, and fifty loops made he upon the edge of the curtain which was outmost in the second set.

searchText: exodus 36:18 and he made fifty clasps of brass to couple the tent together, that it might be one.
english: And he made fifty clasps of brass to couple the tent together, that it might be one.

searchText: exodus 36:19 and he made a covering for the tent of rams’skins dyed red, and a covering of sealskins above.
english: And he made a covering for the tent of rams’skins dyed red, and a covering of sealskins above.

searchText: exodus 36:20 and he made the boards for the tabernacle of acacia-wood, standing up.
english: And he made the boards for the tabernacle of acacia-wood, standing up.

searchText: exodus 36:21 ten cubits was the length of a board, and a cubit and a half the breadth of each board.
english: Ten cubits was the length of a board, and a cubit and a half the breadth of each board.

searchText: exodus 36:22 each board had two tenons, joined one to another. thus did he make for all the boards of the tabernacle.
english: Each board had two tenons, joined one to another. Thus did he make for all the boards of the tabernacle.

searchText: exodus 36:23 and he made the boards for the tabernacle; twenty boards for the south side southward.
english: And he made the boards for the tabernacle; twenty boards for the south side southward.

searchText: exodus 36:24 and he made forty sockets of silver under the twenty boards: two sockets under one board for its two tenons, and two sockets under another board for its two tenons.
english: And he made forty sockets of silver under the twenty boards: two sockets under one board for its two tenons, and two sockets under another board for its two tenons.

searchText: exodus 36:25 and for the second side of the tabernacle, on the north side, he made twenty boards,
english: And for the second side of the tabernacle, on the north side, he made twenty boards,

searchText: exodus 36:26 and their forty sockets of silver: two sockets under one board, and two sockets under another board.
english: and their forty sockets of silver: two sockets under one board, and two sockets under another board.

searchText: exodus 36:27 and for the hinder part of the tabernacle westward he made six boards.
english: And for the hinder part of the tabernacle westward he made six boards.

searchText: exodus 36:28 and two boards made he for the corners of the tabernacle in the hinder part;
english: And two boards made he for the corners of the tabernacle in the hinder part;

searchText: exodus 36:29 that they might be double beneath, and in like manner they should be complete unto the top thereof unto the first ring. thus he did to both of them in the two corners.
english: that they might be double beneath, and in like manner they should be complete unto the top thereof unto the first ring. Thus he did to both of them in the two corners.

searchText: exodus 36:30 and there were eight boards, and their sockets of silver, sixteen sockets: under every board two sockets.
english: And there were eight boards, and their sockets of silver, sixteen sockets: under every board two sockets.

searchText: exodus 36:31 and he made bars of acacia-wood: five for the boards of the one side of the tabernacle,
english: And he made bars of acacia-wood: five for the boards of the one side of the tabernacle,

searchText: exodus 36:32 and five bars for the boards of the other side of the tabernacle, and five bars for the boards of the tabernacle for the hinder part westward.
english: and five bars for the boards of the other side of the tabernacle, and five bars for the boards of the tabernacle for the hinder part westward.

searchText: exodus 36:33 and he made the middle bar to pass through in the midst of the boards from the one end to the other.
english: And he made the middle bar to pass through in the midst of the boards from the one end to the other.

searchText: exodus 36:34 and he overlaid the boards with gold, and made their rings of gold for holders for the bars, and overlaid the bars with gold.
english: And he overlaid the boards with gold, and made their rings of gold for holders for the bars, and overlaid the bars with gold.

searchText: exodus 36:35 and he made the veil of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen; with the cherubim the work of the skilful workman made he it.
english: And he made the veil of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen; with the cherubim the work of the skilful workman made he it.

searchText: exodus 36:36 and he made thereunto four pillars of acacia, and overlaid them with gold, their hooks being of gold; and he cast for them four sockets of silver.
english: And he made thereunto four pillars of acacia, and overlaid them with gold, their hooks being of gold; and he cast for them four sockets of silver.

searchText: exodus 36:37 and he made a screen for the door of the tent, of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen, the work of the weaver in colours;
english: And he made a screen for the door of the Tent, of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen, the work of the weaver in colours;

searchText: exodus 36:38 and the five pillars of it with their hooks; and he overlaid their capitals and their fillets with gold; and their five sockets were of brass.
english: and the five pillars of it with their hooks; and he overlaid their capitals and their fillets with gold; and their five sockets were of brass.

searchText: exodus 37:1 and bezalel made the ark of acacia-wood: two cubits and a half was the length of it, and a cubit and a half the breadth of it, and a cubit and a half the height of it.
english: And Bezalel made the ark of acacia-wood: two cubits and a half was the length of it, and a cubit and a half the breadth of it, and a cubit and a half the height of it.

searchText: exodus 37:2 and he overlaid it with pure gold within and without, and made a crown of gold to it round about.
english: And he overlaid it with pure gold within and without, and made a crown of gold to it round about.

searchText: exodus 37:3 and he cast for it four rings of gold, in the four feet thereof: even two rings on the one side of it, and two rings on the other side of it.
english: And he cast for it four rings of gold, in the four feet thereof: even two rings on the one side of it, and two rings on the other side of it.

searchText: exodus 37:4 and he made staves of acacia-wood, and overlaid them with gold.
english: And he made staves of acacia-wood, and overlaid them with gold.

searchText: exodus 37:5 and he put the staves into the rings on the sides of the ark, to bear the ark.
english: And he put the staves into the rings on the sides of the ark, to bear the ark.

searchText: exodus 37:6 and he made an ark-cover of pure gold: two cubits and a half was the length thereof, and a cubit and a half the breadth thereof.
english: And he made an ark-cover of pure gold: two cubits and a half was the length thereof, and a cubit and a half the breadth thereof.

searchText: exodus 37:7 and he made two cherubim of gold: of beaten work made he them, at the two ends of the ark-cover:
english: And he made two cherubim of gold: of beaten work made he them, at the two ends of the ark-cover:

searchText: exodus 37:8 one cherub at the one end, and one cherub at the other end; of one piece with the ark-cover made he the cherubim at the two ends thereof.
english: one cherub at the one end, and one cherub at the other end; of one piece with the ark-cover made he the cherubim at the two ends thereof.

searchText: exodus 37:9 and the cherubim spread out their wings on high, screening the ark-cover with their wings, with their faces one to another; toward the ark-cover were the faces of the cherubim.
english: And the cherubim spread out their wings on high, screening the ark-cover with their wings, with their faces one to another; toward the ark-cover were the faces of the cherubim.

searchText: exodus 37:10 and he made the table of acacia-wood: two cubits was the length thereof, and a cubit the breadth thereof, and a cubit and a half the height thereof.
english: And he made the table of acacia-wood: two cubits was the length thereof, and a cubit the breadth thereof, and a cubit and a half the height thereof.

searchText: exodus 37:11 and he overlaid it with pure gold, and made thereto a crown of gold round about.
english: And he overlaid it with pure gold, and made thereto a crown of gold round about.

searchText: exodus 37:12 and he made unto it a border of a hand-breadth round about, and made a golden crown to the border thereof round about.
english: And he made unto it a border of a hand-breadth round about, and made a golden crown to the border thereof round about.

searchText: exodus 37:13 and he cast for it four rings of gold, and put the rings in the four corners that were on the four feet thereof.
english: And he cast for it four rings of gold, and put the rings in the four corners that were on the four feet thereof.

searchText: exodus 37:14 close by the border were the rings, the holders for the staves to bear the table.
english: Close by the border were the rings, the holders for the staves to bear the table.

searchText: exodus 37:15 and he made the staves of acacia-wood, and overlaid them with gold, to bear the table.
english: And he made the staves of acacia-wood, and overlaid them with gold, to bear the table.

searchText: exodus 37:16 and he made the vessels which were upon the table, the dishes thereof, and the pans thereof, and the bowls thereof, and the jars thereof, wherewith to pour out, of pure gold.
english: And he made the vessels which were upon the table, the dishes thereof, and the pans thereof, and the bowls thereof, and the jars thereof, wherewith to pour out, of pure gold.

searchText: exodus 37:17 and he made the candlestick of pure gold: of beaten work made he the candlestick, even its base, and its shaft; its cups, its knops, and its flowers, were of one piece with it.
english: And he made the candlestick of pure gold: of beaten work made he the candlestick, even its base, and its shaft; its cups, its knops, and its flowers, were of one piece with it.

searchText: exodus 37:18 and there were six branches going out of the sides thereof: three branches of the candlestick out of the one side thereof, and three branches of the candlestick out of the other side thereof;
english: And there were six branches going out of the sides thereof: three branches of the candlestick out of the one side thereof, and three branches of the candlestick out of the other side thereof;

searchText: exodus 37:19 three cups made like almond-blossoms in one branch, a knop and a flower; and three cups made like almond-blossoms in the other branch, a knop and a flower. so for the six branches going out of the candlestick.
english: three cups made like almond-blossoms in one branch, a knop and a flower; and three cups made like almond-blossoms in the other branch, a knop and a flower. So for the six branches going out of the candlestick.

searchText: exodus 37:20 and in the candlestick were four cups made like almond-blossoms, the knops thereof, and the flowers thereof;
english: And in the candlestick were four cups made like almond-blossoms, the knops thereof, and the flowers thereof;

searchText: exodus 37:21 and a knop under two branches of one piece with it, and a knop under two branches of one piece with it, and a knop under two branches of one piece with it, for the six branches going out of it.
english: and a knop under two branches of one piece with it, and a knop under two branches of one piece with it, and a knop under two branches of one piece with it, for the six branches going out of it.

searchText: exodus 37:22 their knops and their branches were of one piece with it; the whole of it was one beaten work of pure gold.
english: Their knops and their branches were of one piece with it; the whole of it was one beaten work of pure gold.

searchText: exodus 37:23 and he made the lamps thereof, seven, and the tongs thereof, and the snuffdishes thereof, of pure gold.
english: And he made the lamps thereof, seven, and the tongs thereof, and the snuffdishes thereof, of pure gold.

searchText: exodus 37:24 of a talent of pure gold made he it, and all the vessels thereof.
english: Of a talent of pure gold made he it, and all the vessels thereof.

searchText: exodus 37:25 and he made the altar of incense of acacia-wood: a cubit was the length thereof, and a cubit the breadth thereof, four-square; and two cubits was the height thereof; the horns thereof were of one piece with it.
