english: And he made the altar of incense of acacia-wood: a cubit was the length thereof, and a cubit the breadth thereof, four-square; and two cubits was the height thereof; the horns thereof were of one piece with it.

searchText: exodus 37:26 and he overlaid it with pure gold, the top thereof, and the sides thereof round about, and the horns of it; and he made unto it a crown of gold round about.
english: And he overlaid it with pure gold, the top thereof, and the sides thereof round about, and the horns of it; and he made unto it a crown of gold round about.

searchText: exodus 37:27 and he made for it two golden rings under the crown thereof, upon the two ribs thereof, upon the two sides of it, for holders for staves wherewith to bear it.
english: And he made for it two golden rings under the crown thereof, upon the two ribs thereof, upon the two sides of it, for holders for staves wherewith to bear it.

searchText: exodus 37:28 and he made the staves of acacia-wood, and overlaid them with gold.
english: And he made the staves of acacia-wood, and overlaid them with gold.

searchText: exodus 37:29 and he made the holy anointing oil, and the pure incense of sweet spices, after the art of the perfumer.
english: And he made the holy anointing oil, and the pure incense of sweet spices, after the art of the perfumer.

searchText: exodus 38:1 and he made the altar of burnt-offering of acacia-wood: five cubits was the length thereof, and five cubits the breadth thereof, four-square, and three cubits the height thereof.
english: And he made the altar of burnt-offering of acacia-wood: five cubits was the length thereof, and five cubits the breadth thereof, four-square, and three cubits the height thereof.

searchText: exodus 38:2 and he made the horns thereof upon the four corners of it; the horns thereof were of one piece with it; and he overlaid it with brass.
english: And he made the horns thereof upon the four corners of it; the horns thereof were of one piece with it; and he overlaid it with brass.

searchText: exodus 38:3 and he made all the vessels of the altar, the pots, and the shovels, and the basins, the flesh-hooks, and the fire-pans; all the vessels thereof made he of brass.
english: And he made all the vessels of the altar, the pots, and the shovels, and the basins, the flesh-hooks, and the fire-pans; all the vessels thereof made he of brass.

searchText: exodus 38:4 and he made for the altar a grating of network of brass, under the ledge round it beneath, reaching halfway up.
english: And he made for the altar a grating of network of brass, under the ledge round it beneath, reaching halfway up.

searchText: exodus 38:5 and he cast four rings for the four ends of the grating of brass, to be holders for the staves.
english: And he cast four rings for the four ends of the grating of brass, to be holders for the staves.

searchText: exodus 38:6 and he made the staves of acacia-wood, and overlaid them with brass.
english: And he made the staves of acacia-wood, and overlaid them with brass.

searchText: exodus 38:7 and he put the staves into the rings on the sides of the altar, wherewith to bear it; he made it hollow with planks.
english: And he put the staves into the rings on the sides of the altar, wherewith to bear it; he made it hollow with planks.

searchText: exodus 38:8 and he made the laver of brass, and the base thereof of brass, of the mirrors of the serving women that did service at the door of the tent of meeting.
english: And he made the laver of brass, and the base thereof of brass, of the mirrors of the serving women that did service at the door of the tent of meeting.

searchText: exodus 38:9 and he made the court; for the south side southward the hangings of the court were of fine twined linen, a hundred cubits.
english: And he made the court; for the south side southward the hangings of the court were of fine twined linen, a hundred cubits.

searchText: exodus 38:10 their pillars were twenty, and their sockets twenty, of brass; the hooks of the pillars and their fillets were of silver.
english: Their pillars were twenty, and their sockets twenty, of brass; the hooks of the pillars and their fillets were of silver.

searchText: exodus 38:11 and for the north side a hundred cubits, their pillars twenty, and their sockets twenty, of brass; the hooks of the pillars and their fillets of silver.
english: And for the north side a hundred cubits, their pillars twenty, and their sockets twenty, of brass; the hooks of the pillars and their fillets of silver.

searchText: exodus 38:12 and for the west side were hangings of fifty cubits, their pillars ten, and their sockets ten; the hooks of the pillars and their fillets of silver.
english: And for the west side were hangings of fifty cubits, their pillars ten, and their sockets ten; the hooks of the pillars and their fillets of silver.

searchText: exodus 38:13 and for the east side eastward fifty cubits.
english: And for the east side eastward fifty cubits.

searchText: exodus 38:14 the hangings for the one side [of the gate] were fifteen cubits; their pillars three, and their sockets three.
english: The hangings for the one side [of the gate] were fifteen cubits; their pillars three, and their sockets three.

searchText: exodus 38:15 and so for the other side; on this hand and that hand by the gate of the court were hangings of fifteen cubits; their pillars three, and their sockets three.
english: And so for the other side; on this hand and that hand by the gate of the court were hangings of fifteen cubits; their pillars three, and their sockets three.

searchText: exodus 38:16 all the hangings of the court round about were of fine twined linen.
english: All the hangings of the court round about were of fine twined linen.

searchText: exodus 38:17 and the sockets for the pillars were of brass; the hooks of the pillars and their fillets of silver; and the overlaying of their capitals of silver; and all the pillars of the court were filleted with silver.
english: And the sockets for the pillars were of brass; the hooks of the pillars and their fillets of silver; and the overlaying of their capitals of silver; and all the pillars of the court were filleted with silver.

searchText: exodus 38:18 and the screen for the gate of the court was the work of the weaver in colours, of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen; and twenty cubits was the length, and the height in the breadth was five cubits, answerable to the hangings of the court.
english: And the screen for the gate of the court was the work of the weaver in colours, of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen; and twenty cubits was the length, and the height in the breadth was five cubits, answerable to the hangings of the court.

searchText: exodus 38:19 and their pillars were four, and their sockets four of brass; their hooks of silver, and the overlaying of their capitals and their fillets of silver.
english: And their pillars were four, and their sockets four of brass; their hooks of silver, and the overlaying of their capitals and their fillets of silver.

searchText: exodus 38:20 and all the pins of the tabernacle, and of the court round about, were of brass.
english: And all the pins of the tabernacle, and of the court round about, were of brass.

searchText: exodus 38:21 these are the accounts of the tabernacle, even the tabernacle of the testimony, as they were rendered according to the commandment of moses, through the service of the levites, by the hand of ithamar, the son of aaron the priest.
english: These are the accounts of the tabernacle, even the tabernacle of the testimony, as they were rendered according to the commandment of Moses, through the service of the Levites, by the hand of Ithamar, the son of Aaron the priest.

searchText: exodus 38:22 and bezalel the son of uri, the son of hur, of the tribe of judah, made all that the lord commanded moses.
english: And Bezalel the son of Uri, the son of Hur, of the tribe of Judah, made all that the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: exodus 38:23 and with him was oholiab, the son of ahisamach, of the tribe of dan, a craftsman, and a skilful workman, and a weaver in colours, in blue, and in purple, and in scarlet, and fine linen.—
english: And with him was Oholiab, the son of Ahisamach, of the tribe of Dan, a craftsman, and a skilful workman, and a weaver in colours, in blue, and in purple, and in scarlet, and fine linen.—

searchText: exodus 38:24 all the gold that was used for the work in all the work of the sanctuary, even the gold of the offering, was twenty and nine talents, and seven hundred and thirty shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary.
english: All the gold that was used for the work in all the work of the sanctuary, even the gold of the offering, was twenty and nine talents, and seven hundred and thirty shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary.

searchText: exodus 38:25 and the silver of them that were numbered of the congregation was a hundred talents, and a thousand seven hundred and three-score and fifteen shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary:
english: And the silver of them that were numbered of the congregation was a hundred talents, and a thousand seven hundred and three-score and fifteen shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary:

searchText: exodus 38:26 a beka a head, that is, half a shekel, after the shekel of the sanctuary, for every one that passed over to them that are numbered, from twenty years old and upward, for six hundred thousand and three thousand and five hundred and fifty men.
english: a beka a head, that is, half a shekel, after the shekel of the sanctuary, for every one that passed over to them that are numbered, from twenty years old and upward, for six hundred thousand and three thousand and five hundred and fifty men.

searchText: exodus 38:27 and the hundred talents of silver were for casting the sockets of the sanctuary, and the sockets of the veil: a hundred sockets for the hundred talents, a talent for a socket.
english: And the hundred talents of silver were for casting the sockets of the sanctuary, and the sockets of the veil: a hundred sockets for the hundred talents, a talent for a socket.

searchText: exodus 38:28 and of the thousand seven hundred seventy and five shekels he made hooks for the pillars, and overlaid their capitals, and made fillets for them.
english: And of the thousand seven hundred seventy and five shekels he made hooks for the pillars, and overlaid their capitals, and made fillets for them.

searchText: exodus 38:29 and the brass of the offering was seventy talents and two thousand and four hundred shekels.
english: And the brass of the offering was seventy talents and two thousand and four hundred shekels.

searchText: exodus 38:30 and therewith he made the sockets to the door of the tent of meeting, and the brazen altar, and the brazen grating for it, and all the vessels of the altar,
english: And therewith he made the sockets to the door of the tent of meeting, and the brazen altar, and the brazen grating for it, and all the vessels of the altar,

searchText: exodus 38:31 and the sockets of the court round about, and the sockets of the gate of the court, and all the pins of the tabernacle, and all the pins of the court round about.
english: and the sockets of the court round about, and the sockets of the gate of the court, and all the pins of the tabernacle, and all the pins of the court round about.

searchText: exodus 39:1 and of the blue, and purple, and scarlet, they made plaited garments, for ministering in the holy place, and made the holy garments for aaron, as the lord commanded moses.
english: And of the blue, and purple, and scarlet, they made plaited garments, for ministering in the holy place, and made the holy garments for Aaron, as the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: exodus 39:2 and he made the ephod of gold, blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen.
english: And he made the ephod of gold, blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen.

searchText: exodus 39:3 and they did beat the gold into thin plates, and cut it into threads, to work it in the blue, and in the purple, and in the scarlet, and in the fine linen, the work of the skilful workman.
english: And they did beat the gold into thin plates, and cut it into threads, to work it in the blue, and in the purple, and in the scarlet, and in the fine linen, the work of the skilful workman.

searchText: exodus 39:4 they made shoulder-pieces for it, joined together; at the two ends was it joined together.
english: They made shoulder-pieces for it, joined together; at the two ends was it joined together.

searchText: exodus 39:5 and the skilfully woven band, that was upon it, wherewith to gird it on, was of the same piece and like the work thereof: of gold, of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen, as the lord commanded moses.
english: And the skilfully woven band, that was upon it, wherewith to gird it on, was of the same piece and like the work thereof: of gold, of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen, as the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: exodus 39:6 and they wrought the onyx stones, inclosed in settings of gold, graven with the engravings of a signet, according to the names of the children of israel.
english: And they wrought the onyx stones, inclosed in settings of gold, graven with the engravings of a signet, according to the names of the children of Israel.

searchText: exodus 39:7 and he put them on the shoulder-pieces of the ephod, to be stones of memorial for the children of israel, as the lord commanded moses.
english: And he put them on the shoulder-pieces of the ephod, to be stones of memorial for the children of Israel, as the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: exodus 39:8 and he made the breastplate, the work of the skilful workman, like the work of the ephod: of gold, of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen.
english: And he made the breastplate, the work of the skilful workman, like the work of the ephod: of gold, of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen.

searchText: exodus 39:9 it was four-square; they made the breastplate double; a span was the length thereof, and a span the breadth thereof, being double.
english: It was four-square; they made the breastplate double; a span was the length thereof, and a span the breadth thereof, being double.

searchText: exodus 39:10 and they set in it four rows of stones: a row of carnelian, topaz, and smaragd was the first row.
english: And they set in it four rows of stones: a row of carnelian, topaz, and smaragd was the first row.

searchText: exodus 39:11 and the second row, a carbuncle, a sapphire, and an emerald.
english: And the second row, a carbuncle, a sapphire, and an emerald.

searchText: exodus 39:12 and the third row, a jacinth, an agate, and an amethyst.
english: And the third row, a jacinth, an agate, and an amethyst.

searchText: exodus 39:13 and the fourth row, a beryl, an onyx, and a jasper; they were inclosed in fittings of gold in their settings.
english: And the fourth row, a beryl, an onyx, and a jasper; they were inclosed in fittings of gold in their settings.

searchText: exodus 39:14 and the stones were according to the names of the children of israel, twelve, according to their names, like the engravings of a signet, every one according to his name, for the twelve tribes.
english: And the stones were according to the names of the children of Israel, twelve, according to their names, like the engravings of a signet, every one according to his name, for the twelve tribes.

searchText: exodus 39:15 and they made upon the breastplate plaited chains, of wreathen work of pure gold.
english: And they made upon the breastplate plaited chains, of wreathen work of pure gold.

searchText: exodus 39:16 and they made two settings of gold, and two gold rings; and put the two rings on the two ends of the breastplate.
english: And they made two settings of gold, and two gold rings; and put the two rings on the two ends of the breastplate.

searchText: exodus 39:17 and they put the two wreathen chains of gold on the two rings at the ends of the breastplate.
english: And they put the two wreathen chains of gold on the two rings at the ends of the breastplate.

searchText: exodus 39:18 and the other two ends of the two wreathen chains they put on the two settings, and put them on the shoulder-pieces of the ephod, in the forepart thereof.
english: And the other two ends of the two wreathen chains they put on the two settings, and put them on the shoulder-pieces of the ephod, in the forepart thereof.

searchText: exodus 39:19 and they made two rings of gold, and put them upon the two ends of the breastplate, upon the edge thereof, which was toward the side of the ephod inward.
english: And they made two rings of gold, and put them upon the two ends of the breastplate, upon the edge thereof, which was toward the side of the ephod inward.

searchText: exodus 39:20 and they made two rings of gold, and put them on the two shoulder-pieces of the ephod underneath, in the forepart thereof, close by the coupling thereof, above the skilfully woven band of the ephod.
english: And they made two rings of gold, and put them on the two shoulder-pieces of the ephod underneath, in the forepart thereof, close by the coupling thereof, above the skilfully woven band of the ephod.

searchText: exodus 39:21 and they did bind the breastplate by the rings thereof unto the rings of the ephod with a thread of blue, that it might be upon the skilfully woven band of the ephod, and that the breastplate might not be loosed from the ephod; as the lord commanded moses.
english: And they did bind the breastplate by the rings thereof unto the rings of the ephod with a thread of blue, that it might be upon the skilfully woven band of the ephod, and that the breastplate might not be loosed from the ephod; as the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: exodus 39:22 and he made the robe of the ephod of woven work, all of blue;
english: And he made the robe of the ephod of woven work, all of blue;

searchText: exodus 39:23 and the hole of the robe in the midst thereof, as the hole of a coat of mail, with a binding round about the hole of it, that it should not be rent.
english: and the hole of the robe in the midst thereof, as the hole of a coat of mail, with a binding round about the hole of it, that it should not be rent.

searchText: exodus 39:24 and they made upon the skirts of the robe pomegranates of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and twined linen.
english: And they made upon the skirts of the robe pomegranates of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and twined linen.

searchText: exodus 39:25 and they made bells of pure gold, and put the bells between the pomegranates upon the skirts of the robe round about, between the pomegranates:
english: And they made bells of pure gold, and put the bells between the pomegranates upon the skirts of the robe round about, between the pomegranates:

searchText: exodus 39:26 a bell and a pomegranate, a bell and a pomegranate, upon the skirts of the robe round about, to minister in; as the lord commanded moses.
english: a bell and a pomegranate, a bell and a pomegranate, upon the skirts of the robe round about, to minister in; as the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: exodus 39:27 and they made the tunics of fine linen of woven work for aaron, and for his sons,
english: And they made the tunics of fine linen of woven work for Aaron, and for his sons,

searchText: exodus 39:28 and the mitre of fine linen, and the goodly head-tires of fine linen, and the linen breeches of fine twined linen,
english: and the mitre of fine linen, and the goodly head-tires of fine linen, and the linen breeches of fine twined linen,

searchText: exodus 39:29 and the girdle of fine twined linen, and blue, and purple, and scarlet, the work of the weaver in colours; as the lord commanded moses.
english: and the girdle of fine twined linen, and blue, and purple, and scarlet, the work of the weaver in colours; as the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: exodus 39:30 and they made the plate of the holy crown of pure gold, and wrote upon it a writing, like the engravings of a signet: holy to the lord.
english: And they made the plate of the holy crown of pure gold, and wrote upon it a writing, like the engravings of a signet: HOLY TO THE LORD.

searchText: exodus 39:31 and they tied unto it a thread of blue, to fasten it upon the mitre above; as the lord commanded moses.
english: And they tied unto it a thread of blue, to fasten it upon the mitre above; as the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: exodus 39:32 thus was finished all the work of the tabernacle of the tent of meeting; and the children of israel did according to all that the lord commanded moses, so did they.
english: Thus was finished all the work of the tabernacle of the tent of meeting; and the children of Israel did according to all that the LORD commanded Moses, so did they.

searchText: exodus 39:33 and they brought the tabernacle unto moses, the tent, and all its furniture, its clasps, its boards, its bars, and its pillars, and its sockets;
english: And they brought the tabernacle unto Moses, the Tent, and all its furniture, its clasps, its boards, its bars, and its pillars, and its sockets;

searchText: exodus 39:34 and the covering of rams’skins dyed red, and the covering of sealskins, and the veil of the screen;
english: and the covering of rams’skins dyed red, and the covering of sealskins, and the veil of the screen;

searchText: exodus 39:35 the ark of the testimony, and the staves thereof, and the ark-cover;
english: the ark of the testimony, and the staves thereof, and the ark-cover;

searchText: exodus 39:36 the table, all the vessels thereof, and the showbread;
english: the table, all the vessels thereof, and the showbread;

searchText: exodus 39:37 the pure candlestick, the lamps thereof, even the lamps to be set in order, and all the vessels thereof, and the oil for the light;
english: the pure candlestick, the lamps thereof, even the lamps to be set in order, and all the vessels thereof, and the oil for the light;

searchText: exodus 39:38 and the golden altar, and the anointing oil, and the sweet incense, and the screen for the door of the tent;
english: and the golden altar, and the anointing oil, and the sweet incense, and the screen for the door of the Tent;

searchText: exodus 39:39 the brazen altar, and its grating of brass, its staves, and all its vessels, the laver and its base;
english: the brazen altar, and its grating of brass, its staves, and all its vessels, the laver and its base;

searchText: exodus 39:40 the hangings of the court, its pillars, and its sockets, and the screen for the gate of the court, the cords thereof, and the pins thereof, and all the instruments of the service of the tabernacle of the tent of meeting;
english: the hangings of the court, its pillars, and its sockets, and the screen for the gate of the court, the cords thereof, and the pins thereof, and all the instruments of the service of the tabernacle of the tent of meeting;

searchText: exodus 39:41 the plaited garments for ministering in the holy place; the holy garments for aaron the priest, and the garments of his sons, to minister in the priest’s office.
english: the plaited garments for ministering in the holy place; the holy garments for Aaron the priest, and the garments of his sons, to minister in the priest’s office.

searchText: exodus 39:42 according to all that the lord commanded moses, so the children of israel did all the work.
english: According to all that the LORD commanded Moses, so the children of Israel did all the work.

searchText: exodus 39:43 and moses saw all the work, and, behold, they had done it; as the lord had commanded, even so had they done it. and moses blessed them.
english: And Moses saw all the work, and, behold, they had done it; as the LORD had commanded, even so had they done it. And Moses blessed them.

searchText: exodus 40:1 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: exodus 40:2 ’on the first day of the first month shalt thou rear up the tabernacle of the tent of meeting.
english: ’On the first day of the first month shalt thou rear up the tabernacle of the tent of meeting.

searchText: exodus 40:3 and thou shalt put therein the ark of the testimony, and thou shalt screen the ark with the veil.
english: And thou shalt put therein the ark of the testimony, and thou shalt screen the ark with the veil.

searchText: exodus 40:4 and thou shalt bring in the table, and set in order the bread that is upon it; and thou shalt bring in the candlestick, and light the lamps thereof.
english: And thou shalt bring in the table, and set in order the bread that is upon it; and thou shalt bring in the candlestick, and light the lamps thereof.

searchText: exodus 40:5 and thou shalt set the golden altar for incense before the ark of the testimony, and put the screen of the door to the tabernacle.
english: And thou shalt set the golden altar for incense before the ark of the testimony, and put the screen of the door to the tabernacle.

searchText: exodus 40:6 and thou shalt set the altar of burnt-offering before the door of the tabernacle of the tent of meeting.
english: And thou shalt set the altar of burnt-offering before the door of the tabernacle of the tent of meeting.

searchText: exodus 40:7 and thou shalt set the laver between the tent of meeting and the altar, and shalt put water therein.
english: And thou shalt set the laver between the tent of meeting and the altar, and shalt put water therein.

searchText: exodus 40:8 and thou shalt set up the court round about, and hang up the screen of the gate of the court.
english: And thou shalt set up the court round about, and hang up the screen of the gate of the court.

searchText: exodus 40:9 and thou shalt take the anointing oil, and anoint the tabernacle, and all that is therein, and shalt hallow it, and all the furniture thereof; and it shall be holy.
english: And thou shalt take the anointing oil, and anoint the tabernacle, and all that is therein, and shalt hallow it, and all the furniture thereof; and it shall be holy.

searchText: exodus 40:10 and thou shalt anoint the altar of burnt-offering, and all its vessels, and sanctify the altar; and the altar shall be most holy.
english: And thou shalt anoint the altar of burnt-offering, and all its vessels, and sanctify the altar; and the altar shall be most holy.

searchText: exodus 40:11 and thou shalt anoint the laver and its base, and sanctify it.
english: And thou shalt anoint the laver and its base, and sanctify it.

searchText: exodus 40:12 and thou shalt bring aaron and his sons unto the door of the tent of meeting, and shalt wash them with water.
english: And thou shalt bring Aaron and his sons unto the door of the tent of meeting, and shalt wash them with water.

searchText: exodus 40:13 and thou shalt put upon aaron the holy garments; and thou shalt anoint him, and sanctify him, that he may minister unto me in the priest’s office.
english: And thou shalt put upon Aaron the holy garments; and thou shalt anoint him, and sanctify him, that he may minister unto Me in the priest’s office.

searchText: exodus 40:14 and thou shalt bring his sons, and put tunics upon them.
english: And thou shalt bring his sons, and put tunics upon them.

searchText: exodus 40:15 and thou shalt anoint them, as thou didst anoint their father, that they may minister unto me in the priest’s office; and their anointing shall be to them for an everlasting priesthood throughout their generations.’
english: And thou shalt anoint them, as thou didst anoint their father, that they may minister unto Me in the priest’s office; and their anointing shall be to them for an everlasting priesthood throughout their generations.’

searchText: exodus 40:16 thus did moses; according to all that the lord commanded him, so did he.
english: Thus did Moses; according to all that the LORD commanded him, so did he.

searchText: exodus 40:17 and it came to pass in the first month in the second year, on the first day of the month, that the tabernacle was reared up.
english: And it came to pass in the first month in the second year, on the first day of the month, that the tabernacle was reared up.

searchText: exodus 40:18 and moses reared up the tabernacle, and laid its sockets, and set up the boards thereof, and put in the bars thereof, and reared up its pillars.
english: And Moses reared up the tabernacle, and laid its sockets, and set up the boards thereof, and put in the bars thereof, and reared up its pillars.

searchText: exodus 40:19 and he spread the tent over the tabernacle, and put the covering of the tent above upon it; as the lord commanded moses.
english: And he spread the tent over the tabernacle, and put the covering of the tent above upon it; as the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: exodus 40:20 and he took and put the testimony into the ark, and set the staves on the ark, and put the ark-cover above upon the ark.
english: And he took and put the testimony into the ark, and set the staves on the ark, and put the ark-cover above upon the ark.

searchText: exodus 40:21 and he brought the ark into the tabernacle, and set up the veil of the screen, and screened the ark of the testimony; as the lord commanded moses.
english: And he brought the ark into the tabernacle, and set up the veil of the screen, and screened the ark of the testimony; as the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: exodus 40:22 and he put the table in the tent of meeting, upon the side of the tabernacle northward, without the veil.
english: And he put the table in the tent of meeting, upon the side of the tabernacle northward, without the veil.

searchText: exodus 40:23 and he set a row of bread in order upon it before the lord; as the lord commanded moses.
english: And he set a row of bread in order upon it before the LORD; as the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: exodus 40:24 and he put the candlestick in the tent of meeting, over against the table, on the side of the tabernacle southward.
english: And he put the candlestick in the tent of meeting, over against the table, on the side of the tabernacle southward.

searchText: exodus 40:25 and he lighted the lamps before the lord; as the lord commanded moses.
english: And he lighted the lamps before the LORD; as the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: exodus 40:26 and he put the golden altar in the tent of meeting before the veil;
english: And he put the golden altar in the tent of meeting before the veil;

searchText: exodus 40:27 and he burnt thereon incense of sweet spices; as the lord commanded moses.
english: and he burnt thereon incense of sweet spices; as the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: exodus 40:28 and he put the screen of the door to the tabernacle.
english: And he put the screen of the door to the tabernacle.

searchText: exodus 40:29 and the altar of burnt-offering he set at the door of the tabernacle of the tent of meeting, and offered upon it the burnt-offering and the meal-offering; as the lord commanded moses.
english: And the altar of burnt-offering he set at the door of the tabernacle of the tent of meeting, and offered upon it the burnt-offering and the meal-offering; as the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: exodus 40:30 and he set the laver between the tent of meeting and the altar, and put water therein, wherewith to wash;
english: And he set the laver between the tent of meeting and the altar, and put water therein, wherewith to wash;

searchText: exodus 40:31 that moses and aaron and his sons might wash their hands and their feet thereat;
english: that Moses and Aaron and his sons might wash their hands and their feet thereat;

searchText: exodus 40:32 when they went into the tent of meeting, and when they came near unto the altar, they should wash; as the lord commanded moses.
english: when they went into the tent of meeting, and when they came near unto the altar, they should wash; as the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: exodus 40:33 and he reared up the court round about the tabernacle and the altar, and set up the screen of the gate of the court. so moses finished the work.
english: And he reared up the court round about the tabernacle and the altar, and set up the screen of the gate of the court. So Moses finished the work.

searchText: exodus 40:34 then the cloud covered the tent of meeting, and the glory of the lord filled the tabernacle.
english: Then the cloud covered the tent of meeting, and the glory of the LORD filled the tabernacle.

searchText: exodus 40:35 and moses was not able to enter into the tent of meeting, because the cloud abode thereon, and the glory of the lord filled the tabernacle.—
english: And Moses was not able to enter into the tent of meeting, because the cloud abode thereon, and the glory of the LORD filled the tabernacle.—

searchText: exodus 40:36 and whenever the cloud was taken up from over the tabernacle, the children of israel went onward, throughout all their journeys.
english: And whenever the cloud was taken up from over the tabernacle, the children of Israel went onward, throughout all their journeys.

searchText: exodus 40:37 but if the cloud was not taken up, then they journeyed not till the day that it was taken up.
english: But if the cloud was not taken up, then they journeyed not till the day that it was taken up.

searchText: exodus 40:38 for the cloud of the lord was upon the tabernacle by day, and there was fire therein by night, in the sight of all the house of israel, throughout all their journeys.—
english: For the cloud of the LORD was upon the tabernacle by day, and there was fire therein by night, in the sight of all the house of Israel, throughout all their journeys.—

searchText: leviticus 1:1 and the lord called unto moses, and spoke unto him out of the tent of meeting, saying:
english: And the LORD called unto Moses, and spoke unto him out of the tent of meeting, saying:

searchText: leviticus 1:2 speak unto the children of israel, and say unto them: when any man of you bringeth an offering unto the lord, ye shall bring your offering of the cattle, even of the herd or of the flock.
english: Speak unto the children of Israel, and say unto them: When any man of you bringeth an offering unto the LORD, ye shall bring your offering of the cattle, even of the herd or of the flock.

searchText: leviticus 1:3 if his offering be a burnt-offering of the herd, he shall offer it a male without blemish; he shall bring it to the door of the tent of meeting, that he may be accepted before the lord.
english: If his offering be a burnt-offering of the herd, he shall offer it a male without blemish; he shall bring it to the door of the tent of meeting, that he may be accepted before the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 1:4 and he shall lay his hand upon the head of the burnt-offering; and it shall be accepted for him to make atonement for him.
english: And he shall lay his hand upon the head of the burnt-offering; and it shall be accepted for him to make atonement for him.

searchText: leviticus 1:5 and he shall kill the bullock before the lord; and aaron’s sons, the priests, shall present the blood, and dash the blood round about against the altar that is at the door of the tent of meeting.
english: And he shall kill the bullock before the LORD; and Aaron’s sons, the priests, shall present the blood, and dash the blood round about against the altar that is at the door of the tent of meeting.

searchText: leviticus 1:6 and he shall flay the burnt-offering, and cut it into its pieces.
english: And he shall flay the burnt-offering, and cut it into its pieces.

searchText: leviticus 1:7 and the sons of aaron the priest shall put fire upon the altar, and lay wood in order upon the fire.
english: And the sons of Aaron the priest shall put fire upon the altar, and lay wood in order upon the fire.

searchText: leviticus 1:8 and aaron’s sons, the priests, shall lay the pieces, and the head, and the suet, in order upon the wood that is on the fire which is upon the altar;
english: And Aaron’s sons, the priests, shall lay the pieces, and the head, and the suet, in order upon the wood that is on the fire which is upon the altar;

searchText: leviticus 1:9 but its inwards and its legs shall he wash with water; and the priest shall make the whole smoke on the altar, for a burnt-offering, an offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the lord.
english: but its inwards and its legs shall he wash with water; and the priest shall make the whole smoke on the altar, for a burnt-offering, an offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 1:10 and if his offering be of the flock, whether of the sheep, or of the goats, for a burnt-offering, he shall offer it a male without blemish.
english: And if his offering be of the flock, whether of the sheep, or of the goats, for a burnt-offering, he shall offer it a male without blemish.

searchText: leviticus 1:11 and he shall kill it on the side of the altar northward before the lord; and aaron’s sons, the priests, shall dash its blood against the altar round about.
english: And he shall kill it on the side of the altar northward before the LORD; and Aaron’s sons, the priests, shall dash its blood against the altar round about.

searchText: leviticus 1:12 and he shall cut it into its pieces; and the priest shall lay them, with its head and its suet, in order on the wood that is on the fire which is upon the altar.
english: And he shall cut it into its pieces; and the priest shall lay them, with its head and its suet, in order on the wood that is on the fire which is upon the altar.

searchText: leviticus 1:13 but the inwards and the legs shall he wash with water; and the priest shall offer the whole, and make it smoke upon the altar; it is a burnt-offering, an offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the lord.
english: But the inwards and the legs shall he wash with water; and the priest shall offer the whole, and make it smoke upon the altar; it is a burnt-offering, an offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 1:14 and if his offering to the lord be a burnt-offering of fowls, then he shall bring his offering of turtle-doves, or of young pigeons.
english: And if his offering to the LORD be a burnt-offering of fowls, then he shall bring his offering of turtle-doves, or of young pigeons.

searchText: leviticus 1:15 and the priest shall bring it unto the altar, and pinch off its head, and make it smoke on the altar; and the blood thereof shall be drained out on the side of the altar.
english: And the priest shall bring it unto the altar, and pinch off its head, and make it smoke on the altar; and the blood thereof shall be drained out on the side of the altar.

searchText: leviticus 1:16 and he shall take away its crop with the feathers thereof, and cast it beside the altar on the east part, in the place of the ashes.
english: And he shall take away its crop with the feathers thereof, and cast it beside the altar on the east part, in the place of the ashes.

searchText: leviticus 1:17 and he shall rend it by the wings thereof, but shall not divide it asunder; and the priest shall make it smoke upon the altar, upon the wood that is upon the fire; it is a burnt-offering, an offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the lord.
english: And he shall rend it by the wings thereof, but shall not divide it asunder; and the priest shall make it smoke upon the altar, upon the wood that is upon the fire; it is a burnt-offering, an offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 2:1 and when any one bringeth a meal-offering unto the lord, his offering shall be of fine flour; and he shall pour oil upon it, and put frankincense thereon.
english: And when any one bringeth a meal-offering unto the LORD, his offering shall be of fine flour; and he shall pour oil upon it, and put frankincense thereon.

searchText: leviticus 2:2 and he shall bring it to aaron’s sons the priests; and he shall take thereout his handful of the fine flour thereof, and of the oil thereof, together with all the frankincense thereof; and the priest shall make the memorial-part thereof smoke upon the altar, an offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the lord.
english: And he shall bring it to Aaron’s sons the priests; and he shall take thereout his handful of the fine flour thereof, and of the oil thereof, together with all the frankincense thereof; and the priest shall make the memorial-part thereof smoke upon the altar, an offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 2:3 but that which is left of the meal-offering shall be aaron’s and his sons’; it is a thing most holy of the offerings of the lord made by fire.
english: But that which is left of the meal-offering shall be Aaron’s and his sons’; it is a thing most holy of the offerings of the LORD made by fire.

searchText: leviticus 2:4 and when thou bringest a meal-offering baked in the oven, it shall be unleavened cakes of fine flour mingled with oil, or unleavened wafers spread with oil.
english: And when thou bringest a meal-offering baked in the oven, it shall be unleavened cakes of fine flour mingled with oil, or unleavened wafers spread with oil.

searchText: leviticus 2:5 and if thy offering be a meal-offering baked on a griddle, it shall be of fine flour unleavened, mingled with oil.
english: And if thy offering be a meal-offering baked on a griddle, it shall be of fine flour unleavened, mingled with oil.

searchText: leviticus 2:6 thou shalt break it in pieces, and pour oil thereon; it is a meal-offering.
english: Thou shalt break it in pieces, and pour oil thereon; it is a meal-offering.

searchText: leviticus 2:7 and if thy offering be a meal-offering of the stewing-pan, it shall be made of fine flour with oil.
english: And if thy offering be a meal-offering of the stewing-pan, it shall be made of fine flour with oil.

searchText: leviticus 2:8 and thou shalt bring the meal-offering that is made of these things unto the lord; and it shall be presented unto the priest, and he shall bring it unto the altar.
english: And thou shalt bring the meal-offering that is made of these things unto the LORD; and it shall be presented unto the priest, and he shall bring it unto the altar.

searchText: leviticus 2:9 and the priest shall take off from the meal-offering the memorial-part thereof, and shall make it smoke upon the altar—an offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the lord.
english: And the priest shall take off from the meal-offering the memorial-part thereof, and shall make it smoke upon the altar—an offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 2:10 but that which is left of the meal-offering shall be aaron’s and his sons’; it is a thing most holy of the offerings of the lord made by fire.
english: But that which is left of the meal-offering shall be Aaron’s and his sons’; it is a thing most holy of the offerings of the LORD made by fire.

searchText: leviticus 2:11 no meal-offering, which ye shall bring unto the lord, shall be made with leaven; for ye shall make no leaven, nor any honey, smoke as an offering made by fire unto the lord.
english: No meal-offering, which ye shall bring unto the LORD, shall be made with leaven; for ye shall make no leaven, nor any honey, smoke as an offering made by fire unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 2:12 as an offering of first-fruits ye may bring them unto the lord; but they shall not come up for a sweet savour on the altar.
english: As an offering of first-fruits ye may bring them unto the LORD; but they shall not come up for a sweet savour on the altar.

searchText: leviticus 2:13 and every meal-offering of thine shalt thou season with salt; neither shalt thou suffer the salt of the covenant of thy god to be lacking from thy meal-offering; with all thy offerings thou shalt offer salt.
english: And every meal-offering of thine shalt thou season with salt; neither shalt thou suffer the salt of the covenant of thy God to be lacking from thy meal-offering; with all thy offerings thou shalt offer salt.

searchText: leviticus 2:14 and if thou bring a meal-offering of first-fruits unto the lord, thou shalt bring for the meal-offering of thy first-fruits corn in the ear parched with fire, even groats of the fresh ear.
english: And if thou bring a meal-offering of first-fruits unto the LORD, thou shalt bring for the meal-offering of thy first-fruits corn in the ear parched with fire, even groats of the fresh ear.

searchText: leviticus 2:15 and thou shalt put oil upon it, and lay frankincense thereon; it is a meal-offering.
english: And thou shalt put oil upon it, and lay frankincense thereon; it is a meal-offering.

searchText: leviticus 2:16 and the priest shall make the memorial-part of it smoke, even of the groats thereof, and of the oil thereof, with all the frankincense thereof; it is an offering made by fire unto the lord.
english: And the priest shall make the memorial-part of it smoke, even of the groats thereof, and of the oil thereof, with all the frankincense thereof; it is an offering made by fire unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 3:1 and if his offering be a sacrifice of peace-offerings: if he offer of the herd, whether male or female, he shall offer it without blemish before the lord.
english: And if his offering be a sacrifice of peace-offerings: if he offer of the herd, whether male or female, he shall offer it without blemish before the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 3:2 and he shall lay his hand upon the head of his offering, and kill it at the door of the tent of meeting; and aaron’s sons the priests shall dash the blood against the altar round about.
english: And he shall lay his hand upon the head of his offering, and kill it at the door of the tent of meeting; and Aaron’s sons the priests shall dash the blood against the altar round about.

searchText: leviticus 3:3 and he shall present of the sacrifice of peace-offerings an offering made by fire unto the lord: the fat that covereth the inwards, and all the fat that is upon the inwards,
english: And he shall present of the sacrifice of peace-offerings an offering made by fire unto the LORD: the fat that covereth the inwards, and all the fat that is upon the inwards,

searchText: leviticus 3:4 and the two kidneys, and the fat that is on them, which is by the loins, and the lobe above the liver, which he shall take away hard by the kidneys.
english: and the two kidneys, and the fat that is on them, which is by the loins, and the lobe above the liver, which he shall take away hard by the kidneys.

searchText: leviticus 3:5 and aaron’s sons shall make it smoke on the altar upon the burnt-offering, which is upon the wood that is on the fire; it is an offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the lord.
english: And Aaron’s sons shall make it smoke on the altar upon the burnt-offering, which is upon the wood that is on the fire; it is an offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 3:6 and if his offering for a sacrifice of peace-offerings unto the lord be of the flock, male or female, he shall offer it without blemish.
english: And if his offering for a sacrifice of peace-offerings unto the LORD be of the flock, male or female, he shall offer it without blemish.

searchText: leviticus 3:7 if he bring a lamb for his offering, then shall he present it before the lord.
english: If he bring a lamb for his offering, then shall he present it before the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 3:8 and he shall lay his hand upon the head of his offering, and kill it before the tent of meeting; and aaron’s sons shall dash the blood thereof against the altar round about.
english: And he shall lay his hand upon the head of his offering, and kill it before the tent of meeting; and Aaron’s sons shall dash the blood thereof against the altar round about.

searchText: leviticus 3:9 and he shall present of the sacrifice of peace-offerings an offering made by fire unto the lord: the fat thereof, the fat tail entire, which he shall take away hard by the rump-bone; and the fat that covereth the inwards, and all the fat that is upon the inwards,
english: And he shall present of the sacrifice of peace-offerings an offering made by fire unto the LORD: the fat thereof, the fat tail entire, which he shall take away hard by the rump-bone; and the fat that covereth the inwards, and all the fat that is upon the inwards,

searchText: leviticus 3:10 and the two kidneys, and the fat that is upon them, which is by the loins, and the lobe above the liver, which he shall take away by the kidneys.
english: and the two kidneys, and the fat that is upon them, which is by the loins, and the lobe above the liver, which he shall take away by the kidneys.

searchText: leviticus 3:11 and the priest shall make it smoke upon the altar; it is the food of the offering made by fire unto the lord.
english: And the priest shall make it smoke upon the altar; it is the food of the offering made by fire unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 3:12 and if his offering be a goat, then he shall present it before the lord.
english: And if his offering be a goat, then he shall present it before the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 3:13 and he shall lay his hand upon the head of it, and kill it before the tent of meeting; and the sons of aaron shall dash the blood thereof against the altar round about.
english: And he shall lay his hand upon the head of it, and kill it before the tent of meeting; and the sons of Aaron shall dash the blood thereof against the altar round about.

searchText: leviticus 3:14 and he shall present thereof his offering, even an offering made by fire unto the lord: the fat that covereth the inwards, and all the fat that is upon the inwards,
english: And he shall present thereof his offering, even an offering made by fire unto the LORD: the fat that covereth the inwards, and all the fat that is upon the inwards,

searchText: leviticus 3:15 and the two kidneys, and the fat that is upon them, which is by the loins, and the lobe above the liver, which he shall take away by the kidneys.
english: and the two kidneys, and the fat that is upon them, which is by the loins, and the lobe above the liver, which he shall take away by the kidneys.

searchText: leviticus 3:16 and the priest shall make them smoke upon the altar; it is the food of the offering made by fire, for a sweet savour; all the fat is the lord’s.
english: And the priest shall make them smoke upon the altar; it is the food of the offering made by fire, for a sweet savour; all the fat is the LORD’S.

searchText: leviticus 3:17 it shall be a perpetual statute throughout your generations in all your dwellings, that ye shall eat neither fat nor blood.
english: It shall be a perpetual statute throughout your generations in all your dwellings, that ye shall eat neither fat nor blood.

searchText: leviticus 4:1 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: leviticus 4:2 speak unto the children of israel, saying: if any one shall sin through error, in any of the things which the lord hath commanded not to be done, and shall do any one of them:
english: Speak unto the children of Israel, saying: If any one shall sin through error, in any of the things which the LORD hath commanded not to be done, and shall do any one of them:

searchText: leviticus 4:3 if the anointed priest shall sin so as to bring guilt on the people, then let him offer for his sin, which he hath sinned, a young bullock without blemish unto the lord for a sin-offering.
english: if the anointed priest shall sin so as to bring guilt on the people, then let him offer for his sin, which he hath sinned, a young bullock without blemish unto the LORD for a sin-offering.

searchText: leviticus 4:4 and he shall bring the bullock unto the door of the tent of meeting before the lord; and he shall lay his hand upon the head of the bullock, and kill the bullock before the lord.
english: And he shall bring the bullock unto the door of the tent of meeting before the LORD; and he shall lay his hand upon the head of the bullock, and kill the bullock before the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 4:5 and the anointed priest shall take of the blood of the bullock, and bring it to the tent of meeting.
english: And the anointed priest shall take of the blood of the bullock, and bring it to the tent of meeting.

searchText: leviticus 4:6 and the priest shall dip his finger in the blood, and sprinkle of the blood seven times before the lord, in front of the veil of the sanctuary.
english: And the priest shall dip his finger in the blood, and sprinkle of the blood seven times before the LORD, in front of the veil of the sanctuary.

searchText: leviticus 4:7 and the priest shall put of the blood upon the horns of the altar of sweet incense before the lord, which is in the tent of meeting; and all the remaining blood of the bullock shall he pour out at the base of the altar of burnt-offering, which is at the door of the tent of meeting.
english: And the priest shall put of the blood upon the horns of the altar of sweet incense before the LORD, which is in the tent of meeting; and all the remaining blood of the bullock shall he pour out at the base of the altar of burnt-offering, which is at the door of the tent of meeting.

searchText: leviticus 4:8 and all the fat of the bullock of the sin-offering he shall take off from it; the fat that covereth the inwards, and all the fat that is upon the inwards,
english: And all the fat of the bullock of the sin-offering he shall take off from it; the fat that covereth the inwards, and all the fat that is upon the inwards,

searchText: leviticus 4:9 and the two kidneys, and the fat that is upon them, which is by the loins, and the lobe above the liver, which he shall take away by kidneys,
english: and the two kidneys, and the fat that is upon them, which is by the loins, and the lobe above the liver, which he shall take away by kidneys,

searchText: leviticus 4:10 as it is taken off from the ox of the sacrifice of peace-offerings; and the priest shall make them smoke upon the altar of burnt-offering.
english: as it is taken off from the ox of the sacrifice of peace-offerings; and the priest shall make them smoke upon the altar of burnt-offering.

searchText: leviticus 4:11 but the skin of the bullock, and all its flesh, with its head, and with its legs, and its inwards, and its dung,
english: But the skin of the bullock, and all its flesh, with its head, and with its legs, and its inwards, and its dung,

searchText: leviticus 4:12 even the whole bullock shall he carry forth without the camp unto a clean place, where the ashes are poured out, and burn it on wood with fire; where the ashes are poured out shall it be burnt.
english: even the whole bullock shall he carry forth without the camp unto a clean place, where the ashes are poured out, and burn it on wood with fire; where the ashes are poured out shall it be burnt.

searchText: leviticus 4:13 and if the whole congregation of israel shall err, the thing being hid from the eyes of the assembly, and do any of the things which the lord hath commanded not to be done, and are guilty:
english: And if the whole congregation of Israel shall err, the thing being hid from the eyes of the assembly, and do any of the things which the LORD hath commanded not to be done, and are guilty:

searchText: leviticus 4:14 when the sin wherein they have sinned is known, then the assembly shall offer a young bullock for a sin-offering, and bring it before the tent of meeting.
english: when the sin wherein they have sinned is known, then the assembly shall offer a young bullock for a sin-offering, and bring it before the tent of meeting.

searchText: leviticus 4:15 and the elders of the congregation shall lay their hands upon the head of the bullock before the lord; and the bullock shall be killed before the lord.
english: And the elders of the congregation shall lay their hands upon the head of the bullock before the LORD; and the bullock shall be killed before the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 4:16 and the anointed priest shall bring of the blood of the bullock to the tent of meeting.
english: And the anointed priest shall bring of the blood of the bullock to the tent of meeting.

searchText: leviticus 4:17 and the priest shall dip his finger in the blood, and sprinkle it seven times before the lord, in front of the veil.
english: And the priest shall dip his finger in the blood, and sprinkle it seven times before the LORD, in front of the veil.

searchText: leviticus 4:18 and he shall put of the blood upon the horns of the altar which is before the lord, that is in the tent of meeting, and all the remaining blood shall he pour out at the base of the altar of burnt-offering, which is at the door of the tent of meeting.
english: And he shall put of the blood upon the horns of the altar which is before the LORD, that is in the tent of meeting, and all the remaining blood shall he pour out at the base of the altar of burnt-offering, which is at the door of the tent of meeting.

searchText: leviticus 4:19 and all the fat thereof shall he take off from it, and make it smoke upon the altar.
english: And all the fat thereof shall he take off from it, and make it smoke upon the altar.

searchText: leviticus 4:20 thus shall he do with the bullock; as he did with the bullock of the sin-offering, so shall he do with this; and the priest shall make atonement for them, and they shall be forgiven.
english: Thus shall he do with the bullock; as he did with the bullock of the sin-offering, so shall he do with this; and the priest shall make atonement for them, and they shall be forgiven.

searchText: leviticus 4:21 and he shall carry forth the bullock without the camp, and burn it as he burned the first bullock; it is the sin-offering for the assembly.
english: And he shall carry forth the bullock without the camp, and burn it as he burned the first bullock; it is the sin-offering for the assembly.

searchText: leviticus 4:22 when a ruler sinneth, and doeth through error any one of all the things which the lord his god hath commanded not to be done, and is guilty:
english: When a ruler sinneth, and doeth through error any one of all the things which the LORD his God hath commanded not to be done, and is guilty:

searchText: leviticus 4:23 if his sin, wherein he hath sinned, be known to him, he shall bring for his offering a goat, a male without blemish.
english: if his sin, wherein he hath sinned, be known to him, he shall bring for his offering a goat, a male without blemish.

searchText: leviticus 4:24 and he shall lay his hand upon the head of the goat, and kill it in the place where they kill the burnt-offering before the lord; it is a sin-offering.
english: And he shall lay his hand upon the head of the goat, and kill it in the place where they kill the burnt-offering before the LORD; it is a sin-offering.

searchText: leviticus 4:25 and the priest shall take of the blood of the sin-offering with his finger, and put it upon the horns of the altar of burnt-offering, and the remaining blood thereof shall he pour out at the base of the altar of burnt-offering.
english: And the priest shall take of the blood of the sin-offering with his finger, and put it upon the horns of the altar of burnt-offering, and the remaining blood thereof shall he pour out at the base of the altar of burnt-offering.

searchText: leviticus 4:26 and all the fat thereof shall he make smoke upon the altar, as the fat of the sacrifice of peace-offerings; and the priest shall make atonement for him as concerning his sin, and he shall be forgiven.
english: And all the fat thereof shall he make smoke upon the altar, as the fat of the sacrifice of peace-offerings; and the priest shall make atonement for him as concerning his sin, and he shall be forgiven.

searchText: leviticus 4:27 and if any one of the common people sin through error, in doing any of the things which the lord hath commanded not to be done, and be guilty:
english: And if any one of the common people sin through error, in doing any of the things which the LORD hath commanded not to be done, and be guilty:

searchText: leviticus 4:28 if his sin, which he hath sinned, be known to him, then he shall bring for his offering a goat, a female without blemish, for his sin which he hath sinned.
english: if his sin, which he hath sinned, be known to him, then he shall bring for his offering a goat, a female without blemish, for his sin which he hath sinned.

searchText: leviticus 4:29 and he shall lay his hand upon the head of the sin-offering, and kill the sin-offering in the place of burnt-offering.
english: And he shall lay his hand upon the head of the sin-offering, and kill the sin-offering in the place of burnt-offering.

searchText: leviticus 4:30 and the priest shall take of the blood thereof with his finger, and put it upon the horns of the altar of burnt-offering, and all the remaining blood thereof shall he pour out at the base of the altar.
english: And the priest shall take of the blood thereof with his finger, and put it upon the horns of the altar of burnt-offering, and all the remaining blood thereof shall he pour out at the base of the altar.

searchText: leviticus 4:31 and all the fat thereof shall he take away, as the fat is taken away from off the sacrifice of peace-offerings; and the priest shall make it smoke upon the altar for a sweet savour unto the lord; and the priest shall make atonement for him, and he shall be forgiven.
english: And all the fat thereof shall he take away, as the fat is taken away from off the sacrifice of peace-offerings; and the priest shall make it smoke upon the altar for a sweet savour unto the LORD; and the priest shall make atonement for him, and he shall be forgiven.

searchText: leviticus 4:32 and if he bring a lamb as his offering for a sin-offering, he shall bring it a female without blemish.
english: And if he bring a lamb as his offering for a sin-offering, he shall bring it a female without blemish.

searchText: leviticus 4:33 and he shall lay his hand upon the head of the sin-offering, and kill it for a sin-offering in the place where they kill the burnt-offering.
english: And he shall lay his hand upon the head of the sin-offering, and kill it for a sin-offering in the place where they kill the burnt-offering.

searchText: leviticus 4:34 and the priest shall take of the blood of the sin-offering with his finger, and put it upon the horns of the altar of burnt-offering, and all the remaining blood thereof shall he pour out at the base of the altar.
english: And the priest shall take of the blood of the sin-offering with his finger, and put it upon the horns of the altar of burnt-offering, and all the remaining blood thereof shall he pour out at the base of the altar.

searchText: leviticus 4:35 and all the fat thereof shall he take away, as the fat of the lamb is taken away from the sacrifice of peace-offerings; and the priest shall make them smoke on the altar, upon the offerings of the lord made by fire; and the priest shall make atonement for him as touching his sin that he hath sinned, and he shall be forgiven.
english: And all the fat thereof shall he take away, as the fat of the lamb is taken away from the sacrifice of peace-offerings; and the priest shall make them smoke on the altar, upon the offerings of the LORD made by fire; and the priest shall make atonement for him as touching his sin that he hath sinned, and he shall be forgiven.

searchText: leviticus 5:1 and if any one sin, in that he heareth the voice of adjuration, he being a witness, whether he hath seen or known, if he do not utter it, then he shall bear his iniquity;
english: And if any one sin, in that he heareth the voice of adjuration, he being a witness, whether he hath seen or known, if he do not utter it, then he shall bear his iniquity;

searchText: leviticus 5:2 or if any one touch any unclean thing, whether it be the carcass of an unclean beast, or the carcass of unclean cattle, or the carcass of unclean swarming things, and be guilty, it being hidden from him that he is unclean;
english: or if any one touch any unclean thing, whether it be the carcass of an unclean beast, or the carcass of unclean cattle, or the carcass of unclean swarming things, and be guilty, it being hidden from him that he is unclean;

searchText: leviticus 5:3 or if he touch the uncleanness of man, whatsoever his uncleanness be wherewith he is unclean, and it be hid from him; and, when he knoweth of it, be guilty;
english: or if he touch the uncleanness of man, whatsoever his uncleanness be wherewith he is unclean, and it be hid from him; and, when he knoweth of it, be guilty;

searchText: leviticus 5:4 or if any one swear clearly with his lips to do evil, or to do good, whatsoever it be that a man shall utter clearly with an oath, and it be hid from him; and, when he knoweth of it, be guilty in one of these things;
english: or if any one swear clearly with his lips to do evil, or to do good, whatsoever it be that a man shall utter clearly with an oath, and it be hid from him; and, when he knoweth of it, be guilty in one of these things;

searchText: leviticus 5:5 and it shall be, when he shall be guilty in one of these things, that he shall confess that wherein he hath sinned;
english: and it shall be, when he shall be guilty in one of these things, that he shall confess that wherein he hath sinned;

searchText: leviticus 5:6 and he shall bring his forfeit unto the lord for his sin which he hath sinned, a female from the flock, a lamb or a goat, for a sin-offering; and the priest shall make atonement for him as concerning his sin.
english: and he shall bring his forfeit unto the LORD for his sin which he hath sinned, a female from the flock, a lamb or a goat, for a sin-offering; and the priest shall make atonement for him as concerning his sin.

searchText: leviticus 5:7 and if his means suffice not for a lamb, then he shall bring his forfeit for that wherein he hath sinned, two turtle-doves, or two young pigeons, unto the lord: one for a sin-offering, and the other for a burnt-offering.
english: And if his means suffice not for a lamb, then he shall bring his forfeit for that wherein he hath sinned, two turtle-doves, or two young pigeons, unto the LORD: one for a sin-offering, and the other for a burnt-offering.

searchText: leviticus 5:8 and he shall bring them unto the priest, who shall offer that which is for the sin-offering first, and pinch off its head close by its neck, but shall not divide it asunder.
english: And he shall bring them unto the priest, who shall offer that which is for the sin-offering first, and pinch off its head close by its neck, but shall not divide it asunder.

searchText: leviticus 5:9 and he shall sprinkle of the blood of the sin-offering upon the side of the altar; and the rest of the blood shall be drained out at the base of the altar; it is a sin-offering.
english: And he shall sprinkle of the blood of the sin-offering upon the side of the altar; and the rest of the blood shall be drained out at the base of the altar; it is a sin-offering.

searchText: leviticus 5:10 and he shall prepare the second for a burnt-offering, according to the ordinance; and the priest shall make atonement for him as concerning his sin which he hath sinned, and he shall be forgiven.
english: And he shall prepare the second for a burnt-offering, according to the ordinance; and the priest shall make atonement for him as concerning his sin which he hath sinned, and he shall be forgiven.

searchText: leviticus 5:11 but if his means suffice not for two turtledoves, or two young pigeons, then he shall bring his offering for that wherein he hath sinned, the tenth part of an ephah of fine flour for a sin-offering; he shall put no oil upon it, neither shall he put any frankincense thereon; for it is a sin-offering.
english: But if his means suffice not for two turtledoves, or two young pigeons, then he shall bring his offering for that wherein he hath sinned, the tenth part of an ephah of fine flour for a sin-offering; he shall put no oil upon it, neither shall he put any frankincense thereon; for it is a sin-offering.

searchText: leviticus 5:12 and he shall bring it to the priest, and the priest shall take his handful of it as the memorial-part thereof, and make it smoke on the altar, upon the offerings of the lord made by fire; it is a sin-offering.
english: And he shall bring it to the priest, and the priest shall take his handful of it as the memorial-part thereof, and make it smoke on the altar, upon the offerings of the LORD made by fire; it is a sin-offering.

searchText: leviticus 5:13 and the priest shall make atonement for him as touching his sin that he hath sinned in any of these things, and he shall be forgiven; and the remnant shall be the priest’s, as the meal-offering.
english: And the priest shall make atonement for him as touching his sin that he hath sinned in any of these things, and he shall be forgiven; and the remnant shall be the priest’s, as the meal-offering.

searchText: leviticus 5:14 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: leviticus 5:15 if any one commit a trespass, and sin through error, in the holy things of the lord, then he shall bring his forfeit unto the lord, a ram without blemish out of the flock, according to thy valuation in silver by shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary, for a guilt-offering.
english: If any one commit a trespass, and sin through error, in the holy things of the LORD, then he shall bring his forfeit unto the LORD, a ram without blemish out of the flock, according to thy valuation in silver by shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary, for a guilt-offering.

searchText: leviticus 5:16 and he shall make restitution for that which he hath done amiss in the holy thing, and shall add the fifth part thereto, and give it unto the priest; and the priest shall make atonement for him with the ram of the guilt-offering, and he shall be forgiven.
english: And he shall make restitution for that which he hath done amiss in the holy thing, and shall add the fifth part thereto, and give it unto the priest; and the priest shall make atonement for him with the ram of the guilt-offering, and he shall be forgiven.

searchText: leviticus 5:17 and if any one sin, and do any of the things which the lord hath commanded not to be done, though he know it not, yet is he guilty, and shall bear his iniquity.
english: And if any one sin, and do any of the things which the LORD hath commanded not to be done, though he know it not, yet is he guilty, and shall bear his iniquity.

searchText: leviticus 5:18 and he shall bring a ram without blemish out of the flock, according to thy valuation, for a guilt-offering, unto the priest; and the priest shall make atonement for him concerning the error which he committed, though he knew it not, and he shall be forgiven.
english: And he shall bring a ram without blemish out of the flock, according to thy valuation, for a guilt-offering, unto the priest; and the priest shall make atonement for him concerning the error which he committed, though he knew it not, and he shall be forgiven.

searchText: leviticus 5:19 it is a guilt-offering—he is certainly guilty before the lord.
english: It is a guilt-offering—he is certainly guilty before the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 5:20 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: leviticus 5:21 if any one sin, and commit a trespass against the lord, and deal falsely with his neighbour in a matter of deposit, or of pledge, or of robbery, or have oppressed his neighbour;
english: If any one sin, and commit a trespass against the LORD, and deal falsely with his neighbour in a matter of deposit, or of pledge, or of robbery, or have oppressed his neighbour;

searchText: leviticus 5:22 or have found that which was lost, and deal falsely therein, and swear to a lie; in any of all these that a man doeth, sinning therein;
english: or have found that which was lost, and deal falsely therein, and swear to a lie; in any of all these that a man doeth, sinning therein;

searchText: leviticus 5:23 then it shall be, if he hath sinned, and is guilty, that he shall restore that which he took by robbery, or the thing which he hath gotten by oppression, or the deposit which was deposited with him, or the lost thing which he found,
english: then it shall be, if he hath sinned, and is guilty, that he shall restore that which he took by robbery, or the thing which he hath gotten by oppression, or the deposit which was deposited with him, or the lost thing which he found,

searchText: leviticus 5:24 or any thing about which he hath sworn falsely, he shall even restore it in full, and shall add the fifth part more thereto; unto him to whom it appertaineth shall he give it, in the day of his being guilty.
english: or any thing about which he hath sworn falsely, he shall even restore it in full, and shall add the fifth part more thereto; unto him to whom it appertaineth shall he give it, in the day of his being guilty.

searchText: leviticus 5:25 and he shall bring his forfeit unto the lord, a ram without blemish out of the flock, according to thy valuation, for a guilt-offering, unto the priest.
english: And he shall bring his forfeit unto the LORD, a ram without blemish out of the flock, according to thy valuation, for a guilt-offering, unto the priest.

searchText: leviticus 5:26 and the priest shall make atonement for him before the lord, and he shall be forgiven, concerning whatsoever he doeth so as to be guilty thereby.
english: And the priest shall make atonement for him before the LORD, and he shall be forgiven, concerning whatsoever he doeth so as to be guilty thereby.

searchText: leviticus 6:1 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: leviticus 6:2 command aaron and his sons, saying: this is the law of the burnt-offering: it is that which goeth up on its firewood upon the altar all night unto the morning; and the fire of the altar shall be kept burning thereby.
english: Command Aaron and his sons, saying: This is the law of the burnt-offering: it is that which goeth up on its firewood upon the altar all night unto the morning; and the fire of the altar shall be kept burning thereby.

searchText: leviticus 6:3 and the priest shall put on his linen garment, and his linen breeches shall he put upon his flesh; and he shall take up the ashes whereto the fire hath consumed the burnt-offering on the altar, and he shall put them beside the altar.
english: And the priest shall put on his linen garment, and his linen breeches shall he put upon his flesh; and he shall take up the ashes whereto the fire hath consumed the burnt-offering on the altar, and he shall put them beside the altar.

searchText: leviticus 6:4 and he shall put off his garments, and put on other garments, and carry forth the ashes without the camp unto a clean place.
english: And he shall put off his garments, and put on other garments, and carry forth the ashes without the camp unto a clean place.

searchText: leviticus 6:5 and the fire upon the altar shall be kept burning thereby, it shall not go out; and the priest shall kindle wood on it every morning; and he shall lay the burnt-offering in order upon it, and shall make smoke thereon the fat of the peace-offerings.
english: And the fire upon the altar shall be kept burning thereby, it shall not go out; and the priest shall kindle wood on it every morning; and he shall lay the burnt-offering in order upon it, and shall make smoke thereon the fat of the peace-offerings.

searchText: leviticus 6:6 fire shall be kept burning upon the altar continually; it shall not go out.
english: Fire shall be kept burning upon the altar continually; it shall not go out.

searchText: leviticus 6:7 and this is the law of the meal-offering: the sons of aaron shall offer it before the lord, in front of the altar.
english: And this is the law of the meal-offering: the sons of Aaron shall offer it before the LORD, in front of the altar.

searchText: leviticus 6:8 and he shall take up therefrom his handful, of the fine flour of the meal-offering, and of the oil thereof, and all the frankincense which is upon the meal-offering, and shall make the memorial-part thereof smoke upon the altar for a sweet savour unto the lord.
english: And he shall take up therefrom his handful, of the fine flour of the meal-offering, and of the oil thereof, and all the frankincense which is upon the meal-offering, and shall make the memorial-part thereof smoke upon the altar for a sweet savour unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 6:9 and that which is left thereof shall aaron and his sons eat; it shall be eaten without leaven in a holy place; in the court of the tent of meeting they shall eat it.
english: And that which is left thereof shall Aaron and his sons eat; it shall be eaten without leaven in a holy place; in the court of the tent of meeting they shall eat it.

searchText: leviticus 6:10 it shall not be baked with leaven. i have given it as their portion of my offerings made by fire; it is most holy, as the sin-offering, and as the guilt-offering.
english: It shall not be baked with leaven. I have given it as their portion of My offerings made by fire; it is most holy, as the sin-offering, and as the guilt-offering.

searchText: leviticus 6:11 every male among the children of aaron may eat of it, as a due for ever throughout your generations, from the offerings of the lord made by fire; whatsoever toucheth them shall be holy.
english: Every male among the children of Aaron may eat of it, as a due for ever throughout your generations, from the offerings of the LORD made by fire; whatsoever toucheth them shall be holy.

searchText: leviticus 6:12 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: leviticus 6:13 this is the offering of aaron and of his sons, which they shall offer unto the lord in the day when he is anointed: the tenth part of an ephah of fine flour for a meal-offering perpetually, half of it in the morning, and half thereof in the evening.
english: This is the offering of Aaron and of his sons, which they shall offer unto the LORD in the day when he is anointed: the tenth part of an ephah of fine flour for a meal-offering perpetually, half of it in the morning, and half thereof in the evening.

searchText: leviticus 6:14 on a griddle it shall be made with oil; when it is soaked, thou shalt bring it in; in broken pieces shalt thou offer the meal-offering for a sweet savour unto the lord.
english: On a griddle it shall be made with oil; when it is soaked, thou shalt bring it in; in broken pieces shalt thou offer the meal-offering for a sweet savour unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 6:15 and the anointed priest that shall be in his stead from among his sons shall offer it, it is a due for ever; it shall be wholly made to smoke unto the lord.
english: And the anointed priest that shall be in his stead from among his sons shall offer it, it is a due for ever; it shall be wholly made to smoke unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 6:16 and every meal-offering of the priest shall be wholly made to smoke; it shall not be eaten.
