english: And every meal-offering of the priest shall be wholly made to smoke; it shall not be eaten.

searchText: leviticus 6:17 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: leviticus 6:18 speak unto aaron and to his sons, saying: this is the law of the sin-offering: in the place where the burnt-offering is killed shall the sin-offering be killed before the lord; it is most holy.
english: Speak unto Aaron and to his sons, saying: This is the law of the sin-offering: in the place where the burnt-offering is killed shall the sin-offering be killed before the LORD; it is most holy.

searchText: leviticus 6:19 the priest that offereth it for sin shall eat it; in a holy place shall it be eaten, in the court of the tent of meeting.
english: The priest that offereth it for sin shall eat it; in a holy place shall it be eaten, in the court of the tent of meeting.

searchText: leviticus 6:20 whatsoever shall touch the flesh thereof shall be holy; and when there is sprinkled of the blood thereof upon any garment, thou shalt wash that whereon it was sprinkled in a holy place.
english: Whatsoever shall touch the flesh thereof shall be holy; and when there is sprinkled of the blood thereof upon any garment, thou shalt wash that whereon it was sprinkled in a holy place.

searchText: leviticus 6:21 but the earthen vessel wherein it is sodden shall be broken; and if it be sodden in a brazen vessel, it shall be scoured, and rinsed in water.
english: But the earthen vessel wherein it is sodden shall be broken; and if it be sodden in a brazen vessel, it shall be scoured, and rinsed in water.

searchText: leviticus 6:22 every male among the priests may eat thereof; it is most holy.
english: Every male among the priests may eat thereof; it is most holy.

searchText: leviticus 6:23 and no sin-offering, whereof any of the blood is brought into the tent of meeting to make atonement in the holy place, shall be eaten; it shall be burnt with fire.
english: And no sin-offering, whereof any of the blood is brought into the tent of meeting to make atonement in the holy place, shall be eaten; it shall be burnt with fire.

searchText: leviticus 7:1 and this is the law of the guilt-offering: it is most holy.
english: And this is the law of the guilt-offering: it is most holy.

searchText: leviticus 7:2 in the place where they kill the burnt-offering shall they kill the guilt-offering: and the blood thereof shall be dashed against the altar round about.
english: In the place where they kill the burnt-offering shall they kill the guilt-offering: and the blood thereof shall be dashed against the altar round about.

searchText: leviticus 7:3 and he shall offer of it all the fat thereof: the fat tail, and the fat that covereth the inwards,
english: And he shall offer of it all the fat thereof: the fat tail, and the fat that covereth the inwards,

searchText: leviticus 7:4 and the two kidneys, and the fat that is on them, which is by the loins, and the lobe above the liver, which he shall take away by the kidneys.
english: and the two kidneys, and the fat that is on them, which is by the loins, and the lobe above the liver, which he shall take away by the kidneys.

searchText: leviticus 7:5 and the priest shall make them smoke upon the altar for an offering made by fire unto the lord; it is a guilt-offering.
english: And the priest shall make them smoke upon the altar for an offering made by fire unto the LORD; it is a guilt-offering.

searchText: leviticus 7:6 every male among the priests may eat thereof; it shall be eaten in a holy place; it is most holy.
english: Every male among the priests may eat thereof; it shall be eaten in a holy place; it is most holy.

searchText: leviticus 7:7 as is the sin-offering, so is the guilt-offering; there is one law for them; the priest that maketh atonement therewith, he shall have it.
english: As is the sin-offering, so is the guilt-offering; there is one law for them; the priest that maketh atonement therewith, he shall have it.

searchText: leviticus 7:8 and the priest that offereth any man’s burnt-offering, even the priest shall have to himself the skin of the burnt-offering which he hath offered.
english: And the priest that offereth any man’s burnt-offering, even the priest shall have to himself the skin of the burnt-offering which he hath offered.

searchText: leviticus 7:9 and every meal-offering that is baked in the oven, and all that is dressed in the stewing-pan, and on the griddle, shall be the priest’s that offereth it.
english: And every meal-offering that is baked in the oven, and all that is dressed in the stewing-pan, and on the griddle, shall be the priest’s that offereth it.

searchText: leviticus 7:10 and every meal-offering, mingled with oil, or dry, shall all the sons of aaron have, one as well as another.
english: And every meal-offering, mingled with oil, or dry, shall all the sons of Aaron have, one as well as another.

searchText: leviticus 7:11 and this is the law of the sacrifice of peace-offerings, which one may offer unto the lord.
english: And this is the law of the sacrifice of peace-offerings, which one may offer unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 7:12 if he offer it for a thanksgiving, then he shall offer with the sacrifice of thanksgiving unleavened cakes mingled with oil, and unleavened wafers spread with oil, and cakes mingled with oil, of fine flour soaked.
english: If he offer it for a thanksgiving, then he shall offer with the sacrifice of thanksgiving unleavened cakes mingled with oil, and unleavened wafers spread with oil, and cakes mingled with oil, of fine flour soaked.

searchText: leviticus 7:13 with cakes of leavened bread he shall present his offering with the sacrifice of his peace-offerings for thanksgiving.
english: With cakes of leavened bread he shall present his offering with the sacrifice of his peace-offerings for thanksgiving.

searchText: leviticus 7:14 and of it he shall present one out of each offering for a gift unto the lord; it shall be the priest’s that dasheth the blood of the peace-offerings against the altar.
english: And of it he shall present one out of each offering for a gift unto the LORD; it shall be the priest’s that dasheth the blood of the peace-offerings against the altar.

searchText: leviticus 7:15 and the flesh of the sacrifice of his peace-offerings for thanksgiving shall be eaten on the day of his offering; he shall not leave any of it until the morning.
english: And the flesh of the sacrifice of his peace-offerings for thanksgiving shall be eaten on the day of his offering; he shall not leave any of it until the morning.

searchText: leviticus 7:16 but if the sacrifice of his offering be a vow, or a freewill-offering, it shall be eaten on the day that he offereth his sacrifice; and on the morrow that which remaineth of it may be eaten.
english: But if the sacrifice of his offering be a vow, or a freewill-offering, it shall be eaten on the day that he offereth his sacrifice; and on the morrow that which remaineth of it may be eaten.

searchText: leviticus 7:17 but that which remaineth of the flesh of the sacrifice on the third day shall be burnt with fire.
english: But that which remaineth of the flesh of the sacrifice on the third day shall be burnt with fire.

searchText: leviticus 7:18 and if any of the flesh of the sacrifice of his peace-offerings be at all eaten on the third day, it shall not be accepted, neither shall it be imputed unto him that offereth it; it shall be an abhorred thing, and the soul that eateth of it shall bear his iniquity.
english: And if any of the flesh of the sacrifice of his peace-offerings be at all eaten on the third day, it shall not be accepted, neither shall it be imputed unto him that offereth it; it shall be an abhorred thing, and the soul that eateth of it shall bear his iniquity.

searchText: leviticus 7:19 and the flesh that toucheth any unclean thing shall not be eaten; it shall be burnt with fire. and as for the flesh, every one that is clean may eat thereof.
english: And the flesh that toucheth any unclean thing shall not be eaten; it shall be burnt with fire. And as for the flesh, every one that is clean may eat thereof.

searchText: leviticus 7:20 but the soul that eateth of the flesh of the sacrifice of peace-offerings, that pertain unto the lord, having his uncleanness upon him, that soul shall be cut off from his people.
english: But the soul that eateth of the flesh of the sacrifice of peace-offerings, that pertain unto the LORD, having his uncleanness upon him, that soul shall be cut off from his people.

searchText: leviticus 7:21 and when any one shall touch any unclean thing, whether it be the uncleanness of man, or an unclean beast, or any unclean detestable thing, and eat of the flesh of the sacrifice of peace-offerings, which pertain unto the lord, that soul shall be cut off from his people.
english: And when any one shall touch any unclean thing, whether it be the uncleanness of man, or an unclean beast, or any unclean detestable thing, and eat of the flesh of the sacrifice of peace-offerings, which pertain unto the LORD, that soul shall be cut off from his people.

searchText: leviticus 7:22 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: leviticus 7:23 speak unto the children of israel, saying: ye shall eat no fat, of ox, or sheep, or goat.
english: Speak unto the children of Israel, saying: Ye shall eat no fat, of ox, or sheep, or goat.

searchText: leviticus 7:24 and the fat of that which dieth of itself, and the fat of that which is torn of beasts, may be used for any other service; but ye shall in no wise eat of it.
english: And the fat of that which dieth of itself, and the fat of that which is torn of beasts, may be used for any other service; but ye shall in no wise eat of it.

searchText: leviticus 7:25 for whosoever eateth the fat of the beast, of which men present an offering made by fire unto the lord, even the soul that eateth it shall be cut off from his people.
english: For whosoever eateth the fat of the beast, of which men present an offering made by fire unto the LORD, even the soul that eateth it shall be cut off from his people.

searchText: leviticus 7:26 and ye shall eat no manner of blood, whether it be of fowl or of beast, in any of your dwellings.
english: And ye shall eat no manner of blood, whether it be of fowl or of beast, in any of your dwellings.

searchText: leviticus 7:27 whosoever it be that eateth any blood, that soul shall be cut off from his people.
english: Whosoever it be that eateth any blood, that soul shall be cut off from his people.

searchText: leviticus 7:28 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: leviticus 7:29 speak unto the children of israel, saying: he that offereth his sacrifice of peace-offerings unto the lord shall bring his offering unto the lord out of his sacrifice of peace-offerings.
english: Speak unto the children of Israel, saying: He that offereth his sacrifice of peace-offerings unto the LORD shall bring his offering unto the LORD out of his sacrifice of peace-offerings.

searchText: leviticus 7:30 his own hands shall bring the offerings of the lord made by fire: the fat with the breast shall he bring, that the breast may be waved for a wave-offering before the lord.
english: His own hands shall bring the offerings of the LORD made by fire: the fat with the breast shall he bring, that the breast may be waved for a wave-offering before the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 7:31 and the priest shall make the fat smoke upon the altar; but the breast shall be aaron’s and his sons’.
english: And the priest shall make the fat smoke upon the altar; but the breast shall be Aaron’s and his sons’.

searchText: leviticus 7:32 and the right thigh shall ye give unto the priest for a heave-offering out of your sacrifices of peace-offerings.
english: And the right thigh shall ye give unto the priest for a heave-offering out of your sacrifices of peace-offerings.

searchText: leviticus 7:33 he among the sons of aaron, that offereth the blood of the peace-offerings, and the fat, shall have the right thigh for a portion.
english: He among the sons of Aaron, that offereth the blood of the peace-offerings, and the fat, shall have the right thigh for a portion.

searchText: leviticus 7:34 for the breast of waving and the thigh of heaving have i taken of the children of israel out of their sacrifices of peace-offerings, and have given them unto aaron the priest and unto his sons as a due for ever from the children of israel.
english: For the breast of waving and the thigh of heaving have I taken of the children of Israel out of their sacrifices of peace-offerings, and have given them unto Aaron the priest and unto his sons as a due for ever from the children of Israel.

searchText: leviticus 7:35 this is the consecrated portion of aaron, and the consecrated portion of his sons, out of the offerings of the lord made by fire, in the day when they were presented to minister unto the lord in the priest’s office;
english: This is the consecrated portion of Aaron, and the consecrated portion of his sons, out of the offerings of the LORD made by fire, in the day when they were presented to minister unto the LORD in the priest’s office;

searchText: leviticus 7:36 which the lord commanded to be given them of the children of israel, in the day that they were anointed. it is a due for ever throughout their generations.
english: which the LORD commanded to be given them of the children of Israel, in the day that they were anointed. It is a due for ever throughout their generations.

searchText: leviticus 7:37 this is the law of the burnt-offering, of the meal-offering, and of the sin-offering, and of the guilt-offering, and of the consecration-offering, and of the sacrifice of peace-offerings;
english: This is the law of the burnt-offering, of the meal-offering, and of the sin-offering, and of the guilt-offering, and of the consecration-offering, and of the sacrifice of peace-offerings;

searchText: leviticus 7:38 which the lord commanded moses in mount sinai, in the day that he commanded the children of israel to present their offerings unto the lord, in the wilderness of sinai.
english: which the LORD commanded Moses in mount Sinai, in the day that he commanded the children of Israel to present their offerings unto the LORD, in the wilderness of Sinai.

searchText: leviticus 8:1 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: leviticus 8:2 ’take aaron and his sons with him, and the garments, and the anointing oil, and the bullock of the sin-offering, and the two rams, and the basket of unleavened bread;
english: ’Take Aaron and his sons with him, and the garments, and the anointing oil, and the bullock of the sin-offering, and the two rams, and the basket of unleavened bread;

searchText: leviticus 8:3 and assemble thou all the congregation at the door of the tent of meeting.’
english: and assemble thou all the congregation at the door of the tent of meeting.’

searchText: leviticus 8:4 and moses did as the lord commanded him; and the congregation was assembled at the door of the tent of meeting.
english: And Moses did as the LORD commanded him; and the congregation was assembled at the door of the tent of meeting.

searchText: leviticus 8:5 and moses said unto the congregation: ‘this is the thing which the lord hath commanded to be done.’
english: And Moses said unto the congregation: ‘This is the thing which the LORD hath commanded to be done.’

searchText: leviticus 8:6 and moses brought aaron and his sons, and washed them with water.
english: And Moses brought Aaron and his sons, and washed them with water.

searchText: leviticus 8:7 and he put upon him the tunic, and girded him with the girdle, and clothed him with the robe, and put the ephod upon him, and he girded him with the skilfully woven band of the ephod, and bound it unto him therewith.
english: And he put upon him the tunic, and girded him with the girdle, and clothed him with the robe, and put the ephod upon him, and he girded him with the skilfully woven band of the ephod, and bound it unto him therewith.

searchText: leviticus 8:8 and he placed the breastplate upon him; and in the breastplate he put the urim and the thummim.
english: And he placed the breastplate upon him; and in the breastplate he put the Urim and the Thummim.

searchText: leviticus 8:9 and he set the mitre upon his head; and upon the mitre, in front, did he set the golden plate, the holy crown; as the lord commanded moses.
english: And he set the mitre upon his head; and upon the mitre, in front, did he set the golden plate, the holy crown; as the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: leviticus 8:10 and moses took the anointing oil, and anointed the tabernacle and all that was therein, and sanctified them.
english: And Moses took the anointing oil, and anointed the tabernacle and all that was therein, and sanctified them.

searchText: leviticus 8:11 and he sprinkled thereof upon the altar seven times, and anointed the altar and all its vessels, and the laver and its base, to sanctify them.
english: And he sprinkled thereof upon the altar seven times, and anointed the altar and all its vessels, and the laver and its base, to sanctify them.

searchText: leviticus 8:12 and he poured of the anointing oil upon aaron’s head, and anointed him, to sanctify him.
english: And he poured of the anointing oil upon Aaron’s head, and anointed him, to sanctify him.

searchText: leviticus 8:13 and moses brought aaron’s sons, and clothed them with tunics, and girded them with girdles, and bound head-tires upon them; as the lord commanded moses.
english: And Moses brought Aaron’s sons, and clothed them with tunics, and girded them with girdles, and bound head-tires upon them; as the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: leviticus 8:14 and the bullock of the sin-offering was brought; and aaron and his sons laid their hands upon the head of the bullock of the sin-offering.
english: And the bullock of the sin-offering was brought; and Aaron and his sons laid their hands upon the head of the bullock of the sin-offering.

searchText: leviticus 8:15 and when it was slain, moses took the blood, and put it upon the horns of the altar round about with his finger, and purified the altar, and poured out the remaining blood at the base of the altar, and sanctified it, to make atonement for it.
english: And when it was slain, Moses took the blood, and put it upon the horns of the altar round about with his finger, and purified the altar, and poured out the remaining blood at the base of the altar, and sanctified it, to make atonement for it.

searchText: leviticus 8:16 and he took all the fat that was upon the inwards, and the lobe of the liver, and the two kidneys, and their fat, and moses made it smoke upon the altar.
english: And he took all the fat that was upon the inwards, and the lobe of the liver, and the two kidneys, and their fat, and Moses made it smoke upon the altar.

searchText: leviticus 8:17 but the bullock, and its skin, and its flesh, and its dung, were burnt with fire without the camp; as the lord commanded moses.
english: But the bullock, and its skin, and its flesh, and its dung, were burnt with fire without the camp; as the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: leviticus 8:18 and the ram of the burnt-offering was presented; and aaron and his sons laid their hands upon the head of the ram.
english: And the ram of the burnt-offering was presented; and Aaron and his sons laid their hands upon the head of the ram.

searchText: leviticus 8:19 and when it was killed, moses dashed the blood against the altar round about.
english: And when it was killed, Moses dashed the blood against the altar round about.

searchText: leviticus 8:20 and when the ram was cut into its pieces, moses made the head, and the pieces, and the suet smoke.
english: And when the ram was cut into its pieces, Moses made the head, and the pieces, and the suet smoke.

searchText: leviticus 8:21 and when the inwards and the legs were washed with water, moses made the whole ram smoke upon the altar; it was a burnt-offering for a sweet savour; it was an offering made by fire unto the lord; as the lord commanded moses.
english: And when the inwards and the legs were washed with water, Moses made the whole ram smoke upon the altar; it was a burnt-offering for a sweet savour; it was an offering made by fire unto the LORD; as the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: leviticus 8:22 and the other ram was presented, the ram of consecration, and aaron and his sons laid their hands upon the head of the ram.
english: And the other ram was presented, the ram of consecration, and Aaron and his sons laid their hands upon the head of the ram.

searchText: leviticus 8:23 and when it was slain, moses took of the blood thereof, and put it upon the tip of aaron’s right ear, and upon the thumb of his right hand, and upon the great toe of his right foot.
english: And when it was slain, Moses took of the blood thereof, and put it upon the tip of Aaron’s right ear, and upon the thumb of his right hand, and upon the great toe of his right foot.

searchText: leviticus 8:24 and aaron’s sons were brought, and moses put of the blood upon the tip of their right ear, and upon the thumb of their right hand, and upon the great toe of their right foot; and moses dashed the blood against the altar round about.
english: And Aaron’s sons were brought, and Moses put of the blood upon the tip of their right ear, and upon the thumb of their right hand, and upon the great toe of their right foot; and Moses dashed the blood against the altar round about.

searchText: leviticus 8:25 and he took the fat, and the fat tail, and all the fat that was upon the inwards, and the lobe of the liver, and the two kidneys, and their fat, and the right thigh.
english: And he took the fat, and the fat tail, and all the fat that was upon the inwards, and the lobe of the liver, and the two kidneys, and their fat, and the right thigh.

searchText: leviticus 8:26 and out of the basket of unleavened bread, that was before the lord, he took one unleavened cake, and one cake of oiled bread, and one wafer, and placed them on the fat, and upon the right thigh.
english: And out of the basket of unleavened bread, that was before the LORD, he took one unleavened cake, and one cake of oiled bread, and one wafer, and placed them on the fat, and upon the right thigh.

searchText: leviticus 8:27 and he put the whole upon the hands of aaron, and upon the hands of his sons, and waved them for a wave-offering before the lord.
english: And he put the whole upon the hands of Aaron, and upon the hands of his sons, and waved them for a wave-offering before the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 8:28 and moses took them from off their hands, and made them smoke on the altar upon the burnt-offering; they were a consecration-offering for a sweet savour; it was an offering made by fire unto the lord.
english: And Moses took them from off their hands, and made them smoke on the altar upon the burnt-offering; they were a consecration-offering for a sweet savour; it was an offering made by fire unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 8:29 and moses took the breast, and waved it for a wave-offering before the lord; it was moses’portion of the ram of consecration; as the lord commanded moses.
english: And Moses took the breast, and waved it for a wave-offering before the LORD; it was Moses’portion of the ram of consecration; as the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: leviticus 8:30 and moses took of the anointing oil, and of the blood which was upon the altar, and sprinkled it upon aaron, and upon his garments, and upon his sons, and upon his sons’garments with him, and sanctified aaron, and his garments, and his sons, and his sons’garments with him.
english: And Moses took of the anointing oil, and of the blood which was upon the altar, and sprinkled it upon Aaron, and upon his garments, and upon his sons, and upon his sons’garments with him, and sanctified Aaron, and his garments, and his sons, and his sons’garments with him.

searchText: leviticus 8:31 and moses said unto aaron and to his sons: ‘boil the flesh at the door of the tent of meeting; and there eat it and the bread that is in the basket of consecration, as i commanded, saying: aaron and his sons shall eat it.
english: And Moses said unto Aaron and to his sons: ‘Boil the flesh at the door of the tent of meeting; and there eat it and the bread that is in the basket of consecration, as I commanded, saying: Aaron and his sons shall eat it.

searchText: leviticus 8:32 and that which remaineth of the flesh and of the bread shall ye burn with fire.
english: And that which remaineth of the flesh and of the bread shall ye burn with fire.

searchText: leviticus 8:33 and ye shall not go out from the door of the tent of meeting seven days, until the days of your consecration be fulfilled; for he shall consecrate you seven days.
english: And ye shall not go out from the door of the tent of meeting seven days, until the days of your consecration be fulfilled; for He shall consecrate you seven days.

searchText: leviticus 8:34 as hath been done this day, so the lord hath commanded to do, to make atonement for you.
english: As hath been done this day, so the LORD hath commanded to do, to make atonement for you.

searchText: leviticus 8:35 and at the door of the tent of meeting shall ye abide day and night seven days, and keep the charge of the lord, that ye die not; for so i am commanded.
english: And at the door of the tent of meeting shall ye abide day and night seven days, and keep the charge of the LORD, that ye die not; for so I am commanded.

searchText: leviticus 8:36 and aaron and his sons did all the things which the lord commanded by the hand of moses.
english: And Aaron and his sons did all the things which the LORD commanded by the hand of Moses.

searchText: leviticus 9:1 and it came to pass on the eighth day, that moses called aaron and his sons, and the elders of israel;
english: And it came to pass on the eighth day, that Moses called Aaron and his sons, and the elders of Israel;

searchText: leviticus 9:2 and he said unto aaron: ‘take thee a bull-calf for a sin-offering, and a ram for a burnt-offering, without blemish, and offer them before the lord.
english: and he said unto Aaron: ‘Take thee a bull-calf for a sin-offering, and a ram for a burnt-offering, without blemish, and offer them before the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 9:3 and unto the children of israel thou shalt speak, saying: take ye a he-goat for a sin-offering; and a calf and a lamb, both of the first year, without blemish, for a burnt-offering;
english: And unto the children of Israel thou shalt speak, saying: Take ye a he-goat for a sin-offering; and a calf and a lamb, both of the first year, without blemish, for a burnt-offering;

searchText: leviticus 9:4 and an ox and a ram for peace-offerings, to sacrifice before the lord; and a meal-offering mingled with oil; for to-day the lord appeareth unto you.’
english: and an ox and a ram for peace-offerings, to sacrifice before the LORD; and a meal-offering mingled with oil; for to-day the LORD appeareth unto you.’

searchText: leviticus 9:5 and they brought that which moses commanded before the tent of meeting; and all the congregation drew near and stood before the lord.
english: And they brought that which Moses commanded before the tent of meeting; and all the congregation drew near and stood before the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 9:6 and moses said: ‘this is the thing which the lord commanded that ye should do; that the glory of the lord may appear unto you.’
english: And Moses said: ‘This is the thing which the LORD commanded that ye should do; that the glory of the LORD may appear unto you.’

searchText: leviticus 9:7 and moses said unto aaron: ‘draw near unto the altar, and offer thy sin-offering, and thy burnt-offering, and make atonement for thyself, and for the people; and present the offering of the people, and make atonement for them; as the lord commanded.’
english: And Moses said unto Aaron: ‘Draw near unto the altar, and offer thy sin-offering, and thy burnt-offering, and make atonement for thyself, and for the people; and present the offering of the people, and make atonement for them; as the LORD commanded.’

searchText: leviticus 9:8 so aaron drew near unto the altar, and slew the calf of the sin-offering, which was for himself.
english: So Aaron drew near unto the altar, and slew the calf of the sin-offering, which was for himself.

searchText: leviticus 9:9 and the sons of aaron presented the blood unto him; and he dipped his finger in the blood, and put it upon the horns of the altar, and poured out the blood at the base of the altar.
english: And the sons of Aaron presented the blood unto him; and he dipped his finger in the blood, and put it upon the horns of the altar, and poured out the blood at the base of the altar.

searchText: leviticus 9:10 but the fat, and the kidneys, and the lobe of the liver of the sin-offering, he made smoke upon the altar; as the lord commanded moses.
english: But the fat, and the kidneys, and the lobe of the liver of the sin-offering, he made smoke upon the altar; as the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: leviticus 9:11 and the flesh and the skin were burnt with fire without the camp.
english: And the flesh and the skin were burnt with fire without the camp.

searchText: leviticus 9:12 and he slew the burnt-offering; and aaron’s sons delivered unto him the blood, and he dashed it against the altar round about.
english: And he slew the burnt-offering; and Aaron’s sons delivered unto him the blood, and he dashed it against the altar round about.

searchText: leviticus 9:13 and they delivered the burnt-offering unto him, piece by piece, and the head; and he made them smoke upon the altar.
english: And they delivered the burnt-offering unto him, piece by piece, and the head; and he made them smoke upon the altar.

searchText: leviticus 9:14 and he washed the inwards and the legs, and made them smoke upon the burnt-offering on the altar.
english: And he washed the inwards and the legs, and made them smoke upon the burnt-offering on the altar.

searchText: leviticus 9:15 and the people’s offering was presented; and he took the goat of the sin-offering which was for the people, and slew it, and offered it for sin, as the first.
english: And the people’s offering was presented; and he took the goat of the sin-offering which was for the people, and slew it, and offered it for sin, as the first.

searchText: leviticus 9:16 and the burnt-offering was presented; and he offered it according to the ordinance.
english: And the burnt-offering was presented; and he offered it according to the ordinance.

searchText: leviticus 9:17 and the meal-offering was presented; and he filled his hand therefrom, and made it smoke upon the altar, besides the burnt-offering of the morning.
english: And the meal-offering was presented; and he filled his hand therefrom, and made it smoke upon the altar, besides the burnt-offering of the morning.

searchText: leviticus 9:18 he slew also the ox and the ram, the sacrifice of peace-offerings, which was for the people; and aaron’s sons delivered unto him the blood, and he dashed it against the altar round about,
english: He slew also the ox and the ram, the sacrifice of peace-offerings, which was for the people; and Aaron’s sons delivered unto him the blood, and he dashed it against the altar round about,

searchText: leviticus 9:19 and the fat of the ox, and of the ram, the fat tail, and that which covereth the inwards, and the kidneys, and the lobe of the liver.
english: and the fat of the ox, and of the ram, the fat tail, and that which covereth the inwards, and the kidneys, and the lobe of the liver.

searchText: leviticus 9:20 and they put the fat upon the breasts, and he made the fat smoke upon the altar.
english: And they put the fat upon the breasts, and he made the fat smoke upon the altar.

searchText: leviticus 9:21 and the breasts and the right thigh aaron waved for a wave-offering before the lord; as moses commanded.
english: And the breasts and the right thigh Aaron waved for a wave-offering before the LORD; as Moses commanded.

searchText: leviticus 9:22 and aaron lifted up his hands toward the people, and blessed them; and he came down from offering the sin-offering, and the burnt-offering, and the peace-offerings.
english: And Aaron lifted up his hands toward the people, and blessed them; and he came down from offering the sin-offering, and the burnt-offering, and the peace-offerings.

searchText: leviticus 9:23 and moses and aaron went into the tent of meeting, and came out, and blessed the people; and the glory of the lord appeared unto all the people.
english: And Moses and Aaron went into the tent of meeting, and came out, and blessed the people; and the glory of the LORD appeared unto all the people.

searchText: leviticus 9:24 and there came forth fire from before the lord, and consumed upon the altar the burnt-offering and the fat; and when all the people saw it, they shouted, and fell on their faces.
english: And there came forth fire from before the LORD, and consumed upon the altar the burnt-offering and the fat; and when all the people saw it, they shouted, and fell on their faces.

searchText: leviticus 10:1 and nadab and abihu, the sons of aaron, took each of them his censer, and put fire therein, and laid incense thereon, and offered strange fire before the lord, which he had not commanded them.
english: And Nadab and Abihu, the sons of Aaron, took each of them his censer, and put fire therein, and laid incense thereon, and offered strange fire before the LORD, which He had not commanded them.

searchText: leviticus 10:2 and there came forth fire from before the lord, and devoured them, and they died before the lord.
english: And there came forth fire from before the LORD, and devoured them, and they died before the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 10:3 then moses said unto aaron: ‘this is it that the lord spoke, saying: through them that are nigh unto me i will be sanctified, and before all the people i will be glorified.’ and aaron held his peace.
english: Then Moses said unto Aaron: ‘This is it that the LORD spoke, saying: Through them that are nigh unto Me I will be sanctified, and before all the people I will be glorified.’ And Aaron held his peace.

searchText: leviticus 10:4 and moses called mishael and elzaphan, the sons of uzziel the uncle of aaron, and said unto them: ‘draw near, carry your brethren from before the sanctuary out of the camp.’
english: And Moses called Mishael and Elzaphan, the sons of Uzziel the uncle of Aaron, and said unto them: ‘Draw near, carry your brethren from before the sanctuary out of the camp.’

searchText: leviticus 10:5 so they drew near, and carried them in their tunics out of the camp, as moses had said.
english: So they drew near, and carried them in their tunics out of the camp, as Moses had said.

searchText: leviticus 10:6 and moses said unto aaron, and unto eleazar and unto ithamar, his sons: ‘let not the hair of your heads go loose, neither rend your clothes, that ye die not, and that he be not wroth with all the congregation; but let your brethren, the whole house of israel, bewail the burning which the lord hath kindled.
english: And Moses said unto Aaron, and unto Eleazar and unto Ithamar, his sons: ‘Let not the hair of your heads go loose, neither rend your clothes, that ye die not, and that He be not wroth with all the congregation; but let your brethren, the whole house of Israel, bewail the burning which the LORD hath kindled.

searchText: leviticus 10:7 and ye shall not go out from the door of the tent of meeting, lest ye die; for the anointing oil of the lord is upon you.’ and they did according to the word of moses.
english: And ye shall not go out from the door of the tent of meeting, lest ye die; for the anointing oil of the LORD is upon you.’ And they did according to the word of Moses.

searchText: leviticus 10:8 and the lord spoke unto aaron, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Aaron, saying:

searchText: leviticus 10:9 ’drink no wine nor strong drink, thou, nor thy sons with thee, when ye go into the tent of meeting, that ye die not; it shall be a statute forever throughout your generations.
english: ’Drink no wine nor strong drink, thou, nor thy sons with thee, when ye go into the tent of meeting, that ye die not; it shall be a statute forever throughout your generations.

searchText: leviticus 10:10 and that ye may put difference between the holy and the common, and between the unclean and the clean;
english: And that ye may put difference between the holy and the common, and between the unclean and the clean;

searchText: leviticus 10:11 and that ye may teach the children of israel all the statutes which the lord hath spoken unto them by the hand of moses.’
english: and that ye may teach the children of Israel all the statutes which the LORD hath spoken unto them by the hand of Moses.’

searchText: leviticus 10:12 and moses spoke unto aaron, and unto eleazar and unto ithamar, his sons that were left: ‘take the meal-offering that remaineth of the offerings of the lord made by fire, and eat it without leaven beside the altar; for it is most holy.
english: And Moses spoke unto Aaron, and unto Eleazar and unto Ithamar, his sons that were left: ‘Take the meal-offering that remaineth of the offerings of the LORD made by fire, and eat it without leaven beside the altar; for it is most holy.

searchText: leviticus 10:13 and ye shall eat it in a holy place, because it is thy due, and thy sons’due, of the offerings of the lord made by fire; for so i am commanded.
english: And ye shall eat it in a holy place, because it is thy due, and thy sons’due, of the offerings of the LORD made by fire; for so I am commanded.

searchText: leviticus 10:14 and the breast of waving and the thigh of heaving shall ye eat in a clean place; thou, and thy sons, and thy daughters with thee; for they are given as thy due, and thy sons’due, out of the sacrifices of the peace-offerings of the children of israel.
english: And the breast of waving and the thigh of heaving shall ye eat in a clean place; thou, and thy sons, and thy daughters with thee; for they are given as thy due, and thy sons’due, out of the sacrifices of the peace-offerings of the children of Israel.

searchText: leviticus 10:15 the thigh of heaving and the breast of waving shall they bring with the offerings of the fat made by fire, to wave it for a wave-offering before the lord; and it shall be thine, and thy sons’with thee, as a due for ever; as the lord hath commanded.’
english: The thigh of heaving and the breast of waving shall they bring with the offerings of the fat made by fire, to wave it for a wave-offering before the LORD; and it shall be thine, and thy sons’with thee, as a due for ever; as the LORD hath commanded.’

searchText: leviticus 10:16 and moses diligently inquired for the goat of the sin-offering, and, behold, it was burnt; and he was angry with eleazar and with ithamar, the sons of aaron that were left, saying:
english: And Moses diligently inquired for the goat of the sin-offering, and, behold, it was burnt; and he was angry with Eleazar and with Ithamar, the sons of Aaron that were left, saying:

searchText: leviticus 10:17 ’wherefore have ye not eaten the sin-offering in the place of the sanctuary, seeing it is most holy, and he hath given it you to bear the iniquity of the congregation, to make atonement for them before the lord?
english: ’Wherefore have ye not eaten the sin-offering in the place of the sanctuary, seeing it is most holy, and He hath given it you to bear the iniquity of the congregation, to make atonement for them before the LORD?

searchText: leviticus 10:18 behold, the blood of it was not brought into the sanctuary within; ye should certainly have eaten it in the sanctuary, as i commanded.’
english: Behold, the blood of it was not brought into the sanctuary within; ye should certainly have eaten it in the sanctuary, as I commanded.’

searchText: leviticus 10:19 and aaron spoke unto moses: ‘behold, this day have they offered their sin-offering and their burnt-offering before the lord, and there have befallen me such things as these; and if i had eaten the sin-offering to-day, would it have been well-pleasing in the sight of the lord?
english: And Aaron spoke unto Moses: ‘Behold, this day have they offered their sin-offering and their burnt-offering before the LORD, and there have befallen me such things as these; and if I had eaten the sin-offering to-day, would it have been well-pleasing in the sight of the LORD?

searchText: leviticus 10:20 and when moses heard that, it was well-pleasing in his sight.
english: And when Moses heard that, it was well-pleasing in his sight.

searchText: leviticus 11:1 and the lord spoke unto moses and to aaron, saying unto them:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses and to Aaron, saying unto them:

searchText: leviticus 11:2 speak unto the children of israel, saying: these are the living things which ye may eat among all the beasts that are on the earth.
english: Speak unto the children of Israel, saying: These are the living things which ye may eat among all the beasts that are on the earth.

searchText: leviticus 11:3 whatsoever parteth the hoof, and is wholly cloven-footed, and cheweth the cud, among the beasts, that may ye eat.
english: Whatsoever parteth the hoof, and is wholly cloven-footed, and cheweth the cud, among the beasts, that may ye eat.

searchText: leviticus 11:4 nevertheless these shall ye not eat of them that only chew the cud, or of them that only part the hoof: the camel, because he cheweth the cud but parteth not the hoof, he is unclean unto you.
english: Nevertheless these shall ye not eat of them that only chew the cud, or of them that only part the hoof: the camel, because he cheweth the cud but parteth not the hoof, he is unclean unto you.

searchText: leviticus 11:5 and the rock-badger, because he cheweth the cud but parteth not the hoof, he is unclean unto you.
english: And the rock-badger, because he cheweth the cud but parteth not the hoof, he is unclean unto you.

searchText: leviticus 11:6 and the hare, because she cheweth the cud but parteth not the hoof, she is unclean unto you.
english: And the hare, because she cheweth the cud but parteth not the hoof, she is unclean unto you.

searchText: leviticus 11:7 and the swine, because he parteth the hoof, and is cloven-footed, but cheweth not the cud, he is unclean unto you.
english: And the swine, because he parteth the hoof, and is cloven-footed, but cheweth not the cud, he is unclean unto you.

searchText: leviticus 11:8 of their flesh ye shall not eat, and their carcasses ye shall not touch; they are unclean unto you.
english: Of their flesh ye shall not eat, and their carcasses ye shall not touch; they are unclean unto you.

searchText: leviticus 11:9 these may ye eat of all that are in the waters: whatsoever hath fins and scales in the waters, in the seas, and in the rivers, them may ye eat.
english: These may ye eat of all that are in the waters: whatsoever hath fins and scales in the waters, in the seas, and in the rivers, them may ye eat.

searchText: leviticus 11:10 and all that have not fins and scales in the seas, and in the rivers, of all that swarm in the waters, and of all the living creatures that are in the waters, they are a detestable thing unto you,
english: And all that have not fins and scales in the seas, and in the rivers, of all that swarm in the waters, and of all the living creatures that are in the waters, they are a detestable thing unto you,

searchText: leviticus 11:11 and they shall be a detestable thing unto you; ye shall not eat of their flesh, and their carcasses ye shall have in detestation.
english: and they shall be a detestable thing unto you; ye shall not eat of their flesh, and their carcasses ye shall have in detestation.

searchText: leviticus 11:12 whatsoever hath no fins nor scales in the waters, that is a detestable thing unto you.
english: Whatsoever hath no fins nor scales in the waters, that is a detestable thing unto you.

searchText: leviticus 11:13 and these ye shall have in detestation among the fowls; they shall not be eaten, they are a detestable thing: the great vulture, and the bearded vulture, and the ospray;
english: And these ye shall have in detestation among the fowls; they shall not be eaten, they are a detestable thing: the great vulture, and the bearded vulture, and the ospray;

searchText: leviticus 11:14 and the kite, and the falcon after its kinds;
english: and the kite, and the falcon after its kinds;

searchText: leviticus 11:15 every raven after its kinds;
english: every raven after its kinds;

searchText: leviticus 11:16 and the ostrich, and the night-hawk, and the sea-mew, and the hawk after its kinds;
english: and the ostrich, and the night-hawk, and the sea-mew, and the hawk after its kinds;

searchText: leviticus 11:17 and the little owl, and the cormorant, and the great owl;
english: and the little owl, and the cormorant, and the great owl;

searchText: leviticus 11:18 and the horned owl, and the pelican, and the carrion-vulture;
english: and the horned owl, and the pelican, and the carrion-vulture;

searchText: leviticus 11:19 and the stork, and the heron after its kinds, and the hoopoe, and the bat.
english: and the stork, and the heron after its kinds, and the hoopoe, and the bat.

searchText: leviticus 11:20 all winged swarming things that go upon all fours are a detestable thing unto you.
english: All winged swarming things that go upon all fours are a detestable thing unto you.

searchText: leviticus 11:21 yet these may ye eat of all winged swarming things that go upon all fours, which have jointed legs above their feet, wherewith to leap upon the earth;
english: Yet these may ye eat of all winged swarming things that go upon all fours, which have jointed legs above their feet, wherewith to leap upon the earth;

searchText: leviticus 11:22 even these of them ye may eat: the locust after its kinds, and the bald locust after its kinds, and the cricket after its kinds, and the grasshopper after its kinds.
english: even these of them ye may eat: the locust after its kinds, and the bald locust after its kinds, and the cricket after its kinds, and the grasshopper after its kinds.

searchText: leviticus 11:23 but all winged swarming things, which have four feet, are a detestable thing unto you.
english: But all winged swarming things, which have four feet, are a detestable thing unto you.

searchText: leviticus 11:24 and by these ye shall become unclean; whosoever toucheth the carcass of them shall be unclean until even.
english: And by these ye shall become unclean; whosoever toucheth the carcass of them shall be unclean until even.

searchText: leviticus 11:25 and whosoever beareth aught of the carcass of them shall wash his clothes, and be unclean until the even.
english: And whosoever beareth aught of the carcass of them shall wash his clothes, and be unclean until the even.

searchText: leviticus 11:26 every beast which parteth the hoof, but is not cloven footed, nor cheweth the cud, is unclean unto you; every one that to toucheth them shall be unclean.
english: Every beast which parteth the hoof, but is not cloven footed, nor cheweth the cud, is unclean unto you; every one that to toucheth them shall be unclean.

searchText: leviticus 11:27 and whatsoever goeth upon its paws, among all beasts that go on all fours, they are unclean unto you; whoso toucheth their carcass shall be unclean until the even.
english: And whatsoever goeth upon its paws, among all beasts that go on all fours, they are unclean unto you; whoso toucheth their carcass shall be unclean until the even.

searchText: leviticus 11:28 and he that beareth the carcass of them shall wash his clothes, and be unclean until the even; they are unclean unto you.
english: And he that beareth the carcass of them shall wash his clothes, and be unclean until the even; they are unclean unto you.

searchText: leviticus 11:29 and these are they which are unclean unto you among the swarming things that swarm upon the earth: the weasel, and the mouse, and the great lizard after its kinds,
english: And these are they which are unclean unto you among the swarming things that swarm upon the earth: the weasel, and the mouse, and the great lizard after its kinds,

searchText: leviticus 11:30 and the gecko, and the land-crocodile, and the lizard, and the sand-lizard, and the chameleon.
english: and the gecko, and the land-crocodile, and the lizard, and the sand-lizard, and the chameleon.

searchText: leviticus 11:31 these are they which are unclean to you among all that swarm; whosoever doth touch them, when they are dead, shall be unclean until the even.
english: These are they which are unclean to you among all that swarm; whosoever doth touch them, when they are dead, shall be unclean until the even.

searchText: leviticus 11:32 and upon whatsoever any of them, when they are dead, doth fall, it shall be unclean; whether it be any vessel of wood, or raiment, or skin, or sack, whatsoever vessel it be, wherewith any work is done, it must be put into water, and it shall be unclean until the even; then shall it be clean.
english: And upon whatsoever any of them, when they are dead, doth fall, it shall be unclean; whether it be any vessel of wood, or raiment, or skin, or sack, whatsoever vessel it be, wherewith any work is done, it must be put into water, and it shall be unclean until the even; then shall it be clean.

searchText: leviticus 11:33 and every earthen vessel whereinto any of them falleth, whatsoever is in it shall be unclean, and it ye shall break.
english: And every earthen vessel whereinto any of them falleth, whatsoever is in it shall be unclean, and it ye shall break.

searchText: leviticus 11:34 all food therein which may be eaten, that on which water cometh, shall be unclean; and all drink in every such vessel that may be drunk shall be unclean.
english: All food therein which may be eaten, that on which water cometh, shall be unclean; and all drink in every such vessel that may be drunk shall be unclean.

searchText: leviticus 11:35 and every thing whereupon any part of their carcass falleth shall be unclean; whether oven, or range for pots, it shall be broken in pieces; they are unclean, and shall be unclean unto you.
english: And every thing whereupon any part of their carcass falleth shall be unclean; whether oven, or range for pots, it shall be broken in pieces; they are unclean, and shall be unclean unto you.

searchText: leviticus 11:36 nevertheless a fountain or a cistern wherein is a gathering of water shall be clean; but he who toucheth their carcass shall be unclean.
english: Nevertheless a fountain or a cistern wherein is a gathering of water shall be clean; but he who toucheth their carcass shall be unclean.

searchText: leviticus 11:37 and if aught of their carcass fall upon any sowing seed which is to be sown, it is clean.
english: And if aught of their carcass fall upon any sowing seed which is to be sown, it is clean.

searchText: leviticus 11:38 but if water be put upon the seed, and aught of their carcass fall thereon, it is unclean unto you.
english: But if water be put upon the seed, and aught of their carcass fall thereon, it is unclean unto you.

searchText: leviticus 11:39 and if any beast, of which ye may eat, die, he that toucheth the carcass thereof shall be unclean until the even.
english: And if any beast, of which ye may eat, die, he that toucheth the carcass thereof shall be unclean until the even.

searchText: leviticus 11:40 and he that eateth of the carcass of it shall wash his clothes, and be unclean until the even; he also that beareth the carcass of it shall wash his clothes, and be unclean until the even.
english: And he that eateth of the carcass of it shall wash his clothes, and be unclean until the even; he also that beareth the carcass of it shall wash his clothes, and be unclean until the even.

searchText: leviticus 11:41 and every swarming thing that swarmeth upon the earth is a detestable thing; it shall not be eaten.
english: And every swarming thing that swarmeth upon the earth is a detestable thing; it shall not be eaten.

searchText: leviticus 11:42 whatsoever goeth upon the belly, and whatsoever goeth upon all fours, or whatsoever hath many feet, even all swarming things that swarm upon the earth, them ye shall not eat; for they are a detestable thing.
english: Whatsoever goeth upon the belly, and whatsoever goeth upon all fours, or whatsoever hath many feet, even all swarming things that swarm upon the earth, them ye shall not eat; for they are a detestable thing.

searchText: leviticus 11:43 ye shall not make yourselves detestable with any swarming thing that swarmeth, neither shall ye make yourselves unclean with them, that ye should be defiled thereby.
english: Ye shall not make yourselves detestable with any swarming thing that swarmeth, neither shall ye make yourselves unclean with them, that ye should be defiled thereby.

searchText: leviticus 11:44 for i am the lord your god; sanctify yourselves therefore, and be ye holy; for i am holy; neither shall ye defile yourselves with any manner of swarming thing that moveth upon the earth.
english: For I am the LORD your God; sanctify yourselves therefore, and be ye holy; for I am holy; neither shall ye defile yourselves with any manner of swarming thing that moveth upon the earth.

searchText: leviticus 11:45 for i am the lord that brought you up out of the land of egypt, to be your god; ye shall therefore be holy, for i am holy. .
english: For I am the LORD that brought you up out of the land of Egypt, to be your God; ye shall therefore be holy, for I am holy. .

searchText: leviticus 11:46 this is the law of the beast, and of the fowl, and of every living creature that moveth in the waters, and of every creature that swarmeth upon the earth;
english: This is the law of the beast, and of the fowl, and of every living creature that moveth in the waters, and of every creature that swarmeth upon the earth;

searchText: leviticus 11:47 to make a difference between the unclean and the clean, and between the living thing that may be eaten and the living thing that may not be eaten.
english: to make a difference between the unclean and the clean, and between the living thing that may be eaten and the living thing that may not be eaten.

searchText: leviticus 12:1 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: leviticus 12:2 speak unto the children of israel, saying: if a woman be delivered, and bear a man-child, then she shall be unclean seven days; as in the days of the impurity of her sickness shall she be unclean.
english: Speak unto the children of Israel, saying: If a woman be delivered, and bear a man-child, then she shall be unclean seven days; as in the days of the impurity of her sickness shall she be unclean.

searchText: leviticus 12:3 and in the eighth day the flesh of his foreskin shall be circumcised.
english: And in the eighth day the flesh of his foreskin shall be circumcised.

searchText: leviticus 12:4 and she shall continue in the blood of purification three and thirty days; she shall touch no hallowed thing, nor come into the sanctuary, until the days of her purification be fulfilled.
english: And she shall continue in the blood of purification three and thirty days; she shall touch no hallowed thing, nor come into the sanctuary, until the days of her purification be fulfilled.

searchText: leviticus 12:5 but if she bear a maid-child, then she shall be unclean two weeks, as in her impurity; and she shall continue in the blood of purification threescore and six days.
english: But if she bear a maid-child, then she shall be unclean two weeks, as in her impurity; and she shall continue in the blood of purification threescore and six days.

searchText: leviticus 12:6 and when the days of her purification are fulfilled, for a son, or for a daughter, she shall bring a lamb of the first year for a burnt-offering, and a young pigeon, or a turtle-dove, for a sin-offering, unto the door of the tent of meeting, unto the priest.
english: And when the days of her purification are fulfilled, for a son, or for a daughter, she shall bring a lamb of the first year for a burnt-offering, and a young pigeon, or a turtle-dove, for a sin-offering, unto the door of the tent of meeting, unto the priest.

searchText: leviticus 12:7 and he shall offer it before the lord, and make atonement for her; and she shall be cleansed from the fountain of her blood. this is the law for her that beareth, whether a male or a female.
english: And he shall offer it before the LORD, and make atonement for her; and she shall be cleansed from the fountain of her blood. This is the law for her that beareth, whether a male or a female.

searchText: leviticus 12:8 and if her means suffice not for a lamb, then she shall take two turtle-doves, or two young pigeons: the one for a burnt-offering, and the other for a sin-offering; and the priest shall make atonement for her, and she shall be clean.
english: And if her means suffice not for a lamb, then she shall take two turtle-doves, or two young pigeons: the one for a burnt-offering, and the other for a sin-offering; and the priest shall make atonement for her, and she shall be clean.

searchText: leviticus 13:1 and the lord spoke unto moses and unto aaron, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses and unto Aaron, saying:

searchText: leviticus 13:2 when a man shall have in the skin of his flesh a rising, or a scab, or a bright spot, and it become in the skin of his flesh the plague of leprosy, then he shall be brought unto aaron the priest, or unto one of his sons the priests.
english: When a man shall have in the skin of his flesh a rising, or a scab, or a bright spot, and it become in the skin of his flesh the plague of leprosy, then he shall be brought unto Aaron the priest, or unto one of his sons the priests.

searchText: leviticus 13:3 and the priest shall look upon the plague in the skin of the flesh; and if the hair in the plague be turned white, and the appearance of the plague be deeper than the skin of his flesh, it is the plague of leprosy; and the priest shall look on him, and pronounce him unclean.
english: And the priest shall look upon the plague in the skin of the flesh; and if the hair in the plague be turned white, and the appearance of the plague be deeper than the skin of his flesh, it is the plague of leprosy; and the priest shall look on him, and pronounce him unclean.

searchText: leviticus 13:4 and if the bright spot be white in the skin of his flesh, and the appearance thereof be not deeper than the skin, and the hair thereof be not turned white, then the priest shall shut up him that hath the plague seven days.
english: And if the bright spot be white in the skin of his flesh, and the appearance thereof be not deeper than the skin, and the hair thereof be not turned white, then the priest shall shut up him that hath the plague seven days.

searchText: leviticus 13:5 and the priest shall look on him the seventh day; and, behold, if the plague stay in its appearance, and the plague be not spread in the skin, then the priest shall shut him up seven days more.
english: And the priest shall look on him the seventh day; and, behold, if the plague stay in its appearance, and the plague be not spread in the skin, then the priest shall shut him up seven days more.

searchText: leviticus 13:6 and the priest shall look on him again the seventh day; and, behold, if the plague be dim, and the plague be not spread in the skin, then the priest shall pronounce him clean: it is a scab; and he shall wash his clothes, and be clean.
english: And the priest shall look on him again the seventh day; and, behold, if the plague be dim, and the plague be not spread in the skin, then the priest shall pronounce him clean: it is a scab; and he shall wash his clothes, and be clean.

searchText: leviticus 13:7 but if the scab spread abroad in the skin, after that he hath shown himself to the priest for his cleansing, he shall show himself to the priest again.
english: But if the scab spread abroad in the skin, after that he hath shown himself to the priest for his cleansing, he shall show himself to the priest again.

searchText: leviticus 13:8 and the priest shall look, and, behold, if the scab be spread in the skin, then the priest shall pronounce him unclean: it is leprosy.
english: And the priest shall look, and, behold, if the scab be spread in the skin, then the priest shall pronounce him unclean: it is leprosy.

searchText: leviticus 13:9 when the plague of leprosy is in a man, then he shall be brought unto the priest.
english: When the plague of leprosy is in a man, then he shall be brought unto the priest.

searchText: leviticus 13:10 and the priest shall look, and, behold, if there be a white rising in the skin, and it have turned the hair white, and there be quick raw flesh in the rising,
english: And the priest shall look, and, behold, if there be a white rising in the skin, and it have turned the hair white, and there be quick raw flesh in the rising,

searchText: leviticus 13:11 it is an old leprosy in the skin of his flesh, and the priest shall pronounce him unclean; he shall not shut him up; for he is unclean.
english: it is an old leprosy in the skin of his flesh, and the priest shall pronounce him unclean; he shall not shut him up; for he is unclean.

searchText: leviticus 13:12 and if the leprosy break out abroad in the skin, and the leprosy cover all the skin of him that hath the plague from his head even to his feet, as far as appeareth to the priest;
english: And if the leprosy break out abroad in the skin, and the leprosy cover all the skin of him that hath the plague from his head even to his feet, as far as appeareth to the priest;

searchText: leviticus 13:13 then the priest shall look; and, behold, if the leprosy have covered all his flesh, he shall pronounce him clean that hath the plague; it is all turned white: he is clean.
english: then the priest shall look; and, behold, if the leprosy have covered all his flesh, he shall pronounce him clean that hath the plague; it is all turned white: he is clean.

searchText: leviticus 13:14 but whensoever raw flesh appeareth in him, he shall be unclean.
english: But whensoever raw flesh appeareth in him, he shall be unclean.

searchText: leviticus 13:15 and the priest shall look on the raw flesh, and pronounce him unclean; the raw flesh is unclean: it is leprosy.
english: And the priest shall look on the raw flesh, and pronounce him unclean; the raw flesh is unclean: it is leprosy.

searchText: leviticus 13:16 but if the raw flesh again be turned into white, then he shall come unto the priest;
english: But if the raw flesh again be turned into white, then he shall come unto the priest;

searchText: leviticus 13:17 and the priest shall look on him; and, behold, if the plague be turned into white, then the priest shall pronounce him clean that hath the plague: he is clean.
english: and the priest shall look on him; and, behold, if the plague be turned into white, then the priest shall pronounce him clean that hath the plague: he is clean.

searchText: leviticus 13:18 and when the flesh hath in the skin thereof a boil, and it is healed,
english: And when the flesh hath in the skin thereof a boil, and it is healed,

searchText: leviticus 13:19 and in the place of the boil there is a white rising, or a bright spot, reddish-white, then it shall be shown to the priest.
english: and in the place of the boil there is a white rising, or a bright spot, reddish-white, then it shall be shown to the priest.

searchText: leviticus 13:20 and the priest shall look; and, behold, if the appearance thereof be lower than the skin, and the hair thereof be turned white, then the priest shall pronounce him unclean: it is the plague of leprosy, it hath broken out in the boil.
english: And the priest shall look; and, behold, if the appearance thereof be lower than the skin, and the hair thereof be turned white, then the priest shall pronounce him unclean: it is the plague of leprosy, it hath broken out in the boil.

searchText: leviticus 13:21 but if the priest look on it, and, behold, there be no white hairs therein, and it be not lower than the skin, but be dim, then the priest shall shut him up seven days.
english: But if the priest look on it, and, behold, there be no white hairs therein, and it be not lower than the skin, but be dim, then the priest shall shut him up seven days.

searchText: leviticus 13:22 and if it spread abroad in the skin, then the priest shall pronounce him unclean: it is a plague.
english: And if it spread abroad in the skin, then the priest shall pronounce him unclean: it is a plague.

searchText: leviticus 13:23 but if the bright spot stay in its place, and be not spread, it is the scar of the boil; and the priest shall pronounce him clean.
english: But if the bright spot stay in its place, and be not spread, it is the scar of the boil; and the priest shall pronounce him clean.

searchText: leviticus 13:24 or when the flesh hath in the skin thereof a burning by fire, and the quick flesh of the burning become a bright spot, reddish-white, or white;
english: Or when the flesh hath in the skin thereof a burning by fire, and the quick flesh of the burning become a bright spot, reddish-white, or white;

searchText: leviticus 13:25 then the priest shall look upon it; and, behold, if the hair in the bright spot be turned white, and the appearance thereof be deeper than the skin, it is leprosy, it hath broken out in the burning; and the priest shall pronounce him unclean: it is the plague of leprosy.
english: then the priest shall look upon it; and, behold, if the hair in the bright spot be turned white, and the appearance thereof be deeper than the skin, it is leprosy, it hath broken out in the burning; and the priest shall pronounce him unclean: it is the plague of leprosy.

searchText: leviticus 13:26 but if the priest look on it, and, behold, there be no white hair in the bright spot, and it be no lower than the skin, but be dim; then the priest shall shut him up seven days.
english: But if the priest look on it, and, behold, there be no white hair in the bright spot, and it be no lower than the skin, but be dim; then the priest shall shut him up seven days.

searchText: leviticus 13:27 and the priest shall look upon him the seventh day; if it spread abroad in the skin, then the priest shall pronounce him unclean: it is the plague of leprosy.
english: And the priest shall look upon him the seventh day; if it spread abroad in the skin, then the priest shall pronounce him unclean: it is the plague of leprosy.

searchText: leviticus 13:28 and if the bright spot stay in its place, and be not spread in the skin, but be dim, it is the rising of the burning, and the priest shall pronounce him clean; for it is the scar of the burning.
english: And if the bright spot stay in its place, and be not spread in the skin, but be dim, it is the rising of the burning, and the priest shall pronounce him clean; for it is the scar of the burning.

searchText: leviticus 13:29 and when a man or woman hath a plague upon the head or upon the beard,
english: And when a man or woman hath a plague upon the head or upon the beard,

searchText: leviticus 13:30 then the priest shall look on the plague; and, behold, if the appearance thereof be deeper than the skin, and there be in it yellow thin hair, then the priest shall pronounce him unclean: it is a scall, it is leprosy of the head or of the beard.
english: then the priest shall look on the plague; and, behold, if the appearance thereof be deeper than the skin, and there be in it yellow thin hair, then the priest shall pronounce him unclean: it is a scall, it is leprosy of the head or of the beard.

searchText: leviticus 13:31 and if the priest look on the plague of the scall, and, behold, the appearance thereof be not deeper than the skin, and there be no black hair in it, then the priest shall shut up him that hath the plague of the scall seven days.
english: And if the priest look on the plague of the scall, and, behold, the appearance thereof be not deeper than the skin, and there be no black hair in it, then the priest shall shut up him that hath the plague of the scall seven days.

searchText: leviticus 13:32 and in the seventh day the priest shall look on the plague; and, behold, if the scall be not spread, and there be in it no yellow hair, and the appearance of the scall be not deeper than the skin,
english: And in the seventh day the priest shall look on the plague; and, behold, if the scall be not spread, and there be in it no yellow hair, and the appearance of the scall be not deeper than the skin,

searchText: leviticus 13:33 then he shall be shaven, but the scall shall he not shave; and the priest shall shut up him that hath the scall seven days more.
english: then he shall be shaven, but the scall shall he not shave; and the priest shall shut up him that hath the scall seven days more.

searchText: leviticus 13:34 and in the seventh day the priest shall look on the scall; and, behold, if the scall be not spread in the skin, and the appearance thereof be not deeper than the skin, then the priest shall pronounce him clean; and he shall wash his clothes, and be clean.
english: And in the seventh day the priest shall look on the scall; and, behold, if the scall be not spread in the skin, and the appearance thereof be not deeper than the skin, then the priest shall pronounce him clean; and he shall wash his clothes, and be clean.

searchText: leviticus 13:35 but if the scall spread abroad in the skin after his cleansing,
english: But if the scall spread abroad in the skin after his cleansing,

searchText: leviticus 13:36 then the priest shall look on him; and, behold, if the scall be spread in the skin, the priest shall not seek for the yellow hair: he is unclean.
english: then the priest shall look on him; and, behold, if the scall be spread in the skin, the priest shall not seek for the yellow hair: he is unclean.

searchText: leviticus 13:37 but if the scall stay in its appearance, and black hair be grown up therein; the scall is healed, he is clean; and the priest shall pronounce him clean.
english: But if the scall stay in its appearance, and black hair be grown up therein; the scall is healed, he is clean; and the priest shall pronounce him clean.

searchText: leviticus 13:38 and if a man or a woman have in the skin of their flesh bright spots, even white bright spots;
english: And if a man or a woman have in the skin of their flesh bright spots, even white bright spots;

searchText: leviticus 13:39 then the priest shall look; and, behold, if the bright spots in the skin of their flesh be of a dull white, it is a tetter, it hath broken out in the skin: he is clean.
english: then the priest shall look; and, behold, if the bright spots in the skin of their flesh be of a dull white, it is a tetter, it hath broken out in the skin: he is clean.

searchText: leviticus 13:40 and if a man’s hair be fallen off his head, he is bald; yet is he clean.
english: And if a man’s hair be fallen off his head, he is bald; yet is he clean.

searchText: leviticus 13:41 and if his hair be fallen off from the front part of his head, he is forehead-bald; yet is he clean.
english: And if his hair be fallen off from the front part of his head, he is forehead-bald; yet is he clean.

searchText: leviticus 13:42 but if there be in the bald head, or the bald forehead, a reddish-white plague, it is leprosy breaking out in his bald head, or his bald forehead.
english: But if there be in the bald head, or the bald forehead, a reddish-white plague, it is leprosy breaking out in his bald head, or his bald forehead.

searchText: leviticus 13:43 then the priest shall look upon him; and, behold, if the rising of the plague be reddish-white in his bald head, or in his bald forehead, as the appearance of leprosy in the skin of the flesh,
english: Then the priest shall look upon him; and, behold, if the rising of the plague be reddish-white in his bald head, or in his bald forehead, as the appearance of leprosy in the skin of the flesh,

searchText: leviticus 13:44 he is a leprous man, he is unclean; the priest shall surely pronounce him unclean: his plague is in his head. .
english: he is a leprous man, he is unclean; the priest shall surely pronounce him unclean: his plague is in his head. .

searchText: leviticus 13:45 and the leper in whom the plague is, his clothes shall be rent, and the hair of his head shall go loose, and he shall cover his upper lip, and shall cry: ‘unclean, unclean.’
english: And the leper in whom the plague is, his clothes shall be rent, and the hair of his head shall go loose, and he shall cover his upper lip, and shall cry: ‘Unclean, unclean.’

searchText: leviticus 13:46 all the days wherein the plague is in him he shall be unclean; he is unclean; he shall dwell alone; without the camp shall his dwelling be.
english: All the days wherein the plague is in him he shall be unclean; he is unclean; he shall dwell alone; without the camp shall his dwelling be.

searchText: leviticus 13:47 and when the plague of leprosy is in a garment, whether it be a woolen garment, or a linen garment;
english: And when the plague of leprosy is in a garment, whether it be a woolen garment, or a linen garment;

searchText: leviticus 13:48 or in the warp, or in the woof, whether they be of linen, or of wool; or in a skin, or in any thing made of skin.
english: or in the warp, or in the woof, whether they be of linen, or of wool; or in a skin, or in any thing made of skin.

searchText: leviticus 13:49 if the plague be greenish or reddish in the garment, or in the skin, or in the warp, or in the woof, or in any thing of skin, it is the plague of leprosy, and shall be shown unto the priest.
english: If the plague be greenish or reddish in the garment, or in the skin, or in the warp, or in the woof, or in any thing of skin, it is the plague of leprosy, and shall be shown unto the priest.

searchText: leviticus 13:50 and the priest shall look upon the plague, and shut up that which hath the plague seven days.
english: And the priest shall look upon the plague, and shut up that which hath the plague seven days.

searchText: leviticus 13:51 and he shall look on the plague on the seventh day: if the plague be spread in the garment, or in the warp, or in the woof, or in the skin, whatever service skin is used for, the plague is a malignant leprosy: it is unclean.
english: And he shall look on the plague on the seventh day: if the plague be spread in the garment, or in the warp, or in the woof, or in the skin, whatever service skin is used for, the plague is a malignant leprosy: it is unclean.

searchText: leviticus 13:52 and he shall burn the garment, or the warp, or the woof, whether it be of wool or of linen, or any thing of skin, wherein the plague is; for it is a malignant leprosy; it shall be burnt in the fire.
english: And he shall burn the garment, or the warp, or the woof, whether it be of wool or of linen, or any thing of skin, wherein the plague is; for it is a malignant leprosy; it shall be burnt in the fire.

searchText: leviticus 13:53 and if the priest shall look, and, behold, the plague be not spread in the garment, or in the warp, or in the woof, or in any thing of skin;
english: And if the priest shall look, and, behold, the plague be not spread in the garment, or in the warp, or in the woof, or in any thing of skin;

searchText: leviticus 13:54 then the priest shall command that they wash the thing wherein the plague is, and he shall shut it up seven days more.
english: then the priest shall command that they wash the thing wherein the plague is, and he shall shut it up seven days more.

searchText: leviticus 13:55 and the priest shall look, after that the plague is washed; and, behold, if the plague have not changed its colour, and the plague be not spread, it is unclean; thou shalt burn it in the fire; it is a fret, whether the bareness be within or without.
english: And the priest shall look, after that the plague is washed; and, behold, if the plague have not changed its colour, and the plague be not spread, it is unclean; thou shalt burn it in the fire; it is a fret, whether the bareness be within or without.

searchText: leviticus 13:56 and if the priest look, and, behold, the plague be dim after the washing thereof, then he shall rend it out of the garment, or out of the skin, or out of the warp, or out of the woof.
english: And if the priest look, and, behold, the plague be dim after the washing thereof, then he shall rend it out of the garment, or out of the skin, or out of the warp, or out of the woof.

searchText: leviticus 13:57 and if it appear still in the garment, or in the warp, or in the woof, or in any thing of skin, it is breaking out, thou shalt burn that wherein the plague is with fire.
english: And if it appear still in the garment, or in the warp, or in the woof, or in any thing of skin, it is breaking out, thou shalt burn that wherein the plague is with fire.

searchText: leviticus 13:58 and the garment, or the warp, or the woof, or whatsoever thing of skin it be, which thou shalt wash, if the plague be departed from them, then it shall be washed the second time, and shall be clean.
english: And the garment, or the warp, or the woof, or whatsoever thing of skin it be, which thou shalt wash, if the plague be departed from them, then it shall be washed the second time, and shall be clean.

searchText: leviticus 13:59 this is the law of the plague of leprosy in a garment of wool or linen, or in the warp, or in the woof, or in any thing of skin, to pronounce it clean, or to pronounce it unclean.
english: This is the law of the plague of leprosy in a garment of wool or linen, or in the warp, or in the woof, or in any thing of skin, to pronounce it clean, or to pronounce it unclean.

searchText: leviticus 14:1 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: leviticus 14:2 this shall be the law of the leper in the day of his cleansing: he shall be brought unto the priest.
english: This shall be the law of the leper in the day of his cleansing: he shall be brought unto the priest.

searchText: leviticus 14:3 and the priest shall go forth out of the camp; and the priest shall look, and, behold, if the plague of leprosy be healed in the leper;
english: And the priest shall go forth out of the camp; and the priest shall look, and, behold, if the plague of leprosy be healed in the leper;

searchText: leviticus 14:4 then shall the priest command to take for him that is to be cleansed two living clean birds, and cedar-wood, and scarlet, and hyssop.
english: then shall the priest command to take for him that is to be cleansed two living clean birds, and cedar-wood, and scarlet, and hyssop.

searchText: leviticus 14:5 and the priest shall command to kill one of the birds in an earthen vessel over running water.
