english: And the priest shall command to kill one of the birds in an earthen vessel over running water.

searchText: leviticus 14:6 as for the living bird, he shall take it, and the cedar-wood, and the scarlet, and the hyssop, and shall dip them and the living bird in the blood of the bird that was killed over the running water.
english: As for the living bird, he shall take it, and the cedar-wood, and the scarlet, and the hyssop, and shall dip them and the living bird in the blood of the bird that was killed over the running water.

searchText: leviticus 14:7 and he shall sprinkle upon him that is to be cleansed from the leprosy seven times, and shall pronounce him clean, and shall let go the living bird into the open field.
english: And he shall sprinkle upon him that is to be cleansed from the leprosy seven times, and shall pronounce him clean, and shall let go the living bird into the open field.

searchText: leviticus 14:8 and he that is to be cleansed shall wash his clothes, and shave off all his hair, and bathe himself in water, and he shall be clean; and after that he may come into the camp, but shall dwell outside his tent seven days.
english: And he that is to be cleansed shall wash his clothes, and shave off all his hair, and bathe himself in water, and he shall be clean; and after that he may come into the camp, but shall dwell outside his tent seven days.

searchText: leviticus 14:9 and it shall be on the seventh day, that he shall shave all his hair off his head and his beard and his eyebrows, even all his hair he shall shave off; and he shall wash his clothes, and he shall bathe his flesh in water, and he shall be clean.
english: And it shall be on the seventh day, that he shall shave all his hair off his head and his beard and his eyebrows, even all his hair he shall shave off; and he shall wash his clothes, and he shall bathe his flesh in water, and he shall be clean.

searchText: leviticus 14:10 and on the eighth day he shall take two he-lambs without blemish, and one ewe-lamb of the first year without blemish, and three tenth parts of an ephah of fine flour for a meal-offering, mingled with oil, and one log of oil.
english: And on the eighth day he shall take two he-lambs without blemish, and one ewe-lamb of the first year without blemish, and three tenth parts of an ephah of fine flour for a meal-offering, mingled with oil, and one log of oil.

searchText: leviticus 14:11 and the priest that cleanseth him shall set the man that is to be cleansed, and those things, before the lord, at the door of the tent of meeting.
english: And the priest that cleanseth him shall set the man that is to be cleansed, and those things, before the LORD, at the door of the tent of meeting.

searchText: leviticus 14:12 and the priest shall take one of the he-lambs, and offer him for a guilt-offering, and the log of oil, and wave them for a wave-offering before the lord.
english: And the priest shall take one of the he-lambs, and offer him for a guilt-offering, and the log of oil, and wave them for a wave-offering before the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 14:13 and he shall kill the he-lamb in the place where they kill the sin-offering and the burnt-offering, in the place of the sanctuary; for as the sin-offering is the priest’s, so is the guilt-offering; it is most holy.
english: And he shall kill the he-lamb in the place where they kill the sin-offering and the burnt-offering, in the place of the sanctuary; for as the sin-offering is the priest’s, so is the guilt-offering; it is most holy.

searchText: leviticus 14:14 and the priest shall take of the blood of the guilt-offering, and the priest shall put it upon the tip of the right ear of him that is to be cleansed, and upon the thumb of his right hand, and upon the great toe of his right foot.
english: And the priest shall take of the blood of the guilt-offering, and the priest shall put it upon the tip of the right ear of him that is to be cleansed, and upon the thumb of his right hand, and upon the great toe of his right foot.

searchText: leviticus 14:15 and the priest shall take of the log of oil, and pour it into the palm of his own left hand.
english: And the priest shall take of the log of oil, and pour it into the palm of his own left hand.

searchText: leviticus 14:16 and the priest shall dip his right finger in the oil that is in his left hand, and shall sprinkle of the oil with his finger seven times before the lord.
english: And the priest shall dip his right finger in the oil that is in his left hand, and shall sprinkle of the oil with his finger seven times before the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 14:17 and of the rest of the oil that is in his hand shall the priest put upon the tip of the right ear of him that is to be cleansed, and upon the thumb of his right hand, and upon the great toe of his right foot, upon the blood of the guilt-offering.
english: And of the rest of the oil that is in his hand shall the priest put upon the tip of the right ear of him that is to be cleansed, and upon the thumb of his right hand, and upon the great toe of his right foot, upon the blood of the guilt-offering.

searchText: leviticus 14:18 and the rest of the oil that is in the priest’s hand he shall put upon the head of him that is to be cleansed; and the priest shall make atonement for him before the lord.
english: And the rest of the oil that is in the priest’s hand he shall put upon the head of him that is to be cleansed; and the priest shall make atonement for him before the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 14:19 and the priest shall offer the sin-offering, and make atonement for him that is to be cleansed because of his uncleanness; and afterward he shall kill the burnt-offering.
english: And the priest shall offer the sin-offering, and make atonement for him that is to be cleansed because of his uncleanness; and afterward he shall kill the burnt-offering.

searchText: leviticus 14:20 and the priest shall offer the burnt-offering and the meal-offering upon the altar; and the priest shall make atonement for him, and he shall be clean.
english: And the priest shall offer the burnt-offering and the meal-offering upon the altar; and the priest shall make atonement for him, and he shall be clean.

searchText: leviticus 14:21 and if he be poor, and his means suffice not, then he shall take one he-lamb for a guilt-offering to be waved, to make atonement for him, and one tenth part of an ephah of fine flour mingled with oil for a meal-offering, and a log of oil;
english: And if he be poor, and his means suffice not, then he shall take one he-lamb for a guilt-offering to be waved, to make atonement for him, and one tenth part of an ephah of fine flour mingled with oil for a meal-offering, and a log of oil;

searchText: leviticus 14:22 and two turtle-doves, or two young pigeons, such as his means suffice for; and the one shall be a sin-offering, and the other a burnt-offering.
english: and two turtle-doves, or two young pigeons, such as his means suffice for; and the one shall be a sin-offering, and the other a burnt-offering.

searchText: leviticus 14:23 and on the eighth day he shall bring them for his cleansing unto the priest, unto the door of the tent of meeting, before the lord.
english: And on the eighth day he shall bring them for his cleansing unto the priest, unto the door of the tent of meeting, before the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 14:24 and the priest shall take the lamb of the guilt-offering, and the log of oil, and the priest shall wave them for a wave-offering before the lord.
english: And the priest shall take the lamb of the guilt-offering, and the log of oil, and the priest shall wave them for a wave-offering before the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 14:25 and he shall kill the lamb of the guilt-offering, and the priest shall take of the blood of the guilt-offering, and put it upon the tip of the right ear of him that is to be cleansed, and upon the thumb of his right hand, and upon the great toe of his right foot.
english: And he shall kill the lamb of the guilt-offering, and the priest shall take of the blood of the guilt-offering, and put it upon the tip of the right ear of him that is to be cleansed, and upon the thumb of his right hand, and upon the great toe of his right foot.

searchText: leviticus 14:26 and the priest shall pour of the oil into the palm of his own left hand.
english: And the priest shall pour of the oil into the palm of his own left hand.

searchText: leviticus 14:27 and the priest shall sprinkle with his right finger some of the oil that is in his left hand seven times before the lord.
english: And the priest shall sprinkle with his right finger some of the oil that is in his left hand seven times before the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 14:28 and the priest shall put of the oil that is in his hand upon the tip of the right ear of him that is to be cleansed, and upon the thumb of his right hand, and upon the great toe of his right foot, upon the place of the blood of the guilt-offering.
english: And the priest shall put of the oil that is in his hand upon the tip of the right ear of him that is to be cleansed, and upon the thumb of his right hand, and upon the great toe of his right foot, upon the place of the blood of the guilt-offering.

searchText: leviticus 14:29 and the rest of the oil that is in the priest’s hand he shall put upon the head of him that is to be cleansed, to make atonement for him before the lord.
english: And the rest of the oil that is in the priest’s hand he shall put upon the head of him that is to be cleansed, to make atonement for him before the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 14:30 and he shall offer one of the turtle-doves, or of the young pigeons, such as his means suffice for;
english: And he shall offer one of the turtle-doves, or of the young pigeons, such as his means suffice for;

searchText: leviticus 14:31 even such as his means suffice for, the one for a sin-offering, and the other for a burnt-offering, with the meal-offering; and the priest shall make atonement for him that is to be cleansed before the lord.
english: even such as his means suffice for, the one for a sin-offering, and the other for a burnt-offering, with the meal-offering; and the priest shall make atonement for him that is to be cleansed before the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 14:32 this is the law of him in whom is the plague of leprosy, whose means suffice not for that which pertaineth to his cleansing.
english: This is the law of him in whom is the plague of leprosy, whose means suffice not for that which pertaineth to his cleansing.

searchText: leviticus 14:33 and the lord spoke unto moses and unto aaron, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses and unto Aaron, saying:

searchText: leviticus 14:34 when ye are come into the land of canaan, which i give to you for a possession, and i put the plague of leprosy in a house of the land of your possession;
english: When ye are come into the land of Canaan, which I give to you for a possession, and I put the plague of leprosy in a house of the land of your possession;

searchText: leviticus 14:35 then he that owneth the house shall come and tell the priest, saying: ‘there seemeth to me to be as it were a plague in the house.’
english: then he that owneth the house shall come and tell the priest, saying: ‘There seemeth to me to be as it were a plague in the house.’

searchText: leviticus 14:36 and the priest shall command that they empty the house, before the priest go in to see the plague, that all that is in the house be not made unclean; and afterward the priest shall go in to see the house.
english: And the priest shall command that they empty the house, before the priest go in to see the plague, that all that is in the house be not made unclean; and afterward the priest shall go in to see the house.

searchText: leviticus 14:37 and he shall look on the plague, and, behold, if the plague be in the walls of the house with hollow streaks, greenish or reddish, and the appearance thereof be lower than the wall;
english: And he shall look on the plague, and, behold, if the plague be in the walls of the house with hollow streaks, greenish or reddish, and the appearance thereof be lower than the wall;

searchText: leviticus 14:38 then the priest shall go out of the house to the door of the house, and shut up the house seven days.
english: then the priest shall go out of the house to the door of the house, and shut up the house seven days.

searchText: leviticus 14:39 and the priest shall come again the seventh day, and shall look; and, behold, if the plague be spread in the walls of the house;
english: And the priest shall come again the seventh day, and shall look; and, behold, if the plague be spread in the walls of the house;

searchText: leviticus 14:40 then the priest shall command that they take out the stones in which the plague is, and cast them into an unclean place without the city.
english: then the priest shall command that they take out the stones in which the plague is, and cast them into an unclean place without the city.

searchText: leviticus 14:41 and he shall cause the house to be scraped within round about, and they shall pour out the mortar that they scrape off without the city into an unclean place.
english: And he shall cause the house to be scraped within round about, and they shall pour out the mortar that they scrape off without the city into an unclean place.

searchText: leviticus 14:42 and they shall take other stones, and put them in the place of those stones; and he shall take other mortar, and shall plaster the house.
english: And they shall take other stones, and put them in the place of those stones; and he shall take other mortar, and shall plaster the house.

searchText: leviticus 14:43 and if the plague come again, and break out in the house, after that the stones have been taken out, and after the house hath been scraped, and after it is plastered;
english: And if the plague come again, and break out in the house, after that the stones have been taken out, and after the house hath been scraped, and after it is plastered;

searchText: leviticus 14:44 then the priest shall come in and look; and, behold, if the plague be spread in the house, it is a malignant leprosy in the house: it is unclean.
english: then the priest shall come in and look; and, behold, if the plague be spread in the house, it is a malignant leprosy in the house: it is unclean.

searchText: leviticus 14:45 and he shall break down the house, the stones of it, and the timber thereof, and all the mortar of the house; and he shall carry them forth out of the city into an unclean place.
english: And he shall break down the house, the stones of it, and the timber thereof, and all the mortar of the house; and he shall carry them forth out of the city into an unclean place.

searchText: leviticus 14:46 moreover he that goeth into the house all the while that it is shut up shall be unclean until the even.
english: Moreover he that goeth into the house all the while that it is shut up shall be unclean until the even.

searchText: leviticus 14:47 and he that lieth in the house shall wash his clothes; and he that eateth in the house shall wash his clothes.
english: And he that lieth in the house shall wash his clothes; and he that eateth in the house shall wash his clothes.

searchText: leviticus 14:48 and if the priest shall come in, and look, and, behold, the plague hath not spread in the house, after the house was plastered; then the priest shall pronounce the house clean, because the plague is healed.
english: And if the priest shall come in, and look, and, behold, the plague hath not spread in the house, after the house was plastered; then the priest shall pronounce the house clean, because the plague is healed.

searchText: leviticus 14:49 and he shall take to cleanse the house two birds, and cedar-wood, and scarlet, and hyssop.
english: And he shall take to cleanse the house two birds, and cedar-wood, and scarlet, and hyssop.

searchText: leviticus 14:50 and he shall kill one of the birds in an earthen vessel over running water.
english: And he shall kill one of the birds in an earthen vessel over running water.

searchText: leviticus 14:51 and he shall take the cedar-wood, and the hyssop, and the scarlet, and the living bird, and dip them in the blood of the slain bird, and in the running water, and sprinkle the house seven times.
english: And he shall take the cedar-wood, and the hyssop, and the scarlet, and the living bird, and dip them in the blood of the slain bird, and in the running water, and sprinkle the house seven times.

searchText: leviticus 14:52 and he shall cleanse the house with the blood of the bird, and with the running water, and with the living bird, and with the cedar-wood, and with the hyssop, and with the scarlet.
english: And he shall cleanse the house with the blood of the bird, and with the running water, and with the living bird, and with the cedar-wood, and with the hyssop, and with the scarlet.

searchText: leviticus 14:53 but he shall let go the living bird out of the city into the open field; so shall he make atonement for the house; and it shall be clean.
english: But he shall let go the living bird out of the city into the open field; so shall he make atonement for the house; and it shall be clean.

searchText: leviticus 14:54 this is the law for all manner of plague of leprosy, and for a scall;
english: This is the law for all manner of plague of leprosy, and for a scall;

searchText: leviticus 14:55 and for the leprosy of a garment, and for a house;
english: and for the leprosy of a garment, and for a house;

searchText: leviticus 14:56 and for a rising, and for a scab, and for a bright spot;
english: and for a rising, and for a scab, and for a bright spot;

searchText: leviticus 14:57 to teach when it is unclean, and when it is clean; this is the law of leprosy.
english: to teach when it is unclean, and when it is clean; this is the law of leprosy.

searchText: leviticus 15:1 and the lord spoke unto moses and to aaron, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses and to Aaron, saying:

searchText: leviticus 15:2 speak unto the children of israel, and say unto them: when any man hath an issue out of his flesh, his issue is unclean.
english: Speak unto the children of Israel, and say unto them: When any man hath an issue out of his flesh, his issue is unclean.

searchText: leviticus 15:3 and this shall be his uncleanness in his issue: whether his flesh run with his issue, or his flesh be stopped from his issue, it is his uncleanness.
english: And this shall be his uncleanness in his issue: whether his flesh run with his issue, or his flesh be stopped from his issue, it is his uncleanness.

searchText: leviticus 15:4 every bed whereon he that hath the issue lieth shall be unclean; and every thing whereon he sitteth shall be unclean. .
english: Every bed whereon he that hath the issue lieth shall be unclean; and every thing whereon he sitteth shall be unclean. .

searchText: leviticus 15:5 and whosoever toucheth his bed shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and be unclean until the even.
english: And whosoever toucheth his bed shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and be unclean until the even.

searchText: leviticus 15:6 and he that sitteth on any thing whereon he that hath the issue sat shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and be unclean until the even.
english: And he that sitteth on any thing whereon he that hath the issue sat shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and be unclean until the even.

searchText: leviticus 15:7 and he that toucheth the flesh of him that hath the issue shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and be unclean until the even.
english: And he that toucheth the flesh of him that hath the issue shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and be unclean until the even.

searchText: leviticus 15:8 and if he that hath the issue spit upon him that is clean, then he shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and be unclean until the even.
english: And if he that hath the issue spit upon him that is clean, then he shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and be unclean until the even.

searchText: leviticus 15:9 and what saddle soever he that hath the issue rideth upon shall be unclean.
english: And what saddle soever he that hath the issue rideth upon shall be unclean.

searchText: leviticus 15:10 and whosoever toucheth any thing that was under him shall be unclean until the even; and he that beareth those things shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and be unclean until the even.
english: And whosoever toucheth any thing that was under him shall be unclean until the even; and he that beareth those things shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and be unclean until the even.

searchText: leviticus 15:11 and whomsoever he that hath the issue toucheth, without having rinsed his hands in water, he shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and be unclean until the even.
english: And whomsoever he that hath the issue toucheth, without having rinsed his hands in water, he shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and be unclean until the even.

searchText: leviticus 15:12 and the earthen vessel, which he that hath the issue toucheth, shall be broken; and every vessel of wood shall be rinsed in water.
english: And the earthen vessel, which he that hath the issue toucheth, shall be broken; and every vessel of wood shall be rinsed in water.

searchText: leviticus 15:13 and when he that hath an issue is cleansed of his issue, then he shall number to himself seven days for his cleansing, and wash his clothes; and he shall bathe his flesh in running water, and shall be clean.
english: And when he that hath an issue is cleansed of his issue, then he shall number to himself seven days for his cleansing, and wash his clothes; and he shall bathe his flesh in running water, and shall be clean.

searchText: leviticus 15:14 and on the eighth day he shall take to him two turtle-doves, or two young pigeons, and come before the lord unto the door of the tent of meeting, and give them unto the priest.
english: And on the eighth day he shall take to him two turtle-doves, or two young pigeons, and come before the LORD unto the door of the tent of meeting, and give them unto the priest.

searchText: leviticus 15:15 and the priest shall offer them, the one for a sin-offering, and the other for a burnt-offering; and the priest shall make atonement for him before the lord for his issue.
english: And the priest shall offer them, the one for a sin-offering, and the other for a burnt-offering; and the priest shall make atonement for him before the LORD for his issue.

searchText: leviticus 15:16 and if the flow of seed go out from a man, then he shall bathe all his flesh in water, and be unclean until the even.
english: And if the flow of seed go out from a man, then he shall bathe all his flesh in water, and be unclean until the even.

searchText: leviticus 15:17 and every garment, and every skin, whereon is the flow of seed, shall be washed with water, and be unclean until the even.
english: And every garment, and every skin, whereon is the flow of seed, shall be washed with water, and be unclean until the even.

searchText: leviticus 15:18 the woman also with whom a man shall lie carnally, they shall both bathe themselves in water, and be unclean until the even.
english: The woman also with whom a man shall lie carnally, they shall both bathe themselves in water, and be unclean until the even.

searchText: leviticus 15:19 and if a woman have an issue, and her issue in her flesh be blood, she shall be in her impurity seven days; and whosoever toucheth her shall be unclean until the even.
english: And if a woman have an issue, and her issue in her flesh be blood, she shall be in her impurity seven days; and whosoever toucheth her shall be unclean until the even.

searchText: leviticus 15:20 and every thing that she lieth upon in her impurity shall be unclean; every thing also that she sitteth upon shall be unclean.
english: And every thing that she lieth upon in her impurity shall be unclean; every thing also that she sitteth upon shall be unclean.

searchText: leviticus 15:21 and whosoever toucheth her bed shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and be unclean until the even.
english: And whosoever toucheth her bed shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and be unclean until the even.

searchText: leviticus 15:22 and whosoever toucheth any thing that she sitteth upon shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and be unclean until the even.
english: And whosoever toucheth any thing that she sitteth upon shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and be unclean until the even.

searchText: leviticus 15:23 and if he be on the bed, or on any thing whereon she sitteth, when he toucheth it, he shall be unclean until the even.
english: And if he be on the bed, or on any thing whereon she sitteth, when he toucheth it, he shall be unclean until the even.

searchText: leviticus 15:24 and if any man lie with her, and her impurity be upon him, he shall be unclean seven days; and every bed whereon he lieth shall be unclean. .
english: And if any man lie with her, and her impurity be upon him, he shall be unclean seven days; and every bed whereon he lieth shall be unclean. .

searchText: leviticus 15:25 and if a woman have an issue of her blood many days not in the time of her impurity, or if she have an issue beyond the time of her impurity; all the days of the issue of her uncleanness she shall be as in the days of her impurity: she is unclean.
english: And if a woman have an issue of her blood many days not in the time of her impurity, or if she have an issue beyond the time of her impurity; all the days of the issue of her uncleanness she shall be as in the days of her impurity: she is unclean.

searchText: leviticus 15:26 every bed whereon she lieth all the days of her issue shall be unto her as the bed of her impurity; and every thing whereon she sitteth shall be unclean, as the uncleanness of her impurity.
english: Every bed whereon she lieth all the days of her issue shall be unto her as the bed of her impurity; and every thing whereon she sitteth shall be unclean, as the uncleanness of her impurity.

searchText: leviticus 15:27 and whosoever toucheth those things shall be unclean, and shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and be unclean until the even.
english: And whosoever toucheth those things shall be unclean, and shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and be unclean until the even.

searchText: leviticus 15:28 but if she be cleansed of her issue, then she shall number to herself seven days, and after that she shall be clean.
english: But if she be cleansed of her issue, then she shall number to herself seven days, and after that she shall be clean.

searchText: leviticus 15:29 and on the eighth day she shall take unto her two turtle-doves, or two young pigeons, and bring them unto the priest, to the door of the tent of meeting.
english: And on the eighth day she shall take unto her two turtle-doves, or two young pigeons, and bring them unto the priest, to the door of the tent of meeting.

searchText: leviticus 15:30 and the priest shall offer the one for a sin-offering, and the other for a burnt-offering; and the priest shall make atonement for her before the lord for the issue of her uncleanness.
english: And the priest shall offer the one for a sin-offering, and the other for a burnt-offering; and the priest shall make atonement for her before the LORD for the issue of her uncleanness.

searchText: leviticus 15:31 thus shall ye separate the children of israel from their uncleanness; that they die not in their uncleanness, when they defile my tabernacle that is in the midst of them.
english: Thus shall ye separate the children of Israel from their uncleanness; that they die not in their uncleanness, when they defile My tabernacle that is in the midst of them.

searchText: leviticus 15:32 this is the law of him that hath an issue, and of him from whom the flow of seed goeth out, so that he is unclean thereby;
english: This is the law of him that hath an issue, and of him from whom the flow of seed goeth out, so that he is unclean thereby;

searchText: leviticus 15:33 and of her that is sick with her impurity, and of them that have an issue, whether it be a man, or a woman; and of him that lieth with her that is unclean.
english: and of her that is sick with her impurity, and of them that have an issue, whether it be a man, or a woman; and of him that lieth with her that is unclean.

searchText: leviticus 16:1 and the lord spoke unto moses, after the death of the two sons of aaron, when they drew near before the lord, and died;
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, after the death of the two sons of Aaron, when they drew near before the LORD, and died;

searchText: leviticus 16:2 and the lord said unto moses: ‘speak unto aaron thy brother, that he come not at all times into the holy place within the veil, before the ark-cover which is upon the ark; that he die not; for i appear in the cloud upon the ark-cover.
english: and the LORD said unto Moses: ‘Speak unto Aaron thy brother, that he come not at all times into the holy place within the veil, before the ark-cover which is upon the ark; that he die not; for I appear in the cloud upon the ark-cover.

searchText: leviticus 16:3 herewith shall aaron come into the holy place: with a young bullock for a sin-offering, and a ram for a burnt-offering.
english: Herewith shall Aaron come into the holy place: with a young bullock for a sin-offering, and a ram for a burnt-offering.

searchText: leviticus 16:4 he shall put on the holy linen tunic, and he shall have the linen breeches upon his flesh, and shall be girded with the linen girdle, and with the linen mitre shall he be attired; they are the holy garments; and he shall bathe his flesh in water, and put them on.
english: He shall put on the holy linen tunic, and he shall have the linen breeches upon his flesh, and shall be girded with the linen girdle, and with the linen mitre shall he be attired; they are the holy garments; and he shall bathe his flesh in water, and put them on.

searchText: leviticus 16:5 and he shall take of the congregation of the children of israel two he-goats for a sin-offering, and one ram for a burnt-offering.
english: And he shall take of the congregation of the children of Israel two he-goats for a sin-offering, and one ram for a burnt-offering.

searchText: leviticus 16:6 and aaron shall present the bullock of the sin-offering, which is for himself, and make atonement for himself, and for his house.
english: And Aaron shall present the bullock of the sin-offering, which is for himself, and make atonement for himself, and for his house.

searchText: leviticus 16:7 and he shall take the two goats, and set them before the lord at the door of the tent of meeting.
english: And he shall take the two goats, and set them before the LORD at the door of the tent of meeting.

searchText: leviticus 16:8 and aaron shall cast lots upon the two goats: one lot for the lord, and the other lot for azazel.
english: And Aaron shall cast lots upon the two goats: one lot for the LORD, and the other lot for Azazel.

searchText: leviticus 16:9 and aaron shall present the goat upon which the lot fell for the lord, and offer him for a sin-offering.
english: And Aaron shall present the goat upon which the lot fell for the LORD, and offer him for a sin-offering.

searchText: leviticus 16:10 but the goat, on which the lot fell for azazel, shall be set alive before the lord, to make atonement over him, to send him away for azazel into the wilderness.
english: But the goat, on which the lot fell for Azazel, shall be set alive before the LORD, to make atonement over him, to send him away for Azazel into the wilderness.

searchText: leviticus 16:11 and aaron shall present the bullock of the sin-offering, which is for himself, and shall make atonement for himself, and for his house, and shall kill the bullock of the sin-offering which is for himself.
english: And Aaron shall present the bullock of the sin-offering, which is for himself, and shall make atonement for himself, and for his house, and shall kill the bullock of the sin-offering which is for himself.

searchText: leviticus 16:12 and he shall take a censer full of coals of fire from off the altar before the lord, and his hands full of sweet incense beaten small, and bring it within the veil.
english: And he shall take a censer full of coals of fire from off the altar before the LORD, and his hands full of sweet incense beaten small, and bring it within the veil.

searchText: leviticus 16:13 and he shall put the incense upon the fire before the lord, that the cloud of the incense may cover the ark-cover that is upon the testimony, that he die not.
english: And he shall put the incense upon the fire before the LORD, that the cloud of the incense may cover the ark-cover that is upon the testimony, that he die not.

searchText: leviticus 16:14 and he shall take of the blood of the bullock, and sprinkle it with his finger upon the ark-cover on the east; and before the ark-cover shall he sprinkle of the blood with his finger seven times.
english: And he shall take of the blood of the bullock, and sprinkle it with his finger upon the ark-cover on the east; and before the ark-cover shall he sprinkle of the blood with his finger seven times.

searchText: leviticus 16:15 then shall he kill the goat of the sin-offering, that is for the people, and bring his blood within the veil, and do with his blood as he did with the blood of the bullock, and sprinkle it upon the ark-cover, and before the ark-cover.
english: Then shall he kill the goat of the sin-offering, that is for the people, and bring his blood within the veil, and do with his blood as he did with the blood of the bullock, and sprinkle it upon the ark-cover, and before the ark-cover.

searchText: leviticus 16:16 and he shall make atonement for the holy place, because of the uncleannesses of the children of israel, and because of their transgressions, even all their sins; and so shall he do for the tent of meeting, that dwelleth with them in the midst of their uncleannesses.
english: And he shall make atonement for the holy place, because of the uncleannesses of the children of Israel, and because of their transgressions, even all their sins; and so shall he do for the tent of meeting, that dwelleth with them in the midst of their uncleannesses.

searchText: leviticus 16:17 and there shall be no man in the tent of meeting when he goeth in to make atonement in the holy place, until he come out, and have made atonement for himself, and for his household, and for all the assembly of israel.
english: And there shall be no man in the tent of meeting when he goeth in to make atonement in the holy place, until he come out, and have made atonement for himself, and for his household, and for all the assembly of Israel.

searchText: leviticus 16:18 and he shall go out unto the altar that is before the lord, and make atonement for it; and shall take of the blood of the bullock, and of the blood of the goat, and put it upon the horns of the altar round about.
english: And he shall go out unto the altar that is before the LORD, and make atonement for it; and shall take of the blood of the bullock, and of the blood of the goat, and put it upon the horns of the altar round about.

searchText: leviticus 16:19 and he shall sprinkle of the blood upon it with his finger seven times, and cleanse it, and hallow it from the uncleannesses of the children of israel.
english: And he shall sprinkle of the blood upon it with his finger seven times, and cleanse it, and hallow it from the uncleannesses of the children of Israel.

searchText: leviticus 16:20 and when he hath made an end of atoning for the holy place, and the tent of meeting, and the altar, he shall present the live goat.
english: And when he hath made an end of atoning for the holy place, and the tent of meeting, and the altar, he shall present the live goat.

searchText: leviticus 16:21 and aaron shall lay both his hands upon the head of the live goat, and confess over him all the iniquities of the children of israel, and all their transgressions, even all their sins; and he shall put them upon the head of the goat, and shall send him away by the hand of an appointed man into the wilderness.
english: And Aaron shall lay both his hands upon the head of the live goat, and confess over him all the iniquities of the children of Israel, and all their transgressions, even all their sins; and he shall put them upon the head of the goat, and shall send him away by the hand of an appointed man into the wilderness.

searchText: leviticus 16:22 and the goat shall bear upon him all their iniquities unto a land which is cut off; and he shall let go the goat in the wilderness.
english: And the goat shall bear upon him all their iniquities unto a land which is cut off; and he shall let go the goat in the wilderness.

searchText: leviticus 16:23 and aaron shall come into the tent of meeting, and shall put off the linen garments, which he put on when he went into the holy place, and shall leave them there.
english: And Aaron shall come into the tent of meeting, and shall put off the linen garments, which he put on when he went into the holy place, and shall leave them there.

searchText: leviticus 16:24 and he shall bathe his flesh in water in a holy place and put on his other vestments, and come forth, and offer his burnt-offering and the burnt-offering of the people, and make atonement for himself and for the people.
english: And he shall bathe his flesh in water in a holy place and put on his other vestments, and come forth, and offer his burnt-offering and the burnt-offering of the people, and make atonement for himself and for the people.

searchText: leviticus 16:25 and the fat of the sin-offering shall he make smoke upon the altar.
english: And the fat of the sin-offering shall he make smoke upon the altar.

searchText: leviticus 16:26 and he that letteth go the goat for azazel shall wash his clothes, and bathe his flesh in water, and afterward he may come into the camp.
english: And he that letteth go the goat for Azazel shall wash his clothes, and bathe his flesh in water, and afterward he may come into the camp.

searchText: leviticus 16:27 and the bullock of the sin-offering, and the goat of the sin-offering, whose blood was brought in to make atonement in the holy place, shall be carried forth without the camp; and they shall burn in the fire their skins, and their flesh, and their dung.
english: And the bullock of the sin-offering, and the goat of the sin-offering, whose blood was brought in to make atonement in the holy place, shall be carried forth without the camp; and they shall burn in the fire their skins, and their flesh, and their dung.

searchText: leviticus 16:28 and he that burneth them shall wash his clothes, and bathe his flesh in water, and afterward he may come into the camp.
english: And he that burneth them shall wash his clothes, and bathe his flesh in water, and afterward he may come into the camp.

searchText: leviticus 16:29 and it shall be a statute for ever unto you: in the seventh month, on the tenth day of the month, ye shall afflict your souls, and shall do no manner of work, the home-born, or the stranger that sojourneth among you.
english: And it shall be a statute for ever unto you: in the seventh month, on the tenth day of the month, ye shall afflict your souls, and shall do no manner of work, the home-born, or the stranger that sojourneth among you.

searchText: leviticus 16:30 for on this day shall atonement be made for you, to cleanse you; from all your sins shall ye be clean before the lord.
english: For on this day shall atonement be made for you, to cleanse you; from all your sins shall ye be clean before the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 16:31 it is a sabbath of solemn rest unto you, and ye shall afflict your souls; it is a statute for ever.
english: It is a sabbath of solemn rest unto you, and ye shall afflict your souls; it is a statute for ever.

searchText: leviticus 16:32 and the priest, who shall be anointed and who shall be consecrated to be priest in his father’s stead, shall make the atonement, and shall put on the linen garments, even the holy garments.
english: And the priest, who shall be anointed and who shall be consecrated to be priest in his father’s stead, shall make the atonement, and shall put on the linen garments, even the holy garments.

searchText: leviticus 16:33 and he shall make atonement for the most holy place, and he shall make atonement for the tent of meeting and for the altar; and he shall make atonement for the priests and for all the people of the assembly.
english: And he shall make atonement for the most holy place, and he shall make atonement for the tent of meeting and for the altar; and he shall make atonement for the priests and for all the people of the assembly.

searchText: leviticus 16:34 and this shall be an everlasting statute unto you, to make atonement for the children of israel because of all their sins once in the year.’ and he did as the lord commanded moses.
english: And this shall be an everlasting statute unto you, to make atonement for the children of Israel because of all their sins once in the year.’ And he did as the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: leviticus 17:1 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: leviticus 17:2 speak unto aaron, and unto his sons, and unto all the children of israel, and say unto them: this is the thing which the lord hath commanded, saying:
english: Speak unto Aaron, and unto his sons, and unto all the children of Israel, and say unto them: This is the thing which the LORD hath commanded, saying:

searchText: leviticus 17:3 what man soever there be of the house of israel, that killeth an ox, or lamb, or goat, in the camp, or that killeth it without the camp,
english: What man soever there be of the house of Israel, that killeth an ox, or lamb, or goat, in the camp, or that killeth it without the camp,

searchText: leviticus 17:4 and hath not brought it unto the door of the tent of meeting, to present it as an offering unto the lord before the tabernacle of the lord, blood shall be imputed unto that man; he hath shed blood; and that man shall be cut off from among his people.
english: and hath not brought it unto the door of the tent of meeting, to present it as an offering unto the LORD before the tabernacle of the LORD, blood shall be imputed unto that man; he hath shed blood; and that man shall be cut off from among his people.

searchText: leviticus 17:5 to the end that the children of israel may bring their sacrifices, which they sacrifice in the open field, even that they may bring them unto the lord, unto the door of the tent of meeting, unto the priest, and sacrifice them for sacrifices of peace-offerings unto the lord.
english: To the end that the children of Israel may bring their sacrifices, which they sacrifice in the open field, even that they may bring them unto the LORD, unto the door of the tent of meeting, unto the priest, and sacrifice them for sacrifices of peace-offerings unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 17:6 and the priest shall dash the blood against the altar of the lord at the door of the tent of meeting, and make the fat smoke for a sweet savour unto the lord.
english: And the priest shall dash the blood against the altar of the LORD at the door of the tent of meeting, and make the fat smoke for a sweet savour unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 17:7 and they shall no more sacrifice their sacrifices unto the satyrs, after whom they go astray. this shall be a statute for ever unto them throughout their generations. .
english: And they shall no more sacrifice their sacrifices unto the satyrs, after whom they go astray. This shall be a statute for ever unto them throughout their generations. .

searchText: leviticus 17:8 and thou shalt say unto them: whatsoever man there be of the house of israel, or of the strangers that sojourn among them, that offereth a burnt-offering or sacrifice,
english: And thou shalt say unto them: Whatsoever man there be of the house of Israel, or of the strangers that sojourn among them, that offereth a burnt-offering or sacrifice,

searchText: leviticus 17:9 and bringeth it not unto the door of the tent of meeting, to sacrifice it unto the lord, even that man shall be cut off from his people.
english: and bringeth it not unto the door of the tent of meeting, to sacrifice it unto the LORD, even that man shall be cut off from his people.

searchText: leviticus 17:10 and whatsoever man there be of the house of israel, or of the strangers that sojourn among them, that eateth any manner of blood, i will set my face against that soul that eateth blood, and will cut him off from among his people.
english: And whatsoever man there be of the house of Israel, or of the strangers that sojourn among them, that eateth any manner of blood, I will set My face against that soul that eateth blood, and will cut him off from among his people.

searchText: leviticus 17:11 for the life of the flesh is in the blood; and i have given it to you upon the altar to make atonement for your souls; for it is the blood that maketh atonement by reason of the life.
english: For the life of the flesh is in the blood; and I have given it to you upon the altar to make atonement for your souls; for it is the blood that maketh atonement by reason of the life.

searchText: leviticus 17:12 therefore i said unto the children of israel: no soul of you shall eat blood, neither shall any stranger that sojourneth among you eat blood.
english: Therefore I said unto the children of Israel: No soul of you shall eat blood, neither shall any stranger that sojourneth among you eat blood.

searchText: leviticus 17:13 and whatsoever man there be of the children of israel, or of the strangers that sojourn among them, that taketh in hunting any beast or fowl that may be eaten, he shall pour out the blood thereof, and cover it with dust.
english: And whatsoever man there be of the children of Israel, or of the strangers that sojourn among them, that taketh in hunting any beast or fowl that may be eaten, he shall pour out the blood thereof, and cover it with dust.

searchText: leviticus 17:14 for as to the life of all flesh, the blood thereof is all one with the life thereof; therefore i said unto the children of israel: ye shall eat the blood of no manner of flesh; for the life of all flesh is the blood thereof; whosoever eateth it shall be cut off.
english: For as to the life of all flesh, the blood thereof is all one with the life thereof; therefore I said unto the children of Israel: Ye shall eat the blood of no manner of flesh; for the life of all flesh is the blood thereof; whosoever eateth it shall be cut off.

searchText: leviticus 17:15 and every soul that eateth that which dieth of itself, or that which is torn of beasts, whether he be home-born or a stranger, he shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and be unclean until the even; then shall he be clean.
english: And every soul that eateth that which dieth of itself, or that which is torn of beasts, whether he be home-born or a stranger, he shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and be unclean until the even; then shall he be clean.

searchText: leviticus 17:16 but if he wash them not, nor bathe his flesh, then he shall bear his iniquity.
english: But if he wash them not, nor bathe his flesh, then he shall bear his iniquity.

searchText: leviticus 18:1 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: leviticus 18:2 speak unto the children of israel, and say unto them: i am the lord your god.
english: Speak unto the children of Israel, and say unto them: I am the LORD your God.

searchText: leviticus 18:3 after the doings of the land of egypt, wherein ye dwelt, shall ye not do; and after the doings of the land of canaan, whither i bring you, shall ye not do; neither shall ye walk in their statutes.
english: After the doings of the land of Egypt, wherein ye dwelt, shall ye not do; and after the doings of the land of Canaan, whither I bring you, shall ye not do; neither shall ye walk in their statutes.

searchText: leviticus 18:4 mine ordinances shall ye do, and my statutes shall ye keep, to walk therein: i am the lord your god.
english: Mine ordinances shall ye do, and My statutes shall ye keep, to walk therein: I am the LORD your God.

searchText: leviticus 18:5 ye shall therefore keep my statutes, and mine ordinances, which if a man do, he shall live by them: i am the lord.
english: Ye shall therefore keep My statutes, and Mine ordinances, which if a man do, he shall live by them: I am the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 18:6 none of you shall approach to any that is near of kin to him, to uncover their nakedness. i am the lord.
english: None of you shall approach to any that is near of kin to him, to uncover their nakedness. I am the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 18:7 the nakedness of thy father, and the nakedness of thy mother, shalt thou not uncover: she is thy mother; thou shalt not uncover her nakedness.
english: The nakedness of thy father, and the nakedness of thy mother, shalt thou not uncover: she is thy mother; thou shalt not uncover her nakedness.

searchText: leviticus 18:8 the nakedness of thy father’s wife shalt thou not uncover: it is thy father’s nakedness.
english: The nakedness of thy father’s wife shalt thou not uncover: it is thy father’s nakedness.

searchText: leviticus 18:9 the nakedness of thy sister, the daughter of thy father, or the daughter of thy mother, whether born at home, or born abroad, even their nakedness thou shalt not uncover. .
english: The nakedness of thy sister, the daughter of thy father, or the daughter of thy mother, whether born at home, or born abroad, even their nakedness thou shalt not uncover. .

searchText: leviticus 18:10 the nakedness of thy son’s daughter, or of thy daughter’s daughter, even their nakedness thou shalt not uncover; for theirs is thine own nakedness.
english: The nakedness of thy son’s daughter, or of thy daughter’s daughter, even their nakedness thou shalt not uncover; for theirs is thine own nakedness.

searchText: leviticus 18:11 the nakedness of thy father’s wife’s daughter, begotten of thy father, she is thy sister, thou shalt not uncover her nakedness.
english: The nakedness of thy father’s wife’s daughter, begotten of thy father, she is thy sister, thou shalt not uncover her nakedness.

searchText: leviticus 18:12 thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy father’s sister: she is thy father’s near kinswoman.
english: Thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy father’s sister: she is thy father’s near kinswoman.

searchText: leviticus 18:13 thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy mother’s sister; for she is thy mother’s near kinswoman.
english: Thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy mother’s sister; for she is thy mother’s near kinswoman.

searchText: leviticus 18:14 thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy fathers brother, thou shalt not approach to his wife: she is thine aunt.
english: Thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy fathers brother, thou shalt not approach to his wife: she is thine aunt.

searchText: leviticus 18:15 thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy daughter-in-law: she is thy son’s wife; thou shalt not uncover her nakedness.
english: Thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy daughter-in-law: she is thy son’s wife; thou shalt not uncover her nakedness.

searchText: leviticus 18:16 thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy brother’s wife: it is thy brother’s nakedness.
english: Thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy brother’s wife: it is thy brother’s nakedness.

searchText: leviticus 18:17 thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of a woman and her daughter; thou shalt not take her son’s daughter, or her daughter’s daughter, to uncover her nakedness: they are near kinswomen; it is lewdness.
english: Thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of a woman and her daughter; thou shalt not take her son’s daughter, or her daughter’s daughter, to uncover her nakedness: they are near kinswomen; it is lewdness.

searchText: leviticus 18:18 and thou shalt not take a woman to her sister, to be a rival to her, to uncover her nakedness, beside the other in her lifetime.
english: And thou shalt not take a woman to her sister, to be a rival to her, to uncover her nakedness, beside the other in her lifetime.

searchText: leviticus 18:19 and thou shalt not approach unto a woman to uncover her nakedness, as long as she is impure by her uncleanness.
english: And thou shalt not approach unto a woman to uncover her nakedness, as long as she is impure by her uncleanness.

searchText: leviticus 18:20 and thou shalt not lie carnally with thy neighbour’s wife, to defile thyself with her.
english: And thou shalt not lie carnally with thy neighbour’s wife, to defile thyself with her.

searchText: leviticus 18:21 and thou shalt not give any of thy seed to set them apart to molech, neither shalt thou profane the name of thy god: i am the lord.
english: And thou shalt not give any of thy seed to set them apart to Molech, neither shalt thou profane the name of thy God: I am the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 18:22 thou shalt not lie with mankind, as with womankind; it is abomination.
english: Thou shalt not lie with mankind, as with womankind; it is abomination.

searchText: leviticus 18:23 and thou shalt not lie with any beast to defile thyself therewith; neither shall any woman stand before a beast, to lie down thereto; it is perversion.
english: And thou shalt not lie with any beast to defile thyself therewith; neither shall any woman stand before a beast, to lie down thereto; it is perversion.

searchText: leviticus 18:24 defile not ye yourselves in any of these things; for in all these the nations are defiled, which i cast out from before you.
english: Defile not ye yourselves in any of these things; for in all these the nations are defiled, which I cast out from before you.

searchText: leviticus 18:25 and the land was defiled, therefore i did visit the iniquity thereof upon it, and the land vomited out her inhabitants.
english: And the land was defiled, therefore I did visit the iniquity thereof upon it, and the land vomited out her inhabitants.

searchText: leviticus 18:26 ye therefore shall keep my statutes and mine ordinances, and shall not do any of these abominations; neither the home-born, nor the stranger that sojourneth among you—
english: Ye therefore shall keep My statutes and Mine ordinances, and shall not do any of these abominations; neither the home-born, nor the stranger that sojourneth among you—

searchText: leviticus 18:27 for all these abominations have the men of the land done, that were before you, and the land is defiled—
english: for all these abominations have the men of the land done, that were before you, and the land is defiled—

searchText: leviticus 18:28 that the land vomit not you out also, when ye defile it, as it vomited out the nation that was before you.
english: that the land vomit not you out also, when ye defile it, as it vomited out the nation that was before you.

searchText: leviticus 18:29 for whosoever shall do any of these abominations, even the souls that do them shall be cut off from among their people.
english: For whosoever shall do any of these abominations, even the souls that do them shall be cut off from among their people.

searchText: leviticus 18:30 therefore shall ye keep my charge, that ye do not any of these abominable customs, which were done before you, and that ye defile not yourselves therein: i am the lord your god.
english: Therefore shall ye keep My charge, that ye do not any of these abominable customs, which were done before you, and that ye defile not yourselves therein: I am the LORD your God.

searchText: leviticus 19:1 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: leviticus 19:2 speak unto all the congregation of the children of israel, and say unto them: ye shall be holy; for i the lord your god am holy.
english: Speak unto all the congregation of the children of Israel, and say unto them: Ye shall be holy; for I the LORD your God am holy.

searchText: leviticus 19:3 ye shall fear every man his mother, and his father, and ye shall keep my sabbaths: i am the lord your god.
english: Ye shall fear every man his mother, and his father, and ye shall keep My sabbaths: I am the LORD your God.

searchText: leviticus 19:4 turn ye not unto the idols, nor make to yourselves molten gods: i am the lord your god.
english: Turn ye not unto the idols, nor make to yourselves molten gods: I am the LORD your God.

searchText: leviticus 19:5 and when ye offer a sacrifice of peace-offerings unto the lord, ye shall offer it that ye may be accepted.
english: And when ye offer a sacrifice of peace-offerings unto the LORD, ye shall offer it that ye may be accepted.

searchText: leviticus 19:6 it shall be eaten the same day ye offer it, and on the morrow; and if aught remain until the third day, it shall be burnt with fire.
english: It shall be eaten the same day ye offer it, and on the morrow; and if aught remain until the third day, it shall be burnt with fire.

searchText: leviticus 19:7 and if it be eaten at all on the third day, it is a vile thing; it shall not be accepted.
english: And if it be eaten at all on the third day, it is a vile thing; it shall not be accepted.

searchText: leviticus 19:8 but every one that eateth it shall bear his iniquity, because he hath profaned the holy thing of the lord; and that soul shall be cut off from his people.
english: But every one that eateth it shall bear his iniquity, because he hath profaned the holy thing of the LORD; and that soul shall be cut off from his people.

searchText: leviticus 19:9 and when ye reap the harvest of your land, thou shalt not wholly reap the corner of thy field, neither shalt thou gather the gleaning of thy harvest.
english: And when ye reap the harvest of your land, thou shalt not wholly reap the corner of thy field, neither shalt thou gather the gleaning of thy harvest.

searchText: leviticus 19:10 and thou shalt not glean thy vineyard, neither shalt thou gather the fallen fruit of thy vineyard; thou shalt leave them for the poor and for the stranger: i am the lord your god.
english: And thou shalt not glean thy vineyard, neither shalt thou gather the fallen fruit of thy vineyard; thou shalt leave them for the poor and for the stranger: I am the LORD your God.

searchText: leviticus 19:11 ye shall not steal; neither shall ye deal falsely, nor lie one to another.
english: Ye shall not steal; neither shall ye deal falsely, nor lie one to another.

searchText: leviticus 19:12 and ye shall not swear by my name falsely, so that thou profane the name of thy god: i am the lord.
english: And ye shall not swear by My name falsely, so that thou profane the name of thy God: I am the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 19:13 thou shalt not oppress thy neighbour, nor rob him; the wages of a hired servant shall not abide with thee all night until the morning.
english: Thou shalt not oppress thy neighbour, nor rob him; the wages of a hired servant shall not abide with thee all night until the morning.

searchText: leviticus 19:14 thou shalt not curse the deaf, nor put a stumbling-block before the blind, but thou shalt fear thy god: i am the lord.
english: Thou shalt not curse the deaf, nor put a stumbling-block before the blind, but thou shalt fear thy God: I am the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 19:15 ye shall do no unrighteousness in judgment; thou shalt not respect the person of the poor, nor favour the person of the mighty; but in righteousness shalt thou judge thy neighbour.
english: Ye shall do no unrighteousness in judgment; thou shalt not respect the person of the poor, nor favour the person of the mighty; but in righteousness shalt thou judge thy neighbour.

searchText: leviticus 19:16 thou shalt not go up and down as a talebearer among thy people; neither shalt thou stand idly by the blood of thy neighbour: i am the lord.
english: Thou shalt not go up and down as a talebearer among thy people; neither shalt thou stand idly by the blood of thy neighbour: I am the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 19:17 thou shalt not hate thy brother in thy heart; thou shalt surely rebuke thy neighbour, and not bear sin because of him.
english: Thou shalt not hate thy brother in thy heart; thou shalt surely rebuke thy neighbour, and not bear sin because of him.

searchText: leviticus 19:18 thou shalt not take vengeance, nor bear any grudge against the children of thy people, but thou shalt love thy neighbour as thyself: i am the lord.
english: Thou shalt not take vengeance, nor bear any grudge against the children of thy people, but thou shalt love thy neighbour as thyself: I am the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 19:19 ye shall keep my statutes. thou shalt not let thy cattle gender with a diverse kind; thou shalt not sow thy field with two kinds of seed; neither shall there come upon thee a garment of two kinds of stuff mingled together.
english: Ye shall keep My statutes. Thou shalt not let thy cattle gender with a diverse kind; thou shalt not sow thy field with two kinds of seed; neither shall there come upon thee a garment of two kinds of stuff mingled together.

searchText: leviticus 19:20 and whosoever lieth carnally with a woman, that is a bondmaid, designated for a man, and not at all redeemed, nor was freedom given her; there shall be inquisition; they shall not be put to death, because she was not free.
english: And whosoever lieth carnally with a woman, that is a bondmaid, designated for a man, and not at all redeemed, nor was freedom given her; there shall be inquisition; they shall not be put to death, because she was not free.

searchText: leviticus 19:21 and he shall bring his forfeit unto the lord, unto the door of the tent of meeting, even a ram for a guilt-offering.
english: And he shall bring his forfeit unto the LORD, unto the door of the tent of meeting, even a ram for a guilt-offering.

searchText: leviticus 19:22 and the priest shall make atonement for him with the ram of the guilt-offering before the lord for his sin which he hath sinned; and he shall be forgiven for his sin which he hath sinned.
english: And the priest shall make atonement for him with the ram of the guilt-offering before the LORD for his sin which he hath sinned; and he shall be forgiven for his sin which he hath sinned.

searchText: leviticus 19:23 and when ye shall come into the land, and shall have planted all manner of trees for food, then ye shall count the fruit thereof as forbidden; three years shall it be as forbidden unto you; it shall not be eaten.
english: And when ye shall come into the land, and shall have planted all manner of trees for food, then ye shall count the fruit thereof as forbidden; three years shall it be as forbidden unto you; it shall not be eaten.

searchText: leviticus 19:24 and in the fourth year all the fruit thereof shall be holy, for giving praise unto the lord.
english: And in the fourth year all the fruit thereof shall be holy, for giving praise unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 19:25 but in the fifth year may ye eat of the fruit thereof, that it may yield unto you more richly the increase thereof: i am the lord your god.
english: But in the fifth year may ye eat of the fruit thereof, that it may yield unto you more richly the increase thereof: I am the LORD your God.

searchText: leviticus 19:26 ye shall not eat with the blood; neither shall ye practise divination nor soothsaying.
english: Ye shall not eat with the blood; neither shall ye practise divination nor soothsaying.

searchText: leviticus 19:27 ye shall not round the corners of your heads, neither shalt thou mar the corners of thy beard.
english: Ye shall not round the corners of your heads, neither shalt thou mar the corners of thy beard.

searchText: leviticus 19:28 ye shall not make any cuttings in your flesh for the dead, nor imprint any marks upon you: i am the lord.
english: Ye shall not make any cuttings in your flesh for the dead, nor imprint any marks upon you: I am the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 19:29 profane not thy daughter, to make her a harlot, lest the land fall into harlotry, and the land become full of lewdness.
english: Profane not thy daughter, to make her a harlot, lest the land fall into harlotry, and the land become full of lewdness.

searchText: leviticus 19:30 ye shall keep my sabbaths, and reverence my sanctuary: i am the lord.
english: Ye shall keep My sabbaths, and reverence My sanctuary: I am the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 19:31 turn ye not unto the ghosts, nor unto familiar spirits; seek them not out, to be defiled by them: i am the lord your god.
english: Turn ye not unto the ghosts, nor unto familiar spirits; seek them not out, to be defiled by them: I am the LORD your God.

searchText: leviticus 19:32 thou shalt rise up before the hoary head, and honour the face of the old man, and thou shalt fear thy god: i am the lord.
english: Thou shalt rise up before the hoary head, and honour the face of the old man, and thou shalt fear thy God: I am the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 19:33 and if a stranger sojourn with thee in your land, ye shall not do him wrong.
english: And if a stranger sojourn with thee in your land, ye shall not do him wrong.

searchText: leviticus 19:34 the stranger that sojourneth with you shall be unto you as the home-born among you, and thou shalt love him as thyself; for ye were strangers in the land of egypt: i am the lord your god.
english: The stranger that sojourneth with you shall be unto you as the home-born among you, and thou shalt love him as thyself; for ye were strangers in the land of Egypt: I am the LORD your God.

searchText: leviticus 19:35 ye shall do no unrighteousness in judgment, in meteyard, in weight, or in measure.
english: Ye shall do no unrighteousness in judgment, in meteyard, in weight, or in measure.

searchText: leviticus 19:36 just balances, just weights, a just ephah, and a just hin, shall ye have: i am the lord your god, who brought you out of the land of egypt.
english: Just balances, just weights, a just ephah, and a just hin, shall ye have: I am the LORD your God, who brought you out of the land of Egypt.

searchText: leviticus 19:37 and ye shall observe all my statutes, and all mine ordinances, and do them: i am the lord.
english: And ye shall observe all My statutes, and all Mine ordinances, and do them: I am the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 20:1 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: leviticus 20:2 moreover, thou shalt say to the children of israel: whosoever he be of the children of israel, or of the strangers that sojourn in israel, that giveth of his seed unto molech; he shall surely be put to death; the people of the land shall stone him with stones.
english: Moreover, thou shalt say to the children of Israel: Whosoever he be of the children of Israel, or of the strangers that sojourn in Israel, that giveth of his seed unto Molech; he shall surely be put to death; the people of the land shall stone him with stones.

searchText: leviticus 20:3 i also will set my face against that man, and will cut him off from among his people, because he hath given of his seed unto molech, to defile my sanctuary, and to profane my holy name.
english: I also will set My face against that man, and will cut him off from among his people, because he hath given of his seed unto Molech, to defile My sanctuary, and to profane My holy name.

searchText: leviticus 20:4 and if the people of the land do at all hide their eyes from that man, when he giveth of his seed unto molech, and put him not to death;
english: And if the people of the land do at all hide their eyes from that man, when he giveth of his seed unto Molech, and put him not to death;

searchText: leviticus 20:5 then i will set my face against that man, and against his family, and will cut him off, and all that go astray after him, to go astray after molech, from among their people.
english: then I will set My face against that man, and against his family, and will cut him off, and all that go astray after him, to go astray after Molech, from among their people.

searchText: leviticus 20:6 and the soul that turneth unto the ghosts, and unto the familiar spirits, to go astray after them, i will even set my face against that soul, and will cut him off from among his people.
english: And the soul that turneth unto the ghosts, and unto the familiar spirits, to go astray after them, I will even set My face against that soul, and will cut him off from among his people.

searchText: leviticus 20:7 sanctify yourselves therefore, and be ye holy; for i am the lord your god.
english: Sanctify yourselves therefore, and be ye holy; for I am the LORD your God.

searchText: leviticus 20:8 and keep ye my statutes, and do them: i am the lord who sanctify you.
english: And keep ye My statutes, and do them: I am the LORD who sanctify you.

searchText: leviticus 20:9 for whatsoever man there be that curseth his father or his mother shall surely be put to death; he hath cursed his father or his mother; his blood shall be upon him.
english: For whatsoever man there be that curseth his father or his mother shall surely be put to death; he hath cursed his father or his mother; his blood shall be upon him.

searchText: leviticus 20:10 and the man that committeth adultery with another man’s wife, even he that committeth adultery with his neighbour’s wife, both the adulterer and the adulteress shall surely be put to death.
english: And the man that committeth adultery with another man’s wife, even he that committeth adultery with his neighbour’s wife, both the adulterer and the adulteress shall surely be put to death.

searchText: leviticus 20:11 and the man that lieth with his father’s wife—he hath uncovered his father’s nakedness—both of them shall surely be put to death; their blood shall be upon them.
english: And the man that lieth with his father’s wife—he hath uncovered his father’s nakedness—both of them shall surely be put to death; their blood shall be upon them.

searchText: leviticus 20:12 and if a man lie with his daughter-in-law, both of them shall surely be put to death; they have wrought corruption; their blood shall be upon them.
english: And if a man lie with his daughter-in-law, both of them shall surely be put to death; they have wrought corruption; their blood shall be upon them.

searchText: leviticus 20:13 and if a man lie with mankind, as with womankind, both of them have committed abomination: they shall surely be put to death; their blood shall be upon them.
english: And if a man lie with mankind, as with womankind, both of them have committed abomination: they shall surely be put to death; their blood shall be upon them.

searchText: leviticus 20:14 and if a man take with his wife also her mother, it is wickedness: they shall be burnt with fire, both he and they; that there be no wickedness among you.
english: And if a man take with his wife also her mother, it is wickedness: they shall be burnt with fire, both he and they; that there be no wickedness among you.

searchText: leviticus 20:15 and if a man lie with a beast, he shall surely be put to death; and ye shall slay the beast.
english: And if a man lie with a beast, he shall surely be put to death; and ye shall slay the beast.

searchText: leviticus 20:16 and if a woman approach unto any beast, and lie down thereto, thou shalt kill the woman, and the beast: they shall surely be put to death; their blood shall be upon them.
english: And if a woman approach unto any beast, and lie down thereto, thou shalt kill the woman, and the beast: they shall surely be put to death; their blood shall be upon them.

searchText: leviticus 20:17 and if a man shall take his sister, his father’s daughter, or his mother’s daughter, and see her nakedness, and she see his nakedness: it is a shameful thing; and they shall be cut off in the sight of the children of their people: he hath uncovered his sister’s nakedness; he shall bear his iniquity.
english: And if a man shall take his sister, his father’s daughter, or his mother’s daughter, and see her nakedness, and she see his nakedness: it is a shameful thing; and they shall be cut off in the sight of the children of their people: he hath uncovered his sister’s nakedness; he shall bear his iniquity.

searchText: leviticus 20:18 and if a man shall lie with a woman having her sickness, and shall uncover her nakedness—he hath made naked her fountain, and she hath uncovered the fountain of her blood—both of them shall be cut off from among their people.
english: And if a man shall lie with a woman having her sickness, and shall uncover her nakedness—he hath made naked her fountain, and she hath uncovered the fountain of her blood—both of them shall be cut off from among their people.

searchText: leviticus 20:19 and thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy mother’s sister, nor of thy father’s sister; for he hath made naked his near kin; they shall bear their iniquity.
english: And thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy mother’s sister, nor of thy father’s sister; for he hath made naked his near kin; they shall bear their iniquity.

searchText: leviticus 20:20 and if a man shall lie with his uncle’s wife—he hath uncovered his uncle’s nakedness—they shall bear their sin; they shall die childless.
english: And if a man shall lie with his uncle’s wife—he hath uncovered his uncle’s nakedness—they shall bear their sin; they shall die childless.

searchText: leviticus 20:21 and if a man shall take his brother’s wife, it is impurity: he hath uncovered his brother’s nakedness; they shall be childless.
english: And if a man shall take his brother’s wife, it is impurity: he hath uncovered his brother’s nakedness; they shall be childless.

searchText: leviticus 20:22 ye shall therefore keep all my statutes, and all mine ordinances, and do them, that the land, whither i bring you to dwell therein, vomit you not out.
english: Ye shall therefore keep all My statutes, and all Mine ordinances, and do them, that the land, whither I bring you to dwell therein, vomit you not out.

searchText: leviticus 20:23 and ye shall not walk in the customs of the nation, which i am casting out before you; for they did all these things, and therefore i abhorred them.
english: And ye shall not walk in the customs of the nation, which I am casting out before you; for they did all these things, and therefore I abhorred them.

searchText: leviticus 20:24 but i have said unto you: ‘ye shall inherit their land, and i will give it unto you to possess it, a land flowing with milk and honey.’ i am the lord your god, who have set you apart from the peoples.
english: But I have said unto you: ‘Ye shall inherit their land, and I will give it unto you to possess it, a land flowing with milk and honey.’ I am the LORD your God, who have set you apart from the peoples.

searchText: leviticus 20:25 ye shall therefore separate between the clean beast and the unclean, and between the unclean fowl and the clean; and ye shall not make your souls detestable by beast, or by fowl, or by any thing wherewith the ground teemeth, which i have set apart for you to hold unclean.
english: Ye shall therefore separate between the clean beast and the unclean, and between the unclean fowl and the clean; and ye shall not make your souls detestable by beast, or by fowl, or by any thing wherewith the ground teemeth, which I have set apart for you to hold unclean.

searchText: leviticus 20:26 and ye shall be holy unto me; for i the lord am holy, and have set you apart from the peoples, that ye should be mine.
english: And ye shall be holy unto Me; for I the LORD am holy, and have set you apart from the peoples, that ye should be Mine.

searchText: leviticus 20:27 a man also or a woman that divineth by a ghost or a familiar spirit, shall surely be put to death; they shall stone them with stones; their blood shall be upon them.
english: A man also or a woman that divineth by a ghost or a familiar spirit, shall surely be put to death; they shall stone them with stones; their blood shall be upon them.

searchText: leviticus 21:1 and the lord said unto moses: speak unto the priests the sons of aaron, and say unto them: there shall none defile himself for the dead among his people;
english: And the LORD said unto Moses: Speak unto the priests the sons of Aaron, and say unto them: There shall none defile himself for the dead among his people;

searchText: leviticus 21:2 except for his kin, that is near unto him, for his mother, and for his father, and for his son, and for his daughter, and for his brother;
english: except for his kin, that is near unto him, for his mother, and for his father, and for his son, and for his daughter, and for his brother;

searchText: leviticus 21:3 and for his sister a virgin, that is near unto him, that hath had no husband, for her may he defile himself.
english: and for his sister a virgin, that is near unto him, that hath had no husband, for her may he defile himself.

searchText: leviticus 21:4 he shall not defile himself, being a chief man among his people, to profane himself.
english: He shall not defile himself, being a chief man among his people, to profane himself.

searchText: leviticus 21:5 they shall not make baldness upon their head, neither shall they shave off the corners of their beard, nor make any cuttings in their flesh.
english: They shall not make baldness upon their head, neither shall they shave off the corners of their beard, nor make any cuttings in their flesh.

searchText: leviticus 21:6 they shall be holy unto their god, and not profane the name of their god; for the offerings of the lord made by fire, the bread of their god, they do offer; therefore they shall be holy.
english: They shall be holy unto their God, and not profane the name of their God; for the offerings of the LORD made by fire, the bread of their God, they do offer; therefore they shall be holy.

searchText: leviticus 21:7 they shall not take a woman that is a harlot, or profaned; neither shall they take a woman put away from her husband; for he is holy unto his god.
english: They shall not take a woman that is a harlot, or profaned; neither shall they take a woman put away from her husband; for he is holy unto his God.

searchText: leviticus 21:8 thou shalt sanctify him therefore; for he offereth the bread of thy god; he shall be holy unto thee; for i the lord, who sanctify you, am holy.
english: Thou shalt sanctify him therefore; for he offereth the bread of thy God; he shall be holy unto thee; for I the LORD, who sanctify you, am holy.

searchText: leviticus 21:9 and the daughter of any priest, if she profane herself by playing the harlot, she profaneth her father: she shall be burnt with fire.
english: And the daughter of any priest, if she profane herself by playing the harlot, she profaneth her father: she shall be burnt with fire.
