searchText: leviticus 21:10 and the priest that is highest among his brethren, upon whose head the anointing oil is poured, and that is consecrated to put on the garments, shall not let the hair of his head go loose, nor rend his clothes;
english: And the priest that is highest among his brethren, upon whose head the anointing oil is poured, and that is consecrated to put on the garments, shall not let the hair of his head go loose, nor rend his clothes;

searchText: leviticus 21:11 neither shall he go in to any dead body, nor defile himself for his father, or for his mother;
english: neither shall he go in to any dead body, nor defile himself for his father, or for his mother;

searchText: leviticus 21:12 neither shall he go out of the sanctuary, nor profane the sanctuary of his god; for the consecration of the anointing oil of his god is upon him: i am the lord.
english: neither shall he go out of the sanctuary, nor profane the sanctuary of his God; for the consecration of the anointing oil of his God is upon him: I am the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 21:13 and he shall take a wife in her virginity.
english: And he shall take a wife in her virginity.

searchText: leviticus 21:14 a widow, or one divorced, or a profaned woman, or a harlot, these shall he not take; but a virgin of his own people shall he take to wife.
english: A widow, or one divorced, or a profaned woman, or a harlot, these shall he not take; but a virgin of his own people shall he take to wife.

searchText: leviticus 21:15 and he shall not profane his seed among his people; for i am the lord who sanctify him.
english: And he shall not profane his seed among his people; for I am the LORD who sanctify him.

searchText: leviticus 21:16 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: leviticus 21:17 speak unto aaron, saying: whosoever he be of thy seed throughout their generations that hath a blemish, let him not approach to offer the bread of his god.
english: Speak unto Aaron, saying: Whosoever he be of thy seed throughout their generations that hath a blemish, let him not approach to offer the bread of his God.

searchText: leviticus 21:18 for whatsoever man he be that hath a blemish, he shall not approach: a blind man, or a lame, or he that hath any thing maimed, or anything too long,
english: For whatsoever man he be that hath a blemish, he shall not approach: a blind man, or a lame, or he that hath any thing maimed, or anything too long,

searchText: leviticus 21:19 or a man that is broken-footed, or broken-handed,
english: or a man that is broken-footed, or broken-handed,

searchText: leviticus 21:20 or crook-backed, or a dwarf, or that hath his eye overspread, or is scabbed, or scurvy, or hath his stones crushed;
english: or crook-backed, or a dwarf, or that hath his eye overspread, or is scabbed, or scurvy, or hath his stones crushed;

searchText: leviticus 21:21 no man of the seed of aaron the priest, that hath a blemish, shall come nigh to offer the offerings of the lord made by fire; he hath a blemish; he shall not come nigh to offer the bread of his god.
english: no man of the seed of Aaron the priest, that hath a blemish, shall come nigh to offer the offerings of the LORD made by fire; he hath a blemish; he shall not come nigh to offer the bread of his God.

searchText: leviticus 21:22 he may eat the bread of his god, both of the most holy, and of the holy.
english: He may eat the bread of his God, both of the most holy, and of the holy.

searchText: leviticus 21:23 only he shall not go in unto the veil, nor come nigh unto the altar, because he hath a blemish; that he profane not my holy places; for i am the lord who sanctify them.
english: Only he shall not go in unto the veil, nor come nigh unto the altar, because he hath a blemish; that he profane not My holy places; for I am the LORD who sanctify them.

searchText: leviticus 21:24 so moses spoke unto aaron, and to his sons, and unto all the children of israel.
english: So Moses spoke unto Aaron, and to his sons, and unto all the children of Israel.

searchText: leviticus 22:1 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: leviticus 22:2 speak unto aaron and to his sons, that they separate themselves from the holy things of the children of israel, which they hallow unto me, and that they profane not my holy name: i am the lord.
english: Speak unto Aaron and to his sons, that they separate themselves from the holy things of the children of Israel, which they hallow unto Me, and that they profane not My holy name: I am the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 22:3 say unto them: whosoever he be of all your seed throughout your generations, that approacheth unto the holy things, which the children of israel hallow unto the lord, having his uncleanness upon him, that soul shall be cut off from before me: i am the lord.
english: Say unto them: Whosoever he be of all your seed throughout your generations, that approacheth unto the holy things, which the children of Israel hallow unto the LORD, having his uncleanness upon him, that soul shall be cut off from before Me: I am the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 22:4 what man soever of the seed of aaron is a leper, or hath an issue, he shall not eat of the holy things, until he be clean. and whoso toucheth any one that is unclean by the dead; or from whomsoever the flow of seed goeth out;
english: What man soever of the seed of Aaron is a leper, or hath an issue, he shall not eat of the holy things, until he be clean. And whoso toucheth any one that is unclean by the dead; or from whomsoever the flow of seed goeth out;

searchText: leviticus 22:5 or whosoever toucheth any swarming thing, whereby he may be made unclean, or a man of whom he may take uncleanness, whatsoever uncleanness he hath;
english: or whosoever toucheth any swarming thing, whereby he may be made unclean, or a man of whom he may take uncleanness, whatsoever uncleanness he hath;

searchText: leviticus 22:6 the soul that toucheth any such shall be unclean until the even, and shall not eat of the holy things, unless he bathe his flesh in water.
english: the soul that toucheth any such shall be unclean until the even, and shall not eat of the holy things, unless he bathe his flesh in water.

searchText: leviticus 22:7 and when the sun is down, he shall be clean; and afterward he may eat of the holy things, because it is his bread.
english: And when the sun is down, he shall be clean; and afterward he may eat of the holy things, because it is his bread.

searchText: leviticus 22:8 that which dieth of itself, or is torn of beasts, he shall not eat to defile himself therewith: i am the lord.
english: That which dieth of itself, or is torn of beasts, he shall not eat to defile himself therewith: I am the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 22:9 they shall therefore keep my charge, lest they bear sin for it, and die therein, if they profane it: i am the lord who sanctify them.
english: They shall therefore keep My charge, lest they bear sin for it, and die therein, if they profane it: I am the LORD who sanctify them.

searchText: leviticus 22:10 there shall no common man eat of the holy thing; a tenant of a priest, or a hired servant, shall not eat of the holy thing.
english: There shall no common man eat of the holy thing; a tenant of a priest, or a hired servant, shall not eat of the holy thing.

searchText: leviticus 22:11 but if a priest buy any soul, the purchase of his money, he may eat of it; and such as are born in his house, they may eat of his bread.
english: But if a priest buy any soul, the purchase of his money, he may eat of it; and such as are born in his house, they may eat of his bread.

searchText: leviticus 22:12 and if a priest’s daughter be married unto a common man, she shall not eat of that which is set apart from the holy things.
english: And if a priest’s daughter be married unto a common man, she shall not eat of that which is set apart from the holy things.

searchText: leviticus 22:13 but if a priest’s daughter be a widow, or divorced, and have no child, and is returned unto her father’s house, as in her youth, she may eat of her father’s bread; but there shall no common man eat thereof.
english: But if a priest’s daughter be a widow, or divorced, and have no child, and is returned unto her father’s house, as in her youth, she may eat of her father’s bread; but there shall no common man eat thereof.

searchText: leviticus 22:14 and if a man eat of the holy thing through error, then he shall put the fifth part thereof unto it, and shall give unto the priest the holy thing.
english: And if a man eat of the holy thing through error, then he shall put the fifth part thereof unto it, and shall give unto the priest the holy thing.

searchText: leviticus 22:15 and they shall not profane the holy things of the children of israel, which they set apart unto the lord;
english: And they shall not profane the holy things of the children of Israel, which they set apart unto the LORD;

searchText: leviticus 22:16 and so cause them to bear the iniquity that bringeth guilt, when they eat their holy things; for i am the lord who sanctify them.
english: and so cause them to bear the iniquity that bringeth guilt, when they eat their holy things; for I am the LORD who sanctify them.

searchText: leviticus 22:17 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: leviticus 22:18 speak unto aaron, and to his sons, and unto all the children of israel, and say unto them: whosoever he be of the house of israel, or of the strangers in israel, that bringeth his offering, whether it be any of their vows, or any of their free-will-offerings, which are brought unto the lord for a burnt-offering;
english: Speak unto Aaron, and to his sons, and unto all the children of Israel, and say unto them: Whosoever he be of the house of Israel, or of the strangers in Israel, that bringeth his offering, whether it be any of their vows, or any of their free-will-offerings, which are brought unto the LORD for a burnt-offering;

searchText: leviticus 22:19 that ye may be accepted, ye shall offer a male without blemish, of the beeves, of the sheep, or of the goats.
english: that ye may be accepted, ye shall offer a male without blemish, of the beeves, of the sheep, or of the goats.

searchText: leviticus 22:20 but whatsoever hath a blemish, that shall ye not bring; for it shall not be acceptable for you.
english: But whatsoever hath a blemish, that shall ye not bring; for it shall not be acceptable for you.

searchText: leviticus 22:21 and whosoever bringeth a sacrifice of peace-offerings unto the lord in fulfilment of a vow clearly uttered, or for a freewill-offering, of the herd or of the flock, it shall be perfect to be accepted; there shall be no blemish therein.
english: And whosoever bringeth a sacrifice of peace-offerings unto the LORD in fulfilment of a vow clearly uttered, or for a freewill-offering, of the herd or of the flock, it shall be perfect to be accepted; there shall be no blemish therein.

searchText: leviticus 22:22 blind, or broken, or maimed, or having a wen, or scabbed, or scurvy, ye shall not offer these unto the lord, nor make an offering by fire of them upon the altar unto the lord.
english: Blind, or broken, or maimed, or having a wen, or scabbed, or scurvy, ye shall not offer these unto the LORD, nor make an offering by fire of them upon the altar unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 22:23 either a bullock or a lamb that hath any thing too long or too short, that mayest thou offer for a freewill-offering; but for a vow it shall not be accepted.
english: Either a bullock or a lamb that hath any thing too long or too short, that mayest thou offer for a freewill-offering; but for a vow it shall not be accepted.

searchText: leviticus 22:24 that which hath its stones bruised, or crushed, or torn, or cut, ye shall not offer unto the lord; neither shall ye do thus in your land.
english: That which hath its stones bruised, or crushed, or torn, or cut, ye shall not offer unto the LORD; neither shall ye do thus in your land.

searchText: leviticus 22:25 neither from the hand of a foreigner shall ye offer the bread of your god of any of these, because their corruption is in them, there is a blemish in them; they shall not be accepted for you.
english: Neither from the hand of a foreigner shall ye offer the bread of your God of any of these, because their corruption is in them, there is a blemish in them; they shall not be accepted for you.

searchText: leviticus 22:26 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: leviticus 22:27 when a bullock, or a sheep, or a goat, is brought forth, then it shall be seven days under the dam; but from the eighth day and thenceforth it may be accepted for an offering made by fire unto the lord.
english: When a bullock, or a sheep, or a goat, is brought forth, then it shall be seven days under the dam; but from the eighth day and thenceforth it may be accepted for an offering made by fire unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 22:28 and whether it be cow or ewe, ye shall not kill it and its young both in one day.
english: And whether it be cow or ewe, ye shall not kill it and its young both in one day.

searchText: leviticus 22:29 and when ye sacrifice a sacrifice of thanksgiving unto the lord, ye shall sacrifice it that ye may be accepted.
english: And when ye sacrifice a sacrifice of thanksgiving unto the LORD, ye shall sacrifice it that ye may be accepted.

searchText: leviticus 22:30 on the same day it shall be eaten; ye shall leave none of it until the morning: i am the lord.
english: On the same day it shall be eaten; ye shall leave none of it until the morning: I am the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 22:31 and ye shall keep my commandments, and do them: i am the lord.
english: And ye shall keep My commandments, and do them: I am the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 22:32 and ye shall not profane my holy name; but i will be hallowed among the children of israel: i am the lord who hallow you,
english: And ye shall not profane My holy name; but I will be hallowed among the children of Israel: I am the LORD who hallow you,

searchText: leviticus 22:33 that brought you out of the land of egypt, to be your god: i am the lord.
english: that brought you out of the land of Egypt, to be your God: I am the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 23:1 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: leviticus 23:2 speak unto the children of israel, and say unto them: the appointed seasons of the lord, which ye shall proclaim to be holy convocations, even these are my appointed seasons.
english: Speak unto the children of Israel, and say unto them: The appointed seasons of the LORD, which ye shall proclaim to be holy convocations, even these are My appointed seasons.

searchText: leviticus 23:3 six days shall work be done; but on the seventh day is a sabbath of solemn rest, a holy convocation; ye shall do no manner of work; it is a sabbath unto the lord in all your dwellings.
english: Six days shall work be done; but on the seventh day is a sabbath of solemn rest, a holy convocation; ye shall do no manner of work; it is a sabbath unto the LORD in all your dwellings.

searchText: leviticus 23:4 these are the appointed seasons of the lord, even holy convocations, which ye shall proclaim in their appointed season.
english: These are the appointed seasons of the LORD, even holy convocations, which ye shall proclaim in their appointed season.

searchText: leviticus 23:5 in the first month, on the fourteenth day of the month at dusk, is the lord’s passover.
english: In the first month, on the fourteenth day of the month at dusk, is the LORD’S passover.

searchText: leviticus 23:6 and on the fifteenth day of the same month is the feast of unleavened bread unto the lord; seven days ye shall eat unleavened bread.
english: And on the fifteenth day of the same month is the feast of unleavened bread unto the LORD; seven days ye shall eat unleavened bread.

searchText: leviticus 23:7 in the first day ye shall have a holy convocation; ye shall do no manner of servile work.
english: In the first day ye shall have a holy convocation; ye shall do no manner of servile work.

searchText: leviticus 23:8 and ye shall bring an offering made by fire unto the lord seven days; in the seventh day is a holy convocation; ye shall do no manner of servile work.
english: And ye shall bring an offering made by fire unto the LORD seven days; in the seventh day is a holy convocation; ye shall do no manner of servile work.

searchText: leviticus 23:9 and the lord spoke unto moses saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses saying:

searchText: leviticus 23:10 speak unto the children of israel, and say unto them: when ye are come into the land which i give unto you, and shall reap the harvest thereof, then ye shall bring the sheaf of the first-fruits of your harvest unto the priest.
english: Speak unto the children of Israel, and say unto them: When ye are come into the land which I give unto you, and shall reap the harvest thereof, then ye shall bring the sheaf of the first-fruits of your harvest unto the priest.

searchText: leviticus 23:11 and he shall wave the sheaf before the lord, to be accepted for you; on the morrow after the sabbath the priest shall wave it.
english: And he shall wave the sheaf before the LORD, to be accepted for you; on the morrow after the sabbath the priest shall wave it.

searchText: leviticus 23:12 and in the day when ye wave the sheaf, ye shall offer a he-lamb without blemish of the first year for a burnt-offering unto the lord.
english: And in the day when ye wave the sheaf, ye shall offer a he-lamb without blemish of the first year for a burnt-offering unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 23:13 and the meal-offering thereof shall be two tenth parts of an ephah of fine flour mingled with oil, an offering made by fire unto the lord for a sweet savour; and the drink-offering thereof shall be of wine, the fourth part of a hin.
english: And the meal-offering thereof shall be two tenth parts of an ephah of fine flour mingled with oil, an offering made by fire unto the LORD for a sweet savour; and the drink-offering thereof shall be of wine, the fourth part of a hin.

searchText: leviticus 23:14 and ye shall eat neither bread, nor parched corn, nor fresh ears, until this selfsame day, until ye have brought the offering of your god; it is a statute for ever throughout your generations in all your dwellings.
english: And ye shall eat neither bread, nor parched corn, nor fresh ears, until this selfsame day, until ye have brought the offering of your God; it is a statute for ever throughout your generations in all your dwellings.

searchText: leviticus 23:15 and ye shall count unto you from the morrow after the day of rest, from the day that ye brought the sheaf of the waving; seven weeks shall there be complete;
english: And ye shall count unto you from the morrow after the day of rest, from the day that ye brought the sheaf of the waving; seven weeks shall there be complete;

searchText: leviticus 23:16 even unto the morrow after the seventh week shall ye number fifty days; and ye shall present a new meal-offering unto the lord.
english: even unto the morrow after the seventh week shall ye number fifty days; and ye shall present a new meal-offering unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 23:17 ye shall bring out of your dwellings two wave-loaves of two tenth parts of an ephah; they shall be of fine flour, they shall be baked with leaven, for first-fruits unto the lord.
english: Ye shall bring out of your dwellings two wave-loaves of two tenth parts of an ephah; they shall be of fine flour, they shall be baked with leaven, for first-fruits unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 23:18 and ye shall present with the bread seven lambs without blemish of the first year, and one young bullock, and two rams; they shall be a burnt-offering unto the lord, with their meal-offering, and their drink-offerings, even an offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the lord.
english: And ye shall present with the bread seven lambs without blemish of the first year, and one young bullock, and two rams; they shall be a burnt-offering unto the LORD, with their meal-offering, and their drink-offerings, even an offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 23:19 and ye shall offer one he-goat for a sin-offering, and two he-lambs of the first year for a sacrifice of peace-offerings.
english: And ye shall offer one he-goat for a sin-offering, and two he-lambs of the first year for a sacrifice of peace-offerings.

searchText: leviticus 23:20 and the priest shall wave them with the bread of the first-fruits for a wave-offering before the lord, with the two lambs; they shall be holy to the lord for the priest.
english: And the priest shall wave them with the bread of the first-fruits for a wave-offering before the LORD, with the two lambs; they shall be holy to the LORD for the priest.

searchText: leviticus 23:21 and ye shall make proclamation on the selfsame day; there shall be a holy convocation unto you; ye shall do no manner of servile work; it is a statute for ever in all your dwellings throughout your generations.
english: And ye shall make proclamation on the selfsame day; there shall be a holy convocation unto you; ye shall do no manner of servile work; it is a statute for ever in all your dwellings throughout your generations.

searchText: leviticus 23:22 and when ye reap the harvest of your land, thou shalt not wholly reap the corner of thy field, neither shalt thou gather the gleaning of thy harvest; thou shalt leave them for the poor, and for the stranger: i am the lord your god.
english: And when ye reap the harvest of your land, thou shalt not wholly reap the corner of thy field, neither shalt thou gather the gleaning of thy harvest; thou shalt leave them for the poor, and for the stranger: I am the LORD your God.

searchText: leviticus 23:23 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: leviticus 23:24 speak unto the children of israel, saying: in the seventh month, in the first day of the month, shall be a solemn rest unto you, a memorial proclaimed with the blast of horns, a holy convocation.
english: Speak unto the children of Israel, saying: In the seventh month, in the first day of the month, shall be a solemn rest unto you, a memorial proclaimed with the blast of horns, a holy convocation.

searchText: leviticus 23:25 ye shall do no manner of servile work; and ye shall bring an offering made by fire unto the lord.
english: Ye shall do no manner of servile work; and ye shall bring an offering made by fire unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 23:26 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: leviticus 23:27 howbeit on the tenth day of this seventh month is the day of atonement; there shall be a holy convocation unto you, and ye shall afflict your souls; and ye shall bring an offering made by fire unto the lord.
english: Howbeit on the tenth day of this seventh month is the day of atonement; there shall be a holy convocation unto you, and ye shall afflict your souls; and ye shall bring an offering made by fire unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 23:28 and ye shall do no manner of work in that same day; for it is a day of atonement, to make atonement for you before the lord your god.
english: And ye shall do no manner of work in that same day; for it is a day of atonement, to make atonement for you before the LORD your God.

searchText: leviticus 23:29 for whatsoever soul it be that shall not be afflicted in that same day, he shall be cut off from his people.
english: For whatsoever soul it be that shall not be afflicted in that same day, he shall be cut off from his people.

searchText: leviticus 23:30 and whatsoever soul it be that doeth any manner of work in that same day, that soul will i destroy from among his people.
english: And whatsoever soul it be that doeth any manner of work in that same day, that soul will I destroy from among his people.

searchText: leviticus 23:31 ye shall do no manner of work; it is a statute for ever throughout your generations in all your dwellings.
english: Ye shall do no manner of work; it is a statute for ever throughout your generations in all your dwellings.

searchText: leviticus 23:32 it shall be unto you a sabbath of solemn rest, and ye shall afflict your souls; in the ninth day of the month at even, from even unto even, shall ye keep your sabbath.
english: It shall be unto you a sabbath of solemn rest, and ye shall afflict your souls; in the ninth day of the month at even, from even unto even, shall ye keep your sabbath.

searchText: leviticus 23:33 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: leviticus 23:34 speak unto the children of israel, saying: on the fifteenth day of this seventh month is the feast of tabernacles for seven days unto the lord.
english: Speak unto the children of Israel, saying: On the fifteenth day of this seventh month is the feast of tabernacles for seven days unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 23:35 on the first day shall be a holy convocation; ye shall do no manner of servile work.
english: On the first day shall be a holy convocation; ye shall do no manner of servile work.

searchText: leviticus 23:36 seven days ye shall bring an offering made by fire unto the lord; on the eighth day shall be a holy convocation unto you; and ye shall bring an offering made by fire unto the lord; it is a day of solemn assembly; ye shall do no manner of servile work.
english: Seven days ye shall bring an offering made by fire unto the LORD; on the eighth day shall be a holy convocation unto you; and ye shall bring an offering made by fire unto the LORD; it is a day of solemn assembly; ye shall do no manner of servile work.

searchText: leviticus 23:37 these are the appointed seasons of the lord, which ye shall proclaim to be holy convocations, to bring an offering made by fire unto the lord, a burnt-offering, and a meal-offering, a sacrifice, and drink-offerings, each on its own day;
english: These are the appointed seasons of the LORD, which ye shall proclaim to be holy convocations, to bring an offering made by fire unto the LORD, a burnt-offering, and a meal-offering, a sacrifice, and drink-offerings, each on its own day;

searchText: leviticus 23:38 beside the sabbaths of the lord, and beside your gifts, and beside all your vows, and beside all your freewill-offerings, which ye give unto the lord.
english: beside the sabbaths of the LORD, and beside your gifts, and beside all your vows, and beside all your freewill-offerings, which ye give unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 23:39 howbeit on the fifteenth day of the seventh month, when ye have gathered in the fruits of the land, ye shall keep the feast of the lord seven days; on the first day shall be a solemn rest, and on the eighth day shall be a solemn rest.
english: Howbeit on the fifteenth day of the seventh month, when ye have gathered in the fruits of the land, ye shall keep the feast of the LORD seven days; on the first day shall be a solemn rest, and on the eighth day shall be a solemn rest.

searchText: leviticus 23:40 and ye shall take you on the first day the fruit of goodly trees, branches of palm-trees, and boughs of thick trees, and willows of the brook, and ye shall rejoice before the lord your god seven days.
english: And ye shall take you on the first day the fruit of goodly trees, branches of palm-trees, and boughs of thick trees, and willows of the brook, and ye shall rejoice before the LORD your God seven days.

searchText: leviticus 23:41 and ye shall keep it a feast unto the lord seven days in the year; it is a statute for ever in your generations; ye shall keep it in the seventh month.
english: And ye shall keep it a feast unto the LORD seven days in the year; it is a statute for ever in your generations; ye shall keep it in the seventh month.

searchText: leviticus 23:42 ye shall dwell in booths seven days; all that are home-born in israel shall dwell in booths;
english: Ye shall dwell in booths seven days; all that are home-born in Israel shall dwell in booths;

searchText: leviticus 23:43 that your generations may know that i made the children of israel to dwell in booths, when i brought them out of the land of egypt: i am the lord your god.
english: that your generations may know that I made the children of Israel to dwell in booths, when I brought them out of the land of Egypt: I am the LORD your God.

searchText: leviticus 23:44 and moses declared unto the children of israel the appointed seasons of the lord.
english: And Moses declared unto the children of Israel the appointed seasons of the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 24:1 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: leviticus 24:2 ’command the children of israel, that they bring unto thee pure olive oil beaten for the light, to cause a lamp to burn continually.
english: ’Command the children of Israel, that they bring unto thee pure olive oil beaten for the light, to cause a lamp to burn continually.

searchText: leviticus 24:3 without the veil of the testimony, in the tent of meeting, shall aaron order it from evening to morning before the lord continually; it shall be a statute for ever throughout your generations.
english: Without the veil of the testimony, in the tent of meeting, shall Aaron order it from evening to morning before the LORD continually; it shall be a statute for ever throughout your generations.

searchText: leviticus 24:4 he shall order the lamps upon the pure candlestick before the lord continually.
english: He shall order the lamps upon the pure candlestick before the LORD continually.

searchText: leviticus 24:5 and thou shalt take fine flour, and bake twelve cakes thereof: two tenth parts of an ephah shall be in one cake.
english: And thou shalt take fine flour, and bake twelve cakes thereof: two tenth parts of an ephah shall be in one cake.

searchText: leviticus 24:6 and thou shalt set them in two rows, six in a row, upon the pure table before the lord.
english: And thou shalt set them in two rows, six in a row, upon the pure table before the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 24:7 and thou shalt put pure frankincense with each row, that it may be to the bread for a memorial-part, even an offering made by fire unto the lord.
english: And thou shalt put pure frankincense with each row, that it may be to the bread for a memorial-part, even an offering made by fire unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 24:8 every sabbath day he shall set it in order before the lord continually; it is from the children of israel, an everlasting covenant.
english: Every sabbath day he shall set it in order before the LORD continually; it is from the children of Israel, an everlasting covenant.

searchText: leviticus 24:9 and it shall be for aaron and his sons; and they shall eat it in a holy place; for it is most holy unto him of the offerings of the lord made by fire, a perpetual due.’
english: And it shall be for Aaron and his sons; and they shall eat it in a holy place; for it is most holy unto him of the offerings of the LORD made by fire, a perpetual due.’

searchText: leviticus 24:10 and the son of an israelitish woman, whose father was an egyptian, went out among the children of israel; and the son of the israelitish woman and a man of israel strove together in the camp.
english: And the son of an Israelitish woman, whose father was an Egyptian, went out among the children of Israel; and the son of the Israelitish woman and a man of Israel strove together in the camp.

searchText: leviticus 24:11 and the son of the israelitish woman blasphemed the name, and cursed; and they brought him unto moses. and his mother’s name was shelomith, the daughter of dibri, of the tribe of dan.
english: And the son of the Israelitish woman blasphemed the Name, and cursed; and they brought him unto Moses. And his mother’s name was Shelomith, the daughter of Dibri, of the tribe of Dan.

searchText: leviticus 24:12 and they put him in ward, that it might be declared unto them at the mouth of the lord.
english: And they put him in ward, that it might be declared unto them at the mouth of the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 24:13 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: leviticus 24:14 ’bring forth him that hath cursed without the camp; and let all that heard him lay their hands upon his head, and let all the congregation stone him.
english: ’Bring forth him that hath cursed without the camp; and let all that heard him lay their hands upon his head, and let all the congregation stone him.

searchText: leviticus 24:15 and thou shalt speak unto the children of israel, saying: whosoever curseth his god shall bear his sin.
english: And thou shalt speak unto the children of Israel, saying: Whosoever curseth his God shall bear his sin.

searchText: leviticus 24:16 and he that blasphemeth the name of the lord, he shall surely be put to death; all the congregation shall certainly stone him; as well the stranger, as the home-born, when he blasphemeth the name, shall be put to death.
english: And he that blasphemeth the name of the LORD, he shall surely be put to death; all the congregation shall certainly stone him; as well the stranger, as the home-born, when he blasphemeth the Name, shall be put to death.

searchText: leviticus 24:17 and he that smiteth any man mortally shall surely be put to death.
english: And he that smiteth any man mortally shall surely be put to death.

searchText: leviticus 24:18 and he that smiteth a beast mortally shall make it good: life for life.
english: And he that smiteth a beast mortally shall make it good: life for life.

searchText: leviticus 24:19 and if a man maim his neighbour; as he hath done, so shall it be done to him:
english: And if a man maim his neighbour; as he hath done, so shall it be done to him:

searchText: leviticus 24:20 breach for breach, eye for eye, tooth for tooth; as he hath maimed a man, so shall it be rendered unto him.
english: breach for breach, eye for eye, tooth for tooth; as he hath maimed a man, so shall it be rendered unto him.

searchText: leviticus 24:21 and he that killeth a beast shall make it good; and he that killeth a man shall be put to death.
english: And he that killeth a beast shall make it good; and he that killeth a man shall be put to death.

searchText: leviticus 24:22 ye shall have one manner of law, as well for the stranger, as for the home-born; for i am the lord your god.’
english: Ye shall have one manner of law, as well for the stranger, as for the home-born; for I am the LORD your God.’

searchText: leviticus 24:23 and moses spoke to the children of israel, and they brought forth him that had cursed out of the camp, and stoned him with stones. and the children of israel did as the lord commanded moses.
english: And Moses spoke to the children of Israel, and they brought forth him that had cursed out of the camp, and stoned him with stones. And the children of Israel did as the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: leviticus 25:1 and the lord spoke unto moses in mount sinai, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses in mount Sinai, saying:

searchText: leviticus 25:2 speak unto the children of israel, and say unto them: when ye come into the land which i give you, then shall the land keep a sabbath unto the lord.
english: Speak unto the children of Israel, and say unto them: When ye come into the land which I give you, then shall the land keep a sabbath unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 25:3 six years thou shalt sow thy field, and six years thou shalt prune thy vineyard, and gather in the produce thereof.
english: Six years thou shalt sow thy field, and six years thou shalt prune thy vineyard, and gather in the produce thereof.

searchText: leviticus 25:4 but in the seventh year shall be a sabbath of solemn rest for the land, a sabbath unto the lord; thou shalt neither sow thy field, nor prune thy vineyard.
english: But in the seventh year shall be a sabbath of solemn rest for the land, a sabbath unto the LORD; thou shalt neither sow thy field, nor prune thy vineyard.

searchText: leviticus 25:5 that which groweth of itself of thy harvest thou shalt not reap, and the grapes of thy undressed vine thou shalt not gather; it shall be a year of solemn rest for the land.
english: That which groweth of itself of thy harvest thou shalt not reap, and the grapes of thy undressed vine thou shalt not gather; it shall be a year of solemn rest for the land.

searchText: leviticus 25:6 and the sabbath-produce of the land shall be for food for you: for thee, and for thy servant and for thy maid, and for thy hired servant and for the settler by thy side that sojourn with thee;
english: And the sabbath-produce of the land shall be for food for you: for thee, and for thy servant and for thy maid, and for thy hired servant and for the settler by thy side that sojourn with thee;

searchText: leviticus 25:7 and for thy cattle, and for the beasts that are in thy land, shall all the increase thereof be for food.
english: and for thy cattle, and for the beasts that are in thy land, shall all the increase thereof be for food.

searchText: leviticus 25:8 and thou shalt number seven sabbaths of years unto thee, seven times seven years; and there shall be unto thee the days of seven sabbaths of years, even forty and nine years.
english: And thou shalt number seven sabbaths of years unto thee, seven times seven years; and there shall be unto thee the days of seven sabbaths of years, even forty and nine years.

searchText: leviticus 25:9 then shalt thou make proclamation with the blast of the horn on the tenth day of the seventh month; in the day of atonement shall ye make proclamation with the horn throughout all your land.
english: Then shalt thou make proclamation with the blast of the horn on the tenth day of the seventh month; in the day of atonement shall ye make proclamation with the horn throughout all your land.

searchText: leviticus 25:10 and ye shall hallow the fiftieth year, and proclaim liberty throughout the land unto all the inhabitants thereof; it shall be a jubilee unto you; and ye shall return every man unto his possession, and ye shall return every man unto his family.
english: And ye shall hallow the fiftieth year, and proclaim liberty throughout the land unto all the inhabitants thereof; it shall be a jubilee unto you; and ye shall return every man unto his possession, and ye shall return every man unto his family.

searchText: leviticus 25:11 a jubilee shall that fiftieth year be unto you; ye shall not sow, neither reap that which groweth of itself in it, nor gather the grapes in it of the undressed vines.
english: A jubilee shall that fiftieth year be unto you; ye shall not sow, neither reap that which groweth of itself in it, nor gather the grapes in it of the undressed vines.

searchText: leviticus 25:12 for it is a jubilee; it shall be holy unto you; ye shall eat the increase thereof out of the field.
english: For it is a jubilee; it shall be holy unto you; ye shall eat the increase thereof out of the field.

searchText: leviticus 25:13 in this year of jubilee ye shall return every man unto his possession.
english: In this year of jubilee ye shall return every man unto his possession.

searchText: leviticus 25:14 and if thou sell aught unto thy neighbour, or buy of thy neighbour’s hand, ye shall not wrong one another.
english: And if thou sell aught unto thy neighbour, or buy of thy neighbour’s hand, ye shall not wrong one another.

searchText: leviticus 25:15 according to the number of years after the jubilee thou shalt buy of thy neighbour, and according unto the number of years of the crops he shall sell unto thee.
english: According to the number of years after the jubilee thou shalt buy of thy neighbour, and according unto the number of years of the crops he shall sell unto thee.

searchText: leviticus 25:16 according to the multitude of the years thou shalt increase the price thereof, and according to the fewness of the years thou shalt diminish the price of it; for the number of crops doth he sell unto thee.
english: According to the multitude of the years thou shalt increase the price thereof, and according to the fewness of the years thou shalt diminish the price of it; for the number of crops doth he sell unto thee.

searchText: leviticus 25:17 and ye shall not wrong one another; but thou shalt fear thy god; for i am the lord your god.
english: And ye shall not wrong one another; but thou shalt fear thy God; for I am the LORD your God.

searchText: leviticus 25:18 wherefore ye shall do my statutes, and keep mine ordinances and do them; and ye shall dwell in the land in safety.
english: Wherefore ye shall do My statutes, and keep Mine ordinances and do them; and ye shall dwell in the land in safety.

searchText: leviticus 25:19 and the land shall yield her fruit, and ye shall eat until ye have enough, and dwell therein in safety.
english: And the land shall yield her fruit, and ye shall eat until ye have enough, and dwell therein in safety.

searchText: leviticus 25:20 and if ye shall say: ‘what shall we eat the seventh year? behold, we may not sow, nor gather in our increase’;
english: And if ye shall say: ‘What shall we eat the seventh year? behold, we may not sow, nor gather in our increase’;

searchText: leviticus 25:21 then i will command my blessing upon you in the sixth year, and it shall bring forth produce for the three years.
english: then I will command My blessing upon you in the sixth year, and it shall bring forth produce for the three years.

searchText: leviticus 25:22 and ye shall sow the eighth year, and eat of the produce, the old store; until the ninth year, until her produce come in, ye shall eat the old store.
english: And ye shall sow the eighth year, and eat of the produce, the old store; until the ninth year, until her produce come in, ye shall eat the old store.

searchText: leviticus 25:23 and the land shall not be sold in perpetuity; for the land is mine; for ye are strangers and settlers with me.
english: And the land shall not be sold in perpetuity; for the land is Mine; for ye are strangers and settlers with Me.

searchText: leviticus 25:24 and in all the land of your possession ye shall grant a redemption for the land.
english: And in all the land of your possession ye shall grant a redemption for the land.

searchText: leviticus 25:25 if thy brother be waxen poor, and sell some of his possession, then shall his kinsman that is next unto him come, and shall redeem that which his brother hath sold.
english: If thy brother be waxen poor, and sell some of his possession, then shall his kinsman that is next unto him come, and shall redeem that which his brother hath sold.

searchText: leviticus 25:26 and if a man have no one to redeem it, and he be waxen rich and find sufficient means to redeem it;
english: And if a man have no one to redeem it, and he be waxen rich and find sufficient means to redeem it;

searchText: leviticus 25:27 then let him count the years of the sale thereof, and restore the overplus unto the man to whom he sold it; and he shall return unto his possession.
english: then let him count the years of the sale thereof, and restore the overplus unto the man to whom he sold it; and he shall return unto his possession.

searchText: leviticus 25:28 but if he have not sufficient means to get it back for himself, then that which he hath sold shall remain in the hand of him that hath bought it until the year of jubilee; and in the jubilee it shall go out, and he shall return unto his possession.
english: But if he have not sufficient means to get it back for himself, then that which he hath sold shall remain in the hand of him that hath bought it until the year of jubilee; and in the jubilee it shall go out, and he shall return unto his possession.

searchText: leviticus 25:29 and if a man sell a dwelling-house in a walled city, then he may redeem it within a whole year after it is sold; for a full year shall he have the right of redemption.
english: And if a man sell a dwelling-house in a walled city, then he may redeem it within a whole year after it is sold; for a full year shall he have the right of redemption.

searchText: leviticus 25:30 and if it be not redeemed within the space of a full year, then the house that is in the walled city shall be made sure in perpetuity to him that bought it, throughout his generations; it shall not go out in the jubilee.
english: And if it be not redeemed within the space of a full year, then the house that is in the walled city shall be made sure in perpetuity to him that bought it, throughout his generations; it shall not go out in the jubilee.

searchText: leviticus 25:31 but the houses of the villages which have no wall round about them shall be reckoned with the fields of the country; they may be redeemed, and they shall go out in the jubilee.
english: But the houses of the villages which have no wall round about them shall be reckoned with the fields of the country; they may be redeemed, and they shall go out in the jubilee.

searchText: leviticus 25:32 but as for the cities of the levites, the houses of the cities of their possession, the levites shall have a perpetual right of redemption.
english: But as for the cities of the Levites, the houses of the cities of their possession, the Levites shall have a perpetual right of redemption.

searchText: leviticus 25:33 and if a man purchase of the levites, then the house that was sold in the city of his possession, shall go out in the jubilee; for the houses of the cities of the levites are their possession among the children of israel.
english: And if a man purchase of the Levites, then the house that was sold in the city of his possession, shall go out in the jubilee; for the houses of the cities of the Levites are their possession among the children of Israel.

searchText: leviticus 25:34 but the fields of the open land about their cities may not be sold; for that is their perpetual possession.
english: But the fields of the open land about their cities may not be sold; for that is their perpetual possession.

searchText: leviticus 25:35 and if thy brother be waxen poor, and his means fail with thee; then thou shalt uphold him: as a stranger and a settler shall he live with thee.
english: And if thy brother be waxen poor, and his means fail with thee; then thou shalt uphold him: as a stranger and a settler shall he live with thee.

searchText: leviticus 25:36 take thou no interest of him or increase; but fear thy god; that thy brother may live with thee.
english: Take thou no interest of him or increase; but fear thy God; that thy brother may live with thee.

searchText: leviticus 25:37 thou shalt not give him thy money upon interest, nor give him thy victuals for increase.
english: Thou shalt not give him thy money upon interest, nor give him thy victuals for increase.

searchText: leviticus 25:38 i am the lord your god, who brought you forth out of the land of egypt, to give you the land of canaan, to be your god.
english: I am the LORD your God, who brought you forth out of the land of Egypt, to give you the land of Canaan, to be your God.

searchText: leviticus 25:39 and if thy brother be waxen poor with thee, and sell himself unto thee, thou shalt not make him to serve as a bondservant.
english: And if thy brother be waxen poor with thee, and sell himself unto thee, thou shalt not make him to serve as a bondservant.

searchText: leviticus 25:40 as a hired servant, and as a settler, he shall be with thee; he shall serve with thee unto the year of jubilee.
english: As a hired servant, and as a settler, he shall be with thee; he shall serve with thee unto the year of jubilee.

searchText: leviticus 25:41 then shall he go out from thee, he and his children with him, and shall return unto his own family, and unto the possession of his fathers shall he return.
english: Then shall he go out from thee, he and his children with him, and shall return unto his own family, and unto the possession of his fathers shall he return.

searchText: leviticus 25:42 for they are my servants, whom i brought forth out of the land of egypt; they shall not be sold as bondmen.
english: For they are My servants, whom I brought forth out of the land of Egypt; they shall not be sold as bondmen.

searchText: leviticus 25:43 thou shalt not rule over him with rigour; but shalt fear thy god.
english: Thou shalt not rule over him with rigour; but shalt fear thy God.

searchText: leviticus 25:44 and as for thy bondmen, and thy bondmaids, whom thou mayest have: of the nations that are round about you, of them shall ye buy bondmen and bondmaids.
english: And as for thy bondmen, and thy bondmaids, whom thou mayest have: of the nations that are round about you, of them shall ye buy bondmen and bondmaids.

searchText: leviticus 25:45 moreover of the children of the strangers that do sojourn among you, of them may ye buy, and of their families that are with you, which they have begotten in your land; and they may be your possession.
english: Moreover of the children of the strangers that do sojourn among you, of them may ye buy, and of their families that are with you, which they have begotten in your land; and they may be your possession.

searchText: leviticus 25:46 and ye may make them an inheritance for your children after you, to hold for a possession: of them may ye take your bondmen for ever; but over your brethren the children of israel ye shall not rule, one over another, with rigour.
english: And ye may make them an inheritance for your children after you, to hold for a possession: of them may ye take your bondmen for ever; but over your brethren the children of Israel ye shall not rule, one over another, with rigour.

searchText: leviticus 25:47 and if a stranger who is a settler with thee be waxen rich, and thy brother be waxen poor beside him, and sell himself unto the stranger who is a settler with thee, or to the offshoot of a stranger’s family,
english: And if a stranger who is a settler with thee be waxen rich, and thy brother be waxen poor beside him, and sell himself unto the stranger who is a settler with thee, or to the offshoot of a stranger’s family,

searchText: leviticus 25:48 after that he is sold he may be redeemed; one of his brethren may redeem him;
english: after that he is sold he may be redeemed; one of his brethren may redeem him;

searchText: leviticus 25:49 or his uncle, or his uncle’s son, may redeem him, or any that is nigh of kin unto him of his family may redeem him; or if he be waxen rich, he may redeem himself.
english: or his uncle, or his uncle’s son, may redeem him, or any that is nigh of kin unto him of his family may redeem him; or if he be waxen rich, he may redeem himself.

searchText: leviticus 25:50 and he shall reckon with him that bought him from the year that he sold himself to him unto the year of jubilee; and the price of his sale shall be according unto the number of years; according to the time of a hired servant shall he be with him.
english: And he shall reckon with him that bought him from the year that he sold himself to him unto the year of jubilee; and the price of his sale shall be according unto the number of years; according to the time of a hired servant shall he be with him.

searchText: leviticus 25:51 if there be yet many years, according unto them he shall give back the price of his redemption out of the money that he was bought for.
english: If there be yet many years, according unto them he shall give back the price of his redemption out of the money that he was bought for.

searchText: leviticus 25:52 and if there remain but few years unto the year of jubilee, then he shall reckon with him; according unto his years shall he give back the price of his redemption.
english: And if there remain but few years unto the year of jubilee, then he shall reckon with him; according unto his years shall he give back the price of his redemption.

searchText: leviticus 25:53 as a servant hired year by year shall he be with him; he shall not rule with rigour over him in thy sight.
english: As a servant hired year by year shall he be with him; he shall not rule with rigour over him in thy sight.

searchText: leviticus 25:54 and if he be not redeemed by any of these means, then he shall go out in the year of jubilee, he, and his children with him.
english: And if he be not redeemed by any of these means, then he shall go out in the year of jubilee, he, and his children with him.

searchText: leviticus 25:55 for unto me the children of israel are servants; they are my servants whom i brought forth out of the land of egypt: i am the lord your god.
english: For unto Me the children of Israel are servants; they are My servants whom I brought forth out of the land of Egypt: I am the LORD your God.

searchText: leviticus 26:1 ye shall make you no idols, neither shall ye rear you up a graven image, or a pillar, neither shall ye place any figured stone in your land, to bow down unto it; for i am the lord your god.
english: Ye shall make you no idols, neither shall ye rear you up a graven image, or a pillar, neither shall ye place any figured stone in your land, to bow down unto it; for I am the LORD your God.

searchText: leviticus 26:2 ye shall keep my sabbaths, and reverence my sanctuary: i am the lord.
english: Ye shall keep My sabbaths, and reverence My sanctuary: I am the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 26:3 if ye walk in my statutes, and keep my commandments, and do them;
english: If ye walk in My statutes, and keep My commandments, and do them;

searchText: leviticus 26:4 then i will give your rains in their season, and the land shall yield her produce, and the trees of the field shall yield their fruit.
english: then I will give your rains in their season, and the land shall yield her produce, and the trees of the field shall yield their fruit.

searchText: leviticus 26:5 and your threshing shall reach unto the vintage, and the vintage shall reach unto the sowing time; and ye shall eat your bread until ye have enough, and dwell in your land safely.
english: And your threshing shall reach unto the vintage, and the vintage shall reach unto the sowing time; and ye shall eat your bread until ye have enough, and dwell in your land safely.

searchText: leviticus 26:6 and i will give peace in the land, and ye shall lie down, and none shall make you afraid; and i will cause evil beasts to cease out of the land, neither shall the sword go through your land.
english: And I will give peace in the land, and ye shall lie down, and none shall make you afraid; and I will cause evil beasts to cease out of the land, neither shall the sword go through your land.

searchText: leviticus 26:7 and ye shall chase your enemies, and they shall fall before you by the sword.
english: And ye shall chase your enemies, and they shall fall before you by the sword.

searchText: leviticus 26:8 and five of you shall chase a hundred, and a hundred of you shall chase ten thousand; and your enemies shall fall before you by the sword.
english: And five of you shall chase a hundred, and a hundred of you shall chase ten thousand; and your enemies shall fall before you by the sword.

searchText: leviticus 26:9 and i will have respect unto you, and make you fruitful, and multiply you; and will establish my covenant with you.
english: And I will have respect unto you, and make you fruitful, and multiply you; and will establish My covenant with you.

searchText: leviticus 26:10 and ye shall eat old store long kept, and ye shall bring forth the old from before the new.
english: And ye shall eat old store long kept, and ye shall bring forth the old from before the new.

searchText: leviticus 26:11 and i will set my tabernacle among you, and my soul shall not abhor you.
english: And I will set My tabernacle among you, and My soul shall not abhor you.

searchText: leviticus 26:12 and i will walk among you, and will be your god, and ye shall be my people.
english: And I will walk among you, and will be your God, and ye shall be My people.

searchText: leviticus 26:13 i am the lord your god, who brought you forth out of the land of egypt, that ye should not be their bondmen; and i have broken the bars of your yoke, and made you go upright.
english: I am the LORD your God, who brought you forth out of the land of Egypt, that ye should not be their bondmen; and I have broken the bars of your yoke, and made you go upright.

searchText: leviticus 26:14 but if ye will not hearken unto me, and will not do all these commandments;
english: But if ye will not hearken unto Me, and will not do all these commandments;

searchText: leviticus 26:15 and if ye shall reject my statutes, and if your soul abhor mine ordinances, so that ye will not do all my commandments, but break my covenant;
english: and if ye shall reject My statutes, and if your soul abhor Mine ordinances, so that ye will not do all My commandments, but break My covenant;

searchText: leviticus 26:16 i also will do this unto you: i will appoint terror over you, even consumption and fever, that shall make the eyes to fail, and the soul to languish; and ye shall sow your seed in vain, for your enemies shall eat it.
english: I also will do this unto you: I will appoint terror over you, even consumption and fever, that shall make the eyes to fail, and the soul to languish; and ye shall sow your seed in vain, for your enemies shall eat it.

searchText: leviticus 26:17 and i will set my face against you, and ye shall be smitten before your enemies; they that hate you shall rule over you; and ye shall flee when none pursueth you.
english: And I will set My face against you, and ye shall be smitten before your enemies; they that hate you shall rule over you; and ye shall flee when none pursueth you.

searchText: leviticus 26:18 and if ye will not yet for these things hearken unto me, then i will chastise you seven times more for your sins.
english: And if ye will not yet for these things hearken unto Me, then I will chastise you seven times more for your sins.

searchText: leviticus 26:19 and i will break the pride of your power; and i will make your heaven as iron, and your earth as brass.
english: And I will break the pride of your power; and I will make your heaven as iron, and your earth as brass.

searchText: leviticus 26:20 and your strength shall be spent in vain; for your land shall not yield her produce, neither shall the trees of the land yield their fruit.
english: And your strength shall be spent in vain; for your land shall not yield her produce, neither shall the trees of the land yield their fruit.

searchText: leviticus 26:21 and if ye walk contrary unto me, and will not hearken unto me; i will bring seven times more plagues upon you according to your sins.
english: And if ye walk contrary unto Me, and will not hearken unto Me; I will bring seven times more plagues upon you according to your sins.

searchText: leviticus 26:22 and i will send the beast of the field among you, which shall rob you of your children, and destroy your cattle, and make you few in number; and your ways shall become desolate.
english: And I will send the beast of the field among you, which shall rob you of your children, and destroy your cattle, and make you few in number; and your ways shall become desolate.

searchText: leviticus 26:23 and if in spite of these things ye will not be corrected unto me, but will walk contrary unto me;
english: And if in spite of these things ye will not be corrected unto Me, but will walk contrary unto Me;

searchText: leviticus 26:24 then will i also walk contrary unto you; and i will smite you, even i, seven times for your sins.
english: then will I also walk contrary unto you; and I will smite you, even I, seven times for your sins.

searchText: leviticus 26:25 and i will bring a sword upon you, that shall execute the vengeance of the covenant; and ye shall be gathered together within your cities; and i will send the pestilence among you; and ye shall be delivered into the hand of the enemy.
english: And I will bring a sword upon you, that shall execute the vengeance of the covenant; and ye shall be gathered together within your cities; and I will send the pestilence among you; and ye shall be delivered into the hand of the enemy.

searchText: leviticus 26:26 when i break your staff of bread, ten women shall bake your bread in one oven, and they shall deliver your bread again by weight; and ye shall eat, and not be satisfied.
english: When I break your staff of bread, ten women shall bake your bread in one oven, and they shall deliver your bread again by weight; and ye shall eat, and not be satisfied.

searchText: leviticus 26:27 and if ye will not for all this hearken unto me, but walk contrary unto me;
english: And if ye will not for all this hearken unto Me, but walk contrary unto Me;

searchText: leviticus 26:28 then i will walk contrary unto you in fury; and i also will chastise you seven times for your sins.
english: then I will walk contrary unto you in fury; and I also will chastise you seven times for your sins.

searchText: leviticus 26:29 and ye shall eat the flesh of your sons, and the flesh of your daughters shall ye eat.
english: And ye shall eat the flesh of your sons, and the flesh of your daughters shall ye eat.

searchText: leviticus 26:30 and i will destroy your high places, and cut down your sun-pillars, and cast your carcasses upon the carcasses of your idols; and my soul shall abhor you.
english: And I will destroy your high places, and cut down your sun-pillars, and cast your carcasses upon the carcasses of your idols; and My soul shall abhor you.

searchText: leviticus 26:31 and i will make your cities a waste, and will bring your sanctuaries unto desolation, and i will not smell the savour of your sweet odours.
english: And I will make your cities a waste, and will bring your sanctuaries unto desolation, and I will not smell the savour of your sweet odours.

searchText: leviticus 26:32 and i will bring the land into desolation; and your enemies that dwell therein shall be astonished at it.
english: And I will bring the land into desolation; and your enemies that dwell therein shall be astonished at it.

searchText: leviticus 26:33 and you will i scatter among the nations, and i will draw out the sword after you; and your land shall be a desolation, and your cities shall be a waste.
english: And you will I scatter among the nations, and I will draw out the sword after you; and your land shall be a desolation, and your cities shall be a waste.

searchText: leviticus 26:34 then shall the land be paid her sabbaths, as long as it lieth desolate, and ye are in your enemies’land; even then shall the land rest, and repay her sabbaths.
english: Then shall the land be paid her sabbaths, as long as it lieth desolate, and ye are in your enemies’land; even then shall the land rest, and repay her sabbaths.

searchText: leviticus 26:35 as long as it lieth desolate it shall have rest; even the rest which it had not in your sabbaths, when ye dwelt upon it.
english: As long as it lieth desolate it shall have rest; even the rest which it had not in your sabbaths, when ye dwelt upon it.

searchText: leviticus 26:36 and as for them that are left of you, i will send a faintness into their heart in the lands of their enemies; and the sound of a driven leaf shall chase them; and they shall flee, as one fleeth from the sword; and they shall fall when none pursueth.
english: And as for them that are left of you, I will send a faintness into their heart in the lands of their enemies; and the sound of a driven leaf shall chase them; and they shall flee, as one fleeth from the sword; and they shall fall when none pursueth.

searchText: leviticus 26:37 and they shall stumble one upon another, as it were before the sword, when none pursueth; and ye shall have no power to stand before your enemies.
english: And they shall stumble one upon another, as it were before the sword, when none pursueth; and ye shall have no power to stand before your enemies.

searchText: leviticus 26:38 and ye shall perish among the nations, and the land of your enemies shall eat you up.
english: And ye shall perish among the nations, and the land of your enemies shall eat you up.

searchText: leviticus 26:39 and they that are left of you shall pine away in their iniquity in your enemies’lands; and also in the iniquities of their fathers shall they pine away with them.
english: And they that are left of you shall pine away in their iniquity in your enemies’lands; and also in the iniquities of their fathers shall they pine away with them.

searchText: leviticus 26:40 and they shall confess their iniquity, and the iniquity of their fathers, in their treachery which they committed against me, and also that they have walked contrary unto me.
english: And they shall confess their iniquity, and the iniquity of their fathers, in their treachery which they committed against Me, and also that they have walked contrary unto Me.

searchText: leviticus 26:41 i also will walk contrary unto them, and bring them into the land of their enemies; if then perchance their uncircumcised heart be humbled, and they then be paid the punishment of their iniquity;
english: I also will walk contrary unto them, and bring them into the land of their enemies; if then perchance their uncircumcised heart be humbled, and they then be paid the punishment of their iniquity;

searchText: leviticus 26:42 then will i remember my covenant with jacob, and also my covenant with isaac, and also my covenant with abraham will i remember; and i will remember the land.
english: then will I remember My covenant with Jacob, and also My covenant with Isaac, and also My covenant with Abraham will I remember; and I will remember the land.

searchText: leviticus 26:43 for the land shall lie forsaken without them, and shall be paid her sabbaths, while she lieth desolate without them; and they shall be paid the punishment of their iniquity; because, even because they rejected mine ordinances, and their soul abhorred my statutes.
english: For the land shall lie forsaken without them, and shall be paid her sabbaths, while she lieth desolate without them; and they shall be paid the punishment of their iniquity; because, even because they rejected Mine ordinances, and their soul abhorred My statutes.

searchText: leviticus 26:44 and yet for all that, when they are in the land of their enemies, i will not reject them, neither will i abhor them, to destroy them utterly, and to break my covenant with them; for i am the lord their god.
english: And yet for all that, when they are in the land of their enemies, I will not reject them, neither will I abhor them, to destroy them utterly, and to break My covenant with them; for I am the LORD their God.

searchText: leviticus 26:45 but i will for their sakes remember the covenant of their ancestors, whom i brought forth out of the land of egypt in the sight of the nations, that i might be their god: i am the lord.
english: But I will for their sakes remember the covenant of their ancestors, whom I brought forth out of the land of Egypt in the sight of the nations, that I might be their God: I am the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 26:46 these are the statutes and ordinances and laws, which the lord made between him and the children of israel in mount sinai by the hand of moses.
english: These are the statutes and ordinances and laws, which the LORD made between Him and the children of Israel in mount Sinai by the hand of Moses.

searchText: leviticus 27:1 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: leviticus 27:2 speak unto the children of israel, and say unto them: when a man shall clearly utter a vow of persons unto the lord, according to thy valuation,
english: Speak unto the children of Israel, and say unto them: When a man shall clearly utter a vow of persons unto the LORD, according to thy valuation,

searchText: leviticus 27:3 then thy valuation shall be for the male from twenty years old even unto sixty years old, even thy valuation shall be fifty shekels of silver, after the shekel of the sanctuary.
english: then thy valuation shall be for the male from twenty years old even unto sixty years old, even thy valuation shall be fifty shekels of silver, after the shekel of the sanctuary.

searchText: leviticus 27:4 and if it be a female, then thy valuation shall be thirty shekels.
english: And if it be a female, then thy valuation shall be thirty shekels.

searchText: leviticus 27:5 and if it be from five years old even unto twenty years old, then thy valuation shall be for the male twenty shekels, and for the female ten shekels.
english: And if it be from five years old even unto twenty years old, then thy valuation shall be for the male twenty shekels, and for the female ten shekels.

searchText: leviticus 27:6 and if it be from a month old even unto five years old, then thy valuation shall be for the male five shekels of silver, and for the female thy valuation shall be three shekels of silver.
english: And if it be from a month old even unto five years old, then thy valuation shall be for the male five shekels of silver, and for the female thy valuation shall be three shekels of silver.

searchText: leviticus 27:7 and if it be from sixty years old and upward: if it be a male, then thy valuation shall be fifteen shekels, and for the female ten shekels.
english: And if it be from sixty years old and upward: if it be a male, then thy valuation shall be fifteen shekels, and for the female ten shekels.

searchText: leviticus 27:8 but if he be too poor for thy valuation, then he shall be set before the priest, and the priest shall value him; according to the means of him that vowed shall the priest value him.
english: But if he be too poor for thy valuation, then he shall be set before the priest, and the priest shall value him; according to the means of him that vowed shall the priest value him.

searchText: leviticus 27:9 and if it be a beast, whereof men bring an offering unto the lord, all that any man giveth of such unto the lord shall be holy.
english: And if it be a beast, whereof men bring an offering unto the LORD, all that any man giveth of such unto the LORD shall be holy.

searchText: leviticus 27:10 he shall not alter it, nor change it, a good for a bad, or a bad for a good; and if he shall at all change beast for beast, then both it and that for which it is changed shall be holy.
english: He shall not alter it, nor change it, a good for a bad, or a bad for a good; and if he shall at all change beast for beast, then both it and that for which it is changed shall be holy.

searchText: leviticus 27:11 and if it be any unclean beast, of which they may not bring an offering unto the lord, then he shall set the beast before the priest.
english: And if it be any unclean beast, of which they may not bring an offering unto the LORD, then he shall set the beast before the priest.

searchText: leviticus 27:12 and the priest shall value it, whether it be good or bad; as thou the priest valuest it, so shall it be.
english: And the priest shall value it, whether it be good or bad; as thou the priest valuest it, so shall it be.

searchText: leviticus 27:13 but if he will indeed redeem it, then he shall add the fifth part thereof unto thy valuation.
english: But if he will indeed redeem it, then he shall add the fifth part thereof unto thy valuation.

searchText: leviticus 27:14 and when a man shall sanctify his house to be holy unto the lord, then the priest shall value it, whether it be good or bad; as the priest shall value it, so shall it stand.
english: And when a man shall sanctify his house to be holy unto the LORD, then the priest shall value it, whether it be good or bad; as the priest shall value it, so shall it stand.

searchText: leviticus 27:15 and if he that sanctified it will redeem his house, then he shall add the fifth part of the money of thy valuation unto it, and it shall be his.
english: And if he that sanctified it will redeem his house, then he shall add the fifth part of the money of thy valuation unto it, and it shall be his.

searchText: leviticus 27:16 and if a man shall sanctify unto the lord part of the field of his possession, then thy valuation shall be according to the sowing thereof; the sowing of a homer of barley shall be valued at fifty shekels of silver.
english: And if a man shall sanctify unto the LORD part of the field of his possession, then thy valuation shall be according to the sowing thereof; the sowing of a homer of barley shall be valued at fifty shekels of silver.

searchText: leviticus 27:17 if he sanctify his field from the year of jubilee, according to thy valuation it shall stand.
english: If he sanctify his field from the year of jubilee, according to thy valuation it shall stand.

searchText: leviticus 27:18 but if he sanctify his field after the jubilee, then the priest shall reckon unto him the money according to the years that remain unto the year of jubilee, and an abatement shall be made from thy valuation.
english: But if he sanctify his field after the jubilee, then the priest shall reckon unto him the money according to the years that remain unto the year of jubilee, and an abatement shall be made from thy valuation.

searchText: leviticus 27:19 and if he that sanctified the field will indeed redeem it, then he shall add the fifth part of the money of thy valuation unto it, and it shall be assured to him.
english: And if he that sanctified the field will indeed redeem it, then he shall add the fifth part of the money of thy valuation unto it, and it shall be assured to him.

searchText: leviticus 27:20 and if he will not redeem the field, or if he have sold the field to another man, it shall not be redeemed any more.
english: And if he will not redeem the field, or if he have sold the field to another man, it shall not be redeemed any more.

searchText: leviticus 27:21 but the field, when it goeth out in the jubilee, shall be holy unto the lord, as a field devoted; the possession thereof shall be the priest’s.
english: But the field, when it goeth out in the jubilee, shall be holy unto the LORD, as a field devoted; the possession thereof shall be the priest’s.

searchText: leviticus 27:22 and if he sanctify unto the lord a field which he hath bought, which is not of the field of his possession;
english: And if he sanctify unto the LORD a field which he hath bought, which is not of the field of his possession;

searchText: leviticus 27:23 then the priest shall reckon unto him the worth of thy valuation unto the year of jubilee; and he shall give thy valuation in that day, as a holy thing unto the lord.
english: then the priest shall reckon unto him the worth of thy valuation unto the year of jubilee; and he shall give thy valuation in that day, as a holy thing unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 27:24 in the year of jubilee the field shall return unto him of whom it was bought, even to him to whom the possession of the land belongeth.
english: In the year of jubilee the field shall return unto him of whom it was bought, even to him to whom the possession of the land belongeth.

searchText: leviticus 27:25 and all thy valuations shall be according to the shekel of the sanctuary; twenty gerahs shall be the shekel.
english: And all thy valuations shall be according to the shekel of the sanctuary; twenty gerahs shall be the shekel.

searchText: leviticus 27:26 howbeit the firstling among beasts, which is born as a firstling to the lord, no man shall sanctify it; whether it be ox or sheep, it is the lord’s.
english: Howbeit the firstling among beasts, which is born as a firstling to the LORD, no man shall sanctify it; whether it be ox or sheep, it is the LORD’S.

searchText: leviticus 27:27 and if it be of an unclean beast, then he shall ransom it according to thy valuation, and shall add unto it the fifth part thereof; or if it be not redeemed, then it shall be sold according to thy valuation.
english: And if it be of an unclean beast, then he shall ransom it according to thy valuation, and shall add unto it the fifth part thereof; or if it be not redeemed, then it shall be sold according to thy valuation.

searchText: leviticus 27:28 notwithstanding, no devoted thing, that a man may devote unto the lord of all that he hath, whether of man or beast, or of the field of his possession, shall be sold or redeemed; every devoted thing is most holy unto the lord.
english: Notwithstanding, no devoted thing, that a man may devote unto the LORD of all that he hath, whether of man or beast, or of the field of his possession, shall be sold or redeemed; every devoted thing is most holy unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 27:29 none devoted, that may be devoted of men, shall be ransomed; he shall surely be put to death.
english: None devoted, that may be devoted of men, shall be ransomed; he shall surely be put to death.

searchText: leviticus 27:30 and all the tithe of the land, whether of the seed of the land, or of the fruit of the tree, is the lord’s; it is holy unto the lord.
english: And all the tithe of the land, whether of the seed of the land, or of the fruit of the tree, is the LORD’S; it is holy unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 27:31 and if a man will redeem aught of his tithe, he shall add unto it the fifth part thereof.
english: And if a man will redeem aught of his tithe, he shall add unto it the fifth part thereof.

searchText: leviticus 27:32 and all the tithe of the herd or the flock, whatsoever passeth under the rod, the tenth shall be holy unto the lord.
english: And all the tithe of the herd or the flock, whatsoever passeth under the rod, the tenth shall be holy unto the LORD.

searchText: leviticus 27:33 he shall not inquire whether it be good or bad, neither shall he change it; and if he change it at all, then both it and that for which it is changed shall be holy; it shall not be redeemed.
english: He shall not inquire whether it be good or bad, neither shall he change it; and if he change it at all, then both it and that for which it is changed shall be holy; it shall not be redeemed.

searchText: leviticus 27:34 these are the commandments, which the lord commanded moses for the children of israel in mount sinai.
english: These are the commandments, which the LORD commanded Moses for the children of Israel in mount Sinai.

searchText: numbers 1:1 and the lord spoke unto moses in the wilderness of sinai, in the tent of meeting, on the first day of the second month, in the second year after they were come out of the land of egypt, saying:
english: AND THE LORD spoke unto Moses in the wilderness of Sinai, in the tent of meeting, on the first day of the second month, in the second year after they were come out of the land of Egypt, saying:

searchText: numbers 1:2 ’take ye the sum of all the congregation of the children of israel, by their families, by their fathers’houses, according to the number of names, every male, by their polls;
