english: ’Take ye the sum of all the congregation of the children of Israel, by their families, by their fathers’houses, according to the number of names, every male, by their polls;

searchText: numbers 1:3 from twenty years old and upward, all that are able to go forth to war in israel: ye shall number them by their hosts, even thou and aaron.
english: from twenty years old and upward, all that are able to go forth to war in Israel: ye shall number them by their hosts, even thou and Aaron.

searchText: numbers 1:4 and with you there shall be a man of every tribe, every one head of his fathers’house.
english: And with you there shall be a man of every tribe, every one head of his fathers’house.

searchText: numbers 1:5 and these are the names of the men that shall stand with you: of reuben, elizur the son of shedeur.
english: And these are the names of the men that shall stand with you: of Reuben, Elizur the son of Shedeur.

searchText: numbers 1:6 of simeon, shelumiel the son of zurishaddai.
english: Of Simeon, Shelumiel the son of Zurishaddai.

searchText: numbers 1:7 of judah, nahshon the son of amminadab.
english: Of Judah, Nahshon the son of Amminadab.

searchText: numbers 1:8 of issachar, nethanel the son of zuar.
english: Of Issachar, Nethanel the son of Zuar.

searchText: numbers 1:9 of zebulun, eliab the son of helon.
english: Of Zebulun, Eliab the son of Helon.

searchText: numbers 1:10 of the children of joseph: of ephraim, elishama the son of ammihud; of manasseh, gamaliel the son of pedahzur.
english: Of the children of Joseph: of Ephraim, Elishama the son of Ammihud; of Manasseh, Gamaliel the son of Pedahzur.

searchText: numbers 1:11 of benjamin, abidan the son of gideoni.
english: Of Benjamin, Abidan the son of Gideoni.

searchText: numbers 1:12 of dan, ahiezer the son of ammishaddai.
english: Of Dan, Ahiezer the son of Ammishaddai.

searchText: numbers 1:13 of asher, pagiel the son of ochran.
english: Of Asher, Pagiel the son of Ochran.

searchText: numbers 1:14 of gad, eliasaph the son of deuel.
english: Of Gad, Eliasaph the son of Deuel.

searchText: numbers 1:15 of naphtali, ahira the son of enan.’
english: Of Naphtali, Ahira the son of Enan.’

searchText: numbers 1:16 these were the elect of the congregation, the princes of the tribes of their fathers; they were the heads of the thousands of israel.
english: These were the elect of the congregation, the princes of the tribes of their fathers; they were the heads of the thousands of Israel.

searchText: numbers 1:17 and moses and aaron took these men that are pointed out by name.
english: And Moses and Aaron took these men that are pointed out by name.

searchText: numbers 1:18 and they assembled all the congregation together on the first day of the second month, and they declared their pedigrees after their families, by their fathers’houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, by their polls.
english: And they assembled all the congregation together on the first day of the second month, and they declared their pedigrees after their families, by their fathers’houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, by their polls.

searchText: numbers 1:19 as the lord commanded moses, so did he number them in the wilderness of sinai.
english: As the LORD commanded Moses, so did he number them in the wilderness of Sinai.

searchText: numbers 1:20 and the children of reuben, israel’s first-born, their generations, by their families, by their fathers’houses, according to the number of names, by their polls, every male from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;
english: And the children of Reuben, Israel’s first-born, their generations, by their families, by their fathers’houses, according to the number of names, by their polls, every male from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;

searchText: numbers 1:21 those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of reuben, were forty and six thousand and five hundred.
english: those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of Reuben, were forty and six thousand and five hundred.

searchText: numbers 1:22 of the children of simeon, their generations, by their families, by their fathers’houses, those that were numbered thereof, according to the number of names, by their polls, every male from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;
english: Of the children of Simeon, their generations, by their families, by their fathers’houses, those that were numbered thereof, according to the number of names, by their polls, every male from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;

searchText: numbers 1:23 those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of simeon, were fifty and nine thousand and three hundred.
english: those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of Simeon, were fifty and nine thousand and three hundred.

searchText: numbers 1:24 of the children of gad, their generations, by their families, by their fathers’houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;
english: Of the children of Gad, their generations, by their families, by their fathers’houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;

searchText: numbers 1:25 those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of gad, were forty and five thousand six hundred and fifty.
english: those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of Gad, were forty and five thousand six hundred and fifty.

searchText: numbers 1:26 of the children of judah, their generations, by their families, by their fathers’houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;
english: Of the children of Judah, their generations, by their families, by their fathers’houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;

searchText: numbers 1:27 those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of judah, were threescore and fourteen thousand and six hundred.
english: those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of Judah, were threescore and fourteen thousand and six hundred.

searchText: numbers 1:28 of the children of issachar, their generations, by their families, by their fathers’houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;
english: Of the children of Issachar, their generations, by their families, by their fathers’houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;

searchText: numbers 1:29 those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of issachar, were fifty and four thousand and four hundred.
english: those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of Issachar, were fifty and four thousand and four hundred.

searchText: numbers 1:30 of the children of zebulun, their generations, by their families, by their fathers’houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;
english: Of the children of Zebulun, their generations, by their families, by their fathers’houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;

searchText: numbers 1:31 those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of zebulun, were fifty and seven thousand and four hundred.
english: those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of Zebulun, were fifty and seven thousand and four hundred.

searchText: numbers 1:32 of the children of joseph, namely, of the children of ephraim, their generations, by their families, by their fathers’houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;
english: Of the children of Joseph, namely, of the children of Ephraim, their generations, by their families, by their fathers’houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;

searchText: numbers 1:33 those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of ephraim, were forty thousand and five hundred.
english: those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of Ephraim, were forty thousand and five hundred.

searchText: numbers 1:34 of the children of manasseh, their generations, by their families, by their fathers’houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;
english: Of the children of Manasseh, their generations, by their families, by their fathers’houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;

searchText: numbers 1:35 those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of manasseh, were thirty and two thousand and two hundred.
english: those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of Manasseh, were thirty and two thousand and two hundred.

searchText: numbers 1:36 of the children of benjamin, their generations, by their families, by their fathers’houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;
english: Of the children of Benjamin, their generations, by their families, by their fathers’houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;

searchText: numbers 1:37 those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of benjamin, were thirty and five thousand and four hundred.
english: those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of Benjamin, were thirty and five thousand and four hundred.

searchText: numbers 1:38 of the children of dan, their generations, by their families, by their fathers’houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;
english: Of the children of Dan, their generations, by their families, by their fathers’houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;

searchText: numbers 1:39 those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of dan, were threescore and two thousand and seven hundred.
english: those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of Dan, were threescore and two thousand and seven hundred.

searchText: numbers 1:40 of the children of asher, their generations, by their families, by their fathers’houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;
english: Of the children of Asher, their generations, by their families, by their fathers’houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;

searchText: numbers 1:41 those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of asher, were forty and one thousand and five hundred.
english: those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of Asher, were forty and one thousand and five hundred.

searchText: numbers 1:42 of the children of naphtali, their generations, by their families, by their fathers’houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;
english: Of the children of Naphtali, their generations, by their families, by their fathers’houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;

searchText: numbers 1:43 those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of naphtali, were fifty and three thousand and four hundred.
english: those that were numbered of them, of the tribe of Naphtali, were fifty and three thousand and four hundred.

searchText: numbers 1:44 these are those that were numbered, which moses and aaron numbered, and the princes of israel, being twelve men; they were each one for his fathers’house.
english: These are those that were numbered, which Moses and Aaron numbered, and the princes of Israel, being twelve men; they were each one for his fathers’house.

searchText: numbers 1:45 and all those that were numbered of the children of israel by their fathers’houses, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war in israel;
english: And all those that were numbered of the children of Israel by their fathers’houses, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war in Israel;

searchText: numbers 1:46 even all those that were numbered were six hundred thousand and three thousand and five hundred and fifty.
english: even all those that were numbered were six hundred thousand and three thousand and five hundred and fifty.

searchText: numbers 1:47 but the levites after the tribe of their fathers were not numbered among them.
english: But the Levites after the tribe of their fathers were not numbered among them.

searchText: numbers 1:48 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 1:49 ’howbeit the tribe of levi thou shalt not number, neither shalt thou take the sum of them among the children of israel;
english: ’Howbeit the tribe of Levi thou shalt not number, neither shalt thou take the sum of them among the children of Israel;

searchText: numbers 1:50 but appoint thou the levites over the tabernacle of the testimony, and over all the furniture thereof, and over all that belongeth to it; they shall bear the tabernacle, and all the furniture thereof; and they shall minister unto it, and shall encamp round about the tabernacle.
english: but appoint thou the Levites over the tabernacle of the testimony, and over all the furniture thereof, and over all that belongeth to it; they shall bear the tabernacle, and all the furniture thereof; and they shall minister unto it, and shall encamp round about the tabernacle.

searchText: numbers 1:51 and when the tabernacle setteth forward, the levites shall take it down; and when the tabernacle is to be pitched, the levites shall set it up; and the common man that draweth nigh shall be put to death.
english: And when the tabernacle setteth forward, the Levites shall take it down; and when the tabernacle is to be pitched, the Levites shall set it up; and the common man that draweth nigh shall be put to death.

searchText: numbers 1:52 and the children of israel shall pitch their tents, every man with his own camp, and every man with his own standard, according to their hosts.
english: And the children of Israel shall pitch their tents, every man with his own camp, and every man with his own standard, according to their hosts.

searchText: numbers 1:53 but the levites shall pitch round about the tabernacle of the testimony, that there be no wrath upon the congregation of the children of israel; and the levites shall keep the charge of the tabernacle of the testimony.’
english: But the Levites shall pitch round about the tabernacle of the testimony, that there be no wrath upon the congregation of the children of Israel; and the Levites shall keep the charge of the tabernacle of the testimony.’

searchText: numbers 1:54 thus did the children of israel; according to all that the lord commanded moses, so did they.
english: Thus did the children of Israel; according to all that the LORD commanded Moses, so did they.

searchText: numbers 2:1 and the lord spoke unto moses and unto aaron, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses and unto Aaron, saying:

searchText: numbers 2:2 ’the children of israel shall pitch by their fathers’houses; every man with his own standard, according to the ensigns; a good way off shall they pitch round about the tent of meeting.
english: ’The children of Israel shall pitch by their fathers’houses; every man with his own standard, according to the ensigns; a good way off shall they pitch round about the tent of meeting.

searchText: numbers 2:3 now those that pitch on the east side toward the sunrising shall be they of the standard of the camp of judah, according to their hosts; the prince of the children of judah being nahshon the son of amminadab,
english: Now those that pitch on the east side toward the sunrising shall be they of the standard of the camp of Judah, according to their hosts; the prince of the children of Judah being Nahshon the son of Amminadab,

searchText: numbers 2:4 and his host, and those that were numbered of them, threescore and fourteen thousand and six hundred;
english: and his host, and those that were numbered of them, threescore and fourteen thousand and six hundred;

searchText: numbers 2:5 and those that pitch next unto him shall be the tribe of issachar; the prince of the children of issachar being nethanel the son of zuar,
english: and those that pitch next unto him shall be the tribe of Issachar; the prince of the children of Issachar being Nethanel the son of Zuar,

searchText: numbers 2:6 and his host, even those that were numbered thereof, fifty and four thousand and four hundred;
english: and his host, even those that were numbered thereof, fifty and four thousand and four hundred;

searchText: numbers 2:7 and the tribe of zebulun; the prince of the children of zebulun being eliab the son of helon,
english: and the tribe of Zebulun; the prince of the children of Zebulun being Eliab the son of Helon,

searchText: numbers 2:8 and his host, and those that were numbered thereof, fifty and seven thousand and four hundred;
english: and his host, and those that were numbered thereof, fifty and seven thousand and four hundred;

searchText: numbers 2:9 all that were numbered of the camp of judah being a hundred thousand and fourscore thousand and six thousand and four hundred, according to their hosts; they shall set forth first.
english: all that were numbered of the camp of Judah being a hundred thousand and fourscore thousand and six thousand and four hundred, according to their hosts; they shall set forth first.

searchText: numbers 2:10 on the south side shall be the standard of the camp of reuben according to their hosts; the prince of the children of reuben being elizur the son of shedeur,
english: On the south side shall be the standard of the camp of Reuben according to their hosts; the prince of the children of Reuben being Elizur the son of Shedeur,

searchText: numbers 2:11 and his host, and those that were numbered thereof, forty and six thousand and five hundred;
english: and his host, and those that were numbered thereof, forty and six thousand and five hundred;

searchText: numbers 2:12 and those that pitch next unto him shall be the tribe of simeon; the prince of the children of simeon being shelumiel the son of zurishaddai,
english: and those that pitch next unto him shall be the tribe of Simeon; the prince of the children of Simeon being Shelumiel the son of Zurishaddai,

searchText: numbers 2:13 and his host, and those that were numbered of them, fifty and nine thousand and three hundred;
english: and his host, and those that were numbered of them, fifty and nine thousand and three hundred;

searchText: numbers 2:14 and the tribe of gad; the prince of the children of gad being eliasaph the son of reuel,
english: and the tribe of Gad; the prince of the children of Gad being Eliasaph the son of Reuel,

searchText: numbers 2:15 and his host, even those that were numbered of them, forty and five thousand and six hundred and fifty;
english: and his host, even those that were numbered of them, forty and five thousand and six hundred and fifty;

searchText: numbers 2:16 all that were numbered of the camp of reuben being a hundred thousand and fifty and one thousand and four hundred and fifty, according to their hosts; and they shall set forth second.
english: all that were numbered of the camp of Reuben being a hundred thousand and fifty and one thousand and four hundred and fifty, according to their hosts; and they shall set forth second.

searchText: numbers 2:17 then the tent of meeting, with the camp of the levites, shall set forward in the midst of the camps; as they encamp, so shall they set forward, every man in his place, by their standards.
english: Then the tent of meeting, with the camp of the Levites, shall set forward in the midst of the camps; as they encamp, so shall they set forward, every man in his place, by their standards.

searchText: numbers 2:18 on the west side shall be the standard of the camp of ephraim according to their hosts; the prince of the children of ephraim being elishama the son of ammihud,
english: On the west side shall be the standard of the camp of Ephraim according to their hosts; the prince of the children of Ephraim being Elishama the son of Ammihud,

searchText: numbers 2:19 and his host, and those that were numbered of them, forty thousand and five hundred;
english: and his host, and those that were numbered of them, forty thousand and five hundred;

searchText: numbers 2:20 and next unto him shall be the tribe of manasseh; the prince of the children of manasseh being gamaliel the son of pedahzur,
english: and next unto him shall be the tribe of Manasseh; the prince of the children of Manasseh being Gamaliel the son of Pedahzur,

searchText: numbers 2:21 and his host, and those that were numbered of them, thirty and two thousand and two hundred;
english: and his host, and those that were numbered of them, thirty and two thousand and two hundred;

searchText: numbers 2:22 and the tribe of benjamin; the prince of the children of benjamin being abidan the son of gideoni,
english: and the tribe of Benjamin; the prince of the children of Benjamin being Abidan the son of Gideoni,

searchText: numbers 2:23 and his host, and those that were numbered of them, thirty and five thousand and four hundred;
english: and his host, and those that were numbered of them, thirty and five thousand and four hundred;

searchText: numbers 2:24 all that were numbered of the camp of ephraim being a hundred thousand and eight thousand and a hundred, according to their hosts; and they shall set forth third.
english: all that were numbered of the camp of Ephraim being a hundred thousand and eight thousand and a hundred, according to their hosts; and they shall set forth third.

searchText: numbers 2:25 on the north side shall be the standard of the camp of dan according to their hosts; the prince of the children of dan being ahiezer the son of ammishaddai,
english: On the north side shall be the standard of the camp of Dan according to their hosts; the prince of the children of Dan being Ahiezer the son of Ammishaddai,

searchText: numbers 2:26 and his host, and those that were numbered of them, threescore and two thousand and seven hundred;
english: and his host, and those that were numbered of them, threescore and two thousand and seven hundred;

searchText: numbers 2:27 and those that pitch next unto him shall be the tribe of asher; the prince of the children of asher being pagiel the son of ochran,
english: and those that pitch next unto him shall be the tribe of Asher; the prince of the children of Asher being Pagiel the son of Ochran,

searchText: numbers 2:28 and his host, and those that were numbered of them, forty and one thousand and five hundred;
english: and his host, and those that were numbered of them, forty and one thousand and five hundred;

searchText: numbers 2:29 and the tribe of naphtali; the prince of the children of naphtali being ahira the son of enan,
english: and the tribe of Naphtali; the prince of the children of Naphtali being Ahira the son of Enan,

searchText: numbers 2:30 and his host, and those that were numbered of them, fifty and three thousand and four hundred;
english: and his host, and those that were numbered of them, fifty and three thousand and four hundred;

searchText: numbers 2:31 all that were numbered of the camp of dan being a hundred thousand and fifty and seven thousand and six hundred; they shall set forth hindmost by their standards.’
english: all that were numbered of the camp of Dan being a hundred thousand and fifty and seven thousand and six hundred; they shall set forth hindmost by their standards.’

searchText: numbers 2:32 these are they that were numbered of the children of israel by their fathers’houses; all that were numbered of the camps according to their hosts were six hundred thousand and three thousand and five hundred and fifty.
english: These are they that were numbered of the children of Israel by their fathers’houses; all that were numbered of the camps according to their hosts were six hundred thousand and three thousand and five hundred and fifty.

searchText: numbers 2:33 but the levites were not numbered among the children of israel; as the lord commanded moses.
english: But the Levites were not numbered among the children of Israel; as the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: numbers 2:34 thus did the children of israel: according to all that the lord commanded moses, so they pitched by their standards, and so they set forward, each one according to its families, and according to its fathers’houses.
english: Thus did the children of Israel: according to all that the LORD commanded Moses, so they pitched by their standards, and so they set forward, each one according to its families, and according to its fathers’houses.

searchText: numbers 3:1 now these are the generations of aaron and moses in the day that the lord spoke with moses in mount sinai.
english: Now these are the generations of Aaron and Moses in the day that the LORD spoke with Moses in mount Sinai.

searchText: numbers 3:2 and these are the names of the sons of aaron: nadab the first-born, and abihu, eleazar, and ithamar.
english: And these are the names of the sons of Aaron: Nadab the first-born, and Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.

searchText: numbers 3:3 these are the names of the sons of aaron, the priests that were anointed, whom he consecrated to minister in the priest’s office.
english: These are the names of the sons of Aaron, the priests that were anointed, whom he consecrated to minister in the priest’s office.

searchText: numbers 3:4 and nadab and abihu died before the lord, when they offered strange fire before the lord, in the wilderness of sinai, and they had no children; and eleazar and ithamar ministered in the priest’s office in the presence of aaron their father.
english: And Nadab and Abihu died before the LORD, when they offered strange fire before the LORD, in the wilderness of Sinai, and they had no children; and Eleazar and Ithamar ministered in the priest’s office in the presence of Aaron their father.

searchText: numbers 3:5 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 3:6 ’bring the tribe of levi near, and set them before aaron the priest, that they may minister unto him.
english: ’Bring the tribe of Levi near, and set them before Aaron the priest, that they may minister unto him.

searchText: numbers 3:7 and they shall keep his charge, and the charge of the whole congregation before the tent of meeting, to do the service of the tabernacle.
english: And they shall keep his charge, and the charge of the whole congregation before the tent of meeting, to do the service of the tabernacle.

searchText: numbers 3:8 and they shall keep all the furniture of the tent of meeting, and the charge of the children of israel, to do the service of the tabernacle.
english: And they shall keep all the furniture of the tent of meeting, and the charge of the children of Israel, to do the service of the tabernacle.

searchText: numbers 3:9 and thou shalt give the levites unto aaron and to his sons; they are wholly given unto him from the children of israel.
english: And thou shalt give the Levites unto Aaron and to his sons; they are wholly given unto him from the children of Israel.

searchText: numbers 3:10 and thou shalt appoint aaron and his sons, that they may keep their priesthood; and the common man that draweth nigh shall be put to death.’
english: And thou shalt appoint Aaron and his sons, that they may keep their priesthood; and the common man that draweth nigh shall be put to death.’

searchText: numbers 3:11 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 3:12 ’and i, behold, i have taken the levites from among the children of israel instead of every first-born that openeth the womb among the children of israel; and the levites shall be mine;
english: ’And I, behold, I have taken the Levites from among the children of Israel instead of every first-born that openeth the womb among the children of Israel; and the Levites shall be Mine;

searchText: numbers 3:13 for all the first-born are mine: on the day that i smote all the first-born in the land of egypt i hallowed unto me all the first-born in israel, both man and beast, mine they shall be: i am the lord.’ .
english: for all the first-born are Mine: on the day that I smote all the first-born in the land of Egypt I hallowed unto Me all the first-born in Israel, both man and beast, Mine they shall be: I am the LORD.’ .

searchText: numbers 3:14 and the lord spoke unto moses in the wilderness of sinai, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses in the wilderness of Sinai, saying:

searchText: numbers 3:15 ’number the children of levi by their fathers’houses, by their families; every male from a month old and upward shalt thou number them.’
english: ’Number the children of Levi by their fathers’houses, by their families; every male from a month old and upward shalt thou number them.’

searchText: numbers 3:16 and moses numbered them according to the word of the lord, as he was commanded.
english: And Moses numbered them according to the word of the LORD, as he was commanded.

searchText: numbers 3:17 and these were the sons of levi by their names: gershon, and kohath, and merari.
english: And these were the sons of Levi by their names: Gershon, and Kohath, and Merari.

searchText: numbers 3:18 and these are the names of the sons of gershon by their families: libni and shimei.
english: And these are the names of the sons of Gershon by their families: Libni and Shimei.

searchText: numbers 3:19 and the sons of kohath by their families: amram and izhar, hebron and uzziel.
english: And the sons of Kohath by their families: Amram and Izhar, Hebron and Uzziel.

searchText: numbers 3:20 and the sons of merari by their families: mahli and mushi. these are the families of the levites according to their fathers’houses.
english: And the sons of Merari by their families: Mahli and Mushi. These are the families of the Levites according to their fathers’houses.

searchText: numbers 3:21 of gershon was the family of the libnites, and the family of the shimeites; these are the families of the gershonites.
english: Of Gershon was the family of the Libnites, and the family of the Shimeites; these are the families of the Gershonites.

searchText: numbers 3:22 those that were numbered of them, according to the number of all the males, from a month old and upward, even those that were numbered of them were seven thousand and five hundred.
english: Those that were numbered of them, according to the number of all the males, from a month old and upward, even those that were numbered of them were seven thousand and five hundred.

searchText: numbers 3:23 the families of the gershonites were to pitch behind the tabernacle westward;
english: The families of the Gershonites were to pitch behind the tabernacle westward;

searchText: numbers 3:24 the prince of the fathers’house of the gershonites being eliasaph the son of lael,
english: the prince of the fathers’house of the Gershonites being Eliasaph the son of Lael,

searchText: numbers 3:25 and the charge of the sons of gershon in the tent of meeting the tabernacle, and the tent, the covering thereof, and the screen for the door of the tent of meeting,
english: and the charge of the sons of Gershon in the tent of meeting the tabernacle, and the Tent, the covering thereof, and the screen for the door of the tent of meeting,

searchText: numbers 3:26 and the hangings of the court, and the screen for the door of the court—which is by the tabernacle, and by the altar, round about—and the cords of it, even whatsoever pertaineth to the service thereof.
english: and the hangings of the court, and the screen for the door of the court—which is by the tabernacle, and by the altar, round about—and the cords of it, even whatsoever pertaineth to the service thereof.

searchText: numbers 3:27 and of kohath was the family of the amramites, and the family of the izharites, and the family of the hebronites, and the family of the uzzielites; these are the families of the kohathites:
english: And of Kohath was the family of the Amramites, and the family of the Izharites, and the family of the Hebronites, and the family of the Uzzielites; these are the families of the Kohathites:

searchText: numbers 3:28 according to the number of all the males, from a month old and upward, eight thousand and six hundred, keepers of the charge of the sanctuary.
english: according to the number of all the males, from a month old and upward, eight thousand and six hundred, keepers of the charge of the sanctuary.

searchText: numbers 3:29 the families of the sons of kohath were to pitch on the side of the tabernacle southward;
english: The families of the sons of Kohath were to pitch on the side of the tabernacle southward;

searchText: numbers 3:30 the prince of the fathers’house of the families of the kohathites being elizaphan the son of uzziel,
english: the prince of the fathers’house of the families of the Kohathites being Elizaphan the son of Uzziel,

searchText: numbers 3:31 and their charge the ark, and the table, and the candlestick, and the altars, and the vessels of the sanctuary wherewith the priests minister, and the screen, and all that pertaineth to the service thereof;
english: and their charge the ark, and the table, and the candlestick, and the altars, and the vessels of the sanctuary wherewith the priests minister, and the screen, and all that pertaineth to the service thereof;

searchText: numbers 3:32 eleazar the son of aaron the priest being prince of the princes of the levites, and having the oversight of them that keep the charge of the sanctuary.
english: Eleazar the son of Aaron the priest being prince of the princes of the Levites, and having the oversight of them that keep the charge of the sanctuary.

searchText: numbers 3:33 of merari was the family of the mahlites, and the family of the mushites; these are the families of merari.
english: Of Merari was the family of the Mahlites, and the family of the Mushites; these are the families of Merari.

searchText: numbers 3:34 and those that were numbered of them, according to the number of all the males, from a month old and upward, were six thousand and two hundred;
english: And those that were numbered of them, according to the number of all the males, from a month old and upward, were six thousand and two hundred;

searchText: numbers 3:35 the prince of the fathers’house of the families of merari being zuriel the son of abihail; they were to pitch on the side of the tabernacle northward;
english: the prince of the fathers’house of the families of Merari being Zuriel the son of Abihail; they were to pitch on the side of the tabernacle northward;

searchText: numbers 3:36 the appointed charge of the sons of merari being the boards of the tabernacle, and the bars thereof, and the pillars thereof, and the sockets thereof, and all the instruments thereof, and all that pertaineth to the service thereof;
english: the appointed charge of the sons of Merari being the boards of the tabernacle, and the bars thereof, and the pillars thereof, and the sockets thereof, and all the instruments thereof, and all that pertaineth to the service thereof;

searchText: numbers 3:37 and the pillars of the court round about, and their sockets, and their pins, and their cords.
english: and the pillars of the court round about, and their sockets, and their pins, and their cords.

searchText: numbers 3:38 and those that were to pitch before the tabernacle eastward, before the tent of meeting toward the sunrising, were moses, and aaron and his sons, keeping the charge of the sanctuary, even the charge for the children of israel; and the common man that drew nigh was to be put to death.
english: And those that were to pitch before the tabernacle eastward, before the tent of meeting toward the sunrising, were Moses, and Aaron and his sons, keeping the charge of the sanctuary, even the charge for the children of Israel; and the common man that drew nigh was to be put to death.

searchText: numbers 3:39 all that were numbered of the levites, whom moses and aaron numbered at the commandment of the lord, by their families, all the males from a month old and upward, were twenty and two thousand.
english: All that were numbered of the Levites, whom Moses and Aaron numbered at the commandment of the LORD, by their families, all the males from a month old and upward, were twenty and two thousand.

searchText: numbers 3:40 and the lord said unto moses: ‘number all the first-born males of the children of israel from a month old and upward, and take the number of their names.
english: And the LORD said unto Moses: ‘Number all the first-born males of the children of Israel from a month old and upward, and take the number of their names.

searchText: numbers 3:41 and thou shalt take the levites for me, even the lord, instead of all the first-born among the children of israel; and the cattle of the levites instead of all the firstlings among the cattle of the children of israel.’
english: And thou shalt take the Levites for Me, even the LORD, instead of all the first-born among the children of Israel; and the cattle of the Levites instead of all the firstlings among the cattle of the children of Israel.’

searchText: numbers 3:42 and moses numbered, as the lord commanded him, all the first-born among the children of israel.
english: And Moses numbered, as the LORD commanded him, all the first-born among the children of Israel.

searchText: numbers 3:43 and all the first-born males according to the number of names, from a month old and upward, of those that were numbered of them, were twenty and two thousand two hundred and threescore and thirteen.
english: And all the first-born males according to the number of names, from a month old and upward, of those that were numbered of them, were twenty and two thousand two hundred and threescore and thirteen.

searchText: numbers 3:44 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 3:45 ’take the levites instead of all the first-born among the children of israel, and the cattle of the levites instead of their cattle; and the levites shall be mine, even the lord’s.
english: ’Take the Levites instead of all the first-born among the children of Israel, and the cattle of the Levites instead of their cattle; and the Levites shall be Mine, even the LORD’S.

searchText: numbers 3:46 and as for the redemption of the two hundred and three score and thirteen of the first-born of the children of israel, that are over and above the number of the levites,
english: And as for the redemption of the two hundred and three score and thirteen of the first-born of the children of Israel, that are over and above the number of the Levites,

searchText: numbers 3:47 thou shalt take five shekels apiece by the poll; after the shekel of the sanctuary shalt thou take them—the shekel is twenty gerahs.
english: thou shalt take five shekels apiece by the poll; after the shekel of the sanctuary shalt thou take them—the shekel is twenty gerahs.

searchText: numbers 3:48 and thou shalt give the money wherewith they that remain over of them are redeemed unto aaron and to his sons.’
english: And thou shalt give the money wherewith they that remain over of them are redeemed unto Aaron and to his sons.’

searchText: numbers 3:49 and moses took the redemption-money from them that were over and above them that were redeemed by the levites;
english: And Moses took the redemption-money from them that were over and above them that were redeemed by the Levites;

searchText: numbers 3:50 from the first-born of the children of israel took he the money: a thousand three hundred and threescore and five shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary.
english: from the first-born of the children of Israel took he the money: a thousand three hundred and threescore and five shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary.

searchText: numbers 3:51 and moses gave the redemption-money unto aaron and to his sons, according to the word of the lord, as the lord commanded moses.
english: And Moses gave the redemption-money unto Aaron and to his sons, according to the word of the LORD, as the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: numbers 4:1 and the lord spoke unto moses and unto aaron, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses and unto Aaron, saying:

searchText: numbers 4:2 ’take the sum of the sons of kohath from among the sons of levi, by their families, by their fathers’houses,
english: ’Take the sum of the sons of Kohath from among the sons of Levi, by their families, by their fathers’houses,

searchText: numbers 4:3 from thirty years old and upward even until fifty years old, all that enter upon the service, to do work in the tent of meeting.
english: from thirty years old and upward even until fifty years old, all that enter upon the service, to do work in the tent of meeting.

searchText: numbers 4:4 this is the service of the sons of kohath in the tent of meeting, about the most holy things:
english: This is the service of the sons of Kohath in the tent of meeting, about the most holy things:

searchText: numbers 4:5 when the camp setteth forward, aaron shall go in, and his sons, and they shall take down the veil of the screen, and cover the ark of the testimony with it;
english: when the camp setteth forward, Aaron shall go in, and his sons, and they shall take down the veil of the screen, and cover the ark of the testimony with it;

searchText: numbers 4:6 and shall put thereon a covering of sealskin, and shall spread over it a cloth all of blue, and shall set the staves thereof.
english: and shall put thereon a covering of sealskin, and shall spread over it a cloth all of blue, and shall set the staves thereof.

searchText: numbers 4:7 and upon the table of showbread they shall spread a cloth of blue, and put thereon the dishes, and the pans, and the bowls, and the jars wherewith to pour out; and the continual bread shall remain thereon.
english: And upon the table of showbread they shall spread a cloth of blue, and put thereon the dishes, and the pans, and the bowls, and the jars wherewith to pour out; and the continual bread shall remain thereon.

searchText: numbers 4:8 and they shall spread upon them a cloth of scarlet, and cover the same with a covering of sealskin, and shall set the staves thereof.
english: And they shall spread upon them a cloth of scarlet, and cover the same with a covering of sealskin, and shall set the staves thereof.

searchText: numbers 4:9 and they shall take a cloth of blue, and cover the candlestick of the light, and its lamps, and its tongs, and its snuffdishes, and all the oil vessels thereof, wherewith they minister unto it.
english: And they shall take a cloth of blue, and cover the candlestick of the light, and its lamps, and its tongs, and its snuffdishes, and all the oil vessels thereof, wherewith they minister unto it.

searchText: numbers 4:10 and they shall put it and all the vessels thereof within a covering of sealskin, and shall put it upon a bar.
english: And they shall put it and all the vessels thereof within a covering of sealskin, and shall put it upon a bar.

searchText: numbers 4:11 and upon the golden altar they shall spread a cloth of blue, and cover it with a covering of sealskin, and shall set the staves thereof.
english: And upon the golden altar they shall spread a cloth of blue, and cover it with a covering of sealskin, and shall set the staves thereof.

searchText: numbers 4:12 and they shall take all the vessels of ministry, wherewith they minister in the sanctuary, and put them in a cloth of blue, and cover them with a covering of sealskin, and shall put them on a bar.
english: And they shall take all the vessels of ministry, wherewith they minister in the sanctuary, and put them in a cloth of blue, and cover them with a covering of sealskin, and shall put them on a bar.

searchText: numbers 4:13 and they shall take away the ashes from the altar, and spread a purple cloth thereon.
english: And they shall take away the ashes from the altar, and spread a purple cloth thereon.

searchText: numbers 4:14 and they shall put upon it all the vessels thereof, wherewith they minister about it, the fire-pans, the flesh-hooks, and the shovels, and the basins, all the vessels of the altar; and they shall spread upon it a covering of sealskin, and set the staves thereof.
english: And they shall put upon it all the vessels thereof, wherewith they minister about it, the fire-pans, the flesh-hooks, and the shovels, and the basins, all the vessels of the altar; and they shall spread upon it a covering of sealskin, and set the staves thereof.

searchText: numbers 4:15 and when aaron and his sons have made an end of covering the holy furniture, and all the holy vessels, as the camp is to set forward—after that, the sons of kohath shall come to bear them; but they shall not touch the holy things, lest they die. these things are the burden of the sons of kohath in the tent of meeting.
english: And when Aaron and his sons have made an end of covering the holy furniture, and all the holy vessels, as the camp is to set forward—after that, the sons of Kohath shall come to bear them; but they shall not touch the holy things, lest they die. These things are the burden of the sons of Kohath in the tent of meeting.

searchText: numbers 4:16 and the charge of eleazar the son of aaron the priest shall be the oil for the light, and the sweet incense, and the continual meal-offering, and the anointing oil: he shall have the charge of all the tabernacle, and of all that therein is, whether it be the sanctuary, or the furniture thereof.’
english: And the charge of Eleazar the son of Aaron the priest shall be the oil for the light, and the sweet incense, and the continual meal-offering, and the anointing oil: he shall have the charge of all the tabernacle, and of all that therein is, whether it be the sanctuary, or the furniture thereof.’

searchText: numbers 4:17 and the lord spoke unto moses and unto aaron, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses and unto Aaron, saying:

searchText: numbers 4:18 ’cut ye not off the tribe of the families of the kohathites from among the levites;
english: ’Cut ye not off the tribe of the families of the Kohathites from among the Levites;

searchText: numbers 4:19 but thus do unto them, that they may live, and not die, when they approach unto the most holy things: aaron and his sons shall go in, and appoint them every one to his service and to his burden;
english: but thus do unto them, that they may live, and not die, when they approach unto the most holy things: Aaron and his sons shall go in, and appoint them every one to his service and to his burden;

searchText: numbers 4:20 but they shall not go in to see the holy things as they are being covered, lest they die.’
english: but they shall not go in to see the holy things as they are being covered, lest they die.’

searchText: numbers 4:21 and the lord spoke unto moses saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses saying:

searchText: numbers 4:22 ’take the sum of the sons of gershon also, by their fathers’houses, by their families;
english: ’Take the sum of the sons of Gershon also, by their fathers’houses, by their families;

searchText: numbers 4:23 from thirty years old and upward until fifty years old shalt thou number them: all that enter in to wait upon the service, to do service in the tent of meeting.
english: from thirty years old and upward until fifty years old shalt thou number them: all that enter in to wait upon the service, to do service in the tent of meeting.

searchText: numbers 4:24 this is the service of the families of the gershonites, in serving and in bearing burdens:
english: This is the service of the families of the Gershonites, in serving and in bearing burdens:

searchText: numbers 4:25 they shall bear the curtains of the tabernacle, and the tent of meeting, its covering, and the covering of sealskin that is above upon it, and the screen for the door of the tent of meeting;
english: they shall bear the curtains of the tabernacle, and the tent of meeting, its covering, and the covering of sealskin that is above upon it, and the screen for the door of the tent of meeting;

searchText: numbers 4:26 and the hangings of the court, and the screen for the door of the gate of the court, which is by the tabernacle and by the altar round about, and their cords, and all the instruments of their service, and whatsoever there may be to do with them, therein shall they serve.
english: and the hangings of the court, and the screen for the door of the gate of the court, which is by the tabernacle and by the altar round about, and their cords, and all the instruments of their service, and whatsoever there may be to do with them, therein shall they serve.

searchText: numbers 4:27 at the commandment of aaron and his sons shall be all the service of the sons of the gershonites, in all their burden, and in all their service; and ye shall appoint unto them in charge all their burden.
english: At the commandment of Aaron and his sons shall be all the service of the sons of the Gershonites, in all their burden, and in all their service; and ye shall appoint unto them in charge all their burden.

searchText: numbers 4:28 this is the service of the families of the sons of the gershonites in the tent of meeting; and their charge shall be under the hand of ithamar the son of aaron the priest.
english: This is the service of the families of the sons of the Gershonites in the tent of meeting; and their charge shall be under the hand of Ithamar the son of Aaron the priest.

searchText: numbers 4:29 as for the sons of merari, thou shalt number them by their families, by their fathers’houses;
english: As for the sons of Merari, thou shalt number them by their families, by their fathers’houses;

searchText: numbers 4:30 from thirty years old and upward even unto fifty years old shalt thou number them, every one that entereth upon the service, to do the work of the tent of meeting.
english: from thirty years old and upward even unto fifty years old shalt thou number them, every one that entereth upon the service, to do the work of the tent of meeting.

searchText: numbers 4:31 and this is the charge of their burden, according to all their service in the tent of meeting: the boards of the tabernacle, and the bars thereof, and the pillars thereof, and the sockets thereof;
english: And this is the charge of their burden, according to all their service in the tent of meeting: the boards of the tabernacle, and the bars thereof, and the pillars thereof, and the sockets thereof;

searchText: numbers 4:32 and the pillars of the court round about, and their sockets, and their pins, and their cords, even all their appurtenance, and all that pertaineth to their service; and by name ye shall appoint the instruments of the charge of their burden.
english: and the pillars of the court round about, and their sockets, and their pins, and their cords, even all their appurtenance, and all that pertaineth to their service; and by name ye shall appoint the instruments of the charge of their burden.

searchText: numbers 4:33 this is the service of the families of the sons of merari, according to all their service, in the tent of meeting, under the hand of ithamar the son of aaron the priest.’
english: This is the service of the families of the sons of Merari, according to all their service, in the tent of meeting, under the hand of Ithamar the son of Aaron the priest.’

searchText: numbers 4:34 and moses and aaron and the princes of the congregation numbered the sons of the kohathites by their families, and by their fathers’houses,
english: And Moses and Aaron and the princes of the congregation numbered the sons of the Kohathites by their families, and by their fathers’houses,

searchText: numbers 4:35 from thirty years old and upward even unto fifty years old, every one that entered upon the service, for service in the tent of meeting.
english: from thirty years old and upward even unto fifty years old, every one that entered upon the service, for service in the tent of meeting.

searchText: numbers 4:36 and those that were numbered of them by their families were two thousand seven hundred and fifty.
english: And those that were numbered of them by their families were two thousand seven hundred and fifty.

searchText: numbers 4:37 these are they that were numbered of the families of the kohathites, of all that did serve in the tent of meeting, whom moses and aaron numbered according to the commandment of the lord by the hand of moses. .
english: These are they that were numbered of the families of the Kohathites, of all that did serve in the tent of meeting, whom Moses and Aaron numbered according to the commandment of the LORD by the hand of Moses. .

searchText: numbers 4:38 and those that were numbered of the sons of gershon, by their families, and by their fathers’houses,
english: And those that were numbered of the sons of Gershon, by their families, and by their fathers’houses,

searchText: numbers 4:39 from thirty years old and upward even unto fifty years old, every one that entered upon the service, for service in the tent of meeting,
english: from thirty years old and upward even unto fifty years old, every one that entered upon the service, for service in the tent of meeting,

searchText: numbers 4:40 even those that were numbered of them, by their families, by their fathers’houses, were two thousand and six hundred and thirty.
english: even those that were numbered of them, by their families, by their fathers’houses, were two thousand and six hundred and thirty.

searchText: numbers 4:41 these are they that were numbered of the families of the sons of gershon, of all that did serve in the tent of meeting, whom moses and aaron numbered according to the commandment of the lord.
english: These are they that were numbered of the families of the sons of Gershon, of all that did serve in the tent of meeting, whom Moses and Aaron numbered according to the commandment of the LORD.

searchText: numbers 4:42 and those that were numbered of the families of the sons of merari, by their families, by their fathers’houses,
english: And those that were numbered of the families of the sons of Merari, by their families, by their fathers’houses,

searchText: numbers 4:43 from thirty years old and upward even unto fifty years old, every one that entered upon the service, for service in the tent of meeting,
english: from thirty years old and upward even unto fifty years old, every one that entered upon the service, for service in the tent of meeting,

searchText: numbers 4:44 even those that were numbered of them by their families, were three thousand and two hundred.
english: even those that were numbered of them by their families, were three thousand and two hundred.

searchText: numbers 4:45 these are they that were numbered of the families of the sons of merari, whom moses and aaron numbered according to the commandment of the lord by the hand of moses.
english: These are they that were numbered of the families of the sons of Merari, whom Moses and Aaron numbered according to the commandment of the LORD by the hand of Moses.

searchText: numbers 4:46 all those that were numbered of the levites, whom moses and aaron and the princes of israel numbered, by their families, and by their fathers’houses,
english: All those that were numbered of the Levites, whom Moses and Aaron and the princes of Israel numbered, by their families, and by their fathers’houses,

searchText: numbers 4:47 from thirty years old and upward even unto fifty years old, every one that entered in to do the work of service, and the work of bearing burdens in the tent of meeting,
english: from thirty years old and upward even unto fifty years old, every one that entered in to do the work of service, and the work of bearing burdens in the tent of meeting,

searchText: numbers 4:48 even those that were numbered of them, were eight thousand and five hundred and fourscore.
english: even those that were numbered of them, were eight thousand and five hundred and fourscore.

searchText: numbers 4:49 according to the commandment of the lord they were appointed by the hand of moses, every one to his service, and to his burden; they were also numbered, as the lord commanded moses.
english: According to the commandment of the LORD they were appointed by the hand of Moses, every one to his service, and to his burden; they were also numbered, as the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: numbers 5:1 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 5:2 ’command the children of israel, that they put out of the camp every leper, and every one that hath an issue, and whosoever is unclean by the dead;
english: ’Command the children of Israel, that they put out of the camp every leper, and every one that hath an issue, and whosoever is unclean by the dead;

searchText: numbers 5:3 both male and female shall ye put out, without the camp shall ye put them; that they defile not their camp, in the midst whereof i dwell.’
english: both male and female shall ye put out, without the camp shall ye put them; that they defile not their camp, in the midst whereof I dwell.’

searchText: numbers 5:4 and the children of israel did so, and put them out without the camp; as the lord spoke unto moses, so did the children of israel.
english: And the children of Israel did so, and put them out without the camp; as the LORD spoke unto Moses, so did the children of Israel.

searchText: numbers 5:5 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 5:6 speak unto the children of israel: when a man or woman shall commit any sin that men commit, to commit a trespass against the lord, and that soul be guilty;
english: Speak unto the children of Israel: When a man or woman shall commit any sin that men commit, to commit a trespass against the LORD, and that soul be guilty;

searchText: numbers 5:7 then they shall confess their sin which they have done; and he shall make restitution for his guilt in full, and add unto it the fifth part thereof, and give it unto him in respect of whom he hath been guilty.
english: then they shall confess their sin which they have done; and he shall make restitution for his guilt in full, and add unto it the fifth part thereof, and give it unto him in respect of whom he hath been guilty.

searchText: numbers 5:8 but if the man have no kinsman to whom restitution may be made for the guilt, the restitution for guilt which is made shall be the lord’s, even the priest’s; besides the ram of the atonement, whereby atonement shall be made for him.
english: But if the man have no kinsman to whom restitution may be made for the guilt, the restitution for guilt which is made shall be the LORD’S, even the priest’s; besides the ram of the atonement, whereby atonement shall be made for him.

searchText: numbers 5:9 and every heave-offering of all the holy things of the children of israel, which they present unto the priest, shall be his.
english: And every heave-offering of all the holy things of the children of Israel, which they present unto the priest, shall be his.

searchText: numbers 5:10 and every man’s hallowed things shall be his: whatsoever any man giveth the priest, it shall be his.
english: And every man’s hallowed things shall be his: whatsoever any man giveth the priest, it shall be his.

searchText: numbers 5:11 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 5:12 speak unto the children of israel, and say unto them: if any man’s wife go aside, and act unfaithfully against him,
english: Speak unto the children of Israel, and say unto them: If any man’s wife go aside, and act unfaithfully against him,

searchText: numbers 5:13 and a man lie with her carnally, and it be hid from the eyes of her husband, she being defiled secretly, and there be no witness against her, neither she be taken in the act;
english: and a man lie with her carnally, and it be hid from the eyes of her husband, she being defiled secretly, and there be no witness against her, neither she be taken in the act;

searchText: numbers 5:14 and the spirit of jealousy come upon him, and he warned his wife, and she be defiled; or if the spirit of jealousy come upon him, and he warned his wife, and she be not defiled;
english: and the spirit of jealousy come upon him, and he warned his wife, and she be defiled; or if the spirit of jealousy come upon him, and he warned his wife, and she be not defiled;

searchText: numbers 5:15 then shall the man bring his wife unto the priest, and shall bring her offering for her, the tenth part of an ephah of barley meal; he shall pour no oil upon it, nor put frankincense thereon; for it is a meal-offering of jealousy, a meal-offering of memorial, bringing iniquity to remembrance.
english: then shall the man bring his wife unto the priest, and shall bring her offering for her, the tenth part of an ephah of barley meal; he shall pour no oil upon it, nor put frankincense thereon; for it is a meal-offering of jealousy, a meal-offering of memorial, bringing iniquity to remembrance.

searchText: numbers 5:16 and the priest shall bring her near, and set her before the lord.
english: And the priest shall bring her near, and set her before the LORD.

searchText: numbers 5:17 and the priest shall take holy water in an earthen vessel; and of the dust that is on the floor of the tabernacle the priest shall take, and put it into the water.
english: And the priest shall take holy water in an earthen vessel; and of the dust that is on the floor of the tabernacle the priest shall take, and put it into the water.

searchText: numbers 5:18 and the priest shall set the woman before the lord, and let the hair of the woman’s head go loose, and put the meal-offering of memorial in her hands, which is the meal-offering of jealousy; and the priest shall have in his hand the water of bitterness that causeth the curse.
english: And the priest shall set the woman before the LORD, and let the hair of the woman’s head go loose, and put the meal-offering of memorial in her hands, which is the meal-offering of jealousy; and the priest shall have in his hand the water of bitterness that causeth the curse.

searchText: numbers 5:19 and the priest shall cause her to swear, and shall say unto the woman: ‘if no man have lain with thee, and if thou hast not gone aside to uncleanness, being under thy husband, be thou free from this water of bitterness that causeth the curse;
english: And the priest shall cause her to swear, and shall say unto the woman: ‘If no man have lain with thee, and if thou hast not gone aside to uncleanness, being under thy husband, be thou free from this water of bitterness that causeth the curse;

searchText: numbers 5:20 but if thou hast gone aside, being under thy husband, and if thou be defiled, and some man have lain with thee besides thy husband—
english: but if thou hast gone aside, being under thy husband, and if thou be defiled, and some man have lain with thee besides thy husband—

searchText: numbers 5:21 then the priest shall cause the woman to swear with the oath of cursing, and the priest shall say unto the woman—the lord make thee a curse and an oath among thy people, when the lord doth make thy thigh to fall away, and thy belly to swell;
english: then the priest shall cause the woman to swear with the oath of cursing, and the priest shall say unto the woman—the LORD make thee a curse and an oath among thy people, when the LORD doth make thy thigh to fall away, and thy belly to swell;

searchText: numbers 5:22 and this water that causeth the curse shall go into thy bowels, and make thy belly to swell, and thy thigh to fall away’; and the woman shall say: ‘amen, amen.’
english: and this water that causeth the curse shall go into thy bowels, and make thy belly to swell, and thy thigh to fall away’; and the woman shall say: ‘Amen, Amen.’

searchText: numbers 5:23 and the priest shall write these curses in a scroll, and he shall blot them out into the water of bitterness.
english: And the priest shall write these curses in a scroll, and he shall blot them out into the water of bitterness.

searchText: numbers 5:24 and he shall make the woman drink the water of bitterness that causeth the curse; and the water that causeth the curse shall enter into her and become bitter.
english: And he shall make the woman drink the water of bitterness that causeth the curse; and the water that causeth the curse shall enter into her and become bitter.

searchText: numbers 5:25 and the priest shall take the meal-offering of jealousy out of the woman’s hand, and shall wave the meal-offering before the lord, and bring it unto the altar.
english: And the priest shall take the meal-offering of jealousy out of the woman’s hand, and shall wave the meal-offering before the LORD, and bring it unto the altar.

searchText: numbers 5:26 and the priest shall take a handful of the meal-offering, as the memorial-part thereof, and make it smoke upon the altar, and afterward shall make the woman drink the water.
english: And the priest shall take a handful of the meal-offering, as the memorial-part thereof, and make it smoke upon the altar, and afterward shall make the woman drink the water.

searchText: numbers 5:27 and when he hath made her drink the water, then it shall come to pass, if she be defiled, and have acted unfaithfully against her husband, that the water that causeth the curse shall enter into her and become bitter, and her belly shall swell, and her thigh shall fall away; and the woman shall be a curse among her people.
english: And when he hath made her drink the water, then it shall come to pass, if she be defiled, and have acted unfaithfully against her husband, that the water that causeth the curse shall enter into her and become bitter, and her belly shall swell, and her thigh shall fall away; and the woman shall be a curse among her people.

searchText: numbers 5:28 and if the woman be not defiled, but be clean; then she shall be cleared, and shall conceive seed.
english: And if the woman be not defiled, but be clean; then she shall be cleared, and shall conceive seed.

searchText: numbers 5:29 this is the law of jealousy, when a wife, being under her husband, goeth aside, and is defiled;
english: This is the law of jealousy, when a wife, being under her husband, goeth aside, and is defiled;

searchText: numbers 5:30 or when the spirit of jealousy cometh upon a man, and he be jealous over his wife; then shall he set the woman before the lord, and the priest shall execute upon her all this law.
english: or when the spirit of jealousy cometh upon a man, and he be jealous over his wife; then shall he set the woman before the LORD, and the priest shall execute upon her all this law.

searchText: numbers 5:31 and the man shall be clear from iniquity, and that woman shall bear her iniquity.
english: And the man shall be clear from iniquity, and that woman shall bear her iniquity.

searchText: numbers 6:1 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 6:2 speak unto the children of israel, and say unto them: when either man or woman shall clearly utter a vow, the vow of a nazirite, to consecrate himself unto the lord,
english: Speak unto the children of Israel, and say unto them: When either man or woman shall clearly utter a vow, the vow of a Nazirite, to consecrate himself unto the LORD,

searchText: numbers 6:3 he shall abstain from wine and strong drink: he shall drink no vinegar of wine, or vinegar of strong drink, neither shall he drink any liquor of grapes, nor eat fresh grapes or dried.
english: he shall abstain from wine and strong drink: he shall drink no vinegar of wine, or vinegar of strong drink, neither shall he drink any liquor of grapes, nor eat fresh grapes or dried.

searchText: numbers 6:4 all the days of his naziriteship shall he eat nothing that is made of the grape-vine, from the pressed grapes even to the grapestone.
english: All the days of his Naziriteship shall he eat nothing that is made of the grape-vine, from the pressed grapes even to the grapestone.

searchText: numbers 6:5 all the days of his vow of naziriteship there shall no razor come upon his head; until the days be fulfilled, in which he consecrateth himself unto the lord, he shall be holy, he shall let the locks of the hair of his head grow long.
english: All the days of his vow of Naziriteship there shall no razor come upon his head; until the days be fulfilled, in which he consecrateth himself unto the LORD, he shall be holy, he shall let the locks of the hair of his head grow long.

searchText: numbers 6:6 all the days that he consecrateth himself unto the lord he shall not come near to a dead body.
english: All the days that he consecrateth himself unto the LORD he shall not come near to a dead body.

searchText: numbers 6:7 he shall not make himself unclean for his father, or for his mother, for his brother, or for his sister, when they die; because his consecration unto god is upon his head.
english: He shall not make himself unclean for his father, or for his mother, for his brother, or for his sister, when they die; because his consecration unto God is upon his head.

searchText: numbers 6:8 all the days of his naziriteship he is holy unto the lord.
english: All the days of his Naziriteship he is holy unto the LORD.

searchText: numbers 6:9 and if any man die very suddenly beside him, and he defile his consecrated head, then he shall shave his head in the day of his cleansing, on the seventh day shall he shave it.
english: And if any man die very suddenly beside him, and he defile his consecrated head, then he shall shave his head in the day of his cleansing, on the seventh day shall he shave it.

searchText: numbers 6:10 and on the eighth day he shall bring two turtledoves, or two young pigeons, to the priest, to the door of the tent of meeting.
english: And on the eighth day he shall bring two turtledoves, or two young pigeons, to the priest, to the door of the tent of meeting.

searchText: numbers 6:11 and the priest shall prepare one for a sin-offering, and the other for a burnt-offering, and make atonement for him, for that he sinned by reason of the dead; and he shall hallow his head that same day.
english: And the priest shall prepare one for a sin-offering, and the other for a burnt-offering, and make atonement for him, for that he sinned by reason of the dead; and he shall hallow his head that same day.

searchText: numbers 6:12 and he shall consecrate unto the lord the days of his naziriteship, and shall bring a he-lamb of the first year for a guilt-offering; but the former days shall be void, because his consecration was defiled. .
english: And he shall consecrate unto the LORD the days of his Naziriteship, and shall bring a he-lamb of the first year for a guilt-offering; but the former days shall be void, because his consecration was defiled. .

searchText: numbers 6:13 and this is the law of the nazirite, when the days of his consecration are fulfilled: he shall abring it unto the door of the tent of meeting;
english: And this is the law of the Nazirite, when the days of his consecration are fulfilled: he shall abring it unto the door of the tent of meeting;

searchText: numbers 6:14 and he shall present his offering unto the lord, one he-lamb of the first year without blemish for a burnt-offering, and one ewe-lamb of the first year without blemish for a sin-offering, and one ram without blemish for peace-offerings,
english: and he shall present his offering unto the LORD, one he-lamb of the first year without blemish for a burnt-offering, and one ewe-lamb of the first year without blemish for a sin-offering, and one ram without blemish for peace-offerings,

searchText: numbers 6:15 and a basket of unleavened bread, cakes of fine flour mingled with oil, and unleavened wafers spread with oil, and their meal-offering, and their drink-offerings.
english: and a basket of unleavened bread, cakes of fine flour mingled with oil, and unleavened wafers spread with oil, and their meal-offering, and their drink-offerings.

searchText: numbers 6:16 and the priest shall bring them before the lord, and shall offer his sin-offering, and his burnt-offering.
english: And the priest shall bring them before the LORD, and shall offer his sin-offering, and his burnt-offering.

searchText: numbers 6:17 and he shall offer the ram for a sacrifice of peace-offerings unto the lord, with the basket of unleavened bread; the priest shall offer also the meal-offering thereof, and the drink-offering thereof.
english: And he shall offer the ram for a sacrifice of peace-offerings unto the LORD, with the basket of unleavened bread; the priest shall offer also the meal-offering thereof, and the drink-offering thereof.

searchText: numbers 6:18 and the nazirite shall shave his consecrated head at the door of the tent of meeting, and shall take the hair of his consecrated head, and put it on the fire which is under the sacrifice of peace-offerings.
english: And the Nazirite shall shave his consecrated head at the door of the tent of meeting, and shall take the hair of his consecrated head, and put it on the fire which is under the sacrifice of peace-offerings.

searchText: numbers 6:19 and the priest shall take the shoulder of the ram when it is sodden, and one unleavened cake out of the basket, and one unleavened wafer, and shall put them upon the hands of the nazirite, after he hath shaven his consecrated head.
english: And the priest shall take the shoulder of the ram when it is sodden, and one unleavened cake out of the basket, and one unleavened wafer, and shall put them upon the hands of the Nazirite, after he hath shaven his consecrated head.

searchText: numbers 6:20 and the priest shall wave them for a wave-offering before the lord; this is holy for the priest, together with the breast of waving and the thigh of heaving; and after that the nazirite may drink wine.
english: And the priest shall wave them for a wave-offering before the LORD; this is holy for the priest, together with the breast of waving and the thigh of heaving; and after that the Nazirite may drink wine.

searchText: numbers 6:21 this is the law of the nazirite who voweth, and of his offering unto the lord for his naziriteship, beside that for which his means suffice; according to his vow which he voweth, so he must do after the law of his naziriteship.
english: This is the law of the Nazirite who voweth, and of his offering unto the LORD for his Naziriteship, beside that for which his means suffice; according to his vow which he voweth, so he must do after the law of his Naziriteship.

searchText: numbers 6:22 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 6:23 ’speak unto aaron and unto his sons, saying: on this wise ye shall bless the children of israel; ye shall say unto them:
english: ’Speak unto Aaron and unto his sons, saying: On this wise ye shall bless the children of Israel; ye shall say unto them:

searchText: numbers 6:24 the lord bless thee, and keep thee;
english: The LORD bless thee, and keep thee;

searchText: numbers 6:25 the lord make his face to shine upon thee, and be gracious unto thee;
english: The LORD make His face to shine upon thee, and be gracious unto thee;

searchText: numbers 6:26 the lord lift up his countenance upon thee, and give thee peace.
english: The LORD lift up His countenance upon thee, and give thee peace.

searchText: numbers 6:27 so shall they put my name upon the children of israel, and i will bless them.’
english: So shall they put My name upon the children of Israel, and I will bless them.’

searchText: numbers 7:1 and it came to pass on the day that moses had made an end of setting up the tabernacle, and had anointed it and sanctified it, and all the furniture thereof, and the altar and all the vessels thereof, and had anointed them and sanctified them;
english: And it came to pass on the day that Moses had made an end of setting up the tabernacle, and had anointed it and sanctified it, and all the furniture thereof, and the altar and all the vessels thereof, and had anointed them and sanctified them;

searchText: numbers 7:2 that the princes of israel, the heads of their fathers’houses, offered—these were the princes of the tribes, these are they that were over them that were numbered.
english: that the princes of Israel, the heads of their fathers’houses, offered—these were the princes of the tribes, these are they that were over them that were numbered.

searchText: numbers 7:3 and they brought their offering before the lord, six covered wagons, and twelve oxen: a wagon for every two of the princes, and for each one an ox; and they presented them before the tabernacle.
english: And they brought their offering before the LORD, six covered wagons, and twelve oxen: a wagon for every two of the princes, and for each one an ox; and they presented them before the tabernacle.

searchText: numbers 7:4 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 7:5 ’take it of them, that they may be to do the service of the tent of meeting; and thou shalt give them unto the levites, to every man according to his service.’
english: ’Take it of them, that they may be to do the service of the tent of meeting; and thou shalt give them unto the Levites, to every man according to his service.’

searchText: numbers 7:6 and moses took the wagons and the oxen, and gave them unto the levites.
english: And Moses took the wagons and the oxen, and gave them unto the Levites.

searchText: numbers 7:7 two wagons and four oxen he gave unto the sons of gershon, according to their service.
english: Two wagons and four oxen he gave unto the sons of Gershon, according to their service.

searchText: numbers 7:8 and four wagons and eight oxen he gave unto the sons of merari, according unto their service, under the hand of ithamar the son of aaron the priest.
english: And four wagons and eight oxen he gave unto the sons of Merari, according unto their service, under the hand of Ithamar the son of Aaron the priest.

searchText: numbers 7:9 but unto the sons of kohath he gave none, because the service of the holy things belonged unto them: they bore them upon their shoulders.
english: But unto the sons of Kohath he gave none, because the service of the holy things belonged unto them: they bore them upon their shoulders.

searchText: numbers 7:10 and the princes brought the dedication-offering of the altar in the day that it was anointed, even the princes brought their offering before the altar.
