english: And the princes brought the dedication-offering of the altar in the day that it was anointed, even the princes brought their offering before the altar.

searchText: numbers 7:11 and the lord said unto moses: ‘they shall present their offering each prince on his day, for the dedication of the altar.’
english: And the LORD said unto Moses: ‘They shall present their offering each prince on his day, for the dedication of the altar.’

searchText: numbers 7:12 and he that presented his offering the first day was nahshon the son of amminadab, of the tribe of judah;
english: And he that presented his offering the first day was Nahshon the son of Amminadab, of the tribe of Judah;

searchText: numbers 7:13 and his offering was one silver dish, the weight thereof was a hundred and thirty shekels, one silver basin of seventy shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mingled with oil for a meal-offering;
english: and his offering was one silver dish, the weight thereof was a hundred and thirty shekels, one silver basin of seventy shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mingled with oil for a meal-offering;

searchText: numbers 7:14 one golden pan of ten shekels, full of incense;
english: one golden pan of ten shekels, full of incense;

searchText: numbers 7:15 one young bullock, one ram, one he-lamb of the first year, for a burnt-offering;
english: one young bullock, one ram, one he-lamb of the first year, for a burnt-offering;

searchText: numbers 7:16 one male of the goats for a sin-offering;
english: one male of the goats for a sin-offering;

searchText: numbers 7:84 this was the dedication-offering of the altar, in the day when it was anointed, at the hands of the princes of israel: twelve silver dishes, twelve silver basins, twelve golden pans;
english: This was the dedication-offering of the altar, in the day when it was anointed, at the hands of the princes of Israel: twelve silver dishes, twelve silver basins, twelve golden pans;

searchText: numbers 7:85 each silver dish weighing a hundred and thirty shekels, and each basin seventy; all the silver of the vessels two thousand and four hundred shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary;
english: each silver dish weighing a hundred and thirty shekels, and each basin seventy; all the silver of the vessels two thousand and four hundred shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary;

searchText: numbers 7:88 and all the oxen for the sacrifice of peace-offerings twenty and four bullocks, the rams sixty, the he-goats sixty, the he-lambs of the first year sixty. this was the dedication-offering of the altar, after that it was anointed.
english: and all the oxen for the sacrifice of peace-offerings twenty and four bullocks, the rams sixty, the he-goats sixty, the he-lambs of the first year sixty. This was the dedication-offering of the altar, after that it was anointed.

searchText: numbers 7:89 and when moses went into the tent of meeting that he might speak with him, then he heard the voice speaking unto him from above the ark-cover that was upon the ark of the testimony, from between the two cherubim; and he spoke unto him.
english: And when Moses went into the tent of meeting that He might speak with him, then he heard the Voice speaking unto him from above the ark-cover that was upon the ark of the testimony, from between the two cherubim; and He spoke unto him.

searchText: numbers 8:1 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 8:2 ’speak unto aaron, and say unto him: when thou lightest the lamps, the seven lamps shall give light in front of the candlestick.’
english: ’Speak unto Aaron, and say unto him: When thou lightest the lamps, the seven lamps shall give light in front of the candlestick.’

searchText: numbers 8:3 and aaron did so: he lighted the lamps thereof so as to give light in front of the candlestick, as the lord commanded moses.
english: And Aaron did so: he lighted the lamps thereof so as to give light in front of the candlestick, as the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: numbers 8:4 and this was the work of the candlestick, beaten work of gold; unto the base thereof, and unto the flowers thereof, it was beaten work; according unto the pattern which the lord had shown moses, so he made the candlestick.
english: And this was the work of the candlestick, beaten work of gold; unto the base thereof, and unto the flowers thereof, it was beaten work; according unto the pattern which the LORD had shown Moses, so he made the candlestick.

searchText: numbers 8:5 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 8:6 ’take the levites from among the children of israel, and cleanse them.
english: ’Take the Levites from among the children of Israel, and cleanse them.

searchText: numbers 8:7 and thus shalt thou do unto them, to cleanse them: sprinkle the water of purification upon them, and let them cause a razor to pass over all their flesh, and let them wash their clothes, and cleanse themselves.
english: And thus shalt thou do unto them, to cleanse them: sprinkle the water of purification upon them, and let them cause a razor to pass over all their flesh, and let them wash their clothes, and cleanse themselves.

searchText: numbers 8:8 then let them take a young bullock, and its meal-offering, fine flour mingled with oil, and another young bullock shalt thou take for a sin-offering.
english: Then let them take a young bullock, and its meal-offering, fine flour mingled with oil, and another young bullock shalt thou take for a sin-offering.

searchText: numbers 8:9 and thou shalt present the levites before the tent of meeting; and thou shalt assemble the whole congregation of the children of israel.
english: And thou shalt present the Levites before the tent of meeting; and thou shalt assemble the whole congregation of the children of Israel.

searchText: numbers 8:10 and thou shalt present the levites before the lord; and the children of israel shall lay their hands upon the levites.
english: And thou shalt present the Levites before the LORD; and the children of Israel shall lay their hands upon the Levites.

searchText: numbers 8:11 and aaron shall offer the levites before the lord for a wave-offering from the children of israel, that they may be to do the service of the lord.
english: And Aaron shall offer the Levites before the LORD for a wave-offering from the children of Israel, that they may be to do the service of the LORD.

searchText: numbers 8:12 and the levites shall lay their hands upon the heads of the bullocks; and offer thou the one for a sin-offering, and the other for a burnt-offering, unto the lord, to make atonement for the levites.
english: And the Levites shall lay their hands upon the heads of the bullocks; and offer thou the one for a sin-offering, and the other for a burnt-offering, unto the LORD, to make atonement for the Levites.

searchText: numbers 8:13 and thou shalt set the levites before aaron, and before his sons, and offer them for a wave-offering unto the lord.
english: And thou shalt set the Levites before Aaron, and before his sons, and offer them for a wave-offering unto the LORD.

searchText: numbers 8:14 thus shalt thou separate the levites from among the children of israel; and the levites shall be mine.
english: Thus shalt thou separate the Levites from among the children of Israel; and the Levites shall be Mine.

searchText: numbers 8:15 and after that shall the levites go in to do the service of the tent of meeting; and thou shalt cleanse them, and offer them for a wave-offering.
english: And after that shall the Levites go in to do the service of the tent of meeting; and thou shalt cleanse them, and offer them for a wave-offering.

searchText: numbers 8:16 for they are wholly given unto me from among the children of israel; instead of all that openeth the womb, even the first-born of all the children of israel, have i taken them unto me.
english: For they are wholly given unto Me from among the children of Israel; instead of all that openeth the womb, even the first-born of all the children of Israel, have I taken them unto Me.

searchText: numbers 8:17 for all the first-born among the children of israel are mine, both man and beast; on the day that i smote all the first-born in the land of egypt i sanctified them for myself.
english: For all the first-born among the children of Israel are Mine, both man and beast; on the day that I smote all the first-born in the land of Egypt I sanctified them for Myself.

searchText: numbers 8:18 and i have taken the levites instead of all the first-born among the children of israel.
english: And I have taken the Levites instead of all the first-born among the children of Israel.

searchText: numbers 8:19 and i have given the levites— they are given to aaron and to his sons from among the children of israel, to do the service of the children of israel in the tent of meeting, and to make atonement for the children of israel, that there be no plague among the children of israel, through the children of israel coming nigh unto the sanctuary.’
english: And I have given the Levites— they are given to Aaron and to his sons from among the children of Israel, to do the service of the children of Israel in the tent of meeting, and to make atonement for the children of Israel, that there be no plague among the children of Israel, through the children of Israel coming nigh unto the sanctuary.’

searchText: numbers 8:20 thus did moses, and aaron, and all the congregation of the children of israel, unto the levites; according unto all that the lord commanded moses touching the levites, so did the children of israel unto them.
english: Thus did Moses, and Aaron, and all the congregation of the children of Israel, unto the Levites; according unto all that the LORD commanded Moses touching the Levites, so did the children of Israel unto them.

searchText: numbers 8:21 and the levites purified themselves, and they washed their clothes; and aaron offered them for a sacred gift before the lord; and aaron made atonement for them to cleanse them.
english: And the Levites purified themselves, and they washed their clothes; and Aaron offered them for a sacred gift before the LORD; and Aaron made atonement for them to cleanse them.

searchText: numbers 8:22 and after that went the levites in to do their service in the tent of meeting before aaron, and before his sons; as the lord had commanded moses concerning the levites, so did they unto them.
english: And after that went the Levites in to do their service in the tent of meeting before Aaron, and before his sons; as the LORD had commanded Moses concerning the Levites, so did they unto them.

searchText: numbers 8:23 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 8:24 ’this is that which pertaineth unto the levites: from twenty and five years old and upward they shall go in to perform the service in the work of the tent of meeting;
english: ’This is that which pertaineth unto the Levites: from twenty and five years old and upward they shall go in to perform the service in the work of the tent of meeting;

searchText: numbers 8:25 and from the age of fifty years they shall return from the service of the work, and shall serve no more;
english: and from the age of fifty years they shall return from the service of the work, and shall serve no more;

searchText: numbers 8:26 but shall minister with their brethren in the tent of meeting, to keep the charge, but they shall do no manner of service. thus shalt thou do unto the levites touching their charges.’
english: but shall minister with their brethren in the tent of meeting, to keep the charge, but they shall do no manner of service. Thus shalt thou do unto the Levites touching their charges.’

searchText: numbers 9:1 and the lord spoke unto moses in the wilderness of sinai, in the first month of the second year after they were come out of the land of egypt, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses in the wilderness of Sinai, in the first month of the second year after they were come out of the land of Egypt, saying:

searchText: numbers 9:2 ’let the children of israel keep the passover in its appointed season.
english: ’Let the children of Israel keep the passover in its appointed season.

searchText: numbers 9:3 in the fourteenth day of this month, at dusk, ye shall keep it in its appointed season; according to all the statutes of it, and according to all the ordinances thereof, shall ye keep it.’
english: In the fourteenth day of this month, at dusk, ye shall keep it in its appointed season; according to all the statutes of it, and according to all the ordinances thereof, shall ye keep it.’

searchText: numbers 9:4 and moses spoke unto the children of israel, that they should keep the passover.
english: And Moses spoke unto the children of Israel, that they should keep the passover.

searchText: numbers 9:5 and they kept the passover in the first month, on the fourteenth day of the month, at dusk, in the wilderness of sinai; according to all that the lord commanded moses, so did the children of israel.
english: And they kept the passover in the first month, on the fourteenth day of the month, at dusk, in the wilderness of Sinai; according to all that the LORD commanded Moses, so did the children of Israel.

searchText: numbers 9:6 but there were certain men, who were unclean by the dead body of a man, so that they could not keep the passover on that day; and they came before moses and before aaron on that day.
english: But there were certain men, who were unclean by the dead body of a man, so that they could not keep the passover on that day; and they came before Moses and before Aaron on that day.

searchText: numbers 9:7 and those men said unto him: ‘we are unclean by the dead body of a man; wherefore are we to be kept back, so as not to bring the offering of the lord in its appointed season among the children of israel?’
english: And those men said unto him: ‘We are unclean by the dead body of a man; wherefore are we to be kept back, so as not to bring the offering of the LORD in its appointed season among the children of Israel?’

searchText: numbers 9:8 and moses said unto them: ‘stay ye, that i may hear what the lord will command concerning you.’
english: And Moses said unto them: ‘Stay ye, that I may hear what the LORD will command concerning you.’

searchText: numbers 9:9 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 9:10 ’speak unto the children of israel, saying: if any man of you or of your generations shall be unclean by reason of a dead body, or be in a journey afar off, yet he shall keep the passover unto the lord;
english: ’Speak unto the children of Israel, saying: If any man of you or of your generations shall be unclean by reason of a dead body, or be in a journey afar off, yet he shall keep the passover unto the LORD;

searchText: numbers 9:11 in the second month on the fourteenth day at dusk they shall keep it; they shall eat it with unleavened bread and bitter herbs;
english: in the second month on the fourteenth day at dusk they shall keep it; they shall eat it with unleavened bread and bitter herbs;

searchText: numbers 9:12 they shall leave none of it unto the morning, nor break a bone thereof; according to all the statute of the passover they shall keep it.
english: they shall leave none of it unto the morning, nor break a bone thereof; according to all the statute of the passover they shall keep it.

searchText: numbers 9:13 but the man that is clean, and is not on a journey, and forbeareth to keep the passover, that soul shall be cut off from his people; because he brought not the offering of the lord in its appointed season, that man shall bear his sin.
english: But the man that is clean, and is not on a journey, and forbeareth to keep the passover, that soul shall be cut off from his people; because he brought not the offering of the LORD in its appointed season, that man shall bear his sin.

searchText: numbers 9:14 and if a stranger shall sojourn among you, and will keep the passover unto the lord: according to the statute of the passover, and according to the ordinance thereof, so shall he do; ye shall have one statute, both for the stranger, and for him that is born in the land.’
english: And if a stranger shall sojourn among you, and will keep the passover unto the LORD: according to the statute of the passover, and according to the ordinance thereof, so shall he do; ye shall have one statute, both for the stranger, and for him that is born in the land.’

searchText: numbers 9:15 and on the day that the tabernacle was reared up the cloud covered the tabernacle, even the tent of the testimony; and at even there was upon the tabernacle as it were the appearance of fire, until morning.
english: And on the day that the tabernacle was reared up the cloud covered the tabernacle, even the tent of the testimony; and at even there was upon the tabernacle as it were the appearance of fire, until morning.

searchText: numbers 9:16 so it was alway: the cloud covered it, and the appearance of fire by night.
english: So it was alway: the cloud covered it, and the appearance of fire by night.

searchText: numbers 9:17 and whenever the cloud was taken up from over the tent, then after that the children of israel journeyed; and in the place where the cloud abode, there the children of israel encamped.
english: And whenever the cloud was taken up from over the Tent, then after that the children of Israel journeyed; and in the place where the cloud abode, there the children of Israel encamped.

searchText: numbers 9:18 at the commandment of the lord the children of israel journeyed, and at the commandment of the lord they encamped: as long as the cloud abode upon the tabernacle they remained encamped.
english: At the commandment of the LORD the children of Israel journeyed, and at the commandment of the LORD they encamped: as long as the cloud abode upon the tabernacle they remained encamped.

searchText: numbers 9:19 and when the cloud tarried upon the tabernacle many days, then the children of israel kept the charge of the lord, and journeyed not.
english: And when the cloud tarried upon the tabernacle many days, then the children of Israel kept the charge of the LORD, and journeyed not.

searchText: numbers 9:20 and sometimes the cloud was a few days upon the tabernacle; according to the commandment of the lord they remained encamped, and according to the commandment of the lord they journeyed.
english: And sometimes the cloud was a few days upon the tabernacle; according to the commandment of the LORD they remained encamped, and according to the commandment of the LORD they journeyed.

searchText: numbers 9:21 and sometimes the cloud was from evening until morning; and when the cloud was taken up in the morning, they journeyed; or if it continued by day and by night, when the cloud was taken up, they journeyed.
english: And sometimes the cloud was from evening until morning; and when the cloud was taken up in the morning, they journeyed; or if it continued by day and by night, when the cloud was taken up, they journeyed.

searchText: numbers 9:22 whether it were two days, or a month, or a year, that the cloud tarried upon the tabernacle, abiding thereon, the children of israel remained encamped, and journeyed not; but when it was taken up, they journeyed.
english: Whether it were two days, or a month, or a year, that the cloud tarried upon the tabernacle, abiding thereon, the children of Israel remained encamped, and journeyed not; but when it was taken up, they journeyed.

searchText: numbers 9:23 at the commandment of the lord they encamped, and at the commandment of the lord they journeyed; they kept the charge of the lord, at the commandment of the lord by the hand of moses.
english: At the commandment of the LORD they encamped, and at the commandment of the LORD they journeyed; they kept the charge of the LORD, at the commandment of the LORD by the hand of Moses.

searchText: numbers 10:1 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 10:2 ’make thee two trumpets of silver; of beaten work shalt thou make them; and they shall be unto thee for the calling of the congregation, and for causing the camps to set forward.
english: ’Make thee two trumpets of silver; of beaten work shalt thou make them; and they shall be unto thee for the calling of the congregation, and for causing the camps to set forward.

searchText: numbers 10:3 and when they shall blow with them, all the congregation shall gather themselves unto thee at the door of the tent of meeting.
english: And when they shall blow with them, all the congregation shall gather themselves unto thee at the door of the tent of meeting.

searchText: numbers 10:4 and if they blow but with one, then the princes, the heads of the thousands of israel, shall gather themselves unto thee.
english: And if they blow but with one, then the princes, the heads of the thousands of Israel, shall gather themselves unto thee.

searchText: numbers 10:5 and when ye blow an alarm, the camps that lie on the east side shall take their journey.
english: And when ye blow an alarm, the camps that lie on the east side shall take their journey.

searchText: numbers 10:6 and when ye blow an alarm the second time, the camps that lie on the south side shall set forward; they shall blow an alarm for their journeys.
english: And when ye blow an alarm the second time, the camps that lie on the south side shall set forward; they shall blow an alarm for their journeys.

searchText: numbers 10:7 but when the assembly is to be gathered together, ye shall blow, but ye shall not sound an alarm.
english: But when the assembly is to be gathered together, ye shall blow, but ye shall not sound an alarm.

searchText: numbers 10:8 and the sons of aaron, the priests, shall blow with the trumpets; and they shall be to you for a statute for ever throughout your generations.
english: And the sons of Aaron, the priests, shall blow with the trumpets; and they shall be to you for a statute for ever throughout your generations.

searchText: numbers 10:9 and when ye go to war in your land against the adversary that oppresseth you, then ye shall sound an alarm with the trumpets; and ye shall be remembered before the lord your god, and ye shall be saved from your enemies.
english: And when ye go to war in your land against the adversary that oppresseth you, then ye shall sound an alarm with the trumpets; and ye shall be remembered before the LORD your God, and ye shall be saved from your enemies.

searchText: numbers 10:10 also in the day of your gladness, and in your appointed seasons, and in your new moons, ye shall blow with the trumpets over your burnt-offerings, and over the sacrifices of your peace-offerings; and they shall be to you for a memorial before your god: i am the lord your god.’
english: Also in the day of your gladness, and in your appointed seasons, and in your new moons, ye shall blow with the trumpets over your burnt-offerings, and over the sacrifices of your peace-offerings; and they shall be to you for a memorial before your God: I am the LORD your God.’

searchText: numbers 10:11 and it came to pass in the second year, in the second month, on the twentieth day of the month, that the cloud was taken up from over the tabernacle of the testimony.
english: And it came to pass in the second year, in the second month, on the twentieth day of the month, that the cloud was taken up from over the tabernacle of the testimony.

searchText: numbers 10:12 and the children of israel set forward by their stages out of the wilderness of sinai; and the cloud abode in the wilderness of paran.—
english: And the children of Israel set forward by their stages out of the wilderness of Sinai; and the cloud abode in the wilderness of Paran.—

searchText: numbers 10:13 and they took their first journey, according to the commandment of the lord by the hand of moses.
english: And they took their first journey, according to the commandment of the LORD by the hand of Moses.

searchText: numbers 10:14 and in the first place the standard of the camp of the children of judah set forward according to their hosts; and over his host was nahshon the son of amminadab.
english: And in the first place the standard of the camp of the children of Judah set forward according to their hosts; and over his host was Nahshon the son of Amminadab.

searchText: numbers 10:15 and over the host of the tribe of the children of issachar was nethanel the son of zuar.
english: And over the host of the tribe of the children of Issachar was Nethanel the son of Zuar.

searchText: numbers 10:16 and over the host of the tribe of the children of zebulun was eliab the son of helon.
english: And over the host of the tribe of the children of Zebulun was Eliab the son of Helon.

searchText: numbers 10:17 and the tabernacle was taken down; and the sons of gershon and the sons of merari, who bore the tabernacle, set forward.
english: And the tabernacle was taken down; and the sons of Gershon and the sons of Merari, who bore the tabernacle, set forward.

searchText: numbers 10:18 and the standard of the camp of reuben set forward according to their hosts; and over his host was elizur the son of shedeur.
english: And the standard of the camp of Reuben set forward according to their hosts; and over his host was Elizur the son of Shedeur.

searchText: numbers 10:19 and over the host of the tribe of the children of simeon was shelumiel the son of zurishaddai.
english: And over the host of the tribe of the children of Simeon was Shelumiel the son of Zurishaddai.

searchText: numbers 10:20 and over the host of the tribe of the children of gad was eliasaph the son of deuel.
english: And over the host of the tribe of the children of Gad was Eliasaph the son of Deuel.

searchText: numbers 10:21 and the kohathites the bearers of the sanctuary set forward, that the tabernacle might be set up against their coming.
english: And the Kohathites the bearers of the sanctuary set forward, that the tabernacle might be set up against their coming.

searchText: numbers 10:22 and the standard of the camp of the children of ephraim set forward according to their hosts; and over his host was elishama the son of ammihud.
english: And the standard of the camp of the children of Ephraim set forward according to their hosts; and over his host was Elishama the son of Ammihud.

searchText: numbers 10:23 and over the host of the tribe of the children of manasseh was gamaliel the son of pedahzur.
english: And over the host of the tribe of the children of Manasseh was Gamaliel the son of Pedahzur.

searchText: numbers 10:24 and over the host of the tribe of the children of benjamin was abidan the son of gideoni.
english: And over the host of the tribe of the children of Benjamin was Abidan the son of Gideoni.

searchText: numbers 10:25 and the standard of the camp of the children of dan, which was the rearward of all the camps, set forward according to their hosts; and over his host was ahiezer the son of ammishaddai.
english: And the standard of the camp of the children of Dan, which was the rearward of all the camps, set forward according to their hosts; and over his host was Ahiezer the son of Ammishaddai.

searchText: numbers 10:26 and over the host of the tribe of the children of asher was pagiel the son of ochran.
english: And over the host of the tribe of the children of Asher was Pagiel the son of Ochran.

searchText: numbers 10:27 and over the host of the tribe of the children of naphtali was ahira the son of enan.
english: And over the host of the tribe of the children of Naphtali was Ahira the son of Enan.

searchText: numbers 10:28 thus were the journeyings of the children of israel according to their hosts.—and they set forward.
english: Thus were the journeyings of the children of Israel according to their hosts.—And they set forward.

searchText: numbers 10:29 and moses said unto hobab, the son of reuel the midianite, moses’father-in-law: ‘we are journeying unto the place of which the lord said: i will give it you; come thou with us, and we will do thee good; for the lord hath spoken good concerning israel.’
english: And Moses said unto Hobab, the son of Reuel the Midianite, Moses’father-in-law: ‘We are journeying unto the place of which the LORD said: I will give it you; come thou with us, and we will do thee good; for the LORD hath spoken good concerning Israel.’

searchText: numbers 10:30 and he said unto him: ‘i will not go; but i will depart to mine own land, and to my kindred.’
english: And he said unto him: ‘I will not go; but I will depart to mine own land, and to my kindred.’

searchText: numbers 10:31 and he said: ‘leave us not, i pray thee; forasmuch as thou knowest how we are to encamp in the wilderness, and thou shalt be to us instead of eyes.
english: And he said: ‘Leave us not, I pray thee; forasmuch as thou knowest how we are to encamp in the wilderness, and thou shalt be to us instead of eyes.

searchText: numbers 10:32 and it shall be, if thou go with us, yea, it shall be, that what good soever the lord shall do unto us, the same will we do unto thee.’
english: And it shall be, if thou go with us, yea, it shall be, that what good soever the LORD shall do unto us, the same will we do unto thee.’

searchText: numbers 10:33 and they set forward from the mount of the lord three days’journey; and the ark of the covenant of the lord went before them three days’journey, to seek out a resting-place for them.
english: And they set forward from the mount of the LORD three days’journey; and the ark of the covenant of the LORD went before them three days’journey, to seek out a resting-place for them.

searchText: numbers 10:34 and the cloud of the lord was over them by day, when they set forward from the camp.
english: And the cloud of the LORD was over them by day, when they set forward from the camp.

searchText: numbers 10:35 and it came to pass, when the ark set forward, that moses said: ‘rise up, o lord, and let thine enemies be scattered; and let them that hate thee flee before thee.’
english: And it came to pass, when the ark set forward, that Moses said: ‘Rise up, O LORD, and let Thine enemies be scattered; and let them that hate Thee flee before Thee.’

searchText: numbers 10:36 and when it rested, he said: ‘return, o lord, unto the ten thousands of the families of israel.’
english: And when it rested, he said: ‘Return, O LORD, unto the ten thousands of the families of Israel.’

searchText: numbers 11:1 and the people were as murmurers, speaking evil in the ears of the lord; and when the lord heard it, his anger was kindled; and the fire of the lord burnt among them, and devoured in the uttermost part of the camp.
english: And the people were as murmurers, speaking evil in the ears of the LORD; and when the LORD heard it, His anger was kindled; and the fire of the LORD burnt among them, and devoured in the uttermost part of the camp.

searchText: numbers 11:2 and the people cried unto moses; and moses prayed unto the lord, and the fire abated.
english: And the people cried unto Moses; and Moses prayed unto the LORD, and the fire abated.

searchText: numbers 11:3 and the name of that place was called taberah, because the fire of the lord burnt among them.
english: And the name of that place was called Taberah, because the fire of the LORD burnt among them.

searchText: numbers 11:4 and the mixed multitude that was among them fell a lusting; and the children of israel also wept on their part, and said: ‘would that we were given flesh to eat!
english: And the mixed multitude that was among them fell a lusting; and the children of Israel also wept on their part, and said: ‘Would that we were given flesh to eat!

searchText: numbers 11:5 we remember the fish, which we were wont to eat in egypt for nought; the cucumbers, and the melons, and the leeks, and the onions, and the garlic;
english: We remember the fish, which we were wont to eat in Egypt for nought; the cucumbers, and the melons, and the leeks, and the onions, and the garlic;

searchText: numbers 11:6 but now our soul is dried away; there is nothing at all; we have nought save this manna to look to.’—
english: but now our soul is dried away; there is nothing at all; we have nought save this manna to look to.’—

searchText: numbers 11:7 now the manna was like coriander seed, and the appearance thereof as the appearance of bdellium.
english: Now the manna was like coriander seed, and the appearance thereof as the appearance of bdellium.

searchText: numbers 11:8 the people went about, and gathered it, and ground it in mills, or beat it in mortars, and seethed it in pots, and made cakes of it; and the taste of it was as the taste of a cake baked with oil.
english: The people went about, and gathered it, and ground it in mills, or beat it in mortars, and seethed it in pots, and made cakes of it; and the taste of it was as the taste of a cake baked with oil.

searchText: numbers 11:9 and when the dew fell upon the camp in the night, the manna fell upon it.—
english: And when the dew fell upon the camp in the night, the manna fell upon it.—

searchText: numbers 11:10 and moses heard the people weeping, family by family, every man at the door of his tent; and the anger of the lord was kindled greatly; and moses was displeased.
english: And Moses heard the people weeping, family by family, every man at the door of his tent; and the anger of the LORD was kindled greatly; and Moses was displeased.

searchText: numbers 11:11 and moses said unto the lord: ‘wherefore hast thou dealt ill with thy servant? and wherefore have i not found favour in thy sight, that thou layest the burden of all this people upon me?
english: And Moses said unto the LORD: ‘Wherefore hast Thou dealt ill with Thy servant? and wherefore have I not found favour in Thy sight, that Thou layest the burden of all this people upon me?

searchText: numbers 11:12 have i conceived all this people? have i brought them forth, that thou shouldest say unto me: carry them in thy bosom, as a nursing-father carrieth the sucking child, unto the land which thou didst swear unto their fathers?
english: Have I conceived all this people? have I brought them forth, that Thou shouldest say unto me: Carry them in thy bosom, as a nursing-father carrieth the sucking child, unto the land which Thou didst swear unto their fathers?

searchText: numbers 11:13 whence should i have flesh to give unto all this people? for they trouble me with their weeping, saying: give us flesh, that we may eat.
english: Whence should I have flesh to give unto all this people? for they trouble me with their weeping, saying: Give us flesh, that we may eat.

searchText: numbers 11:14 i am not able to bear all this people myself alone, because it is too heavy for me.
english: I am not able to bear all this people myself alone, because it is too heavy for me.

searchText: numbers 11:15 and if thou deal thus with me, kill me, i pray thee, out of hand, if i have found favour in thy sight; and let me not look upon my wretchedness.’
english: And if Thou deal thus with me, kill me, I pray Thee, out of hand, if I have found favour in Thy sight; and let me not look upon my wretchedness.’

searchText: numbers 11:16 and the lord said unto moses: ‘gather unto me seventy men of the elders of israel, whom thou knowest to be the elders of the people, and officers over them; and bring them unto the tent of meeting, that they may stand there with thee.
english: And the LORD said unto Moses: ‘Gather unto Me seventy men of the elders of Israel, whom thou knowest to be the elders of the people, and officers over them; and bring them unto the tent of meeting, that they may stand there with thee.

searchText: numbers 11:17 and i will come down and speak with thee there; and i will take of the spirit which is upon thee, and will put it upon them; and they shall bear the burden of the people with thee, that thou bear it not thyself alone.
english: And I will come down and speak with thee there; and I will take of the spirit which is upon thee, and will put it upon them; and they shall bear the burden of the people with thee, that thou bear it not thyself alone.

searchText: numbers 11:18 and say thou unto the people: sanctify yourselves against to-morrow, and ye shall eat flesh; for ye have wept in the ears of the lord, saying: would that we were given flesh to eat! for it was well with us in egypt; therefore the lord will give you flesh, and ye shall eat.
english: And say thou unto the people: Sanctify yourselves against to-morrow, and ye shall eat flesh; for ye have wept in the ears of the LORD, saying: Would that we were given flesh to eat! for it was well with us in Egypt; therefore the LORD will give you flesh, and ye shall eat.

searchText: numbers 11:19 ye shall not eat one day, nor two days, nor five days, neither ten days, nor twenty days;
english: Ye shall not eat one day, nor two days, nor five days, neither ten days, nor twenty days;

searchText: numbers 11:20 but a whole month, until it come out at your nostrils, and it be loathsome unto you; because that ye have rejected the lord who is among you, and have troubled him with weeping, saying: why, now, came we forth out of egypt?’
english: but a whole month, until it come out at your nostrils, and it be loathsome unto you; because that ye have rejected the LORD who is among you, and have troubled Him with weeping, saying: Why, now, came we forth out of Egypt?’

searchText: numbers 11:21 and moses said: ‘the people, among whom i am, are six hundred thousand men on foot; and yet thou hast said: i will give them flesh, that they may eat a whole month!
english: And Moses said: ‘The people, among whom I am, are six hundred thousand men on foot; and yet Thou hast said: I will give them flesh, that they may eat a whole month!

searchText: numbers 11:22 if flocks and herds be slain for them, will they suffice them? or if all the fish of the sea be gathered together for them, will they suffice them?’
english: If flocks and herds be slain for them, will they suffice them? or if all the fish of the sea be gathered together for them, will they suffice them?’

searchText: numbers 11:23 and the lord said unto moses: ‘is the lord’s hand waxed short? now shalt thou see whether my word shall come to pass unto thee or not.’
english: And the LORD said unto Moses: ‘Is the LORD’S hand waxed short? now shalt thou see whether My word shall come to pass unto thee or not.’

searchText: numbers 11:24 and moses went out, and told the people the words of the lord; and he gathered seventy men of the elders of the people, and set them round about the tent.
english: And Moses went out, and told the people the words of the LORD; and he gathered seventy men of the elders of the people, and set them round about the Tent.

searchText: numbers 11:25 and the lord came down in the cloud, and spoke unto him, and took of the spirit that was upon him, and put it upon the seventy elders; and it came to pass, that, when the spirit rested upon them, they prophesied, but they did so no more.
english: And the LORD came down in the cloud, and spoke unto him, and took of the spirit that was upon him, and put it upon the seventy elders; and it came to pass, that, when the spirit rested upon them, they prophesied, but they did so no more.

searchText: numbers 11:26 but there remained two men in the camp, the name of the one was eldad, and the name of the other medad; and the spirit rested upon them; and they were of them that were recorded, but had not gone out unto the tent; and they prophesied in the camp.
english: But there remained two men in the camp, the name of the one was Eldad, and the name of the other Medad; and the spirit rested upon them; and they were of them that were recorded, but had not gone out unto the Tent; and they prophesied in the camp.

searchText: numbers 11:27 and there ran a young man, and told moses, and said: ‘eldad and medad are prophesying in the camp.’
english: And there ran a young man, and told Moses, and said: ‘Eldad and Medad are prophesying in the camp.’

searchText: numbers 11:28 and joshua the son of nun, the minister of moses from his youth up, answered and said: ‘my lord moses, shut them in.’
english: And Joshua the son of Nun, the minister of Moses from his youth up, answered and said: ‘My lord Moses, shut them in.’

searchText: numbers 11:29 and moses said unto him: ‘art thou jealous for my sake? would that all the lord’s people were prophets, that the lord would put his spirit upon them! ’
english: And Moses said unto him: ‘Art thou jealous for my sake? would that all the LORD’S people were prophets, that the LORD would put His spirit upon them! ’

searchText: numbers 11:30 and moses withdrew into the camp, he and the elders of israel.
english: And Moses withdrew into the camp, he and the elders of Israel.

searchText: numbers 11:31 and there went forth a wind from the lord, and brought across quails from the sea, and let them fall by the camp, about a day’s journey on this side, and a day’s journey on the other side, round about the camp, and about two cubits above the face of the earth.
english: And there went forth a wind from the LORD, and brought across quails from the sea, and let them fall by the camp, about a day’s journey on this side, and a day’s journey on the other side, round about the camp, and about two cubits above the face of the earth.

searchText: numbers 11:32 and the people rose up all that day, and all the night, and all the next day, and gathered the quails; he that gathered least gathered ten heaps; and they spread them all abroad for themselves round about the camp.
english: And the people rose up all that day, and all the night, and all the next day, and gathered the quails; he that gathered least gathered ten heaps; and they spread them all abroad for themselves round about the camp.

searchText: numbers 11:33 while the flesh was yet between their teeth, ere it was chewed, the anger of the lord was kindled against the people, and the lord smote the people with a very great plague.
english: While the flesh was yet between their teeth, ere it was chewed, the anger of the LORD was kindled against the people, and the LORD smote the people with a very great plague.

searchText: numbers 11:34 and the name of that place was called kibroth-hattaavah, because there they buried the people that lusted.
english: And the name of that place was called Kibroth-hattaavah, because there they buried the people that lusted.

searchText: numbers 11:35 from kibroth-hattaavah the people journeyed unto hazeroth; and they abode at hazeroth.
english: From Kibroth-hattaavah the people journeyed unto Hazeroth; and they abode at Hazeroth.

searchText: numbers 12:1 and miriam and aaron spoke against moses because of the cushite woman whom he had married; for he had married a cushite woman.
english: And Miriam and Aaron spoke against Moses because of the Cushite woman whom he had married; for he had married a Cushite woman.

searchText: numbers 12:2 and they said: ‘hath the lord indeed spoken only with moses? hath he not spoken also with us?’ and the lord heard it.—
english: And they said: ‘Hath the LORD indeed spoken only with Moses? hath He not spoken also with us?’ And the LORD heard it.—

searchText: numbers 12:3 now the man moses was very meek, above all the men that were upon the face of the earth.—
english: Now the man Moses was very meek, above all the men that were upon the face of the earth.—

searchText: numbers 12:4 and the lord spoke suddenly unto moses, and unto aaron, and unto miriam: ‘come out ye three unto the tent of meeting.’ and they three came out.
english: And the LORD spoke suddenly unto Moses, and unto Aaron, and unto Miriam: ‘Come out ye three unto the tent of meeting.’ And they three came out.

searchText: numbers 12:5 and the lord came down in a pillar of cloud, and stood at the door of the tent, and called aaron and miriam; and they both came forth.
english: And the LORD came down in a pillar of cloud, and stood at the door of the Tent, and called Aaron and Miriam; and they both came forth.

searchText: numbers 12:6 and he said: ‘hear now my words: if there be a prophet among you, i the lord do make myself known unto him in a vision, i do speak with him in a dream.
english: And He said: ‘Hear now My words: if there be a prophet among you, I the LORD do make Myself known unto him in a vision, I do speak with him in a dream.

searchText: numbers 12:7 my servant moses is not so; he is trusted in all my house;
english: My servant Moses is not so; he is trusted in all My house;

searchText: numbers 12:8 with him do i speak mouth to mouth, even manifestly, and not in dark speeches; and the similitude of the lord doth he behold; wherefore then were ye not afraid to speak against my servant, against moses?’
english: with him do I speak mouth to mouth, even manifestly, and not in dark speeches; and the similitude of the LORD doth he behold; wherefore then were ye not afraid to speak against My servant, against Moses?’

searchText: numbers 12:9 and the anger of the lord was kindled against them; and he departed.
english: And the anger of the LORD was kindled against them; and He departed.

searchText: numbers 12:10 and when the cloud was removed from over the tent, behold, miriam was leprous, as white as snow; and aaron looked upon miriam; and, behold, she was leprous.
english: And when the cloud was removed from over the Tent, behold, Miriam was leprous, as white as snow; and Aaron looked upon Miriam; and, behold, she was leprous.

searchText: numbers 12:11 and aaron said unto moses: ‘oh my lord, lay not, i pray thee, sin upon us, for that we have done foolishly, and for that we have sinned.
english: And Aaron said unto Moses: ‘Oh my lord, lay not, I pray thee, sin upon us, for that we have done foolishly, and for that we have sinned.

searchText: numbers 12:12 let her not, i pray, be as one dead, of whom the flesh is half consumed when he cometh out of his mother’s womb.’
english: Let her not, I pray, be as one dead, of whom the flesh is half consumed when he cometh out of his mother’s womb.’

searchText: numbers 12:13 and moses cried unto the lord, saying: ‘heal her now, o god, i beseech thee.’
english: And Moses cried unto the LORD, saying: ‘Heal her now, O God, I beseech Thee.’

searchText: numbers 12:14 and the lord said unto moses: ‘if her father had but spit in her face, should she not hide in shame seven days? let her be shut up without the camp seven days, and after that she shall be brought in again.’
english: And the LORD said unto Moses: ‘If her father had but spit in her face, should she not hide in shame seven days? let her be shut up without the camp seven days, and after that she shall be brought in again.’

searchText: numbers 12:15 and miriam was shut up without the camp seven days; and the people journeyed not till miriam was brought in again.
english: And Miriam was shut up without the camp seven days; and the people journeyed not till Miriam was brought in again.

searchText: numbers 12:16 and afterward the people journeyed from hazeroth, and pitched in the wilderness of paran.
english: And afterward the people journeyed from Hazeroth, and pitched in the wilderness of Paran.

searchText: numbers 13:1 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 13:2 ’send thou men, that they may spy out the land of canaan, which i give unto the children of israel; of every tribe of their fathers shall ye send a man, every one a prince among them.’
english: ’Send thou men, that they may spy out the land of Canaan, which I give unto the children of Israel; of every tribe of their fathers shall ye send a man, every one a prince among them.’

searchText: numbers 13:3 and moses sent them from the wilderness of paran according to the commandment of the lord; all of them men who were heads of the children of israel.
english: And Moses sent them from the wilderness of Paran according to the commandment of the LORD; all of them men who were heads of the children of Israel.

searchText: numbers 13:4 and these were their names: of the tribe of reuben, shammua the son of zaccur.
english: And these were their names: of the tribe of Reuben, Shammua the son of Zaccur.

searchText: numbers 13:5 of the tribe of simeon, shaphat the son of hori.
english: Of the tribe of Simeon, Shaphat the son of Hori.

searchText: numbers 13:6 of the tribe of judah, caleb the son of jephunneh.
english: Of the tribe of Judah, Caleb the son of Jephunneh.

searchText: numbers 13:7 of the tribe of issachar, igal the son of joseph.
english: Of the tribe of Issachar, Igal the son of Joseph.

searchText: numbers 13:8 of the tribe of ephraim, hoshea the son of nun.
english: Of the tribe of Ephraim, Hoshea the son of Nun.

searchText: numbers 13:9 of the tribe of benjamin, palti the son of raphu.
english: Of the tribe of Benjamin, Palti the son of Raphu.

searchText: numbers 13:10 of the tribe of zebulun, gaddiel the son of sodi.
english: Of the tribe of Zebulun, Gaddiel the son of Sodi.

searchText: numbers 13:11 of the tribe of joseph, namely, of the tribe of manasseh, gaddi the son of susi.
english: Of the tribe of Joseph, namely, of the tribe of Manasseh, Gaddi the son of Susi.

searchText: numbers 13:12 of the tribe of dan, ammiel the son of gemalli.
english: Of the tribe of Dan, Ammiel the son of Gemalli.

searchText: numbers 13:13 of the tribe of asher, sethur the son of michael.
english: Of the tribe of Asher, Sethur the son of Michael.

searchText: numbers 13:14 of the tribe of naphtali, nahbi the son of vophsi.
english: Of the tribe of Naphtali, Nahbi the son of Vophsi.

searchText: numbers 13:15 of the tribe of gad, geuel the son of machi.
english: Of the tribe of Gad, Geuel the son of Machi.

searchText: numbers 13:16 these are the names of the men that moses sent to spy out the land. and moses called hoshea the son of nun joshua.
english: These are the names of the men that Moses sent to spy out the land. And Moses called Hoshea the son of Nun Joshua.

searchText: numbers 13:17 and moses sent them to spy out the land of canaan, and said unto them: ‘get you up here into the south, and go up into the mountains;
english: And Moses sent them to spy out the land of Canaan, and said unto them: ‘Get you up here into the South, and go up into the mountains;

searchText: numbers 13:18 and see the land, what it is; and the people that dwelleth therein, whether they are strong or weak, whether they are few or many;
english: and see the land, what it is; and the people that dwelleth therein, whether they are strong or weak, whether they are few or many;

searchText: numbers 13:19 and what the land is that they dwell in, whether it is good or bad; and what cities they are that they dwell in, whether in camps, or in strongholds;
english: and what the land is that they dwell in, whether it is good or bad; and what cities they are that they dwell in, whether in camps, or in strongholds;

searchText: numbers 13:20 and what the land is, whether it is fat or lean, whether there is wood therein, or not. and be ye of good courage, and bring of the fruit of the land.’—now the time was the time of the first-ripe grapes.—
english: and what the land is, whether it is fat or lean, whether there is wood therein, or not. And be ye of good courage, and bring of the fruit of the land.’—Now the time was the time of the first-ripe grapes.—

searchText: numbers 13:21 so they went up, and spied out the land from the wilderness of zin unto rehob, at the entrance to hamath.
english: So they went up, and spied out the land from the wilderness of Zin unto Rehob, at the entrance to Hamath.

searchText: numbers 13:22 and they went up into the south, and came unto hebron; and ahiman, sheshai, and talmai, the children of anak, were there.—now hebron was built seven years before zoan in egypt.—
english: And they went up into the South, and came unto Hebron; and Ahiman, Sheshai, and Talmai, the children of Anak, were there.—Now Hebron was built seven years before Zoan in Egypt.—

searchText: numbers 13:23 and they came unto the valley of eshcol, and cut down from thence a branch with one cluster of grapes, and they bore it upon a pole between two; they took also of the pomegranates, and of the figs.—
english: And they came unto the valley of Eshcol, and cut down from thence a branch with one cluster of grapes, and they bore it upon a pole between two; they took also of the pomegranates, and of the figs.—

searchText: numbers 13:24 that place was called the valley of eshcol, because of the cluster which the children of israel cut down from thence.—
english: That place was called the valley of Eshcol, because of the cluster which the children of Israel cut down from thence.—

searchText: numbers 13:25 and they returned from spying out the land at the end of forty days.
english: And they returned from spying out the land at the end of forty days.

searchText: numbers 13:26 and they went and came to moses, and to aaron, and to all the congregation of the children of israel, unto the wilderness of paran, to kadesh; and brought back word unto them, and unto all the congregation, and showed them the fruit of the land.
english: And they went and came to Moses, and to Aaron, and to all the congregation of the children of Israel, unto the wilderness of Paran, to Kadesh; and brought back word unto them, and unto all the congregation, and showed them the fruit of the land.

searchText: numbers 13:27 and they told him, and said: ‘we came unto the land whither thou sentest us, and surely it floweth with milk and honey; and this is the fruit of it.
english: And they told him, and said: ‘We came unto the land whither thou sentest us, and surely it floweth with milk and honey; and this is the fruit of it.

searchText: numbers 13:28 howbeit the people that dwell in the land are fierce, and the cities are fortified, and very great; and moreover we saw the children of anak there.
english: Howbeit the people that dwell in the land are fierce, and the cities are fortified, and very great; and moreover we saw the children of Anak there.

searchText: numbers 13:29 amalek dwelleth in the land of the south; and the hittite, and the jebusite, and the amorite, dwell in the mountains; and the canaanite dwelleth by the sea, and along by the side of the jordan.
english: Amalek dwelleth in the land of the South; and the Hittite, and the Jebusite, and the Amorite, dwell in the mountains; and the Canaanite dwelleth by the sea, and along by the side of the Jordan.

searchText: numbers 13:30 and caleb stilled the people toward moses, and said: ‘we should go up at once, and possess it; for we are well able to overcome it.’
english: And Caleb stilled the people toward Moses, and said: ‘We should go up at once, and possess it; for we are well able to overcome it.’

searchText: numbers 13:31 but the men that went up with him said: ‘we are not able to go up against the people; for they are stronger than we.’
english: But the men that went up with him said: ‘We are not able to go up against the people; for they are stronger than we.’

searchText: numbers 13:32 and they spread an evil report of the land which they had spied out unto the children of israel, saying: ‘the land, through which we have passed to spy it out, is a land that eateth up the inhabitants thereof; and all the people that we saw in it are men of great stature.
english: And they spread an evil report of the land which they had spied out unto the children of Israel, saying: ‘The land, through which we have passed to spy it out, is a land that eateth up the inhabitants thereof; and all the people that we saw in it are men of great stature.

searchText: numbers 13:33 and there we saw the nephilim, the sons of anak, who come of the nephilim; and we were in our own sight as grasshoppers, and so we were in their sight.’
english: And there we saw the Nephilim, the sons of Anak, who come of the Nephilim; and we were in our own sight as grasshoppers, and so we were in their sight.’

searchText: numbers 14:1 and all the congregation lifted up their voice, and cried; and the people wept that night.
english: And all the congregation lifted up their voice, and cried; and the people wept that night.

searchText: numbers 14:2 and all the children of israel murmured against moses and against aaron; and the whole congregation said unto them: ‘would that we had died in the land of egypt! or would we had died in this wilderness!
english: And all the children of Israel murmured against Moses and against Aaron; and the whole congregation said unto them: ‘Would that we had died in the land of Egypt! or would we had died in this wilderness!

searchText: numbers 14:3 and wherefore doth the lord bring us unto this land, to fall by the sword? our wives and our little ones will be a prey; were it not better for us to return into egypt?’
english: And wherefore doth the LORD bring us unto this land, to fall by the sword? Our wives and our little ones will be a prey; were it not better for us to return into Egypt?’

searchText: numbers 14:4 and they said one to another: ‘let us make a captain, and let us return into egypt.’
english: And they said one to another: ‘Let us make a captain, and let us return into Egypt.’

searchText: numbers 14:5 then moses and aaron fell on their faces before all the assembly of the congregation of the children of israel.
english: Then Moses and Aaron fell on their faces before all the assembly of the congregation of the children of Israel.

searchText: numbers 14:6 and joshua the son of nun and caleb the son of jephunneh, who were of them that spied out the land, rent their clothes.
english: And Joshua the son of Nun and Caleb the son of Jephunneh, who were of them that spied out the land, rent their clothes.

searchText: numbers 14:7 and they spoke unto all the congregation of the children of israel, saying: ‘the land, which we passed through to spy it out, is an exceeding good land.
english: And they spoke unto all the congregation of the children of Israel, saying: ‘The land, which we passed through to spy it out, is an exceeding good land.

searchText: numbers 14:8 if the lord delight in us, then he will bring us into this land, and give it unto us—a land which floweth with milk and honey.
english: If the LORD delight in us, then He will bring us into this land, and give it unto us—a land which floweth with milk and honey.

searchText: numbers 14:9 only rebel not against the lord, neither fear ye the people of the land; for they are bread for us; their defence is removed from over them, and the lord is with us; fear them not.’
english: Only rebel not against the LORD, neither fear ye the people of the land; for they are bread for us; their defence is removed from over them, and the LORD is with us; fear them not.’

searchText: numbers 14:10 but all the congregation bade stone them with stones, when the glory of the lord appeared in the tent of meeting unto all the children of israel.
english: But all the congregation bade stone them with stones, when the glory of the LORD appeared in the tent of meeting unto all the children of Israel.

searchText: numbers 14:11 and the lord said unto moses: ‘how long will this people despise me? and how long will they not believe in me, for all the signs which i have wrought among them?
english: And the LORD said unto Moses: ‘How long will this people despise Me? and how long will they not believe in Me, for all the signs which I have wrought among them?

searchText: numbers 14:12 i will smite them with the pestilence, and destroy them, and will make of thee a nation greater and mightier than they.’
english: I will smite them with the pestilence, and destroy them, and will make of thee a nation greater and mightier than they.’

searchText: numbers 14:13 and moses said unto the lord: ‘when the egyptians shall hear—for thou broughtest up this people in thy might from among them—
english: And Moses said unto the LORD: ‘When the Egyptians shall hear—for Thou broughtest up this people in Thy might from among them—

searchText: numbers 14:14 they will say to the inhabitants of this land, who have heard that thou lord art in the midst of this people; inasmuch as thou lord art seen face to face, and thy cloud standeth over them, and thou goest before them, in a pillar of cloud by day, and in a pillar of fire by night;
english: they will say to the inhabitants of this land, who have heard that Thou LORD art in the midst of this people; inasmuch as Thou LORD art seen face to face, and Thy cloud standeth over them, and Thou goest before them, in a pillar of cloud by day, and in a pillar of fire by night;

searchText: numbers 14:15 now if thou shalt kill this people as one man, then the nations which have heard the fame of thee will speak, saying:
english: now if Thou shalt kill this people as one man, then the nations which have heard the fame of Thee will speak, saying:

searchText: numbers 14:16 because the lord was not able to bring this people into the land which he swore unto them, therefore he hath slain them in the wilderness.
english: Because the LORD was not able to bring this people into the land which He swore unto them, therefore He hath slain them in the wilderness.

searchText: numbers 14:17 and now, i pray thee, let the power of the lord be great, according as thou hast spoken, saying:
english: And now, I pray Thee, let the power of the Lord be great, according as Thou hast spoken, saying:

searchText: numbers 14:18 the lord is slow to anger, and plenteous in lovingkindness, forgiving iniquity and transgression, and that will by no means clear the guilty; visiting the iniquity of the fathers upon the children, upon the third and upon the fourth generation.
english: The LORD is slow to anger, and plenteous in lovingkindness, forgiving iniquity and transgression, and that will by no means clear the guilty; visiting the iniquity of the fathers upon the children, upon the third and upon the fourth generation.

searchText: numbers 14:19 pardon, i pray thee, the iniquity of this people according unto the greatness of thy lovingkindness, and according as thou hast forgiven this people, from egypt even until now.’
english: Pardon, I pray Thee, the iniquity of this people according unto the greatness of Thy lovingkindness, and according as Thou hast forgiven this people, from Egypt even until now.’

searchText: numbers 14:20 and the lord said: ‘i have pardoned according to thy word.
english: And the LORD said: ‘I have pardoned according to thy word.

searchText: numbers 14:21 but in very deed, as i live—and all the earth shall be filled with the glory of the lord—
english: But in very deed, as I live—and all the earth shall be filled with the glory of the LORD—

searchText: numbers 14:22 surely all those men that have seen my glory, and my signs, which i wrought in egypt and in the wilderness, yet have put me to proof these ten times, and have not hearkened to my voice;
english: surely all those men that have seen My glory, and My signs, which I wrought in Egypt and in the wilderness, yet have put Me to proof these ten times, and have not hearkened to My voice;

searchText: numbers 14:23 surely they shall not see the land which i swore unto their fathers, neither shall any of them that despised me see it.
english: surely they shall not see the land which I swore unto their fathers, neither shall any of them that despised Me see it.

searchText: numbers 14:24 but my servant caleb, because he had another spirit with him, and hath followed me fully, him will i bring into the land whereinto he went; and his seed shall possess it.
english: But My servant Caleb, because he had another spirit with him, and hath followed Me fully, him will I bring into the land whereinto he went; and his seed shall possess it.

searchText: numbers 14:25 now the amalekite and the canaanite dwell in the vale; tomorrow turn ye, and get you into the wilderness by the way to the red sea.’
english: Now the Amalekite and the Canaanite dwell in the Vale; tomorrow turn ye, and get you into the wilderness by the way to the Red Sea.’

searchText: numbers 14:26 and the lord spoke unto moses and unto aaron, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses and unto Aaron, saying:

searchText: numbers 14:27 ’how long shall i bear with this evil congregation, that keep murmuring against me? i have heard the murmurings of the children of israel, which they keep murmuring against me.
english: ’How long shall I bear with this evil congregation, that keep murmuring against Me? I have heard the murmurings of the children of Israel, which they keep murmuring against Me.

searchText: numbers 14:28 say unto them: as i live, saith the lord, surely as ye have spoken in mine ears, so will i do to you:
english: Say unto them: As I live, saith the LORD, surely as ye have spoken in Mine ears, so will I do to you:

searchText: numbers 14:29 your carcasses shall fall in this wilderness, and all that were numbered of you, according to your whole number, from twenty years old and upward, ye that have murmured against me;
english: your carcasses shall fall in this wilderness, and all that were numbered of you, according to your whole number, from twenty years old and upward, ye that have murmured against Me;

searchText: numbers 14:30 surely ye shall not come into the land, concerning which i lifted up my hand that i would make you dwell therein, save caleb the son of jephunneh, and joshua the son of nun.
english: surely ye shall not come into the land, concerning which I lifted up My hand that I would make you dwell therein, save Caleb the son of Jephunneh, and Joshua the son of Nun.

searchText: numbers 14:31 but your little ones, that ye said would be a prey, them will i bring in, and they shall know the land which ye have rejected.
english: But your little ones, that ye said would be a prey, them will I bring in, and they shall know the land which ye have rejected.

searchText: numbers 14:32 but as for you, your carcasses shall fall in this wilderness.
english: But as for you, your carcasses shall fall in this wilderness.

searchText: numbers 14:33 and your children shall be wanderers in the wilderness forty years, and shall bear your strayings, until your carcasses be consumed in the wilderness.
english: And your children shall be wanderers in the wilderness forty years, and shall bear your strayings, until your carcasses be consumed in the wilderness.

searchText: numbers 14:34 after the number of the days in which ye spied out the land, even forty days, for every day a year, shall ye bear your iniquities, even forty years, and ye shall know my displeasure.
english: After the number of the days in which ye spied out the land, even forty days, for every day a year, shall ye bear your iniquities, even forty years, and ye shall know My displeasure.

searchText: numbers 14:35 i the lord have spoken, surely this will i do unto all this evil congregation, that are gathered together against me; in this wilderness they shall be consumed, and there they shall die.’
english: I the LORD have spoken, surely this will I do unto all this evil congregation, that are gathered together against Me; in this wilderness they shall be consumed, and there they shall die.’

searchText: numbers 14:36 and the men, whom moses sent to spy out the land, and who, when they returned, made all the congregation to murmur against him, by bringing up an evil report against the land,
english: And the men, whom Moses sent to spy out the land, and who, when they returned, made all the congregation to murmur against him, by bringing up an evil report against the land,

searchText: numbers 14:37 even those men that did bring up an evil report of the land, died by the plague before the lord.
english: even those men that did bring up an evil report of the land, died by the plague before the LORD.

searchText: numbers 14:38 but joshua the son of nun, and caleb the son of jephunneh, remained alive of those men that went to spy out the land.
english: But Joshua the son of Nun, and Caleb the son of Jephunneh, remained alive of those men that went to spy out the land.

searchText: numbers 14:39 and moses told these words unto all the children of israel; and the people mourned greatly.
english: And Moses told these words unto all the children of Israel; and the people mourned greatly.

searchText: numbers 14:40 and they rose up early in the morning, and got them up to the top of the mountain, saying: ‘lo, we are here, and will go up unto the place which the lord hath promised; for we have sinned.’
english: And they rose up early in the morning, and got them up to the top of the mountain, saying: ‘Lo, we are here, and will go up unto the place which the LORD hath promised; for we have sinned.’

searchText: numbers 14:41 and moses said: ‘wherefore now do ye transgress the commandment of the lord, seeing it shall not prosper?
english: And Moses said: ‘Wherefore now do ye transgress the commandment of the LORD, seeing it shall not prosper?

searchText: numbers 14:42 go not up, for the lord is not among you; that ye be not smitten down before your enemies.
english: Go not up, for the LORD is not among you; that ye be not smitten down before your enemies.

searchText: numbers 14:43 for there the amalekite and the canaanite are before you, and ye shall fall by the sword; forasmuch as ye are turned back from following the lord, and the lord will not be with you.’
english: For there the Amalekite and the Canaanite are before you, and ye shall fall by the sword; forasmuch as ye are turned back from following the LORD, and the LORD will not be with you.’

searchText: numbers 14:44 but they presumed to go up to the top of the mountain; nevertheless the ark of the covenant of the lord, and moses, departed not out of the camp.
english: But they presumed to go up to the top of the mountain; nevertheless the ark of the covenant of the LORD, and Moses, departed not out of the camp.

searchText: numbers 14:45 then the amalekite and the canaanite, who dwelt in that hill-country, came down, and smote them and beat them down, even unto hormah.
english: Then the Amalekite and the Canaanite, who dwelt in that hill-country, came down, and smote them and beat them down, even unto Hormah.

searchText: numbers 15:1 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 15:2 speak unto the children of israel, and say unto them: when ye are come into the land of your habitations, which i give unto you,
english: Speak unto the children of Israel, and say unto them: When ye are come into the land of your habitations, which I give unto you,

searchText: numbers 15:3 and will make an offering by fire unto the lord, a burnt-offering, or a sacrifice, in fulfilment of a vow clearly uttered, or as a freewill-offering, or in your appointed seasons, to make a sweet savour unto the lord, of the herd, or of the flock;
english: and will make an offering by fire unto the LORD, a burnt-offering, or a sacrifice, in fulfilment of a vow clearly uttered, or as a freewill-offering, or in your appointed seasons, to make a sweet savour unto the LORD, of the herd, or of the flock;

searchText: numbers 15:4 then shall he that bringeth his offering present unto the lord a meal-offering of a tenth part of an ephah of fine flour mingled with the fourth part of a hin of oil;
english: then shall he that bringeth his offering present unto the LORD a meal-offering of a tenth part of an ephah of fine flour mingled with the fourth part of a hin of oil;

searchText: numbers 15:5 and wine for the drink-offering, the fourth part of a hin, shalt thou prepare with the burnt-offering or for the sacrifice, for each lamb.
english: and wine for the drink-offering, the fourth part of a hin, shalt thou prepare with the burnt-offering or for the sacrifice, for each lamb.

searchText: numbers 15:6 or for a ram, thou shalt prepare for a meal-offering two tenth parts of an ephah of fine flour mingled with the third part of a hin of oil;
english: Or for a ram, thou shalt prepare for a meal-offering two tenth parts of an ephah of fine flour mingled with the third part of a hin of oil;

searchText: numbers 15:7 and for the drink-offering thou shalt present the third part of a hin of wine, of a sweet savour unto the lord.
english: and for the drink-offering thou shalt present the third part of a hin of wine, of a sweet savour unto the LORD.

searchText: numbers 15:8 and when thou preparest a bullock for a burnt-offering, or for a sacrifice, in fulfilment of a vow clearly uttered, or for peace-offerings unto the lord;
english: And when thou preparest a bullock for a burnt-offering, or for a sacrifice, in fulfilment of a vow clearly uttered, or for peace-offerings unto the LORD;

searchText: numbers 15:9 then shall there be presented with the bullock a meal-offering of three tenth parts of an ephah of fine flour mingled with half a hin of oil.
english: then shall there be presented with the bullock a meal-offering of three tenth parts of an ephah of fine flour mingled with half a hin of oil.

searchText: numbers 15:10 and thou shalt present for the drink-offering half a hin of wine, for an offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the lord.
english: And thou shalt present for the drink-offering half a hin of wine, for an offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the LORD.

searchText: numbers 15:11 thus shall it be done for each bullock, or for each ram, or for each of the he-lambs, or of the kids.
english: Thus shall it be done for each bullock, or for each ram, or for each of the he-lambs, or of the kids.

searchText: numbers 15:12 according to the number that ye may prepare, so shall ye do for every one according to their number.
english: According to the number that ye may prepare, so shall ye do for every one according to their number.

searchText: numbers 15:13 all that are home-born shall do these things after this manner, in presenting an offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the lord.
english: All that are home-born shall do these things after this manner, in presenting an offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the LORD.

searchText: numbers 15:14 and if a stranger sojourn with you, or whosoever may be among you, throughout your generations, and will offer an offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the lord; as ye do, so he shall do.
english: And if a stranger sojourn with you, or whosoever may be among you, throughout your generations, and will offer an offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the LORD; as ye do, so he shall do.

searchText: numbers 15:15 as for the congregation, there shall be one statute both for you, and for the stranger that sojourneth with you, a statute for ever throughout your generations; as ye are, so shall the stranger be before the lord.
english: As for the congregation, there shall be one statute both for you, and for the stranger that sojourneth with you, a statute for ever throughout your generations; as ye are, so shall the stranger be before the LORD.

searchText: numbers 15:16 one law and one ordinance shall be both for you, and for the stranger that sojourneth with you.
english: One law and one ordinance shall be both for you, and for the stranger that sojourneth with you.

searchText: numbers 15:17 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 15:18 speak unto the children of israel, and say unto them: when ye come into the land whither i bring you,
english: Speak unto the children of Israel, and say unto them: When ye come into the land whither I bring you,

searchText: numbers 15:19 then it shall be, that, when ye eat of the bread of the land, ye shall set apart a portion for a gift unto the lord.
english: then it shall be, that, when ye eat of the bread of the land, ye shall set apart a portion for a gift unto the LORD.

searchText: numbers 15:20 of the first of your dough ye shall set apart a cake for a gift; as that which is set apart of the threshing-floor, so shall ye set it apart.
english: Of the first of your dough ye shall set apart a cake for a gift; as that which is set apart of the threshing-floor, so shall ye set it apart.

searchText: numbers 15:21 of the first of your dough ye shall give unto the lord a portion for a gift throughout your generations.
english: Of the first of your dough ye shall give unto the LORD a portion for a gift throughout your generations.

searchText: numbers 15:22 and when ye shall err, and not observe all these commandments, which the lord hath spoken unto moses,
english: And when ye shall err, and not observe all these commandments, which the LORD hath spoken unto Moses,

searchText: numbers 15:23 even all that the lord hath commanded you by the hand of moses, from the day that the lord gave commandment, and onward throughout your generations;
english: even all that the LORD hath commanded you by the hand of Moses, from the day that the LORD gave commandment, and onward throughout your generations;

searchText: numbers 15:24 then it shall be, if it be done in error by the congregation, it being hid from their eyes, that all the congregation shall offer one young bullock for a burnt-offering, for a sweet savour unto the lord—with the meal-offering thereof, and the drink-offering thereof, according to the ordinance—and one he-goat for a sin-offering.
english: then it shall be, if it be done in error by the congregation, it being hid from their eyes, that all the congregation shall offer one young bullock for a burnt-offering, for a sweet savour unto the LORD—with the meal-offering thereof, and the drink-offering thereof, according to the ordinance—and one he-goat for a sin-offering.

searchText: numbers 15:25 and the priest shall make atonement for all the congregation of the children of israel, and they shall be forgiven; for it was an error, and they have brought their offering, an offering made by fire unto the lord, and their sin-offering before the lord, for their error.
english: And the priest shall make atonement for all the congregation of the children of Israel, and they shall be forgiven; for it was an error, and they have brought their offering, an offering made by fire unto the LORD, and their sin-offering before the LORD, for their error.

searchText: numbers 15:26 and all the congregation of the children of israel shall be forgiven, and the stranger that sojourneth among them; for in respect of all the people it was done in error.
english: And all the congregation of the children of Israel shall be forgiven, and the stranger that sojourneth among them; for in respect of all the people it was done in error.

searchText: numbers 15:27 and if one person sin through error, then he shall offer a she-goat of the first year for a sin-offering.
english: And if one person sin through error, then he shall offer a she-goat of the first year for a sin-offering.

searchText: numbers 15:28 and the priest shall make atonement for the soul that erreth, when he sinneth through error, before the lord, to make atonement for him; and he shall be forgiven,
