english: And the priest shall make atonement for the soul that erreth, when he sinneth through error, before the LORD, to make atonement for him; and he shall be forgiven,

searchText: numbers 15:29 both he that is home-born among the children of israel, and the stranger that sojourneth among them: ye shall have one law for him that doeth aught in error.
english: both he that is home-born among the children of Israel, and the stranger that sojourneth among them: ye shall have one law for him that doeth aught in error.

searchText: numbers 15:30 but the soul that doeth aught with a high hand, whether he be home-born or a stranger, the same blasphemeth the lord; and that soul shall be cut off from among his people.
english: But the soul that doeth aught with a high hand, whether he be home-born or a stranger, the same blasphemeth the LORD; and that soul shall be cut off from among his people.

searchText: numbers 15:31 because he hath despised the word of the lord, and hath broken his commandment; that soul shall utterly be cut off, his iniquity shall be upon him.
english: Because he hath despised the word of the LORD, and hath broken His commandment; that soul shall utterly be cut off, his iniquity shall be upon him.

searchText: numbers 15:32 and while the children of israel were in the wilderness, they found a man gathering sticks upon the sabbath day.
english: And while the children of Israel were in the wilderness, they found a man gathering sticks upon the sabbath day.

searchText: numbers 15:33 and they that found him gathering sticks brought him unto moses and aaron, and unto all the congregation.
english: And they that found him gathering sticks brought him unto Moses and Aaron, and unto all the congregation.

searchText: numbers 15:34 and they put him in ward, because it had not been declared what should be done to him.
english: And they put him in ward, because it had not been declared what should be done to him.

searchText: numbers 15:35 and the lord said unto moses: ‘the man shall surely be put to death; all the congregation shall stone him with stones without the camp.’
english: And the LORD said unto Moses: ‘The man shall surely be put to death; all the congregation shall stone him with stones without the camp.’

searchText: numbers 15:36 and all the congregation brought him without the camp, and stoned him with stones, and he died, as the lord commanded moses.
english: And all the congregation brought him without the camp, and stoned him with stones, and he died, as the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: numbers 15:37 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 15:38 ’speak unto the children of israel, and bid them that they make them throughout their generations fringes in the corners of their garments, and that they put with the fringe of each corner a thread of blue.
english: ’Speak unto the children of Israel, and bid them that they make them throughout their generations fringes in the corners of their garments, and that they put with the fringe of each corner a thread of blue.

searchText: numbers 15:39 and it shall be unto you for a fringe, that ye may look upon it, and remember all the commandments of the lord, and do them; and that ye go not about after your own heart and your own eyes, after which ye use to go astray;
english: And it shall be unto you for a fringe, that ye may look upon it, and remember all the commandments of the LORD, and do them; and that ye go not about after your own heart and your own eyes, after which ye use to go astray;

searchText: numbers 15:40 that ye may remember and do all my commandments, and be holy unto your god.
english: that ye may remember and do all My commandments, and be holy unto your God.

searchText: numbers 15:41 i am the lord your god, who brought you out of the land of egypt, to be your god: i am the lord your god.’
english: I am the LORD your God, who brought you out of the land of Egypt, to be your God: I am the LORD your God.’

searchText: numbers 16:1 now korah, the son of izhar, the son of kohath, the son of levi, with dathan and abiram, the sons of eliab, and on, the son of peleth, sons of reuben, took men;
english: Now Korah, the son of Izhar, the son of Kohath, the son of Levi, with Dathan and Abiram, the sons of Eliab, and On, the son of Peleth, sons of Reuben, took men;

searchText: numbers 16:2 and they rose up in face of moses, with certain of the children of israel, two hundred and fifty men; they were princes of the congregation, the elect men of the assembly, men of renown;
english: and they rose up in face of Moses, with certain of the children of Israel, two hundred and fifty men; they were princes of the congregation, the elect men of the assembly, men of renown;

searchText: numbers 16:3 and they assembled themselves together against moses and against aaron, and said unto them: ‘ye take too much upon you, seeing all the congregation are holy, every one of them, and the lord is among them; wherefore then lift ye up yourselves above the assembly of the lord?’
english: and they assembled themselves together against Moses and against Aaron, and said unto them: ‘Ye take too much upon you, seeing all the congregation are holy, every one of them, and the LORD is among them; wherefore then lift ye up yourselves above the assembly of the LORD?’

searchText: numbers 16:4 and when moses heard it, he fell upon his face.
english: And when Moses heard it, he fell upon his face.

searchText: numbers 16:5 and he spoke unto korah and unto all his company, saying: ‘in the morning the lord will show who are his, and who is holy, and will cause him to come near unto him; even him whom he may choose will he cause to come near unto him. .
english: And he spoke unto Korah and unto all his company, saying: ‘In the morning the LORD will show who are His, and who is holy, and will cause him to come near unto Him; even him whom He may choose will He cause to come near unto Him. .

searchText: numbers 16:6 this do: take you censers, korah, and all his company;
english: This do: take you censers, Korah, and all his company;

searchText: numbers 16:7 and put fire therein, and put incense upon them before the lord to-morrow; and it shall be that the man whom the lord doth choose, he shall be holy; ye take too much upon you, ye sons of levi.’
english: and put fire therein, and put incense upon them before the LORD to-morrow; and it shall be that the man whom the LORD doth choose, he shall be holy; ye take too much upon you, ye sons of Levi.’

searchText: numbers 16:8 and moses said unto korah: ‘hear now, ye sons of levi:
english: And Moses said unto Korah: ‘Hear now, ye sons of Levi:

searchText: numbers 16:9 is it but a small thing unto you, that the god of israel hath separated you from the congregation of israel, to bring you near to himself, to do the service of the tabernacle of the lord, and to stand before the congregation to minister unto them;
english: is it but a small thing unto you, that the God of Israel hath separated you from the congregation of Israel, to bring you near to Himself, to do the service of the tabernacle of the LORD, and to stand before the congregation to minister unto them;

searchText: numbers 16:10 and that he hath brought thee near, and all thy brethren the sons of levi with thee? and will ye seek the priesthood also?
english: and that He hath brought thee near, and all thy brethren the sons of Levi with thee? and will ye seek the priesthood also?

searchText: numbers 16:11 therefore thou and all thy company that are gathered together against the lord—; and as to aaron, what is he that ye murmur against him?’
english: Therefore thou and all thy company that are gathered together against the LORD—; and as to Aaron, what is he that ye murmur against him?’

searchText: numbers 16:12 and moses sent to call dathan and abiram, the sons of eliab; and they said: ‘we will not come up;
english: And Moses sent to call Dathan and Abiram, the sons of Eliab; and they said: ‘We will not come up;

searchText: numbers 16:13 is it a small thing that thou hast brought us up out of a land flowing with milk and honey, to kill us in the wilderness, but thou must needs make thyself also a prince over us?
english: is it a small thing that thou hast brought us up out of a land flowing with milk and honey, to kill us in the wilderness, but thou must needs make thyself also a prince over us?

searchText: numbers 16:14 moreover thou hast not brought us into a land flowing with milk and honey, nor given us inheritance of fields and vineyards; wilt thou put out the eyes of these men? we will not come up.’
english: Moreover thou hast not brought us into a land flowing with milk and honey, nor given us inheritance of fields and vineyards; wilt thou put out the eyes of these men? we will not come up.’

searchText: numbers 16:15 and moses was very wroth, and said unto the lord: ‘respect not thou their offering; i have not taken one ass from them, neither have i hurt one of them.’
english: And Moses was very wroth, and said unto the LORD: ‘Respect not thou their offering; I have not taken one ass from them, neither have I hurt one of them.’

searchText: numbers 16:16 and moses said unto korah: ‘be thou and all thy congregation before the lord, thou, and they, and aaron, to-morrow;
english: And Moses said unto Korah: ‘Be thou and all thy congregation before the LORD, thou, and they, and Aaron, to-morrow;

searchText: numbers 16:17 and take ye every man his fire-pan, and put incense upon them, and bring ye before the lord every man his fire-pan, two hundred and fifty fire-pans; thou also, and aaron, each his fire-pan.’
english: and take ye every man his fire-pan, and put incense upon them, and bring ye before the LORD every man his fire-pan, two hundred and fifty fire-pans; thou also, and Aaron, each his fire-pan.’

searchText: numbers 16:18 and they took every man his fire-pan, and put fire in them, and laid incense thereon, and stood at the door of the tent of meeting with moses and aaron.
english: And they took every man his fire-pan, and put fire in them, and laid incense thereon, and stood at the door of the tent of meeting with Moses and Aaron.

searchText: numbers 16:19 and korah assembled all the congregation against them unto the door of the tent of meeting; and the glory of the lord appeared unto all the congregation.
english: And Korah assembled all the congregation against them unto the door of the tent of meeting; and the glory of the LORD appeared unto all the congregation.

searchText: numbers 16:20 and the lord spoke unto moses and unto aaron, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses and unto Aaron, saying:

searchText: numbers 16:21 ’separate yourselves from among this congregation, that i may consume them in a moment.’
english: ’Separate yourselves from among this congregation, that I may consume them in a moment.’

searchText: numbers 16:22 and they fell upon their faces, and said: ‘o god, the god of the spirits of all flesh, shall one man sin, and wilt thou be wroth with all the congregation?’
english: And they fell upon their faces, and said: ‘O God, the God of the spirits of all flesh, shall one man sin, and wilt Thou be wroth with all the congregation?’

searchText: numbers 16:23 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 16:24 ’speak unto the congregation, saying: get you up from about the dwelling of korah, dathan, and abiram.’
english: ’Speak unto the congregation, saying: Get you up from about the dwelling of Korah, Dathan, and Abiram.’

searchText: numbers 16:25 and moses rose up and went unto dathan and abiram; and the elders of israel followed him.
english: And Moses rose up and went unto Dathan and Abiram; and the elders of Israel followed him.

searchText: numbers 16:26 and he spoke unto the congregation, saying: ‘depart, i pray you, from the tents of these wicked men, and touch nothing of theirs, lest ye be swept away in all their sins.’
english: And he spoke unto the congregation, saying: ‘Depart, I pray you, from the tents of these wicked men, and touch nothing of theirs, lest ye be swept away in all their sins.’

searchText: numbers 16:27 so they got them up from the dwelling of korah, dathan, and abiram, on every side; and dathan and abiram came out, and stood at the door of their tents, with their wives, and their sons, and their little ones.
english: So they got them up from the dwelling of Korah, Dathan, and Abiram, on every side; and Dathan and Abiram came out, and stood at the door of their tents, with their wives, and their sons, and their little ones.

searchText: numbers 16:28 and moses said: ‘hereby ye shall know that the lord hath sent me to do all these works, and that i have not done them of mine own mind.
english: And Moses said: ‘Hereby ye shall know that the LORD hath sent me to do all these works, and that I have not done them of mine own mind.

searchText: numbers 16:29 if these men die the common death of all men, and be visited after the visitation of all men, then the lord hath not sent me.
english: If these men die the common death of all men, and be visited after the visitation of all men, then the LORD hath not sent Me.

searchText: numbers 16:30 but if the lord make a new thing, and the ground open her mouth, and swallow them up, with all that appertain unto them, and they go down alive into the pit, then ye shall understand that these men have despised the lord.’
english: But if the LORD make a new thing, and the ground open her mouth, and swallow them up, with all that appertain unto them, and they go down alive into the pit, then ye shall understand that these men have despised the LORD.’

searchText: numbers 16:31 and it came to pass, as he made an end of speaking all these words, that the ground did cleave asunder that was under them.
english: And it came to pass, as he made an end of speaking all these words, that the ground did cleave asunder that was under them.

searchText: numbers 16:32 and the earth opened her mouth and swallowed them up, and their households, and all the men that appertained unto korah, and all their goods.
english: And the earth opened her mouth and swallowed them up, and their households, and all the men that appertained unto Korah, and all their goods.

searchText: numbers 16:33 so they, and all that appertained to them, went down alive into the pit; and the earth closed upon them, and they perished from among the assembly.
english: So they, and all that appertained to them, went down alive into the pit; and the earth closed upon them, and they perished from among the assembly.

searchText: numbers 16:34 and all israel that were round about them fled at the cry of them; for they said: ‘lest the earth swallow us up.’
english: And all Israel that were round about them fled at the cry of them; for they said: ‘Lest the earth swallow us up.’

searchText: numbers 16:35 and fire came forth from the lord, and devoured the two hundred and fifty men that offered the incense.
english: And fire came forth from the LORD, and devoured the two hundred and fifty men that offered the incense.

searchText: numbers 17:1 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 17:2 ‘speak unto eleazar the son of aaron the priest, that he take up the fire-pans out of the burning, and scatter thou the fire yonder; for they are become holy;
english: ‘Speak unto Eleazar the son of Aaron the priest, that he take up the fire-pans out of the burning, and scatter thou the fire yonder; for they are become holy;

searchText: numbers 17:3 even the fire-pans of these men who have sinned at the cost of their lives, and let them be made beaten plates for a covering of the altar—for they are become holy, because they were offered before the lord—that they may be a sign unto the children of israel.’
english: even the fire-pans of these men who have sinned at the cost of their lives, and let them be made beaten plates for a covering of the altar—for they are become holy, because they were offered before the LORD—that they may be a sign unto the children of Israel.’

searchText: numbers 17:4 and eleazar the priest took the brazen fire-pans, which they that were burnt had offered; and they beat them out for a covering of the altar,
english: And Eleazar the priest took the brazen fire-pans, which they that were burnt had offered; and they beat them out for a covering of the altar,

searchText: numbers 17:5 to be a memorial unto the children of israel, to the end that no common man, that is not of the seed of aaron, draw near to burn incense before the lord; that he fare not as korah, and as his company; as the lord spoke unto him by the hand of moses.
english: to be a memorial unto the children of Israel, to the end that no common man, that is not of the seed of Aaron, draw near to burn incense before the LORD; that he fare not as Korah, and as his company; as the LORD spoke unto him by the hand of Moses.

searchText: numbers 17:6 but on the morrow all the congregation of the children of israel murmured against moses and against aaron, saying: ‘ye have killed the people of the lord.’
english: But on the morrow all the congregation of the children of Israel murmured against Moses and against Aaron, saying: ‘Ye have killed the people of the LORD.’

searchText: numbers 17:7 and it came to pass, when the congregation was assembled against moses and against aaron, that they looked toward the tent of meeting; and, behold, the cloud covered it, and the glory of the lord appeared.
english: And it came to pass, when the congregation was assembled against Moses and against Aaron, that they looked toward the tent of meeting; and, behold, the cloud covered it, and the glory of the LORD appeared.

searchText: numbers 17:8 and moses and aaron came to the front of the tent of meeting.
english: And Moses and Aaron came to the front of the tent of meeting.

searchText: numbers 17:9 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 17:10 ’get you up from among this congregation, that i may consume them in a moment.’ and they fell upon their faces.
english: ’Get you up from among this congregation, that I may consume them in a moment.’ And they fell upon their faces.

searchText: numbers 17:11 and moses said unto aaron: ‘take thy fire-pan, and put fire therein from off the altar, and lay incense thereon, and carry it quickly unto the congregation, and make atonement for them; for there is wrath gone out from the lord: the plague is begun.’
english: And Moses said unto Aaron: ‘Take thy fire-pan, and put fire therein from off the altar, and lay incense thereon, and carry it quickly unto the congregation, and make atonement for them; for there is wrath gone out from the LORD: the plague is begun.’

searchText: numbers 17:12 and aaron took as moses spoke, and ran into the midst of the assembly; and, behold, the plague was begun among the people; and he put on the incense, and made atonement for the people.
english: And Aaron took as Moses spoke, and ran into the midst of the assembly; and, behold, the plague was begun among the people; and he put on the incense, and made atonement for the people.

searchText: numbers 17:13 and he stood between the dead and the living; and the plague was stayed.
english: And he stood between the dead and the living; and the plague was stayed.

searchText: numbers 17:14 now they that died by the plague were fourteen thousand and seven hundred, besides them that died about the matter of korah.
english: Now they that died by the plague were fourteen thousand and seven hundred, besides them that died about the matter of Korah.

searchText: numbers 17:15 and aaron returned unto moses unto the door of the tent of meeting, and the plague was stayed.
english: And Aaron returned unto Moses unto the door of the tent of meeting, and the plague was stayed.

searchText: numbers 17:16 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 17:17 ‘speak unto the children of israel, and take of them rods, one for each fathers’house, of all their princes according to their fathers’houses, twelve rods; thou shalt write every man’s name upon his rod.
english: ‘Speak unto the children of Israel, and take of them rods, one for each fathers’house, of all their princes according to their fathers’houses, twelve rods; thou shalt write every man’s name upon his rod.

searchText: numbers 17:18 and thou shalt write aaron’s name upon the rod of levi, for there shall be one rod for the head of their fathers’houses.
english: And thou shalt write Aaron’s name upon the rod of Levi, for there shall be one rod for the head of their fathers’houses.

searchText: numbers 17:19 and thou shalt lay them up in the tent of meeting before the testimony, where i meet with you.
english: And thou shalt lay them up in the tent of meeting before the testimony, where I meet with you.

searchText: numbers 17:20 and it shall come to pass, that the man whom i shall choose, his rod shall bud; and i will make to cease from me the murmurings of the children of israel, which they murmur against you.’
english: And it shall come to pass, that the man whom I shall choose, his rod shall bud; and I will make to cease from Me the murmurings of the children of Israel, which they murmur against you.’

searchText: numbers 17:21 and moses spoke unto the children of israel; and all their princes gave him rods, for each prince one, according to their fathers’houses, even twelve rods; and the rod of aaron was among their rods.
english: And Moses spoke unto the children of Israel; and all their princes gave him rods, for each prince one, according to their fathers’houses, even twelve rods; and the rod of Aaron was among their rods.

searchText: numbers 17:22 and moses laid up the rods before the lord in the tent of the testimony.
english: And Moses laid up the rods before the LORD in the tent of the testimony.

searchText: numbers 17:23 and it came to pass on the morrow, that moses went into the tent of the testimony; and, behold, the rod of aaron for the house of levi was budded, and put forth buds, and bloomed blossoms, and bore ripe almonds.
english: And it came to pass on the morrow, that Moses went into the tent of the testimony; and, behold, the rod of Aaron for the house of Levi was budded, and put forth buds, and bloomed blossoms, and bore ripe almonds.

searchText: numbers 17:24 and moses brought out all the rods from before the lord unto all the children of israel; and they looked, and took every man his rod.
english: And Moses brought out all the rods from before the LORD unto all the children of Israel; and they looked, and took every man his rod.

searchText: numbers 17:25 and the lord said unto moses: ‘put back the rod of aaron before the testimony, to be kept there, for a token against the rebellious children; that there may be made an end of their murmurings against me, that they die not.’
english: and the LORD said unto Moses: ‘Put back the rod of Aaron before the testimony, to be kept there, for a token against the rebellious children; that there may be made an end of their murmurings against Me, that they die not.’

searchText: numbers 17:26 thus did moses; as the lord commanded him, so did he.
english: Thus did Moses; as the LORD commanded him, so did he.

searchText: numbers 17:27 and the children of israel spoke unto moses, saying: ‘behold, we perish, we are undone, we are all undone.
english: And the children of Israel spoke unto Moses, saying: ‘Behold, we perish, we are undone, we are all undone.

searchText: numbers 17:28 every one that cometh near, that cometh near unto the tabernacle of the lord, is to die; shall we wholly perish?’
english: Every one that cometh near, that cometh near unto the tabernacle of the LORD, is to die; shall we wholly perish?’

searchText: numbers 18:1 and the lord said unto aaron: ‘thou and thy sons and thy fathers’ house with thee shall bear the iniquity of the sanctuary; and thou and thy sons with thee shall bear the iniquity of your priesthood.
english: And the LORD said unto Aaron: ‘Thou and thy sons and thy fathers’ house with thee shall bear the iniquity of the sanctuary; and thou and thy sons with thee shall bear the iniquity of your priesthood.

searchText: numbers 18:2 and thy brethren also, the tribe of levi, the tribe of thy father, bring thou near with thee, that they may be joined unto thee, and minister unto thee, thou and thy sons with thee being before the tent of the testimony.
english: And thy brethren also, the tribe of Levi, the tribe of thy father, bring thou near with thee, that they may be joined unto thee, and minister unto thee, thou and thy sons with thee being before the tent of the testimony.

searchText: numbers 18:3 and they shall keep thy charge, and the charge of all the tent; only they shall not come nigh unto the holy furniture and unto the altar, that they die not, neither they, nor ye.
english: And they shall keep thy charge, and the charge of all the Tent; only they shall not come nigh unto the holy furniture and unto the altar, that they die not, neither they, nor ye.

searchText: numbers 18:4 and they shall be joined unto thee, and keep the charge of the tent of meeting, whatsoever the service of the tent may be; but a common man shall not draw nigh unto you.
english: And they shall be joined unto thee, and keep the charge of the tent of meeting, whatsoever the service of the Tent may be; but a common man shall not draw nigh unto you.

searchText: numbers 18:5 and ye shall keep the charge of the holy things, and the charge of the altar, that there be wrath no more upon the children of israel.
english: And ye shall keep the charge of the holy things, and the charge of the altar, that there be wrath no more upon the children of Israel.

searchText: numbers 18:6 and i, behold, i have taken your brethren the levites from among the children of israel; for you they are given as a gift unto the lord, to do the service of the tent of meeting.
english: And I, behold, I have taken your brethren the Levites from among the children of Israel; for you they are given as a gift unto the LORD, to do the service of the tent of meeting.

searchText: numbers 18:7 and thou and thy sons with thee shall keep your priesthood in everything that pertaineth to the altar, and to that within the veil; and ye shall serve; i give you the priesthood as a service of gift; and the common man that draweth nigh shall be put to death.’
english: And thou and thy sons with thee shall keep your priesthood in everything that pertaineth to the altar, and to that within the veil; and ye shall serve; I give you the priesthood as a service of gift; and the common man that draweth nigh shall be put to death.’

searchText: numbers 18:8 and the lord spoke unto aaron: ‘and i, behold, i have given thee the charge of my heave-offerings; even of all the hallowed things of the children of israel unto thee have i given them for a consecrated portion, and to thy sons, as a due for ever.
english: And the LORD spoke unto Aaron: ‘And I, behold, I have given thee the charge of My heave-offerings; even of all the hallowed things of the children of Israel unto thee have I given them for a consecrated portion, and to thy sons, as a due for ever.

searchText: numbers 18:9 this shall be thine of the most holy things, reserved from the fire: every offering of theirs, even every meal-offering of theirs, and every sin-offering of theirs, and every guilt-offering of theirs, which they may render unto me, shall be most holy for thee and for thy sons.
english: This shall be thine of the most holy things, reserved from the fire: every offering of theirs, even every meal-offering of theirs, and every sin-offering of theirs, and every guilt-offering of theirs, which they may render unto Me, shall be most holy for thee and for thy sons.

searchText: numbers 18:10 in a most holy place shalt thou eat thereof; every male may eat thereof; it shall be holy unto thee.
english: In a most holy place shalt thou eat thereof; every male may eat thereof; it shall be holy unto thee.

searchText: numbers 18:11 and this is thine: the heave-offering of their gift, even all the wave-offerings of the children of israel; i have given them unto thee, and to thy sons and to thy daughters with thee, as a due for ever; every one that is clean in thy house may eat thereof.
english: And this is thine: the heave-offering of their gift, even all the wave-offerings of the children of Israel; I have given them unto thee, and to thy sons and to thy daughters with thee, as a due for ever; every one that is clean in thy house may eat thereof.

searchText: numbers 18:12 all the best of the oil, and all the best of the wine, and of the corn, the first part of them which they give unto the lord, to thee have i given them.
english: All the best of the oil, and all the best of the wine, and of the corn, the first part of them which they give unto the LORD, to thee have I given them.

searchText: numbers 18:13 the first-ripe fruits of all that is in their land, which they bring unto the lord, shall be thine; every one that is clean in thy house may eat thereof.
english: The first-ripe fruits of all that is in their land, which they bring unto the LORD, shall be thine; every one that is clean in thy house may eat thereof.

searchText: numbers 18:14 every thing devoted in israel shall be thine.
english: Every thing devoted in Israel shall be thine.

searchText: numbers 18:15 every thing that openeth the womb, of all flesh which they offer unto the lord, both of man and beast, shall be thine; howbeit the first-born of man shalt thou surely redeem, and the firstling of unclean beasts shalt thou redeem.
english: Every thing that openeth the womb, of all flesh which they offer unto the LORD, both of man and beast, shall be thine; howbeit the first-born of man shalt thou surely redeem, and the firstling of unclean beasts shalt thou redeem.

searchText: numbers 18:16 and their redemption-money—from a month old shalt thou redeem them—shall be, according to thy valuation, five shekels of silver, after the shekel of the sanctuary—the same is twenty gerahs.
english: And their redemption-money—from a month old shalt thou redeem them—shall be, according to thy valuation, five shekels of silver, after the shekel of the sanctuary—the same is twenty gerahs.

searchText: numbers 18:17 but the firstling of an ox, or the firstling of a sheep, or the firstling of a goat, thou shalt not redeem; they are holy: thou shalt dash their blood against the altar, and shalt make their fat smoke for an offering made by fire, for a sweet savour unto the lord.
english: But the firstling of an ox, or the firstling of a sheep, or the firstling of a goat, thou shalt not redeem; they are holy: thou shalt dash their blood against the altar, and shalt make their fat smoke for an offering made by fire, for a sweet savour unto the LORD.

searchText: numbers 18:18 and the flesh of them shall be thine, as the wave-breast and as the right thigh, it shall be thine.
english: And the flesh of them shall be thine, as the wave-breast and as the right thigh, it shall be thine.

searchText: numbers 18:19 all the heave-offerings of the holy things, which the children of israel offer unto the lord, have i given thee, and thy sons and thy daughters with thee, as a due for ever; it is an everlasting covenant of salt before the lord unto thee and to thy seed with thee.’
english: All the heave-offerings of the holy things, which the children of Israel offer unto the LORD, have I given thee, and thy sons and thy daughters with thee, as a due for ever; it is an everlasting covenant of salt before the LORD unto thee and to thy seed with thee.’

searchText: numbers 18:20 and the lord said unto aaron: ‘thou shalt have no inheritance in their land, neither shalt thou have any portion among them; i am thy portion and thine inheritance among the children of israel.
english: And the LORD said unto Aaron: ‘Thou shalt have no inheritance in their land, neither shalt thou have any portion among them; I am thy portion and thine inheritance among the children of Israel.

searchText: numbers 18:21 and unto the children of levi, behold, i have given all the tithe in israel for an inheritance, in return for their service which they serve, even the service of the tent of meeting.
english: And unto the children of Levi, behold, I have given all the tithe in Israel for an inheritance, in return for their service which they serve, even the service of the tent of meeting.

searchText: numbers 18:22 and henceforth the children of israel shall not come nigh the tent of meeting, lest they bear sin, and die.
english: And henceforth the children of Israel shall not come nigh the tent of meeting, lest they bear sin, and die.

searchText: numbers 18:23 but the levites alone shall do the service of the tent of meeting, and they shall bear their iniquity; it shall be a statute for ever throughout your generations, and among the children of israel they shall have no inheritance.
english: But the Levites alone shall do the service of the tent of meeting, and they shall bear their iniquity; it shall be a statute for ever throughout your generations, and among the children of Israel they shall have no inheritance.

searchText: numbers 18:24 for the tithe of the children of israel, which they set apart as a gift unto the lord, i have given to the levites for an inheritance; therefore i have said unto them: among the children of israel they shall have no inheritance.’
english: For the tithe of the children of Israel, which they set apart as a gift unto the LORD, I have given to the Levites for an inheritance; therefore I have said unto them: Among the children of Israel they shall have no inheritance.’

searchText: numbers 18:25 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 18:26 ’moreover thou shalt speak unto the levites, and say unto them: when ye take of the children of israel the tithe which i have given you from them for your inheritance, then ye shall set apart of it a gift for the lord, even a tithe of the tithe.
english: ’Moreover thou shalt speak unto the Levites, and say unto them: When ye take of the children of Israel the tithe which I have given you from them for your inheritance, then ye shall set apart of it a gift for the LORD, even a tithe of the tithe.

searchText: numbers 18:27 and the gift which ye set apart shall be reckoned unto you, as though it were the corn of the threshing-floor, and as the fulness of the wine-press.
english: And the gift which ye set apart shall be reckoned unto you, as though it were the corn of the threshing-floor, and as the fulness of the wine-press.

searchText: numbers 18:28 thus ye also shall set apart a gift unto the lord of all your tithes, which ye receive of the children of israel; and thereof ye shall give the gift which is set apart unto the lord to aaron the priest.
english: Thus ye also shall set apart a gift unto the LORD of all your tithes, which ye receive of the children of Israel; and thereof ye shall give the gift which is set apart unto the LORD to Aaron the priest.

searchText: numbers 18:29 out of all that is given you ye shall set apart all of that which is due unto the lord, of all the best thereof, even the hallowed part thereof out of it.
english: Out of all that is given you ye shall set apart all of that which is due unto the LORD, of all the best thereof, even the hallowed part thereof out of it.

searchText: numbers 18:30 therefore thou shalt say unto them: when ye set apart the best thereof from it, then it shall be counted unto the levites as the increase of the threshing-floor, and as the increase of the wine-press.
english: Therefore thou shalt say unto them: When ye set apart the best thereof from it, then it shall be counted unto the Levites as the increase of the threshing-floor, and as the increase of the wine-press.

searchText: numbers 18:31 and ye may eat it in every place, ye and your households; for it is your reward in return for your service in the tent of meeting.
english: And ye may eat it in every place, ye and your households; for it is your reward in return for your service in the tent of meeting.

searchText: numbers 18:32 and ye shall bear no sin by reason of it, seeing that ye have set apart from it the best thereof; and ye shall not profane the holy things of the children of israel, that ye die not.’
english: And ye shall bear no sin by reason of it, seeing that ye have set apart from it the best thereof; and ye shall not profane the holy things of the children of Israel, that ye die not.’

searchText: numbers 19:1 and the lord spoke unto moses and unto aaron, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses and unto Aaron, saying:

searchText: numbers 19:2 this is the statute of the law which the lord hath commanded, saying: speak unto the children of israel, that they bring thee a red heifer, faultless, wherein is no blemish, and upon which never came yoke.
english: This is the statute of the law which the LORD hath commanded, saying: Speak unto the children of Israel, that they bring thee a red heifer, faultless, wherein is no blemish, and upon which never came yoke.

searchText: numbers 19:3 and ye shall give her unto eleazar the priest, and she shall be brought forth without the camp, and she shall be slain before his face.
english: And ye shall give her unto Eleazar the priest, and she shall be brought forth without the camp, and she shall be slain before his face.

searchText: numbers 19:4 and eleazar the priest shall take of her blood with his finger, and sprinkle of her blood toward the front of the tent of meeting seven times.
english: And Eleazar the priest shall take of her blood with his finger, and sprinkle of her blood toward the front of the tent of meeting seven times.

searchText: numbers 19:5 and the heifer shall be burnt in his sight; her skin, and her flesh, and her blood, with her dung, shall be burnt.
english: And the heifer shall be burnt in his sight; her skin, and her flesh, and her blood, with her dung, shall be burnt.

searchText: numbers 19:6 and the priest shall take cedar-wood, and hyssop, and scarlet, and cast it into the midst of the burning of the heifer.
english: And the priest shall take cedar-wood, and hyssop, and scarlet, and cast it into the midst of the burning of the heifer.

searchText: numbers 19:7 then the priest shall wash his clothes, and he shall bathe his flesh in water, and afterward he may come into the camp, and the priest shall be unclean until the even.
english: Then the priest shall wash his clothes, and he shall bathe his flesh in water, and afterward he may come into the camp, and the priest shall be unclean until the even.

searchText: numbers 19:8 and he that burneth her shall wash his clothes in water, and bathe his flesh in water, and shall be unclean until the even.
english: And he that burneth her shall wash his clothes in water, and bathe his flesh in water, and shall be unclean until the even.

searchText: numbers 19:9 and a man that is clean shall gather up the ashes of the heifer, and lay them up without the camp in a clean place, and it shall be kept for the congregation of the children of israel for a water of sprinkling; it is a purification from sin.
english: And a man that is clean shall gather up the ashes of the heifer, and lay them up without the camp in a clean place, and it shall be kept for the congregation of the children of Israel for a water of sprinkling; it is a purification from sin.

searchText: numbers 19:10 and he that gathereth the ashes of the heifer shall wash his clothes, and be unclean until the even; and it shall be unto the children of israel, and unto the stranger that sojourneth among them, for a statute for ever.
english: And he that gathereth the ashes of the heifer shall wash his clothes, and be unclean until the even; and it shall be unto the children of Israel, and unto the stranger that sojourneth among them, for a statute for ever.

searchText: numbers 19:11 he that toucheth the dead, even any man’s dead body, shall be unclean seven days;
english: He that toucheth the dead, even any man’s dead body, shall be unclean seven days;

searchText: numbers 19:12 the same shall purify himself therewith on the third day and on the seventh day, and he shall be clean; but if he purify not himself the third day and the seventh day, he shall not be clean.
english: the same shall purify himself therewith on the third day and on the seventh day, and he shall be clean; but if he purify not himself the third day and the seventh day, he shall not be clean.

searchText: numbers 19:13 whosoever toucheth the dead, even the body of any man that is dead, and purifieth not himself—he hath defiled the tabernacle of the lord—that soul shall be cut off from israel; because the water of sprinkling was not dashed against him, he shall be unclean; his uncleanness is yet upon him.
english: Whosoever toucheth the dead, even the body of any man that is dead, and purifieth not himself—he hath defiled the tabernacle of the LORD—that soul shall be cut off from Israel; because the water of sprinkling was not dashed against him, he shall be unclean; his uncleanness is yet upon him.

searchText: numbers 19:14 this is the law: when a man dieth in a tent, every one that cometh into the tent, and every thing that is in the tent, shall be unclean seven days.
english: This is the law: when a man dieth in a tent, every one that cometh into the tent, and every thing that is in the tent, shall be unclean seven days.

searchText: numbers 19:15 and every open vessel, which hath no covering close-bound upon it, is unclean.
english: And every open vessel, which hath no covering close-bound upon it, is unclean.

searchText: numbers 19:16 and whosoever in the open field toucheth one that is slain with a sword, or one that dieth of himself, or a bone of a man, or a grave, shall be unclean seven days.
english: And whosoever in the open field toucheth one that is slain with a sword, or one that dieth of himself, or a bone of a man, or a grave, shall be unclean seven days.

searchText: numbers 19:17 and for the unclean they shall take of the ashes of the burning of the purification from sin, and running water shall be put thereto in a vessel.
english: And for the unclean they shall take of the ashes of the burning of the purification from sin, and running water shall be put thereto in a vessel.

searchText: numbers 19:18 and a clean person shall take hyssop, and dip it in the water, and sprinkle it upon the tent, and upon all the vessels, and upon the persons that were there, and upon him that touched the bone, or the slain, or the dead, or the grave.
english: And a clean person shall take hyssop, and dip it in the water, and sprinkle it upon the tent, and upon all the vessels, and upon the persons that were there, and upon him that touched the bone, or the slain, or the dead, or the grave.

searchText: numbers 19:19 and the clean person shall sprinkle upon the unclean on the third day, and on the seventh day; and on the seventh day he shall purify him; and he shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and shall be clean at even.
english: And the clean person shall sprinkle upon the unclean on the third day, and on the seventh day; and on the seventh day he shall purify him; and he shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and shall be clean at even.

searchText: numbers 19:20 but the man that shall be unclean, and shall not purify himself, that soul shall be cut off from the midst of the assembly, because he hath defiled the sanctuary of the lord; the water of sprinkling hath not been dashed against him: he is unclean.
english: But the man that shall be unclean, and shall not purify himself, that soul shall be cut off from the midst of the assembly, because he hath defiled the sanctuary of the LORD; the water of sprinkling hath not been dashed against him: he is unclean.

searchText: numbers 19:21 and it shall be a perpetual statute unto them; and he that sprinkleth the water of sprinkling shall wash his clothes; and he that toucheth the water of sprinkling shall be unclean until even.
english: And it shall be a perpetual statute unto them; and he that sprinkleth the water of sprinkling shall wash his clothes; and he that toucheth the water of sprinkling shall be unclean until even.

searchText: numbers 19:22 and whatsoever the unclean person toucheth shall be unclean; and the soul that toucheth him shall be unclean until even.
english: And whatsoever the unclean person toucheth shall be unclean; and the soul that toucheth him shall be unclean until even.

searchText: numbers 20:1 and the children of israel, even the whole congregation, came into the wilderness of zin in the first month; and the people abode in kadesh; and miriam died there, and was buried there.
english: And the children of Israel, even the whole congregation, came into the wilderness of Zin in the first month; and the people abode in Kadesh; and Miriam died there, and was buried there.

searchText: numbers 20:2 and there was no water for the congregation; and they assembled themselves together against moses and against aaron.
english: And there was no water for the congregation; and they assembled themselves together against Moses and against Aaron.

searchText: numbers 20:3 and the people strove with moses, and spoke, saying: ‘would that we had perished when our brethren perished before the lord!
english: And the people strove with Moses, and spoke, saying: ‘Would that we had perished when our brethren perished before the LORD!

searchText: numbers 20:4 and why have ye brought the assembly of the lord into this wilderness, to die there, we and our cattle?
english: And why have ye brought the assembly of the LORD into this wilderness, to die there, we and our cattle?

searchText: numbers 20:5 and wherefore have ye made us to come up out of egypt, to bring us in unto this evil place? it is no place of seed, or of figs, or of vines, or of pomegranates; neither is there any water to drink.’
english: And wherefore have ye made us to come up out of Egypt, to bring us in unto this evil place? it is no place of seed, or of figs, or of vines, or of pomegranates; neither is there any water to drink.’

searchText: numbers 20:6 and moses and aaron went from the presence of the assembly unto the door of the tent of meeting, and fell upon their faces; and the glory of the lord appeared unto them.
english: And Moses and Aaron went from the presence of the assembly unto the door of the tent of meeting, and fell upon their faces; and the glory of the LORD appeared unto them.

searchText: numbers 20:7 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 20:8 ’take the rod, and assemble the congregation, thou, and aaron thy brother, and speak ye unto the rock before their eyes, that it give forth its water; and thou shalt bring forth to them water out of the rock; so thou shalt give the congregation and their cattle drink.’
english: ’Take the rod, and assemble the congregation, thou, and Aaron thy brother, and speak ye unto the rock before their eyes, that it give forth its water; and thou shalt bring forth to them water out of the rock; so thou shalt give the congregation and their cattle drink.’

searchText: numbers 20:9 and moses took the rod from before the lord, as he commanded him.
english: And Moses took the rod from before the LORD, as He commanded him.

searchText: numbers 20:10 and moses and aaron gathered the assembly together before the rock, and he said unto them: ‘hear now, ye rebels; are we to bring you forth water out of this rock?’
english: And Moses and Aaron gathered the assembly together before the rock, and he said unto them: ‘Hear now, ye rebels; are we to bring you forth water out of this rock?’

searchText: numbers 20:11 and moses lifted up his hand, and smote the rock with his rod twice; and water came forth abundantly, and the congregation drank, and their cattle.
english: And Moses lifted up his hand, and smote the rock with his rod twice; and water came forth abundantly, and the congregation drank, and their cattle.

searchText: numbers 20:12 and the lord said unto moses and aaron: ‘because ye believed not in me, to sanctify me in the eyes of the children of israel, therefore ye shall not bring this assembly into the land which i have given them.’
english: And the LORD said unto Moses and Aaron: ‘Because ye believed not in Me, to sanctify Me in the eyes of the children of Israel, therefore ye shall not bring this assembly into the land which I have given them.’

searchText: numbers 20:13 these are the waters of meribah, where the children of israel strove with the lord, and he was sanctified in them.
english: These are the waters of Meribah, where the children of Israel strove with the LORD, and He was sanctified in them.

searchText: numbers 20:14 and moses sent messengers from kadesh unto the king of edom: ‘thus saith thy brother israel: thou knowest all the travail that hath befallen us;
english: And Moses sent messengers from Kadesh unto the king of Edom: ‘Thus saith thy brother Israel: Thou knowest all the travail that hath befallen us;

searchText: numbers 20:15 how our fathers went down into egypt, and we dwelt in egypt a long time; and the egyptians dealt ill with us, and our fathers;
english: how our fathers went down into Egypt, and we dwelt in Egypt a long time; and the Egyptians dealt ill with us, and our fathers;

searchText: numbers 20:16 and when we cried unto the lord, he heard our voice, and sent an angel, and brought us forth out of egypt; and, behold, we are in kadesh, a city in the uttermost of thy border.
english: and when we cried unto the LORD, He heard our voice, and sent an angel, and brought us forth out of Egypt; and, behold, we are in Kadesh, a city in the uttermost of thy border.

searchText: numbers 20:17 let us pass, i pray thee, through thy land; we will not pass through field or through vineyard, neither will we drink of the water of the wells; we will go along the king’s highway, we will not turn aside to the right hand nor to the left, until we have passed thy border.’
english: Let us pass, I pray thee, through thy land; we will not pass through field or through vineyard, neither will we drink of the water of the wells; we will go along the king’s highway, we will not turn aside to the right hand nor to the left, until we have passed thy border.’

searchText: numbers 20:18 and edom said unto him: ‘thou shalt not pass through me, lest i come out with the sword against thee.’
english: And Edom said unto him: ‘Thou shalt not pass through me, lest I come out with the sword against thee.’

searchText: numbers 20:19 and the children of israel said unto him: ‘we will go up by the highway; and if we drink of thy water, i and my cattle, then will i give the price thereof; let me only pass through on my feet; there is no hurt.’
english: And the children of Israel said unto him: ‘We will go up by the highway; and if we drink of thy water, I and my cattle, then will I give the price thereof; let me only pass through on my feet; there is no hurt.’

searchText: numbers 20:20 and he said: ‘thou shalt not pass through.’ and edom came out against him with much people, and with a strong hand.
english: And he said: ‘Thou shalt not pass through.’ And Edom came out against him with much people, and with a strong hand.

searchText: numbers 20:21 thus edom refused to give israel passage through his border; wherefore israel turned away from him.
english: Thus Edom refused to give Israel passage through his border; wherefore Israel turned away from him.

searchText: numbers 20:22 and they journeyed from kadesh; and the children of israel, even the whole congregation, came unto mount hor.
english: And they journeyed from Kadesh; and the children of Israel, even the whole congregation, came unto mount Hor.

searchText: numbers 20:23 and the lord spoke unto moses and aaron in mount hor, by the border of the land of edom, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses and Aaron in mount Hor, by the border of the land of Edom, saying:

searchText: numbers 20:24 ’aaron shall be gathered unto his people; for he shall not enter into the land which i have given unto the children of israel, because ye rebelled against my word at the waters of meribah.
english: ’Aaron shall be gathered unto his people; for he shall not enter into the land which I have given unto the children of Israel, because ye rebelled against My word at the waters of Meribah.

searchText: numbers 20:25 take aaron and eleazar his son, and bring them up unto mount hor.
english: Take Aaron and Eleazar his son, and bring them up unto mount Hor.

searchText: numbers 20:26 and strip aaron of his garments, and put them upon eleazar his son; and aaron shall be gathered unto his people, and shall die there.’
english: And strip Aaron of his garments, and put them upon Eleazar his son; and Aaron shall be gathered unto his people, and shall die there.’

searchText: numbers 20:27 and moses did as the lord commanded; and they went up into mount hor in the sight of all the congregation.
english: And Moses did as the LORD commanded; and they went up into mount Hor in the sight of all the congregation.

searchText: numbers 20:28 and moses stripped aaron of his garments, and put them upon eleazar his son; and aaron died there in the top of the mount; and moses and eleazar came down from the mount.
english: And Moses stripped Aaron of his garments, and put them upon Eleazar his son; and Aaron died there in the top of the mount; and Moses and Eleazar came down from the mount.

searchText: numbers 20:29 and when all the congregation saw that aaron was dead, they wept for aaron thirty days, even all the house of israel.
english: And when all the congregation saw that Aaron was dead, they wept for Aaron thirty days, even all the house of Israel.

searchText: numbers 21:1 and the canaanite, the king of arad, who dwelt in the south, heard tell that israel came by the way of atharim; and he fought against israel, and took some of them captive.
english: And the Canaanite, the king of Arad, who dwelt in the South, heard tell that Israel came by the way of Atharim; and he fought against Israel, and took some of them captive.

searchText: numbers 21:2 and israel vowed a vow unto the lord, and said: ‘if thou wilt indeed deliver this people into my hand, then i will utterly destroy their cities.’
english: And Israel vowed a vow unto the LORD, and said: ‘If Thou wilt indeed deliver this people into my hand, then I will utterly destroy their cities.’

searchText: numbers 21:3 and the lord hearkened to the voice of israel, and delivered up the canaanites; and they utterly destroyed them and their cities; and the name of the place was called hormah.
english: And the LORD hearkened to the voice of Israel, and delivered up the Canaanites; and they utterly destroyed them and their cities; and the name of the place was called Hormah.

searchText: numbers 21:4 and they journeyed from mount hor by the way to the red sea, to compass the land of edom; and the soul of the people became impatient because of the way.
english: And they journeyed from mount Hor by the way to the Red Sea, to compass the land of Edom; and the soul of the people became impatient because of the way.

searchText: numbers 21:5 and the people spoke against god, and against moses: ‘wherefore have ye brought us up out of egypt to die in the wilderness? for there is no bread, and there is no water; and our soul loatheth this light bread.’
english: And the people spoke against God, and against Moses: ‘Wherefore have ye brought us up out of Egypt to die in the wilderness? for there is no bread, and there is no water; and our soul loatheth this light bread.’

searchText: numbers 21:6 and the lord sent fiery serpents among the people, and they bit the people; and much people of israel died.
english: And the LORD sent fiery serpents among the people, and they bit the people; and much people of Israel died.

searchText: numbers 21:7 and the people came to moses, and said: ‘we have sinned, because we have spoken against the lord, and against thee; pray unto the lord, that he take away the serpents from us.’ and moses prayed for the people.
english: And the people came to Moses, and said: ‘We have sinned, because we have spoken against the LORD, and against thee; pray unto the LORD, that He take away the serpents from us.’ And Moses prayed for the people.

searchText: numbers 21:8 and the lord said unto moses: ‘make thee a fiery serpent, and set it upon a pole; and it shall come to pass, that every one that is bitten, when he seeth it, shall live.’
english: And the LORD said unto Moses: ‘Make thee a fiery serpent, and set it upon a pole; and it shall come to pass, that every one that is bitten, when he seeth it, shall live.’

searchText: numbers 21:9 and moses made a serpent of brass, and set it upon the pole; and it came to pass, that if a serpent had bitten any man, when he looked unto the serpent of brass, he lived.
english: And Moses made a serpent of brass, and set it upon the pole; and it came to pass, that if a serpent had bitten any man, when he looked unto the serpent of brass, he lived.

searchText: numbers 21:10 and the children of israel journeyed, and pitched in oboth.
english: And the children of Israel journeyed, and pitched in Oboth.

searchText: numbers 21:11 and they journeyed from oboth, and pitched at ije-abarim, in the wilderness which is in front of moab, toward the sun-rising.
english: And they journeyed from Oboth, and pitched at Ije-abarim, in the wilderness which is in front of Moab, toward the sun-rising.

searchText: numbers 21:12 from thence they journeyed, and pitched in the valley of zered.
english: From thence they journeyed, and pitched in the valley of Zered.

searchText: numbers 21:13 from thence they journeyed, and pitched on the other side of the arnon, which is in the wilderness, that cometh out of the border of the amorites.—for arnon is the border of moab, between moab and the amorites;
english: From thence they journeyed, and pitched on the other side of the Arnon, which is in the wilderness, that cometh out of the border of the Amorites.—For Arnon is the border of Moab, between Moab and the Amorites;

searchText: numbers 21:14 wherefore it is said in the book of the wars of the lord: vaheb in suphah, and the valleys of arnon,
english: wherefore it is said in the book of the Wars of the LORD: Vaheb in Suphah, And the valleys of Arnon,

searchText: numbers 21:15 and the slope of the valleys that inclineth toward the seat of ar, and leaneth upon the border of moab.—
english: And the slope of the valleys That inclineth toward the seat of Ar, And leaneth upon the border of Moab.—

searchText: numbers 21:16 and from thence to beer; that is the well whereof the lord said unto moses: ‘gather the people together, and i will give them water.’
english: And from thence to Beer; that is the well whereof the LORD said unto Moses: ‘Gather the people together, and I will give them water.’

searchText: numbers 21:17 then sang israel this song: spring up, o well—sing ye unto it—
english: Then sang Israel this song: Spring up, O well—sing ye unto it—

searchText: numbers 21:18 the well, which the princes digged, which the nobles of the people delved, with the sceptre, and with their staves. and from the wilderness to mattanah;
english: The well, which the princes digged, Which the nobles of the people delved, With the sceptre, and with their staves. And from the wilderness to Mattanah;

searchText: numbers 21:19 and from mattanah to nahaliel; and from nahaliel to bamoth;
english: and from Mattanah to Nahaliel; and from Nahaliel to Bamoth;

searchText: numbers 21:20 and from bamoth to the valley that is in the field of moab, by the top of pisgah, which looketh down upon the desert.
english: and from Bamoth to the valley that is in the field of Moab, by the top of Pisgah, which looketh down upon the desert.

searchText: numbers 21:21 and israel sent messengers unto sihon king of the amorites, saying:
english: And Israel sent messengers unto Sihon king of the Amorites, saying:

searchText: numbers 21:22 ’let me pass through thy land; we will not turn aside into field, or into vineyard; we will not drink of the water of the wells; we will go by the king’s highway, until we have passed thy border.’
english: ’Let me pass through thy land; we will not turn aside into field, or into vineyard; we will not drink of the water of the wells; we will go by the king’s highway, until we have passed thy border.’

searchText: numbers 21:23 and sihon would not suffer israel to pass through his border; but sihon gathered all his people together, and went out against israel into the wilderness, and came to jahaz; and he fought against israel.
english: And Sihon would not suffer Israel to pass through his border; but Sihon gathered all his people together, and went out against Israel into the wilderness, and came to Jahaz; and he fought against Israel.

searchText: numbers 21:24 and israel smote him with the edge of the sword, and possessed his land from the arnon unto the jabbok, even unto the children of ammon; for the border of the children of ammon was strong.
english: And Israel smote him with the edge of the sword, and possessed his land from the Arnon unto the Jabbok, even unto the children of Ammon; for the border of the children of Ammon was strong.

searchText: numbers 21:25 and israel took all these cities; and israel dwelt in all the cities of the amorites, in heshbon, and in all the towns thereof.
english: And Israel took all these cities; and Israel dwelt in all the cities of the Amorites, in Heshbon, and in all the towns thereof.

searchText: numbers 21:26 for heshbon was the city of sihon the king of the amorites, who had fought against the former king of moab, and taken all his land out of his hand, even unto the arnon.
english: For Heshbon was the city of Sihon the king of the Amorites, who had fought against the former king of Moab, and taken all his land out of his hand, even unto the Arnon.

searchText: numbers 21:27 wherefore they that speak in parables say: come ye to heshbon! let the city of sihon be built and established!
english: Wherefore they that speak in parables say: Come ye to Heshbon! Let the city of Sihon be built and established!

searchText: numbers 21:28 for a fire is gone out of heshbon, a flame from the city of sihon; it hath devoured ar of moab, the lords of the high places of arnon.
english: For a fire is gone out of Heshbon, A flame from the city of Sihon; It hath devoured Ar of Moab, The lords of the high places of Arnon.

searchText: numbers 21:29 woe to thee, moab! thou art undone, o people of chemosh; he hath given his sons as fugitives, and his daughters into captivity, unto sihon king of the amorites.
english: Woe to thee, Moab! Thou art undone, O people of Chemosh; He hath given his sons as fugitives, And his daughters into captivity, Unto Sihon king of the Amorites.

searchText: numbers 21:30 we have shot at them—heshbon is perished—even unto dibon, and we have laid waste even unto nophah, which reacheth unto medeba.
english: We have shot at them—Heshbon is perished—even unto Dibon, And we have laid waste even unto Nophah, Which reacheth unto Medeba.

searchText: numbers 21:31 thus israel dwelt in the land of the amorites.
english: Thus Israel dwelt in the land of the Amorites.

searchText: numbers 21:32 and moses sent to spy out jazer, and they took the towns thereof, and drove out the amorites that were there.
english: And Moses sent to spy out Jazer, and they took the towns thereof, and drove out the Amorites that were there.

searchText: numbers 21:33 and they turned and went up by the way of bashan; and og the king of bashan went out against them, he and all his people, to battle at edrei.
english: And they turned and went up by the way of Bashan; and Og the king of Bashan went out against them, he and all his people, to battle at Edrei.

searchText: numbers 21:34 and the lord said unto moses: ‘fear him not; for i have delivered him into thy hand, and all his people, and his land; and thou shalt do to him as thou didst unto sihon king of the amorites, who dwelt at heshbon.’
english: And the LORD said unto Moses: ‘Fear him not; for I have delivered him into thy hand, and all his people, and his land; and thou shalt do to him as thou didst unto Sihon king of the Amorites, who dwelt at Heshbon.’

searchText: numbers 21:35 so they smote him, and his sons, and all his people, until there was none left him remaining; and they possessed his land.
english: So they smote him, and his sons, and all his people, until there was none left him remaining; and they possessed his land.

searchText: numbers 22:1 and the children of israel journeyed, and pitched in the plains of moab beyond the jordan at jericho.
english: And the children of Israel journeyed, and pitched in the plains of Moab beyond the Jordan at Jericho.

searchText: numbers 22:2 and balak the son of zippor saw all that israel had done to the amorites.
english: And Balak the son of Zippor saw all that Israel had done to the Amorites.

searchText: numbers 22:3 and moab was sore afraid of the people, because they were many; and moab was overcome with dread because of the children of israel.
english: And Moab was sore afraid of the people, because they were many; and Moab was overcome with dread because of the children of Israel.

searchText: numbers 22:4 and moab said unto the elders of midian: ‘now will this multitude lick up all that is round about us, as the ox licketh up the grass of the field.’—and balak the son of zippor was king of moab at that time.—
english: And Moab said unto the elders of Midian: ‘Now will this multitude lick up all that is round about us, as the ox licketh up the grass of the field.’—And Balak the son of Zippor was king of Moab at that time.—

searchText: numbers 22:5 and he sent messengers unto balaam the son of beor, to pethor, which is by the river, to the land of the children of his people, to call him, saying: ‘behold, there is a people come out from egypt; behold, they cover the face of the earth, and they abide over against me.
english: And he sent messengers unto Balaam the son of Beor, to Pethor, which is by the River, to the land of the children of his people, to call him, saying: ‘Behold, there is a people come out from Egypt; behold, they cover the face of the earth, and they abide over against me.

searchText: numbers 22:6 come now therefore, i pray thee, curse me this people; for they are too mighty for me; peradventure i shall prevail, that we may smite them, and that i may drive them out of the land; for i know that he whom thou blessest is blessed, and he whom thou cursest is cursed.’
english: Come now therefore, I pray thee, curse me this people; for they are too mighty for me; peradventure I shall prevail, that we may smite them, and that I may drive them out of the land; for I know that he whom thou blessest is blessed, and he whom thou cursest is cursed.’

searchText: numbers 22:7 and the elders of moab and the elders of midian departed with the rewards of divination in their hand; and they came unto balaam, and spoke unto him the words of balak.
english: And the elders of Moab and the elders of Midian departed with the rewards of divination in their hand; and they came unto Balaam, and spoke unto him the words of Balak.

searchText: numbers 22:8 and he said unto them: ‘lodge here this night, and i will bring you back word, as the lord may speak unto me’; and the princes of moab abode with balaam.
english: And he said unto them: ‘Lodge here this night, and I will bring you back word, as the LORD may speak unto me’; and the princes of Moab abode with Balaam.

searchText: numbers 22:9 and god came unto balaam, and said: ‘what men are these with thee?’
english: And God came unto Balaam, and said: ‘What men are these with thee?’

searchText: numbers 22:10 and balaam said unto god: ‘balak the son of zippor, king of moab, hath sent unto me [saying]:
english: And Balaam said unto God: ‘Balak the son of Zippor, king of Moab, hath sent unto me [saying]:

searchText: numbers 22:11 behold the people that is come out of egypt, it covereth the face of the earth; now, come curse me them; peradventure i shall be able to fight against them, and shall drive them out.’
english: Behold the people that is come out of Egypt, it covereth the face of the earth; now, come curse me them; peradventure I shall be able to fight against them, and shall drive them out.’

searchText: numbers 22:12 and god said unto balaam: ‘thou shalt not go with them; thou shalt not curse the people; for they are blessed.’
english: And God said unto Balaam: ‘Thou shalt not go with them; thou shalt not curse the people; for they are blessed.’

searchText: numbers 22:13 and balaam rose up in the morning, and said unto the princes of balak: ‘get you into your land; for the lord refuseth to give me leave to go with you.’
english: And Balaam rose up in the morning, and said unto the princes of Balak: ‘Get you into your land; for the LORD refuseth to give me leave to go with you.’

searchText: numbers 22:14 and the princes of moab rose up, and they went unto balak, and said: ‘balaam refuseth to come with us.’
english: And the princes of Moab rose up, and they went unto Balak, and said: ‘Balaam refuseth to come with us.’

searchText: numbers 22:15 and balak sent yet again princes, more, and more honourable than they.
english: And Balak sent yet again princes, more, and more honourable than they.

searchText: numbers 22:16 and they came to balaam, and said to him: ‘thus saith balak the son of zippor: let nothing, i pray thee, hinder thee from coming unto me;
english: And they came to Balaam, and said to him: ‘Thus saith Balak the son of Zippor: Let nothing, I pray thee, hinder thee from coming unto me;

searchText: numbers 22:17 for i will promote thee unto very great honour, and whatsoever thou sayest unto me i will do; come therefore, i pray thee, curse me this people.’
english: for I will promote thee unto very great honour, and whatsoever thou sayest unto me I will do; come therefore, I pray thee, curse me this people.’

searchText: numbers 22:18 and balaam answered and said unto the servants of balak: ‘if balak would give me his house full of silver and gold, i cannot go beyond the word of the lord my god, to do any thing, small or great.
english: And Balaam answered and said unto the servants of Balak: ‘If Balak would give me his house full of silver and gold, I cannot go beyond the word of the LORD my God, to do any thing, small or great.

searchText: numbers 22:19 now therefore, i pray you, tarry ye also here this night, that i may know what the lord will speak unto me more.’
english: Now therefore, I pray you, tarry ye also here this night, that I may know what the LORD will speak unto me more.’

searchText: numbers 22:20 and god came unto balaam at night, and said unto him: ‘if the men are come to call thee, rise up, go with them; but only the word which i speak unto thee, that shalt thou do.’
english: And God came unto Balaam at night, and said unto him: ‘If the men are come to call thee, rise up, go with them; but only the word which I speak unto thee, that shalt thou do.’

searchText: numbers 22:21 and balaam rose up in the morning, and saddled his ass, and went with the princes of moab.
english: And Balaam rose up in the morning, and saddled his ass, and went with the princes of Moab.

searchText: numbers 22:22 and god’s anger was kindled because he went; and the angel of the lord placed himself in the way for an adversary against him.—now he was riding upon his ass, and his two servants were with him.—
english: And God’s anger was kindled because he went; and the angel of the LORD placed himself in the way for an adversary against him.—Now he was riding upon his ass, and his two servants were with him.—

searchText: numbers 22:23 and the ass saw the angel of the lord standing in the way, with his sword drawn in his hand; and the ass turned aside out of the way, and went into the field; and balaam smote the ass, to turn her into the way.
english: And the ass saw the angel of the LORD standing in the way, with his sword drawn in his hand; and the ass turned aside out of the way, and went into the field; and Balaam smote the ass, to turn her into the way.

searchText: numbers 22:24 then the angel of the lord stood in a hollow way between the vineyards, a fence being on this side, and a fence on that side.
english: Then the angel of the LORD stood in a hollow way between the vineyards, a fence being on this side, and a fence on that side.

searchText: numbers 22:25 and the ass saw the angel of the lord, and she thrust herself unto the wall, and crushed balaam’s foot against the wall; and he smote her again.
english: And the ass saw the angel of the LORD, and she thrust herself unto the wall, and crushed Balaam’s foot against the wall; and he smote her again.

searchText: numbers 22:26 and the angel of the lord went further, and stood in a narrow place, where was no way to turn either to the right hand or to the left.
english: And the angel of the LORD went further, and stood in a narrow place, where was no way to turn either to the right hand or to the left.

searchText: numbers 22:27 and the ass saw the angel of the lord, and she lay down under balaam; and balaam’s anger was kindled, and he smote the ass with his staff.
english: And the ass saw the angel of the LORD, and she lay down under Balaam; and Balaam’s anger was kindled, and he smote the ass with his staff.

searchText: numbers 22:28 and the lord opened the mouth of the ass, and she said unto balaam: ‘what have i done unto thee, that thou hast smitten me these three times?’
english: And the LORD opened the mouth of the ass, and she said unto Balaam: ‘What have I done unto thee, that thou hast smitten me these three times?’

searchText: numbers 22:29 and balaam said unto the ass: ‘because thou hast mocked me; i would there were a sword in my hand, for now i had killed thee.’
english: And Balaam said unto the ass: ‘Because thou hast mocked me; I would there were a sword in my hand, for now I had killed thee.’

searchText: numbers 22:30 and the ass said unto balaam: ‘am not i thine ass, upon which thou hast ridden all thy life long unto this day? was i ever wont to do so unto thee?’ and he said: ‘nay.’
english: And the ass said unto Balaam: ‘Am not I thine ass, upon which thou hast ridden all thy life long unto this day? was I ever wont to do so unto thee?’ And he said: ‘Nay.’

searchText: numbers 22:31 then the lord opened the eyes of balaam, and he saw the angel of the lord standing in the way, with his sword drawn in his hand; and he bowed his head, and fell on his face.
english: Then the LORD opened the eyes of Balaam, and he saw the angel of the LORD standing in the way, with his sword drawn in his hand; and he bowed his head, and fell on his face.

searchText: numbers 22:32 and the angel of the lord said unto him: ‘wherefore hast thou smitten thine ass these three times? behold, i am come forth for an adversary, because thy way is contrary unto me;
english: And the angel of the LORD said unto him: ‘Wherefore hast thou smitten thine ass these three times? behold, I am come forth for an adversary, because thy way is contrary unto me;

searchText: numbers 22:33 and the ass saw me, and turned aside before me these three times; unless she had turned aside from me, surely now i had even slain thee, and saved her alive.’
english: and the ass saw me, and turned aside before me these three times; unless she had turned aside from me, surely now I had even slain thee, and saved her alive.’

searchText: numbers 22:34 and balaam said unto the angel of the lord: ‘i have sinned; for i knew not that thou stoodest in the way against me; now therefore, if it displease thee, i will get me back.’
english: And Balaam said unto the angel of the LORD: ‘I have sinned; for I knew not that thou stoodest in the way against me; now therefore, if it displease thee, I will get me back.’

searchText: numbers 22:35 and the angel of the lord said unto balaam: ‘go with the men; but only the word that i shall speak unto thee, that thou shalt speak.’ so balaam went with the princes of balak.
english: And the angel of the LORD said unto Balaam: ‘Go with the men; but only the word that I shall speak unto thee, that thou shalt speak.’ So Balaam went with the princes of Balak.

searchText: numbers 22:36 and when balak heard that balaam was come, he went out to meet him unto ir-moab, which is on the border of arnon, which is in the utmost part of the border.
english: And when Balak heard that Balaam was come, he went out to meet him unto Ir-moab, which is on the border of Arnon, which is in the utmost part of the border.

searchText: numbers 22:37 and balak said unto balaam: ‘did i not earnestly send unto thee to call thee? wherefore camest thou not unto me? am i not able indeed to promote thee to honour?’
english: And Balak said unto Balaam: ‘Did I not earnestly send unto thee to call thee? wherefore camest thou not unto me? am I not able indeed to promote thee to honour?’

searchText: numbers 22:38 and balaam said unto balak: ‘lo, i am come unto thee; have i now any power at all to speak any thing? the word that god putteth in my mouth, that shall i speak.’
english: And Balaam said unto Balak: ‘Lo, I am come unto thee; have I now any power at all to speak any thing? the word that God putteth in my mouth, that shall I speak.’

searchText: numbers 22:39 and balaam went with balak, and they came unto kiriath-huzoth.
english: And Balaam went with Balak, and they came unto Kiriath-huzoth.

searchText: numbers 22:40 and balak sacrificed oxen and sheep, and sent to balaam, and to the princes that were with him.
english: And Balak sacrificed oxen and sheep, and sent to Balaam, and to the princes that were with him.

searchText: numbers 22:41 and it came to pass in the morning that balak took balaam, and brought him up into bamoth-baal, and he saw from thence the utmost part of the people.
english: And it came to pass in the morning that Balak took Balaam, and brought him up into Bamoth-baal, and he saw from thence the utmost part of the people.

searchText: numbers 23:1 and balaam said unto balak: ‘build me here seven altars, and prepare me here seven bullocks and seven rams.’
english: And Balaam said unto Balak: ‘Build me here seven altars, and prepare me here seven bullocks and seven rams.’

searchText: numbers 23:2 and balak did as balaam had spoken; and balak and balaam offered on every altar a bullock and a ram.
english: And Balak did as Balaam had spoken; and Balak and Balaam offered on every altar a bullock and a ram.

searchText: numbers 23:3 and balaam said unto balak: ‘stand by thy burnt-offering, and i will go; peradventure the lord will come to meet me; and whatsoever he showeth me i will tell thee.’ and he went to a bare height.
english: And Balaam said unto Balak: ‘Stand by thy burnt-offering, and I will go; peradventure the LORD will come to meet me; and whatsoever He showeth me I will tell thee.’ And he went to a bare height.
