searchText: numbers 23:4 and god met balaam; and he said unto him: ‘i have prepared the seven altars, and i have offered up a bullock and a ram on every altar.’
english: And God met Balaam; and he said unto Him: ‘I have prepared the seven altars, and I have offered up a bullock and a ram on every altar.’

searchText: numbers 23:5 and the lord put a word in balaam’s mouth, and said: ‘return unto balak, and thus thou shalt speak.’
english: And the LORD put a word in Balaam’s mouth, and said: ‘Return unto Balak, and thus thou shalt speak.’

searchText: numbers 23:6 and he returned unto him, and, lo, he stood by his burnt-offering, he, and all the princes of moab.
english: And he returned unto him, and, lo, he stood by his burnt-offering, he, and all the princes of Moab.

searchText: numbers 23:7 and he took up his parable, and said: from aram balak bringeth me, the king of moab from the mountains of the east: ‘come, curse me jacob, and come, execrate israel.’
english: And he took up his parable, and said: From Aram Balak bringeth me, The king of Moab from the mountains of the East: ‘Come, curse me Jacob, And come, execrate Israel.’

searchText: numbers 23:8 how shall i curse, whom god hath not cursed? and how shall i execrate, whom the lord hath not execrated?
english: How shall I curse, whom God hath not cursed? And how shall I execrate, whom the LORD hath not execrated?

searchText: numbers 23:9 for from the top of the rocks i see him, and from the hills i behold him: lo, it is a people that shall dwell alone, and shall not be reckoned among the nations.
english: For from the top of the rocks I see him, And from the hills I behold him: Lo, it is a people that shall dwell alone, And shall not be reckoned among the nations.

searchText: numbers 23:10 who hath counted the dust of jacob, or numbered the stock of israel? let me die the death of the righteous, and let mine end be like his!
english: Who hath counted the dust of Jacob, Or numbered the stock of Israel? Let me die the death of the righteous, And let mine end be like his!

searchText: numbers 23:11 and balak said unto balaam: ‘what hast thou done unto me? i took thee to curse mine enemies, and, behold, thou hast blessed them altogether.’
english: And Balak said unto Balaam: ‘What hast thou done unto me? I took thee to curse mine enemies, and, behold, thou hast blessed them altogether.’

searchText: numbers 23:12 and he answered and said: ‘must i not take heed to speak that which the lord putteth in my mouth?’
english: And he answered and said: ‘Must I not take heed to speak that which the LORD putteth in my mouth?’

searchText: numbers 23:13 and balak said unto him: ‘come, i pray thee, with me unto another place, from whence thou mayest see them; thou shalt see but the utmost part of them, and shalt not see them all; and curse me them from thence.’
english: And Balak said unto him: ‘Come, I pray thee, with me unto another place, from whence thou mayest see them; thou shalt see but the utmost part of them, and shalt not see them all; and curse me them from thence.’

searchText: numbers 23:14 and he took him into the field of zophim, to the top of pisgah, and built seven altars, and offered up a bullock and a ram on every altar.
english: And he took him into the field of Zophim, to the top of Pisgah, and built seven altars, and offered up a bullock and a ram on every altar.

searchText: numbers 23:15 and he said unto balak: ‘stand here by thy burnt-offering, while i go toward a meeting yonder.’
english: And he said unto Balak: ‘Stand here by thy burnt-offering, while I go toward a meeting yonder.’

searchText: numbers 23:16 and the lord met balaam, and put a word in his mouth, and said: ‘return unto balak, and thus shalt thou speak.’
english: And the LORD met Balaam, and put a word in his mouth, and said: ‘Return unto Balak, and thus shalt thou speak.’

searchText: numbers 23:17 and he came to him, and, lo, he stood by his burnt-offering, and the princes of moab with him. and balak said unto him: ‘what hath the lord spoken?’
english: And he came to him, and, lo, he stood by his burnt-offering, and the princes of Moab with him. And Balak said unto him: ‘What hath the LORD spoken?’

searchText: numbers 23:18 and he took up his parable, and said: arise, balak, and hear; give ear unto me, thou son of zippor:
english: And he took up his parable, and said: Arise, Balak, and hear; Give ear unto me, thou son of Zippor:

searchText: numbers 23:19 god is not a man, that he should lie; neither the son of man, that he should repent: when he hath said, will he not do it? or when he hath spoken, will he not make it good?
english: God is not a man, that He should lie; Neither the son of man, that He should repent: When He hath said, will He not do it? Or when He hath spoken, will He not make it good?

searchText: numbers 23:20 behold, i am bidden to bless; and when he hath blessed, i cannot call it back.
english: Behold, I am bidden to bless; And when He hath blessed, I cannot call it back.

searchText: numbers 23:21 none hath beheld iniquity in jacob, neither hath one seen perverseness in israel; the lord his god is with him, and the shouting for the king is among them.
english: None hath beheld iniquity in Jacob, Neither hath one seen perverseness in Israel; The LORD his God is with him, And the shouting for the King is among them.

searchText: numbers 23:22 god who brought them forth out of egypt is for them like the lofty horns of the wild-ox.
english: God who brought them forth out of Egypt Is for them like the lofty horns of the wild-ox.

searchText: numbers 23:23 for there is no enchantment with jacob, neither is there any divination with israel; now is it said of jacob and of israel: ‘what hath god wrought! ’
english: For there is no enchantment with Jacob, Neither is there any divination with Israel; Now is it said of Jacob and of Israel: ‘What hath God wrought! ’

searchText: numbers 23:24 behold a people that riseth up as a lioness, and as a lion doth he lift himself up; he shall not lie down until he eat of the prey, and drink the blood of the slain.
english: Behold a people that riseth up as a lioness, And as a lion doth he lift himself up; He shall not lie down until he eat of the prey, And drink the blood of the slain.

searchText: numbers 23:25 and balak said unto balaam: ‘neither curse them at all, nor bless them at all.’
english: And Balak said unto Balaam: ‘Neither curse them at all, nor bless them at all.’

searchText: numbers 23:26 but balaam answered and said unto balak: ‘told not i thee, saying: all that the lord speaketh, that i must do?’
english: But Balaam answered and said unto Balak: ‘Told not I thee, saying: All that the LORD speaketh, that I must do?’

searchText: numbers 23:27 and balak said unto balaam: ‘come now, i will take thee unto another place; peradventure it will please god that thou mayest curse me them from thence.’
english: And Balak said unto Balaam: ‘Come now, I will take thee unto another place; peradventure it will please God that thou mayest curse me them from thence.’

searchText: numbers 23:28 and balak took balaam unto the top of peor, that looketh down upon the desert.
english: And Balak took Balaam unto the top of Peor, that looketh down upon the desert.

searchText: numbers 23:29 and balaam said unto balak: ‘build me here seven altars, and prepare me here seven bullocks and seven rams.’
english: And Balaam said unto Balak: ‘Build me here seven altars, and prepare me here seven bullocks and seven rams.’

searchText: numbers 23:30 and balak did as balaam had said, and offered up a bullock and a ram on every altar.
english: And Balak did as Balaam had said, and offered up a bullock and a ram on every altar.

searchText: numbers 24:1 and when balaam saw that it pleased the lord to bless israel, he went not, as at the other times, to meet with enchantments, but he set his face toward the wilderness.
english: And when Balaam saw that it pleased the LORD to bless Israel, he went not, as at the other times, to meet with enchantments, but he set his face toward the wilderness.

searchText: numbers 24:2 and balaam lifted up his eyes, and he saw israel dwelling tribe by tribe; and the spirit of god came upon him.
english: And Balaam lifted up his eyes, and he saw Israel dwelling tribe by tribe; and the spirit of God came upon him.

searchText: numbers 24:3 and he took up his parable, and said: the saying of balaam the son of beor, and the saying of the man whose eye is opened;
english: And he took up his parable, and said: The saying of Balaam the son of Beor, And the saying of the man whose eye is opened;

searchText: numbers 24:4 the saying of him who heareth the words of god, who seeth the vision of the almighty, fallen down, yet with opened eyes:
english: The saying of him who heareth the words of God, Who seeth the vision of the Almighty, Fallen down, yet with opened eyes:

searchText: numbers 24:5 how goodly are thy tents, o jacob, thy dwellings, o israel!
english: How goodly are thy tents, O Jacob, Thy dwellings, O Israel!

searchText: numbers 24:6 as valleys stretched out, as gardens by the river-side; as aloes planted of the lord, as cedars beside the waters;
english: As valleys stretched out, As gardens by the river-side; As aloes planted of the LORD, As cedars beside the waters;

searchText: numbers 24:7 water shall flow from his branches, and his seed shall be in many waters; and his king shall be higher than agag, and his kingdom shall be exalted.
english: Water shall flow from his branches, And his seed shall be in many waters; And his king shall be higher than Agag, And his kingdom shall be exalted.

searchText: numbers 24:8 god who brought him forth out of egypt is for him like the lofty horns of the wild-ox; he shall eat up the nations that are his adversaries, and shall break their bones in pieces, and pierce them through with his arrows.
english: God who brought him forth out of Egypt Is for him like the lofty horns of the wild-ox; He shall eat up the nations that are his adversaries, And shall break their bones in pieces, And pierce them through with his arrows.

searchText: numbers 24:9 he couched, he lay down as a lion, and as a lioness; who shall rouse him up? blessed be every one that blesseth thee, and cursed be every one that curseth thee.
english: He couched, he lay down as a lion, And as a lioness; who shall rouse him up? Blessed be every one that blesseth thee, And cursed be every one that curseth thee.

searchText: numbers 24:10 and balak’s anger was kindled against balaam, and he smote his hands together; and balak said unto balaam: ‘i called thee to curse mine enemies, and, behold, thou hast altogether blessed them these three times.
english: And Balak’s anger was kindled against Balaam, and he smote his hands together; and Balak said unto Balaam: ‘I called thee to curse mine enemies, and, behold, thou hast altogether blessed them these three times.

searchText: numbers 24:11 therefore now flee thou to thy place; i thought to promote thee unto great honour; but, lo, the lord hath kept thee back from honour.’
english: Therefore now flee thou to thy place; I thought to promote thee unto great honour; but, lo, the LORD hath kept thee back from honour.’

searchText: numbers 24:12 and balaam said unto balak: ‘spoke i not also to thy messengers that thou didst send unto me, saying:
english: And Balaam said unto Balak: ‘Spoke I not also to thy messengers that thou didst send unto me, saying:

searchText: numbers 24:13 if balak would give me his house full of silver and gold, i cannot go beyond the word of the lord, to do either good or bad of mine own mind; what the lord speaketh, that will i speak?
english: If Balak would give me his house full of silver and gold, I cannot go beyond the word of the LORD, to do either good or bad of mine own mind; what the LORD speaketh, that will I speak?

searchText: numbers 24:14 and now, behold, i go unto my people; come, and i will announce to thee what this people shall do to thy people in the end of days.’
english: And now, behold, I go unto my people; come, and I will announce to thee what this people shall do to thy people in the end of days.’

searchText: numbers 24:15 and he took up his parable, and said: the saying of balaam the son of beor, and the saying of the man whose eye is opened;
english: And he took up his parable, and said: The saying of Balaam the son of Beor, And the saying of the man whose eye is opened;

searchText: numbers 24:16 the saying of him who heareth the words of god, and knoweth the knowledge of the most high, who seeth the vision of the almighty, fallen down, yet with opened eyes:
english: The saying of him who heareth the words of God, And knoweth the knowledge of the Most High, Who seeth the vision of the Almighty, Fallen down, yet with opened eyes:

searchText: numbers 24:17 i see him, but not now; i behold him, but not nigh; there shall step forth a star out of jacob, and a scepter shall rise out of israel, and shall smite through the corners of moab, and break down all the sons of seth.
english: I see him, but not now; I behold him, but not nigh; There shall step forth a star out of Jacob, And a scepter shall rise out of Israel, And shall smite through the corners of Moab, And break down all the sons of Seth.

searchText: numbers 24:18 and edom shall be a possession, seir also, even his enemies, shall be a possession; while israel doeth valiantly.
english: And Edom shall be a possession, Seir also, even his enemies, shall be a possession; While Israel doeth valiantly.

searchText: numbers 24:19 and out of jacob shall one have dominion, and shall destroy the remnant from the city.
english: And out of Jacob shall one have dominion, And shall destroy the remnant from the city.

searchText: numbers 24:20 and he looked on amalek, and took up his parable, and said: amalek was the first of the nations; but his end shall come to destruction.
english: And he looked on Amalek, and took up his parable, and said: Amalek was the first of the nations; But his end shall come to destruction.

searchText: numbers 24:21 and he looked on the kenite, and took up his parable, and said: though firm be thy dwelling-place, and though thy nest be set in the rock;
english: And he looked on the Kenite, and took up his parable, and said: Though firm be thy dwelling-place, And though thy nest be set in the rock;

searchText: numbers 24:22 nevertheless kain shall be wasted; how long? asshur shall carry thee away captive. .
english: Nevertheless Kain shall be wasted; How long? Asshur shall carry thee away captive. .

searchText: numbers 24:23 and he took up his parable, and said: alas, who shall live after god hath appointed him?
english: And he took up his parable, and said: Alas, who shall live after God hath appointed him?

searchText: numbers 24:24 but ships shall come from the coast of kittim, and they shall afflict asshur, and shall afflict eber, and he also shall come to destruction.
english: But ships shall come from the coast of Kittim, And they shall afflict Asshur, and shall afflict Eber, And he also shall come to destruction.

searchText: numbers 24:25 and balaam rose up, and went and returned to his place; and balak also went his way.
english: And Balaam rose up, and went and returned to his place; and Balak also went his way.

searchText: numbers 25:1 and israel abode in shittim, and the people began to commit harlotry with the daughters of moab.
english: And Israel abode in Shittim, and the people began to commit harlotry with the daughters of Moab.

searchText: numbers 25:2 and they called the people unto the sacrifices of their gods; and the people did eat, and bowed down to their gods.
english: And they called the people unto the sacrifices of their gods; and the people did eat, and bowed down to their gods.

searchText: numbers 25:3 and israel joined himself unto the baal of peor; and the anger of the lord was kindled against israel.
english: And Israel joined himself unto the Baal of Peor; and the anger of the LORD was kindled against Israel.

searchText: numbers 25:4 and the lord said unto moses: ‘take all the chiefs of the people, and hang them up unto the lord in face of the sun, that the fierce anger of the lord may turn away from israel.’
english: And the LORD said unto Moses: ‘Take all the chiefs of the people, and hang them up unto the LORD in face of the sun, that the fierce anger of the LORD may turn away from Israel.’

searchText: numbers 25:5 and moses said unto the judges of israel: ‘slay ye every one his men that have joined themselves unto the baal of peor.’
english: And Moses said unto the judges of Israel: ‘Slay ye every one his men that have joined themselves unto the Baal of Peor.’

searchText: numbers 25:6 and, behold, one of the children of israel came and brought unto his brethren a midianitish woman in the sight of moses, and in the sight of all the congregation of the children of israel, while they were weeping at the door of the tent of meeting.
english: And, behold, one of the children of Israel came and brought unto his brethren a Midianitish woman in the sight of Moses, and in the sight of all the congregation of the children of Israel, while they were weeping at the door of the tent of meeting.

searchText: numbers 25:7 and when phinehas, the son of eleazar, the son of aaron the priest, saw it, he rose up from the midst of the congregation, and took a spear in his hand.
english: And when Phinehas, the son of Eleazar, the son of Aaron the priest, saw it, he rose up from the midst of the congregation, and took a spear in his hand.

searchText: numbers 25:8 and he went after the man of israel into the chamber, and thrust both of them through, the man of israel, and the woman through her belly. so the plague was stayed from the children of israel.
english: And he went after the man of Israel into the chamber, and thrust both of them through, the man of Israel, and the woman through her belly. So the plague was stayed from the children of Israel.

searchText: numbers 25:9 and those that died by the plague were twenty and four thousand.
english: And those that died by the plague were twenty and four thousand.

searchText: numbers 25:10 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 25:11 ’phinehas, the son of eleazar, the son of aaron the priest, hath turned my wrath away from the children of israel, in that he was very jealous for my sake among them, so that i consumed not the children of israel in my jealousy.
english: ’Phinehas, the son of Eleazar, the son of Aaron the priest, hath turned My wrath away from the children of Israel, in that he was very jealous for My sake among them, so that I consumed not the children of Israel in My jealousy.

searchText: numbers 25:12 wherefore say: behold, i give unto him my covenant of peace;
english: Wherefore say: Behold, I give unto him My covenant of peace;

searchText: numbers 25:13 and it shall be unto him, and to his seed after him, the covenant of an everlasting priesthood; because he was jealous for his god, and made atonement for the children of israel.’
english: and it shall be unto him, and to his seed after him, the covenant of an everlasting priesthood; because he was jealous for his God, and made atonement for the children of Israel.’

searchText: numbers 25:14 now the name of the man of israel that was slain, who was slain with the midianitish woman, was zimri, the son of salu, a prince of a fathers’house among the simeonites.
english: Now the name of the man of Israel that was slain, who was slain with the Midianitish woman, was Zimri, the son of Salu, a prince of a fathers’house among the Simeonites.

searchText: numbers 25:15 and the name of the midianitish woman that was slain was cozbi, the daughter of zur; he was head of the people of a fathers’house in midian.
english: And the name of the Midianitish woman that was slain was Cozbi, the daughter of Zur; he was head of the people of a fathers’house in Midian.

searchText: numbers 25:16 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 25:17 ’harass the midianites, and smite them;
english: ’Harass the Midianites, and smite them;

searchText: numbers 25:18 for they harass you, by their wiles wherewith they have beguiled you in the matter of peor, and in the matter of cozbi, the daughter of the prince of midian, their sister, who was slain on the day of the plague in the matter of peor.’
english: for they harass you, by their wiles wherewith they have beguiled you in the matter of Peor, and in the matter of Cozbi, the daughter of the prince of Midian, their sister, who was slain on the day of the plague in the matter of Peor.’

searchText: numbers 26:1 and it came to pass after the plague, that the lord spoke unto moses and unto eleazar the son of aaron the priest, saying:
english: And it came to pass after the plague, that the LORD spoke unto Moses and unto Eleazar the son of Aaron the priest, saying:

searchText: numbers 26:2 ’take the sum of all the congregation of the children of israel, from twenty years old and upward, by their fathers’houses, all that are able to go forth to war in israel.’
english: ’Take the sum of all the congregation of the children of Israel, from twenty years old and upward, by their fathers’houses, all that are able to go forth to war in Israel.’

searchText: numbers 26:3 and moses and eleazar the priest spoke with them in the plains of moab by the jordan at jericho, saying:
english: And Moses and Eleazar the priest spoke with them in the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho, saying:

searchText: numbers 26:4 ’[take the sum of the people,] from twenty years old and upward, as the lord commanded moses and the children of israel, that came forth out of the land of egypt.’
english: ’[Take the sum of the people,] from twenty years old and upward, as the LORD commanded Moses and the children of Israel, that came forth out of the land of Egypt.’

searchText: numbers 26:5 reuben, the first-born of israel: the sons of reuben: of hanoch, the family of the hanochites; of pallu, the family of the palluites;
english: Reuben, the first-born of Israel: the sons of Reuben: of Hanoch, the family of the Hanochites; of Pallu, the family of the Palluites;

searchText: numbers 26:6 of hezron, the family of the hezronites; of carmi, the family of the carmites.
english: of Hezron, the family of the Hezronites; of Carmi, the family of the Carmites.

searchText: numbers 26:7 these are the families of the reubenites; and they that were numbered of them were forty and three thousand and seven hundred and thirty.
english: These are the families of the Reubenites; and they that were numbered of them were forty and three thousand and seven hundred and thirty.

searchText: numbers 26:8 and the sons of pallu: eliab.
english: And the sons of Pallu: Eliab.

searchText: numbers 26:9 and the sons of eliab: nemuel, and dathan, and abiram. these are that dathan and abiram, the elect of the congregation, who strove against moses and against aaron in the company of korah, when they strove against the lord;
english: And the sons of Eliab: Nemuel, and Dathan, and Abiram. These are that Dathan and Abiram, the elect of the congregation, who strove against Moses and against Aaron in the company of Korah, when they strove against the LORD;

searchText: numbers 26:10 and the earth opened her mouth, and swallowed them up together with korah, when that company died; what time the fire devoured two hundred and fifty men, and they became a sign.
english: and the earth opened her mouth, and swallowed them up together with Korah, when that company died; what time the fire devoured two hundred and fifty men, and they became a sign.

searchText: numbers 26:11 notwithstanding the sons of korah died not.
english: Notwithstanding the sons of Korah died not.

searchText: numbers 26:12 the sons of simeon after their families: of nemuel, the family of the nemuelites; of jamin, the family of the jaminites; of jachin, the family of the jachinites;
english: The sons of Simeon after their families: of Nemuel, the family of the Nemuelites; of Jamin, the family of the Jaminites; of Jachin, the family of the Jachinites;

searchText: numbers 26:13 of zerah, the family of the zerahites; of shaul, the family of the shaulites.
english: of Zerah, the family of the Zerahites; of Shaul, the family of the Shaulites.

searchText: numbers 26:14 these are the families of the simeonites, twenty and two thousand and two hundred.
english: These are the families of the Simeonites, twenty and two thousand and two hundred.

searchText: numbers 26:15 the sons of gad after their families: of zephon, the family of the zephonites; of haggi, the family of the haggites; of shuni, the family of the shunites;
english: The sons of Gad after their families: of Zephon, the family of the Zephonites; of Haggi, the family of the Haggites; of Shuni, the family of the Shunites;

searchText: numbers 26:16 of ozni, the family of the oznites; of eri, the family of the erites;
english: of Ozni, the family of the Oznites; of Eri, the family of the Erites;

searchText: numbers 26:17 of arod, the family of the arodites; of areli, the family of the arelites.
english: of Arod, the family of the Arodites; of Areli, the family of the Arelites.

searchText: numbers 26:18 these are the families of the sons of gad according to those that were numbered of them, forty thousand and five hundred.
english: These are the families of the sons of Gad according to those that were numbered of them, forty thousand and five hundred.

searchText: numbers 26:19 the sons of judah: er and onan; and er and onan died in the land of canaan.
english: The sons of Judah: Er and Onan; and Er and Onan died in the land of Canaan.

searchText: numbers 26:20 and the sons of judah after their families were: of shelah, the family of the shelanites; of perez, the family of the perezites; of zerah, the family of the zerahites.
english: And the sons of Judah after their families were: of Shelah, the family of the Shelanites; of Perez, the family of the Perezites; of Zerah, the family of the Zerahites.

searchText: numbers 26:21 and the sons of perez were: of hezron, the family of the hezronites; of hamul, the family of the hamulites.
english: And the sons of Perez were: of Hezron, the family of the Hezronites; of Hamul, the family of the Hamulites.

searchText: numbers 26:22 these are the families of judah according to those that were numbered of them, threescore and sixteen thousand and five hundred.
english: These are the families of Judah according to those that were numbered of them, threescore and sixteen thousand and five hundred.

searchText: numbers 26:23 the sons of issachar after their families: of tola, the family of the tolaites; of puvah, the family of the punites;
english: The sons of Issachar after their families: of Tola, the family of the Tolaites; of Puvah, the family of the Punites;

searchText: numbers 26:24 of jashub, the family of the jashubites; of shimron, the family of the shimronites.
english: of Jashub, the family of the Jashubites; of Shimron, the family of the Shimronites.

searchText: numbers 26:25 these are the families of issachar according to those that were numbered of them, threescore and four thousand and three hundred.
english: These are the families of Issachar according to those that were numbered of them, threescore and four thousand and three hundred.

searchText: numbers 26:26 the sons of zebulun after their families: of sered, the family of the seredites; of elon, the family of the elonites; of jahleel, the family of the jahleelites.
english: The sons of Zebulun after their families: of Sered, the family of the Seredites; of Elon, the family of the Elonites; of Jahleel, the family of the Jahleelites.

searchText: numbers 26:27 these are the families of the zebulunites according to those that were numbered of them, threescore thousand and five hundred.
english: These are the families of the Zebulunites according to those that were numbered of them, threescore thousand and five hundred.

searchText: numbers 26:28 the sons of joseph after their families: manasseh and ephraim.
english: The sons of Joseph after their families: Manasseh and Ephraim.

searchText: numbers 26:29 the sons of manasseh: of machir, the family of the machirites—and machir begot gilead; of gilead, the family of the gileadites.
english: The sons of Manasseh: of Machir, the family of the Machirites—and Machir begot Gilead; of Gilead, the family of the Gileadites.

searchText: numbers 26:30 these are the sons of gilead: of iezer, the family of the iezerites; of helek, the family of the helekites;
english: These are the sons of Gilead: of Iezer, the family of the Iezerites; of Helek, the family of the Helekites;

searchText: numbers 26:31 and of asriel, the family of the asrielites; and of shechem, the family of the shechemites;
english: and of Asriel, the family of the Asrielites; and of Shechem, the family of the Shechemites;

searchText: numbers 26:32 and of shemida, the family of the shemidaites; and of hepher, the family of the hepherites.
english: and of Shemida, the family of the Shemidaites; and of Hepher, the family of the Hepherites.

searchText: numbers 26:33 and zelophehad the son of hepher had no sons, but daughters; and the names of the daughters of zelophehad were mahlah, and noah, hoglah, milcah, and tirzah.
english: And Zelophehad the son of Hepher had no sons, but daughters; and the names of the daughters of Zelophehad were Mahlah, and Noah, Hoglah, Milcah, and Tirzah.

searchText: numbers 26:34 these are the families of manasseh; and they that were numbered of them were fifty and two thousand and seven hundred.
english: These are the families of Manasseh; and they that were numbered of them were fifty and two thousand and seven hundred.

searchText: numbers 26:35 these are the sons of ephraim after their families: of shuthelah, the family of the shuthelahites; of becher, the family of the becherites; of tahan, the family of the tahanites.
english: These are the sons of Ephraim after their families: of Shuthelah, the family of the Shuthelahites; of Becher, the family of the Becherites; of Tahan, the family of the Tahanites.

searchText: numbers 26:36 and these are the sons of shuthelah: of eran, the family of the eranites.
english: And these are the sons of Shuthelah: of Eran, the family of the Eranites.

searchText: numbers 26:37 these are the families of the sons of ephraim according to those that were numbered of them, thirty and two thousand and five hundred. these are the sons of joseph after their families.
english: These are the families of the sons of Ephraim according to those that were numbered of them, thirty and two thousand and five hundred. These are the sons of Joseph after their families.

searchText: numbers 26:38 the sons of benjamin after their families: of bela, the family of the belaites; of ashbel, the family of the ashbelites; of ahiram, the family of the ahiramites;
english: The sons of Benjamin after their families: of Bela, the family of the Belaites; of Ashbel, the family of the Ashbelites; of Ahiram, the family of the Ahiramites;

searchText: numbers 26:39 of shephupham, the family of the shuphamites; of hupham, the family of the huphamites.
english: of Shephupham, the family of the Shuphamites; of Hupham, the family of the Huphamites.

searchText: numbers 26:40 and the sons of bela were ard and naaman; [of ard,] the family of the ardites; of naaman, the family of the naamites.
english: And the sons of Bela were Ard and Naaman; [of Ard,] the family of the Ardites; of Naaman, the family of the Naamites.

searchText: numbers 26:41 these are the sons of benjamin after their families; and they that were numbered of them were forty and five thousand and six hundred.
english: These are the sons of Benjamin after their families; and they that were numbered of them were forty and five thousand and six hundred.

searchText: numbers 26:42 these are the sons of dan after their families: of shuham, the family of the shuhamites. these are the families of dan after their families.
english: These are the sons of Dan after their families: of Shuham, the family of the Shuhamites. These are the families of Dan after their families.

searchText: numbers 26:43 all the families of the shuhamites, according to those that were numbered of them, were threescore and four thousand and four hundred. .
english: All the families of the Shuhamites, according to those that were numbered of them, were threescore and four thousand and four hundred. .

searchText: numbers 26:44 the sons of asher after their families: of imnah, the family of the imnites; of ishvi, the family of the ishvites; of beriah, the family of the beriites.
english: The sons of Asher after their families: of Imnah, the family of the Imnites; of Ishvi, the family of the Ishvites; of Beriah, the family of the Beriites.

searchText: numbers 26:45 of the sons of beriah: of heber, the family of the heberites; of malchiel, the family of the malchielites.
english: Of the sons of Beriah: of Heber, the family of the Heberites; of Malchiel, the family of the Malchielites.

searchText: numbers 26:46 and the name of the daughter of asher was serah.
english: And the name of the daughter of Asher was Serah.

searchText: numbers 26:47 these are the families of the sons of asher according to those that were numbered of them, fifty and three thousand and four hundred.
english: These are the families of the sons of Asher according to those that were numbered of them, fifty and three thousand and four hundred.

searchText: numbers 26:48 the sons of naphtali after their families: of jahzeel, the family of the jahzeelites; of guni, the family of the gunites;
english: The sons of Naphtali after their families: of Jahzeel, the family of the Jahzeelites; of Guni, the family of the Gunites;

searchText: numbers 26:49 of jezer, the family of the jezerites; of shillem, the family of the shillemites.
english: of Jezer, the family of the Jezerites; of Shillem, the family of the Shillemites.

searchText: numbers 26:50 these are the families of naphtali according to their families; and they that were numbered of them were forty and five thousand and four hundred.
english: These are the families of Naphtali according to their families; and they that were numbered of them were forty and five thousand and four hundred.

searchText: numbers 26:51 these are they that were numbered of the children of israel, six hundred thousand and a thousand and seven hundred and thirty.
english: These are they that were numbered of the children of Israel, six hundred thousand and a thousand and seven hundred and thirty.

searchText: numbers 26:52 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 26:53 ’unto these the land shall be divided for an inheritance according to the number of names.
english: ’Unto these the land shall be divided for an inheritance according to the number of names.

searchText: numbers 26:54 to the more thou shalt give the more inheritance, and to the fewer thou shalt give the less inheritance; to each one according to those that were numbered of it shall its inheritance be given.
english: To the more thou shalt give the more inheritance, and to the fewer thou shalt give the less inheritance; to each one according to those that were numbered of it shall its inheritance be given.

searchText: numbers 26:55 notwithstanding the land shall be divided by lot; according to the names of the tribes of their fathers they shall inherit.
english: Notwithstanding the land shall be divided by lot; according to the names of the tribes of their fathers they shall inherit.

searchText: numbers 26:56 according to the lot shall their inheritance be divided between the more and the fewer.’
english: According to the lot shall their inheritance be divided between the more and the fewer.’

searchText: numbers 26:57 and these are they that were numbered of the levites after their families: of gershon, the family of the gershonites; of kohath, the family of the kohathites; of merari, the family of the merarites.
english: And these are they that were numbered of the Levites after their families: of Gershon, the family of the Gershonites; of Kohath, the family of the Kohathites; of Merari, the family of the Merarites.

searchText: numbers 26:58 these are the families of levi: the family of the libnites, the family of the hebronites, the family of the mahlites, the family of the mushites, the family of the korahites. and kohath begot amram.
english: These are the families of Levi: the family of the Libnites, the family of the Hebronites, the family of the Mahlites, the family of the Mushites, the family of the Korahites. And Kohath begot Amram.

searchText: numbers 26:59 and the name of amram’s wife was jochebed, the daughter of levi, who was born to levi in egypt; and she bore unto amram aaron and moses, and miriam their sister.
english: And the name of Amram’s wife was Jochebed, the daughter of Levi, who was born to Levi in Egypt; and she bore unto Amram Aaron and Moses, and Miriam their sister.

searchText: numbers 26:60 and unto aaron were born nadab and abihu, eleazar and ithamar.
english: And unto Aaron were born Nadab and Abihu, Eleazar and Ithamar.

searchText: numbers 26:61 and nadab and abihu died, when they offered strange fire before the lord.
english: And Nadab and Abihu died, when they offered strange fire before the LORD.

searchText: numbers 26:62 and they that were numbered of them were twenty and three thousand, every male from a month old and upward; for they were not numbered among the children of israel, because there was no inheritance given them among the children of israel.
english: And they that were numbered of them were twenty and three thousand, every male from a month old and upward; for they were not numbered among the children of Israel, because there was no inheritance given them among the children of Israel.

searchText: numbers 26:63 these are they that were numbered by moses and eleazar the priest, who numbered the children of israel in the plains of moab by the jordan at jericho.
english: These are they that were numbered by Moses and Eleazar the priest, who numbered the children of Israel in the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho.

searchText: numbers 26:64 but among these there was not a man of them that were numbered by moses and aaron the priest, who numbered the children of israel in the wilderness of sinai.
english: But among these there was not a man of them that were numbered by Moses and Aaron the priest, who numbered the children of Israel in the wilderness of Sinai.

searchText: numbers 26:65 for the lord had said of them: ‘they shall surely die in the wilderness.’ and there was not left a man of them, save caleb the son of jephunneh, and joshua the son of nun.
english: For the LORD had said of them: ‘They shall surely die in the wilderness.’ And there was not left a man of them, save Caleb the son of Jephunneh, and Joshua the son of Nun.

searchText: numbers 27:1 then drew near the daughters of zelophehad, the son of hepher, the son of gilead, the son of machir, the son of manasseh, of the families of manasseh the son of joseph; and these are the names of his daughters: mahlah, noah, and hoglah, and milcah, and tirzah.
english: Then drew near the daughters of Zelophehad, the son of Hepher, the son of Gilead, the son of Machir, the son of Manasseh, of the families of Manasseh the son of Joseph; and these are the names of his daughters: Mahlah, Noah, and Hoglah, and Milcah, and Tirzah.

searchText: numbers 27:2 and they stood before moses, and before eleazar the priest, and before the princes and all the congregation, at the door of the tent of meeting, saying:
english: And they stood before Moses, and before Eleazar the priest, and before the princes and all the congregation, at the door of the tent of meeting, saying:

searchText: numbers 27:3 ’our father died in the wilderness, and he was not among the company of them that gathered themselves together against the lord in the company of korah, but he died in his own sin; and he had no sons.
english: ’Our father died in the wilderness, and he was not among the company of them that gathered themselves together against the LORD in the company of Korah, but he died in his own sin; and he had no sons.

searchText: numbers 27:4 why should the name of our father be done away from among his family, because he had no son? give unto us a possession among the brethren of our father.’
english: Why should the name of our father be done away from among his family, because he had no son? Give unto us a possession among the brethren of our father.’

searchText: numbers 27:5 and moses brought their cause before the lord.
english: And Moses brought their cause before the LORD.

searchText: numbers 27:6 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 27:7 ’the daughters of zelophehad speak right: thou shalt surely give them a possession of an inheritance among their father’s brethren; and thou shalt cause the inheritance of their father to pass unto them.
english: ’The daughters of Zelophehad speak right: thou shalt surely give them a possession of an inheritance among their father’s brethren; and thou shalt cause the inheritance of their father to pass unto them.

searchText: numbers 27:8 and thou shalt speak unto the children of israel, saying: if a man die, and have no son, then ye shall cause his inheritance to pass unto his daughter.
english: And thou shalt speak unto the children of Israel, saying: If a man die, and have no son, then ye shall cause his inheritance to pass unto his daughter.

searchText: numbers 27:9 and if he have no daughter, then ye shall give his inheritance unto his brethren.
english: And if he have no daughter, then ye shall give his inheritance unto his brethren.

searchText: numbers 27:10 and if he have no brethren, then ye shall give his inheritance unto his father’s brethren.
english: And if he have no brethren, then ye shall give his inheritance unto his father’s brethren.

searchText: numbers 27:11 and if his father have no brethren, then ye shall give his inheritance unto his kinsman that is next to him of his family, and he shall possess it. and it shall be unto the children of israel a statute of judgment, as the lord commanded moses.’
english: And if his father have no brethren, then ye shall give his inheritance unto his kinsman that is next to him of his family, and he shall possess it. And it shall be unto the children of Israel a statute of judgment, as the LORD commanded Moses.’

searchText: numbers 27:12 and the lord said unto moses: ‘get thee up into this mountain of abarim, and behold the land which i have given unto the children of israel.
english: And the LORD said unto Moses: ‘Get thee up into this mountain of Abarim, and behold the land which I have given unto the children of Israel.

searchText: numbers 27:13 and when thou hast seen it, thou also shalt be gathered unto thy people, as aaron thy brother was gathered;
english: And when thou hast seen it, thou also shalt be gathered unto thy people, as Aaron thy brother was gathered;

searchText: numbers 27:14 because ye rebelled against my commandment in the wilderness of zin, in the strife of the congregation, to sanctify me at the waters before their eyes.’—these are the waters of meribath-kadesh in the wilderness of zin.—
english: because ye rebelled against My commandment in the wilderness of Zin, in the strife of the congregation, to sanctify Me at the waters before their eyes.’—These are the waters of Meribath-kadesh in the wilderness of Zin.—

searchText: numbers 27:15 and moses spoke unto the lord, saying:
english: And Moses spoke unto the LORD, saying:

searchText: numbers 27:16 ’let the lord, the god of the spirits of all flesh, set a man over the congregation,
english: ’Let the LORD, the God of the spirits of all flesh, set a man over the congregation,

searchText: numbers 27:17 who may go out before them, and who may come in before them, and who may lead them out, and who may bring them in; that the congregation of the lord be not as sheep which have no shepherd.’
english: who may go out before them, and who may come in before them, and who may lead them out, and who may bring them in; that the congregation of the LORD be not as sheep which have no shepherd.’

searchText: numbers 27:18 and the lord said unto moses: ‘take thee joshua the son of nun, a man in whom is spirit, and lay thy hand upon him;
english: And the LORD said unto Moses: ‘Take thee Joshua the son of Nun, a man in whom is spirit, and lay thy hand upon him;

searchText: numbers 27:19 and set him before eleazar the priest, and before all the congregation; and give him a charge in their sight.
english: and set him before Eleazar the priest, and before all the congregation; and give him a charge in their sight.

searchText: numbers 27:20 and thou shalt put of thy honour upon him, that all the congregation of the children of israel may hearken.
english: And thou shalt put of thy honour upon him, that all the congregation of the children of Israel may hearken.

searchText: numbers 27:21 and he shall stand before eleazar the priest, who shall inquire for him by the judgment of the urim before the lord; at his word shall they go out, and at his word they shall come in, both he, and all the children of israel with him, even all the congregation.’
english: And he shall stand before Eleazar the priest, who shall inquire for him by the judgment of the Urim before the LORD; at his word shall they go out, and at his word they shall come in, both he, and all the children of Israel with him, even all the congregation.’

searchText: numbers 27:22 and moses did as the lord commanded him; and he took joshua, and set him before eleazar the priest, and before all the congregation.
english: And Moses did as the LORD commanded him; and he took Joshua, and set him before Eleazar the priest, and before all the congregation.

searchText: numbers 27:23 and he laid his hands upon him, and gave him a charge, as the lord spoke by the hand of moses.
english: And he laid his hands upon him, and gave him a charge, as the LORD spoke by the hand of Moses.

searchText: numbers 28:1 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 28:2 command the children of israel, and say unto them: my food which is presented unto me for offerings made by fire, of a sweet savour unto me, shall ye observe to offer unto me in its due season.
english: Command the children of Israel, and say unto them: My food which is presented unto Me for offerings made by fire, of a sweet savour unto Me, shall ye observe to offer unto Me in its due season.

searchText: numbers 28:3 and thou shalt say unto them: this is the offering made by fire which ye shall bring unto the lord: he-lambs of the first year without blemish, two day by day, for a continual burnt-offering.
english: And thou shalt say unto them: This is the offering made by fire which ye shall bring unto the LORD: he-lambs of the first year without blemish, two day by day, for a continual burnt-offering.

searchText: numbers 28:4 the one lamb shalt thou offer in the morning, and the other lamb shalt thou offer at dusk;
english: The one lamb shalt thou offer in the morning, and the other lamb shalt thou offer at dusk;

searchText: numbers 28:5 and the tenth part of an ephah of fine flour for a meal-offering, mingled with the fourth part of a hin of beaten oil.
english: and the tenth part of an ephah of fine flour for a meal-offering, mingled with the fourth part of a hin of beaten oil.

searchText: numbers 28:6 it is a continual burnt-offering, which was offered in mount sinai, for a sweet savour, an offering made by fire unto the lord.
english: It is a continual burnt-offering, which was offered in mount Sinai, for a sweet savour, an offering made by fire unto the LORD.

searchText: numbers 28:7 and the drink-offering thereof shall be the fourth part of a hin for the one lamb; in the holy place shalt thou pour out a drink-offering of strong drink unto the lord.
english: And the drink-offering thereof shall be the fourth part of a hin for the one lamb; in the holy place shalt thou pour out a drink-offering of strong drink unto the LORD.

searchText: numbers 28:8 and the other lamb shalt thou present at dusk; as the meal-offering of the morning, and as the drink-offering thereof, thou shalt present it, an offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the lord.
english: And the other lamb shalt thou present at dusk; as the meal-offering of the morning, and as the drink-offering thereof, thou shalt present it, an offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the LORD.

searchText: numbers 28:9 and on the sabbath day two he-lambs of the first year without blemish, and two tenth parts of an ephah of fine flour for a meal-offering, mingled with oil, and the drink-offering thereof.
english: And on the sabbath day two he-lambs of the first year without blemish, and two tenth parts of an ephah of fine flour for a meal-offering, mingled with oil, and the drink-offering thereof.

searchText: numbers 28:10 this is the burnt-offering of every sabbath, beside the continual burnt-offering, and the drink-offering thereof.
english: This is the burnt-offering of every sabbath, beside the continual burnt-offering, and the drink-offering thereof.

searchText: numbers 28:11 and in your new moons ye shall present a burnt-offering unto the lord: two young bullocks, and one ram, seven he-lambs of the first year without blemish;
english: And in your new moons ye shall present a burnt-offering unto the LORD: two young bullocks, and one ram, seven he-lambs of the first year without blemish;

searchText: numbers 28:12 and three tenth parts of an ephah of fine flour for a meal-offering, mingled with oil, for each bullock; and two tenth parts of fine flour for a meal-offering, mingled with oil, for the one ram;
english: and three tenth parts of an ephah of fine flour for a meal-offering, mingled with oil, for each bullock; and two tenth parts of fine flour for a meal-offering, mingled with oil, for the one ram;

searchText: numbers 28:13 and a several tenth part of fine flour mingled with oil for a meal-offering unto every lamb; for a burnt-offering of a sweet savour, an offering made by fire unto the lord.
english: and a several tenth part of fine flour mingled with oil for a meal-offering unto every lamb; for a burnt-offering of a sweet savour, an offering made by fire unto the LORD.

searchText: numbers 28:14 and their drink-offerings shall be half a hin of wine for a bullock, and the third part of a hin for the ram, and the fourth part of a hin for a lamb. this is the burnt-offering of every new moon throughout the months of the year.
english: And their drink-offerings shall be half a hin of wine for a bullock, and the third part of a hin for the ram, and the fourth part of a hin for a lamb. This is the burnt-offering of every new moon throughout the months of the year.

searchText: numbers 28:15 and one he-goat for a sin-offering unto the lord; it shall be offered beside the continual burnt-offering, and the drink-offering thereof.
english: And one he-goat for a sin-offering unto the LORD; it shall be offered beside the continual burnt-offering, and the drink-offering thereof.

searchText: numbers 28:16 and in the first month, on the fourteenth day of the month, is the lord’s passover.
english: And in the first month, on the fourteenth day of the month, is the LORD’S passover.

searchText: numbers 28:17 and on the fifteenth day of this month shall be a feast; seven days shall unleavened bread be eaten.
english: And on the fifteenth day of this month shall be a feast; seven days shall unleavened bread be eaten.

searchText: numbers 28:18 in the first day shall be a holy convocation; ye shall do no manner of servile work;
english: In the first day shall be a holy convocation; ye shall do no manner of servile work;

searchText: numbers 28:19 but ye shall present an offering made by fire, a burnt-offering unto the lord: two young bullocks, and one ram, and seven he-lambs of the first year; they shall be unto you without blemish;
english: but ye shall present an offering made by fire, a burnt-offering unto the LORD: two young bullocks, and one ram, and seven he-lambs of the first year; they shall be unto you without blemish;

searchText: numbers 28:20 and their meal-offering, fine flour mingled with oil; three tenth parts shall ye offer for a bullock, and two tenth parts for the ram;
english: and their meal-offering, fine flour mingled with oil; three tenth parts shall ye offer for a bullock, and two tenth parts for the ram;

searchText: numbers 28:21 a several tenth part shalt thou offer for every lamb of the seven lambs;
english: a several tenth part shalt thou offer for every lamb of the seven lambs;

searchText: numbers 28:22 and one he-goat for a sin-offering, to make atonement for you.
english: and one he-goat for a sin-offering, to make atonement for you.

searchText: numbers 28:23 ye shall offer these beside the burnt-offering of the morning, which is for a continual burnt-offering.
english: Ye shall offer these beside the burnt-offering of the morning, which is for a continual burnt-offering.

searchText: numbers 28:24 after this manner ye shall offer daily, for seven days, the food of the offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the lord; it shall be offered beside the continual burnt-offering, and the drink-offering thereof.
english: After this manner ye shall offer daily, for seven days, the food of the offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the LORD; it shall be offered beside the continual burnt-offering, and the drink-offering thereof.

searchText: numbers 28:25 and on the seventh day ye shall have a holy convocation; ye shall do no manner of servile work.
english: And on the seventh day ye shall have a holy convocation; ye shall do no manner of servile work.

searchText: numbers 28:26 also in the day of the first-fruits, when ye bring a new meal-offering unto the lord in your feast of weeks, ye shall have a holy convocation: ye shall do no manner of servile work;
english: Also in the day of the first-fruits, when ye bring a new meal-offering unto the LORD in your feast of weeks, ye shall have a holy convocation: ye shall do no manner of servile work;

searchText: numbers 28:27 but ye shall present a burnt-offering for a sweet savour unto the lord: two young bullocks, one ram, seven he-lambs of the first year;
english: but ye shall present a burnt-offering for a sweet savour unto the LORD: two young bullocks, one ram, seven he-lambs of the first year;

searchText: numbers 28:28 and their meal-offering, fine flour mingled with oil, three tenth parts for each bullock, two tenth parts for the one ram,
english: and their meal-offering, fine flour mingled with oil, three tenth parts for each bullock, two tenth parts for the one ram,

searchText: numbers 28:29 a several tenth part for every lamb of the seven lambs;
english: a several tenth part for every lamb of the seven lambs;

searchText: numbers 28:30 one he-goat, to make atonement for you.
english: one he-goat, to make atonement for you.

searchText: numbers 28:31 beside the continual burnt-offering, and the meal-offering thereof, ye shall offer them—they shall be unto you without blemish—and their drink-offerings.
english: Beside the continual burnt-offering, and the meal-offering thereof, ye shall offer them—they shall be unto you without blemish—and their drink-offerings.

searchText: numbers 29:1 and in the seventh month, on the first day of the month, ye shall have a holy convocation: ye shall do no manner of servile work; it is a day of blowing the horn unto you.
english: And in the seventh month, on the first day of the month, ye shall have a holy convocation: ye shall do no manner of servile work; it is a day of blowing the horn unto you.

searchText: numbers 29:2 and ye shall prepare a burnt-offering for a sweet savour unto the lord: one young bullock, one ram, seven he-lambs of the first year without blemish;
english: And ye shall prepare a burnt-offering for a sweet savour unto the LORD: one young bullock, one ram, seven he-lambs of the first year without blemish;

searchText: numbers 29:3 and their meal-offering, fine flour mingled with oil, three tenth parts for the bullock, two tenth part for the ram,
english: and their meal-offering, fine flour mingled with oil, three tenth parts for the bullock, two tenth part for the ram,

searchText: numbers 29:4 and one tenth part for every lamb of the seven lambs;
english: and one tenth part for every lamb of the seven lambs;

searchText: numbers 29:5 and one he-goat for a sin-offering, to make atonement for you;
english: and one he-goat for a sin-offering, to make atonement for you;

searchText: numbers 29:6 beside the burnt-offering of the new moon, and the meal-offering thereof, and the continual burnt-offering and the meal-offering thereof, and their drink-offerings, according unto their ordinance, for a sweet savour, an offering made by fire unto the lord.
english: beside the burnt-offering of the new moon, and the meal-offering thereof, and the continual burnt-offering and the meal-offering thereof, and their drink-offerings, according unto their ordinance, for a sweet savour, an offering made by fire unto the LORD.

searchText: numbers 29:7 and on the tenth day of this seventh month ye shall have a holy convocation; and ye shall afflict your souls; ye shall do no manner of work;
english: And on the tenth day of this seventh month ye shall have a holy convocation; and ye shall afflict your souls; ye shall do no manner of work;

searchText: numbers 29:8 but ye shall present a burnt-offering unto the lord for a sweet savour: one young bullock, one ram, seven he-lambs of the first year; they shall be unto you without blemish;
english: but ye shall present a burnt-offering unto the LORD for a sweet savour: one young bullock, one ram, seven he-lambs of the first year; they shall be unto you without blemish;

searchText: numbers 29:9 and their meal-offering, fine flour mingled with oil, three tenth parts for the bullock, two tenth parts for the one ram,
english: and their meal-offering, fine flour mingled with oil, three tenth parts for the bullock, two tenth parts for the one ram,

searchText: numbers 29:10 a several tenth part for every lamb of the seven lambs;
english: a several tenth part for every lamb of the seven lambs;

searchText: numbers 29:11 one he-goat for a sin-offering; beside the sin-offering of atonement, and the continual burnt-offering, and the meal-offering thereof, and their drink-offerings.
english: one he-goat for a sin-offering; beside the sin-offering of atonement, and the continual burnt-offering, and the meal-offering thereof, and their drink-offerings.

searchText: numbers 29:12 and on the fifteenth day of the seventh month ye shall have a holy convocation: ye shall do no manner of servile work, and ye shall keep a feast unto the lord seven days;
english: And on the fifteenth day of the seventh month ye shall have a holy convocation: ye shall do no manner of servile work, and ye shall keep a feast unto the LORD seven days;

searchText: numbers 29:13 and ye shall present a burnt-offering, an offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the lord: thirteen young bullocks, two rams, fourteen he-lambs of the first year; they shall be without blemish;
english: and ye shall present a burnt-offering, an offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the LORD: thirteen young bullocks, two rams, fourteen he-lambs of the first year; they shall be without blemish;

english: and a several tenth part for every lamb of the fourteen lambs;

english: and one he-goat for a sin-offering beside the continual burnt-offering, the meal-offering thereof, and the drink-offering thereof.

searchText: numbers 29:17 and on the second day ye shall present twelve young bullocks, two rams, fourteen he-lambs of the first year without blemish;
english: And on the second day ye shall present twelve young bullocks, two rams, fourteen he-lambs of the first year without blemish;

english: but ye shall present a burnt-offering, an offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the LORD: one bullock, one ram, seven he-lambs of the first year without blemish;

searchText: numbers 29:37 their meal-offering and their drink-offerings for the bullock, for the ram, and for the lambs, shall be according to their number, after the ordinance;
english: their meal-offering and their drink-offerings for the bullock, for the ram, and for the lambs, shall be according to their number, after the ordinance;

searchText: numbers 29:38 and one he-goat for a sin-offering; beside the continual burnt-offering, and the meal-offering thereof, and the drink-offering thereof.
english: and one he-goat for a sin-offering; beside the continual burnt-offering, and the meal-offering thereof, and the drink-offering thereof.

searchText: numbers 29:39 these ye shall offer unto the lord in your appointed seasons, beside your vows, and your freewill-offerings, whether they be your burnt-offerings, or your meal-offerings, or your drink-offerings, or your peace-offerings.
english: These ye shall offer unto the LORD in your appointed seasons, beside your vows, and your freewill-offerings, whether they be your burnt-offerings, or your meal-offerings, or your drink-offerings, or your peace-offerings.

searchText: numbers 30:1 and moses told the children of israel according to all that the lord commanded moses.
english: And Moses told the children of Israel according to all that the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: numbers 30:2 and moses spoke unto the heads of the tribes of the children of israel, saying: this is the thing which the lord hath commanded.
english: And Moses spoke unto the heads of the tribes of the children of Israel, saying: This is the thing which the LORD hath commanded.

searchText: numbers 30:3 when a man voweth a vow unto the lord, or sweareth an oath to bind his soul with a bond, he shall not break his word; he shall do according to all that proceedeth out of his mouth.
english: When a man voweth a vow unto the LORD, or sweareth an oath to bind his soul with a bond, he shall not break his word; he shall do according to all that proceedeth out of his mouth.

searchText: numbers 30:4 also when a woman voweth a vow unto the lord, and bindeth herself by a bond, being in her father’s house, in her youth,
english: Also when a woman voweth a vow unto the LORD, and bindeth herself by a bond, being in her father’s house, in her youth,

searchText: numbers 30:5 and her father heareth her vow, or her bond wherewith she hath bound her soul, and her father holdeth his peace at her, then all her vows shall stand, and every bond wherewith she hath bound her soul shall stand.
english: and her father heareth her vow, or her bond wherewith she hath bound her soul, and her father holdeth his peace at her, then all her vows shall stand, and every bond wherewith she hath bound her soul shall stand.

searchText: numbers 30:6 but if her father disallow her in the day that he heareth, none of her vows, or of her bonds wherewith she hath bound her soul, shall stand; and the lord will forgive her, because her father disallowed her.
english: But if her father disallow her in the day that he heareth, none of her vows, or of her bonds wherewith she hath bound her soul, shall stand; and the LORD will forgive her, because her father disallowed her.

searchText: numbers 30:7 and if she be married to a husband, while her vows are upon her, or the clear utterance of her lips, wherewith she hath bound her soul;
english: And if she be married to a husband, while her vows are upon her, or the clear utterance of her lips, wherewith she hath bound her soul;

searchText: numbers 30:8 and her husband hear it, whatsoever day it be that he heareth it, and hold his peace at her; then her vows shall stand, and her bonds wherewith she hath bound her soul shall stand.
english: and her husband hear it, whatsoever day it be that he heareth it, and hold his peace at her; then her vows shall stand, and her bonds wherewith she hath bound her soul shall stand.

searchText: numbers 30:9 but if her husband disallow her in the day that he heareth it, then he shall make void her vow which is upon her, and the clear utterance of her lips, wherewith she hath bound her soul; and the lord will forgive her.
english: But if her husband disallow her in the day that he heareth it, then he shall make void her vow which is upon her, and the clear utterance of her lips, wherewith she hath bound her soul; and the LORD will forgive her.

searchText: numbers 30:10 but the vow of a widow, or of her that is divorced, even every thing wherewith she hath bound her soul, shall stand against her.
english: But the vow of a widow, or of her that is divorced, even every thing wherewith she hath bound her soul, shall stand against her.

searchText: numbers 30:11 and if a woman vowed in her husband’s house, or bound her soul by a bond with an oath,
english: And if a woman vowed in her husband’s house, or bound her soul by a bond with an oath,

searchText: numbers 30:12 and her husband heard it, and held his peace at her, and disallowed her not, then all her vows shall stand, and every bond wherewith she bound her soul shall stand.
english: and her husband heard it, and held his peace at her, and disallowed her not, then all her vows shall stand, and every bond wherewith she bound her soul shall stand.

searchText: numbers 30:13 but if her husband make them null and void in the day that he heareth them, then whatsoever proceeded out of her lips, whether it were her vows, or the bond of her soul, shall not stand: her husband hath made them void; and the lord will forgive her.
english: But if her husband make them null and void in the day that he heareth them, then whatsoever proceeded out of her lips, whether it were her vows, or the bond of her soul, shall not stand: her husband hath made them void; and the LORD will forgive her.

searchText: numbers 30:14 every vow, and every binding oath to afflict the soul, her husband may let it stand, or her husband may make it void.
english: Every vow, and every binding oath to afflict the soul, her husband may let it stand, or her husband may make it void.

searchText: numbers 30:15 but if her husband altogether hold his peace at her from day to day, then he causeth all her vows to stand, or all her bonds, which are upon her; he hath let them stand, because he held his peace at her in the day that he heard them.
english: But if her husband altogether hold his peace at her from day to day, then he causeth all her vows to stand, or all her bonds, which are upon her; he hath let them stand, because he held his peace at her in the day that he heard them.

searchText: numbers 30:16 but if he shall make them null and void after that he hath heard them, then he shall bear her iniquity.
english: But if he shall make them null and void after that he hath heard them, then he shall bear her iniquity.

searchText: numbers 30:17 these are the statutes, which the lord commanded moses, between a man and his wife, between a father and his daughter, being in her youth, in her father’s house.
english: These are the statutes, which the LORD commanded Moses, between a man and his wife, between a father and his daughter, being in her youth, in her father’s house.

searchText: numbers 31:1 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 31:2 ’avenge the children of israel of the midianites; afterward shalt thou be gathered unto thy people.’
english: ’Avenge the children of Israel of the Midianites; afterward shalt thou be gathered unto thy people.’

searchText: numbers 31:3 and moses spoke unto the people, saying: ‘arm ye men from among you for the war, that they may go against midian, to execute the lord’s vengeance on midian.
english: And Moses spoke unto the people, saying: ‘Arm ye men from among you for the war, that they may go against Midian, to execute the LORD’S vengeance on Midian.

searchText: numbers 31:4 of every tribe a thousand, throughout all the tribes of israel, shall ye send to the war.’
english: Of every tribe a thousand, throughout all the tribes of Israel, shall ye send to the war.’

searchText: numbers 31:5 so there were delivered, out of the thousands of israel, a thousand of every tribe, twelve thousand armed for war.
english: So there were delivered, out of the thousands of Israel, a thousand of every tribe, twelve thousand armed for war.

searchText: numbers 31:6 and moses sent them, a thousand of every tribe, to the war, them and phinehas the son of eleazar the priest, to the war, with the holy vessels and the trumpets for the alarm in his hand.
english: And Moses sent them, a thousand of every tribe, to the war, them and Phinehas the son of Eleazar the priest, to the war, with the holy vessels and the trumpets for the alarm in his hand.

searchText: numbers 31:7 and they warred against midian, as the lord commanded moses; and they slew every male.
english: And they warred against Midian, as the LORD commanded Moses; and they slew every male.

searchText: numbers 31:8 and they slew the kings of midian with the rest of their slain: evi, and rekem, and zur, and hur, and reba, the five kings of midian; balaam also the son of beor they slew with the sword.
english: And they slew the kings of Midian with the rest of their slain: Evi, and Rekem, and Zur, and Hur, and Reba, the five kings of Midian; Balaam also the son of Beor they slew with the sword.

searchText: numbers 31:9 and the children of israel took captive the women of midian and their little ones; and all their cattle, and all their flocks, and all their goods, they took for a prey.
english: And the children of Israel took captive the women of Midian and their little ones; and all their cattle, and all their flocks, and all their goods, they took for a prey.

searchText: numbers 31:10 and all their cities in the places wherein they dwelt, and all their encampments, they burnt with fire.
english: And all their cities in the places wherein they dwelt, and all their encampments, they burnt with fire.

searchText: numbers 31:11 and they took all the spoil, and all the prey, both of man and of beast.
english: And they took all the spoil, and all the prey, both of man and of beast.

searchText: numbers 31:12 and they brought the captives, and the prey, and the spoil, unto moses, and unto eleazar the priest, and unto the congregation of the children of israel, unto the camp, unto the plains of moab, which are by the jordan at jericho.
english: And they brought the captives, and the prey, and the spoil, unto Moses, and unto Eleazar the priest, and unto the congregation of the children of Israel, unto the camp, unto the plains of Moab, which are by the Jordan at Jericho.

searchText: numbers 31:13 and moses, and eleazar the priest, and all the princes of the congregation, went forth to meet them without the camp.
english: And Moses, and Eleazar the priest, and all the princes of the congregation, went forth to meet them without the camp.

searchText: numbers 31:14 and moses was wroth with the officers of the host, the captains of thousands and the captains of hundreds, who came from the service of the war.
english: And Moses was wroth with the officers of the host, the captains of thousands and the captains of hundreds, who came from the service of the war.

searchText: numbers 31:15 and moses said unto them: ‘have ye saved all the women alive?
english: And Moses said unto them: ‘Have ye saved all the women alive?

searchText: numbers 31:16 behold, these caused the children of israel, through the counsel of balaam, to revolt so as to break faith with the lord in the matter of peor, and so the plague was among the congregation of the lord.
english: Behold, these caused the children of Israel, through the counsel of Balaam, to revolt so as to break faith with the LORD in the matter of Peor, and so the plague was among the congregation of the LORD.

searchText: numbers 31:17 now therefore kill every male among the little ones, and kill every woman that hath known man by lying with him.
english: Now therefore kill every male among the little ones, and kill every woman that hath known man by lying with him.

searchText: numbers 31:18 but all the women children, that have not known man by lying with him, keep alive for yourselves.
english: But all the women children, that have not known man by lying with him, keep alive for yourselves.

searchText: numbers 31:19 and encamp ye without the camp seven days; whosoever hath killed any person, and whosoever hath touched any slain, purify yourselves on the third day and on the seventh day, ye and your captives.
english: And encamp ye without the camp seven days; whosoever hath killed any person, and whosoever hath touched any slain, purify yourselves on the third day and on the seventh day, ye and your captives.

searchText: numbers 31:20 and as to every garment, and all that is made of skin, and all work of goats’hair, and all things made of wood, ye shall purify.’
english: And as to every garment, and all that is made of skin, and all work of goats’hair, and all things made of wood, ye shall purify.’

searchText: numbers 31:21 and eleazar the priest said unto the men of war that went to the battle: ‘this is the statute of the law which the lord hath commanded moses:
english: And Eleazar the priest said unto the men of war that went to the battle: ‘This is the statute of the law which the LORD hath commanded Moses:

searchText: numbers 31:22 howbeit the gold, and the silver, the brass, the iron, the tin, and the lead,
english: Howbeit the gold, and the silver, the brass, the iron, the tin, and the lead,

searchText: numbers 31:23 every thing that may abide the fire, ye shall make to go through the fire, and it shall be clean; nevertheless it shall be purified with the water of sprinkling; and all that abideth not the fire ye shall make to go through the water.
english: every thing that may abide the fire, ye shall make to go through the fire, and it shall be clean; nevertheless it shall be purified with the water of sprinkling; and all that abideth not the fire ye shall make to go through the water.

searchText: numbers 31:24 and ye shall wash your clothes on the seventh day, and ye shall be clean, and afterward ye may come into the camp.’
english: And ye shall wash your clothes on the seventh day, and ye shall be clean, and afterward ye may come into the camp.’

searchText: numbers 31:25 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 31:26 ’take the sum of the prey that was taken, both of man and of beast, thou, and eleazar the priest, and the heads of the fathers’houses of the congregation;
english: ’Take the sum of the prey that was taken, both of man and of beast, thou, and Eleazar the priest, and the heads of the fathers’houses of the congregation;

searchText: numbers 31:27 and divide the prey into two parts: between the men skilled in war, that went out to battle, and all the congregation;
english: and divide the prey into two parts: between the men skilled in war, that went out to battle, and all the congregation;

searchText: numbers 31:28 and levy a tribute unto the lord of the men of war that went out to battle: one soul of five hundred, both of the persons, and of the beeves, and of the asses, and of the flocks;
english: and levy a tribute unto the LORD of the men of war that went out to battle: one soul of five hundred, both of the persons, and of the beeves, and of the asses, and of the flocks;

searchText: numbers 31:29 take it of their half, and give it unto eleazar the priest, as a portion set apart for the lord.
english: take it of their half, and give it unto Eleazar the priest, as a portion set apart for the LORD.

searchText: numbers 31:30 and of the children of israel’s half, thou shalt take one drawn out of every fifty, of the persons, of the beeves, of the asses, and of the flocks, even of all the cattle, and give them unto the levites, that keep the charge of the tabernacle of the lord.’
english: And of the children of Israel’s half, thou shalt take one drawn out of every fifty, of the persons, of the beeves, of the asses, and of the flocks, even of all the cattle, and give them unto the Levites, that keep the charge of the tabernacle of the LORD.’

searchText: numbers 31:31 and moses and eleazar the priest did as the lord commanded moses.
english: And Moses and Eleazar the priest did as the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: numbers 31:32 now the prey, over and above the booty which the men of war took, was six hundred thousand and seventy thousand and five thousand sheep,
english: Now the prey, over and above the booty which the men of war took, was six hundred thousand and seventy thousand and five thousand sheep,

searchText: numbers 31:33 and threescore and twelve thousand beeves,
english: and threescore and twelve thousand beeves,

searchText: numbers 31:34 and threescore and one thousand asses,
english: and threescore and one thousand asses,

searchText: numbers 31:35 and thirty and two thousand persons in all, of the women that had not known man by lying with him.
english: and thirty and two thousand persons in all, of the women that had not known man by lying with him.

searchText: numbers 31:36 and the half, which was the portion of them that went out to war, was in number three hundred thousand and thirty thousand and seven thousand and five hundred sheep.
english: And the half, which was the portion of them that went out to war, was in number three hundred thousand and thirty thousand and seven thousand and five hundred sheep.

searchText: numbers 31:37 and the lord’s tribute of the sheep was six hundred and threescore and fifteen.
english: And the LORD’S tribute of the sheep was six hundred and threescore and fifteen.

searchText: numbers 31:38 and the beeves were thirty and six thousand, of which the lord’s tribute was threescore and twelve.
english: And the beeves were thirty and six thousand, of which the LORD’S tribute was threescore and twelve.

searchText: numbers 31:39 and the asses were thirty thousand and five hundred, of which the lord’s tribute was threescore and one.
english: And the asses were thirty thousand and five hundred, of which the LORD’S tribute was threescore and one.

searchText: numbers 31:40 and the persons were sixteen thousand, of whom the lord’s tribute was thirty and two persons.
english: And the persons were sixteen thousand, of whom the LORD’S tribute was thirty and two persons.

searchText: numbers 31:41 and moses gave the tribute, which was set apart for the lord, unto eleazar the priest, as the lord commanded moses.
english: And Moses gave the tribute, which was set apart for the LORD, unto Eleazar the priest, as the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: numbers 31:42 and of the children of israel’s half, which moses divided off from the men that warred—
english: And of the children of Israel’s half, which Moses divided off from the men that warred—
