searchText: numbers 31:43 now the congregation’s half was three hundred thousand and thirty thousand and seven thousand and five hundred sheep,
english: now the congregation’s half was three hundred thousand and thirty thousand and seven thousand and five hundred sheep,

searchText: numbers 31:44 and thirty and six thousand beeves,
english: and thirty and six thousand beeves,

searchText: numbers 31:45 and thirty thousand and five hundred asses,
english: and thirty thousand and five hundred asses,

searchText: numbers 31:46 and sixteen thousand persons—
english: and sixteen thousand persons—

searchText: numbers 31:47 even of the children of israel’s half, moses took one drawn out of every fifty, both of man and of beast, and gave them unto the levites, that kept the charge of the tabernacle of the lord; as the lord commanded moses.
english: even of the children of Israel’s half, Moses took one drawn out of every fifty, both of man and of beast, and gave them unto the Levites, that kept the charge of the tabernacle of the LORD; as the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: numbers 31:48 and the officers that were over the thousands of the host, the captains of thousands, and the captains of hundreds, came near unto moses;
english: And the officers that were over the thousands of the host, the captains of thousands, and the captains of hundreds, came near unto Moses;

searchText: numbers 31:49 and they said unto moses: ‘thy servants have taken the sum of the men of war that are under our charge, and there lacketh not one man of us.
english: and they said unto Moses: ‘Thy servants have taken the sum of the men of war that are under our charge, and there lacketh not one man of us.

searchText: numbers 31:50 and we have brought the lord’s offering, what every man hath gotten, of jewels of gold, armlets, and bracelets, signet-rings, ear-rings, and girdles, to make atonement for our souls before the lord.’
english: And we have brought the LORD’S offering, what every man hath gotten, of jewels of gold, armlets, and bracelets, signet-rings, ear-rings, and girdles, to make atonement for our souls before the LORD.’

searchText: numbers 31:51 and moses and eleazar the priest took the gold of them, even all wrought jewels.
english: And Moses and Eleazar the priest took the gold of them, even all wrought jewels.

searchText: numbers 31:52 and all the gold of the gift that they set apart for the lord, of the captains of thousands, and of the captains of hundreds, was sixteen thousand seven hundred and fifty shekels.—
english: And all the gold of the gift that they set apart for the LORD, of the captains of thousands, and of the captains of hundreds, was sixteen thousand seven hundred and fifty shekels.—

searchText: numbers 31:53 for the men of war had taken booty, every man for himself.—
english: For the men of war had taken booty, every man for himself.—

searchText: numbers 31:54 and moses and eleazar the priest took the gold of the captains of thousands and of hundreds, and brought it into the tent of meeting, for a memorial for the children of israel before the lord.
english: And Moses and Eleazar the priest took the gold of the captains of thousands and of hundreds, and brought it into the tent of meeting, for a memorial for the children of Israel before the LORD.

searchText: numbers 32:1 now the children of reuben and the children of gad had a very great multitude of cattle; and when they saw the land of jazer, and the land of gilead, that, behold, the place was a place for cattle,
english: Now the children of Reuben and the children of Gad had a very great multitude of cattle; and when they saw the land of Jazer, and the land of Gilead, that, behold, the place was a place for cattle,

searchText: numbers 32:2 the children of gad and the children of reuben came and spoke unto moses, and to eleazar the priest, and unto the princes of the congregation, saying:
english: the children of Gad and the children of Reuben came and spoke unto Moses, and to Eleazar the priest, and unto the princes of the congregation, saying:

searchText: numbers 32:3 ’ataroth, and dibon, and jazer, and nimrah, and heshbon, and elealeh, and sebam, and nebo, and beon,
english: ’Ataroth, and Dibon, and Jazer, and Nimrah, and Heshbon, and Elealeh, and Sebam, and Nebo, and Beon,

searchText: numbers 32:4 the land which the lord smote before the congregation of israel, is a land for cattle, and thy servants have cattle.’
english: the land which the LORD smote before the congregation of Israel, is a land for cattle, and thy servants have cattle.’

searchText: numbers 32:5 and they said: ‘if we have found favour in thy sight, let this land be given unto thy servants for a possession; bring us not over the jordan.’
english: And they said: ‘If we have found favour in thy sight, let this land be given unto thy servants for a possession; bring us not over the Jordan.’

searchText: numbers 32:6 and moses said unto the children of gad and to the children of reuben: ‘shall your brethren go to the war, and shall ye sit here?
english: And Moses said unto the children of Gad and to the children of Reuben: ‘Shall your brethren go to the war, and shall ye sit here?

searchText: numbers 32:7 and wherefore will ye turn away the heart of the children of israel from going over into the land which the lord hath given them?
english: And wherefore will ye turn away the heart of the children of Israel from going over into the land which the LORD hath given them?

searchText: numbers 32:8 thus did your fathers, when i sent them from kadesh-barnea to see the land.
english: Thus did your fathers, when I sent them from Kadesh-barnea to see the land.

searchText: numbers 32:9 for when they went up unto the valley of eshcol, and saw the land, they turned away the heart of the children of israel, that they should not go into the land which the lord had given them.
english: For when they went up unto the valley of Eshcol, and saw the land, they turned away the heart of the children of Israel, that they should not go into the land which the LORD had given them.

searchText: numbers 32:10 and the lord’s anger was kindled in that day, and he swore, saying:
english: And the LORD’S anger was kindled in that day, and He swore, saying:

searchText: numbers 32:11 surely none of the men that came up out of egypt, from twenty years old and upward, shall see the land which i swore unto abraham, unto isaac, and unto jacob; because they have not wholly followed me;
english: Surely none of the men that came up out of Egypt, from twenty years old and upward, shall see the land which I swore unto Abraham, unto Isaac, and unto Jacob; because they have not wholly followed Me;

searchText: numbers 32:12 save caleb the son of jephunneh the kenizzite, and joshua the son of nun; because they have wholly followed the lord.
english: save Caleb the son of Jephunneh the Kenizzite, and Joshua the son of Nun; because they have wholly followed the LORD.

searchText: numbers 32:13 and the lord’s anger was kindled against israel, and he made them wander to and fro in the wilderness forty years, until all the generation, that had done evil in the sight of the lord, was consumed.
english: And the LORD’S anger was kindled against Israel, and He made them wander to and fro in the wilderness forty years, until all the generation, that had done evil in the sight of the LORD, was consumed.

searchText: numbers 32:14 and, behold, ye are risen up in your fathers’stead, a brood of sinful men, to augment yet the fierce anger of the lord toward israel.
english: And, behold, ye are risen up in your fathers’stead, a brood of sinful men, to augment yet the fierce anger of the LORD toward Israel.

searchText: numbers 32:15 for if ye turn away from after him, he will yet again leave them in the wilderness; and so ye will destroy all this people.’
english: For if ye turn away from after Him, He will yet again leave them in the wilderness; and so ye will destroy all this people.’

searchText: numbers 32:16 and they came near unto him, and said: ‘we will build sheepfolds here for our cattle, and cities for our little ones;
english: And they came near unto him, and said: ‘We will build sheepfolds here for our cattle, and cities for our little ones;

searchText: numbers 32:17 but we ourselves will be ready armed to go before the children of israel, until we have brought them unto their place; and our little ones shall dwell in the fortified cities because of the inhabitants of the land.
english: but we ourselves will be ready armed to go before the children of Israel, until we have brought them unto their place; and our little ones shall dwell in the fortified cities because of the inhabitants of the land.

searchText: numbers 32:18 we will not return unto our houses, until the children of israel have inherited every man his inheritance.
english: We will not return unto our houses, until the children of Israel have inherited every man his inheritance.

searchText: numbers 32:19 for we will not inherit with them on the other side of the jordan, and forward, because our inheritance is fallen to us on this side of the jordan eastward.’
english: For we will not inherit with them on the other side of the Jordan, and forward, because our inheritance is fallen to us on this side of the Jordan eastward.’

searchText: numbers 32:20 and moses said unto them: ‘if ye will do this thing: if ye will arm yourselves to go before the lord to the war,
english: And Moses said unto them: ‘If ye will do this thing: if ye will arm yourselves to go before the LORD to the war,

searchText: numbers 32:21 and every armed man of you will pass over the jordan before the lord, until he hath driven out his enemies from before him,
english: and every armed man of you will pass over the Jordan before the LORD, until He hath driven out His enemies from before Him,

searchText: numbers 32:22 and the land be subdued before the lord, and ye return afterward; then ye shall be clear before the lord, and before israel, and this land shall be unto you for a possession before the lord.
english: and the land be subdued before the LORD, and ye return afterward; then ye shall be clear before the LORD, and before Israel, and this land shall be unto you for a possession before the LORD.

searchText: numbers 32:23 but if ye will not do so, behold, ye have sinned against the lord; and know ye your sin which will find you.
english: But if ye will not do so, behold, ye have sinned against the LORD; and know ye your sin which will find you.

searchText: numbers 32:24 build you cities for your little ones, and folds for your sheep; and do that which hath proceeded out of your mouth.’
english: Build you cities for your little ones, and folds for your sheep; and do that which hath proceeded out of your mouth.’

searchText: numbers 32:25 and the children of gad and the children of reuben spoke unto moses, saying: ‘thy servants will do as my lord commandeth.
english: And the children of Gad and the children of Reuben spoke unto Moses, saying: ‘Thy servants will do as my lord commandeth.

searchText: numbers 32:26 our little ones, our wives, our flocks, and all our cattle, shall be there in the cities of gilead;
english: Our little ones, our wives, our flocks, and all our cattle, shall be there in the cities of Gilead;

searchText: numbers 32:27 but thy servants will pass over, every man that is armed for war, before the lord to battle, as my lord saith.’
english: but thy servants will pass over, every man that is armed for war, before the LORD to battle, as my lord saith.’

searchText: numbers 32:28 so moses gave charge concerning them to eleazar the priest, and to joshua the son of nun, and to the heads of the fathers’houses of the tribes of the children of israel.
english: So Moses gave charge concerning them to Eleazar the priest, and to Joshua the son of Nun, and to the heads of the fathers’houses of the tribes of the children of Israel.

searchText: numbers 32:29 and moses said unto them: ‘if the children of gad and the children of reuben will pass with you over the jordan, every man that is armed to battle, before the lord, and the land shall be subdued before you, then ye shall give them the land of gilead for a possession;
english: And Moses said unto them: ‘If the children of Gad and the children of Reuben will pass with you over the Jordan, every man that is armed to battle, before the LORD, and the land shall be subdued before you, then ye shall give them the land of Gilead for a possession;

searchText: numbers 32:30 but if they will not pass over with you armed, they shall have possessions among you in the land of canaan.’
english: but if they will not pass over with you armed, they shall have possessions among you in the land of Canaan.’

searchText: numbers 32:31 and the children of gad and the children of reuben answered, saying: ‘as the lord hath said unto thy servants, so will we do.
english: And the children of Gad and the children of Reuben answered, saying: ‘As the LORD hath said unto thy servants, so will we do.

searchText: numbers 32:32 we will pass over armed before the lord into the land of canaan, and the possession of our inheritance shall remain with us beyond the jordan.’
english: We will pass over armed before the LORD into the land of Canaan, and the possession of our inheritance shall remain with us beyond the Jordan.’

searchText: numbers 32:33 and moses gave unto them, even to the children of gad, and to the children of reuben, and unto the half-tribe of manasseh the son of joseph, the kingdom of sihon king of the amorites, and the kingdom of og king of bashan, the land, according to the cities thereof with their borders, even the cities of the land round about.
english: And Moses gave unto them, even to the children of Gad, and to the children of Reuben, and unto the half-tribe of Manasseh the son of Joseph, the kingdom of Sihon king of the Amorites, and the kingdom of Og king of Bashan, the land, according to the cities thereof with their borders, even the cities of the land round about.

searchText: numbers 32:34 and the children of gad built dibon, and ataroth, and aroer;
english: And the children of Gad built Dibon, and Ataroth, and Aroer;

searchText: numbers 32:35 and atroth-shophan, and jazer, and jogbehah;
english: and Atroth-shophan, and Jazer, and Jogbehah;

searchText: numbers 32:36 and beth-nimrah, and beth-haran; fortified cities, and folds for sheep.
english: and Beth-nimrah, and Beth-haran; fortified cities, and folds for sheep.

searchText: numbers 32:37 and the children of reuben built heshbon, and elealeh, and kiriathaim;
english: And the children of Reuben built Heshbon, and Elealeh, and Kiriathaim;

searchText: numbers 32:38 and nebo, and baal-meon—their names being changed—and sibmah; and gave their names unto the cities which they builded.
english: and Nebo, and Baal-meon—their names being changed—and Sibmah; and gave their names unto the cities which they builded.

searchText: numbers 32:39 and the children of machir the son of manasseh went to gilead, and took it, and dispossessed the amorites that were therein.
english: And the children of Machir the son of Manasseh went to Gilead, and took it, and dispossessed the Amorites that were therein.

searchText: numbers 32:40 and moses gave gilead unto machir the son of manasseh; and he dwelt therein.
english: And Moses gave Gilead unto Machir the son of Manasseh; and he dwelt therein.

searchText: numbers 32:41 and jair the son of manasseh went and took the villages thereof, and called them havvoth-jair.
english: And Jair the son of Manasseh went and took the villages thereof, and called them Havvoth-jair.

searchText: numbers 32:42 and nobah went and took kenath, and the villages thereof, and called it nobah, after his own name.
english: And Nobah went and took Kenath, and the villages thereof, and called it Nobah, after his own name.

searchText: numbers 33:1 these are the stages of the children of israel, by which they went forth out of the land of egypt by their hosts under the hand of moses and aaron.
english: These are the stages of the children of Israel, by which they went forth out of the land of Egypt by their hosts under the hand of Moses and Aaron.

searchText: numbers 33:2 and moses wrote their goings forth, stage by stage, by the commandment of the lord; and these are their stages at their goings forth.
english: And Moses wrote their goings forth, stage by stage, by the commandment of the LORD; and these are their stages at their goings forth.

searchText: numbers 33:3 and they journeyed from rameses in the first month, on the fifteenth day of the first month; on the morrow after the passover the children of israel went out with a high hand in the sight of all the egyptians,
english: And they journeyed from Rameses in the first month, on the fifteenth day of the first month; on the morrow after the passover the children of Israel went out with a high hand in the sight of all the Egyptians,

searchText: numbers 33:4 while the egyptians were burying them that the lord had smitten among them, even all their first-born; upon their gods also the lord executed judgments.
english: while the Egyptians were burying them that the LORD had smitten among them, even all their first-born; upon their gods also the LORD executed judgments.

searchText: numbers 33:5 and the children of israel journeyed from rameses, and pitched in succoth.
english: And the children of Israel journeyed from Rameses, and pitched in Succoth.

searchText: numbers 33:6 and they journeyed from succoth, and pitched in etham, which is in the edge of the wilderness.
english: And they journeyed from Succoth, and pitched in Etham, which is in the edge of the wilderness.

searchText: numbers 33:7 and they journeyed from etham, and turned back unto pihahiroth, which is before baal-zephon; and they pitched before migdol.
english: And they journeyed from Etham, and turned back unto Pihahiroth, which is before Baal-zephon; and they pitched before Migdol.

searchText: numbers 33:8 and they journeyed from penehahiroth, and passed through the midst of the sea into the wilderness; and they went three days’journey in the wilderness of etham, and pitched in marah.
english: And they journeyed from Penehahiroth, and passed through the midst of the sea into the wilderness; and they went three days’journey in the wilderness of Etham, and pitched in Marah.

searchText: numbers 33:9 and they journeyed from marah, and came unto elim; and in elim were twelve springs of water, and threescore and ten palm-trees; and they pitched there.
english: And they journeyed from Marah, and came unto Elim; and in Elim were twelve springs of water, and threescore and ten palm-trees; and they pitched there.

searchText: numbers 33:10 and they journeyed from elim, and pitched by the red sea.
english: And they journeyed from Elim, and pitched by the Red Sea.

searchText: numbers 33:11 and they journeyed from the red sea, and pitched in the wilderness of sin.
english: And they journeyed from the Red Sea, and pitched in the wilderness of Sin.

searchText: numbers 33:12 and they journeyed from the wilderness of sin, and pitched in dophkah.
english: And they journeyed from the wilderness of Sin, and pitched in Dophkah.

searchText: numbers 33:13 and they journeyed from dophkah, and pitched in alush.
english: And they journeyed from Dophkah, and pitched in Alush.

searchText: numbers 33:14 and they journeyed from alush, and pitched in rephidim, where was no water for the people to drink.
english: And they journeyed from Alush, and pitched in Rephidim, where was no water for the people to drink.

searchText: numbers 33:15 and they journeyed from rephidim, and pitched in the wilderness of sinai.
english: And they journeyed from Rephidim, and pitched in the wilderness of Sinai.

searchText: numbers 33:16 and they journeyed from the wilderness of sinai, and pitched in kibroth-hattaavah.
english: And they journeyed from the wilderness of Sinai, and pitched in Kibroth-hattaavah.

searchText: numbers 33:17 and they journeyed from kibroth-hattaavah, and pitched in hazeroth.
english: And they journeyed from Kibroth-hattaavah, and pitched in Hazeroth.

searchText: numbers 33:18 and they journeyed from hazeroth, and pitched in rithmah.
english: And they journeyed from Hazeroth, and pitched in Rithmah.

searchText: numbers 33:19 and they journeyed from rithmah, and pitched in rimmon-perez.
english: And they journeyed from Rithmah, and pitched in Rimmon-perez.

searchText: numbers 33:20 and they journeyed from rimmon-perez, and pitched in libnah.
english: And they journeyed from Rimmon-perez, and pitched in Libnah.

searchText: numbers 33:21 and they journeyed from libnah, and pitched in rissah.
english: And they journeyed from Libnah, and pitched in Rissah.

searchText: numbers 33:22 and they journeyed from rissah, and pitched in kehelah.
english: And they journeyed from Rissah, and pitched in Kehelah.

searchText: numbers 33:23 and they journeyed from kehelah, and pitched in mount shepher.
english: And they journeyed from Kehelah, and pitched in mount Shepher.

searchText: numbers 33:24 and they journeyed from mount shepher, and pitched in haradah.
english: And they journeyed from mount Shepher, and pitched in Haradah.

searchText: numbers 33:25 and they journeyed from haradah, and pitched in makheloth.
english: And they journeyed from Haradah, and pitched in Makheloth.

searchText: numbers 33:26 and they journeyed from makheloth, and pitched in tahath.
english: And they journeyed from Makheloth, and pitched in Tahath.

searchText: numbers 33:27 and they journeyed from tahath, and pitched in terah.
english: And they journeyed from Tahath, and pitched in Terah.

searchText: numbers 33:28 and they journeyed from terah, and pitched in mithkah.
english: And they journeyed from Terah, and pitched in Mithkah.

searchText: numbers 33:29 and they journeyed from mithkah, and pitched in hashmonah.
english: And they journeyed from Mithkah, and pitched in Hashmonah.

searchText: numbers 33:30 and they journeyed from hashmonah, and pitched in moseroth.
english: And they journeyed from Hashmonah, and pitched in Moseroth.

searchText: numbers 33:31 and they journeyed from moseroth, and pitched in bene-jaakan.
english: And they journeyed from Moseroth, and pitched in Bene-jaakan.

searchText: numbers 33:32 and they journeyed from bene-jaakan, and pitched in hor-haggidgad.
english: And they journeyed from Bene-jaakan, and pitched in Hor-haggidgad.

searchText: numbers 33:33 and they journeyed from hor-haggidgad, and pitched in jotbah.
english: And they journeyed from Hor-haggidgad, and pitched in Jotbah.

searchText: numbers 33:34 and they journeyed from jotbah, and pitched in abronah.
english: And they journeyed from Jotbah, and pitched in Abronah.

searchText: numbers 33:35 and they journeyed from abronah, and pitched in ezion-geber.
english: And they journeyed from Abronah, and pitched in Ezion-geber.

searchText: numbers 33:36 and they journeyed from ezion-geber, and pitched in the wilderness of zin—the same is kadesh.
english: And they journeyed from Ezion-geber, and pitched in the wilderness of Zin—the same is Kadesh.

searchText: numbers 33:37 and they journeyed from kadesh, and pitched in mount hor, in the edge of the land of edom.—
english: And they journeyed from Kadesh, and pitched in mount Hor, in the edge of the land of Edom.—

searchText: numbers 33:38 and aaron the priest went up into mount hor at the commandment of the lord, and died there, in the fortieth year after the children of israel were come out of the land of egypt, in the fifth month, on the first day of the month.
english: And Aaron the priest went up into mount Hor at the commandment of the LORD, and died there, in the fortieth year after the children of Israel were come out of the land of Egypt, in the fifth month, on the first day of the month.

searchText: numbers 33:39 and aaron was a hundred and twenty and three years old when he died in mount hor.
english: And Aaron was a hundred and twenty and three years old when he died in mount Hor.

searchText: numbers 33:40 and the canaanite, the king of arad, who dwelt in the south in the land of canaan, heard of the coming of the children of israel.—
english: And the Canaanite, the king of Arad, who dwelt in the South in the land of Canaan, heard of the coming of the children of Israel.—

searchText: numbers 33:41 and they journeyed from mount hor, and pitched in zalmonah.
english: And they journeyed from mount Hor, and pitched in Zalmonah.

searchText: numbers 33:42 and they journeyed from zalmonah, and pitched in punon.
english: And they journeyed from Zalmonah, and pitched in Punon.

searchText: numbers 33:43 and they journeyed from punon, and pitched in oboth.
english: And they journeyed from Punon, and pitched in Oboth.

searchText: numbers 33:44 and they journeyed from oboth, and pitched in ije-abarim, in the border of moab.
english: And they journeyed from Oboth, and pitched in Ije-abarim, in the border of Moab.

searchText: numbers 33:45 and they journeyed from ijim, and pitched in dibon-gad.
english: And they journeyed from Ijim, and pitched in Dibon-gad.

searchText: numbers 33:46 and they journeyed from dibon-gad, and pitched in almon-diblathaim.
english: And they journeyed from Dibon-gad, and pitched in Almon-diblathaim.

searchText: numbers 33:47 and they journeyed from almon-diblathaim, and pitched in the mountains of abarim, in front of nebo.
english: And they journeyed from Almon-diblathaim, and pitched in the mountains of Abarim, in front of Nebo.

searchText: numbers 33:48 and they journeyed from the mountains of abarim, and pitched in the plains of moab by the jordan at jericho.
english: And they journeyed from the mountains of Abarim, and pitched in the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho.

searchText: numbers 33:49 and they pitched by the jordan, from beth-jeshimoth even unto abel-shittim in the plains of moab.
english: And they pitched by the Jordan, from Beth-jeshimoth even unto Abel-shittim in the plains of Moab.

searchText: numbers 33:50 and the lord spoke unto moses in the plains of moab by the jordan at jericho, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses in the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho, saying:

searchText: numbers 33:51 ’speak unto the children of israel, and say unto them: when ye pass over the jordan into the land of canaan,
english: ’Speak unto the children of Israel, and say unto them: When ye pass over the Jordan into the land of Canaan,

searchText: numbers 33:52 then ye shall drive out all the inhabitants of the land from before you, and destroy all their figured stones, and destroy all their molten images, and demolish all their high places.
english: then ye shall drive out all the inhabitants of the land from before you, and destroy all their figured stones, and destroy all their molten images, and demolish all their high places.

searchText: numbers 33:53 and ye shall drive out the inhabitants of the land, and dwell therein; for unto you have i given the land to possess it.
english: And ye shall drive out the inhabitants of the land, and dwell therein; for unto you have I given the land to possess it.

searchText: numbers 33:54 and ye shall inherit the land by lot according to your families—to the more ye shall give the more inheritance, and to the fewer thou shalt give the less inheritance; wheresoever the lot falleth to any man, that shall be his; according to the tribes of your fathers shall ye inherit.
english: And ye shall inherit the land by lot according to your families—to the more ye shall give the more inheritance, and to the fewer thou shalt give the less inheritance; wheresoever the lot falleth to any man, that shall be his; according to the tribes of your fathers shall ye inherit.

searchText: numbers 33:55 but if ye will not drive out the inhabitants of the land from before you, then shall those that ye let remain of them be as thorns in your eyes, and as pricks in your sides, and they shall harass you in the land wherein ye dwell.
english: But if ye will not drive out the inhabitants of the land from before you, then shall those that ye let remain of them be as thorns in your eyes, and as pricks in your sides, and they shall harass you in the land wherein ye dwell.

searchText: numbers 33:56 and it shall come to pass, that as i thought to do unto them, so will i do unto you.
english: And it shall come to pass, that as I thought to do unto them, so will I do unto you.

searchText: numbers 34:1 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 34:2 ’command the children of israel, and say unto them: when ye come into the land of canaan, this shall be the land that shall fall unto you for an inheritance, even the land of canaan according to the borders thereof.
english: ’Command the children of Israel, and say unto them: When ye come into the land of Canaan, this shall be the land that shall fall unto you for an inheritance, even the land of Canaan according to the borders thereof.

searchText: numbers 34:3 thus your south side shall be from the wilderness of zin close by the side of edom, and your south border shall begin at the end of the salt sea eastward;
english: Thus your south side shall be from the wilderness of Zin close by the side of Edom, and your south border shall begin at the end of the Salt Sea eastward;

searchText: numbers 34:4 and your border shall turn about southward of the ascent of akrabbim, and pass along to zin; and the goings out thereof shall be southward of kadesh-barnea; and it shall go forth to hazar-addar, and pass along to azmon;
english: and your border shall turn about southward of the ascent of Akrabbim, and pass along to Zin; and the goings out thereof shall be southward of Kadesh-barnea; and it shall go forth to Hazar-addar, and pass along to Azmon;

searchText: numbers 34:5 and the border shall turn about from azmon unto the brook of egypt, and the goings out thereof shall be at the sea.
english: and the border shall turn about from Azmon unto the Brook of Egypt, and the goings out thereof shall be at the Sea.

searchText: numbers 34:6 and for the western border, ye shall have the great sea for a border; this shall be your west border.
english: And for the western border, ye shall have the Great Sea for a border; this shall be your west border.

searchText: numbers 34:7 and this shall be your north border: from the great sea ye shall mark out your line unto mount hor;
english: And this shall be your north border: from the Great Sea ye shall mark out your line unto mount Hor;

searchText: numbers 34:8 from mount hor ye shall mark out a line unto the entrance to hamath; and the goings out of the border shall be at zedad;
english: from mount Hor ye shall mark out a line unto the entrance to Hamath; and the goings out of the border shall be at Zedad;

searchText: numbers 34:9 and the border shall go forth to ziphron, and the goings out thereof shall be at hazar-enan; this shall be your north border.
english: and the border shall go forth to Ziphron, and the goings out thereof shall be at Hazar-enan; this shall be your north border.

searchText: numbers 34:10 and ye shall mark out your line for the east border from hazar-enan to shepham;
english: And ye shall mark out your line for the east border from Hazar-enan to Shepham;

searchText: numbers 34:11 and the border shall go down from shepham to riblah, on the east side of ain; and the border shall go down, and shall strike upon the slope of the sea of chinnereth eastward;
english: and the border shall go down from Shepham to Riblah, on the east side of Ain; and the border shall go down, and shall strike upon the slope of the sea of Chinnereth eastward;

searchText: numbers 34:12 and the border shall go down to the jordan, and the goings out thereof shall be at the salt sea; this shall be your land according to the borders thereof round about.’
english: and the border shall go down to the Jordan, and the goings out thereof shall be at the Salt Sea; this shall be your land according to the borders thereof round about.’

searchText: numbers 34:13 and moses commanded the children of israel, saying: ‘this is the land wherein ye shall receive inheritance by lot, which the lord hath commanded to give unto the nine tribes, and to the half-tribe;
english: And Moses commanded the children of Israel, saying: ‘This is the land wherein ye shall receive inheritance by lot, which the LORD hath commanded to give unto the nine tribes, and to the half-tribe;

searchText: numbers 34:14 for the tribe of the children of reuben according to their fathers’houses, and the tribe of the children of gad according to their fathers’houses, have received, and the half-tribe of manasseh have received, their inheritance;
english: for the tribe of the children of Reuben according to their fathers’houses, and the tribe of the children of Gad according to their fathers’houses, have received, and the half-tribe of Manasseh have received, their inheritance;

searchText: numbers 34:15 the two tribes and the half-tribe have received their inheritance beyond the jordan at jericho eastward, toward the sun-rising.’
english: the two tribes and the half-tribe have received their inheritance beyond the Jordan at Jericho eastward, toward the sun-rising.’

searchText: numbers 34:16 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 34:17 ’these are the names of the men that shall take possession of the land for you: eleazar the priest, and joshua the son of nun.
english: ’These are the names of the men that shall take possession of the land for you: Eleazar the priest, and Joshua the son of Nun.

searchText: numbers 34:18 and ye shall take one prince of every tribe, to take possession of the land.
english: And ye shall take one prince of every tribe, to take possession of the land.

searchText: numbers 34:19 and these are the names of the men: of the tribe of judah, caleb the son of jephunneh.
english: And these are the names of the men: of the tribe of Judah, Caleb the son of Jephunneh.

searchText: numbers 34:20 and of the tribe of the children of simeon, shemuel the son of ammihud.
english: And of the tribe of the children of Simeon, Shemuel the son of Ammihud.

searchText: numbers 34:21 of the tribe of benjamin, elidad the son of chislon.
english: Of the tribe of Benjamin, Elidad the son of Chislon.

searchText: numbers 34:22 and of the tribe of the children of dan a prince, bukki the son of jogli.
english: And of the tribe of the children of Dan a prince, Bukki the son of Jogli.

searchText: numbers 34:23 of the children of joseph: of the tribe of the children of manasseh a prince, hanniel the son of ephod;
english: Of the children of Joseph: of the tribe of the children of Manasseh a prince, Hanniel the son of Ephod;

searchText: numbers 34:24 and of the tribe of the children of ephraim a prince, kemuel the son of shiphtan.
english: and of the tribe of the children of Ephraim a prince, Kemuel the son of Shiphtan.

searchText: numbers 34:25 and of the tribe of the children of zebulun a prince, eli-zaphan the son of parnach.
english: And of the tribe of the children of Zebulun a prince, Eli-zaphan the son of Parnach.

searchText: numbers 34:26 and of the tribe of the children of issachar a prince, paltiel the son of azzan.
english: And of the tribe of the children of Issachar a prince, Paltiel the son of Azzan.

searchText: numbers 34:27 and of the tribe of the children of asher a prince, ahihud the son of shelomi.
english: And of the tribe of the children of Asher a prince, Ahihud the son of Shelomi.

searchText: numbers 34:28 and of the tribe of the children of naphtali a prince, pedahel the son of ammihud.
english: And of the tribe of the children of Naphtali a prince, Pedahel the son of Ammihud.

searchText: numbers 34:29 these are they whom the lord commanded to divide the inheritance unto the children of israel in the land of canaan.’
english: These are they whom the LORD commanded to divide the inheritance unto the children of Israel in the land of Canaan.’

searchText: numbers 35:1 and the lord spoke unto moses in the plains of moab by the jordan at jericho, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses in the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho, saying:

searchText: numbers 35:2 ’command the children of israel, that they give unto the levites of the inheritance of their possession cities to dwell in; and open land round about the cities shall ye give unto the levites.
english: ’Command the children of Israel, that they give unto the Levites of the inheritance of their possession cities to dwell in; and open land round about the cities shall ye give unto the Levites.

searchText: numbers 35:3 and the cities shall they have to dwell in; and their open land shall be for their cattle, and for their substance, and for all their beasts.
english: And the cities shall they have to dwell in; and their open land shall be for their cattle, and for their substance, and for all their beasts.

searchText: numbers 35:4 and the open land about the cities, which ye shall give unto the levites, shall be from the wall of the city and outward a thousand cubits round about.
english: And the open land about the cities, which ye shall give unto the Levites, shall be from the wall of the city and outward a thousand cubits round about.

searchText: numbers 35:5 and ye shall measure without the city for the east side two thousand cubits, and for the south side two thousand cubits, and for the west side two thousand cubits, and for the north side two thousand cubits, the city being in the midst. this shall be to them the open land about the cities.
english: And ye shall measure without the city for the east side two thousand cubits, and for the south side two thousand cubits, and for the west side two thousand cubits, and for the north side two thousand cubits, the city being in the midst. This shall be to them the open land about the cities.

searchText: numbers 35:6 and the cities which ye shall give unto the levites, they shall be the six cities of refuge, which ye shall give for the manslayer to flee thither; and beside them ye shall give forty and two cities.
english: And the cities which ye shall give unto the Levites, they shall be the six cities of refuge, which ye shall give for the manslayer to flee thither; and beside them ye shall give forty and two cities.

searchText: numbers 35:7 all the cities which ye shall give to the levites shall be forty and eight cities: them shall ye give with the open land about them.
english: All the cities which ye shall give to the Levites shall be forty and eight cities: them shall ye give with the open land about them.

searchText: numbers 35:8 and concerning the cities which ye shall give of the possession of the children of israel, from the many ye shall take many, and from the few ye shall take few; each tribe according to its inheritance which it inheriteth shall give of its cities unto the levites.’
english: And concerning the cities which ye shall give of the possession of the children of Israel, from the many ye shall take many, and from the few ye shall take few; each tribe according to its inheritance which it inheriteth shall give of its cities unto the Levites.’

searchText: numbers 35:9 and the lord spoke unto moses, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses, saying:

searchText: numbers 35:10 ’speak unto the children of israel, and say unto them: when ye pass over the jordan into the land of canaan,
english: ’Speak unto the children of Israel, and say unto them: When ye pass over the Jordan into the land of Canaan,

searchText: numbers 35:11 then ye shall appoint you cities to be cities of refuge for you, that the manslayer that killeth any person through error may flee thither.
english: then ye shall appoint you cities to be cities of refuge for you, that the manslayer that killeth any person through error may flee thither.

searchText: numbers 35:12 and the cities shall be unto you for refuge from the avenger, that the manslayer die not, until he stand before the congregation for judgment.
english: And the cities shall be unto you for refuge from the avenger, that the manslayer die not, until he stand before the congregation for judgment.

searchText: numbers 35:13 and as to the cities which ye shall give, there shall be for you six cities of refuge.
english: And as to the cities which ye shall give, there shall be for you six cities of refuge.

searchText: numbers 35:14 ye shall give three cities beyond the jordan, and three cities shall ye give in the land of canaan; they shall be cities of refuge.
english: Ye shall give three cities beyond the Jordan, and three cities shall ye give in the land of Canaan; they shall be cities of refuge.

searchText: numbers 35:15 for the children of israel, and for the stranger and for the settler among them, shall these six cities be for refuge, that every one that killeth any person through error may flee thither.
english: For the children of Israel, and for the stranger and for the settler among them, shall these six cities be for refuge, that every one that killeth any person through error may flee thither.

searchText: numbers 35:16 but if he smote him with an instrument of iron, so that he died, he is a murderer; the murderer shall surely be put to death.
english: But if he smote him with an instrument of iron, so that he died, he is a murderer; the murderer shall surely be put to death.

searchText: numbers 35:17 and if he smote him with a stone in the hand, whereby a man may die, and he died, he is a murderer; the murderer shall surely be put to death.
english: And if he smote him with a stone in the hand, whereby a man may die, and he died, he is a murderer; the murderer shall surely be put to death.

searchText: numbers 35:18 or if he smote him with a weapon of wood in the hand, whereby a man may die, and he died, he is a murderer; the murderer shall surely be put to death.
english: Or if he smote him with a weapon of wood in the hand, whereby a man may die, and he died, he is a murderer; the murderer shall surely be put to death.

searchText: numbers 35:19 the avenger of blood shall himself put the murderer to death; when he meeteth him, he shall put him to death.
english: The avenger of blood shall himself put the murderer to death; when he meeteth him, he shall put him to death.

searchText: numbers 35:20 and if he thrust him of hatred, or hurled at him any thing, lying in wait, so that he died;
english: And if he thrust him of hatred, or hurled at him any thing, lying in wait, so that he died;

searchText: numbers 35:21 or in enmity smote him with his hand, that he died; he that smote him shall surely be put to death: he is a murderer; the avenger of blood shall put the murderer to death when he meeteth him.
english: or in enmity smote him with his hand, that he died; he that smote him shall surely be put to death: he is a murderer; the avenger of blood shall put the murderer to death when he meeteth him.

searchText: numbers 35:22 but if he thrust him suddenly without enmity, or hurled upon him any thing without lying in wait,
english: But if he thrust him suddenly without enmity, or hurled upon him any thing without lying in wait,

searchText: numbers 35:23 or with any stone, whereby a man may die, seeing him not, and cast it upon him, so that he died, and he was not his enemy, neither sought his harm;
english: or with any stone, whereby a man may die, seeing him not, and cast it upon him, so that he died, and he was not his enemy, neither sought his harm;

searchText: numbers 35:24 then the congregation shall judge between the smiter and the avenger of blood according to these ordinances;
english: then the congregation shall judge between the smiter and the avenger of blood according to these ordinances;

searchText: numbers 35:25 and the congregation shall deliver the manslayer out of the hand of the avenger of blood, and the congregation shall restore him to his city of refuge, whither he was fled; and he shall dwell therein until the death of the high priest, who was anointed with the holy oil.
english: and the congregation shall deliver the manslayer out of the hand of the avenger of blood, and the congregation shall restore him to his city of refuge, whither he was fled; and he shall dwell therein until the death of the high priest, who was anointed with the holy oil.

searchText: numbers 35:26 but if the manslayer shall at any time go beyond the border of his city of refuge, whither he fleeth;
english: But if the manslayer shall at any time go beyond the border of his city of refuge, whither he fleeth;

searchText: numbers 35:27 and the avenger of blood find him without the border of his city of refuge, and the avenger of blood slay the manslayer; there shall be no bloodguiltiness for him;
english: and the avenger of blood find him without the border of his city of refuge, and the avenger of blood slay the manslayer; there shall be no bloodguiltiness for him;

searchText: numbers 35:28 because he must remain in his city of refuge until the death of the high priest; but after the death of the high priest the manslayer may return into the land of his possession.
english: because he must remain in his city of refuge until the death of the high priest; but after the death of the high priest the manslayer may return into the land of his possession.

searchText: numbers 35:29 and these things shall be for a statute of judgment unto you throughout your generations in all your dwellings.
english: And these things shall be for a statute of judgment unto you throughout your generations in all your dwellings.

searchText: numbers 35:30 whoso killeth any person, the murderer shall be slain at the mouth of witnesses; but one witness shall not testify against any person that he die.
english: Whoso killeth any person, the murderer shall be slain at the mouth of witnesses; but one witness shall not testify against any person that he die.

searchText: numbers 35:31 moreover ye shall take no ransom for the life of a murderer, that is guilty of death; but he shall surely be put to death.
english: Moreover ye shall take no ransom for the life of a murderer, that is guilty of death; but he shall surely be put to death.

searchText: numbers 35:32 and ye shall take no ransom for him that is fled to his city of refuge, that he should come again to dwell in the land, until the death of the priest.
english: And ye shall take no ransom for him that is fled to his city of refuge, that he should come again to dwell in the land, until the death of the priest.

searchText: numbers 35:33 so ye shall not pollute the land wherein ye are; for blood, it polluteth the land; and no expiation can be made for the land for the blood that is shed therein, but by the blood of him that shed it.
english: So ye shall not pollute the land wherein ye are; for blood, it polluteth the land; and no expiation can be made for the land for the blood that is shed therein, but by the blood of him that shed it.

searchText: numbers 35:34 and thou shalt not defile the land which ye inhabit, in the midst of which i dwell; for i the lord dwell in the midst of the children of israel.’
english: And thou shalt not defile the land which ye inhabit, in the midst of which I dwell; for I the LORD dwell in the midst of the children of Israel.’

searchText: numbers 36:1 and the heads of the fathers’houses of the family of the children of gilead, the son of machir, the son of manasseh, of the families of the sons of joseph, came near, and spoke before moses, and before the princes, the heads of the fathers’houses of the children of israel;
english: And the heads of the fathers’houses of the family of the children of Gilead, the son of Machir, the son of Manasseh, of the families of the sons of Joseph, came near, and spoke before Moses, and before the princes, the heads of the fathers’houses of the children of Israel;

searchText: numbers 36:2 and they said: ‘the lord commanded my lord to give the land for inheritance by lot to the children of israel; and my lord was commanded by the lord to give the inheritance of zelophehad our brother unto his daughters.
english: and they said: ‘The LORD commanded my lord to give the land for inheritance by lot to the children of Israel; and my lord was commanded by the LORD to give the inheritance of Zelophehad our brother unto his daughters.

searchText: numbers 36:3 and if they be married to any of the sons of the other tribes of the children of israel, then will their inheritance be taken away from the inheritance of our fathers, and will be added to the inheritance of the tribe whereunto they shall belong; so will it be taken away from the lot of our inheritance.
english: And if they be married to any of the sons of the other tribes of the children of Israel, then will their inheritance be taken away from the inheritance of our fathers, and will be added to the inheritance of the tribe whereunto they shall belong; so will it be taken away from the lot of our inheritance.

searchText: numbers 36:4 and when the jubilee of the children of israel shall be, then will their inheritance be added unto the inheritance of the tribe whereunto they shall belong; so will their inheritance be taken away from the inheritance of the tribe of our fathers.’
english: And when the jubilee of the children of Israel shall be, then will their inheritance be added unto the inheritance of the tribe whereunto they shall belong; so will their inheritance be taken away from the inheritance of the tribe of our fathers.’

searchText: numbers 36:5 and moses commanded the children of israel according to the word of the lord, saying: ‘the tribe of the sons of joseph speaketh right.
english: And Moses commanded the children of Israel according to the word of the LORD, saying: ‘The tribe of the sons of Joseph speaketh right.

searchText: numbers 36:6 this is the thing which the lord hath commanded concerning the daughters of zelophehad, saying: let them be married to whom they think best; only into the family of the tribe of their father shall they be married.
english: This is the thing which the LORD hath commanded concerning the daughters of Zelophehad, saying: Let them be married to whom they think best; only into the family of the tribe of their father shall they be married.

searchText: numbers 36:7 so shall no inheritance of the children of israel remove from tribe to tribe; for the children of israel shall cleave every one to the inheritance of the tribe of his fathers.
english: So shall no inheritance of the children of Israel remove from tribe to tribe; for the children of Israel shall cleave every one to the inheritance of the tribe of his fathers.

searchText: numbers 36:8 and every daughter, that possesseth an inheritance in any tribe of the children of israel, shall be wife unto one of the family of the tribe of her father, that the children of israel may possess every man the inheritance of his fathers.
english: And every daughter, that possesseth an inheritance in any tribe of the children of Israel, shall be wife unto one of the family of the tribe of her father, that the children of Israel may possess every man the inheritance of his fathers.

searchText: numbers 36:9 so shall no inheritance remove from one tribe to another tribe; for the tribes of the children of israel shall cleave each one to its own inheritance.’
english: So shall no inheritance remove from one tribe to another tribe; for the tribes of the children of Israel shall cleave each one to its own inheritance.’

searchText: numbers 36:10 even as the lord commanded moses, so did the daughters of zelophehad.
english: Even as the LORD commanded Moses, so did the daughters of Zelophehad.

searchText: numbers 36:11 for mahlah, tirzah, and hoglah, and milcah, and noah, the daughters of zelophehad, were married unto their father’s brothers’sons.
english: For Mahlah, Tirzah, and Hoglah, and Milcah, and Noah, the daughters of Zelophehad, were married unto their father’s brothers’sons.

searchText: numbers 36:12 they were married into the families of the sons of manasseh the son of joseph, and their inheritance remained in the tribe of the family of their father.
english: They were married into the families of the sons of Manasseh the son of Joseph, and their inheritance remained in the tribe of the family of their father.

searchText: numbers 36:13 these are the commandments and the ordinances, which the lord commanded by the hand of moses unto the children of israel in the plains of moab by the jordan at jericho.
english: These are the commandments and the ordinances, which the LORD commanded by the hand of Moses unto the children of Israel in the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho.

searchText: deuteronomy 1:1 these are the words which moses spoke unto all israel beyond the jordan; in the wilderness, in the arabah, over against suph, between paran and tophel, and laban, and hazeroth, and di-zahab.
english: THESE ARE the words which Moses spoke unto all Israel beyond the Jordan; in the wilderness, in the Arabah, over against Suph, between Paran and Tophel, and Laban, and Hazeroth, and Di-zahab.

searchText: deuteronomy 1:2 it is eleven days journey from horeb unto kadesh-barnea by the way of mount seir.
english: It is eleven days journey from Horeb unto Kadesh-barnea by the way of mount Seir.

searchText: deuteronomy 1:3 and it came to pass in the fortieth year, in the eleventh month, on the first day of the month, that moses spoke unto the children of israel, according unto all that the lord had given him in commandment unto them;
english: And it came to pass in the fortieth year, in the eleventh month, on the first day of the month, that Moses spoke unto the children of Israel, according unto all that the LORD had given him in commandment unto them;

searchText: deuteronomy 1:4 after he had smitten sihon the king of the amorites, who dwelt in heshbon, and og the king of bashan, who dwelt in ashtaroth, at edrei;
english: after he had smitten Sihon the king of the Amorites, who dwelt in Heshbon, and Og the king of Bashan, who dwelt in Ashtaroth, at Edrei;

searchText: deuteronomy 1:5 beyond the jordan, in the land of moab, took moses upon him to expound this law, saying:
english: beyond the Jordan, in the land of Moab, took Moses upon him to expound this law, saying:

searchText: deuteronomy 1:6 the lord our god spoke unto us in horeb, saying: ‘ye have dwelt long enough in this mountain;
english: The LORD our God spoke unto us in Horeb, saying: ‘Ye have dwelt long enough in this mountain;

searchText: deuteronomy 1:7 turn you, and take your journey, and go to the hill-country of the amorites and unto all the places nigh thereunto, in the arabah, in the hill-country, and in the lowland, and in the south, and by the sea-shore; the land of the canaanites, and lebanon, as far as the great river, the river euphrates.
english: turn you, and take your journey, and go to the hill-country of the Amorites and unto all the places nigh thereunto, in the Arabah, in the hill-country, and in the Lowland, and in the South, and by the sea-shore; the land of the Canaanites, and Lebanon, as far as the great river, the river Euphrates.

searchText: deuteronomy 1:8 behold, i have set the land before you: go in and possess the land which the lord swore unto your fathers, to abraham, to isaac, and to jacob, to give unto them and to their seed after them.’
english: Behold, I have set the land before you: go in and possess the land which the LORD swore unto your fathers, to Abraham, to Isaac, and to Jacob, to give unto them and to their seed after them.’

searchText: deuteronomy 1:9 and i spoke unto you at that time, saying: ‘i am not able to bear you myself alone;
english: And I spoke unto you at that time, saying: ‘I am not able to bear you myself alone;

searchText: deuteronomy 1:10 the lord your god hath multiplied you, and, behold, ye are this day as the stars of heaven for multitude.—
english: the LORD your God hath multiplied you, and, behold, ye are this day as the stars of heaven for multitude.—

searchText: deuteronomy 1:11 the lord, the god of your fathers, make you a thousand times so many more as ye are, and bless you, as he hath promised you!—
english: The LORD, the God of your fathers, make you a thousand times so many more as ye are, and bless you, as He hath promised you!—

searchText: deuteronomy 1:12 how can i myself alone bear your cumbrance, and your burden, and your strife?
english: How can I myself alone bear your cumbrance, and your burden, and your strife?

searchText: deuteronomy 1:13 get you, from each one of your tribes, wise men, and understanding, and full of knowledge, and i will make them heads over you.’
english: Get you, from each one of your tribes, wise men, and understanding, and full of knowledge, and I will make them heads over you.’

searchText: deuteronomy 1:14 and ye answered me, and said: ‘the thing which thou hast spoken is good for us to do.’
english: And ye answered me, and said: ‘The thing which thou hast spoken is good for us to do.’

searchText: deuteronomy 1:15 so i took the heads of your tribes, wise men, and full of knowledge, and made them heads over you, captains of thousands, and captains of hundreds, and captains of fifties, and captains of tens, and officers, tribe by tribe.
english: So I took the heads of your tribes, wise men, and full of knowledge, and made them heads over you, captains of thousands, and captains of hundreds, and captains of fifties, and captains of tens, and officers, tribe by tribe.

searchText: deuteronomy 1:16 and i charged your judges at that time, saying: ‘hear the causes between your brethren, and judge righteously between a man and his brother, and the stranger that is with him.
english: And I charged your judges at that time, saying: ‘Hear the causes between your brethren, and judge righteously between a man and his brother, and the stranger that is with him.

searchText: deuteronomy 1:17 ye shall not respect persons in judgment; ye shall hear the small and the great alike; ye shall not be afraid of the face of any man; for the judgment is god’s; and the cause that is too hard for you ye shall bring unto me, and i will hear it.’
english: Ye shall not respect persons in judgment; ye shall hear the small and the great alike; ye shall not be afraid of the face of any man; for the judgment is God’s; and the cause that is too hard for you ye shall bring unto me, and I will hear it.’

searchText: deuteronomy 1:18 and i commanded you at that time all the things which ye should do.
english: And I commanded you at that time all the things which ye should do.

searchText: deuteronomy 1:19 and we journeyed from horeb, and went through all that great and dreadful wilderness which ye saw, by the way to the hill-country of the amorites, as the lord our god commanded us; and we came to kadesh-barnea.
english: And we journeyed from Horeb, and went through all that great and dreadful wilderness which ye saw, by the way to the hill-country of the Amorites, as the LORD our God commanded us; and we came to Kadesh-barnea.

searchText: deuteronomy 1:20 and i said unto you: ‘ye are come unto the hill-country of the amorites, which the lord our god giveth unto us.
english: And I said unto you: ‘Ye are come unto the hill-country of the Amorites, which the LORD our God giveth unto us.

searchText: deuteronomy 1:21 behold, the lord thy god hath set the land before thee; go up, take possession, as the lord, the god of thy fathers, hath spoken unto thee; fear not, neither be dismayed.’
english: Behold, the LORD thy God hath set the land before thee; go up, take possession, as the LORD, the God of thy fathers, hath spoken unto thee; fear not, neither be dismayed.’

searchText: deuteronomy 1:22 and ye came near unto me every one of you, and said: ‘let us send men before us, that they may search the land for us, and bring us back word of the way by which we must go up, and the cities unto which we shall come.’
english: And ye came near unto me every one of you, and said: ‘Let us send men before us, that they may search the land for us, and bring us back word of the way by which we must go up, and the cities unto which we shall come.’

searchText: deuteronomy 1:23 and the thing pleased me well; and i took twelve men of you, one man for every tribe;
english: And the thing pleased me well; and I took twelve men of you, one man for every tribe;

searchText: deuteronomy 1:24 and they turned and went up into the mountains, and came unto the valley of eshcol, and spied it out.
english: and they turned and went up into the mountains, and came unto the valley of Eshcol, and spied it out.

searchText: deuteronomy 1:25 and they took of the fruit of the land in their hands, and brought it down unto us, and brought us back word, and said: ‘good is the land which the lord our god giveth unto us.’
english: And they took of the fruit of the land in their hands, and brought it down unto us, and brought us back word, and said: ‘Good is the land which the LORD our God giveth unto us.’

searchText: deuteronomy 1:26 yet ye would not go up, but rebelled against the commandment of the lord your god;
english: Yet ye would not go up, but rebelled against the commandment of the LORD your God;

searchText: deuteronomy 1:27 and ye murmured in your tents, and said: ‘because the lord hated us, he hath brought us forth out of the land of egypt, to deliver us into the hand of the amorites, to destroy us.
english: and ye murmured in your tents, and said: ‘Because the LORD hated us, He hath brought us forth out of the land of Egypt, to deliver us into the hand of the Amorites, to destroy us.

searchText: deuteronomy 1:28 whither are we going up? our brethren have made our heart to melt, saying: the people is greater and taller than we; the cities are great and fortified up to heaven; and moreover we have seen the sons of the anakim there.’
english: Whither are we going up? our brethren have made our heart to melt, saying: The people is greater and taller than we; the cities are great and fortified up to heaven; and moreover we have seen the sons of the Anakim there.’

searchText: deuteronomy 1:29 then i said unto you: ‘dread not, neither be afraid of them.
english: Then I said unto you: ‘Dread not, neither be afraid of them.

searchText: deuteronomy 1:30 the lord your god who goeth before you, he shall fight for you, according to all that he did for you in egypt before your eyes;
english: The LORD your God who goeth before you, He shall fight for you, according to all that He did for you in Egypt before your eyes;

searchText: deuteronomy 1:31 and in the wilderness, where thou hast seen how that the lord thy god bore thee, as a man doth bear his son, in all the way that ye went, until ye came unto this place.
english: and in the wilderness, where thou hast seen how that the LORD thy God bore thee, as a man doth bear his son, in all the way that ye went, until ye came unto this place.

searchText: deuteronomy 1:32 yet in this thing ye do not believe the lord your god,
english: Yet in this thing ye do not believe the LORD your God,

searchText: deuteronomy 1:33 who went before you in the way, to seek you out a place to pitch your tents in: in fire by night, to show you by what way ye should go, and in the cloud by day.’
english: Who went before you in the way, to seek you out a place to pitch your tents in: in fire by night, to show you by what way ye should go, and in the cloud by day.’

searchText: deuteronomy 1:34 and the lord heard the voice of your words, and was wroth, and swore, saying:
english: And the LORD heard the voice of your words, and was wroth, and swore, saying:

searchText: deuteronomy 1:35 ’surely there shall not one of these men, even this evil generation, see the good land, which i swore to give unto your fathers,
english: ’Surely there shall not one of these men, even this evil generation, see the good land, which I swore to give unto your fathers,

searchText: deuteronomy 1:36 save caleb the son of jephunneh, he shall see it; and to him will i give the land that he hath trodden upon, and to his children; because he hath wholly followed the lord.’
english: save Caleb the son of Jephunneh, he shall see it; and to him will I give the land that he hath trodden upon, and to his children; because he hath wholly followed the LORD.’

searchText: deuteronomy 1:37 also the lord was angry with me for your sakes, saying: thou also shalt not go in thither;
english: Also the LORD was angry with me for your sakes, saying: Thou also shalt not go in thither;

searchText: deuteronomy 1:38 joshua the son of nun, who standeth before thee, he shall go in thither; encourage thou him, for he shall cause israel to inherit it.
english: Joshua the son of Nun, who standeth before thee, he shall go in thither; encourage thou him, for he shall cause Israel to inherit it.

searchText: deuteronomy 1:39 moreover your little ones, that ye said should be a prey, and your children, that this day have no knowledge of good or evil, they shall go in thither, and unto them will i give it, and they shall possess it.
english: Moreover your little ones, that ye said should be a prey, and your children, that this day have no knowledge of good or evil, they shall go in thither, and unto them will I give it, and they shall possess it.

searchText: deuteronomy 1:40 but as for you, turn you, and take your journey into the wilderness by the way to the red sea.’
english: But as for you, turn you, and take your journey into the wilderness by the way to the Red Sea.’

searchText: deuteronomy 1:41 then ye answered and said unto me: ‘we have sinned against the lord, we will go up and fight, according to all that the lord our god commanded us.’ and ye girded on every man his weapons of war, and deemed it a light thing to go up into the hill-country.
english: Then ye answered and said unto me: ‘We have sinned against the LORD, we will go up and fight, according to all that the LORD our God commanded us.’ And ye girded on every man his weapons of war, and deemed it a light thing to go up into the hill-country.

searchText: deuteronomy 1:42 and the lord said unto me: ‘say unto them: go not up, neither fight; for i am not among you; lest ye be smitten before your enemies.’
english: And the LORD said unto me: ‘Say unto them: Go not up, neither fight; for I am not among you; lest ye be smitten before your enemies.’

searchText: deuteronomy 1:43 so i spoke unto you, and ye hearkened not; but ye rebelled against the commandment of the lord, and were presumptuous, and went up into the hill-country.
english: So I spoke unto you, and ye hearkened not; but ye rebelled against the commandment of the LORD, and were presumptuous, and went up into the hill-country.

searchText: deuteronomy 1:44 and the amorites, that dwell in that hill-country, came out against you, and chased you, as bees do, and beat you down in seir, even unto hormah.
english: And the Amorites, that dwell in that hill-country, came out against you, and chased you, as bees do, and beat you down in Seir, even unto Hormah.

searchText: deuteronomy 1:45 and ye returned and wept before the lord; but the lord hearkened not to your voice, nor gave ear unto you.
english: And ye returned and wept before the LORD; but the LORD hearkened not to your voice, nor gave ear unto you.

searchText: deuteronomy 1:46 so ye abode in kadesh many days, according unto the days that ye abode there.
english: So ye abode in Kadesh many days, according unto the days that ye abode there.

searchText: deuteronomy 2:1 then we turned, and took our journey into the wilderness by the way to the red sea, as the lord spoke unto me; and we compassed mount seir many days.
english: Then we turned, and took our journey into the wilderness by the way to the Red Sea, as the LORD spoke unto me; and we compassed mount Seir many days.

searchText: deuteronomy 2:2 and the lord spoke unto me, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto me, saying:

searchText: deuteronomy 2:3 ’ye have compassed this mountain long enough; turn you northward.
english: ’Ye have compassed this mountain long enough; turn you northward.

searchText: deuteronomy 2:4 and command thou the people, saying: ye are to pass through the border of your brethren the children of esau, that dwell in seir; and they will be afraid of you; take ye good heed unto yourselves therefore;
english: And command thou the people, saying: Ye are to pass through the border of your brethren the children of Esau, that dwell in Seir; and they will be afraid of you; take ye good heed unto yourselves therefore;

searchText: deuteronomy 2:5 contend not with them; for i will not give you of their land, no, not so much as for the sole of the foot to tread on; because i have given mount seir unto esau for a possession.
english: contend not with them; for I will not give you of their land, no, not so much as for the sole of the foot to tread on; because I have given mount Seir unto Esau for a possession.

searchText: deuteronomy 2:6 ye shall purchase food of them for money, that ye may eat; and ye shall also buy water of them for money, that ye may drink.
english: Ye shall purchase food of them for money, that ye may eat; and ye shall also buy water of them for money, that ye may drink.

searchText: deuteronomy 2:7 for the lord thy god hath blessed thee in all the work of thy hand; he hath known thy walking through this great wilderness; these forty years the lord thy god hath been with thee; thou hast lacked nothing.’
english: For the LORD thy God hath blessed thee in all the work of thy hand; He hath known thy walking through this great wilderness; these forty years the LORD thy God hath been with thee; thou hast lacked nothing.’

searchText: deuteronomy 2:8 so we passed by from our brethren the children of esau, that dwell in seir, from the way of the arabah, from elath and from ezion-geber. and we turned and passed by the way of the wilderness of moab.
english: So we passed by from our brethren the children of Esau, that dwell in Seir, from the way of the Arabah, from Elath and from Ezion-geber. And we turned and passed by the way of the wilderness of Moab.

searchText: deuteronomy 2:9 and the lord said unto me: ‘be not at enmity with moab, neither contend with them in battle; for i will not give thee of his land for a possession; because i have given ar unto the children of lot for a possession.—
english: And the LORD said unto me: ‘Be not at enmity with Moab, neither contend with them in battle; for I will not give thee of his land for a possession; because I have given Ar unto the children of Lot for a possession.—

searchText: deuteronomy 2:10 the emim dwelt therein aforetime, a people great, and many, and tall, as the anakim;
english: The Emim dwelt therein aforetime, a people great, and many, and tall, as the Anakim;

searchText: deuteronomy 2:11 these also are accounted rephaim, as the anakim; but the moabites call them emim.
english: these also are accounted Rephaim, as the Anakim; but the Moabites call them Emim.

searchText: deuteronomy 2:12 and in seir dwelt the horites aforetime, but the children of esau succeeded them; and they destroyed them from before them, and dwelt in their stead; as israel did unto the land of his possession, which the lord gave unto them.—
english: And in Seir dwelt the Horites aforetime, but the children of Esau succeeded them; and they destroyed them from before them, and dwelt in their stead; as Israel did unto the land of his possession, which the LORD gave unto them.—

searchText: deuteronomy 2:13 now rise up, and get you over the brook zered.’ and we went over the brook zered.
english: Now rise up, and get you over the brook Zered.’ And we went over the brook Zered.

searchText: deuteronomy 2:14 and the days in which we came from kadesh-barnea, until we were come over the brook zered, were thirty and eight years; until all the generation, even the men of war, were consumed from the midst of the camp, as the lord swore unto them.
english: And the days in which we came from Kadesh-barnea, until we were come over the brook Zered, were thirty and eight years; until all the generation, even the men of war, were consumed from the midst of the camp, as the LORD swore unto them.

searchText: deuteronomy 2:15 moreover the hand of the lord was against them, to discomfit them from the midst of the camp, until they were consumed.
english: Moreover the hand of the LORD was against them, to discomfit them from the midst of the camp, until they were consumed.

searchText: deuteronomy 2:16 so it came to pass, when all the men of war were consumed and dead from among the people,
english: So it came to pass, when all the men of war were consumed and dead from among the people,

searchText: deuteronomy 2:17 that the lord spoke unto me saying:
english: that the LORD spoke unto me saying:

searchText: deuteronomy 2:18 ’thou art this day to pass over the border of moab, even ar;
english: ’Thou art this day to pass over the border of Moab, even Ar;

searchText: deuteronomy 2:19 and when thou comest nigh over against the children of ammon, harass them not, nor contend with them; for i will not give thee of the land of the children of ammon for a possession; because i have given it unto the children of lot for a possession.—
english: and when thou comest nigh over against the children of Ammon, harass them not, nor contend with them; for I will not give thee of the land of the children of Ammon for a possession; because I have given it unto the children of Lot for a possession.—

searchText: deuteronomy 2:20 that also is accounted a land of rephaim: rephaim dwelt therein aforetime; but the ammonites call them zamzummim,
english: That also is accounted a land of Rephaim: Rephaim dwelt therein aforetime; but the Ammonites call them Zamzummim,

searchText: deuteronomy 2:21 a people great, and many, and tall, as the anakim; but the lord destroyed them before them; and they succeeded them, and dwelt in their stead;
english: a people great, and many, and tall, as the Anakim; but the LORD destroyed them before them; and they succeeded them, and dwelt in their stead;

searchText: deuteronomy 2:22 as he did for the children of esau, that dwell in seir, when he destroyed the horites from before them; and they succeeded them, and dwelt in their stead even unto this day;
english: as He did for the children of Esau, that dwell in Seir, when He destroyed the Horites from before them; and they succeeded them, and dwelt in their stead even unto this day;

searchText: deuteronomy 2:23 and the avvim, that dwelt in villages as far as gaza, the caphtorim, that came forth out of caphtor, destroyed them, and dwelt in their stead.—
english: and the Avvim, that dwelt in villages as far as Gaza, the Caphtorim, that came forth out of Caphtor, destroyed them, and dwelt in their stead.—

searchText: deuteronomy 2:24 rise ye up, take your journey, and pass over the valley of arnon; behold, i have given into thy hand sihon the amorite, king of heshbon, and his land; begin to possess it, and contend with him in battle.
english: Rise ye up, take your journey, and pass over the valley of Arnon; behold, I have given into thy hand Sihon the Amorite, king of Heshbon, and his land; begin to possess it, and contend with him in battle.

searchText: deuteronomy 2:25 this day will i begin to put the dread of thee and the fear of thee upon the peoples that are under the whole heaven, who, when they hear the report of thee, shall tremble, and be in anguish because of thee.’
english: This day will I begin to put the dread of thee and the fear of thee upon the peoples that are under the whole heaven, who, when they hear the report of thee, shall tremble, and be in anguish because of thee.’

searchText: deuteronomy 2:26 and i sent messengers out of the wilderness of kedemoth unto sihon king of heshbon with words of peace, saying:
english: And I sent messengers out of the wilderness of Kedemoth unto Sihon king of Heshbon with words of peace, saying:

searchText: deuteronomy 2:27 ’let me pass through thy land; i will go along by the highway, i will neither turn unto the right hand nor to the left.
english: ’Let me pass through thy land; I will go along by the highway, I will neither turn unto the right hand nor to the left.

searchText: deuteronomy 2:28 thou shalt sell me food for money, that i may eat; and give me water for money, that i may drink; only let me pass through on my feet;
english: Thou shalt sell me food for money, that I may eat; and give me water for money, that I may drink; only let me pass through on my feet;

searchText: deuteronomy 2:29 as the children of esau that dwell in seir, and the moabites that dwell in ar, did unto me; until i shall pass over the jordan into the land which the lord our god giveth us.’ .
english: as the children of Esau that dwell in Seir, and the Moabites that dwell in Ar, did unto me; until I shall pass over the Jordan into the land which the LORD our God giveth us.’ .

searchText: deuteronomy 2:30 but sihon king of heshbon would not let us pass by him; for the lord thy god hardened his spirit, and made his heart obstinate, that he might deliver him into thy hand, as appeareth this day.
english: But Sihon king of Heshbon would not let us pass by him; for the LORD thy God hardened his spirit, and made his heart obstinate, that He might deliver him into thy hand, as appeareth this day.

searchText: deuteronomy 2:31 and the lord said unto me: ‘behold, i have begun to deliver up sihon and his land before thee; begin to possess his land.’
english: And the LORD said unto me: ‘Behold, I have begun to deliver up Sihon and his land before thee; begin to possess his land.’

searchText: deuteronomy 2:32 then sihon came out against us, he and all his people, unto battle at jahaz.
english: Then Sihon came out against us, he and all his people, unto battle at Jahaz.

searchText: deuteronomy 2:33 and the lord our god delivered him up before us; and we smote him, and his sons, and all his people.
english: And the LORD our God delivered him up before us; and we smote him, and his sons, and all his people.

searchText: deuteronomy 2:34 and we took all his cities at that time, and utterly destroyed every city, the men, and the women, and the little ones; we left none remaining;
english: And we took all his cities at that time, and utterly destroyed every city, the men, and the women, and the little ones; we left none remaining;

searchText: deuteronomy 2:35 only the cattle we took for a prey unto ourselves, with the spoil of the cities which we had taken.
english: only the cattle we took for a prey unto ourselves, with the spoil of the cities which we had taken.

searchText: deuteronomy 2:36 from aroer, which is on the edge of the valley of arnon, and from the city that is in the valley, even unto gilead, there was not a city too high for us: the lord our god delivered up all before us.
english: From Aroer, which is on the edge of the valley of Arnon, and from the city that is in the valley, even unto Gilead, there was not a city too high for us: the LORD our God delivered up all before us.

searchText: deuteronomy 2:37 only to the land of the children of ammon thou camest not near; all the side of the river jabbok, and the cities of the hill-country, and wheresoever the lord our god forbade us.
