english: Only to the land of the children of Ammon thou camest not near; all the side of the river Jabbok, and the cities of the hill-country, and wheresoever the LORD our God forbade us.

searchText: deuteronomy 3:1 then we turned, and went up the way to bashan; and og the king of bashan came out against us, he and all his people, unto battle at edrei.
english: Then we turned, and went up the way to Bashan; and Og the king of Bashan came out against us, he and all his people, unto battle at Edrei.

searchText: deuteronomy 3:2 and the lord said unto me: ‘fear him not; for i have delivered him, and all his people, and his land, into thy hand; and thou shalt do unto him as thou didst unto sihon king of the amorites, who dwelt at heshbon.’
english: And the LORD said unto me: ‘Fear him not; for I have delivered him, and all his people, and his land, into thy hand; and thou shalt do unto him as thou didst unto Sihon king of the Amorites, who dwelt at Heshbon.’

searchText: deuteronomy 3:3 so the lord our god delivered into our hand og also, the king of bashan, and all his people; and we smote him until none was left to him remaining.
english: So the LORD our God delivered into our hand Og also, the king of Bashan, and all his people; and we smote him until none was left to him remaining.

searchText: deuteronomy 3:4 and we took all his cities at that time; there was not a city which we took not from them; threescore cities, all the region of argob, the kingdom of og in bashan.
english: And we took all his cities at that time; there was not a city which we took not from them; threescore cities, all the region of Argob, the kingdom of Og in Bashan.

searchText: deuteronomy 3:5 all these were fortified cities, with high walls, gates, and bars; beside the unwalled towns a great many.
english: All these were fortified cities, with high walls, gates, and bars; beside the unwalled towns a great many.

searchText: deuteronomy 3:6 and we utterly destroyed them, as we did unto sihon king of heshbon, utterly destroying every city, the men, and the women, and the little ones.
english: And we utterly destroyed them, as we did unto Sihon king of Heshbon, utterly destroying every city, the men, and the women, and the little ones.

searchText: deuteronomy 3:7 but all the cattle, and the spoil of the cities, we took for a prey unto ourselves.
english: But all the cattle, and the spoil of the cities, we took for a prey unto ourselves.

searchText: deuteronomy 3:8 and we took the land at that time out of the hand of the two kings of the amorites that were beyond the jordan, from the valley of arnon unto mount hermon—
english: And we took the land at that time out of the hand of the two kings of the Amorites that were beyond the Jordan, from the valley of Arnon unto mount Hermon—

searchText: deuteronomy 3:9 which hermon the sidonians call sirion, and the amorites call it senir—
english: which Hermon the Sidonians call Sirion, and the Amorites call it Senir—

searchText: deuteronomy 3:10 all the cities of the plain, and all gilead, and all bashan, unto salcah and edrei, cities of the kingdom of og in bashan.—
english: all the cities of the plain, and all Gilead, and all Bashan, unto Salcah and Edrei, cities of the kingdom of Og in Bashan.—

searchText: deuteronomy 3:11 for only og king of bashan remained of the remnant of the rephaim; behold, his bedstead was a bedstead of iron; is it not in rabbah of the children of ammon? nine cubits was the length thereof, and four cubits the breadth of it, after the cubit of a man.—
english: For only Og king of Bashan remained of the remnant of the Rephaim; behold, his bedstead was a bedstead of iron; is it not in Rabbah of the children of Ammon? nine cubits was the length thereof, and four cubits the breadth of it, after the cubit of a man.—

searchText: deuteronomy 3:12 and this land we took in possession at that time; from aroer, which is by the valley of arnon, and half the hill-country of gilead, and the cities thereof, gave i unto the reubenites and to the gadites;
english: And this land we took in possession at that time; from Aroer, which is by the valley of Arnon, and half the hill-country of Gilead, and the cities thereof, gave I unto the Reubenites and to the Gadites;

searchText: deuteronomy 3:13 and the rest of gilead, and all bashan, the kingdom of og, gave i unto the half-tribe of manasseh; all the region of argob—all that bashan is called the land of rephaim.
english: and the rest of Gilead, and all Bashan, the kingdom of Og, gave I unto the half-tribe of Manasseh; all the region of Argob—all that Bashan is called the land of Rephaim.

searchText: deuteronomy 3:14 jair the son of manasseh took all the region of argob, unto the border of the geshurites and the maacathites, and called them, even bashan, after his own name, havvoth-jair, unto this day.—
english: Jair the son of Manasseh took all the region of Argob, unto the border of the Geshurites and the Maacathites, and called them, even Bashan, after his own name, Havvoth-jair, unto this day.—

searchText: deuteronomy 3:15 and i gave gilead unto machir.
english: And I gave Gilead unto Machir.

searchText: deuteronomy 3:16 and unto the reubenites and unto the gadites i gave from gilead even unto the valley of arnon, the middle of the valley for a border; even unto the river jabbok, which is the border of the children of ammon;
english: And unto the Reubenites and unto the Gadites I gave from Gilead even unto the valley of Arnon, the middle of the valley for a border; even unto the river Jabbok, which is the border of the children of Ammon;

searchText: deuteronomy 3:17 the arabah also, the jordan being the border thereof, from chinnereth even unto the sea of the arabah, the salt sea, under the slopes of pisgah eastward.
english: the Arabah also, the Jordan being the border thereof, from Chinnereth even unto the sea of the Arabah, the Salt Sea, under the slopes of Pisgah eastward.

searchText: deuteronomy 3:18 and i commanded you at that time, saying: ‘the lord your god hath given you this land to possess it; ye shall pass over armed before your brethren the children of israel, all the men of valour.
english: And I commanded you at that time, saying: ‘The LORD your God hath given you this land to possess it; ye shall pass over armed before your brethren the children of Israel, all the men of valour.

searchText: deuteronomy 3:19 but your wives, and your little ones, and your cattle—i know that ye have much cattle—shall abide in your cities which i have given you;
english: But your wives, and your little ones, and your cattle—I know that ye have much cattle—shall abide in your cities which I have given you;

searchText: deuteronomy 3:20 until the lord give rest unto your brethren, as unto you, and they also possess the land which the lord your god giveth them beyond the jordan; then shall ye return every man unto his possession, which i have given you.
english: until the LORD give rest unto your brethren, as unto you, and they also possess the land which the LORD your God giveth them beyond the Jordan; then shall ye return every man unto his possession, which I have given you.

searchText: deuteronomy 3:21 and i commanded joshua at that time, saying: ‘thine eyes have seen all that the lord your god hath done unto these two kings; so shall the lord do unto all the kingdoms whither thou goest over.
english: And I commanded Joshua at that time, saying: ‘Thine eyes have seen all that the LORD your God hath done unto these two kings; so shall the LORD do unto all the kingdoms whither thou goest over.

searchText: deuteronomy 3:22 ye shall not fear them; for the lord your god, he it is that fighteth for you.’
english: Ye shall not fear them; for the LORD your God, He it is that fighteth for you.’

searchText: deuteronomy 3:23 and i besought the lord at that time, saying:
english: And I besought the LORD at that time, saying:

searchText: deuteronomy 3:24 ’o lord god, thou hast begun to show thy servant thy greatness, and thy strong hand; for what god is there in heaven or on earth, that can do according to thy works, and according to thy mighty acts?
english: ’O Lord GOD, Thou hast begun to show Thy servant Thy greatness, and Thy strong hand; for what god is there in heaven or on earth, that can do according to Thy works, and according to Thy mighty acts?

searchText: deuteronomy 3:25 let me go over, i pray thee, and see the good land that is beyond the jordan, that goodly hill-country, and lebanon.’
english: Let me go over, I pray Thee, and see the good land that is beyond the Jordan, that goodly hill-country, and Lebanon.’

searchText: deuteronomy 3:26 but the lord was wroth with me for your sakes, and hearkened not unto me; and the lord said unto me: ‘let it suffice thee; speak no more unto me of this matter.
english: But the LORD was wroth with me for your sakes, and hearkened not unto me; and the LORD said unto me: ‘Let it suffice thee; speak no more unto Me of this matter.

searchText: deuteronomy 3:27 get thee up into the top of pisgah, and lift up thine eyes westward, and northward, and southward, and eastward, and behold with thine eyes; for thou shalt not go over this jordan.
english: Get thee up into the top of Pisgah, and lift up thine eyes westward, and northward, and southward, and eastward, and behold with thine eyes; for thou shalt not go over this Jordan.

searchText: deuteronomy 3:28 but charge joshua, and encourage him, and strengthen him; for he shall go over before this people, and he shall cause them to inherit the land which thou shalt see.’
english: But charge Joshua, and encourage him, and strengthen him; for he shall go over before this people, and he shall cause them to inherit the land which thou shalt see.’

searchText: deuteronomy 3:29 so we abode in the valley over against beth-peor.
english: So we abode in the valley over against Beth-peor.

searchText: deuteronomy 4:1 and now, o israel, hearken unto the statutes and unto the ordinances, which i teach you, to do them; that ye may live, and go in and possess the land which the lord, the god of your fathers, giveth you.
english: And now, O Israel, hearken unto the statutes and unto the ordinances, which I teach you, to do them; that ye may live, and go in and possess the land which the LORD, the God of your fathers, giveth you.

searchText: deuteronomy 4:2 ye shall not add unto the word which i command you, neither shall ye diminish from it, that ye may keep the commandments of the lord your god which i command you.
english: Ye shall not add unto the word which I command you, neither shall ye diminish from it, that ye may keep the commandments of the LORD your God which I command you.

searchText: deuteronomy 4:3 your eyes have seen what the lord did in baal-peor; for all the men that followed the baal of peor, the lord thy god hath destroyed them from the midst of thee.
english: Your eyes have seen what the LORD did in Baal-peor; for all the men that followed the Baal of Peor, the LORD thy God hath destroyed them from the midst of thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 4:4 but ye that did cleave unto the lord your god are alive every one of you this day.
english: But ye that did cleave unto the LORD your God are alive every one of you this day.

searchText: deuteronomy 4:5 behold, i have taught you statutes and ordinances, even as the lord my god commanded me, that ye should do so in the midst of the land whither ye go in to possess it.
english: Behold, I have taught you statutes and ordinances, even as the LORD my God commanded me, that ye should do so in the midst of the land whither ye go in to possess it.

searchText: deuteronomy 4:6 observe therefore and do them; for this is your wisdom and your understanding in the sight of the peoples, that, when they hear all these statutes, shall say: ‘surely this great nation is a wise and understanding people.’
english: Observe therefore and do them; for this is your wisdom and your understanding in the sight of the peoples, that, when they hear all these statutes, shall say: ‘Surely this great nation is a wise and understanding people.’

searchText: deuteronomy 4:7 for what great nation is there, that hath god so nigh unto them, as the lord our god is whensoever we call upon him?
english: For what great nation is there, that hath God so nigh unto them, as the LORD our God is whensoever we call upon Him?

searchText: deuteronomy 4:8 and what great nation is there, that hath statutes and ordinances so righteous as all this law, which i set before you this day?
english: And what great nation is there, that hath statutes and ordinances so righteous as all this law, which I set before you this day?

searchText: deuteronomy 4:9 only take heed to thyself, and keep thy soul diligently, lest thou forget the things which thine eyes saw, and lest they depart from thy heart all the days of thy life; but make them known unto thy children and thy children’s children;
english: Only take heed to thyself, and keep thy soul diligently, lest thou forget the things which thine eyes saw, and lest they depart from thy heart all the days of thy life; but make them known unto thy children and thy children’s children;

searchText: deuteronomy 4:10 the day that thou stoodest before the lord thy god in horeb, when the lord said unto me: ‘assemble me the people, and i will make them hear my words that they may learn to fear me all the days that they live upon the earth, and that they may teach their children.’
english: the day that thou stoodest before the LORD thy God in Horeb, when the LORD said unto me: ‘Assemble Me the people, and I will make them hear My words that they may learn to fear Me all the days that they live upon the earth, and that they may teach their children.’

searchText: deuteronomy 4:11 and ye came near and stood under the mountain; and the mountain burned with fire unto the heart of heaven, with darkness, cloud, and thick darkness.
english: And ye came near and stood under the mountain; and the mountain burned with fire unto the heart of heaven, with darkness, cloud, and thick darkness.

searchText: deuteronomy 4:12 and the lord spoke unto you out of the midst of the fire; ye heard the voice of words, but ye saw no form; only a voice.
english: And the LORD spoke unto you out of the midst of the fire; ye heard the voice of words, but ye saw no form; only a voice.

searchText: deuteronomy 4:13 and he declared unto you his covenant, which he commanded you to perform, even the ten words; and he wrote them upon two tables of stone.
english: And He declared unto you His covenant, which He commanded you to perform, even the ten words; and He wrote them upon two tables of stone.

searchText: deuteronomy 4:14 and the lord commanded me at that time to teach you statutes and ordinances, that ye might do them in the land whither ye go over to possess it.
english: And the LORD commanded me at that time to teach you statutes and ordinances, that ye might do them in the land whither ye go over to possess it.

searchText: deuteronomy 4:15 take ye therefore good heed unto yourselves—for ye saw no manner of form on the day that the lord spoke unto you in horeb out of the midst of the fire—
english: Take ye therefore good heed unto yourselves—for ye saw no manner of form on the day that the LORD spoke unto you in Horeb out of the midst of the fire—

searchText: deuteronomy 4:16 lest ye deal corruptly, and make you a graven image, even the form of any figure, the likeness of male or female,
english: lest ye deal corruptly, and make you a graven image, even the form of any figure, the likeness of male or female,

searchText: deuteronomy 4:17 the likeness of any beast that is on the earth, the likeness of any winged fowl that flieth in the heaven,
english: the likeness of any beast that is on the earth, the likeness of any winged fowl that flieth in the heaven,

searchText: deuteronomy 4:18 the likeness of any thing that creepeth on the ground, the likeness of any fish that is in the water under the earth; .
english: the likeness of any thing that creepeth on the ground, the likeness of any fish that is in the water under the earth; .

searchText: deuteronomy 4:19 and lest thou lift up thine eyes unto heaven, and when thou seest the sun and the moon and the stars, even all the host of heaven, thou be drawn away and worship them, and serve them, which the lord thy god hath allotted unto all the peoples under the whole heaven.
english: and lest thou lift up thine eyes unto heaven, and when thou seest the sun and the moon and the stars, even all the host of heaven, thou be drawn away and worship them, and serve them, which the LORD thy God hath allotted unto all the peoples under the whole heaven.

searchText: deuteronomy 4:20 but you hath the lord taken and brought forth out of the iron furnace, out of egypt, to be unto him a people of inheritance, as ye are this day.
english: But you hath the LORD taken and brought forth out of the iron furnace, out of Egypt, to be unto Him a people of inheritance, as ye are this day.

searchText: deuteronomy 4:21 now the lord was angered with me for your sakes, and swore that i should not go over the jordan, and that i should not go in unto that good land, which the lord thy god giveth thee for an inheritance;
english: Now the LORD was angered with me for your sakes, and swore that I should not go over the Jordan, and that I should not go in unto that good land, which the LORD thy God giveth thee for an inheritance;

searchText: deuteronomy 4:22 but i must die in this land, i must not go over the jordan; but ye are to go over, and possess that good land.
english: but I must die in this land, I must not go over the Jordan; but ye are to go over, and possess that good land.

searchText: deuteronomy 4:23 take heed unto yourselves, lest ye forget the covenant of the lord your god, which he made with you, and make you a graven image, even the likeness of any thing which the lord thy god hath forbidden thee.
english: Take heed unto yourselves, lest ye forget the covenant of the LORD your God, which He made with you, and make you a graven image, even the likeness of any thing which the LORD thy God hath forbidden thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 4:24 for the lord thy god is a devouring fire, a jealous god.
english: For the LORD thy God is a devouring fire, a jealous God.

searchText: deuteronomy 4:25 when thou shalt beget children, and children’s children, and ye shall have been long in the land, and shall deal corruptly, and make a graven image, even the form of any thing, and shall do that which is evil in the sight of the lord thy god, to provoke him;
english: When thou shalt beget children, and children’s children, and ye shall have been long in the land, and shall deal corruptly, and make a graven image, even the form of any thing, and shall do that which is evil in the sight of the LORD thy God, to provoke Him;

searchText: deuteronomy 4:26 i call heaven and earth to witness against you this day, that ye shall soon utterly perish from off the land whereunto ye go over the jordan to possess it; ye shall not prolong your days upon it, but shall utterly be destroyed.
english: I call heaven and earth to witness against you this day, that ye shall soon utterly perish from off the land whereunto ye go over the Jordan to possess it; ye shall not prolong your days upon it, but shall utterly be destroyed.

searchText: deuteronomy 4:27 and the lord shall scatter you among the peoples, and ye shall be left few in number among the nations, whither the lord shall lead you away.
english: And the LORD shall scatter you among the peoples, and ye shall be left few in number among the nations, whither the LORD shall lead you away.

searchText: deuteronomy 4:28 and there ye shall serve gods, the work of men’s hands, wood and stone, which neither see, nor hear, nor eat, nor smell.
english: And there ye shall serve gods, the work of men’s hands, wood and stone, which neither see, nor hear, nor eat, nor smell.

searchText: deuteronomy 4:29 but from thence ye will seek the lord thy god; and thou shalt find him, if thou search after him with all thy heart and with all thy soul.
english: But from thence ye will seek the LORD thy God; and thou shalt find Him, if thou search after Him with all thy heart and with all thy soul.

searchText: deuteronomy 4:30 in thy distress, when all these things are come upon thee, in the end of days, thou wilt return to the lord thy god, and hearken unto his voice;
english: In thy distress, when all these things are come upon thee, in the end of days, thou wilt return to the LORD thy God, and hearken unto His voice;

searchText: deuteronomy 4:31 for the lord thy god is a merciful god; he will not fail thee, neither destroy thee, nor forget the covenant of thy fathers which he swore unto them.
english: for the LORD thy God is a merciful God; He will not fail thee, neither destroy thee, nor forget the covenant of thy fathers which He swore unto them.

searchText: deuteronomy 4:32 for ask now of the days past, which were before thee, since the day that god created man upon the earth, and from the one end of heaven unto the other, whether there hath been any such thing as this great thing is, or hath been heard like it?
english: For ask now of the days past, which were before thee, since the day that God created man upon the earth, and from the one end of heaven unto the other, whether there hath been any such thing as this great thing is, or hath been heard like it?

searchText: deuteronomy 4:33 did ever a people hear the voice of god speaking out of the midst of the fire, as thou hast heard, and live?
english: Did ever a people hear the voice of God speaking out of the midst of the fire, as thou hast heard, and live?

searchText: deuteronomy 4:34 or hath god assayed to go and take him a nation from the midst of another nation, by trials, by signs, and by wonders, and by war, and by a mighty hand, and by an outstretched arm, and by great terrors, according to all that the lord your god did for you in egypt before thine eyes?
english: Or hath God assayed to go and take Him a nation from the midst of another nation, by trials, by signs, and by wonders, and by war, and by a mighty hand, and by an outstretched arm, and by great terrors, according to all that the LORD your God did for you in Egypt before thine eyes?

searchText: deuteronomy 4:35 unto thee it was shown, that thou mightiest know that the lord, he is god; there is none else beside him.
english: Unto thee it was shown, that thou mightiest know that the LORD, He is God; there is none else beside Him.

searchText: deuteronomy 4:36 out of heaven he made thee to hear his voice, that he might instruct thee; and upon earth he made thee to see his great fire; and thou didst hear his words out of the midst of the fire.
english: Out of heaven He made thee to hear His voice, that He might instruct thee; and upon earth He made thee to see His great fire; and thou didst hear His words out of the midst of the fire.

searchText: deuteronomy 4:37 and because he loved thy fathers, and chose their seed after them, and brought thee out with his presence, with his great power, out of egypt,
english: And because He loved thy fathers, and chose their seed after them, and brought thee out with His presence, with His great power, out of Egypt,

searchText: deuteronomy 4:38 to drive out nations from before thee greater and mightier than thou, to bring thee in, to give thee their land for an inheritance, as it is this day;
english: to drive out nations from before thee greater and mightier than thou, to bring thee in, to give thee their land for an inheritance, as it is this day;

searchText: deuteronomy 4:39 know this day, and lay it to thy heart, that the lord, he is god in heaven above and upon the earth beneath; there is none else.
english: know this day, and lay it to thy heart, that the LORD, He is God in heaven above and upon the earth beneath; there is none else.

searchText: deuteronomy 4:40 and thou shalt keep his statutes, and his commandments, which i command thee this day, that it may go well with thee, and with thy children after thee, and that thou mayest prolong thy days upon the land, which the lord thy god giveth thee, for ever.
english: And thou shalt keep His statutes, and His commandments, which I command thee this day, that it may go well with thee, and with thy children after thee, and that thou mayest prolong thy days upon the land, which the LORD thy God giveth thee, for ever.

searchText: deuteronomy 4:41 then moses separated three cities beyond the jordan toward the sunrising;
english: Then Moses separated three cities beyond the Jordan toward the sunrising;

searchText: deuteronomy 4:42 that the manslayer might flee thither, that slayeth his neighbour unawares, and hated him not in time past; and that fleeing unto one of these cities he might live:
english: that the manslayer might flee thither, that slayeth his neighbour unawares, and hated him not in time past; and that fleeing unto one of these cities he might live:

searchText: deuteronomy 4:43 bezer in the wilderness, in the table-land, for the reubenites; and ramoth in gilead, for the gadites; and golan in bashan, for the manassites.
english: Bezer in the wilderness, in the table-land, for the Reubenites; and Ramoth in Gilead, for the Gadites; and Golan in Bashan, for the Manassites.

searchText: deuteronomy 4:44 and this is the law which moses set before the children of israel;
english: And this is the law which Moses set before the children of Israel;

searchText: deuteronomy 4:45 these are the testimonies, and the statutes, and the ordinances, which moses spoke unto the children of israel, when they came forth out of egypt;
english: these are the testimonies, and the statutes, and the ordinances, which Moses spoke unto the children of Israel, when they came forth out of Egypt;

searchText: deuteronomy 4:46 beyond the jordan, in the valley over against beth-peor, in the land of sihon king of the amorites, who dwelt at heshbon, whom moses and the children of israel smote, when they came forth out of egypt;
english: beyond the Jordan, in the valley over against Beth-peor, in the land of Sihon king of the Amorites, who dwelt at Heshbon, whom Moses and the children of Israel smote, when they came forth out of Egypt;

searchText: deuteronomy 4:47 and they took his land in possession, and the land of og king of bashan, the two kings of the amorites, who were beyond the jordan toward the sunrising;
english: and they took his land in possession, and the land of Og king of Bashan, the two kings of the Amorites, who were beyond the Jordan toward the sunrising;

searchText: deuteronomy 4:48 from aroer, which is on the edge of the valley of arnon, even unto mount sion—the same is hermon—
english: from Aroer, which is on the edge of the valley of Arnon, even unto mount Sion—the same is Hermon—

searchText: deuteronomy 4:49 and all the arabah beyond the jordan eastward, even unto the sea of the arabah, under the slopes of pisgah.
english: and all the Arabah beyond the Jordan eastward, even unto the sea of the Arabah, under the slopes of Pisgah.

searchText: deuteronomy 5:1 and moses called unto all israel, and said unto them: hear, o israel, the statutes and the ordinances which i speak in your ears this day, that ye may learn them, and observe to do them.
english: And Moses called unto all Israel, and said unto them: Hear, O Israel, the statutes and the ordinances which I speak in your ears this day, that ye may learn them, and observe to do them.

searchText: deuteronomy 5:2 the lord our god made a covenant with us in horeb.
english: The LORD our God made a covenant with us in Horeb.

searchText: deuteronomy 5:3 the lord made not this covenant with our fathers, but with us, even us, who are all of us here alive this day.
english: The LORD made not this covenant with our fathers, but with us, even us, who are all of us here alive this day.

searchText: deuteronomy 5:4 the lord spoke with you face to face in the mount out of the midst of the fire—
english: The LORD spoke with you face to face in the mount out of the midst of the fire—

searchText: deuteronomy 5:5 i stood between the lord and you at that time, to declare unto you the word of the lord; for ye were afraid because of the fire, and went not up into the mount—saying: .
english: I stood between the LORD and you at that time, to declare unto you the word of the LORD; for ye were afraid because of the fire, and went not up into the mount—saying: .

searchText: deuteronomy 5:6 i am the lord thy god, who brought thee out of the land of egypt, out of the house of bondage.
english: I am the LORD thy God, who brought thee out of the land of Egypt, out of the house of bondage.

searchText: deuteronomy 5:7 thou shalt have no other gods before me.
english: Thou shalt have no other gods before Me.

searchText: deuteronomy 5:8 thou shalt not make unto thee a graven image, even any manner of likeness, of any thing that is in heaven above, or that is in the earth beneath, or that is in the water under the earth.
english: Thou shalt not make unto thee a graven image, even any manner of likeness, of any thing that is in heaven above, or that is in the earth beneath, or that is in the water under the earth.

searchText: deuteronomy 5:9 thou shalt not bow down unto them, nor serve them; for i the lord thy god am a jealous god, visiting the iniquity of the fathers upon the children, and upon the third and upon the fourth generation of them that hate me,
english: Thou shalt not bow down unto them, nor serve them; for I the LORD thy God am a jealous God, visiting the iniquity of the fathers upon the children, and upon the third and upon the fourth generation of them that hate Me,

searchText: deuteronomy 5:10 and showing mercy unto the thousandth generation of them that love me and keep my commandments.
english: and showing mercy unto the thousandth generation of them that love Me and keep My commandments.

searchText: deuteronomy 5:11 thou shalt not take the name of the lord thy god in vain; for the lord will not hold him guiltless that taketh his name in vain.
english: Thou shalt not take the name of the LORD thy God in vain; for the LORD will not hold him guiltless that taketh His name in vain.

searchText: deuteronomy 5:12 observe the sabbath day, to keep it holy, as the lord thy god commanded thee.
english: Observe the sabbath day, to keep it holy, as the LORD thy God commanded thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 5:13 six days shalt thou labour, and do all thy work;
english: Six days shalt thou labour, and do all thy work;

searchText: deuteronomy 5:14 but the seventh day is a sabbath unto the lord thy god, in it thou shalt not do any manner of work, thou, nor thy son, nor thy daughter, nor thy man-servant, nor thy maid-servant, nor thine ox, nor thine ass, nor any of thy cattle, nor thy stranger that is within thy gates; that thy man-servant and thy maid-servant may rest as well as thou.
english: but the seventh day is a sabbath unto the LORD thy God, in it thou shalt not do any manner of work, thou, nor thy son, nor thy daughter, nor thy man-servant, nor thy maid-servant, nor thine ox, nor thine ass, nor any of thy cattle, nor thy stranger that is within thy gates; that thy man-servant and thy maid-servant may rest as well as thou.

searchText: deuteronomy 5:15 and thou shalt remember that thou was a servant in the land of egypt, and the lord thy god brought thee out thence by a mighty hand and by an outstretched arm; therefore the lord thy god commanded thee to keep the sabbath day.
english: And thou shalt remember that thou was a servant in the land of Egypt, and the LORD thy God brought thee out thence by a mighty hand and by an outstretched arm; therefore the LORD thy God commanded thee to keep the sabbath day.

searchText: deuteronomy 5:16 honour thy father and thy mother, as the lord thy god commanded thee; that thy days may be long, and that it may go well with thee, upon the land which the lord thy god giveth thee.
english: Honour thy father and thy mother, as the LORD thy God commanded thee; that thy days may be long, and that it may go well with thee, upon the land which the LORD thy God giveth thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 5:17 thou shalt not murder. neither shalt thou commit adultery. neither shalt thou steal. neither shalt thou bear false witness against thy neighbour.
english: Thou shalt not murder. Neither shalt thou commit adultery. Neither shalt thou steal. Neither shalt thou bear false witness against thy neighbour.

searchText: deuteronomy 5:18 neither shalt thou covet thy neighbour’s wife; neither shalt thou desire thy neighbour’s house, his field, or his man-servant, or his maid-servant, his ox, or his ass, or any thing that is thy neighbour’s.
english: Neither shalt thou covet thy neighbour’s wife; neither shalt thou desire thy neighbour’s house, his field, or his man-servant, or his maid-servant, his ox, or his ass, or any thing that is thy neighbour’s.

searchText: deuteronomy 5:19 these words the lord spoke unto all your assembly in the mount out of the midst of the fire, of the cloud, and of the thick darkness, with a great voice, and it went on no more. and he wrote them upon two tables of stone, and gave them unto me.
english: These words the LORD spoke unto all your assembly in the mount out of the midst of the fire, of the cloud, and of the thick darkness, with a great voice, and it went on no more. And He wrote them upon two tables of stone, and gave them unto me.

searchText: deuteronomy 5:20 and it came to pass, when ye heard the voice out of the midst of the darkness, while the mountain did burn with fire, that ye came near unto me, even all the heads of your tribes, and your elders;
english: And it came to pass, when ye heard the voice out of the midst of the darkness, while the mountain did burn with fire, that ye came near unto me, even all the heads of your tribes, and your elders;

searchText: deuteronomy 5:21 and ye said: ‘behold, the lord our god hath shown us his glory and his greatness, and we have heard his voice out of the midst of the fire; we have seen this day that god doth speak with man, and he liveth.
english: and ye said: ‘Behold, the LORD our God hath shown us His glory and His greatness, and we have heard His voice out of the midst of the fire; we have seen this day that God doth speak with man, and he liveth.

searchText: deuteronomy 5:22 now therefore why should we die? for this great fire will consume us; if we hear the voice of the lord our god any more, then we shall die.
english: Now therefore why should we die? for this great fire will consume us; if we hear the voice of the LORD our God any more, then we shall die.

searchText: deuteronomy 5:23 for who is there of all flesh, that hath heard the voice of the living god speaking out of the midst of the fire, as we have, and lived?
english: For who is there of all flesh, that hath heard the voice of the living God speaking out of the midst of the fire, as we have, and lived?

searchText: deuteronomy 5:24 go thou near, and hear all that the lord our god may say; and thou shalt speak unto us all that the lord our god may speak unto thee; and we will hear it and do it.’
english: Go thou near, and hear all that the LORD our God may say; and thou shalt speak unto us all that the LORD our God may speak unto thee; and we will hear it and do it.’

searchText: deuteronomy 5:25 and the lord heard the voice of your words, when ye spoke unto me; and the lord said unto me: ‘i have heard the voice of the words of this people, which they have spoken unto thee; they have well said all that they have spoken.
english: And the LORD heard the voice of your words, when ye spoke unto me; and the LORD said unto me: ‘I have heard the voice of the words of this people, which they have spoken unto thee; they have well said all that they have spoken.

searchText: deuteronomy 5:26 oh that they had such a heart as this alway, to fear me, and keep all my commandments, that it might be well with them, and with their children for ever!
english: Oh that they had such a heart as this alway, to fear Me, and keep all My commandments, that it might be well with them, and with their children for ever!

searchText: deuteronomy 5:27 go say to them: return ye to your tents.
english: Go say to them: Return ye to your tents.

searchText: deuteronomy 5:28 but as for thee, stand thou here by me, and i will speak unto thee all the commandment, and the statutes, and the ordinances, which thou shalt teach them, that they may do them in the land which i give them to possess it.’
english: But as for thee, stand thou here by Me, and I will speak unto thee all the commandment, and the statutes, and the ordinances, which thou shalt teach them, that they may do them in the land which I give them to possess it.’

searchText: deuteronomy 5:29 ye shall observe to do therefore as the lord your god hath commanded you; ye shall not turn aside to the right hand or to the left.
english: Ye shall observe to do therefore as the LORD your God hath commanded you; ye shall not turn aside to the right hand or to the left.

searchText: deuteronomy 5:30 ye shall walk in all the way which the lord your god hath commanded you, that ye may live, and that it may be well with you, and that ye may prolong your days in the land which ye shall possess.
english: Ye shall walk in all the way which the LORD your God hath commanded you, that ye may live, and that it may be well with you, and that ye may prolong your days in the land which ye shall possess.

searchText: deuteronomy 6:1 now this is the commandment, the statutes, and the ordinances, which the lord your god commanded to teach you, that ye might do them in the land whither ye go over to possess it—
english: Now this is the commandment, the statutes, and the ordinances, which the LORD your God commanded to teach you, that ye might do them in the land whither ye go over to possess it—

searchText: deuteronomy 6:2 that thou mightest fear the lord thy god, to keep all his statutes and his commandments, which i command thee, thou, and thy son, and thy son’s son, all the days of thy life; and that thy days may be prolonged.
english: that thou mightest fear the LORD thy God, to keep all His statutes and His commandments, which I command thee, thou, and thy son, and thy son’s son, all the days of thy life; and that thy days may be prolonged.

searchText: deuteronomy 6:3 hear therefore, o israel, and observe to do it; that it may be well with thee, and that ye may increase mightily, as the lord, the god of thy fathers, hath promised unto thee—a land flowing with milk and honey.
english: Hear therefore, O Israel, and observe to do it; that it may be well with thee, and that ye may increase mightily, as the LORD, the God of thy fathers, hath promised unto thee—a land flowing with milk and honey.

searchText: deuteronomy 6:4 hear, o israel: the lord our god, the lord is one.
english: HEAR, O ISRAEL: THE LORD OUR GOD, THE LORD IS ONE.

searchText: deuteronomy 6:5 and thou shalt love the lord thy god with all thy heart, and with all thy soul, and with all thy might.
english: And thou shalt love the LORD thy God with all thy heart, and with all thy soul, and with all thy might.

searchText: deuteronomy 6:6 and these words, which i command thee this day, shall be upon thy heart;
english: And these words, which I command thee this day, shall be upon thy heart;

searchText: deuteronomy 6:7 and thou shalt teach them diligently unto thy children, and shalt talk of them when thou sittest in thy house, and when thou walkest by the way, and when thou liest down, and when thou risest up.
english: and thou shalt teach them diligently unto thy children, and shalt talk of them when thou sittest in thy house, and when thou walkest by the way, and when thou liest down, and when thou risest up.

searchText: deuteronomy 6:8 and thou shalt bind them for a sign upon thy hand, and they shall be for frontlets between thine eyes.
english: And thou shalt bind them for a sign upon thy hand, and they shall be for frontlets between thine eyes.

searchText: deuteronomy 6:9 and thou shalt write them upon the door-posts of thy house, and upon thy gates.
english: And thou shalt write them upon the door-posts of thy house, and upon thy gates.

searchText: deuteronomy 6:10 and it shall be, when the lord thy god shall bring thee into the land which he swore unto thy fathers, to abraham, to isaac, and to jacob, to give thee—great and goodly cities, which thou didst not build,
english: And it shall be, when the LORD thy God shall bring thee into the land which He swore unto thy fathers, to Abraham, to Isaac, and to Jacob, to give thee—great and goodly cities, which thou didst not build,

searchText: deuteronomy 6:11 and houses full of all good things, which thou didst not fill, and cisterns hewn out, which thou the didst not hew, vineyards and olive-trees, which thou didst not plant, and thou shalt eat and be satisfied—
english: and houses full of all good things, which thou didst not fill, and cisterns hewn out, which thou the didst not hew, vineyards and olive-trees, which thou didst not plant, and thou shalt eat and be satisfied—

searchText: deuteronomy 6:12 then beware lest thou forget the lord, who brought thee forth out of the land of egypt, out of the house of bondage.
english: then beware lest thou forget the LORD, who brought thee forth out of the land of Egypt, out of the house of bondage.

searchText: deuteronomy 6:13 thou shalt fear the lord thy god; and him shalt thou serve, and by his name shalt thou swear.
english: Thou shalt fear the LORD thy God; and Him shalt thou serve, and by His name shalt thou swear.

searchText: deuteronomy 6:14 ye shall not go after other gods, of the gods of the peoples that are round about you;
english: Ye shall not go after other gods, of the gods of the peoples that are round about you;

searchText: deuteronomy 6:15 for a jealous god, even the lord thy god, is in the midst of thee; lest the anger of the lord thy god be kindled against thee, and he destroy thee from off the face of the earth.
english: for a jealous God, even the LORD thy God, is in the midst of thee; lest the anger of the LORD thy God be kindled against thee, and He destroy thee from off the face of the earth.

searchText: deuteronomy 6:16 ye shall not try the lord your god, as ye tried him in massah.
english: Ye shall not try the LORD your God, as ye tried Him in Massah.

searchText: deuteronomy 6:17 ye shall diligently keep the commandments of the lord your god, and his testimonies, and his statutes, which he hath commanded thee.
english: Ye shall diligently keep the commandments of the LORD your God, and His testimonies, and His statutes, which He hath commanded thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 6:18 and thou shalt do that which is right and good in the sight of the lord; that it may be well with thee, and that thou mayest go in and possess the good land which the lord swore unto thy fathers,
english: And thou shalt do that which is right and good in the sight of the LORD; that it may be well with thee, and that thou mayest go in and possess the good land which the LORD swore unto thy fathers,

searchText: deuteronomy 6:19 to thrust out all thine enemies from before thee, as the lord hath spoken.
english: to thrust out all thine enemies from before thee, as the LORD hath spoken.

searchText: deuteronomy 6:20 when thy son asketh thee in time to come, saying: ‘what mean the testimonies, and the statutes, and the ordinances, which the lord our god hath commanded you?
english: When thy son asketh thee in time to come, saying: ‘What mean the testimonies, and the statutes, and the ordinances, which the LORD our God hath commanded you?

searchText: deuteronomy 6:21 then thou shalt say unto thy son: ‘we were pharaoh’s bondmen in egypt; and the lord brought us out of egypt with a mighty hand.
english: then thou shalt say unto thy son: ‘We were Pharaoh’s bondmen in Egypt; and the LORD brought us out of Egypt with a mighty hand.

searchText: deuteronomy 6:22 and the lord showed signs and wonders, great and sore, upon egypt, upon pharaoh, and upon all his house, before our eyes.
english: And the LORD showed signs and wonders, great and sore, upon Egypt, upon Pharaoh, and upon all his house, before our eyes.

searchText: deuteronomy 6:23 and he brought us out from thence, that he might bring us in, to give us the land which he swore unto our fathers.
english: And He brought us out from thence, that He might bring us in, to give us the land which He swore unto our fathers.

searchText: deuteronomy 6:24 and the lord commanded us to do all these statutes, to fear the lord our god, for our good always, that he might preserve us alive, as it is at this day.
english: And the LORD commanded us to do all these statutes, to fear the LORD our God, for our good always, that He might preserve us alive, as it is at this day.

searchText: deuteronomy 6:25 and it shall be righteousness unto us, if we observe to do all this commandment before the lord our god, as he hath commanded us.’
english: And it shall be righteousness unto us, if we observe to do all this commandment before the LORD our God, as He hath commanded us.’

searchText: deuteronomy 7:1 when the lord thy god shall bring thee into the land whither thou goest to possess it, and shall cast out many nations before thee, the hittite, and the girgashite, and the amorite, and the canaanite, and the perizzite, and the hivite, and the jebusite, seven nations greater and mightier than thou;
english: When the LORD thy God shall bring thee into the land whither thou goest to possess it, and shall cast out many nations before thee, the Hittite, and the Girgashite, and the Amorite, and the Canaanite, and the Perizzite, and the Hivite, and the Jebusite, seven nations greater and mightier than thou;

searchText: deuteronomy 7:2 and when the lord thy god shall deliver them up before thee, and thou shalt smite them; then thou shalt utterly destroy them; thou shalt make no covenant with them, nor show mercy unto them;
english: and when the LORD thy God shall deliver them up before thee, and thou shalt smite them; then thou shalt utterly destroy them; thou shalt make no covenant with them, nor show mercy unto them;

searchText: deuteronomy 7:3 neither shalt thou make marriages with them: thy daughter thou shalt not give unto his son, nor his daughter shalt thou take unto thy son.
english: neither shalt thou make marriages with them: thy daughter thou shalt not give unto his son, nor his daughter shalt thou take unto thy son.

searchText: deuteronomy 7:4 for he will turn away thy son from following me, that they may serve other gods; so will the anger of the lord be kindled against you, and he will destroy thee quickly.
english: For he will turn away thy son from following Me, that they may serve other gods; so will the anger of the LORD be kindled against you, and He will destroy thee quickly.

searchText: deuteronomy 7:5 but thus shall ye deal with them: ye shall break down their altars, and dash in pieces their pillars, and hew down their asherim, and burn their graven images with fire.
english: But thus shall ye deal with them: ye shall break down their altars, and dash in pieces their pillars, and hew down their Asherim, and burn their graven images with fire.

searchText: deuteronomy 7:6 for thou art a holy people unto the lord thy god: the lord thy god hath chosen thee to be his own treasure, out of all peoples that are upon the face of the earth.
english: For thou art a holy people unto the LORD thy God: the LORD thy God hath chosen thee to be His own treasure, out of all peoples that are upon the face of the earth.

searchText: deuteronomy 7:7 the lord did not set his love upon you, nor choose you, because ye were more in number than any people—for ye were the fewest of all peoples—
english: The LORD did not set His love upon you, nor choose you, because ye were more in number than any people—for ye were the fewest of all peoples—

searchText: deuteronomy 7:8 but because the lord loved you, and because he would keep the oath which he swore unto your fathers, hath the lord brought you out with a mighty hand, and redeemed you out of the house of bondage, from the hand of pharaoh king of egypt.
english: but because the LORD loved you, and because He would keep the oath which He swore unto your fathers, hath the LORD brought you out with a mighty hand, and redeemed you out of the house of bondage, from the hand of Pharaoh king of Egypt.

searchText: deuteronomy 7:9 know therefore that the lord thy god, he is god; the faithful god, who keepeth covenant and mercy with them that love him and keep his commandments to a thousand generations;
english: Know therefore that the LORD thy God, He is God; the faithful God, who keepeth covenant and mercy with them that love Him and keep His commandments to a thousand generations;

searchText: deuteronomy 7:10 and repayeth them that hate him to their face, to destroy them; he will not be slack to him that hateth him, he will repay him to his face.
english: and repayeth them that hate Him to their face, to destroy them; He will not be slack to him that hateth Him, He will repay him to his face.

searchText: deuteronomy 7:11 thou shalt therefore keep the commandment, and the statutes, and the ordinances, which i command thee this day, to do them.
english: Thou shalt therefore keep the commandment, and the statutes, and the ordinances, which I command thee this day, to do them.

searchText: deuteronomy 7:12 and it shall come to pass, because ye hearken to these ordinances, and keep, and do them, that the lord thy god shall keep with thee the covenant and the mercy which he swore unto thy fathers,
english: And it shall come to pass, because ye hearken to these ordinances, and keep, and do them, that the LORD thy God shall keep with thee the covenant and the mercy which He swore unto thy fathers,

searchText: deuteronomy 7:13 and he will love thee, and bless thee, and multiply thee; he will also bless the fruit of thy body and the fruit of thy land, thy corn and thy wine and thine oil, the increase of thy kine and the young of thy flock, in the land which he swore unto thy fathers to give thee.
english: and He will love thee, and bless thee, and multiply thee; He will also bless the fruit of thy body and the fruit of thy land, thy corn and thy wine and thine oil, the increase of thy kine and the young of thy flock, in the land which He swore unto thy fathers to give thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 7:14 thou shalt be blessed above all peoples; there shall not be male or female barren among you, or among your cattle.
english: Thou shalt be blessed above all peoples; there shall not be male or female barren among you, or among your cattle.

searchText: deuteronomy 7:15 and the lord will take away from thee all sickness; and he will put none of the evil diseases of egypt, which thou knowest, upon thee, but will lay them upon all them that hate thee.
english: And the LORD will take away from thee all sickness; and He will put none of the evil diseases of Egypt, which thou knowest, upon thee, but will lay them upon all them that hate thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 7:16 and thou shalt consume all the peoples that the lord thy god shall deliver unto thee; thine eye shall not pity them; neither shalt thou serve their gods; for that will be a snare unto thee.
english: And thou shalt consume all the peoples that the LORD thy God shall deliver unto thee; thine eye shall not pity them; neither shalt thou serve their gods; for that will be a snare unto thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 7:17 if thou shalt say in thy heart: ‘these nations are more than i; how can i dispossess them?’
english: If thou shalt say in thy heart: ‘These nations are more than I; how can I dispossess them?’

searchText: deuteronomy 7:18 thou shalt not be afraid of them; thou shalt well remember what the lord thy god did unto pharaoh, and unto all egypt:
english: thou shalt not be afraid of them; thou shalt well remember what the LORD thy God did unto Pharaoh, and unto all Egypt:

searchText: deuteronomy 7:19 the great trials which thine eyes saw, and the signs, and the wonders, and the mighty hand, and the outstretched arm, whereby the lord thy god brought thee out; so shall the lord thy god do unto all the peoples of whom thou art afraid.
english: the great trials which thine eyes saw, and the signs, and the wonders, and the mighty hand, and the outstretched arm, whereby the LORD thy God brought thee out; so shall the LORD thy God do unto all the peoples of whom thou art afraid.

searchText: deuteronomy 7:20 moreover the lord thy god will send the hornet among them, until they that are left, and they that hide themselves, perish from before thee. .
english: Moreover the LORD thy God will send the hornet among them, until they that are left, and they that hide themselves, perish from before thee. .

searchText: deuteronomy 7:21 thou shalt not be affrighted at them; for the lord thy god is in the midst of thee, a god great and awful.
english: Thou shalt not be affrighted at them; for the LORD thy God is in the midst of thee, a God great and awful.

searchText: deuteronomy 7:22 and the lord thy god will cast out those nations before thee by little and little; thou mayest not consume them quickly, lest the beasts of the field increase upon thee.
english: And the LORD thy God will cast out those nations before thee by little and little; thou mayest not consume them quickly, lest the beasts of the field increase upon thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 7:23 but the lord thy god shall deliver them up before thee, and shall discomfit them with a great discomfiture, until they be destroyed.
english: But the LORD thy God shall deliver them up before thee, and shall discomfit them with a great discomfiture, until they be destroyed.

searchText: deuteronomy 7:24 and he shall deliver their kings into thy hand, and thou shalt make their name to perish from under heaven; there shall no man be able to stand against thee, until thou have destroyed them.
english: And He shall deliver their kings into thy hand, and thou shalt make their name to perish from under heaven; there shall no man be able to stand against thee, until thou have destroyed them.

searchText: deuteronomy 7:25 the graven images of their gods shall ye burn with fire; thou shalt not covet the silver or the gold that is on them, nor take it unto thee, lest thou be snared therein; for it is an abomination to the lord thy god.
english: The graven images of their gods shall ye burn with fire; thou shalt not covet the silver or the gold that is on them, nor take it unto thee, lest thou be snared therein; for it is an abomination to the LORD thy God.

searchText: deuteronomy 7:26 and thou shalt not bring an abomination into thy house, and be accursed like unto it; thou shalt utterly detest it, and thou shalt utterly abhor it; for it is a devoted thing.
english: And thou shalt not bring an abomination into thy house, and be accursed like unto it; thou shalt utterly detest it, and thou shalt utterly abhor it; for it is a devoted thing.

searchText: deuteronomy 8:1 all the commandment which i command thee this day shall ye observe to do, that ye may live, and multiply, and go in and possess the land which the lord swore unto your fathers.
english: All the commandment which I command thee this day shall ye observe to do, that ye may live, and multiply, and go in and possess the land which the LORD swore unto your fathers.

searchText: deuteronomy 8:2 and thou shalt remember all the way which the lord thy god hath led thee these forty years in the wilderness, that he might afflict thee, to prove thee, to know what was in thy heart, whether thou wouldest keep his commandments, or no.
english: And thou shalt remember all the way which the LORD thy God hath led thee these forty years in the wilderness, that He might afflict thee, to prove thee, to know what was in thy heart, whether thou wouldest keep His commandments, or no.

searchText: deuteronomy 8:3 and he afflicted thee, and suffered thee to hunger, and fed thee with manna, which thou knewest not, neither did thy fathers know; that he might make thee know that man doth not live by bread only, but by every thing that proceedeth out of the mouth of the lord doth man live.
english: And He afflicted thee, and suffered thee to hunger, and fed thee with manna, which thou knewest not, neither did thy fathers know; that He might make thee know that man doth not live by bread only, but by every thing that proceedeth out of the mouth of the LORD doth man live.

searchText: deuteronomy 8:4 thy raiment waxed not old upon thee, neither did thy foot swell, these forty years.
english: Thy raiment waxed not old upon thee, neither did thy foot swell, these forty years.

searchText: deuteronomy 8:5 and thou shalt consider in thy heart, that, as a man chasteneth his son, so the lord thy god chasteneth thee.
english: And thou shalt consider in thy heart, that, as a man chasteneth his son, so the LORD thy God chasteneth thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 8:6 and thou shalt keep the commandments of the lord thy god, to walk in his ways, and to fear him.
english: And thou shalt keep the commandments of the LORD thy God, to walk in His ways, and to fear Him.

searchText: deuteronomy 8:7 for the lord thy god bringeth thee into a good land, a land of brooks of water, of fountains and depths, springing forth in valleys and hills;
english: For the LORD thy God bringeth thee into a good land, a land of brooks of water, of fountains and depths, springing forth in valleys and hills;

searchText: deuteronomy 8:8 a land of wheat and barley, and vines and fig-trees and pomegranates; a land of olive-trees and honey;
english: a land of wheat and barley, and vines and fig-trees and pomegranates; a land of olive-trees and honey;

searchText: deuteronomy 8:9 a land wherein thou shalt eat bread without scarceness, thou shalt not lack any thing in it; a land whose stones are iron, and out of whose hills thou mayest dig brass.
english: a land wherein thou shalt eat bread without scarceness, thou shalt not lack any thing in it; a land whose stones are iron, and out of whose hills thou mayest dig brass.

searchText: deuteronomy 8:10 and thou shalt eat and be satisfied, and bless the lord thy god for the good land which he hath given thee.
english: And thou shalt eat and be satisfied, and bless the LORD thy God for the good land which He hath given thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 8:11 beware lest thou forget the lord thy god, in not keeping his commandments, and his ordinances, and his statutes, which i command thee this day;
english: Beware lest thou forget the LORD thy God, in not keeping His commandments, and His ordinances, and His statutes, which I command thee this day;

searchText: deuteronomy 8:12 lest when thou hast eaten and art satisfied, and hast built goodly houses, and dwelt therein;
english: lest when thou hast eaten and art satisfied, and hast built goodly houses, and dwelt therein;

searchText: deuteronomy 8:13 and when thy herds and thy flocks multiply, and thy silver and thy gold is multiplied, and all that thou hast is multiplied;
english: and when thy herds and thy flocks multiply, and thy silver and thy gold is multiplied, and all that thou hast is multiplied;

searchText: deuteronomy 8:14 then thy heart be lifted up, and thou forget the lord thy god, who brought thee forth out of the land of egypt, out of the house of bondage;
english: then thy heart be lifted up, and thou forget the LORD thy God, who brought thee forth out of the land of Egypt, out of the house of bondage;

searchText: deuteronomy 8:15 who led thee through the great and dreadful wilderness, wherein were serpents, fiery serpents, and scorpions, and thirsty ground where was no water; who brought thee forth water out of the rock of flint;
english: who led thee through the great and dreadful wilderness, wherein were serpents, fiery serpents, and scorpions, and thirsty ground where was no water; who brought thee forth water out of the rock of flint;

searchText: deuteronomy 8:16 who fed thee in the wilderness with manna, which thy fathers knew not, that he might afflict thee, and that he might prove thee, to do thee good at thy latter end;
english: who fed thee in the wilderness with manna, which thy fathers knew not, that He might afflict thee, and that He might prove thee, to do thee good at thy latter end;

searchText: deuteronomy 8:17 and thou say in thy heart: ‘my power and the might of my hand hath gotten me this wealth.’
english: and thou say in thy heart: ‘My power and the might of my hand hath gotten me this wealth.’

searchText: deuteronomy 8:18 but thou shalt remember the lord thy god, for it is he that giveth thee power to get wealth, that he may establish his covenant which he swore unto thy fathers, as it is this day.
english: But thou shalt remember the LORD thy God, for it is He that giveth thee power to get wealth, that He may establish His covenant which He swore unto thy fathers, as it is this day.

searchText: deuteronomy 8:19 and it shall be, if thou shalt forget the lord thy god, and walk after other gods, and serve them, and worship them, i forewarn you this day that ye shall surely perish.
english: And it shall be, if thou shalt forget the LORD thy God, and walk after other gods, and serve them, and worship them, I forewarn you this day that ye shall surely perish.

searchText: deuteronomy 8:20 as the nations that the lord maketh to perish before you, so shall ye perish; because ye would not hearken unto the voice of the lord your god.
english: As the nations that the LORD maketh to perish before you, so shall ye perish; because ye would not hearken unto the voice of the LORD your God.

searchText: deuteronomy 9:1 hear, o israel: thou art to pass over the jordan this day, to go in to dispossess nations greater and mightier than thyself, cities great and fortified up to heaven,
english: Hear, O Israel: thou art to pass over the Jordan this day, to go in to dispossess nations greater and mightier than thyself, cities great and fortified up to heaven,

searchText: deuteronomy 9:2 a people great and tall, the sons of the anakim, whom thou knowest, and of whom thou hast heard say: ‘who can stand before the sons of anak?’
english: a people great and tall, the sons of the Anakim, whom thou knowest, and of whom thou hast heard say: ‘Who can stand before the sons of Anak?’

searchText: deuteronomy 9:3 know therefore this day, that the lord thy god is he who goeth over before thee as a devouring fire; he will destroy them, and he will bring them down before thee; so shalt thou drive them out, and make them to perish quickly, as the lord hath spoken unto thee.
english: Know therefore this day, that the LORD thy God is He who goeth over before thee as a devouring fire; He will destroy them, and He will bring them down before thee; so shalt thou drive them out, and make them to perish quickly, as the LORD hath spoken unto thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 9:4 speak not thou in thy heart, after that the lord thy god hath thrust them out from before thee, saying: ‘for my righteousness the lord hath brought me in to possess this land’; whereas for the wickedness of these nations the lord doth drive them out from before thee.
english: Speak not thou in thy heart, after that the LORD thy God hath thrust them out from before thee, saying: ‘For my righteousness the LORD hath brought me in to possess this land’; whereas for the wickedness of these nations the LORD doth drive them out from before thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 9:5 not for thy righteousness, or for the uprightness of thy heart, dost thou go in to possess their land; but for the wickedness of these nations the lord thy god doth drive them out from before thee, and that he may establish the word which the lord swore unto thy fathers, to abraham, to isaac, and to jacob.
english: Not for thy righteousness, or for the uprightness of thy heart, dost thou go in to possess their land; but for the wickedness of these nations the LORD thy God doth drive them out from before thee, and that He may establish the word which the LORD swore unto thy fathers, to Abraham, to Isaac, and to Jacob.

searchText: deuteronomy 9:6 know therefore that it is not for thy righteousness that the lord thy god giveth thee this good land to possess it; for thou art a stiffnecked people.
english: Know therefore that it is not for thy righteousness that the LORD thy God giveth thee this good land to possess it; for thou art a stiffnecked people.

searchText: deuteronomy 9:7 remember, forget thou not, how thou didst make the lord thy god wroth in the wilderness; from the day that thou didst go forth out of the land of egypt, until ye came unto this place, ye have been rebellious against the lord.
english: Remember, forget thou not, how thou didst make the LORD thy God wroth in the wilderness; from the day that thou didst go forth out of the land of Egypt, until ye came unto this place, ye have been rebellious against the LORD.

searchText: deuteronomy 9:8 also in horeb ye made the lord wroth, and the lord was angered with you to have destroyed you.
english: Also in Horeb ye made the LORD wroth, and the LORD was angered with you to have destroyed you.

searchText: deuteronomy 9:9 when i was gone up into the mount to receive the tables of stone, even the tables of the covenant which the lord made with you, then i abode in the mount forty days and forty nights; i did neither eat bread nor drink water.
english: When I was gone up into the mount to receive the tables of stone, even the tables of the covenant which the LORD made with you, then I abode in the mount forty days and forty nights; I did neither eat bread nor drink water.

searchText: deuteronomy 9:10 and the lord delivered unto me the two tables of stone written with the finger of god; and on them was written according to all the words, which the lord spoke with you in the mount out of the midst of the fire in the day of the assembly.
english: And the LORD delivered unto me the two tables of stone written with the finger of God; and on them was written according to all the words, which the LORD spoke with you in the mount out of the midst of the fire in the day of the assembly.

searchText: deuteronomy 9:11 and it came to pass at the end of forty days and forty nights, that the lord gave me the two tables of stone, even the tables of the covenant.
english: And it came to pass at the end of forty days and forty nights, that the LORD gave me the two tables of stone, even the tables of the covenant.

searchText: deuteronomy 9:12 and the lord said unto me: ‘arise, get thee down quickly from hence; for thy people that thou hast brought forth out of egypt have dealt corruptly; they are quickly turned aside out of the way which i commanded them; they have made them a molten image.’
english: And the LORD said unto me: ‘Arise, get thee down quickly from hence; for thy people that thou hast brought forth out of Egypt have dealt corruptly; they are quickly turned aside out of the way which I commanded them; they have made them a molten image.’

searchText: deuteronomy 9:13 furthermore the lord spoke unto me, saying: ‘i have seen this people, and, behold, it is a stiffnecked people;
english: Furthermore the LORD spoke unto me, saying: ‘I have seen this people, and, behold, it is a stiffnecked people;

searchText: deuteronomy 9:14 let me alone, that i may destroy them, and blot out their name from under heaven; and i will make of thee a nation mightier and greater than they.’
english: let Me alone, that I may destroy them, and blot out their name from under heaven; and I will make of thee a nation mightier and greater than they.’

searchText: deuteronomy 9:15 so i turned and came down from the mount, and the mount burned with fire; and the two tables of the covenant were in my two hands.
english: So I turned and came down from the mount, and the mount burned with fire; and the two tables of the covenant were in my two hands.

searchText: deuteronomy 9:16 and i looked, and, behold, ye had sinned against the lord your god; ye had made you a molten calf; ye had turned aside quickly out of the way which the lord had commanded you.
english: And I looked, and, behold, ye had sinned against the LORD your God; ye had made you a molten calf; ye had turned aside quickly out of the way which the LORD had commanded you.

searchText: deuteronomy 9:17 and i took hold of the two tables, and cast them out of my two hands, and broke them before your eyes.
english: And I took hold of the two tables, and cast them out of my two hands, and broke them before your eyes.

searchText: deuteronomy 9:18 and i fell down before the lord, as at the first, forty days and forty nights; i did neither eat bread nor drink water; because of all your sin which ye sinned, in doing that which was evil in the sight of the lord, to provoke him.
english: And I fell down before the LORD, as at the first, forty days and forty nights; I did neither eat bread nor drink water; because of all your sin which ye sinned, in doing that which was evil in the sight of the LORD, to provoke Him.

searchText: deuteronomy 9:19 for i was in dread of the anger and hot displeasure, wherewith the lord was wroth against you to destroy you. but the lord hearkened unto me that time also.
english: For I was in dread of the anger and hot displeasure, wherewith the LORD was wroth against you to destroy you. But the LORD hearkened unto me that time also.

searchText: deuteronomy 9:20 moreover the lord was very angry with aaron to have destroyed him; and i prayed for aaron also the same time.
english: Moreover the LORD was very angry with Aaron to have destroyed him; and I prayed for Aaron also the same time.

searchText: deuteronomy 9:21 and i took your sin, the calf which ye had made, and burnt it with fire, and beat it in pieces, grinding it very small, until it was as fine as dust; and i cast the dust thereof into the brook that descended out of the mount.—
english: And I took your sin, the calf which ye had made, and burnt it with fire, and beat it in pieces, grinding it very small, until it was as fine as dust; and I cast the dust thereof into the brook that descended out of the mount.—

searchText: deuteronomy 9:22 and at taberah, and at massah, and at kibroth-hattaavah, ye made the lord wroth.
english: And at Taberah, and at Massah, and at Kibroth-hattaavah, ye made the LORD wroth.

searchText: deuteronomy 9:23 and when the lord sent you from kadesh-barnea, saying: ‘go up and possess the land which i have given you’; then ye rebelled against the commandment of the lord your god, and ye believed him not, nor hearkened to his voice.
english: And when the LORD sent you from Kadesh-barnea, saying: ‘Go up and possess the land which I have given you’; then ye rebelled against the commandment of the LORD your God, and ye believed Him not, nor hearkened to His voice.

searchText: deuteronomy 9:24 ye have been rebellious against the lord from the day that i knew you.—
english: Ye have been rebellious against the LORD from the day that I knew you.—

searchText: deuteronomy 9:25 so i fell down before the lord the forty days and forty nights that i fell down; because the lord had said he would destroy you.
english: So I fell down before the LORD the forty days and forty nights that I fell down; because the LORD had said He would destroy you.

searchText: deuteronomy 9:26 and i prayed unto the lord, and said: ‘o lord god, destroy not thy people and thine inheritance, that thou hast redeemed through thy greatness, that thou hast brought forth out of egypt with a mighty hand.
english: And I prayed unto the LORD, and said: ‘O Lord GOD, destroy not Thy people and Thine inheritance, that Thou hast redeemed through Thy greatness, that Thou hast brought forth out of Egypt with a mighty hand.

searchText: deuteronomy 9:27 remember thy servants, abraham, isaac, and jacob; look not unto the stubbornness of this people, nor to their wickedness, nor to their sin;
english: Remember Thy servants, Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob; look not unto the stubbornness of this people, nor to their wickedness, nor to their sin;

searchText: deuteronomy 9:28 lest the land whence thou broughtest us out say: because the lord was not able to bring them into the land which he promised unto them, and because he hated them, he hath brought them out to slay them in the wilderness.
english: lest the land whence Thou broughtest us out say: Because the LORD was not able to bring them into the land which He promised unto them, and because He hated them, He hath brought them out to slay them in the wilderness.

searchText: deuteronomy 9:29 yet they are thy people and thine inheritance, that thou didst bring out by thy great power and by thy outstretched arm.’
english: Yet they are Thy people and Thine inheritance, that Thou didst bring out by Thy great power and by Thy outstretched arm.’

searchText: deuteronomy 10:1 at that time the lord said unto me: ‘hew thee two tables of stone like unto the first, and come up unto me into the mount; and make thee an ark of wood.
english: At that time the LORD said unto me: ‘Hew thee two tables of stone like unto the first, and come up unto Me into the mount; and make thee an ark of wood.

searchText: deuteronomy 10:2 and i will write on the tables the words that were on the first tables which thou didst break, and thou shalt put them in the ark.’
english: And I will write on the tables the words that were on the first tables which thou didst break, and thou shalt put them in the ark.’

searchText: deuteronomy 10:3 so i made an ark of acacia-wood, and hewed two tables of stone like unto the first, and went up into the mount, having the two tables in my hand.
english: So I made an ark of acacia-wood, and hewed two tables of stone like unto the first, and went up into the mount, having the two tables in my hand.

searchText: deuteronomy 10:4 and he wrote on the tables according to the first writing, the ten words, which the lord spoke unto you in the mount out of the midst of the fire in the day of the assembly; and the lord gave them unto me.
english: And He wrote on the tables according to the first writing, the ten words, which the LORD spoke unto you in the mount out of the midst of the fire in the day of the assembly; and the LORD gave them unto me.

searchText: deuteronomy 10:5 and i turned and came down from the mount, and put the tables in the ark which i had made; and there they are, as the lord commanded me.—
english: And I turned and came down from the mount, and put the tables in the ark which I had made; and there they are, as the LORD commanded me.—

searchText: deuteronomy 10:6 and the children of israel journeyed from beeroth-benejaakan to moserah; there aaron died, and there he was buried; and eleazar his son ministered in the priest’s office in his stead.
english: And the children of Israel journeyed from Beeroth-benejaakan to Moserah; there Aaron died, and there he was buried; and Eleazar his son ministered in the priest’s office in his stead.

searchText: deuteronomy 10:7 from thence they journeyed unto gudgod; and from gudgod to jotbah, a land of brooks of water.—
english: From thence they journeyed unto Gudgod; and from Gudgod to Jotbah, a land of brooks of water.—

searchText: deuteronomy 10:8 at that time the lord separated the tribe of levi, to bear the ark of the covenant of the lord, to stand before the lord to minister unto him, and to bless in his name, unto this day.
english: At that time the LORD separated the tribe of Levi, to bear the ark of the covenant of the LORD, to stand before the LORD to minister unto Him, and to bless in His name, unto this day.

searchText: deuteronomy 10:9 wherefore levi hath no portion nor inheritance with his brethren; the lord is his inheritance, according as the lord thy god spoke unto him.—
english: Wherefore Levi hath no portion nor inheritance with his brethren; the LORD is his inheritance, according as the LORD thy God spoke unto him.—

searchText: deuteronomy 10:10 now i stayed in the mount, as at the first time, forty days and forty nights; and the lord hearkened unto me that time also; the lord would not destroy thee.
english: Now I stayed in the mount, as at the first time, forty days and forty nights; and the LORD hearkened unto me that time also; the LORD would not destroy thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 10:11 and the lord said unto me: ‘arise, go before the people, causing them to set forward, that they may go in and possess the land, which i swore unto their fathers to give unto them.’
english: And the LORD said unto me: ‘Arise, go before the people, causing them to set forward, that they may go in and possess the land, which I swore unto their fathers to give unto them.’

searchText: deuteronomy 10:12 and now, israel, what doth the lord thy god require of thee, but to fear the lord thy god, to walk in all his ways, and to love him, and to serve the lord thy god with all thy heart and with all thy soul;
english: And now, Israel, what doth the LORD thy God require of thee, but to fear the LORD thy God, to walk in all His ways, and to love Him, and to serve the LORD thy God with all thy heart and with all thy soul;

searchText: deuteronomy 10:13 to keep for thy good the commandments of the lord, and his statutes, which i command thee this day?
english: to keep for thy good the commandments of the LORD, and His statutes, which I command thee this day?

searchText: deuteronomy 10:14 behold, unto the lord thy god belongeth the heaven, and the heaven of heavens, the earth, with all that therein is.
english: Behold, unto the LORD thy God belongeth the heaven, and the heaven of heavens, the earth, with all that therein is.

searchText: deuteronomy 10:15 only the lord had a delight in thy fathers to love them, and he chose their seed after them, even you, above all peoples, as it is this day.
english: Only the LORD had a delight in thy fathers to love them, and He chose their seed after them, even you, above all peoples, as it is this day.

searchText: deuteronomy 10:16 circumcise therefore the foreskin of your heart, and be no more stiffnecked.
english: Circumcise therefore the foreskin of your heart, and be no more stiffnecked.

searchText: deuteronomy 10:17 for the lord your god, he is god of gods, and lord of lords, the great god, the mighty, and the awful, who regardeth not persons, nor taketh reward.
english: For the LORD your God, He is God of gods, and Lord of lords, the great God, the mighty, and the awful, who regardeth not persons, nor taketh reward.

searchText: deuteronomy 10:18 he doth execute justice for the fatherless and widow, and loveth the stranger, in giving him food and raiment.
english: He doth execute justice for the fatherless and widow, and loveth the stranger, in giving him food and raiment.

searchText: deuteronomy 10:19 love ye therefore the stranger; for ye were strangers in the land of egypt.
english: Love ye therefore the stranger; for ye were strangers in the land of Egypt.

searchText: deuteronomy 10:20 thou shalt fear the lord thy god; him shalt thou serve; and to him shalt thou cleave, and by his name shalt thou swear.
english: Thou shalt fear the LORD thy God; Him shalt thou serve; and to Him shalt thou cleave, and by His name shalt thou swear.

searchText: deuteronomy 10:21 he is thy glory, and he is thy god, that hath done for thee these great and tremendous things, which thine eyes have seen.
