english: He is thy glory, and He is thy God, that hath done for thee these great and tremendous things, which thine eyes have seen.

searchText: deuteronomy 10:22 thy fathers went down into egypt with threescore and ten persons; and now the lord thy god hath made thee as the stars of heaven for multitude.
english: Thy fathers went down into Egypt with threescore and ten persons; and now the LORD thy God hath made thee as the stars of heaven for multitude.

searchText: deuteronomy 11:1 therefore thou shalt love the lord thy god, and keep his charge, and his statutes, and his ordinances, and his commandments, alway.
english: Therefore thou shalt love the LORD thy God, and keep His charge, and His statutes, and His ordinances, and His commandments, alway.

searchText: deuteronomy 11:2 and know ye this day; for i speak not with your children that have not known, and that have not seen the chastisement of the lord your god, his greatness, his mighty hand, and his outstretched arm,
english: And know ye this day; for I speak not with your children that have not known, and that have not seen the chastisement of the LORD your God, His greatness, His mighty hand, and His outstretched arm,

searchText: deuteronomy 11:3 and his signs, and his works, which he did in the midst of egypt unto pharaoh the king of egypt, and unto all his land;
english: and His signs, and His works, which He did in the midst of Egypt unto Pharaoh the king of Egypt, and unto all his land;

searchText: deuteronomy 11:4 and what he did unto the army of egypt, unto their horses, and to their chariots; how he made the water of the red sea to overflow them as they pursued after you, and how the lord hath destroyed them unto this day;
english: and what He did unto the army of Egypt, unto their horses, and to their chariots; how He made the water of the Red Sea to overflow them as they pursued after you, and how the LORD hath destroyed them unto this day;

searchText: deuteronomy 11:5 and what he did unto you in the wilderness, until ye came unto this place;
english: and what He did unto you in the wilderness, until ye came unto this place;

searchText: deuteronomy 11:6 and what he did unto dathan and abiram, the sons of eliab, the son of reuben; how the earth opened her mouth, and swallowed them up, and their households, and their tents, and every living substance that followed them, in the midst of all israel;
english: and what He did unto Dathan and Abiram, the sons of Eliab, the son of Reuben; how the earth opened her mouth, and swallowed them up, and their households, and their tents, and every living substance that followed them, in the midst of all Israel;

searchText: deuteronomy 11:7 but your eyes have seen all the great work of the lord which he did.
english: but your eyes have seen all the great work of the LORD which He did.

searchText: deuteronomy 11:8 therefore shall ye keep all the commandment which i command thee this day, that ye may be strong, and go in and possess the land, whither ye go over to possess it;
english: Therefore shall ye keep all the commandment which I command thee this day, that ye may be strong, and go in and possess the land, whither ye go over to possess it;

searchText: deuteronomy 11:9 and that ye may prolong your days upon the land, which the lord swore unto your fathers to give unto them and to their seed, a land flowing with milk and honey.
english: and that ye may prolong your days upon the land, which the LORD swore unto your fathers to give unto them and to their seed, a land flowing with milk and honey.

searchText: deuteronomy 11:10 for the land, whither thou goest in to possess it, is not as the land of egypt, from whence ye came out, where thou didst sow thy seed, and didst water it with thy foot, as a garden of herbs;
english: For the land, whither thou goest in to possess it, is not as the land of Egypt, from whence ye came out, where thou didst sow thy seed, and didst water it with thy foot, as a garden of herbs;

searchText: deuteronomy 11:11 but the land, whither ye go over to possess it, is a land of hills and valleys, and drinketh water as the rain of heaven cometh down;
english: but the land, whither ye go over to possess it, is a land of hills and valleys, and drinketh water as the rain of heaven cometh down;

searchText: deuteronomy 11:12 a land which the lord thy god careth for; the eyes of the lord thy god are always upon it, from the beginning of the year even unto the end of the year. .
english: a land which the LORD thy God careth for; the eyes of the LORD thy God are always upon it, from the beginning of the year even unto the end of the year. .

searchText: deuteronomy 11:13 and it shall come to pass, if ye shall hearken diligently unto my commandments which i command you this day, to love the lord your god, and to serve him with all your heart and with all your soul,
english: And it shall come to pass, if ye shall hearken diligently unto My commandments which I command you this day, to love the LORD your God, and to serve Him with all your heart and with all your soul,

searchText: deuteronomy 11:14 that i will give the rain of your land in its season, the former rain and the latter rain, that thou mayest gather in thy corn, and thy wine, and thine oil.
english: that I will give the rain of your land in its season, the former rain and the latter rain, that thou mayest gather in thy corn, and thy wine, and thine oil.

searchText: deuteronomy 11:15 and i will give grass in thy fields for thy cattle, and thou shalt eat and be satisfied.
english: And I will give grass in thy fields for thy cattle, and thou shalt eat and be satisfied.

searchText: deuteronomy 11:16 take heed to yourselves, lest your heart be deceived, and ye turn aside, and serve other gods, and worship them;
english: Take heed to yourselves, lest your heart be deceived, and ye turn aside, and serve other gods, and worship them;

searchText: deuteronomy 11:17 and the anger of the lord be kindled against you, and he shut up the heaven, so that there shall be no rain, and the ground shall not yield her fruit; and ye perish quickly from off the good land which the lord giveth you.
english: and the anger of the LORD be kindled against you, and He shut up the heaven, so that there shall be no rain, and the ground shall not yield her fruit; and ye perish quickly from off the good land which the LORD giveth you.

searchText: deuteronomy 11:18 therefore shall ye lay up these my words in your heart and in your soul; and ye shall bind them for a sign upon your hand, and they shall be for frontlets between your eyes.
english: Therefore shall ye lay up these My words in your heart and in your soul; and ye shall bind them for a sign upon your hand, and they shall be for frontlets between your eyes.

searchText: deuteronomy 11:19 and ye shall teach them your children, talking of them, when thou sittest in thy house, and when thou walkest by the way, and when thou liest down, and when thou risest up.
english: And ye shall teach them your children, talking of them, when thou sittest in thy house, and when thou walkest by the way, and when thou liest down, and when thou risest up.

searchText: deuteronomy 11:20 and thou shalt write them upon the door-posts of thy house, and upon thy gates;
english: And thou shalt write them upon the door-posts of thy house, and upon thy gates;

searchText: deuteronomy 11:21 that your days may be multiplied, and the days of your children, upon the land which the lord swore unto your fathers to give them, as the days of the heavens above the earth.
english: that your days may be multiplied, and the days of your children, upon the land which the LORD swore unto your fathers to give them, as the days of the heavens above the earth.

searchText: deuteronomy 11:22 for if ye shall diligently keep all this commandment which i command you, to do it, to love the lord your god, to walk in all his ways, and to cleave unto him,
english: For if ye shall diligently keep all this commandment which I command you, to do it, to love the LORD your God, to walk in all His ways, and to cleave unto Him,

searchText: deuteronomy 11:23 then will the lord drive out all these nations from before you, and ye shall dispossess nations greater and mightier than yourselves.
english: then will the LORD drive out all these nations from before you, and ye shall dispossess nations greater and mightier than yourselves.

searchText: deuteronomy 11:24 every place whereon the sole of your foot shall tread shall be yours: from the wilderness, and lebanon, from the river, the river euphrates, even unto the hinder sea shall be your border.
english: Every place whereon the sole of your foot shall tread shall be yours: from the wilderness, and Lebanon, from the river, the river Euphrates, even unto the hinder sea shall be your border.

searchText: deuteronomy 11:25 there shall no man be able to stand against you: the lord your god shall lay the fear of you and the dread of you upon all the land that ye shall tread upon, as he hath spoken unto you.
english: There shall no man be able to stand against you: the LORD your God shall lay the fear of you and the dread of you upon all the land that ye shall tread upon, as He hath spoken unto you.

searchText: deuteronomy 11:26 behold, i set before you this day a blessing and a curse:
english: Behold, I set before you this day a blessing and a curse:

searchText: deuteronomy 11:27 the blessing, if ye shall hearken unto the commandments of the lord your god, which i command you this day;
english: the blessing, if ye shall hearken unto the commandments of the LORD your God, which I command you this day;

searchText: deuteronomy 11:28 and the curse, if ye shall not hearken unto the commandments of the lord your god, but turn aside out of the way which i command you this day, to go after other gods, which ye have not known.
english: and the curse, if ye shall not hearken unto the commandments of the LORD your God, but turn aside out of the way which I command you this day, to go after other gods, which ye have not known.

searchText: deuteronomy 11:29 and it shall come to pass, when the lord thy god shall bring thee into the land whither thou goest to possess it, that thou shalt set the blessing upon mount gerizim, and the curse upon mount ebal.
english: And it shall come to pass, when the LORD thy God shall bring thee into the land whither thou goest to possess it, that thou shalt set the blessing upon mount Gerizim, and the curse upon mount Ebal.

searchText: deuteronomy 11:30 are they not beyond the jordan, behind the way of the going down of the sun, in the land of the canaanites that dwell in the arabah, over against gilgal, beside the terebinths of moreh?
english: Are they not beyond the Jordan, behind the way of the going down of the sun, in the land of the Canaanites that dwell in the Arabah, over against Gilgal, beside the terebinths of Moreh?

searchText: deuteronomy 11:31 for ye are to pass over the jordan to go in to possess the land which the lord your god giveth you, and ye shall possess it, and dwell therein.
english: For ye are to pass over the Jordan to go in to possess the land which the LORD your God giveth you, and ye shall possess it, and dwell therein.

searchText: deuteronomy 11:32 and ye shall observe to do all the statutes and the ordinances which i set before you this day.
english: And ye shall observe to do all the statutes and the ordinances which I set before you this day.

searchText: deuteronomy 12:1 these are the statutes and the ordinances, which ye shall observe to do in the land which the lord, the god of thy fathers, hath given thee to possess it, all the days that ye live upon the earth.
english: These are the statutes and the ordinances, which ye shall observe to do in the land which the LORD, the God of thy fathers, hath given thee to possess it, all the days that ye live upon the earth.

searchText: deuteronomy 12:2 ye shall surely destroy all the places, wherein the nations that ye are to dispossess served their gods, upon the high mountains, and upon the hills, and under every leafy tree.
english: Ye shall surely destroy all the places, wherein the nations that ye are to dispossess served their gods, upon the high mountains, and upon the hills, and under every leafy tree.

searchText: deuteronomy 12:3 and ye shall break down their altars, and dash in pieces their pillars, and burn their asherim with fire; and ye shall hew down the graven images of their gods; and ye shall destroy their name out of that place.
english: And ye shall break down their altars, and dash in pieces their pillars, and burn their Asherim with fire; and ye shall hew down the graven images of their gods; and ye shall destroy their name out of that place.

searchText: deuteronomy 12:4 ye shall not do so unto the lord your god.
english: Ye shall not do so unto the LORD your God.

searchText: deuteronomy 12:5 but unto the place which the lord your god shall choose out of all your tribes to put his name there, even unto his habitation shall ye seek, and thither thou shalt come;
english: But unto the place which the LORD your God shall choose out of all your tribes to put His name there, even unto His habitation shall ye seek, and thither thou shalt come;

searchText: deuteronomy 12:6 and thither ye shall bring your burnt-offerings, and your sacrifices, and your tithes, and the offering of your hand, and your vows, and your freewill-offerings, and the firstlings of your herd and of your flock;
english: and thither ye shall bring your burnt-offerings, and your sacrifices, and your tithes, and the offering of your hand, and your vows, and your freewill-offerings, and the firstlings of your herd and of your flock;

searchText: deuteronomy 12:7 and there ye shall eat before the lord your god, and ye shall rejoice in all that ye put your hand unto, ye and your households, wherein the lord thy god hath blessed thee.
english: and there ye shall eat before the LORD your God, and ye shall rejoice in all that ye put your hand unto, ye and your households, wherein the LORD thy God hath blessed thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 12:8 ye shall not do after all that we do here this day, every man whatsoever is right in his own eyes;
english: Ye shall not do after all that we do here this day, every man whatsoever is right in his own eyes;

searchText: deuteronomy 12:9 for ye are not as yet come to the rest and to the inheritance, which the lord your god giveth thee.
english: for ye are not as yet come to the rest and to the inheritance, which the LORD your God giveth thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 12:10 but when ye go over the jordan, and dwell in the land which the lord your god causeth you to inherit, and he giveth you rest from all your enemies round about, so that ye dwell in safety;
english: But when ye go over the Jordan, and dwell in the land which the LORD your God causeth you to inherit, and He giveth you rest from all your enemies round about, so that ye dwell in safety;

searchText: deuteronomy 12:11 then it shall come to pass that the place which the lord your god shall choose to cause his name to dwell there, thither shall ye bring all that i command you: your burnt-offerings, and your sacrifices, your tithes, and the offering of your hand, and all your choice vows which ye vow unto the lord.
english: then it shall come to pass that the place which the LORD your God shall choose to cause His name to dwell there, thither shall ye bring all that I command you: your burnt-offerings, and your sacrifices, your tithes, and the offering of your hand, and all your choice vows which ye vow unto the LORD.

searchText: deuteronomy 12:12 and ye shall rejoice before the lord your god, ye, and your sons, and your daughters, and your men-servants, and your maid-servants, and the levite that is within your gates, forasmuch as he hath no portion nor inheritance with you.
english: And ye shall rejoice before the LORD your God, ye, and your sons, and your daughters, and your men-servants, and your maid-servants, and the Levite that is within your gates, forasmuch as he hath no portion nor inheritance with you.

searchText: deuteronomy 12:13 take heed to thyself that thou offer not thy burnt-offerings in every place that thou seest;
english: Take heed to thyself that thou offer not thy burnt-offerings in every place that thou seest;

searchText: deuteronomy 12:14 but in the place which the lord shall choose in one of thy tribes, there thou shalt offer thy burnt-offerings, and there thou shalt do all that i command thee.
english: but in the place which the LORD shall choose in one of thy tribes, there thou shalt offer thy burnt-offerings, and there thou shalt do all that I command thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 12:15 notwithstanding thou mayest kill and eat flesh within all thy gates, after all the desire of thy soul, according to the blessing of the lord thy god which he hath given thee; the unclean and the clean may eat thereof, as of the gazelle, and as of the hart.
english: Notwithstanding thou mayest kill and eat flesh within all thy gates, after all the desire of thy soul, according to the blessing of the LORD thy God which He hath given thee; the unclean and the clean may eat thereof, as of the gazelle, and as of the hart.

searchText: deuteronomy 12:16 only ye shall not eat the blood; thou shalt pour it out upon the earth as water.
english: Only ye shall not eat the blood; thou shalt pour it out upon the earth as water.

searchText: deuteronomy 12:17 thou mayest not eat within thy gates the tithe of thy corn, or of thy wine, or of thine oil, or the firstlings of thy herd or of thy flock, nor any of thy vows which thou vowest, nor thy freewill-offerings, nor the offering of thy hand;
english: Thou mayest not eat within thy gates the tithe of thy corn, or of thy wine, or of thine oil, or the firstlings of thy herd or of thy flock, nor any of thy vows which thou vowest, nor thy freewill-offerings, nor the offering of thy hand;

searchText: deuteronomy 12:18 but thou shalt eat them before the lord thy god in the place which the lord thy god shall choose, thou, and thy son, and thy daughter, and thy man-servant, and thy maid-servant, and the levite that is within thy gates; and thou shalt rejoice before the lord thy god in all that thou puttest thy hand unto.
english: but thou shalt eat them before the LORD thy God in the place which the LORD thy God shall choose, thou, and thy son, and thy daughter, and thy man-servant, and thy maid-servant, and the Levite that is within thy gates; and thou shalt rejoice before the LORD thy God in all that thou puttest thy hand unto.

searchText: deuteronomy 12:19 take heed to thyself that thou forsake not the levite as long as thou livest upon thy land.
english: Take heed to thyself that thou forsake not the Levite as long as thou livest upon thy land.

searchText: deuteronomy 12:20 when the lord thy god shall enlarge thy border, as he hath promised thee, and thou shalt say: ‘i will eat flesh’, because thy soul desireth to eat flesh; thou mayest eat flesh, after all the desire of thy soul.
english: When the LORD thy God shall enlarge thy border, as He hath promised thee, and thou shalt say: ‘I will eat flesh’, because thy soul desireth to eat flesh; thou mayest eat flesh, after all the desire of thy soul.

searchText: deuteronomy 12:21 if the place which the lord thy god shall choose to put his name there be too far from thee, then thou shalt kill of thy herd and of thy flock, which the lord hath given thee, as i have commanded thee, and thou shalt eat within thy gates, after all the desire of thy soul.
english: If the place which the LORD thy God shall choose to put His name there be too far from thee, then thou shalt kill of thy herd and of thy flock, which the LORD hath given thee, as I have commanded thee, and thou shalt eat within thy gates, after all the desire of thy soul.

searchText: deuteronomy 12:22 howbeit as the gazelle and as the hart is eaten, so thou shalt eat thereof; the unclean and the clean may eat thereof alike.
english: Howbeit as the gazelle and as the hart is eaten, so thou shalt eat thereof; the unclean and the clean may eat thereof alike.

searchText: deuteronomy 12:23 only be stedfast in not eating the blood; for the blood is the life; and thou shalt not eat the life with the flesh.
english: Only be stedfast in not eating the blood; for the blood is the life; and thou shalt not eat the life with the flesh.

searchText: deuteronomy 12:24 thou shalt not eat it; thou shalt pour it out upon the earth as water.
english: Thou shalt not eat it; thou shalt pour it out upon the earth as water.

searchText: deuteronomy 12:25 thou shalt not eat it; that it may go well with thee, and with thy children after thee, when thou shalt do that which is right in the eyes of the lord.
english: Thou shalt not eat it; that it may go well with thee, and with thy children after thee, when thou shalt do that which is right in the eyes of the LORD.

searchText: deuteronomy 12:26 only thy holy things which thou hast, and thy vows, thou shalt take, and go unto the place which the lord shall choose;
english: Only thy holy things which thou hast, and thy vows, thou shalt take, and go unto the place which the LORD shall choose;

searchText: deuteronomy 12:27 and thou shalt offer thy burnt-offerings, the flesh and the blood, upon the altar of the lord thy god; and the blood of thy sacrifices shall be poured out against the altar of the lord thy god, and thou shalt eat the flesh.
english: and thou shalt offer thy burnt-offerings, the flesh and the blood, upon the altar of the LORD thy God; and the blood of thy sacrifices shall be poured out against the altar of the LORD thy God, and thou shalt eat the flesh.

searchText: deuteronomy 12:28 observe and hear all these words which i command thee, that it may go well with thee, and with thy children after thee for ever, when thou doest that which is good and right in the eyes of the lord thy god.
english: Observe and hear all these words which I command thee, that it may go well with thee, and with thy children after thee for ever, when thou doest that which is good and right in the eyes of the LORD thy God.

searchText: deuteronomy 12:29 when the lord thy god shall cut off the nations from before thee, whither thou goest in to dispossess them, and thou dispossessest them, and dwellest in their land;
english: When the LORD thy God shall cut off the nations from before thee, whither thou goest in to dispossess them, and thou dispossessest them, and dwellest in their land;

searchText: deuteronomy 12:30 take heed to thyself that thou be not ensnared to follow them, after that they are destroyed from before thee; and that thou inquire not after their gods, saying: ‘how used these nations to serve their gods? even so will i do likewise.’
english: take heed to thyself that thou be not ensnared to follow them, after that they are destroyed from before thee; and that thou inquire not after their gods, saying: ‘How used these nations to serve their gods? even so will I do likewise.’

searchText: deuteronomy 12:31 thou shalt not do so unto the lord thy god; for every abomination to the lord, which he hateth, have they done unto their gods; for even their sons and their daughters do they burn in the fire to their gods.
english: Thou shalt not do so unto the LORD thy God; for every abomination to the LORD, which He hateth, have they done unto their gods; for even their sons and their daughters do they burn in the fire to their gods.

searchText: deuteronomy 13:1 all this word which i command you, that shall ye observe to do; thou shalt not add thereto, nor diminish from it.
english: All this word which I command you, that shall ye observe to do; thou shalt not add thereto, nor diminish from it.

searchText: deuteronomy 13:2 if there arise in the midst of thee a prophet, or a dreamer of dreams—and he give thee a sign or a wonder,
english: If there arise in the midst of thee a prophet, or a dreamer of dreams—and he give thee a sign or a wonder,

searchText: deuteronomy 13:3 and the sign or the wonder come to pass, whereof he spoke unto thee—saying: ‘let us go after other gods, which thou hast not known, and let us serve them’;
english: and the sign or the wonder come to pass, whereof he spoke unto thee—saying: ‘Let us go after other gods, which thou hast not known, and let us serve them’;

searchText: deuteronomy 13:4 thou shalt not hearken unto the words of that prophet, or unto that dreamer of dreams; for the lord your god putteth you to proof, to know whether ye do love the lord your god with all your heart and with all your soul.
english: thou shalt not hearken unto the words of that prophet, or unto that dreamer of dreams; for the LORD your God putteth you to proof, to know whether ye do love the LORD your God with all your heart and with all your soul.

searchText: deuteronomy 13:5 after the lord your god shall ye walk, and him shall ye fear, and his commandments shall ye keep, and unto his voice shall ye hearken, and him shall ye serve, and unto him shall ye cleave.
english: After the LORD your God shall ye walk, and Him shall ye fear, and His commandments shall ye keep, and unto His voice shall ye hearken, and Him shall ye serve, and unto Him shall ye cleave.

searchText: deuteronomy 13:6 and that prophet, or that dreamer of dreams, shall be put to death; because he hath spoken perversion against the lord your god, who brought you out of the land of egypt, and redeemed thee out of the house of bondage, to draw thee aside out of the way which the lord thy god commanded thee to walk in. so shalt thou put away the evil from the midst of thee.
english: And that prophet, or that dreamer of dreams, shall be put to death; because he hath spoken perversion against the LORD your God, who brought you out of the land of Egypt, and redeemed thee out of the house of bondage, to draw thee aside out of the way which the LORD thy God commanded thee to walk in. So shalt thou put away the evil from the midst of thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 13:7 if thy brother, the son of thy mother, or thy son, or thy daughter, or the wife of thy bosom, or thy friend, that is as thine own soul, entice thee secretly, saying: 'let us go and serve other gods,' which thou hast not known, thou, nor thy fathers;
english: If thy brother, the son of thy mother, or thy son, or thy daughter, or the wife of thy bosom, or thy friend, that is as thine own soul, entice thee secretly, saying: 'Let us go and serve other gods,' which thou hast not known, thou, nor thy fathers;

searchText: deuteronomy 13:8 of the gods of the peoples that are round about you, nigh unto thee, or far off from thee, from the one end of the earth even unto the other end of the earth;
english: of the gods of the peoples that are round about you, nigh unto thee, or far off from thee, from the one end of the earth even unto the other end of the earth;

searchText: deuteronomy 13:9 thou shalt not consent unto him, nor hearken unto him; neither shall thine eye pity him, neither shalt thou spare, neither shalt thou conceal him;
english: thou shalt not consent unto him, nor hearken unto him; neither shall thine eye pity him, neither shalt thou spare, neither shalt thou conceal him;

searchText: deuteronomy 13:10 but thou shalt surely kill him; thy hand shall be first upon him to put him to death, and afterwards the hand of all the people.
english: but thou shalt surely kill him; thy hand shall be first upon him to put him to death, and afterwards the hand of all the people.

searchText: deuteronomy 13:11 and thou shalt stone him with stones, that he die; because he hath sought to draw thee away from the lord thy god, who brought thee out of the land of egypt, out of the house of bondage.
english: And thou shalt stone him with stones, that he die; because he hath sought to draw thee away from the LORD thy God, who brought thee out of the land of Egypt, out of the house of bondage.

searchText: deuteronomy 13:12 and all israel shall hear, and fear, and shall do no more any such wickedness as this is in the midst of thee.
english: And all Israel shall hear, and fear, and shall do no more any such wickedness as this is in the midst of thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 13:13 if thou shalt hear tell concerning one of thy cities, which the lord thy god giveth thee to dwell there, saying:
english: If thou shalt hear tell concerning one of thy cities, which the LORD thy God giveth thee to dwell there, saying:

searchText: deuteronomy 13:14 ’certain base fellows are gone out from the midst of thee, and have drawn away the inhabitants of their city, saying: let us go and serve other gods, which ye have not known’;
english: ’Certain base fellows are gone out from the midst of thee, and have drawn away the inhabitants of their city, saying: Let us go and serve other gods, which ye have not known’;

searchText: deuteronomy 13:15 then shalt thou inquire, and make search, and ask diligently; and, behold, if it be truth, and the thing certain, that such abomination is wrought in the midst of thee;
english: then shalt thou inquire, and make search, and ask diligently; and, behold, if it be truth, and the thing certain, that such abomination is wrought in the midst of thee;

searchText: deuteronomy 13:16 thou shalt surely smite the inhabitants of that city with the edge of the sword, destroying it utterly, and all that is therein and the cattle thereof, with the edge of the sword.
english: thou shalt surely smite the inhabitants of that city with the edge of the sword, destroying it utterly, and all that is therein and the cattle thereof, with the edge of the sword.

searchText: deuteronomy 13:17 and thou shalt gather all the spoil of it into the midst of the broad place thereof, and shall burn with fire the city, and all the spoil thereof every whit, unto the lord thy god; and it shall be a heap for ever; it shall not be built again.
english: And thou shalt gather all the spoil of it into the midst of the broad place thereof, and shall burn with fire the city, and all the spoil thereof every whit, unto the LORD thy God; and it shall be a heap for ever; it shall not be built again.

searchText: deuteronomy 13:18 and there shall cleave nought of the devoted thing to thy hand, that the lord may turn from the fierceness of his anger, and show thee mercy, and have compassion upon thee, and multiply thee, as he hath sworn unto thy fathers;
english: And there shall cleave nought of the devoted thing to thy hand, that the LORD may turn from the fierceness of His anger, and show thee mercy, and have compassion upon thee, and multiply thee, as He hath sworn unto thy fathers;

searchText: deuteronomy 13:19 when thou shalt hearken to the voice of the lord thy god, to keep all his commandments which i command thee this day, to do that which is right in the eyes of the lord thy god.
english: when thou shalt hearken to the voice of the LORD thy God, to keep all His commandments which I command thee this day, to do that which is right in the eyes of the LORD thy God.

searchText: deuteronomy 14:1 ye are the children of the lord your god: ye shall not cut yourselves, nor make any baldness between your eyes for the dead.
english: Ye are the children of the LORD your God: ye shall not cut yourselves, nor make any baldness between your eyes for the dead.

searchText: deuteronomy 14:2 for thou art a holy people unto the lord thy god, and the lord hath chosen thee to be his own treasure out of all peoples that are upon the face of the earth.
english: For thou art a holy people unto the LORD thy God, and the LORD hath chosen thee to be His own treasure out of all peoples that are upon the face of the earth.

searchText: deuteronomy 14:3 thou shalt not eat any abominable thing.
english: Thou shalt not eat any abominable thing.

searchText: deuteronomy 14:4 these are the beasts which ye may eat: the ox, the sheep, and the goat,
english: These are the beasts which ye may eat: the ox, the sheep, and the goat,

searchText: deuteronomy 14:5 the hart, and the gazelle, and the roebuck, and the wild goat, and the pygarg, and the antelope, and the mountain-sheep.
english: the hart, and the gazelle, and the roebuck, and the wild goat, and the pygarg, and the antelope, and the mountain-sheep.

searchText: deuteronomy 14:6 and every beast that parteth the hoof, and hath the hoof wholly cloven in two, and cheweth the cud, among the beasts, that ye may eat.
english: And every beast that parteth the hoof, and hath the hoof wholly cloven in two, and cheweth the cud, among the beasts, that ye may eat.

searchText: deuteronomy 14:7 nevertheless these ye shall not eat of them that only chew the cud, or of them that only have the hoof cloven: the camel, and the hare, and the rock-badger, because they chew the cud but part not the hoof, they are unclean unto you;
english: Nevertheless these ye shall not eat of them that only chew the cud, or of them that only have the hoof cloven: the camel, and the hare, and the rock-badger, because they chew the cud but part not the hoof, they are unclean unto you;

searchText: deuteronomy 14:8 and the swine, because he parteth the hoof but cheweth not the cud, he is unclean unto you; of their flesh ye shall not eat, and their carcasses ye shall not touch.
english: and the swine, because he parteth the hoof but cheweth not the cud, he is unclean unto you; of their flesh ye shall not eat, and their carcasses ye shall not touch.

searchText: deuteronomy 14:9 these ye may eat of all that are in the waters: whatsoever hath fins and scales may ye eat;
english: These ye may eat of all that are in the waters: whatsoever hath fins and scales may ye eat;

searchText: deuteronomy 14:10 and whatsoever hath not fins and scales ye shall not eat; it is unclean unto you.
english: and whatsoever hath not fins and scales ye shall not eat; it is unclean unto you.

searchText: deuteronomy 14:11 of all clean birds ye may eat.
english: Of all clean birds ye may eat.

searchText: deuteronomy 14:12 but these are they of which ye shall not eat: the great vulture, and the bearded vulture, and the ospray;
english: But these are they of which ye shall not eat: the great vulture, and the bearded vulture, and the ospray;

searchText: deuteronomy 14:13 and the glede, and the falcon, and the kite after its kinds;
english: and the glede, and the falcon, and the kite after its kinds;

searchText: deuteronomy 14:14 and every raven after its kinds;
english: and every raven after its kinds;

searchText: deuteronomy 14:15 and the ostrich, and the night-hawk, and the sea-mew, and the hawk after its kinds;
english: and the ostrich, and the night-hawk, and the sea-mew, and the hawk after its kinds;

searchText: deuteronomy 14:16 the little owl, and the great owl, and the horned owl;
english: the little owl, and the great owl, and the horned owl;

searchText: deuteronomy 14:17 and the pelican, and the carrion-vulture, and the cormorant;
english: and the pelican, and the carrion-vulture, and the cormorant;

searchText: deuteronomy 14:18 and the stork, and the heron after its kinds, and the hoopoe, and the bat.
english: and the stork, and the heron after its kinds, and the hoopoe, and the bat.

searchText: deuteronomy 14:19 and all winged swarming things are unclean unto you; they shall not be eaten.
english: And all winged swarming things are unclean unto you; they shall not be eaten.

searchText: deuteronomy 14:20 of all clean winged things ye may eat.
english: Of all clean winged things ye may eat.

searchText: deuteronomy 14:21 ye shall not eat of any thing that dieth of itself; thou mayest give it unto the stranger that is within thy gates, that he may eat it; or thou mayest sell it unto a foreigner; for thou art a holy people unto the lord thy god. thou shalt not seethe a kid in its mother’s milk.
english: Ye shall not eat of any thing that dieth of itself; thou mayest give it unto the stranger that is within thy gates, that he may eat it; or thou mayest sell it unto a foreigner; for thou art a holy people unto the LORD thy God. Thou shalt not seethe a kid in its mother’s milk.

searchText: deuteronomy 14:22 thou shalt surely tithe all the increase of thy seed, that which is brought forth in the field year by year.
english: Thou shalt surely tithe all the increase of thy seed, that which is brought forth in the field year by year.

searchText: deuteronomy 14:23 and thou shalt eat before the lord thy god, in the place which he shall choose to cause his name to dwell there, the tithe of thy corn, of thy wine, and of thine oil, and the firstlings of thy herd and of thy flock; that thou mayest learn to fear the lord thy god always.
english: And thou shalt eat before the LORD thy God, in the place which He shall choose to cause His name to dwell there, the tithe of thy corn, of thy wine, and of thine oil, and the firstlings of thy herd and of thy flock; that thou mayest learn to fear the LORD thy God always.

searchText: deuteronomy 14:24 and if the way be too long for thee, so that thou art not able to carry it, because the place is too far from thee, which the lord thy god shall choose to set his name there, when the lord thy god shall bless thee;
english: And if the way be too long for thee, so that thou art not able to carry it, because the place is too far from thee, which the LORD thy God shall choose to set His name there, when the LORD thy God shall bless thee;

searchText: deuteronomy 14:25 then shalt thou turn it into money, and bind up the money in thy hand, and shalt go unto the place which the lord thy god shall choose.
english: then shalt thou turn it into money, and bind up the money in thy hand, and shalt go unto the place which the LORD thy God shall choose.

searchText: deuteronomy 14:26 and thou shalt bestow the money for whatsoever thy soul desireth, for oxen, or for sheep, or for wine, or for strong drink, or for whatsoever thy soul asketh of thee; and thou shalt eat there before the lord thy god, and thou shalt rejoice, thou and thy household.
english: And thou shalt bestow the money for whatsoever thy soul desireth, for oxen, or for sheep, or for wine, or for strong drink, or for whatsoever thy soul asketh of thee; and thou shalt eat there before the LORD thy God, and thou shalt rejoice, thou and thy household.

searchText: deuteronomy 14:27 and the levite that is within thy gates, thou shalt not forsake him; for he hath no portion nor inheritance with thee.
english: And the Levite that is within thy gates, thou shalt not forsake him; for he hath no portion nor inheritance with thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 14:28 at the end of every three years, even in the same year, thou shalt bring forth all the tithe of thine increase, and shall lay it up within thy gates.
english: At the end of every three years, even in the same year, thou shalt bring forth all the tithe of thine increase, and shall lay it up within thy gates.

searchText: deuteronomy 14:29 and the levite, because he hath no portion nor inheritance with thee, and the stranger, and the fatherless, and the widow, that are within thy gates, shall come, and shall eat and be satisfied; that the lord thy god may bless thee in all the work of thy hand which thou doest.
english: And the Levite, because he hath no portion nor inheritance with thee, and the stranger, and the fatherless, and the widow, that are within thy gates, shall come, and shall eat and be satisfied; that the LORD thy God may bless thee in all the work of thy hand which thou doest.

searchText: deuteronomy 15:1 at the end of every seven years thou shalt make a release.
english: At the end of every seven years thou shalt make a release.

searchText: deuteronomy 15:2 and this is the manner of the release: every creditor shall release that which he hath lent unto his neighbour; he shall not exact it of his neighbour and his brother; because the lord’s release hath been proclaimed.
english: And this is the manner of the release: every creditor shall release that which he hath lent unto his neighbour; he shall not exact it of his neighbour and his brother; because the LORD’S release hath been proclaimed.

searchText: deuteronomy 15:3 of a foreigner thou mayest exact it; but whatsoever of thine is with thy brother thy hand shall release.
english: Of a foreigner thou mayest exact it; but whatsoever of thine is with thy brother thy hand shall release.

searchText: deuteronomy 15:4 howbeit there shall be no needy among you—for the lord will surely bless thee in the land which the lord thy god giveth thee for an inheritance to possess it—
english: Howbeit there shall be no needy among you—for the LORD will surely bless thee in the land which the LORD thy God giveth thee for an inheritance to possess it—

searchText: deuteronomy 15:5 if only thou diligently hearken unto the voice of the lord thy god, to observe to do all this commandment which i command thee this day.
english: if only thou diligently hearken unto the voice of the LORD thy God, to observe to do all this commandment which I command thee this day.

searchText: deuteronomy 15:6 for the lord thy god will bless thee, as he promised thee; and thou shalt lend unto many nations, but thou shalt not borrow; and thou shalt rule over many nations, but they shall not rule over thee.
english: For the LORD thy God will bless thee, as He promised thee; and thou shalt lend unto many nations, but thou shalt not borrow; and thou shalt rule over many nations, but they shall not rule over thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 15:7 if there be among you a needy man, one of thy brethren, within any of thy gates, in thy land which the lord thy god giveth thee, thou shalt not harden thy heart, nor shut thy hand from thy needy brother;
english: If there be among you a needy man, one of thy brethren, within any of thy gates, in thy land which the LORD thy God giveth thee, thou shalt not harden thy heart, nor shut thy hand from thy needy brother;

searchText: deuteronomy 15:8 but thou shalt surely open thy hand unto him, and shalt surely lend him sufficient for his need in that which he wanteth.
english: but thou shalt surely open thy hand unto him, and shalt surely lend him sufficient for his need in that which he wanteth.

searchText: deuteronomy 15:9 beware that there be not a base thought in thy heart, saying: ‘the seventh year, the year of release, is at hand’; and thine eye be evil against thy needy brother, and thou give him nought; and he cry unto the lord against thee, and it be sin in thee.
english: Beware that there be not a base thought in thy heart, saying: ‘The seventh year, the year of release, is at hand’; and thine eye be evil against thy needy brother, and thou give him nought; and he cry unto the LORD against thee, and it be sin in thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 15:10 thou shalt surely give him, and thy heart shall not be grieved when thou givest unto him; because that for this thing the lord thy god will bless thee in all thy work, and in all that thou puttest thy hand unto.
english: Thou shalt surely give him, and thy heart shall not be grieved when thou givest unto him; because that for this thing the LORD thy God will bless thee in all thy work, and in all that thou puttest thy hand unto.

searchText: deuteronomy 15:11 for the poor shall never cease out of the land; therefore i command thee, saying: ‘thou shalt surely open thy hand unto thy poor and needy brother, in thy land.’
english: For the poor shall never cease out of the land; therefore I command thee, saying: ‘Thou shalt surely open thy hand unto thy poor and needy brother, in thy land.’

searchText: deuteronomy 15:12 if thy brother, a hebrew man, or a hebrew woman, be sold unto thee, he shall serve thee six years; and in the seventh year thou shalt let him go free from thee.
english: If thy brother, a Hebrew man, or a Hebrew woman, be sold unto thee, he shall serve thee six years; and in the seventh year thou shalt let him go free from thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 15:13 and when thou lettest him go free from thee, thou shalt not let him go empty;
english: And when thou lettest him go free from thee, thou shalt not let him go empty;

searchText: deuteronomy 15:14 thou shalt furnish him liberally out of thy flock, and out of thy threshing-floor, and out of thy winepress; of that wherewith the lord thy god hath blessed thee thou shalt give unto him.
english: thou shalt furnish him liberally out of thy flock, and out of thy threshing-floor, and out of thy winepress; of that wherewith the LORD thy God hath blessed thee thou shalt give unto him.

searchText: deuteronomy 15:15 and thou shalt remember that thou wast a bondman in the land of egypt, and the lord thy god redeemed thee; therefore i command thee this thing to-day.
english: And thou shalt remember that thou wast a bondman in the land of Egypt, and the LORD thy God redeemed thee; therefore I command thee this thing to-day.

searchText: deuteronomy 15:16 and it shall be, if he say unto thee: ‘i will not go out from thee’; because he loveth thee and thy house, because he fareth well with thee;
english: And it shall be, if he say unto thee: ‘I will not go out from thee’; because he loveth thee and thy house, because he fareth well with thee;

searchText: deuteronomy 15:17 then thou shalt take an awl, and thrust it through his ear and into the door, and he shall be thy bondman for ever. and also unto thy bondwoman thou shalt do likewise.
english: then thou shalt take an awl, and thrust it through his ear and into the door, and he shall be thy bondman for ever. And also unto thy bondwoman thou shalt do likewise.

searchText: deuteronomy 15:18 it shall not seem hard unto thee, when thou lettest him go free from thee; for to the double of the hire of a hireling hath he served thee six years; and the lord thy god will bless thee in all that thou doest.
english: It shall not seem hard unto thee, when thou lettest him go free from thee; for to the double of the hire of a hireling hath he served thee six years; and the LORD thy God will bless thee in all that thou doest.

searchText: deuteronomy 15:19 all the firstling males that are born of thy herd and of thy flock thou shalt sanctify unto the lord thy god; thou shalt do no work with the firstling of thine ox, nor shear the firstling of thy flock.
english: All the firstling males that are born of thy herd and of thy flock thou shalt sanctify unto the LORD thy God; thou shalt do no work with the firstling of thine ox, nor shear the firstling of thy flock.

searchText: deuteronomy 15:20 thou shalt eat it before the lord thy god year by year in the place which the lord shall choose, thou and thy household.
english: Thou shalt eat it before the LORD thy God year by year in the place which the LORD shall choose, thou and thy household.

searchText: deuteronomy 15:21 and if there be any blemish therein, lameness, or blindness, any ill blemish whatsoever, thou shalt not sacrifice it unto the lord thy god.
english: And if there be any blemish therein, lameness, or blindness, any ill blemish whatsoever, thou shalt not sacrifice it unto the LORD thy God.

searchText: deuteronomy 15:22 thou shalt eat it within thy gates; the unclean and the clean may eat it alike, as the gazelle, and as the hart.
english: Thou shalt eat it within thy gates; the unclean and the clean may eat it alike, as the gazelle, and as the hart.

searchText: deuteronomy 15:23 only thou shalt not eat the blood thereof; thou shalt pour it out upon the ground as water.
english: Only thou shalt not eat the blood thereof; thou shalt pour it out upon the ground as water.

searchText: deuteronomy 16:1 observe the month of abib, and keep the passover unto the lord thy god; for in the month of abib the lord thy god brought thee forth out of egypt by night.
english: Observe the month of Abib, and keep the passover unto the LORD thy God; for in the month of Abib the LORD thy God brought thee forth out of Egypt by night.

searchText: deuteronomy 16:2 and thou shalt sacrifice the passover-offering unto the lord thy god, of the flock and the herd, in the place which the lord shall choose to cause his name to dwell there.
english: And thou shalt sacrifice the passover-offering unto the LORD thy God, of the flock and the herd, in the place which the LORD shall choose to cause His name to dwell there.

searchText: deuteronomy 16:3 thou shalt eat no leavened bread with it; seven days shalt thou eat unleavened bread therewith, even the bread of affliction; for in haste didst thou come forth out of the land of egypt; that thou mayest remember the day when thou camest forth out of the land of egypt all the days of thy life.
english: Thou shalt eat no leavened bread with it; seven days shalt thou eat unleavened bread therewith, even the bread of affliction; for in haste didst thou come forth out of the land of Egypt; that thou mayest remember the day when thou camest forth out of the land of Egypt all the days of thy life.

searchText: deuteronomy 16:4 and there shall be no leaven seen with thee in all thy borders seven days; neither shall any of the flesh, which thou sacrificest the first day at even, remain all night until the morning.
english: And there shall be no leaven seen with thee in all thy borders seven days; neither shall any of the flesh, which thou sacrificest the first day at even, remain all night until the morning.

searchText: deuteronomy 16:5 thou mayest not sacrifice the passover-offering within any of thy gates, which the lord thy god giveth thee;
english: Thou mayest not sacrifice the passover-offering within any of thy gates, which the LORD thy God giveth thee;

searchText: deuteronomy 16:6 but at the place which the lord thy god shall choose to cause his name to dwell in, there thou shalt sacrifice the passover-offering at even, at the going down of the sun, at the season that thou camest forth out of egypt.
english: but at the place which the LORD thy God shall choose to cause His name to dwell in, there thou shalt sacrifice the passover-offering at even, at the going down of the sun, at the season that thou camest forth out of Egypt.

searchText: deuteronomy 16:7 and thou shalt roast and eat it in the place which the lord thy god shall choose; and thou shalt turn in the morning, and go unto thy tents.
english: And thou shalt roast and eat it in the place which the LORD thy God shall choose; and thou shalt turn in the morning, and go unto thy tents.

searchText: deuteronomy 16:8 six days thou shalt eat unleavened bread; and on the seventh day shall be a solemn assembly to the lord thy god; thou shalt do no work therein.
english: Six days thou shalt eat unleavened bread; and on the seventh day shall be a solemn assembly to the LORD thy God; thou shalt do no work therein.

searchText: deuteronomy 16:9 seven weeks shalt thou number unto thee; from the time the sickle is first put to the standing corn shalt thou begin to number seven weeks.
english: Seven weeks shalt thou number unto thee; from the time the sickle is first put to the standing corn shalt thou begin to number seven weeks.

searchText: deuteronomy 16:10 and thou shalt keep the feast of weeks unto the lord thy god after the measure of the freewill-offering of thy hand, which thou shalt give, according as the lord thy god blesseth thee.
english: And thou shalt keep the feast of weeks unto the LORD thy God after the measure of the freewill-offering of thy hand, which thou shalt give, according as the LORD thy God blesseth thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 16:11 and thou shalt rejoice before the lord thy god, thou, and thy son, and thy daughter, and thy man-servant, and thy maid-servant, and the levite that is within they gates, and the stranger, and the fatherless, and the widow, that are in the midst of thee, in the place which the lord thy god shall choose to cause his name to dwell there.
english: And thou shalt rejoice before the LORD thy God, thou, and thy son, and thy daughter, and thy man-servant, and thy maid-servant, and the Levite that is within they gates, and the stranger, and the fatherless, and the widow, that are in the midst of thee, in the place which the LORD thy God shall choose to cause His name to dwell there.

searchText: deuteronomy 16:12 and thou shalt remember that thou wast a bondman in egypt; and thou shalt observe and do these statutes.
english: And thou shalt remember that thou wast a bondman in Egypt; and thou shalt observe and do these statutes.

searchText: deuteronomy 16:13 thou shalt keep the feast of tabernacles seven days, after that thou hast gathered in from thy threshing-floor and from thy winepress.
english: Thou shalt keep the feast of tabernacles seven days, after that thou hast gathered in from thy threshing-floor and from thy winepress.

searchText: deuteronomy 16:14 and thou shalt rejoice in thy feast, thou, and thy son, and thy daughter, and thy man-servant, and thy maid-servant, and the levite, and the stranger, and the fatherless, and the widow, that are within thy gates.
english: And thou shalt rejoice in thy feast, thou, and thy son, and thy daughter, and thy man-servant, and thy maid-servant, and the Levite, and the stranger, and the fatherless, and the widow, that are within thy gates.

searchText: deuteronomy 16:15 seven days shalt thou keep a feast unto the lord thy god in the place which the lord shall choose; because the lord thy god shall bless thee in all thine increase, and in all the work of thy hands, and thou shalt be altogether joyful.
english: Seven days shalt thou keep a feast unto the LORD thy God in the place which the LORD shall choose; because the LORD thy God shall bless thee in all thine increase, and in all the work of thy hands, and thou shalt be altogether joyful.

searchText: deuteronomy 16:16 three times in a year shall all thy males appear before the lord thy god in the place which he shall choose; on the feast of unleavened bread, and on the feast of weeks, and on the feast of tabernacles; and they shall not appear before the lord empty;
english: Three times in a year shall all thy males appear before the LORD thy God in the place which He shall choose; on the feast of unleavened bread, and on the feast of weeks, and on the feast of tabernacles; and they shall not appear before the LORD empty;

searchText: deuteronomy 16:17 every man shall give as he is able, according to the blessing of the lord thy god which he hath given thee.
english: every man shall give as he is able, according to the blessing of the LORD thy God which He hath given thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 16:18 judges and officers shalt thou make thee in all thy gates, which the lord thy god giveth thee, tribe by tribe; and they shall judge the people with righteous judgment.
english: Judges and officers shalt thou make thee in all thy gates, which the LORD thy God giveth thee, tribe by tribe; and they shall judge the people with righteous judgment.

searchText: deuteronomy 16:19 thou shalt not wrest judgment; thou shalt not respect persons; neither shalt thou take a gift; for a gift doth blind the eyes of the wise, and pervert the words of the righteous.
english: Thou shalt not wrest judgment; thou shalt not respect persons; neither shalt thou take a gift; for a gift doth blind the eyes of the wise, and pervert the words of the righteous.

searchText: deuteronomy 16:20 justice, justice shalt thou follow, that thou mayest live, and inherit the land which the lord thy god giveth thee.
english: Justice, justice shalt thou follow, that thou mayest live, and inherit the land which the LORD thy God giveth thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 16:21 thou shalt not plant thee an asherah of any kind of tree beside the altar of the lord thy god, which thou shalt make thee.
english: Thou shalt not plant thee an Asherah of any kind of tree beside the altar of the LORD thy God, which thou shalt make thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 16:22 neither shalt thou set thee up a pillar, which the lord thy god hateth.
english: Neither shalt thou set thee up a pillar, which the LORD thy God hateth.

searchText: deuteronomy 17:1 thou shalt not sacrifice unto the lord thy god an ox, or a sheep, wherein is a blemish, even any evil thing; for that is an abomination unto the lord thy god.
english: Thou shalt not sacrifice unto the LORD thy God an ox, or a sheep, wherein is a blemish, even any evil thing; for that is an abomination unto the LORD thy God.

searchText: deuteronomy 17:2 if there be found in the midst of thee, within any of thy gates which the lord thy god giveth thee, man or woman, that doeth that which is evil in the sight of the lord thy god, in transgressing his covenant,
english: If there be found in the midst of thee, within any of thy gates which the LORD thy God giveth thee, man or woman, that doeth that which is evil in the sight of the LORD thy God, in transgressing His covenant,

searchText: deuteronomy 17:3 and hath gone and served other gods, and worshipped them, or the sun, or the moon, or any of the host of heaven, which i have commanded not;
english: and hath gone and served other gods, and worshipped them, or the sun, or the moon, or any of the host of heaven, which I have commanded not;

searchText: deuteronomy 17:4 and it be told thee, and thou hear it, then shalt thou inquire diligently, and, behold, if it be true, and the thing certain, that such abomination is wrought in israel;
english: and it be told thee, and thou hear it, then shalt thou inquire diligently, and, behold, if it be true, and the thing certain, that such abomination is wrought in Israel;

searchText: deuteronomy 17:5 then shalt thou bring forth that man or that woman, who have done this evil thing, unto thy gates, even the man or the woman; and thou shalt stone them with stones, that they die.
english: then shalt thou bring forth that man or that woman, who have done this evil thing, unto thy gates, even the man or the woman; and thou shalt stone them with stones, that they die.

searchText: deuteronomy 17:6 at the mouth of two witnesses, or three witnesses, shall he that is to die be put to death; at the mouth of one witness he shall not be put to death.
english: At the mouth of two witnesses, or three witnesses, shall he that is to die be put to death; at the mouth of one witness he shall not be put to death.

searchText: deuteronomy 17:7 the hand of the witnesses shall be first upon him to put him to death, and afterward the hand of all the people. so thou shalt put away the evil from the midst of thee.
english: The hand of the witnesses shall be first upon him to put him to death, and afterward the hand of all the people. So thou shalt put away the evil from the midst of thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 17:8 if there arise a matter too hard for thee in judgment, between blood and blood, between plea and plea, and between stroke and stroke, even matters of controversy within thy gates; then shalt thou arise, and get thee up unto the place which the lord thy god shall choose.
english: If there arise a matter too hard for thee in judgment, between blood and blood, between plea and plea, and between stroke and stroke, even matters of controversy within thy gates; then shalt thou arise, and get thee up unto the place which the LORD thy God shall choose.

searchText: deuteronomy 17:9 and thou shall come unto the priests the levites, and unto the judge that shall be in those days; and thou shalt inquire; and they shall declare unto thee the sentence of judgment.
english: And thou shall come unto the priests the Levites, and unto the judge that shall be in those days; and thou shalt inquire; and they shall declare unto thee the sentence of judgment.

searchText: deuteronomy 17:10 and thou shalt do according to the tenor of the sentence, which they shall declare unto thee from that place which the lord shall choose; and thou shalt observe to do according to all that they shall teach thee.
english: And thou shalt do according to the tenor of the sentence, which they shall declare unto thee from that place which the LORD shall choose; and thou shalt observe to do according to all that they shall teach thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 17:11 according to the law which they shall teach thee, and according to the judgment which they shall tell thee, thou shalt do; thou shalt not turn aside from the sentence which they shall declare unto thee, to the right hand, nor to the left.
english: According to the law which they shall teach thee, and according to the judgment which they shall tell thee, thou shalt do; thou shalt not turn aside from the sentence which they shall declare unto thee, to the right hand, nor to the left.

searchText: deuteronomy 17:12 and the man that doeth presumptuously, in not hearkening unto the priest that standeth to minister there before the lord thy god, or unto the judge, even that man shall die; and thou shalt exterminate the evil from israel.
english: And the man that doeth presumptuously, in not hearkening unto the priest that standeth to minister there before the LORD thy God, or unto the judge, even that man shall die; and thou shalt exterminate the evil from Israel.

searchText: deuteronomy 17:13 and all the people shall hear, and fear, and do no more presumptuously.
english: And all the people shall hear, and fear, and do no more presumptuously.

searchText: deuteronomy 17:14 when thou art come unto the land which the lord thy god giveth thee, and shalt possess it, and shalt dwell therein; and shalt say: ‘i will set a king over me, like all the nations that are round about me’;
english: When thou art come unto the land which the LORD thy God giveth thee, and shalt possess it, and shalt dwell therein; and shalt say: ‘I will set a king over me, like all the nations that are round about me’;

searchText: deuteronomy 17:15 thou shalt in any wise set him king over thee, whom the lord thy god shall choose; one from among thy brethren shalt thou set king over thee; thou mayest not put a foreigner over thee, who is not thy brother.
english: thou shalt in any wise set him king over thee, whom the LORD thy God shall choose; one from among thy brethren shalt thou set king over thee; thou mayest not put a foreigner over thee, who is not thy brother.

searchText: deuteronomy 17:16 only he shall not multiply horses to himself, nor cause the people to return to egypt, to the end that he should multiply horses; forasmuch as the lord hath said unto you: ‘ye shall henceforth return no more that way.’
english: Only he shall not multiply horses to himself, nor cause the people to return to Egypt, to the end that he should multiply horses; forasmuch as the LORD hath said unto you: ‘Ye shall henceforth return no more that way.’

searchText: deuteronomy 17:17 neither shall he multiply wives to himself, that his heart turn not away; neither shall he greatly multiply to himself silver and gold.
english: Neither shall he multiply wives to himself, that his heart turn not away; neither shall he greatly multiply to himself silver and gold.

searchText: deuteronomy 17:18 and it shall be, when he sitteth upon the throne of his kingdom, that he shall write him a copy of this law in a book, out of that which is before the priests the levites.
english: And it shall be, when he sitteth upon the throne of his kingdom, that he shall write him a copy of this law in a book, out of that which is before the priests the Levites.

searchText: deuteronomy 17:19 and it shall be with him, and he shall read therein all the days of his life; that he may learn to fear the lord his god, to keep all the words of this law and these statutes, to do them;
english: And it shall be with him, and he shall read therein all the days of his life; that he may learn to fear the LORD his God, to keep all the words of this law and these statutes, to do them;

searchText: deuteronomy 17:20 that his heart be not lifted up above his brethren, and that he turn not aside from the commandment, to the right hand, or to the left; to the end that he may prolong his days in his kingdom, he and his children, in the midst of israel.
english: that his heart be not lifted up above his brethren, and that he turn not aside from the commandment, to the right hand, or to the left; to the end that he may prolong his days in his kingdom, he and his children, in the midst of Israel.

searchText: deuteronomy 18:1 the priests the levites, even all the tribe of levi, shall have no portion nor inheritance with israel; they shall eat the offerings of the lord made by fire, and his inheritance.
english: The priests the Levites, even all the tribe of Levi, shall have no portion nor inheritance with Israel; they shall eat the offerings of the LORD made by fire, and His inheritance.

searchText: deuteronomy 18:2 and they shall have no inheritance among their brethren; the lord is their inheritance, as he hath spoken unto them.
english: And they shall have no inheritance among their brethren; the LORD is their inheritance, as He hath spoken unto them.

searchText: deuteronomy 18:3 and this shall be the priests’due from the people, from them that offer a sacrifice, whether it be ox or sheep, that they shall give unto the priest the shoulder, and the two cheeks, and the maw.
english: And this shall be the priests’due from the people, from them that offer a sacrifice, whether it be ox or sheep, that they shall give unto the priest the shoulder, and the two cheeks, and the maw.

searchText: deuteronomy 18:4 the first-fruits of thy corn, of thy wine, and of thine oil, and the first of the fleece of thy sheep, shalt thou give him.
english: The first-fruits of thy corn, of thy wine, and of thine oil, and the first of the fleece of thy sheep, shalt thou give him.

searchText: deuteronomy 18:5 for the lord thy god hath chosen him out of all thy tribes, to stand to minister in the name of the lord, him and his sons for ever.
english: For the LORD thy God hath chosen him out of all thy tribes, to stand to minister in the name of the LORD, him and his sons for ever.

searchText: deuteronomy 18:6 and if a levite come from any of thy gates out of all israel, where he sojourneth, and come with all the desire of his soul unto the place which the lord shall choose;
english: And if a Levite come from any of thy gates out of all Israel, where he sojourneth, and come with all the desire of his soul unto the place which the LORD shall choose;

searchText: deuteronomy 18:7 then he shall minister in the name of the lord his god, as all his brethren the levites do, who stand there before the lord.
english: then he shall minister in the name of the LORD his God, as all his brethren the Levites do, who stand there before the LORD.

searchText: deuteronomy 18:8 they shall have like portions to eat, beside that which is his due according to the fathers’houses. .
english: They shall have like portions to eat, beside that which is his due according to the fathers’houses. .

searchText: deuteronomy 18:9 when thou art come into the land which the lord thy god giveth thee, thou shalt not learn to do after the abominations of those nations.
english: When thou art come into the land which the LORD thy God giveth thee, thou shalt not learn to do after the abominations of those nations.

searchText: deuteronomy 18:10 there shall not be found among you any one that maketh his son or his daughter to pass through the fire, one that useth divination, a soothsayer, or an enchanter, or a sorcerer,
english: There shall not be found among you any one that maketh his son or his daughter to pass through the fire, one that useth divination, a soothsayer, or an enchanter, or a sorcerer,

searchText: deuteronomy 18:11 or a charmer, or one that consulteth a ghost or a familiar spirit, or a necromancer.
english: or a charmer, or one that consulteth a ghost or a familiar spirit, or a necromancer.

searchText: deuteronomy 18:12 for whosoever doeth these things is an abomination unto the lord; and because of these abominations the lord thy god is driving them out from before thee.
english: For whosoever doeth these things is an abomination unto the LORD; and because of these abominations the LORD thy God is driving them out from before thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 18:13 thou shalt be whole-hearted with the lord thy god.
english: Thou shalt be whole-hearted with the LORD thy God.

searchText: deuteronomy 18:14 for these nations, that thou art to dispossess, hearken unto soothsayers, and unto diviners; but as for thee, the lord thy god hath not suffered thee so to do.
english: For these nations, that thou art to dispossess, hearken unto soothsayers, and unto diviners; but as for thee, the LORD thy God hath not suffered thee so to do.

searchText: deuteronomy 18:15 a prophet will the lord thy god raise up unto thee, from the midst of thee, of thy brethren, like unto me; unto him ye shall hearken;
english: A prophet will the LORD thy God raise up unto thee, from the midst of thee, of thy brethren, like unto me; unto him ye shall hearken;

searchText: deuteronomy 18:16 according to all that thou didst desire of the lord thy god in horeb in the day of the assembly, saying: ‘let me not hear again the voice of the lord my god, neither let me see this great fire any more, that i die not.’
english: according to all that thou didst desire of the LORD thy God in Horeb in the day of the assembly, saying: ‘Let me not hear again the voice of the LORD my God, neither let me see this great fire any more, that I die not.’

searchText: deuteronomy 18:17 and the lord said unto me: ‘they have well said that which they have spoken.
english: And the LORD said unto me: ‘They have well said that which they have spoken.

searchText: deuteronomy 18:18 i will raise them up a prophet from among their brethren, like unto thee; and i will put my words in his mouth, and he shall speak unto them all that i shall command him.
english: I will raise them up a prophet from among their brethren, like unto thee; and I will put My words in his mouth, and he shall speak unto them all that I shall command him.

searchText: deuteronomy 18:19 and it shall come to pass, that whosoever will not hearken unto my words which he shall speak in my name, i will require it of him.
english: And it shall come to pass, that whosoever will not hearken unto My words which he shall speak in My name, I will require it of him.

searchText: deuteronomy 18:20 but the prophet, that shall speak a word presumptuously in my name, which i have not commanded him to speak, or that shall speak in the name of other gods, that same prophet shall die.’
english: But the prophet, that shall speak a word presumptuously in My name, which I have not commanded him to speak, or that shall speak in the name of other gods, that same prophet shall die.’

searchText: deuteronomy 18:21 and if thou say in thy heart: ‘how shall we know the word which the lord hath not spoken?’
english: And if thou say in thy heart: ‘How shall we know the word which the LORD hath not spoken?’

searchText: deuteronomy 18:22 when a prophet speaketh in the name of the lord, if the thing follow not, nor come to pass, that is the thing which the lord hath not spoken; the prophet hath spoken it presumptuously, thou shalt not be afraid of him.
english: When a prophet speaketh in the name of the LORD, if the thing follow not, nor come to pass, that is the thing which the LORD hath not spoken; the prophet hath spoken it presumptuously, thou shalt not be afraid of him.

searchText: deuteronomy 19:1 when the lord thy god shall cut off the nations, whose land the lord thy god giveth thee, and thou dost succeed them, and dwell in their cities, and in their houses;
english: When the LORD thy God shall cut off the nations, whose land the LORD thy God giveth thee, and thou dost succeed them, and dwell in their cities, and in their houses;

searchText: deuteronomy 19:2 thou shalt separate three cities for thee in the midst of thy land, which the lord thy god giveth thee to possess it.
english: thou shalt separate three cities for thee in the midst of thy land, which the LORD thy GOD giveth thee to possess it.

searchText: deuteronomy 19:3 thou shalt prepare thee the way, and divide the borders of thy land, which the lord thy god causeth thee to inherit, into three parts, that every manslayer may flee thither.
english: Thou shalt prepare thee the way, and divide the borders of thy land, which the LORD thy God causeth thee to inherit, into three parts, that every manslayer may flee thither.

searchText: deuteronomy 19:4 and this is the case of the manslayer, that shall flee thither and live: whoso killeth his neighbour unawares, and hated him not in time past;
english: And this is the case of the manslayer, that shall flee thither and live: whoso killeth his neighbour unawares, and hated him not in time past;

searchText: deuteronomy 19:5 as when a man goeth into the forest with his neighbour to hew wood, and his hand fetcheth a stroke with the axe to cut down the tree, and the head slippeth from the helve, and lighteth upon his neighbour, that he die; he shall flee unto one of these cities and live;
english: as when a man goeth into the forest with his neighbour to hew wood, and his hand fetcheth a stroke with the axe to cut down the tree, and the head slippeth from the helve, and lighteth upon his neighbour, that he die; he shall flee unto one of these cities and live;

searchText: deuteronomy 19:6 lest the avenger of blood pursue the manslayer, while his heart is hot, and overtake him, because the way is long, and smite him mortally; whereas he was not deserving of death, inasmuch as he hated him not in time past.
english: lest the avenger of blood pursue the manslayer, while his heart is hot, and overtake him, because the way is long, and smite him mortally; whereas he was not deserving of death, inasmuch as he hated him not in time past.

searchText: deuteronomy 19:7 wherefore i command thee, saying: ‘thou shalt separate three cities for thee.’
english: Wherefore I command thee, saying: ‘Thou shalt separate three cities for thee.’

searchText: deuteronomy 19:8 and if the lord thy god enlarge thy border, as he hath sworn unto thy fathers, and give thee all the land which he promised to give unto thy fathers—
english: And if the LORD thy God enlarge thy border, as He hath sworn unto thy fathers, and give thee all the land which He promised to give unto thy fathers—

searchText: deuteronomy 19:9 if thou shalt keep all this commandment to do it, which i command thee this day, to love the lord thy god, and to walk ever in his ways—then shalt thou add three cities more for thee, beside these three;
english: if thou shalt keep all this commandment to do it, which I command thee this day, to love the LORD thy God, and to walk ever in His ways—then shalt thou add three cities more for thee, beside these three;

searchText: deuteronomy 19:10 that innocent blood be not shed in the midst of thy land, which the lord thy god giveth thee for an inheritance, and so blood be upon thee.
english: that innocent blood be not shed in the midst of thy land, which the LORD thy God giveth thee for an inheritance, and so blood be upon thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 19:11 but if any man hate his neighbour, and lie in wait for him, and rise up against him, and smite him mortally that he die; and he flee into one of these cities;
english: But if any man hate his neighbour, and lie in wait for him, and rise up against him, and smite him mortally that he die; and he flee into one of these cities;

searchText: deuteronomy 19:12 then the elders of his city shall send and fetch him thence, and deliver him into the hand of the avenger of blood, that he may die.
english: then the elders of his city shall send and fetch him thence, and deliver him into the hand of the avenger of blood, that he may die.

searchText: deuteronomy 19:13 thine eye shall not pity him, but thou shalt put away the blood of the innocent from israel, that it may go well with thee.
english: Thine eye shall not pity him, but thou shalt put away the blood of the innocent from Israel, that it may go well with thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 19:14 thou shalt not remove thy neighbour’s landmark, which they of old time have set, in thine inheritance which thou shalt inherit, in the land that the lord thy god giveth thee to possess it.
english: Thou shalt not remove thy neighbour’s landmark, which they of old time have set, in thine inheritance which thou shalt inherit, in the land that the LORD thy God giveth thee to possess it.

searchText: deuteronomy 19:15 one witness shall not rise up against a man for any iniquity, or for any sin, in any sin that he sinneth; at the mouth of two witnesses, or at the mouth of three witnesses, shall a matter be established.
english: One witness shall not rise up against a man for any iniquity, or for any sin, in any sin that he sinneth; at the mouth of two witnesses, or at the mouth of three witnesses, shall a matter be established.

searchText: deuteronomy 19:16 if an unrighteous witness rise up against any man to bear perverted witness against him;
english: If an unrighteous witness rise up against any man to bear perverted witness against him;

searchText: deuteronomy 19:17 then both the men, between whom the controversy is, shall stand before the lord, before the priests and the judges that shall be in those days.
english: then both the men, between whom the controversy is, shall stand before the LORD, before the priests and the judges that shall be in those days.

searchText: deuteronomy 19:18 and the judges shall inquire diligently; and, behold, if the witness be a false witness, and hath testified falsely against his brother;
english: And the judges shall inquire diligently; and, behold, if the witness be a false witness, and hath testified falsely against his brother;

searchText: deuteronomy 19:19 then shall ye do unto him, as he had purposed to do unto his brother; so shalt thou put away the evil from the midst of thee.
english: then shall ye do unto him, as he had purposed to do unto his brother; so shalt thou put away the evil from the midst of thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 19:20 and those that remain shall hear, and fear, and shall henceforth commit no more any such evil in the midst of thee.
english: And those that remain shall hear, and fear, and shall henceforth commit no more any such evil in the midst of thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 19:21 and thine eye shall not pity: life for life, eye for eye, tooth for tooth, hand for hand, foot for foot.
english: And thine eye shall not pity: life for life, eye for eye, tooth for tooth, hand for hand, foot for foot.

searchText: deuteronomy 20:1 when thou goest forth to battle against thine enemies, and seest horses, and chariots, and a people more than thou, thou shalt not be afraid of them; for the lord thy god is with thee, who brought thee up out of the land of egypt.
english: When thou goest forth to battle against thine enemies, and seest horses, and chariots, and a people more than thou, thou shalt not be afraid of them; for the LORD thy God is with thee, who brought thee up out of the land of Egypt.

searchText: deuteronomy 20:2 and it shall be, when ye draw nigh unto the battle, that the priest shall approach and speak unto the people,
english: And it shall be, when ye draw nigh unto the battle, that the priest shall approach and speak unto the people,

searchText: deuteronomy 20:3 and shall say unto them: ‘hear, o israel, ye draw nigh this day unto battle against your enemies; let not your heart faint; fear not, nor be alarmed, neither be ye affrighted at them;
