english: And he shall eat the fruit of thy cattle, and the fruit of thy ground, until thou be destroyed; that also shall not leave thee corn, wine, or oil, the increase of thy kine, or the young of thy flock, until he have caused thee to perish.

searchText: deuteronomy 28:52 and he shall besiege thee in all thy gates, until thy high and fortified walls come down, wherein thou didst trust, throughout all thy land; and he shall besiege thee in all thy gates throughout all thy land, which the lord thy god hath given thee.
english: And he shall besiege thee in all thy gates, until thy high and fortified walls come down, wherein thou didst trust, throughout all thy land; and he shall besiege thee in all thy gates throughout all thy land, which the LORD thy God hath given thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 28:53 and thou shalt eat the fruit of thine own body, the flesh of thy sons and of thy daughters whom the lord thy god hath given thee; in the siege and in the straitness, wherewith thine enemies shall straiten thee.
english: And thou shalt eat the fruit of thine own body, the flesh of thy sons and of thy daughters whom the LORD thy God hath given thee; in the siege and in the straitness, wherewith thine enemies shall straiten thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 28:54 the man that is tender among you, and very delicate, his eye shall be evil against his brother, and against the wife of his bosom, and against the remnant of his children whom he hath remaining;
english: The man that is tender among you, and very delicate, his eye shall be evil against his brother, and against the wife of his bosom, and against the remnant of his children whom he hath remaining;

searchText: deuteronomy 28:55 so that he will not give to any of them of the flesh of his children whom he shall eat, because he hath nothing left him; in the siege and in the straitness, wherewith thine enemy shall straiten thee in all thy gates.
english: so that he will not give to any of them of the flesh of his children whom he shall eat, because he hath nothing left him; in the siege and in the straitness, wherewith thine enemy shall straiten thee in all thy gates.

searchText: deuteronomy 28:56 the tender and delicate woman among you, who would not adventure to set the sole of her foot upon the ground for delicateness and tenderness, her eye shall be evil against the husband of her bosom, and against her son, and against her daughter;
english: The tender and delicate woman among you, who would not adventure to set the sole of her foot upon the ground for delicateness and tenderness, her eye shall be evil against the husband of her bosom, and against her son, and against her daughter;

searchText: deuteronomy 28:57 and against her afterbirth that cometh out from between her feet, and against her children whom she shall bear; for she shall eat them for want of all things secretly; in the siege and in the straitness, wherewith thine enemy shall straiten thee in thy gates.
english: and against her afterbirth that cometh out from between her feet, and against her children whom she shall bear; for she shall eat them for want of all things secretly; in the siege and in the straitness, wherewith thine enemy shall straiten thee in thy gates.

searchText: deuteronomy 28:58 if thou wilt not observe to do all the words of this law that are written in this book, that thou mayest fear this glorious and awful name, the lord thy god;
english: If thou wilt not observe to do all the words of this law that are written in this book, that thou mayest fear this glorious and awful Name, the LORD thy God;

searchText: deuteronomy 28:59 then the lord will make thy plagues wonderful, and the plagues of thy seed, even great plagues, and of long continuance, and sore sicknesses, and of long continuance.
english: then the LORD will make thy plagues wonderful, and the plagues of thy seed, even great plagues, and of long continuance, and sore sicknesses, and of long continuance.

searchText: deuteronomy 28:60 and he will bring back upon thee all the diseases of egypt, which thou wast in dread of; and they shall cleave unto thee.
english: And He will bring back upon thee all the diseases of Egypt, which thou wast in dread of; and they shall cleave unto thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 28:61 also every sickness, and every plague, which is not written in the book of this law, them will the lord bring upon thee, until thou be destroyed.
english: Also every sickness, and every plague, which is not written in the book of this law, them will the LORD bring upon thee, until thou be destroyed.

searchText: deuteronomy 28:62 and ye shall be left few in number, whereas ye were as the stars of heaven for multitude; because thou didst not hearken unto the voice of the lord thy god.
english: And ye shall be left few in number, whereas ye were as the stars of heaven for multitude; because thou didst not hearken unto the voice of the LORD thy God.

searchText: deuteronomy 28:63 and it shall come to pass, that as the lord rejoiced over you to do you good, and to multiply you; so the lord will rejoice over you to cause you to perish, and to destroy you; and ye shall be plucked from off the land whither thou goest in to possess it.
english: And it shall come to pass, that as the LORD rejoiced over you to do you good, and to multiply you; so the LORD will rejoice over you to cause you to perish, and to destroy you; and ye shall be plucked from off the land whither thou goest in to possess it.

searchText: deuteronomy 28:64 and the lord shall scatter thee among all peoples, from the one end of the earth even unto the other end of the earth; and there thou shalt serve other gods, which thou hast not known, thou nor thy fathers, even wood and stone.
english: And the LORD shall scatter thee among all peoples, from the one end of the earth even unto the other end of the earth; and there thou shalt serve other gods, which thou hast not known, thou nor thy fathers, even wood and stone.

searchText: deuteronomy 28:65 and among these nations shalt thou have no repose, and there shall be no rest for the sole of thy foot; but the lord shall give thee there a trembling heart, and failing of eyes, and languishing of soul.
english: And among these nations shalt thou have no repose, and there shall be no rest for the sole of thy foot; but the LORD shall give thee there a trembling heart, and failing of eyes, and languishing of soul.

searchText: deuteronomy 28:66 and thy life shall hang in doubt before thee; and thou shalt fear night and day, and shalt have no assurance of thy life.
english: And thy life shall hang in doubt before thee; and thou shalt fear night and day, and shalt have no assurance of thy life.

searchText: deuteronomy 28:67 in the morning thou shalt say: ‘would it were even! ’ and at even thou shalt say: ‘would it were morning! ’ for the fear of thy heart which thou shalt fear, and for the sight of thine eyes which thou shalt see.
english: In the morning thou shalt say: ‘Would it were even! ’ and at even thou shalt say: ‘Would it were morning! ’ for the fear of thy heart which thou shalt fear, and for the sight of thine eyes which thou shalt see.

searchText: deuteronomy 28:68 and the lord shall bring thee back into egypt in ships, by the way whereof i said unto thee: ‘thou shalt see it no more again’; and there ye shall sell yourselves unto your enemies for bondmen and for bondwoman, and no man shall buy you.
english: And the LORD shall bring thee back into Egypt in ships, by the way whereof I said unto thee: ‘Thou shalt see it no more again’; and there ye shall sell yourselves unto your enemies for bondmen and for bondwoman, and no man shall buy you.

searchText: deuteronomy 28:69 these are the words of the covenant which the lord commanded moses to make with the children of israel in the land of moab, beside the covenant which he made with them in horeb.
english: These are the words of the covenant which the LORD commanded Moses to make with the children of Israel in the land of Moab, beside the covenant which He made with them in Horeb.

searchText: deuteronomy 29:1 and moses called unto all israel, and said unto them: ye have seen all that the lord did before your eyes in the land of egypt unto pharaoh, and unto all his servants, and unto all his land;
english: And Moses called unto all Israel, and said unto them: Ye have seen all that the LORD did before your eyes in the land of Egypt unto Pharaoh, and unto all his servants, and unto all his land;

searchText: deuteronomy 29:2 the great trials which thine eyes saw, the signs and those great wonders;
english: the great trials which thine eyes saw, the signs and those great wonders;

searchText: deuteronomy 29:3 but the lord hath not given you a heart to know, and eyes to see, and ears to hear, unto this day.
english: but the LORD hath not given you a heart to know, and eyes to see, and ears to hear, unto this day.

searchText: deuteronomy 29:4 and i have led you forty years in the wilderness; your clothes are not waxen old upon you, and thy shoe is not waxen old upon thy foot.
english: And I have led you forty years in the wilderness; your clothes are not waxen old upon you, and thy shoe is not waxen old upon thy foot.

searchText: deuteronomy 29:5 ye have not eaten bread, neither have ye drunk wine or strong drink; that ye might know that i am the lord your god.
english: Ye have not eaten bread, neither have ye drunk wine or strong drink; that ye might know that I am the LORD your God.

searchText: deuteronomy 29:6 and when ye came unto this place, sihon the king of heshbon, and og the king of bashan, came out against us unto battle, and we smote them.
english: And when ye came unto this place, Sihon the king of Heshbon, and Og the king of Bashan, came out against us unto battle, and we smote them.

searchText: deuteronomy 29:7 and we took their land, and gave it for an inheritance unto the reubenites, and to the gadites, and to the half-tribe of the manassites.
english: And we took their land, and gave it for an inheritance unto the Reubenites, and to the Gadites, and to the half-tribe of the Manassites.

searchText: deuteronomy 29:8 observe therefore the words of this covenant, and do them, that ye may make all that ye do to prosper.
english: Observe therefore the words of this covenant, and do them, that ye may make all that ye do to prosper.

searchText: deuteronomy 29:9 ye are standing this day all of you before the lord your god: your heads, your tribes, your elders, and your officers, even all the men of israel,
english: Ye are standing this day all of you before the LORD your God: your heads, your tribes, your elders, and your officers, even all the men of Israel,

searchText: deuteronomy 29:10 your little ones, your wives, and thy stranger that is in the midst of thy camp, from the hewer of thy wood unto the drawer of thy water;
english: your little ones, your wives, and thy stranger that is in the midst of thy camp, from the hewer of thy wood unto the drawer of thy water;

searchText: deuteronomy 29:11 that thou shouldest enter into the covenant of the lord thy god—and into his oath—which the lord thy god maketh with thee this day;
english: that thou shouldest enter into the covenant of the LORD thy God—and into His oath—which the LORD thy God maketh with thee this day;

searchText: deuteronomy 29:12 that he may establish thee this day unto himself for a people, and that he may be unto thee a god, as he spoke unto thee, and as he swore unto thy fathers, to abraham, to isaac, and to jacob.
english: that He may establish thee this day unto Himself for a people, and that He may be unto thee a God, as He spoke unto thee, and as He swore unto thy fathers, to Abraham, to Isaac, and to Jacob.

searchText: deuteronomy 29:13 neither with you only do i make this covenant and this oath;
english: Neither with you only do I make this covenant and this oath;

searchText: deuteronomy 29:14 but with him that standeth here with us this day before the lord our god, and also with him that is not here with us this day—
english: but with him that standeth here with us this day before the LORD our God, and also with him that is not here with us this day—

searchText: deuteronomy 29:15 for ye know how we dwelt in the land of egypt; and how we came through the midst of the nations through which ye passed;
english: for ye know how we dwelt in the land of Egypt; and how we came through the midst of the nations through which ye passed;

searchText: deuteronomy 29:16 and ye have seen their detestable things, and their idols, wood and stone, silver and gold, which were with them—
english: and ye have seen their detestable things, and their idols, wood and stone, silver and gold, which were with them—

searchText: deuteronomy 29:17 lest there should be among you man, or woman, or family, or tribe, whose heart turneth away this day from the lord our god, to go to serve the gods of those nations; lest there should be among you a root that beareth gall and wormwood;
english: lest there should be among you man, or woman, or family, or tribe, whose heart turneth away this day from the LORD our God, to go to serve the gods of those nations; lest there should be among you a root that beareth gall and wormwood;

searchText: deuteronomy 29:18 and it come to pass, when he heareth the words of this curse, that he bless himself in his heart, saying: ‘i shall have peace, though i walk in the stubbornness of my heart—that the watered be swept away with the dry’;
english: and it come to pass, when he heareth the words of this curse, that he bless himself in his heart, saying: ‘I shall have peace, though I walk in the stubbornness of my heart—that the watered be swept away with the dry’;

searchText: deuteronomy 29:19 the lord will not be willing to pardon him, but then the anger of the lord and his jealousy shall be kindled against that man, and all the curse that is written in this book shall lie upon him, and the lord shall blot out his name from under heaven;
english: the LORD will not be willing to pardon him, but then the anger of the LORD and His jealousy shall be kindled against that man, and all the curse that is written in this book shall lie upon him, and the LORD shall blot out his name from under heaven;

searchText: deuteronomy 29:20 and the lord shall separate him unto evil out of all the tribes of israel, according to all the curses of the covenant that is written in this book of the law.
english: and the LORD shall separate him unto evil out of all the tribes of Israel, according to all the curses of the covenant that is written in this book of the law.

searchText: deuteronomy 29:21 and the generation to come, your children that shall rise up after you, and the foreigner that shall come from a far land, shall say, when they see the plagues of that land, and the sicknesses wherewith the lord hath made it sick;
english: And the generation to come, your children that shall rise up after you, and the foreigner that shall come from a far land, shall say, when they see the plagues of that land, and the sicknesses wherewith the LORD hath made it sick;

searchText: deuteronomy 29:22 and that the whole land thereof is brimstone, and salt, and a burning, that it is not sown, nor beareth, nor any grass groweth therein, like the overthrow of sodom and gomorrah, admah and zeboiim, which the lord overthrew in his anger, and in his wrath;
english: and that the whole land thereof is brimstone, and salt, and a burning, that it is not sown, nor beareth, nor any grass groweth therein, like the overthrow of Sodom and Gomorrah, Admah and Zeboiim, which the LORD overthrew in His anger, and in His wrath;

searchText: deuteronomy 29:23 even all the nations shall say ‘wherefore hath the lord done thus unto this land? what meaneth the heat of this great anger?’
english: even all the nations shall say ‘Wherefore hath the LORD done thus unto this land? what meaneth the heat of this great anger?’

searchText: deuteronomy 29:24 then men shall say: ‘because they forsook the covenant of the lord, the god of their fathers, which he made with them when he brought them forth out of the land of egypt;
english: then men shall say: ‘Because they forsook the covenant of the LORD, the God of their fathers, which He made with them when He brought them forth out of the land of Egypt;

searchText: deuteronomy 29:25 and went and served other gods, and worshipped them, gods that they knew not, and that he had not allotted unto them;
english: and went and served other gods, and worshipped them, gods that they knew not, and that He had not allotted unto them;

searchText: deuteronomy 29:26 therefore the anger of the lord was kindled against this land, to bring upon it all the curse that is written in this book;
english: therefore the anger of the LORD was kindled against this land, to bring upon it all the curse that is written in this book;

searchText: deuteronomy 29:27 and the lord rooted them out of their land in anger, and in wrath, and in great indignation, and cast them into another land, as it is this day’.—
english: and the LORD rooted them out of their land in anger, and in wrath, and in great indignation, and cast them into another land, as it is this day’.—

searchText: deuteronomy 29:28 the secret things belong unto the lord our god; but the things that are revealed belong unto us and to our children for ever, that we may do all the words of this law.
english: The secret things belong unto the LORD our God; but the things that are revealed belong unto us and to our children for ever, that we may do all the words of this law.

searchText: deuteronomy 30:1 and it shall come to pass, when all these things are come upon thee, the blessing and the curse, which i have set before thee, and thou shalt bethink thyself among all the nations, whither the lord thy god hath driven thee,
english: And it shall come to pass, when all these things are come upon thee, the blessing and the curse, which I have set before thee, and thou shalt bethink thyself among all the nations, whither the LORD thy God hath driven thee,

searchText: deuteronomy 30:2 and shalt return unto the lord thy god, and hearken to his voice according to all that i command thee this day, thou and thy children, with all thy heart, and with all thy soul;
english: and shalt return unto the LORD thy God, and hearken to His voice according to all that I command thee this day, thou and thy children, with all thy heart, and with all thy soul;

searchText: deuteronomy 30:3 that then the lord thy god will turn thy captivity, and have compassion upon thee, and will return and gather thee from all the peoples, whither the lord thy god hath scattered thee.
english: that then the LORD thy God will turn thy captivity, and have compassion upon thee, and will return and gather thee from all the peoples, whither the LORD thy God hath scattered thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 30:4 if any of thine that are dispersed be in the uttermost parts of heaven, from thence will the lord thy god gather thee, and from thence will he fetch thee.
english: If any of thine that are dispersed be in the uttermost parts of heaven, from thence will the LORD thy God gather thee, and from thence will He fetch thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 30:5 and the lord thy god will bring thee into the land which thy fathers possessed, and thou shalt possess it; and he will do thee good, and multiply thee above thy fathers. .
english: And the LORD thy God will bring thee into the land which thy fathers possessed, and thou shalt possess it; and He will do thee good, and multiply thee above thy fathers. .

searchText: deuteronomy 30:6 and the lord thy god will circumcise thy heart, and the heart of thy seed, to love the lord thy god with all thy heart, and with all thy soul, that thou mayest live.
english: And the LORD thy God will circumcise thy heart, and the heart of thy seed, to love the LORD thy God with all thy heart, and with all thy soul, that thou mayest live.

searchText: deuteronomy 30:7 and the lord thy god will put all these curses upon thine enemies, and on them that hate thee, that persecuted thee.
english: And the LORD thy God will put all these curses upon thine enemies, and on them that hate thee, that persecuted thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 30:8 and thou shalt return and hearken to the voice of the lord, and do all his commandments which i command thee this day.
english: And thou shalt return and hearken to the voice of the LORD, and do all His commandments which I command thee this day.

searchText: deuteronomy 30:9 and the lord thy god will make thee over-abundant in all the work of thy hand, in the fruit of thy body, and in the fruit of thy cattle, and in the fruit of thy land, for good; for the lord will again rejoice over thee for good, as he rejoiced over thy fathers;
english: And the LORD thy God will make thee over-abundant in all the work of thy hand, in the fruit of thy body, and in the fruit of thy cattle, and in the fruit of thy land, for good; for the LORD will again rejoice over thee for good, as He rejoiced over thy fathers;

searchText: deuteronomy 30:10 if thou shalt hearken to the voice of the lord thy god, to keep his commandments and his statutes which are written in this book of the law; if thou turn unto the lord thy god with all thy heart, and with all thy soul.
english: if thou shalt hearken to the voice of the LORD thy God, to keep His commandments and His statutes which are written in this book of the law; if thou turn unto the LORD thy God with all thy heart, and with all thy soul.

searchText: deuteronomy 30:11 for this commandment which i command thee this day, it is not too hard for thee, neither is it far off.
english: For this commandment which I command thee this day, it is not too hard for thee, neither is it far off.

searchText: deuteronomy 30:12 it is not in heaven, that thou shouldest say: ‘who shall go up for us to heaven, and bring it unto us, and make us to hear it, that we may do it?’
english: It is not in heaven, that thou shouldest say: ‘Who shall go up for us to heaven, and bring it unto us, and make us to hear it, that we may do it?’

searchText: deuteronomy 30:13 neither is it beyond the sea, that thou shouldest say: ‘who shall go over the sea for us, and bring it unto us, and make us to hear it, that we may do it?’
english: Neither is it beyond the sea, that thou shouldest say: ‘Who shall go over the sea for us, and bring it unto us, and make us to hear it, that we may do it?’

searchText: deuteronomy 30:14 but the word is very nigh unto thee, in thy mouth, and in thy heart, that thou mayest do it.
english: But the word is very nigh unto thee, in thy mouth, and in thy heart, that thou mayest do it.

searchText: deuteronomy 30:15 see, i have set before thee this day life and good, and death and evil,
english: See, I have set before thee this day life and good, and death and evil,

searchText: deuteronomy 30:16 in that i command thee this day to love the lord thy god, to walk in his ways, and to keep his commandments and his statutes and his ordinances; then thou shalt live and multiply, and the lord thy god shall bless thee in the land whither thou goest in to possess it.
english: in that I command thee this day to love the LORD thy God, to walk in His ways, and to keep His commandments and His statutes and His ordinances; then thou shalt live and multiply, and the LORD thy God shall bless thee in the land whither thou goest in to possess it.

searchText: deuteronomy 30:17 but if thy heart turn away, and thou wilt not hear, but shalt be drawn away, and worship other gods, and serve them;
english: But if thy heart turn away, and thou wilt not hear, but shalt be drawn away, and worship other gods, and serve them;

searchText: deuteronomy 30:18 i declare unto you this day, that ye shall surely perish; ye shall not prolong your days upon the land, whither thou passest over the jordan to go in to possess it.
english: I declare unto you this day, that ye shall surely perish; ye shall not prolong your days upon the land, whither thou passest over the Jordan to go in to possess it.

searchText: deuteronomy 30:19 i call heaven and earth to witness against you this day, that i have set before thee life and death, the blessing and the curse; therefore choose life, that thou mayest live, thou and thy seed;
english: I call heaven and earth to witness against you this day, that I have set before thee life and death, the blessing and the curse; therefore choose life, that thou mayest live, thou and thy seed;

searchText: deuteronomy 30:20 to love the lord thy god, to hearken to his voice, and to cleave unto him; for that is thy life, and the length of thy days; that thou mayest dwell in the land which the lord swore unto thy fathers, to abraham, to isaac, and to jacob, to give them.
english: to love the LORD thy God, to hearken to His voice, and to cleave unto Him; for that is thy life, and the length of thy days; that thou mayest dwell in the land which the LORD swore unto thy fathers, to Abraham, to Isaac, and to Jacob, to give them.

searchText: deuteronomy 31:1 and moses went and spoke these words unto all israel.
english: And Moses went and spoke these words unto all Israel.

searchText: deuteronomy 31:2 and he said unto them: ‘i am a hundred and twenty years old this day; i can no more go out and come in; and the lord hath said unto me: thou shalt not go over this jordan.
english: And he said unto them: ‘I am a hundred and twenty years old this day; I can no more go out and come in; and the LORD hath said unto me: Thou shalt not go over this Jordan.

searchText: deuteronomy 31:3 the lord thy god, he will go over before thee; he will destroy these nations from before thee, and thou shalt dispossess them; and joshua, he shall go over before thee, as the lord hath spoken.
english: The LORD thy God, He will go over before thee; He will destroy these nations from before thee, and thou shalt dispossess them; and Joshua, he shall go over before thee, as the LORD hath spoken.

searchText: deuteronomy 31:4 and the lord will do unto them as he did to sihon and to og, the kings of the amorites, and unto their land; whom he destroyed.
english: And the LORD will do unto them as He did to Sihon and to Og, the kings of the Amorites, and unto their land; whom He destroyed.

searchText: deuteronomy 31:5 and the lord will deliver them up before you, and ye shall do unto them according unto all the commandment which i have commanded you.
english: And the LORD will deliver them up before you, and ye shall do unto them according unto all the commandment which I have commanded you.

searchText: deuteronomy 31:6 be strong and of good courage, fear not, nor be affrighted at them; for the lord thy god, he it is that doth go with thee; he will not fail thee, nor forsake thee.’
english: Be strong and of good courage, fear not, nor be affrighted at them; for the LORD thy God, He it is that doth go with thee; He will not fail thee, nor forsake thee.’

searchText: deuteronomy 31:7 and moses called unto joshua, and said unto him in the sight of all israel: ‘be strong and of good courage; for thou shalt go with this people into the land which the lord hath sworn unto their fathers to give them; and thou shalt cause them to inherit it.
english: And Moses called unto Joshua, and said unto him in the sight of all Israel: ‘Be strong and of good courage; for thou shalt go with this people into the land which the LORD hath sworn unto their fathers to give them; and thou shalt cause them to inherit it.

searchText: deuteronomy 31:8 and the lord, he it is that doth go before thee; he will be with thee, he will not fail thee, neither forsake thee; fear not, neither be dismayed.’
english: And the LORD, He it is that doth go before thee; He will be with thee, He will not fail thee, neither forsake thee; fear not, neither be dismayed.’

searchText: deuteronomy 31:9 and moses wrote this law, and delivered it unto the priests the sons of levi, that bore the ark of the covenant of the lord, and unto all the elders of israel.
english: And Moses wrote this law, and delivered it unto the priests the sons of Levi, that bore the ark of the covenant of the LORD, and unto all the elders of Israel.

searchText: deuteronomy 31:10 and moses commanded them, saying: ‘at the end of every seven years, in the set time of the year of release, in the feast of tabernacles,
english: And Moses commanded them, saying: ‘At the end of every seven years, in the set time of the year of release, in the feast of tabernacles,

searchText: deuteronomy 31:11 when all israel is come to appear before the lord thy god in the place which he shall choose, thou shalt read this law before all israel in their hearing.
english: when all Israel is come to appear before the LORD thy God in the place which He shall choose, thou shalt read this law before all Israel in their hearing.

searchText: deuteronomy 31:12 assemble the people, the men and the women and the little ones, and thy stranger that is within thy gates, that they may hear, and that they may learn, and fear the lord your god, and observe to do all the words of this law;
english: Assemble the people, the men and the women and the little ones, and thy stranger that is within thy gates, that they may hear, and that they may learn, and fear the LORD your God, and observe to do all the words of this law;

searchText: deuteronomy 31:13 and that their children, who have not known, may hear, and learn to fear the lord your god, as long as ye live in the land whither ye go over the jordan to possess it.’
english: and that their children, who have not known, may hear, and learn to fear the LORD your God, as long as ye live in the land whither ye go over the Jordan to possess it.’

searchText: deuteronomy 31:14 and the lord said unto moses: ‘behold, thy days approach that thou must die; call joshua, and present yourselves in the tent of meeting, that i may give him a charge.’ and moses and joshua went, and presented themselves in the tent of meeting.
english: And the LORD said unto Moses: ‘Behold, thy days approach that thou must die; call Joshua, and present yourselves in the tent of meeting, that I may give him a charge.’ And Moses and Joshua went, and presented themselves in the tent of meeting.

searchText: deuteronomy 31:15 and the lord appeared in the tent in a pillar of cloud; and the pillar of cloud stood over the door of the tent.
english: And the LORD appeared in the Tent in a pillar of cloud; and the pillar of cloud stood over the door of the Tent.

searchText: deuteronomy 31:16 and the lord said unto moses: ‘behold, thou art about to sleep with thy fathers; and this people will rise up, and go astray after the foreign gods of the land, whither they go to be among them, and will forsake me, and break my covenant which i have made with them.
english: And the LORD said unto Moses: ‘Behold, thou art about to sleep with thy fathers; and this people will rise up, and go astray after the foreign gods of the land, whither they go to be among them, and will forsake Me, and break My covenant which I have made with them.

searchText: deuteronomy 31:17 then my anger shall be kindled against them in that day, and i will forsake them, and i will hide my face from them, and they shall be devoured, and many evils and troubles shall come upon them; so that they will say in that day: are not these evils come upon us because our god is not among us?
english: Then My anger shall be kindled against them in that day, and I will forsake them, and I will hide My face from them, and they shall be devoured, and many evils and troubles shall come upon them; so that they will say in that day: Are not these evils come upon us because our God is not among us?

searchText: deuteronomy 31:18 and i will surely hide my face in that day for all the evil which they shall have wrought, in that they are turned unto other gods.
english: And I will surely hide My face in that day for all the evil which they shall have wrought, in that they are turned unto other gods.

searchText: deuteronomy 31:19 now therefore write ye this song for you, and teach thou it the children of israel; put it in their mouths, that this song may be a witness for me against the children of israel.
english: Now therefore write ye this song for you, and teach thou it the children of Israel; put it in their mouths, that this song may be a witness for Me against the children of Israel.

searchText: deuteronomy 31:20 for when i shall have brought them into the land which i swore unto their fathers, flowing with milk and honey; and they shall have eaten their fill, and waxen fat; and turned unto other gods, and served them, and despised me, and broken my covenant;
english: For when I shall have brought them into the land which I swore unto their fathers, flowing with milk and honey; and they shall have eaten their fill, and waxen fat; and turned unto other gods, and served them, and despised Me, and broken My covenant;

searchText: deuteronomy 31:21 then it shall come to pass, when many evils and troubles are come upon them, that this song shall testify before them as a witness; for it shall not be forgotten out of the mouths of their seed; for i know their imagination how they do even now, before i have brought them into the land which i swore.’
english: then it shall come to pass, when many evils and troubles are come upon them, that this song shall testify before them as a witness; for it shall not be forgotten out of the mouths of their seed; for I know their imagination how they do even now, before I have brought them into the land which I swore.’

searchText: deuteronomy 31:22 so moses wrote this song the same day, and taught it the children of israel.
english: So Moses wrote this song the same day, and taught it the children of Israel.

searchText: deuteronomy 31:23 and he gave joshua the son of nun a charge, and said: ‘be strong and of good courage; for thou shalt bring the children of israel into the land which i swore unto them; and i will be with thee.’
english: And he gave Joshua the son of Nun a charge, and said: ‘Be strong and of good courage; for thou shalt bring the children of Israel into the land which I swore unto them; and I will be with thee.’

searchText: deuteronomy 31:24 and it came to pass, when moses had made an end of writing the words of this law in a book, until they were finished,
english: And it came to pass, when Moses had made an end of writing the words of this law in a book, until they were finished,

searchText: deuteronomy 31:25 that moses commanded the levites, that bore the ark of the covenant of the lord, saying:
english: that Moses commanded the Levites, that bore the ark of the covenant of the LORD, saying:

searchText: deuteronomy 31:26 ’take this book of the law, and put it by the side of the ark of the covenant of the lord your god, that it may be there for a witness against thee.
english: ’Take this book of the law, and put it by the side of the ark of the covenant of the LORD your God, that it may be there for a witness against thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 31:27 for i know thy rebellion, and thy stiff neck; behold, while i am yet alive with you this day, ye have been rebellious against the lord; and how much more after my death?
english: For I know thy rebellion, and thy stiff neck; behold, while I am yet alive with you this day, ye have been rebellious against the LORD; and how much more after my death?

searchText: deuteronomy 31:28 assemble unto me all the elders of your tribes, and your officers, that i may speak these words in their ears, and call heaven and earth to witness against them.
english: Assemble unto me all the elders of your tribes, and your officers, that I may speak these words in their ears, and call heaven and earth to witness against them.

searchText: deuteronomy 31:29 for i know that after my death ye will in any wise deal corruptly, and turn aside from the way which i have commanded you; and evil will befall you in the end of days; because ye will do that which is evil in the sight of the lord, to provoke him through the work of your hands.’
english: For I know that after my death ye will in any wise deal corruptly, and turn aside from the way which I have commanded you; and evil will befall you in the end of days; because ye will do that which is evil in the sight of the LORD, to provoke Him through the work of your hands.’

searchText: deuteronomy 31:30 and moses spoke in the ears of all the assembly of israel the words of this song, until they were finished:
english: And Moses spoke in the ears of all the assembly of Israel the words of this song, until they were finished:

searchText: deuteronomy 32:1 give ear, ye heavens, and i will speak; and let the earth hear the words of my mouth.
english: Give ear, ye heavens, and I will speak; And let the earth hear the words of my mouth.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:2 my doctrine shall drop as the rain, my speech shall distil as the dew; as the small rain upon the tender grass, and as the showers upon the herb.
english: My doctrine shall drop as the rain, My speech shall distil as the dew; As the small rain upon the tender grass, And as the showers upon the herb.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:3 for i will proclaim the name of the lord; ascribe ye greatness unto our god.
english: For I will proclaim the name of the LORD; Ascribe ye greatness unto our God.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:4 the rock, his work is perfect; for all his ways are justice; a god of faithfulness and without iniquity, just and right is he. .
english: The Rock, His work is perfect; For all His ways are justice; A God of faithfulness and without iniquity, Just and right is He. .

searchText: deuteronomy 32:5 is corruption his? no; his children’s is the blemish; a generation crooked and perverse.
english: Is corruption His? No; His children’s is the blemish; A generation crooked and perverse.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:6 do ye thus requite the lord, o foolish people and unwise? is not he thy father that hath gotten thee? hath he not made thee, and established thee?
english: Do ye thus requite the LORD, O foolish people and unwise? Is not He thy father that hath gotten thee? Hath He not made thee, and established thee?

searchText: deuteronomy 32:7 remember the days of old, consider the years of many generations; ask thy father, and he will declare unto thee, thine elders, and they will tell thee.
english: Remember the days of old, Consider the years of many generations; Ask thy father, and he will declare unto thee, Thine elders, and they will tell thee.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:8 when the most high gave to the nations their inheritance, when he separated the children of men, he set the borders of the peoples according to the number of the children of israel.
english: When the Most High gave to the nations their inheritance, when He separated the children of men, He set the borders of the peoples according to the number of the children of Israel.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:9 for the portion of the lord is his people, jacob the lot of his inheritance.
english: For the portion of the LORD is His people, Jacob the lot of His inheritance.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:10 he found him in a desert land, and in the waste, a howling wilderness; he compassed him about, he cared for him, he kept him as the apple of his eye.
english: He found him in a desert land, and in the waste, a howling wilderness; He compassed him about, He cared for him, He kept him as the apple of His eye.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:11 as an eagle that stirreth up her nest, hovereth over her young, spreadeth abroad her wings, taketh them, beareth them on her pinions—
english: As an eagle that stirreth up her nest, Hovereth over her young, Spreadeth abroad her wings, taketh them, Beareth them on her pinions—

searchText: deuteronomy 32:12 the lord alone did lead him, and there was no strange god with him.
english: The LORD alone did lead him, And there was no strange god with Him.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:13 he made him ride on the high places of the earth, and he did eat the fruitage of the field; and he made him to suck honey out of the crag, and oil out of the flinty rock;
english: He made him ride on the high places of the earth, And he did eat the fruitage of the field; And He made him to suck honey out of the crag, And oil out of the flinty rock;

searchText: deuteronomy 32:14 curd of kine, and milk of sheep, with fat of lambs, and rams of the breed of bashan, and he-goats, with the kidney-fat of wheat; and of the blood of the grape thou drankest foaming wine.
english: Curd of kine, and milk of sheep, With fat of lambs, And rams of the breed of Bashan, and he-goats, With the kidney-fat of wheat; And of the blood of the grape thou drankest foaming wine.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:15 but jeshurun waxed fat, and kicked— thou didst wax fat, thou didst grow thick, thou didst become gross— and he forsook god who made him, and contemned the rock of his salvation.
english: But Jeshurun waxed fat, and kicked— Thou didst wax fat, thou didst grow thick, thou didst become gross— And he forsook God who made him, And contemned the Rock of his salvation.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:16 they roused him to jealousy with strange gods, with abominations did they provoke him.
english: They roused Him to jealousy with strange gods, With abominations did they provoke Him.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:17 they sacrificed unto demons, no-gods, gods that they knew not, new gods that came up of late, which your fathers dreaded not.
english: They sacrificed unto demons, no-gods, Gods that they knew not, New gods that came up of late, Which your fathers dreaded not.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:18 of the rock that begot thee thou wast unmindful, and didst forget god that bore thee. .
english: Of the Rock that begot thee thou wast unmindful, And didst forget God that bore thee. .

searchText: deuteronomy 32:19 and the lord saw, and spurned, because of the provoking of his sons and his daughters.
english: And the LORD saw, and spurned, Because of the provoking of His sons and His daughters.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:20 and he said: ‘i will hide my face from them, i will see what their end shall be; for they are a very froward generation, children in whom is no faithfulness.
english: And He said: ‘I will hide My face from them, I will see what their end shall be; For they are a very froward generation, Children in whom is no faithfulness.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:21 they have roused me to jealousy with a no-god; they have provoked me with their vanities; and i will rouse them to jealousy with a no-people; i will provoke them with a vile nation.
english: They have roused Me to jealousy with a no-god; They have provoked Me with their vanities; And I will rouse them to jealousy with a no-people; I will provoke them with a vile nation.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:22 for a fire is kindled in my nostril, and burneth unto the depths of the nether-world, and devoureth the earth with her produce, and setteth ablaze the foundations of the mountains.
english: For a fire is kindled in My nostril, And burneth unto the depths of the nether-world, And devoureth the earth with her produce, And setteth ablaze the foundations of the mountains.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:23 i will heap evils upon them; i will spend mine arrows upon them;
english: I will heap evils upon them; I will spend Mine arrows upon them;

searchText: deuteronomy 32:24 the wasting of hunger, and the devouring of the fiery bolt, and bitter destruction; and the teeth of beasts will i send upon them, with the venom of crawling things of the dust.
english: The wasting of hunger, and the devouring of the fiery bolt, And bitter destruction; And the teeth of beasts will I send upon them, With the venom of crawling things of the dust.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:25 without shall the sword bereave, and in the chambers terror; slaying both young man and virgin, the suckling with the man of gray hairs.
english: Without shall the sword bereave, And in the chambers terror; Slaying both young man and virgin, The suckling with the man of gray hairs.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:26 i thought i would make an end of them, i would make their memory cease from among men;
english: I thought I would make an end of them, I would make their memory cease from among men;

searchText: deuteronomy 32:27 were it not that i dreaded the enemy’s provocation, lest their adversaries should misdeem, lest they should say: our hand is exalted, and not the lord hath wrought all this.’
english: Were it not that I dreaded the enemy’s provocation, Lest their adversaries should misdeem, Lest they should say: Our hand is exalted, And not the LORD hath wrought all this.’

searchText: deuteronomy 32:28 for they are a nation void of counsel, and there is no understanding in them.
english: For they are a nation void of counsel, And there is no understanding in them.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:29 if they were wise, they would understand this, they would discern their latter end.
english: If they were wise, they would understand this, They would discern their latter end.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:30 how should one chase a thousand, and two put ten thousand to flight, except their rock had given them over and the lord had delivered them up?
english: How should one chase a thousand, And two put ten thousand to flight, Except their Rock had given them over And the LORD had delivered them up?

searchText: deuteronomy 32:31 for their rock is not as our rock, even our enemies themselves being judges.
english: For their rock is not as our Rock, Even our enemies themselves being judges.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:32 for their vine is of the vine of sodom, and of the fields of gomorrah; their grapes are grapes of gall, their clusters are bitter;
english: For their vine is of the vine of Sodom, And of the fields of Gomorrah; Their grapes are grapes of gall, Their clusters are bitter;

searchText: deuteronomy 32:33 their wine is the venom of serpents, and the cruel poison of asps.
english: Their wine is the venom of serpents, And the cruel poison of asps.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:34 ’is not this laid up in store with me, sealed up in my treasuries?
english: ’Is not this laid up in store with Me, Sealed up in My treasuries?

searchText: deuteronomy 32:35 vengeance is mine, and recompense, against the time when their foot shall slip; for the day of their calamity is at hand, and the things that are to come upon them shall make haste.
english: Vengeance is Mine, and recompense, Against the time when their foot shall slip; For the day of their calamity is at hand, And the things that are to come upon them shall make haste.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:36 for the lord will judge his people, and repent himself for his servants; when he seeth that their stay is gone, and there is none remaining, shut up or left at large.
english: For the LORD will judge His people, And repent Himself for His servants; When He seeth that their stay is gone, And there is none remaining, shut up or left at large.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:37 and it is said: where are their gods, the rock in whom they trusted;
english: And it is said: Where are their gods, The rock in whom they trusted;

searchText: deuteronomy 32:38 who did eat the fat of their sacrifices, and drank the wine of their drink-offering? let him rise up and help you, let him be your protection.
english: Who did eat the fat of their sacrifices, and drank the wine of their drink-offering? Let him rise up and help you, Let him be your protection.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:39 see now that i, even i, am he, and there is no god with me; i kill, and i make alive; i have wounded, and i heal; and there is none that can deliver out of my hand.
english: See now that I, even I, am He, And there is no god with Me; I kill, and I make alive; I have wounded, and I heal; And there is none that can deliver out of My hand.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:40 for i lift up my hand to heaven, and say: as i live for ever,
english: For I lift up My hand to heaven, And say: As I live for ever,

searchText: deuteronomy 32:41 if i whet my glittering sword, and my hand take hold on judgment; i will render vengeance to mine adversaries, and will recompense them that hate me.
english: If I whet My glittering sword, And My hand take hold on judgment; I will render vengeance to Mine adversaries, And will recompense them that hate Me.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:42 i will make mine arrows drunk with blood, and my sword shall devour flesh; with the blood of the slain and the captives, from the long-haired heads of the enemy.’
english: I will make Mine arrows drunk with blood, And My sword shall devour flesh; With the blood of the slain and the captives, From the long-haired heads of the enemy.’

searchText: deuteronomy 32:43 sing aloud, o ye nations, of his people; for he doth avenge the blood of his servants, and doth render vengeance to his adversaries, and doth make expiation for the land of his people.
english: Sing aloud, O ye nations, of His people; For He doth avenge the blood of His servants, And doth render vengeance to His adversaries, And doth make expiation for the land of His people.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:44 and moses came and spoke all the words of this song in the ears of the people, he, and hoshea the son of nun.
english: And Moses came and spoke all the words of this song in the ears of the people, he, and Hoshea the son of Nun.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:45 and when moses made an end of speaking all these words to all israel,
english: And when Moses made an end of speaking all these words to all Israel,

searchText: deuteronomy 32:46 he said unto them: ‘set your heart unto all the words wherewith i testify against you this day; that ye may charge your children therewith to observe to do all the words of this law.
english: he said unto them: ‘Set your heart unto all the words wherewith I testify against you this day; that ye may charge your children therewith to observe to do all the words of this law.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:47 for it is no vain thing for you; because it is your life, and through this thing ye shall prolong your days upon the land, whither ye go over the jordan to possess it.’
english: For it is no vain thing for you; because it is your life, and through this thing ye shall prolong your days upon the land, whither ye go over the Jordan to possess it.’

searchText: deuteronomy 32:48 and the lord spoke unto moses that selfsame day, saying:
english: And the LORD spoke unto Moses that selfsame day, saying:

searchText: deuteronomy 32:49 ’get thee up into this mountain of abarim, unto mount nebo, which is in the land of moab, that is over against jericho; and behold the land of canaan, which i give unto the children of israel for a possession;
english: ’Get thee up into this mountain of Abarim, unto mount Nebo, which is in the land of Moab, that is over against Jericho; and behold the land of Canaan, which I give unto the children of Israel for a possession;

searchText: deuteronomy 32:50 and die in the mount whither thou goest up, and be gathered unto thy people; as aaron thy brother died in mount hor, and was gathered unto his people.
english: and die in the mount whither thou goest up, and be gathered unto thy people; as Aaron thy brother died in mount Hor, and was gathered unto his people.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:51 because ye trespassed against me in the midst of the children of israel at the waters of meribath-kadesh, in the wilderness of zin; because ye sanctified me not in the midst of the children of israel.
english: Because ye trespassed against Me in the midst of the children of Israel at the waters of Meribath-kadesh, in the wilderness of Zin; because ye sanctified Me not in the midst of the children of Israel.

searchText: deuteronomy 32:52 for thou shalt see the land afar off; but thou shalt not go thither into the land which i give the children of israel.’
english: For thou shalt see the land afar off; but thou shalt not go thither into the land which I give the children of Israel.’

searchText: deuteronomy 33:1 and this is the blessing wherewith moses the man of god blessed the children of israel before his death.
english: And this is the blessing wherewith Moses the man of God blessed the children of Israel before his death.

searchText: deuteronomy 33:2 and he said: the lord came from sinai, and rose from seir unto them; he shined forth from mount paran, and he came from the myriads holy, at his right hand was a fiery law unto them.
english: And he said: The LORD came from Sinai, And rose from Seir unto them; He shined forth from mount Paran, And He came from the myriads holy, At His right hand was a fiery law unto them.

searchText: deuteronomy 33:3 yea, he loveth the peoples, all his holy ones—they are in thy hand; and they sit down at thy feet, receiving of thy words.
english: Yea, He loveth the peoples, All His holy ones—they are in Thy hand; And they sit down at Thy feet, Receiving of Thy words.

searchText: deuteronomy 33:4 moses commanded us a law, an inheritance of the congregation of jacob.
english: Moses commanded us a law, An inheritance of the congregation of Jacob.

searchText: deuteronomy 33:5 and there was a king in jeshurun, when the heads of the people were gathered, all the tribes of israel together.
english: And there was a king in Jeshurun, When the heads of the people were gathered, All the tribes of Israel together.

searchText: deuteronomy 33:6 let reuben live, and not die in that his men become few.
english: Let Reuben live, and not die In that his men become few.

searchText: deuteronomy 33:7 and this for judah, and he said: hear, lord, the voice of judah, and bring him in unto his people; his hands shall contend for him, and thou shalt be a help against his adversaries.
english: And this for Judah, and he said: Hear, LORD, the voice of Judah, And bring him in unto his people; His hands shall contend for him, And Thou shalt be a help against his adversaries.

searchText: deuteronomy 33:8 and of levi he said: thy thummim and thy urim be with thy holy one, whom thou didst prove at massah, with whom thou didst strive at the waters of meribah;
english: And of Levi he said: Thy Thummim and Thy Urim be with Thy holy one, Whom Thou didst prove at Massah, With whom Thou didst strive at the waters of Meribah;

searchText: deuteronomy 33:9 who said of his father, and of his mother: ‘i have not seen him’; neither did he acknowledge his brethren, nor knew he his own children; for they have observed thy word, and keep thy covenant.
english: Who said of his father, and of his mother: ‘I have not seen him’; Neither did he acknowledge his brethren, Nor knew he his own children; For they have observed Thy word, And keep Thy covenant.

searchText: deuteronomy 33:10 they shall teach jacob thine ordinances, and israel thy law; they shall put incense before thee, and whole burnt-offering upon thine altar. .
english: They shall teach Jacob Thine ordinances, And Israel Thy law; They shall put incense before Thee, And whole burnt-offering upon Thine altar. .

searchText: deuteronomy 33:11 bless, lord, his substance, and accept the work of his hands; smite through the loins of them that rise up against him, and of them that hate him, that they rise not again.
english: Bless, LORD, his substance, And accept the work of his hands; Smite through the loins of them that rise up against him, And of them that hate him, that they rise not again.

searchText: deuteronomy 33:12 of benjamin he said: the beloved of the lord shall dwell in safety by him; he covereth him all the day, and he dwelleth between his shoulders.
english: Of Benjamin he said: The beloved of the LORD shall dwell in safety by Him; He covereth him all the day, And He dwelleth between his shoulders.

searchText: deuteronomy 33:13 and of joseph he said: blessed of the lord be his land; for the precious things of heaven, for the dew, and for the deep that coucheth beneath,
english: And of Joseph he said: Blessed of the LORD be his land; For the precious things of heaven, for the dew, And for the deep that coucheth beneath,

searchText: deuteronomy 33:14 and for the precious things of the fruits of the sun, and for the precious things of the yield of the moons,
english: And for the precious things of the fruits of the sun, And for the precious things of the yield of the moons,

searchText: deuteronomy 33:15 and for the tops of the ancient mountains, and for the precious things of the everlasting hills,
english: And for the tops of the ancient mountains, And for the precious things of the everlasting hills,

searchText: deuteronomy 33:16 and for the precious things of the earth and the fulness thereof, and the good will of him that dwelt in the bush; let the blessing come upon the head of joseph, and upon the crown of the head of him that is prince among his brethren.
english: And for the precious things of the earth and the fulness thereof, And the good will of Him that dwelt in the bush; Let the blessing come upon the head of Joseph, And upon the crown of the head of him that is prince among his brethren.

searchText: deuteronomy 33:17 his firstling bullock, majesty is his; and his horns are the horns of the wild-ox; with them he shall gore the peoples all of them, even the ends of the earth; and they are the ten thousands of ephraim, and they are the thousands of manasseh.
english: His firstling bullock, majesty is his; And his horns are the horns of the wild-ox; With them he shall gore the peoples all of them, even the ends of the earth; And they are the ten thousands of Ephraim, And they are the thousands of Manasseh.

searchText: deuteronomy 33:18 and of zebulun he said: rejoice, zebulun, in thy going out, and, issachar, in thy tents.
english: And of Zebulun he said: Rejoice, Zebulun, in thy going out, And, Issachar, in thy tents.

searchText: deuteronomy 33:19 they shall call peoples unto the mountain; there shall they offer sacrifices of righteousness; for they shall suck the abundance of the seas, and the hidden treasures of the sand.
english: They shall call peoples unto the mountain; There shall they offer sacrifices of righteousness; For they shall suck the abundance of the seas, And the hidden treasures of the sand.

searchText: deuteronomy 33:20 and of gad he said: blessed be he that enlargeth gad; he dwelleth as a lioness, and teareth the arm, yea, the crown of the head.
english: And of Gad he said: Blessed be He that enlargeth Gad; He dwelleth as a lioness, And teareth the arm, yea, the crown of the head.

searchText: deuteronomy 33:21 and he chose a first part for himself, for there a portion of a ruler was reserved; and there came the heads of the people, he executed the righteousness of the lord, and his ordinances with israel. .
english: And he chose a first part for himself, For there a portion of a ruler was reserved; And there came the heads of the people, He executed the righteousness of the LORD, And His ordinances with Israel. .

searchText: deuteronomy 33:22 and of dan he said: dan is a lion’s whelp, that leapeth forth from bashan.
english: And of Dan he said: Dan is a lion’s whelp, That leapeth forth from Bashan.

searchText: deuteronomy 33:23 and of naphtali he said: o naphtali, satisfied with favour, and full with the blessing of the lord: possess thou the sea and the south.
english: And of Naphtali he said: O Naphtali, satisfied with favour, And full with the blessing of the LORD: Possess thou the sea and the south.

searchText: deuteronomy 33:24 and of asher he said: blessed be asher above sons; let him be the favoured of his brethren, and let him dip his foot in oil.
english: And of Asher he said: Blessed be Asher above sons; Let him be the favoured of his brethren, And let him dip his foot in oil.

searchText: deuteronomy 33:25 iron and brass shall be thy bars; and as thy days, so shall thy strength be.
english: Iron and brass shall be thy bars; And as thy days, so shall thy strength be.

searchText: deuteronomy 33:26 there is none like unto god, o jeshurun, who rideth upon the heaven as thy help, and in his excellency on the skies.
english: There is none like unto God, O Jeshurun, Who rideth upon the heaven as thy help, And in His excellency on the skies.

searchText: deuteronomy 33:27 the eternal god is a dwelling-place, and underneath are the everlasting arms; and he thrust out the enemy from before thee, and said: ‘destroy.’
english: The eternal God is a dwelling-place, And underneath are the everlasting arms; And He thrust out the enemy from before thee, And said: ‘Destroy.’

searchText: deuteronomy 33:28 and israel dwelleth in safety, the fountain of jacob alone, in a land of corn and wine; yea, his heavens drop down dew.
english: And Israel dwelleth in safety, The fountain of Jacob alone, In a land of corn and wine; Yea, his heavens drop down dew.

searchText: deuteronomy 33:29 happy art thou, o israel, who is like unto thee? a people saved by the lord, the shield of thy help, and that is the sword of thy excellency! and thine enemies shall dwindle away before thee; and thou shalt tread upon their high places.
english: Happy art thou, O Israel, who is like unto thee? A people saved by the LORD, The shield of thy help, And that is the sword of thy excellency! And thine enemies shall dwindle away before thee; And thou shalt tread upon their high places.

searchText: deuteronomy 34:1 and moses went up from the plains of moab unto mount nebo, to the top of pisgah, that is over against jericho. and the lord showed him all the land, even gilead as far as dan;
english: And Moses went up from the plains of Moab unto mount Nebo, to the top of Pisgah, that is over against Jericho. And the LORD showed him all the land, even Gilead as far as Dan;

searchText: deuteronomy 34:2 and all naphtali, and the land of ephraim and manasseh, and all the land of judah as far as the hinder sea;
english: and all Naphtali, and the land of Ephraim and Manasseh, and all the land of Judah as far as the hinder sea;

searchText: deuteronomy 34:3 and the south, and the plain, even the valley of jericho the city of palm-trees, as far as zoar.
english: and the South, and the Plain, even the valley of Jericho the city of palm-trees, as far as Zoar.

searchText: deuteronomy 34:4 and the lord said unto him: ‘this is the land which i swore unto abraham, unto isaac, and unto jacob, saying: i will give it unto thy seed; i have caused thee to see it with thine eyes, but thou shalt not go over thither.’
english: And the LORD said unto him: ‘This is the land which I swore unto Abraham, unto Isaac, and unto Jacob, saying: I will give it unto thy seed; I have caused thee to see it with thine eyes, but thou shalt not go over thither.’

searchText: deuteronomy 34:5 so moses the servant of the lord died there in the land of moab, according to the word of the lord.
english: So Moses the servant of the LORD died there in the land of Moab, according to the word of the LORD.

searchText: deuteronomy 34:6 and he was buried in the valley in the land of moab over against beth-peor; and no man knoweth of his sepulchre unto this day.
english: And he was buried in the valley in the land of Moab over against Beth-peor; and no man knoweth of his sepulchre unto this day.

searchText: deuteronomy 34:7 and moses was a hundred and twenty years old when he died: his eye was not dim, nor his natural force abated.
english: And Moses was a hundred and twenty years old when he died: his eye was not dim, nor his natural force abated.

searchText: deuteronomy 34:8 and the children of israel wept for moses in the plains of moab thirty days; so the days of weeping in the mourning for moses were ended.
english: And the children of Israel wept for Moses in the plains of Moab thirty days; so the days of weeping in the mourning for Moses were ended.

searchText: deuteronomy 34:9 and joshua the son of nun was full of the spirit of wisdom; for moses had laid his hands upon him; and the children of israel hearkened unto him, and did as the lord commanded moses.
english: And Joshua the son of Nun was full of the spirit of wisdom; for Moses had laid his hands upon him; and the children of Israel hearkened unto him, and did as the LORD commanded Moses.

searchText: deuteronomy 34:10 and there hath not arisen a prophet since in israel like unto moses, whom the lord knew face to face;
english: And there hath not arisen a prophet since in Israel like unto Moses, whom the LORD knew face to face;

searchText: deuteronomy 34:11 in all the signs and the wonders, which the lord sent him to do in the land of egypt, to pharaoh, and to all his servants, and to all his land;
english: in all the signs and the wonders, which the LORD sent him to do in the land of Egypt, to Pharaoh, and to all his servants, and to all his land;

searchText: deuteronomy 34:12 and in all the mighty hand, and in all the great terror, which moses wrought in the sight of all israel.
english: and in all the mighty hand, and in all the great terror, which Moses wrought in the sight of all Israel.
